Option Explicit

' =========================================================================
' UD¡LOST: PÿI ZAVÿENÕ SEäITU
' =========================================================================
Private Sub Workbook_BeforeClose(Cancel As Boolean)
    ' é·dnÈ hodiny k zastavenÌ
End Sub

' =========================================================================
' UD¡LOST: PÿI ZMÃNÃ NA LISTU (TIMESTAMP V A2)
' =========================================================================
Private Sub Workbook_SheetChange(ByVal Sh As Object, ByVal Target As Range)
    Static inProgress As Boolean
    Dim targetSheet As Worksheet
    
    On Error GoTo Cleanup
    
    ' Zabr·nit reentrantnÌmu vol·nÌ
    If inProgress Then Exit Sub
    inProgress = True
    
    ' Ignorovat zmÏny v A2 v jakÈmkoli listu
    If Not Intersect(Target, Sh.Range("A2")) Is Nothing Then GoTo Cleanup
    
    ' Ignorovat hromadnÈ zmÏny
    If Target.CountLarge > 1 Then GoTo Cleanup
    
    ' NajÌt cÌlov˝ list "OBECN… INFORMACE"
    On Error Resume Next
    Set targetSheet = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If targetSheet Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "List 'OBECN… INFORMACE' nebyl nalezen!", vbExclamation
        GoTo Cleanup
    End If
    
    ' Vypnout ud·losti pro zabr·nÏnÌ zacyklenÌ
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    
    ' Aktualizovat pouze buÚku A2 v cÌlovÈm listu
    With targetSheet.Range("A2")
        .Value = Now
        .NumberFormat = "dd.mm.yyyy h:mm"
        .Font.Name = "Arial"
        .Font.size = 13
        .Font.Bold = True
        .Font.Color = RGB(255, 0, 0)
        .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter
        .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
    End With

Cleanup:
    ' Obnovit ud·losti
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    inProgress = False
    Exit Sub
End Sub

' =========================================================================
' UD¡LOST: AKTUALIZACE KONTINGEN»NÕ TABULKY (GRAF + BARVY)
' =========================================================================
Private Sub Workbook_SheetPivotTableUpdate(ByVal Sh As Object, ByVal Target As PivotTable)
    
    ' === KONSTANTY ===
    Const NAZEV_LISTU_S_GRAFEM As String = "OBECN… INFORMACE"
    Const NAZEV_ZDROJOVE_TABULKY As String = "PivotGrafEpizody"
    Const NAZEV_GRAFU As String = "PivotEpizody"
    ' =================
    
    Dim chartSheet As Worksheet
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject
    Dim srs As Series
    Dim trnd As Trendline
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro barvenÌ
    Dim vValues As Variant
    Dim i As Long
    Dim val As Double
    Dim pt As Point
    
    ' 1. Reagujeme POUZE na spr·vnou tabulku
    If Target.Name = NAZEV_ZDROJOVE_TABULKY Then
    
        On Error Resume Next
        
        ' 2. NajÌt list
        Set chartSheet = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(NAZEV_LISTU_S_GRAFEM)
        If chartSheet Is Nothing Then Exit Sub

        ' 3. NajÌt graf
        Set chtObj = chartSheet.ChartObjects(NAZEV_GRAFU)
        If chtObj Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
        
        ' 4. ZÌskat sÈrii dat
        Set srs = chtObj.Chart.SeriesCollection(1)
        If srs Is Nothing Then Exit Sub

        ' --- »¡ST A: SPOJNICE TRENDU (EXISTUJÕCÕ LOGIKA) ---
        ' Smazat starÈ
        Do While srs.Trendlines.count > 0
            srs.Trendlines(1).Delete
        Loop
        
        ' P¯idat novou, pokud je dost dat
        If srs.Points.count > 1 Then
            Set trnd = srs.Trendlines.Add(Type:=xlPolynomial, Order:=6, Name:="Polyn. (Celkem)")
            With trnd.Format.line
                .Visible = msoTrue
                .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 0, 0) ' »erven·
            End With
        End If
        
        ' --- »¡ST B: OBARVENÕ SLOUPCŸ (NOV¡ LOGIKA) ---
        ' NaËteme vöechny hodnoty do pole pro rychlejöÌ zpracov·nÌ
        vValues = srs.values
        
        For i = 1 To srs.Points.count
            ' ZÌsk·nÌ hodnoty bodu
            val = CDbl(vValues(i))
            Set pt = srs.Points(i)
            
            ' Aplikace barev podle striktnÌch rozsah˘
            Select Case val
                Case 5 To 5.75
                    ' 633974 -> RGB(99, 57, 116)
                    pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(99, 57, 116)
                    
                Case 6 To 6.75
                    ' f39c12 -> RGB(243, 156, 18)
                    pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(243, 156, 18)
                    
                Case 7 To 7.75
                    ' f4d03f -> RGB(244, 208, 63)
                    pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(244, 208, 63)
                    
                Case 8 To 8.75
                    ' 28b463 -> RGB(40, 180, 99)
                    pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(40, 180, 99)
                    
                Case 9 To 9.5
                    ' 186a3b -> RGB(24, 106, 59)
                    pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(24, 106, 59)
                    
                Case 9.75 To 10
                    ' 1da1f2 -> RGB(29, 161, 242)
                    pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(29, 161, 242)
                    
                Case Else
                    ' Hodnoty mimo rozsahy (nap¯. 5.8, 6.9, <5) z˘stanou v p˘vodnÌ barvÏ grafu
            End Select
        Next i
        
        On Error GoTo 0
    End If
End Sub
--- KONEC K”DU [ThisWorkbook] ---

Private Sub Worksheet_Activate()
    ' Automaticky aktualizuje statistiky pokaûdÈ, kdyû na tento list klikneö
    AktualizovatPWTStats        ' Aktualizuje star˝ PWT box
    AktualizovatFuturesStats    ' Aktualizuje nov˝ Futures box
End Sub

Modul: Graphs_Studios
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Graphs_Studios] ---
Option Explicit

'================================================================================================
'##### HLAVNÕ SPOUäTÃCÕ MAKRO (CENTRALIZOVAN¡ DATA - OPTIMALIZOV¡NO) #####
'================================================================================================
Public Sub AktualizovatVsechnyGrafyStudii()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Dim wsData As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim arrHlavniData As Variant
    Dim dictAgregovanaData As Object ' Scripting.Dictionary
    
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    
    ' óóó OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ (START) óóó
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = False
        .Calculation = xlCalculationManual
        .EnableEvents = False
    End With
    
    ' óóó KROK 1: JEDNOR¡ZOV… NA»TENÕ VäECH DAT DO PAMÃTI óóó
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row ' C je N·zev anime
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        MsgBox "é·dn· data k zobrazenÌ.", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    ' NaËteme sloupec E (Studia) a K (HodnocenÌ) -> Range A:K
    arrHlavniData = wsData.Range("A1:K" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' óóó KROK 2: JEDNOR¡ZOV¡ AGREGACE DAT PRO GRAFY óóó
    ' V˝stupem je Dictionary, kde Key = Studio a Value = Array(CountTotal, SumRating, RatedCount)
    Set dictAgregovanaData = AgregovatDataStudii(arrHlavniData)
    
    If dictAgregovanaData.count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "é·dn· platn· data pro grafy studiÌ.", vbInformation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    ' óóó KROK 3: PÿED¡NÕ AGREGOVANðCH DAT PROCEDUR¡M óóó
    Call VytvorGrafStudii_Pie(dictAgregovanaData, wsData)
    Call VytvorGrafStudii_Best(dictAgregovanaData)
    Call VytvorGrafStudii_Scatter(dictAgregovanaData)
    
    ' óóó KROK 4: SPUäTÃNÕ TECHNICK… ANALðZY (ANIMACE/CGI) óóó
    ' Toto makro m· vlastnÌ logiku ËtenÌ (koment·¯e), takûe ho vol·me zvl·öù,
    ' ale je souË·stÌ "Aktualizovat Vöe".
    Call AktualizovatDataStudiiTech
    
CleanExit:
    ' óóó OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ (KONEC) óóó
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    MsgBox "Kritick· chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### POMOCN¡ FUNKCE: AGREGACE DAT STUDIÕ (JEDINð PRŸCHOD) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Function AgregovatDataStudii(dataArr As Variant) As Object
    Dim dict As Object
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    Dim strStudios As String, arrS As Variant, studio As String
    Dim valHodnoceni As Variant
    Dim arrStats As Variant
    
    ' Indexy v poli dataArr (A..K):
    ' 5 = E (Studio)
    ' 11 = K (HodnocenÌ)
    
    For i = 2 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        strStudios = CStr(dataArr(i, 5))
        
        If Len(strStudios) > 0 Then
            arrS = Split(strStudios, ";")
            
            For j = LBound(arrS) To UBound(arrS)
                studio = Trim(arrS(j))
                
                If Len(studio) > 0 Then
                    ' Inicializace pole pro novÈ studio
                    If Not dict.Exists(studio) Then
                        ' Array(CountTotal=0, SumRating=0, RatedCount=0)
                        dict(studio) = Array(0, 0#, 0)
                    End If
                    
                    arrStats = dict(studio)
                    
                    ' 1. CountTotal (pro Pie Chart)
                    arrStats(0) = arrStats(0) + 1
                    
                    ' 2. Rating (pro Best Bar Chart)
                    valHodnoceni = dataArr(i, 11)
                    If IsNumeric(valHodnoceni) And Not IsEmpty(valHodnoceni) Then
                        arrStats(1) = arrStats(1) + CDbl(valHodnoceni) ' Suma hodnocenÌ
                        arrStats(2) = arrStats(2) + 1                  ' PoËet hodnocen˝ch
                    End If
                    
                    dict(studio) = arrStats ' Aktualizace v dictionary
                End If
            Next j
        End If
    Next i
    
    Set AgregovatDataStudii = dict
End Function

'================================================================================================
'##### GRAF 1: PIE-CHART (»ETNOST STUDIÕ) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorGrafStudii_Pie(dictData As Object, wsData As Worksheet)
    Dim wsChart As Worksheet
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    Dim i As Long, p As Long
    Dim keysArr As Variant, valsArr As Variant
    Dim pieKeys() As String, pieCnts() As Double
    Dim otherCnt As Double
    Dim totalPie As Double
    Dim arrStats As Variant
    
    Const THRESHOLD_PIE As Long = 4
    
    Set wsChart = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    ' P¯Ìprava dat pro Pie Chart
    keysArr = dictData.keys
    
    ' Filtrace "OstatnÌ"
    ReDim pieKeys(0 To UBound(keysArr))
    ReDim pieCnts(0 To UBound(keysArr))
    otherCnt = 0: p = 0
    
    For i = 0 To UBound(keysArr)
        arrStats = dictData(keysArr(i))
        Dim currentCount As Long
        currentCount = arrStats(0) ' CountTotal
        
        If currentCount >= THRESHOLD_PIE Then
            pieKeys(p) = keysArr(i)
            pieCnts(p) = currentCount
            p = p + 1
        Else
            otherCnt = otherCnt + currentCount
        End If
    Next i
    
    If otherCnt > 0 Then
        pieKeys(p) = "OstatnÌ Studia"
        pieCnts(p) = otherCnt
        p = p + 1
    End If
    
    ReDim Preserve pieKeys(0 To p - 1)
    ReDim Preserve pieCnts(0 To p - 1)
    
    ' Bubble Sort (Descending Count)
    Dim s As Long, t As Long, tmpKey As String, tmpCnt As Double
    For s = 0 To p - 2
        For t = s + 1 To p - 1
            If pieCnts(t) > pieCnts(s) Then
                tmpCnt = pieCnts(s): pieCnts(s) = pieCnts(t): pieCnts(t) = tmpCnt
                tmpKey = pieKeys(s): pieKeys(s) = pieKeys(t): pieKeys(t) = tmpKey
            End If
        Next t
    Next s
    
    ' Tvorba/Aktualizace grafu
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafStudiiPop")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(100, 350, 400, 300)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafStudiiPop"
        With chtObj.Chart
            .ChartType = xlPie
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "»etnost Anime StudiÌ"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False: .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        End With
    End If
    
    Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .XValues = pieKeys
        .values = pieCnts
        
        totalPie = Application.WorksheetFunction.Sum(pieCnts)
        
        For i = 1 To .Points.count
            .Points(i).HasDataLabel = True
            With .Points(i).DataLabel
                .text = pieKeys(i - 1) & ": " & pieCnts(i - 1) & " (" & Replace(Format(pieCnts(i - 1) / totalPie, "0.0%"), ".", ",") & ")"
                .Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .Font.size = 10
            End With
        Next i
    End With
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### GRAF 2: BAR-CHART (TOP 10 DLE HODNOCENÕ) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorGrafStudii_Best(dictData As Object)
    Dim wsChart As Worksheet
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    Dim i As Long
    Dim keysArr As Variant
    Dim arrStats As Variant
    Dim tmpArr() As Variant, mCount As Long
    Dim bestKeys() As String, bestAvgs() As Double
    Dim actualN As Long
    
    Const MIN_COUNT As Long = 4
    Const TOP_N As Long = 10
    
    Set wsChart = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    keysArr = dictData.keys
    
    ' Filtrace (Minimum hodnocenÌ)
    mCount = 0
    For i = 0 To UBound(keysArr)
        arrStats = dictData(keysArr(i))
        ' arrStats(2) je RatedCount
        If arrStats(2) >= MIN_COUNT Then mCount = mCount + 1
    Next i
    
    If mCount = 0 Then Exit Sub ' é·dn· data pro bar chart
    
    ReDim tmpArr(1 To mCount, 1 To 2)
    mCount = 0
    For i = 0 To UBound(keysArr)
        arrStats = dictData(keysArr(i))
        If arrStats(2) >= MIN_COUNT Then
            mCount = mCount + 1
            tmpArr(mCount, 1) = keysArr(i)
            ' Average = SumRating (1) / RatedCount (2)
            tmpArr(mCount, 2) = arrStats(1) / arrStats(2)
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' QuickSort (SestupnÏ dle hodnocenÌ)
    If mCount > 1 Then QuickSort2D tmpArr, 1, mCount
    
    ' Top N v˝bÏr
    actualN = Application.Min(mCount, TOP_N)
    ReDim bestKeys(0 To actualN - 1)
    ReDim bestAvgs(0 To actualN - 1)
    
    For i = 1 To actualN
        bestKeys(i - 1) = tmpArr(i, 1)
        bestAvgs(i - 1) = tmpArr(i, 2)
    Next i
    
    ' Tvorba/Aktualizace grafu
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafStudiiBest")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(550, 350, 400, 300) ' Sou¯adnice p¯izp˘sobit
        chtObj.Name = "GrafStudiiBest"
        With chtObj.Chart
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Top " & actualN & " studiÌ podle pr˘m. hodnocenÌ"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False
            .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            
            With .SeriesCollection(1).DataLabels
                .ShowValue = True
                .NumberFormat = "0.00"
                .Position = xlLabelPositionOutsideEnd
            End With
            
            With .Axes(xlValue)
                .HasTitle = True: .AxisTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ"
            End With
            .Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Orientation = xlUpward
        End With
    End If
    
    Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    
    ' Aktualizace dat - Pouze hodnoty
    ' P˘vodnÌ kÛd neresetoval form·tov·nÌ popisk˘ p¯i aktualizaci
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .values = bestAvgs
        .XValues = bestKeys
    End With
    
     ' Aktualizace titulku, pokud se poËet zmÏnil
    cht.HasTitle = True
    cht.ChartTitle.text = "Top " & actualN & " studiÌ podle pr˘m. hodnocenÌ"
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### TECHNICK¡ ANALðZA (ANIMACE/CGI) - OPRAVENO PRO SPR¡VNOU TVORBU TABULKY #####
'================================================================================================
Public Sub AktualizovatDataStudiiTech()
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet, wsDest As Worksheet, wsInfo As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim arrSource As Variant
    Dim cmtText As String
    
    ' Regex objekty
    Dim reCat As Object, matches As Object, match As Object
    
    ' PomocnÈ promÏnnÈ
    Dim rawScore As Double
    Dim studioList As Variant, singleStudio As Variant, cleanSt As String
    Dim dictCounts As Object   ' PoËÌtadlo kolikr·t se studio objevilo (pro filtr MIN_STUDIO_COUNT)
    
    ' === POLE PRO SBÃR DAT (JAKO V INSPIRA»NÕM MODULU) ===
    Dim dataArray() As Variant
    Dim arrRow As Long
    Dim estimatedRows As Long
    
    ' Optimalizace koment·¯˘
    Dim dictComments As Object
    Dim cmt As Comment
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro fin·lnÌ filtrovan˝ v˝stup
    Dim arrFinal() As Variant
    Dim finalCount As Long
    Dim bufferItem As Variant
    Dim j As Long
    
    Const MIN_STUDIO_COUNT As Long = 4
    
    ' óóó 1. INICIALIZACE óóó
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    
    Set wsSource = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsDest = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("MAL Cache + Interactive Rating")
    Set wsInfo = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    ' Regex: Pattern bere "Kategorie -> »Ìslo"
    Set reCat = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    With reCat
        .Global = True
        .IgnoreCase = True
        .Pattern = "([^->]+?)\s*->\s*([\d,./]+)"
    End With
    
    Set dictCounts = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' óóó 2. NA»TENÕ KOMENT¡ÿŸ ZE SLOUPCE K (JAKO V INSPIRA»NÕM MODULU) óóó
    ' DŸLEéIT…: Bereme pouze koment·¯e ze sloupce K, ne z jakÈhokoliv sloupce!
    Set dictComments = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    For Each cmt In wsSource.Comments
        ' Kontrola, ûe koment·¯ je ve sloupci K (11)
        If cmt.Parent.Column = 11 Then
            dictComments(cmt.Parent.row) = cmt.text
        End If
    Next cmt
    
    ' óóó 3. NA»TENÕ DAT óóó
    lastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then GoTo CleanExit
    
    arrSource = wsSource.Range("A1:K" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' óóó 4. PÿÕPRAVA DATOV…HO POLE (JAKO V INSPIRA»NÕM MODULU) óóó
    estimatedRows = lastRow * 10 ' Odhad: 10 z·znam˘ na anime (Animace + CGI pro vÌce studiÌ)
    If estimatedRows < 500 Then estimatedRows = 500
    
    ' Pole: 3 sloupce (Studio, Kategorie, HodnocenÌ), N ¯·dk˘
    ReDim dataArray(1 To 3, 1 To estimatedRows)
    arrRow = 1
    
    ' óóó 5. PRŸCHOD DATY A SBÃR DO POLE óóó
    For i = 2 To UBound(arrSource, 1)
        If Len(arrSource(i, 3)) > 0 And Len(arrSource(i, 5)) > 0 Then
            If dictComments.Exists(i) Then
                cmtText = dictComments(i)
                Dim startPos As Long, endPos As Long, catBlock As String
                startPos = InStr(1, cmtText, "HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:", vbTextCompare)
                
                If startPos > 0 Then
                    startPos = startPos + Len("HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:")
                    endPos = InStr(startPos, cmtText, "Pr˘mÏrnÈ v·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ:", vbTextCompare)
                    If endPos = 0 Then endPos = Len(cmtText) + 1
                    catBlock = Trim(Mid(cmtText, startPos, endPos - startPos))
                    
                    If reCat.Test(catBlock) Then
                        Set matches = reCat.Execute(catBlock)
                        For Each match In matches
                            Dim combinedCategoryNames As String, scoreStr As String
                            combinedCategoryNames = CleanString(match.SubMatches(0))
                            scoreStr = Trim(match.SubMatches(1))
                            
                            ' Parsov·nÌ skÛre (stejnÏ jako v inspiraËnÌm modulu)
                            Dim scorePart As String
                            On Error Resume Next
                            scorePart = Trim(Split(scoreStr, "/")(0))
                            scorePart = Replace(scorePart, ",", ".")
                            On Error GoTo ErrHandler
                            
                            rawScore = val(scorePart)
                            If rawScore <= 0 Or rawScore > 10 Then GoTo SkipMatch
                            
                            ' KLÕ»OV¡ OPRAVA: RozdÏlenÌ kombinovan˝ch kategoriÌ jako "Animace/CGI"
                            Dim singleCategories As Variant, singleCat As Variant
                            singleCategories = Split(combinedCategoryNames, "/")
                            
                            For Each singleCat In singleCategories
                                Dim catName As String
                                catName = Trim(singleCat)
                                
                                ' Kontrola, zda je kategorie Animace nebo CGI
                                If LCase(catName) = "animace" Or LCase(catName) = "cgi" Then
                                    studioList = Split(arrSource(i, 5), ";")
                                    For Each singleStudio In studioList
                                        cleanSt = Trim(singleStudio)
                                        If Len(cleanSt) > 0 Then
                                            ' PoËÌt·me v˝skyty studia pro pozdÏjöÌ filtraci
                                            dictCounts(cleanSt) = dictCounts(cleanSt) + 1
                                            
                                            ' Kontrola velikosti pole
                                            If arrRow > UBound(dataArray, 2) Then
                                                ReDim Preserve dataArray(1 To 3, 1 To UBound(dataArray, 2) + 500)
                                            End If
                                            
                                            ' Z·pis do pole (SLOUPEC, ÿ¡DEK)
                                            dataArray(1, arrRow) = cleanSt
                                            dataArray(2, arrRow) = catName
                                            dataArray(3, arrRow) = rawScore
                                            arrRow = arrRow + 1
                                        End If
                                    Next singleStudio
                                End If
                            Next singleCat
SkipMatch:
                        Next match
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' óóó 6. FILTROV¡NÕ DLE MIN_STUDIO_COUNT A PÿÕPRAVA VðSTUPU óóó
    If arrRow <= 1 Then GoTo CleanExit ' é·dn· data
    
    ' Nejprve spoËÌt·me, kolik z·znam˘ projde filtrem
    finalCount = 0
    For j = 1 To arrRow - 1
        If dictCounts(dataArray(1, j)) >= MIN_STUDIO_COUNT Then
            finalCount = finalCount + 1
        End If
    Next j
    
    If finalCount = 0 Then GoTo CleanExit ' é·dn· studia nesplÚujÌ MIN_STUDIO_COUNT
    
    ' Vytvo¯Ìme fin·lnÌ pole (¯·dky, sloupce) pro z·pis na list
    ReDim arrFinal(1 To finalCount, 1 To 3)
    Dim writeRow As Long
    writeRow = 1
    
    For j = 1 To arrRow - 1
        If dictCounts(dataArray(1, j)) >= MIN_STUDIO_COUNT Then
            arrFinal(writeRow, 1) = dataArray(1, j) ' Studio
            arrFinal(writeRow, 2) = dataArray(2, j) ' Kategorie
            arrFinal(writeRow, 3) = dataArray(3, j) ' HodnocenÌ
            writeRow = writeRow + 1
        End If
    Next j
    
    ' óóó 7. Z¡PIS VðSLEDKŸ A TVORBA TABULKY óóó
    Dim tbl As ListObject
    
    With wsDest
        ' VyËistÌme oblast
        On Error Resume Next
        .ListObjects("TabulkaStudiaTech").Delete
        On Error GoTo ErrHandler
        .Range("AV:AX").ClearContents
        
        ' HlaviËky
        .Range("AV1").Value = "Studio"
        .Range("AW1").Value = "Tech. Kategorie"
        .Range("AX1").Value = "HodnocenÌ"
        
        ' Z·pis dat
        .Range("AV2").Resize(finalCount, 3).Value = arrFinal
        
        ' Vytvo¯enÌ tabulky
        Set tbl = .ListObjects.Add(xlSrcRange, .Range("AV1").Resize(finalCount + 1, 3), , xlYes)
        tbl.Name = "TabulkaStudiaTech"
        tbl.TableStyle = "TableStyleMedium2"
        .Columns("AX").NumberFormat = "0.00"
    End With
    
    ' óóó 8. AKTUALIZACE PIVOT TABULKY A GRAFU óóó
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim chartObj As ChartObject
    Set chartObj = wsInfo.ChartObjects("Pivot_Graph_Animace_CGI")
    
    If Not chartObj Is Nothing Then
        chartObj.Chart.PivotLayout.PivotTable.PivotCache.Refresh
    Else
        Dim pt As PivotTable
        For Each pt In wsDest.PivotTables
            pt.PivotCache.Refresh
        Next pt
    End If
    
    Set pt = Nothing
    Set pt = wsDest.PivotTables("PivotStudiaTech")
    If Not pt Is Nothing Then
        pt.PivotFields("Studio").AutoSort xlAscending, "Pr˘mÏr z HodnocenÌ"
    End If
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler

CleanExit:
    Erase dataArray
    Erase arrFinal
    Set dictCounts = Nothing
    Set dictComments = Nothing
    Set reCat = Nothing
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Exit Sub
    
ErrHandler:
    Erase dataArray
    Erase arrFinal
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    MsgBox "Chyba v 'AktualizovatDataStudiiTech': " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' POMOCN… FUNKCE
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub QuickSort2D(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal inLow As Long, ByVal inHi As Long)
    Dim pivot As Double
    Dim tmp1 As Variant, tmp2 As Variant
    Dim tmpLow As Long, tmpHi As Long

    tmpLow = inLow
    tmpHi = inHi
    pivot = arr((inLow + inHi) \ 2, 2)

    While (tmpLow <= tmpHi)
        While (arr(tmpLow, 2) > pivot And tmpLow < inHi)
            tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
        Wend
        While (pivot > arr(tmpHi, 2) And tmpHi > inLow)
            tmpHi = tmpHi - 1
        Wend

        If (tmpLow <= tmpHi) Then
            tmp1 = arr(tmpLow, 1): arr(tmpLow, 1) = arr(tmpHi, 1): arr(tmpHi, 1) = tmp1
            tmp2 = arr(tmpLow, 2): arr(tmpLow, 2) = arr(tmpHi, 2): arr(tmpHi, 2) = tmp2
            tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
            tmpHi = tmpHi - 1
        End If
    Wend

    If (inLow < tmpHi) Then QuickSort2D arr, inLow, tmpHi
    If (tmpLow < inHi) Then QuickSort2D arr, tmpLow, inHi
End Sub

Private Function CleanString(ByVal txt As String) As String
    txt = Replace(txt, ",", "")
    txt = Replace(txt, ".", "")
    txt = Replace(txt, ":", "")
    txt = Replace(txt, vbCr, "")
    txt = Replace(txt, vbLf, "")
    txt = Replace(txt, vbTab, "")
    CleanString = Trim(txt)
End Function

'================================================================================================
'##### GRAF 3: SCATTER-CHART (OPTIMALIZOV¡NO: GHOSTING & LAZY WRITE) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorGrafStudii_Scatter(dictData As Object)
    Dim wsChart As Worksheet
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    Dim i As Long
    Dim keysArr As Variant
    Dim arrStats As Variant
    Dim ser As Series
    
    ' --- KONFIGURACE ---
    Const SCATTER_COLOR As Long = 65535
    Const MIN_COUNT_SCATTER As Long = 4
    
    ' --- 1. PÿÕPRAVA DAT DO SLOVNÕKU ---
    Dim dictScatterData As Object
    Set dictScatterData = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    keysArr = dictData.keys
    Dim currentCount As Long, currentSum As Double, ratedCount As Long
    Dim avgRating As Double
    Dim studioName As String
    
    For i = 0 To UBound(keysArr)
        arrStats = dictData(keysArr(i))
        currentCount = arrStats(0)
        currentSum = arrStats(1)
        ratedCount = arrStats(2)
        
        If ratedCount >= MIN_COUNT_SCATTER Then
            studioName = keysArr(i)
            avgRating = currentSum / ratedCount
            dictScatterData(studioName) = Array(currentCount, avgRating)
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictScatterData.count = 0 Then Exit Sub

    ' --- 2. ZÕSK¡NÕ NEBO VYTVOÿENÕ GRAFU ---
    Set wsChart = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafStudiiScatter")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(100, 670, 600, 400)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafStudiiScatter"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlXYScatter
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Kvantita vs. Kvalita (Studia 4+ titul˘)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False
            
            With .Axes(xlCategory)
                .HasTitle = True: .AxisTitle.text = "PoËet titul˘ (KVANTITA)"
                .MinimumScaleIsAuto = True
            End With
            With .Axes(xlValue)
                .HasTitle = True: .AxisTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ (KVALITA)"
                .MinimumScale = 4: .MaximumScale = 10
            End With
        End With
    Else
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 1 Then
             If InStr(1, cht.SeriesCollection(1).Name, "Studia") > 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection(1).Delete
        End If
    End If
    
    ' --- 3. OPTIMALIZACE "GHOSTING" (SkrytÌ grafu pro zrychlenÌ) ---
    Dim wasVisible As Boolean
    wasVisible = chtObj.Visible
    chtObj.Visible = False ' <--- TOTO EXTR…MNÃ ZRYCHLÕ PRŸBÃH
    
    ' --- 4. SYNCHRONIZACE S…RIÕ ---
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Dim serName As String
    Dim newData As Variant
    
    ' A) Aktualizace a Maz·nÌ
    For i = cht.SeriesCollection.count To 1 Step -1
        Set ser = cht.SeriesCollection(i)
        serName = ser.Name
        
        If dictScatterData.Exists(serName) Then
            newData = dictScatterData(serName)
            
            ' --- LAZY WRITE (Z·pis jen p¯i zmÏnÏ) ---
            Dim oldX As Variant, oldY As Variant
            Dim needsUpdate As Boolean: needsUpdate = True
            
            oldX = ser.XValues
            oldY = ser.values
            
            ' Kontrola, zda data v grafu odpovÌdajÌ nov˝m dat˘m
            If IsArray(oldX) And IsArray(oldY) Then
                If UBound(oldX) >= 1 And UBound(oldY) >= 1 Then
                    ' Excel vracÌ pole indexovanÈ od 1, Array() od 0
                    If oldX(1) = newData(0) And oldY(1) = newData(1) Then
                        needsUpdate = False
                    End If
                End If
            End If
            
            If needsUpdate Then
                ser.XValues = Array(newData(0))
                ser.values = Array(newData(1))
            End If
            ' ---------------------------------------
            
            ' --- ZDE JE OPRAVA: VéDY AKTUALIZOVAT BARVU ---
            ' I kdyû se nezmÏnÌ data, barva se musÌ p¯epsat, kdyby se zmÏnila konstanta
            ser.MarkerBackgroundColor = SCATTER_COLOR
            ser.MarkerForegroundColor = SCATTER_COLOR
            ' ----------------------------------------------
            
            dictScatterData.Remove serName
        Else
            ser.Delete
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' B) P¯id·nÌ nov˝ch studiÌ
    Dim key As Variant
    For Each key In dictScatterData.keys
        studioName = key
        newData = dictScatterData(studioName)
        
        Set ser = cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        With ser
            .Name = studioName
            .XValues = Array(newData(0))
            .values = Array(newData(1))
            
            .MarkerBackgroundColor = SCATTER_COLOR
            .MarkerForegroundColor = SCATTER_COLOR
            .MarkerStyle = xlMarkerStyleCircle
            .MarkerSize = 7
            
            .HasDataLabels = True
            With .DataLabels
                .ShowSeriesName = True
                .ShowValue = False
                .Position = xlLabelPositionAbove
                .Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
                .Font.size = 9
            End With
        End With
    Next key
    
    ' --- 5. OBNOVENÕ VIDITELNOSTI ---
    cht.HasLegend = False
    chtObj.Visible = wasVisible ' <--- ZOBRAZÕME HOTOVð GRAF
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
End Sub
--- KONEC K”DU [Graphs_Studios] ---

Modul: Graphs_Seasons_Age
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Graphs_Seasons_Age] ---
'================================================================================================
'##### HLAVNÕ SPOUäTÃCÕ MAKRO #####
'================================================================================================
Public Sub AktualizovatVsechnyGrafy()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    ' óóó OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ (CENTR¡LNÕ ÿÕZENÕ) óóó
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = False
        .Calculation = xlCalculationManual
        .EnableEvents = False
    End With
    
    ' Zavol· prvnÌ proceduru pro vytvo¯enÌ graf˘ VÏk/SezÛna
    Call VytvorGrafyVekuSezony
    
    ' Zavol· druhou proceduru pro vytvo¯enÌ grafu HodnocenÌ v Ëase
    Call CreateFavoriteYearsChart_The_Final_One
    
    ' Zavol· t¯etÌ proceduru pro vytvo¯enÌ p¯ehledu NejlepöÌch sezÛn
    Call VytvorPrehled_NejlepsiSezony
    
    ' óóó OBNOVENÕ PROSTÿEDÕ óóó
CleanExit:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    
    'MsgBox "Vöechny grafy byly ˙spÏönÏ aktualizov·ny!", vbInformation, "Hotovo"
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "Nastala chyba p¯i aktualizaci graf˘: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume CleanExit
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### TVORBA TLA»ÕTKA #####
'================================================================================================
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' TlaËÌtko pro grafy VÏk/SezÛna (v buÚce AI1)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Public Sub VytvorTlacitkoGrafVekuSezony()
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim rng As Range
    Dim btn As Shape
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Set rng = ws.Range("AI1") ' UmÌstÏnÌ tlaËÌtka
    
    rng.ColumnWidth = 27.14
    rng.RowHeight = 24.75
    
    ' Smazat starÈ tlaËÌtko, pokud existuje
    On Error Resume Next
        ws.Shapes("btnAktualizaceVekSezona").Delete
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    
    ' Vytvo¯it novÈ tlaËÌtko
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = "btnAktualizaceVekSezona"
        ' TlaËÌtko nynÌ vol· hlavnÌ makro, kterÈ spustÌ vöe ostatnÌ
        .OnAction = "AktualizovatVsechnyGrafy"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89) ' Ponech·na ZELEN¡ barva z inspirace
        With .line
            .Visible = msoTrue
            .weight = 1.5
            .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        End With
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat grafy"
            With .TextRange.Font
                .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True
            End With
            With .TextRange.Font.Fill
                .Visible = msoTrue
                .Solid
                .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
        End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
    End With
    
    Exit Sub
    
ErrBtn:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i vytv·¯enÌ tlaËÌtka VÏk/SezÛna: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### PROCEDURA 1: GRAFY VÃK/SEZ”NA (THE ABSOLUTE PEAK PERFORMANCE) #####
'================================================================================================
Public Sub VytvorGrafyVekuSezony()
    On Error GoTo Chyba

    ' --- DEKLARACE PROMÃNNðCH ---
    Dim wsData As Worksheet, wsChart As Worksheet
    Dim chtAge As ChartObject, chtSez As ChartObject
    Dim chtAgeAvg As ChartObject ' P¯ejmenov·no z chtSezAvg
    
    Dim leftAge As Double, topAge As Double, wAge As Double, hAge As Double
    Dim leftSez As Double, topSez As Double, wSez As Double, hSez As Double
    Dim leftAvg As Double, topAvg As Double, wAvg As Double, hAvg As Double
    
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim dataArr As Variant
    Dim valDate As Variant, valRating As Variant
    
    Dim todayDate As Date
    Dim d As Date, daysDiff As Long
    Dim sGrp As Long
    
    Dim cntAge(1 To 4) As Long
    Dim cntSez(1 To 4) As Long
    Dim cntAgeRated(1 To 4) As Long ' PoËet hodnocen˝ch anime v age-group
    Dim sumAge(1 To 4) As Double    ' Suma hodnocenÌ pro age-group
    Dim seasonColors(1 To 4) As Long
    
    Dim ageLabels(1 To 4) As String, sezLabels(1 To 4) As String
    Dim totalAge As Long, totalSez As Long
    
    ' --- INITIALIZACE ---
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsChart = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    todayDate = Date
    For i = 1 To 4: seasonColors(i) = -1: Next i

    ' óóó OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ (ÿÕZENO Z HLAVNÕHO MAKRA) óóó
    ' With Application ... End With - ODSTRANÃNO

    ' --- MAZ¡NÕ / PÿÕPRAVA GRAFŸ ---
    On Error Resume Next
        wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafPrumerneHodnoceniVeku").Delete
    On Error GoTo Chyba
    
    On Error Resume Next
      Set chtAge = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafAnimeVeku")
      Set chtSez = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafAnimeSezony")
      ' ZkusÌme najÌt nov˝ n·zev, pokud ne, zkusÌme star˝ a p¯ejmenujeme
      Set chtAgeAvg = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafPrumerVeku")
      If chtAgeAvg Is Nothing Then
          Set chtAgeAvg = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafPrumerSezony")
          If Not chtAgeAvg Is Nothing Then chtAgeAvg.Name = "GrafPrumerVeku"
      End If
    On Error GoTo 0

    ' Pozice Grafu VÏk
    If Not chtAge Is Nothing Then
        leftAge = chtAge.left: topAge = chtAge.top: wAge = chtAge.Width: hAge = chtAge.Height
    Else
        leftAge = 100: topAge = 700: wAge = 400: hAge = 300
    End If
    
    ' Pozice Grafu SezÛn
    If Not chtSez Is Nothing Then
        leftSez = chtSez.left: topSez = chtSez.top: wSez = chtSez.Width: hSez = chtSez.Height
    Else
        leftSez = 550: topSez = 700: wSez = 300: hSez = 300
    End If
    
    ' Pozice Grafu Pr˘mÏrnÈho HodnocenÌ VÏku (pod grafem SezÛn)
    If Not chtAgeAvg Is Nothing Then
        leftAvg = chtAgeAvg.left: topAvg = chtAgeAvg.top: wAvg = chtAgeAvg.Width: hAvg = chtAgeAvg.Height
    Else
        leftAvg = leftSez
        topAvg = topSez + hSez + 20 ' 20 bod˘ pod grafem sezÛn
        wAvg = wSez
        hAvg = hSez
    End If

    ageLabels(1) = "0ñ2 roky": sezLabels(1) = "Winter"
    ageLabels(2) = "2ñ5 let": sezLabels(2) = "Spring"
    ageLabels(3) = "5ñ15 let": sezLabels(3) = "Summer"
    ageLabels(4) = "15+ let": sezLabels(4) = "Fall"

    ' --- NA»TENÕ DAT DO PAMÃTI ---
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "F").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then GoTo Konec
    
    ' NaËÌt·me data od F do K (F=1, K=6 v poli dataArr)
    dataArr = wsData.Range("F2:K" & lastRow).Value

    ' --- HLAVNÕ SMY»KA (MATEMATICK¡ OPTIMALIZACE) ---
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        valDate = dataArr(i, 1) ' Sloupec F
        valRating = dataArr(i, 6) ' Sloupec K
        
        If IsDate(valDate) Then
            d = valDate
            daysDiff = todayDate - d
            
            ' 1) VÏk
            Select Case daysDiff
                Case Is <= 730:  aGrp = 1: cntAge(1) = cntAge(1) + 1
                Case Is <= 1825: aGrp = 2: cntAge(2) = cntAge(2) + 1
                Case Is <= 5475: aGrp = 3: cntAge(3) = cntAge(3) + 1
                Case Else:       aGrp = 4: cntAge(4) = cntAge(4) + 1
            End Select
            
            ' Suma hodnocenÌ pro vÏkovou skupinu
            If IsNumeric(valRating) Then
                If valRating > 0 Then ' P¯edpokl·d·me pouze hodnocen· anime
                    sumAge(aGrp) = sumAge(aGrp) + CDbl(valRating)
                    cntAgeRated(aGrp) = cntAgeRated(aGrp) + 1
                End If
            End If
            
            ' 2) SezÛna
            sGrp = ((Month(d) - 1) \ 3) + 1
            
            cntSez(sGrp) = cntSez(sGrp) + 1
            
            ' 3) Barva
            If seasonColors(sGrp) = -1 Then
                seasonColors(sGrp) = wsData.Cells(i + 1, "F").DisplayFormat.Interior.Color
            End If
        End If
    Next i

    ' --- VYKRESLENÕ GRAFŸ ---
    
    ' 1) Graf VÏku - ZmÏna na Bar Chart
    If chtAge Is Nothing Then
        Set chtAge = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(leftAge, topAge, wAge, hAge)
        chtAge.Name = "GrafAnimeVeku"
    End If
    
    With chtAge.Chart
        .ChartType = xlBarClustered ' ZmÏna typu na Bar
        .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "PoËet Anime podle st·¯Ì vÏkov˝ch skupin"
        .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True: .HasLegend = False
        
        ' --- UPDATE MÕSTO SMAZ¡NÕ (Zachov·nÌ form·tov·nÌ) ---
        Dim srsAge As Series
        If .SeriesCollection.count > 0 Then
            Set srsAge = .SeriesCollection(1)
        Else
            Set srsAge = .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        End If
        
        srsAge.XValues = ageLabels
        srsAge.values = Array(cntAge(1), cntAge(2), cntAge(3), cntAge(4))
        
        ' Data Labels - text aktualizujeme, form·t nech·me
        If Not srsAge.HasDataLabels Then srsAge.ApplyDataLabels
    End With
    
    totalAge = cntAge(1) + cntAge(2) + cntAge(3) + cntAge(4)
    If totalAge > 0 Then
        With chtAge.Chart.SeriesCollection(1)
            For i = 1 To .Points.count
                ' Data Labels na konci pruh˘
                .Points(i).DataLabel.text = cntAge(i) & " (" & Format(cntAge(i) / totalAge, "0,0%") & ")"
            Next i
        End With
    End If
    
    ' 2) Graf SezÛn - ZmÏna z Pie na Bar Chart
    If chtSez Is Nothing Then
        Set chtSez = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(leftSez, topSez, wSez, hSez)
        chtSez.Name = "GrafAnimeSezony"
    End If
    
    With chtSez.Chart
        .ChartType = xlBarClustered ' ZmÏna na Bar
        .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "PoËet Anime podle sezÛny"
        .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True: .HasLegend = False
        
        ' --- SEÿAZENÕ DAT (Largest to Smallest) ---
        Dim sezKeys(1 To 4) As String, sezCnts(1 To 4) As Long
        Dim sezCols(1 To 4) As Long
        Dim tmpKey As String, tmpCnt As Long, tmpCol As Long
        Dim j As Long
        
        ' NaplnÏnÌ pomocn˝ch polÌ
        For i = 1 To 4
            sezKeys(i) = sezLabels(i)
            sezCnts(i) = cntSez(i)
            sezCols(i) = seasonColors(i)
        Next i
        
        ' Bubble Sort (SestupnÏ podle poËtu)
        For i = 1 To 3
            For j = i + 1 To 4
                If sezCnts(j) < sezCnts(i) Then
                     ' Swap
                    tmpCnt = sezCnts(i): sezCnts(i) = sezCnts(j): sezCnts(j) = tmpCnt
                    tmpKey = sezKeys(i): sezKeys(i) = sezKeys(j): sezKeys(j) = tmpKey
                    tmpCol = sezCols(i): sezCols(i) = sezCols(j): sezCols(j) = tmpCol
                End If
            Next j
        Next i
        
        ' --- UPDATE MÕSTO SMAZ¡NÕ (Zachov·nÌ form·tov·nÌ) ---
        Dim srsSez As Series
        If .SeriesCollection.count > 0 Then
            Set srsSez = .SeriesCollection(1)
        Else
            Set srsSez = .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        End If

        srsSez.XValues = sezKeys
        srsSez.values = sezCnts
    End With

    totalSez = cntSez(1) + cntSez(2) + cntSez(3) + cntSez(4)
    If totalSez > 0 Then
        With chtSez.Chart.SeriesCollection(1)
            .ApplyDataLabels
            For i = 1 To .Points.count
                .Points(i).DataLabel.text = _
                  sezCnts(i) & " (" & Format(sezCnts(i) / totalSez, "0,0%") & ")"
                  
                ' Aplikace barev (nynÌ se¯azen˝ch)
                If sezCols(i) <> -1 Then
                    .Points(i).Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = sezCols(i)
                End If
            Next i
        End With
    End If
    
    ' 3) NOVð GRAF: Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ PODLE VÃKU (Bar Chart)
    If chtAgeAvg Is Nothing Then
        Set chtAgeAvg = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(leftAvg, topAvg, wAvg, hAvg)
        chtAgeAvg.Name = "GrafPrumerVeku"
    End If
    
    ' VypoËat pr˘mÏr˘ a p¯Ìprava na sort
    Dim avgAge(1 To 4) As Double
    Dim avgKeys(1 To 4) As String
    Dim tmpAvg As Double
    
    For i = 1 To 4
        If cntAgeRated(i) > 0 Then
            avgAge(i) = sumAge(i) / cntAgeRated(i)
        Else
            avgAge(i) = 0
        End If
        avgKeys(i) = ageLabels(i)
    Next i
    
    ' Bubble Sort (VzestupnÏ podle pr˘mÏru, aby nejvÏtöÌ byl naho¯e)
    For i = 1 To 3
        For j = i + 1 To 4
            If avgAge(j) < avgAge(i) Then
                ' Swap
                tmpAvg = avgAge(i): avgAge(i) = avgAge(j): avgAge(j) = tmpAvg
                tmpKey = avgKeys(i): avgKeys(i) = avgKeys(j): avgKeys(j) = tmpKey
            End If
        Next j
    Next i

    With chtAgeAvg.Chart
        .ChartType = xlBarClustered
        .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ vÏkov˝ch skupin"
        .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True: .HasLegend = False
        
        ' --- UPDATE MÕSTO SMAZ¡NÕ ---
        Dim srsAvg As Series
        If .SeriesCollection.count > 0 Then
            Set srsAvg = .SeriesCollection(1)
        Else
            Set srsAvg = .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            ' Pouze p¯i prvnÌm vytvo¯enÌ sÈrie/grafu nastavÌme osu, jinak nech·me uûivatelskÈ nastavenÌ
             .Axes(xlValue).MinimumScale = 0
             .Axes(xlValue).MaximumScale = 10
        End If
        
        srsAvg.XValues = avgKeys
        srsAvg.values = Array(avgAge(1), avgAge(2), avgAge(3), avgAge(4))
    End With
    
    With chtAgeAvg.Chart.SeriesCollection(1)
        If Not .HasDataLabels Then .ApplyDataLabels
        For i = 1 To .Points.count
            .Points(i).DataLabel.text = Format(avgAge(i), "0.00")
            
            ' Barvy nech·me defaultnÌ (nebo modrÈ), protoûe nem·me specifickÈ barvy pro vÏk
             .Points(i).Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(91, 155, 213) ' V˝chozÌ modr·
        Next i
    End With

Konec:
    ' Application state obnovuje hlavnÌ makro
    Exit Sub

Chyba:
    ' Application state obnovuje hlavnÌ makro
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i aktualizaci graf˘ VÏk/SezÛna: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### PROCEDURA 2: GRAF HODNOCENÕ V »ASE #####
'================================================================================================
Sub CreateFavoriteYearsChart_The_Final_One()
    '================================================================================================
    ' Autor: Gemini (Verze 9.9 - Pln· kontrola uûivatele nad form·tem os)
    ' Popis: Makro neresetuje meze osy Y napravo a respektuje smaz·nÌ titulku
    '        osy Y nalevo. Form·tov·nÌ je plnÏ v rukou uûivatele.
    '================================================================================================

    ' --- F·ze 1: Zpracov·nÌ dat ---
    Dim wb As Workbook: Set wb = ThisWorkbook
    Dim wsAnimeList As Worksheet, wsChartTarget As Worksheet
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsAnimeList = wb.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsChartTarget = wb.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    On Error GoTo 0
    If wsAnimeList Is Nothing Or wsChartTarget Is Nothing Then Exit Sub

    Dim yearlyScores As Object: Set yearlyScores = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim yearlyCounts As Object: Set yearlyCounts = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim decadeScores As Object: Set decadeScores = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim decadeCounts As Object: Set decadeCounts = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim lastRow As Long
    lastRow = wsAnimeList.Cells.Find("*", SearchOrder:=xlByRows, SearchDirection:=xlPrevious).row
    
    ' --- NA»TENÕ DAT DO POLE (Optimalizace) ---
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Sub
    Dim dataArr As Variant
    dataArr = wsAnimeList.Range("F2:K" & lastRow).Value

    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        Dim valDate As Variant, valScore As Variant
        valDate = dataArr(i, 1) ' Sloupec F (Datum)
        valScore = dataArr(i, 6) ' Sloupec K (HodnocenÌ)

        If IsDate(valDate) And IsNumeric(valScore) Then
            Dim releaseYear As Long, score As Double, decade As Long
            releaseYear = year(valDate)
            score = CDbl(valScore)
            
            If score > 0 Then
                yearlyScores(releaseYear) = yearlyScores(releaseYear) + score
                yearlyCounts(releaseYear) = yearlyCounts(releaseYear) + 1
                decade = Int(releaseYear / 10) * 10
                decadeScores(decade) = decadeScores(decade) + score
                decadeCounts(decade) = decadeCounts(decade) + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    If yearlyScores.count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Nebyly nalezena û·dn· platn· data k vytvo¯enÌ grafu.", vbExclamation, "é·dn· data"
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' --- F¡ZE 2: P¯Ìprava dat ---
    Dim sortedYears As Object: Set sortedYears = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim Y As Variant
    For Each Y In yearlyScores.keys: sortedYears.Add Y: Next
    sortedYears.Sort
    
    Dim minDataYear As Long: minDataYear = sortedYears(0)
    Dim maxDataYear As Long: maxDataYear = sortedYears(sortedYears.count - 1)
    
    Dim dataSize As Long: dataSize = sortedYears.count
    Dim yearsArray() As Variant, yearlyAvgArray() As Double, yearlyCountsArray() As Long
    ReDim yearsArray(1 To dataSize), yearlyAvgArray(1 To dataSize), yearlyCountsArray(1 To dataSize)
    
    Dim overallMin As Double: overallMin = 10
    Dim overallMax As Double: overallMax = 0
    
    Dim idx As Long: idx = 1
    For Each Y In sortedYears
        yearsArray(idx) = Y
        yearlyAvgArray(idx) = Round(yearlyScores(Y) / yearlyCounts(Y), 2)
        yearlyCountsArray(idx) = yearlyCounts(Y)
        If yearlyAvgArray(idx) < overallMin Then overallMin = yearlyAvgArray(idx)
        If yearlyAvgArray(idx) > overallMax Then overallMax = yearlyAvgArray(idx)
        idx = idx + 1
    Next Y
    
    Dim sortedDecades As Object: Set sortedDecades = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    For Each Y In decadeScores.keys: sortedDecades.Add Y: Next
    sortedDecades.Sort
    Dim decadeDataSize As Long: decadeDataSize = sortedDecades.count
    Dim decadeYearsArray() As Variant, decadeValuesArray() As Double
    ReDim decadeYearsArray(1 To decadeDataSize), decadeValuesArray(1 To decadeDataSize)
    idx = 1
    For Each Y In sortedDecades
        decadeYearsArray(idx) = Y + 5
        decadeValuesArray(idx) = Round(decadeScores(Y) / decadeCounts(Y), 2)
        If decadeValuesArray(idx) < overallMin Then overallMin = decadeValuesArray(idx)
        If decadeValuesArray(idx) > overallMax Then overallMax = decadeValuesArray(idx)
        idx = idx + 1
    Next Y

    ' --- F¡ZE 3: AKTUALIZACE GRAFU ---
    wsChartTarget.Activate
    Dim chrtObj As ChartObject
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chrtObj = wsChartTarget.ChartObjects("AnimeHodnoceniVCaseGraf")
    On Error GoTo 0
    If chrtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chrtObj = wsChartTarget.ChartObjects.Add(left:=250, top:=50, Width:=800, Height:=450)
        chrtObj.Name = "AnimeHodnoceniVCaseGraf"
    End If
    
    Dim chrt As Chart
    Set chrt = chrtObj.Chart
        
    With chrt
        .PlotArea.Format.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
        
        For i = .SeriesCollection.count To 1 Step -1
            If left(.SeriesCollection(i).Name, 4) = "ÿada" Or left(.SeriesCollection(i).Name, 7) = "PozadÌ " Then
                .SeriesCollection(i).Delete
            End If
        Next i
        
        With .Axes(xlCategory, xlPrimary)
            .MinimumScale = minDataYear - 1: .MaximumScale = maxDataYear + 1
            .HasMajorGridlines = False: .HasMinorGridlines = False
        End With

        Dim dynamicYMin As Double: dynamicYMin = Application.WorksheetFunction.Floor(overallMin, 1)
        Dim dynamicYMax As Double: dynamicYMax = Application.WorksheetFunction.Ceiling(overallMax, 1)
        
        ' ===== ZMÃNA 1: Form·tov·nÌ levÈ osy Y nynÌ respektuje smaz·nÌ titulku =====
        With .Axes(xlValue, xlPrimary)
             ' MÏ¯Ìtko se st·le aktualizuje podle dat
             .MinimumScale = dynamicYMin
             .MaximumScale = dynamicYMax
             ' Titulek se aktualizuje, jen pokud existuje. Pokud ho smaûeö, z˘stane smazan˝.
             If .HasTitle Then
                .AxisTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ"
             End If
             .HasMajorGridlines = False
        End With
        
        Dim srs As Series
        Dim seriesName As String
        
        seriesName = "RoËnÌ pr˘mÏr"
        On Error Resume Next
        Set srs = .SeriesCollection(seriesName)
        On Error GoTo 0
        If srs Is Nothing Then
            Set srs = .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            srs.Name = seriesName
            srs.ChartType = xlXYScatterSmooth
            srs.MarkerStyle = 8: srs.MarkerSize = 6
            srs.Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 0, 0)
            srs.Format.line.weight = 2.5
        End If
        srs.AxisGroup = xlPrimary
        srs.XValues = yearsArray
        srs.values = yearlyAvgArray
        Set srs = Nothing
        
        seriesName = "Dek·dov˝ pr˘mÏr"
        On Error Resume Next
        Set srs = .SeriesCollection(seriesName)
        On Error GoTo 0
        If srs Is Nothing Then
            Set srs = .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            srs.Name = seriesName
            srs.ChartType = xlXYScatterSmooth
            srs.MarkerStyle = 2: srs.MarkerSize = 8
            srs.Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 192, 0)
            srs.Format.line.weight = 2
        End If
        srs.AxisGroup = xlPrimary
        srs.XValues = decadeYearsArray
        srs.values = decadeValuesArray
        Set srs = Nothing

        seriesName = "PoËet anime"
        On Error Resume Next
        Set srs = .SeriesCollection(seriesName)
        On Error GoTo 0
        If srs Is Nothing Then
            Set srs = .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            srs.Name = seriesName
            srs.ChartType = xlLine
            srs.MarkerStyle = xlMarkerStyleNone
            srs.Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(112, 173, 71)
            srs.Format.line.weight = 2
            srs.Format.line.DashStyle = msoLineDash
        End If
        srs.AxisGroup = xlSecondary
        srs.XValues = yearsArray
        srs.values = yearlyCountsArray
        Set srs = Nothing
        
        .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ a poËet zhlÈdnut˝ch Anime v kaûdÈm roce"
        .HasLegend = True
        
        Dim shp As Shape
        Dim shapeName As String
        For Each Y In sortedDecades
            If Y + 9.5 > .Axes(xlCategory).MinimumScale And Y + 0.5 < .Axes(xlCategory).MaximumScale Then
                shapeName = "DecadeLabel_" & Y
                On Error Resume Next
                Set shp = .Shapes(shapeName)
                On Error GoTo 0
                
                ' === ⁄PRAVA POZICE POPISKU ===
                ' StandardnÏ chceme popisek uprost¯ed dek·dy (y + 5)
                calcYear = Y + 5
                
                ' Pokud je st¯ed dek·dy (nap¯. 1985) "schovan˝" vlevo p¯ed zaË·tkem grafu (1987),
                ' posuneme ho na zaË·tek grafu + 1 rok (tedy nad 1988).
                If calcYear < .Axes(xlCategory).MinimumScale Then
                    calcYear = .Axes(xlCategory).MinimumScale + 1
                End If
                
                ' V˝poËet pixelovÈ pozice podle calcYear
                lblXpos = .PlotArea.InsideLeft + ((calcYear - .Axes(xlCategory).MinimumScale) / (.Axes(xlCategory).MaximumScale - .Axes(xlCategory).MinimumScale) * .PlotArea.InsideWidth) - 20
                ' =============================
                
                If shp Is Nothing Then
                    Set shp = .Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, lblXpos, .PlotArea.InsideTop - 20, 40, 20)
                    shp.Name = shapeName
                    shp.TextFrame2.TextRange.text = Y & "s"
                    With shp.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font
                        .size = 10: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(220, 220, 220): .Bold = False
                    End With
                    shp.line.Visible = msoFalse: shp.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
                Else
                    shp.left = lblXpos
                    shp.top = .PlotArea.InsideTop - 20
                End If
                Set shp = Nothing
            End If
        Next Y
        
        .HasAxis(xlCategory, xlSecondary) = True
        .HasAxis(xlValue, xlSecondary) = True
        
        With .Axes(xlCategory, xlSecondary)
             .MinimumScale = minDataYear - 1: .MaximumScale = maxDataYear + 1
             .TickLabelPosition = xlNone
             .HasTitle = False: .HasMajorGridlines = False: .HasMinorGridlines = False
        End With

        ' ===== ZMÃNA 2: Meze (minimum/maximum) pravÈ osy Y se jiû neaktualizujÌ =====
        With .Axes(xlValue, xlSecondary)
            ' N·sledujÌcÌ dva ¯·dky jsou smaz·ny, aby se neresetovaly tvÈ manu·lnÌ meze.
            ' .MinimumScale = 0
            ' .MaximumScale = Application.WorksheetFunction.Ceiling(maxCount, 5)
            
            ' UPOZORNÃNÕ: Pokud p¯id·ö data, kter· p¯es·hnou tvÈ manu·lnÌ nastavenÌ,
            ' nemusÌ b˝t v grafu vidÏt! Budeö muset meze osy upravit ruËnÏ.
            
            .HasTitle = False
            .HasMajorGridlines = False
        End With
    End With
    
End Sub


'================================================================================================
'##### PROCEDURA 3: NEJLEPäÕ ANIME SEZ”NY (Top 8) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorPrehled_NejlepsiSezony()
    ' --- KONFIGURACE ---
    Const POCET_SEZON As Long = 8
    
    ' Indexy jsou relativnÌ k naËtenÈ oblasti C:Q (C=1)
    ' C=1 (Name), F=4 (Date), K=9 (Score), N=12 (Status)
    ' User: é·nry = H (index 6, C-D-E-F-G-H), oddÏlovaË "; "
    Const COL_DATE_IDX As Long = 4      ' F
    Const COL_SCORE_IDX As Long = 9     ' K
    Const COL_NAME_IDX As Long = 1      ' C
    Const COL_STATUS_IDX As Long = 12   ' N
    Const COL_GENRES_IDX As Long = 6    ' H (User specified)
    
    ' Odhad pro ostatnÌ sloupce (G=5, I=7, J=8)
    ' ZkusÌme G=Type? I=Eps? J=Duration?
    Const COL_EPS_IDX As Long = 7       ' I (P¯edpoklad)
    Const COL_DUR_IDX As Long = 8       ' J (P¯edpoklad)
    
    Dim wsData As Worksheet, wsTarget As Worksheet
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    Dim lastRow As Long
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "F").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' NaËÌt·me C:Q (Name=1...Genres=6...Score=9...Status=12...Q=15)
    Dim arrData As Variant
    arrData = wsData.Range("C2:Q" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' --- AGREGACE DAT ---
    ' Dictionary Key: "Year-SeasonId"
    ' Value: Array(SumScore, Count, MaxScore, MinScore, MVPName, SumDur, SumEp, CompletedCount, DictGenres, SeasonName)
    Dim dictSeasons As Object
    Set dictSeasons = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim i As Long
    Dim valDate As Variant, valScore As Variant, valName As String
    Dim score As Double
    Dim sYear As Long, sMonth As Long, sId As Long, sKey As String, sName As String
    Dim sData As Variant ' Pole pro uloûenÌ stats
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(arrData, 1)
        valDate = arrData(i, COL_DATE_IDX)
        valScore = arrData(i, COL_SCORE_IDX)
        valName = CStr(arrData(i, COL_NAME_IDX))
        
        If IsDate(valDate) And IsNumeric(valScore) Then
            score = CDbl(valScore)
            If score > 0 Then
                sYear = year(valDate)
                sMonth = Month(valDate)
                
                ' UrËenÌ sezÛny: 1=Winter, 2=Spring, 3=Summer, 4=Fall
                sId = ((sMonth - 1) \ 3) + 1
                sKey = sYear & "-" & sId
                
                Select Case sId
                    Case 1: sName = "Winter " & sYear
                    Case 2: sName = "Spring " & sYear
                    Case 3: sName = "Summer " & sYear
                    Case 4: sName = "Fall " & sYear
                End Select
                
                If Not dictSeasons.Exists(sKey) Then
                    ' Init: SumScore, Count, MaxScore, MinScore, MVPName, SumDur, SumEp, CompletedCount, DictGenres, SeasonName
                    Dim dGen As Object: Set dGen = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                    dictSeasons.Add sKey, Array(0#, 0, -1#, 11#, "", 0#, 0, 0, dGen, sName)
                End If
                
                sData = dictSeasons(sKey)
                
                ' --- UPDATE STATS ---
                sData(0) = sData(0) + score
                sData(1) = sData(1) + 1
                
                ' Max/Min/MVP
                If score > sData(2) Then
                    sData(2) = score
                    sData(4) = valName & " (" & score & "/10)"
                End If
                If score < sData(3) Then sData(3) = score
                
                ' Duration/Eps (Pokud jsou numeric)
                Dim eps As Long: eps = 0
                Dim dur As Double: dur = 0
                If IsNumeric(arrData(i, COL_EPS_IDX)) Then eps = CLng(arrData(i, COL_EPS_IDX))
                If IsNumeric(arrData(i, COL_DUR_IDX)) Then dur = val(arrData(i, COL_DUR_IDX)) ' Val pro jistotu (nap¯. "24 min")
                
                sData(5) = sData(5) + (eps * dur)
                sData(6) = sData(6) + eps
                
                ' Completed
                Dim status As String: status = LCase(CStr(arrData(i, COL_STATUS_IDX)))
                If InStr(status, "completed") > 0 Or InStr(status, "dokonËeno") > 0 Then
                    sData(7) = sData(7) + 1
                End If
                
                ' Genres (Column H, Separator "; ")
                ' Index 6
                Dim sGenres As String
                sGenres = CStr(arrData(i, COL_GENRES_IDX))
                If Len(sGenres) > 0 Then
                    Dim gArr() As String, g As Variant
                    gArr = Split(sGenres, "; ") ' User specified separator
                    Dim dG As Object: Set dG = sData(8)
                    For Each g In gArr
                        Dim trG As String: trG = Trim(g)
                        If Len(trG) > 0 Then
                            dG(trG) = dG(trG) + 1
                        End If
                    Next g
                    Set sData(8) = dG
                End If
                
                dictSeasons(sKey) = sData
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictSeasons.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' --- PÿEVOD NA POLE PRO ÿAZENÕ ---
    ' Pot¯ebujeme: AvgRating, SeasonName, MVP, Count, Completed%, Max, Min, SumDur, SumEp, TopGenre
    
    Const MIN_ANIME_COUNT As Long = 4 ' User requested minimum 4 anime to display season
    
    ' First, count valid seasons to know array size (or just use collection/resize later)
    Dim validCount As Long: validCount = 0
    Dim k As Variant
    For Each k In dictSeasons.keys
        sData = dictSeasons(k)
        If sData(1) >= MIN_ANIME_COUNT Then validCount = validCount + 1
    Next k
    
    If validCount = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim arrExport() As Variant
    ReDim arrExport(1 To validCount, 1 To 10)
    Dim idx As Long: idx = 0
    
    For Each k In dictSeasons.keys
        sData = dictSeasons(k)
        
        If sData(1) >= MIN_ANIME_COUNT Then
            idx = idx + 1
            
            Dim avgR As Double: avgR = sData(0) / sData(1)
            Dim topG As String: topG = GetTopGenre(sData(8))
            Dim compPct As Double
            If sData(1) > 0 Then compPct = (sData(7) / sData(1)) Else compPct = 0
            
            arrExport(idx, 1) = avgR            ' Sort Key
            arrExport(idx, 2) = sData(9)        ' Name
            arrExport(idx, 3) = sData(4)        ' MVP
            arrExport(idx, 4) = sData(1)        ' Count (Local List Count)
            arrExport(idx, 5) = compPct         ' Completed % (Initially Local)
            arrExport(idx, 6) = sData(2)        ' Max
            arrExport(idx, 7) = sData(3)        ' Min
            arrExport(idx, 8) = sData(5)        ' Sum Duration (Min)
            arrExport(idx, 9) = sData(6)        ' Sum Ep
            arrExport(idx, 10) = topG           ' Top Genre
        End If
    Next k
    
    ' --- SORT (Bubble Sort Descending by AvgRating) ---
    BubbleSort2D arrExport, 1, True
    
    ' --- PRE-FETCH API DATA FOR TOP X ---
    Dim rowsToShow As Long: rowsToShow = IIf(UBound(arrExport, 1) > POCET_SEZON, POCET_SEZON, UBound(arrExport, 1))
    Dim iter As Long
    
    For iter = 1 To rowsToShow
        Dim tYear As Long, tSeason As String
        Dim sNameParts() As String
        sNameParts = Split(arrExport(iter, 2), " ")
        If UBound(sNameParts) >= 1 Then
            tSeason = sNameParts(0)
            tYear = CLng(sNameParts(1))
            
            ' Fetch Total Anime in Season from AniList API (Format: TV)
            Dim totalInSeason As Long
            totalInSeason = GetAnilistSeasonTotal(tYear, tSeason)
            
            ' Calculate "Completed %" based on API Total
            ' Logic: (My Rated Count) / (API Total Count)
            Dim myCompletedC As Long
            myCompletedC = arrExport(iter, 4)
            
            If totalInSeason > 0 Then
                arrExport(iter, 5) = myCompletedC / totalInSeason
                ' Display count as "MyCount / APITotal"
                arrExport(iter, 4) = arrExport(iter, 4) & " / " & totalInSeason
            Else
                ' If API fails or returns 0 (or huge error), we keep implicit local %
            End If
        End If
        DoEvents
    Next iter
    
    ' --- VYKRESLENÕ ---
    Dim tbHeader As Shape, tbContent As Shape
    Dim defaultLeftPos As Double, defaultTopPos As Double
    Dim borderColor As Long: borderColor = RGB(0, 0, 0)
    
    ' Default Position (Right of charts)
    defaultLeftPos = 900
    defaultTopPos = 50
    
    ' --- HEADER ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbHeader = wsTarget.Shapes("txtBestSeasonsHeader")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If tbHeader Is Nothing Then
        ' Create New Header
        Set tbHeader = wsTarget.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, defaultLeftPos, defaultTopPos, 400, 30)
        tbHeader.Name = "txtBestSeasonsHeader"
        With tbHeader
            .line.Visible = msoFalse
            .Fill.Visible = msoTrue
            .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(85, 89, 107) ' Default Dark Grey
            .Fill.Transparency = 0
            With .TextFrame2
                .TextRange.text = "NejlepöÌ Anime sezÛny"
                .TextRange.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
                .TextRange.Font.size = 18
                .TextRange.Font.Bold = msoTrue
                .TextRange.Font.Fill.Visible = msoTrue
                .TextRange.Font.Fill.Solid
                .TextRange.Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255) ' Default White
                .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
                .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            End With
        End With
    Else
        ' Update Existing Header (Preserve Size, Pos, Color)
        ' Ensure text is correct (in case it was changed)
        tbHeader.TextFrame2.TextRange.text = "NejlepöÌ Anime sezony"
    End If
    
    ' Redraw Header Lines (Delete/Recreate or Update?)
    ' Easiest to delete and recreate lines to match current Header/Content size/pos
    On Error Resume Next
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineBSHeaderTop").Delete: wsTarget.Shapes("lineBSHeaderLeft").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineBSHeaderRight").Delete
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineBSHeaderTop", tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineBSHeaderLeft", tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    
    ' --- CONTENT ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbContent = wsTarget.Shapes("txtBestSeasonsContent")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Capture User Preferred Colors from Existing or Defaults
    Dim userFontColor As Long: userFontColor = RGB(220, 220, 220)
    
    If tbContent Is Nothing Then
        ' Create New Content Box
        Dim calcHeight As Double
        calcHeight = (rowsToShow * 3 * 14) + (rowsToShow * 10) + 50
        If calcHeight < 100 Then calcHeight = 100
        
        Set tbContent = wsTarget.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, defaultLeftPos, defaultTopPos + 30, 400, calcHeight)
        tbContent.Name = "txtBestSeasonsContent"
        
        With tbContent
            .Fill.Visible = msoTrue
            .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(85, 89, 107) ' Default
            .Fill.Transparency = 0
            .line.Visible = msoFalse
            .TextFrame2.TextRange.text = ""
            .TextFrame2.MarginLeft = 10
            .TextFrame2.MarginTop = 10
        End With
    Else
        ' Update Existing Content Box (PRESERVE SIZE & COLORS)
        ' We do NOT change .Height or .Width
        
        ' Capture Font Color if possible (from first char)
        If tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.count > 0 Then
            userFontColor = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters(1, 1).Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB
        End If
        
        ' Clear Text
        tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.text = ""
    End If
    
    ' Redraw Content Lines
    On Error Resume Next
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineBSContentLeft").Delete: wsTarget.Shapes("lineBSContentRight").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineBSContentBottom").Delete
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    Dim tr As Object
    For i = 1 To rowsToShow
        If i > 1 Then tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter vbCrLf & vbCrLf
        
        ' Data Prep
        Dim dValScore As Double: dValScore = arrExport(i, 1)
        Dim sAvg As String
        If dValScore = Int(dValScore) Then
            sAvg = Format(dValScore, "0")
        Else
            sAvg = Format(dValScore, "0.00") ' User requested "X,YZ"
            sAvg = Replace(sAvg, ".", ",")
            If Right(sAvg, 3) = ",00" Then sAvg = left(sAvg, Len(sAvg) - 3)
            If Right(sAvg, 1) = "0" Then sAvg = left(sAvg, Len(sAvg) - 1) ' Handle 8,90 -> 8,9
        End If
        
        ' Max/Min formatting (same 0.## logic)
        Dim dValMax As Double: dValMax = arrExport(i, 6)
        Dim sMax As String
        If dValMax = Int(dValMax) Then sMax = Format(dValMax, "0") Else sMax = Replace(Format(dValMax, "0.##"), ".", ",")
        
        Dim dValMin As Double: dValMin = arrExport(i, 7)
        Dim sMin As String
        If dValMin = Int(dValMin) Then sMin = Format(dValMin, "0") Else sMin = Replace(Format(dValMin, "0.##"), ".", ",")
        
        Dim sCom As String: sCom = Format(arrExport(i, 5), "0 %")
        Dim sMyCount As String: sMyCount = arrExport(i, 4)
        
        Dim parts() As String
        parts = Split(CStr(sMyCount), " / ")
        sMyCount = parts(0) ' Get the first part (My Count)
        
        ' Calculate hours/days
        Dim mins As Double: mins = arrExport(i, 8)
        Dim hours As Double: hours = mins / 60
        Dim sHours As String
        If hours = Int(hours) Then sHours = Format(hours, "0") Else sHours = Replace(Format(hours, "0.0"), ".", ",")
        
        Dim days As Double: days = hours / 24
        Dim sDays As String
        If days = Int(days) Then sDays = Format(days, "0") Else sDays = Replace(Format(days, "0.0"), ".", ",")
        
        ' --- LINE 1 ---
        ' "1. [Season] / MVP: [Name] ([Score]/10)"
        ' Format: 1. (Reg) Season (Bold+Italic) / MVP: (Reg) Name (Bold+Italic) (Score/10) (Bold+Italic)
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(i & ". ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrExport(i, 2)) ' Season
        FormatTxt tr, True, True, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / MVP: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrExport(i, 3) & vbCrLf) ' Name (Score/10) - stored in arrExport(3)
        FormatTxt tr, True, True, userFontColor
        
        ' --- LINE 2 ---
        ' "PoËet Anime: [MyCount] / dokonËeno [Pct] % / O hodnocenÌ: [Avg]/10 / hodnocenÌ ^ [Max]/10 ° [Min]/10"
        
        ' Symboly pomocÌ ChrW pro bezpeËnost (Unicode)
        Dim sUp As String: sUp = ChrW(9650) ' Triangle Up
        Dim sDown As String: sDown = ChrW(9660) ' Triangle Down
        Dim sAvgSym As String: sAvgSym = ChrW(216) ' O stroke (O)
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("PoËet Anime: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(sMyCount)
        FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / dokonËeno ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(sCom)
        FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / " & sAvgSym & " hodnocenÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(sAvg & "/10")
        FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
        
        ' Condition for Max/Min display
        If dValMax <> dValMin Then
            Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / hodnocenÌ " & sUp & " ")
            FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
            Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(sMax & "/10")
            FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
            
            Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" " & sDown & " ")
            FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
            Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(sMin & "/10" & vbCrLf)
            FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
        Else
            ' Just append newline if not showing range
            Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(vbCrLf)
            FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        End If
        
        ' --- LINE 3 ---
        ' "DÈlka sledov·nÌ: [H] hodin ([D] dny) / poËet epizod: [Ep] / top û·nr: [Genre]"
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("DÈlka sledov·nÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(sHours & " hodin (" & sDays & " dny)")
        FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / poËet epizod: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrExport(i, 9))
        FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / top û·nr: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False, userFontColor
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrExport(i, 10))
        FormatTxt tr, True, False, userFontColor
        
    Next i
    
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineBSContentLeft", tbContent.left, tbContent.top, tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineBSContentBottom", tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5

End Sub

Private Sub DrawLine(ws As Worksheet, sName As String, x1 As Double, y1 As Double, x2 As Double, y2 As Double, col As Long, w As Double)
    Dim ln As Shape
    Set ln = ws.Shapes.AddLine(x1, y1, x2, y2)
    With ln
        .Name = sName
        .line.ForeColor.RGB = col
        .line.weight = w
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub FormatTxt(rng As Object, bBold As Boolean, bItalic As Boolean, Optional fColor As Long = -1)
    With rng.Font
        .Name = "Aptos Narrow"
        .size = 11
        .Bold = bBold
        .Italic = bItalic
        If fColor = -1 Then
             .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(220, 220, 220) ' Default
        Else
             .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = fColor
        End If
    End With
End Sub

' funkce pro AniList API (nahrazuje Jikan)
Private Function GetAnilistSeasonTotal(ByVal year As Long, ByVal seasonName As String) As Long
    ' AniList GraphQL: Use PageInfo to get Total
    ' Query: Multi-Page to bypass 5000 limit issue and get accurate counts for all formats
    ' Formats: TV, OVA, MOVIE, SPECIAL, ONA, TV_SHORT
    
    Dim url As String
    url = "https://graphql.anilist.co"
    
    Dim sSeason As String
    sSeason = UCase(seasonName) ' AniList expects UPPERCASE (WINTER, SPRING, SUMMER, FALL)
    
    ' Construct complex query for all formats separately to ensure accurate summing
    ' Each alias (tv, ova, etc.) gets its own Page context with filters
    Dim qCore As String
    qCore = "media(season: " & sSeason & ", seasonYear: " & year & ", type: ANIME, isAdult: false, countryOfOrigin: \""JP\"") { id }"
    
    Dim query As String
    query = "{""query"":""query { " & _
            "tv: Page { pageInfo { total } " & Replace(qCore, "media(", "media(format: TV, ") & " } " & _
            "ova: Page { pageInfo { total } " & Replace(qCore, "media(", "media(format: OVA, ") & " } " & _
            "mov: Page { pageInfo { total } " & Replace(qCore, "media(", "media(format: MOVIE, ") & " } " & _
            "spe: Page { pageInfo { total } " & Replace(qCore, "media(", "media(format: SPECIAL, ") & " } " & _
            "ona: Page { pageInfo { total } " & Replace(qCore, "media(", "media(format: ONA, ") & " } " & _
            "tvs: Page { pageInfo { total } " & Replace(qCore, "media(", "media(format: TV_SHORT, ") & " } " & _
            "}""}"
            
    Dim xmlHttp As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    Set xmlHttp = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    If xmlHttp Is Nothing Then Set xmlHttp = CreateObject("Microsoft.XMLHTTP")
    On Error GoTo ErrAPI
    
    If xmlHttp Is Nothing Then Exit Function
    
    xmlHttp.Open "POST", url, False
    xmlHttp.setRequestHeader "Content-Type", "application/json"
    xmlHttp.sEnd query
