            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' QuickSort podle data (sloupec 1)
    QuickSort2D cleanData, 1, count, 1
    
    ' RozdÏlenÌ do polÌ pro graf
    Dim labelsArr() As String, valuesArr() As Double
    ReDim labelsArr(1 To count)
    ReDim valuesArr(1 To count)
    
    For i = 1 To count
        labelsArr(i) = Format(cleanData(i, 1), "dd.mm.yyyy")
        valuesArr(i) = cleanData(i, 2)
    Next i
    
    ' Graf
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafPrubehHodnoceni")
    On Error GoTo ErrLine
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(left:=100, top:=350, Width:=700, Height:=350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafPrubehHodnoceni"
        With chtObj.Chart
            .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Pr˘bÏh hodnocenÌ v Ëase"
            .HasLegend = False
            .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            ' Styling
            .ChartArea.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(82, 82, 82)
            .PlotArea.Format.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
            .ChartTitle.Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            .Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            .Axes(xlValue).TickLabels.Font.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            .Axes(xlValue).MajorGridlines.Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(120, 120, 120)
            .SeriesCollection(1).Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(70, 114, 137)
        End With
    End If
    
    With chtObj.Chart.SeriesCollection(1)
        .XValues = labelsArr
        .values = valuesArr
    End With
    Exit Sub
ErrLine:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i vytv·¯enÌ grafu pr˘bÏhu hodnocenÌ: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'====================================================================================================
' *** HLAVNÕ PROCEDURA PRO ANALðZU ROZDÕLŸ V HODNOCENÕ ANIME (OPTIMALIZOV¡NO) ***
'====================================================================================================
Public Sub AktualizujPrehledRozdiluHodnoceni()
    Application.StatusBar = "SpouötÌm aktualizaci rozdÌl˘ hodnocenÌ..."
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    On Error GoTo ChybaHlavnihoMakra

    Dim wsData As Worksheet, wsTarget As Worksheet
    Dim lastDataRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim malID As Long, myRating As Integer
    Dim cacheDict As Object, positiveDifferences As Object, negativeDifferences As Object
    Dim animeData As Object, useCache As Boolean
    
    Set positiveDifferences = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Set negativeDifferences = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    Set cacheDict = NactiCache()
    lastDataRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    ' NaËÌst data do pole pro rychlost (Sloupce C aû K)
    ' C=3 (Hyperlink), D=4, E=5, F=6(Datum), ..., K=11(HodnocenÌ)
    ' Read range C2:K...
    Dim mainData As Variant
    mainData = wsData.Range("C2:K" & lastDataRow).Value
    
    ' Optimalizace naËÌt·nÌ hyperlink˘: NaËÌst vöechny hyperlinky v C sloupci najednou
    Dim hlDict As Object: Set hlDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim hl As Hyperlink
    For Each hl In wsData.Range("C2:C" & lastDataRow).Hyperlinks
        ' UloûÌme mapov·nÌ: ÿ·dek -> Adresa
        ' Subtract 1 because array is 1-based from row 2 (so row 2 is index 1)
        ' Wait, row 2 is index 1.
        hlDict(hl.Range.row) = hl.Address
    Next hl

    For i = 1 To UBound(mainData, 1)
        Dim rowIdx As Long: rowIdx = i + 1 ' SkuteËn˝ ¯·dek v Excelu
        Dim valK As Variant: valK = mainData(i, 9) ' K je 9. sloupec v C:K (C,D,E,F,G,H,I,J,K)
        
        If Not IsNumeric(valK) Then GoTo nextRow
        If valK < 1 Or valK > 10 Then GoTo nextRow
        myRating = CInt(valK)
        
        ' ZÌsk·nÌ MAL ID z hyperlink cache
        malID = 0
        Dim urlAddr As String
        If hlDict.Exists(rowIdx) Then
            urlAddr = hlDict(rowIdx)
            Dim urlParts() As String
            urlParts = Split(urlAddr, "/")
            If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then malID = CLng(urlParts(4))
        End If
        If malID = 0 Then GoTo nextRow

        Application.StatusBar = "Zpracov·v·m... " & i & " / " & UBound(mainData, 1) & " (ID: " & malID & ")"
        
        ' --- LOGIKA CACHE ---
        useCache = False
        Dim forceUpdate As Boolean: forceUpdate = False
        
        If cacheDict.Exists(malID) Then
            If CInt(cacheDict(malID)("MyRating")) <> myRating Then
                forceUpdate = True
            Else
                Dim releaseDate As Variant
                releaseDate = mainData(i, 4) ' Sloupec F je 4. v C:K (C,D,E,F...)
                
                Dim updateTierDays As Long
                updateTierDays = GetUpdateTierDays(releaseDate)
                
                If updateTierDays > 0 Then
                    Dim lastUpdate As Date
                    lastUpdate = cacheDict(malID)("LastUpdate")
                    If DateDiff("d", lastUpdate, Date) >= updateTierDays Then forceUpdate = True
                End If
            End If
            If Not forceUpdate Then useCache = True
        Else
            forceUpdate = True
        End If
        
        If useCache Then
            Set animeData = cacheDict(malID)
        Else
            ' API Call
            Set animeData = GetJikanData(malID, myRating)
            If USE_ADAPTIVE_DELAY Then Sleep INITIAL_DELAY_MS Else Sleep API_DELAY_MS
            
            If Not animeData Is Nothing Then
                animeData.Add "Title", mainData(i, 1) ' Sloupec C
                animeData.Add "MyRating", myRating
                animeData.Add "URL", urlAddr
                animeData.Add "LastUpdate", Date
                Set cacheDict(malID) = animeData
            Else
                If cacheDict.Exists(malID) Then Set animeData = cacheDict(malID) Else Set animeData = Nothing
            End If
        End If
        
        If Not animeData Is Nothing Then
             If animeData.Exists("Difference") Then animeData.Remove "Difference"
             Dim commScore As Double: commScore = CDbl(animeData("CommunityScore"))
             animeData.Add "Difference", Abs(myRating - commScore)
             If myRating < commScore Then
                 negativeDifferences.Add animeData
             ElseIf myRating > commScore Then
                 positiveDifferences.Add animeData
             End If
        End If
nextRow:
    Next i
    
    Application.StatusBar = "ÿadÌm v˝sledky a vykresluji p¯ehledy..."
    SortArrayListByDictKey negativeDifferences, "Difference", False
    SortArrayListByDictKey positiveDifferences, "Difference", False
    
    VytvorPrehledyRozdilu wsTarget, negativeDifferences, positiveDifferences
    
    Application.StatusBar = "Ukl·d·m novou cache..."
    UlozCache cacheDict
    Application.StatusBar = False

Cleanup:
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Exit Sub

ChybaHlavnihoMakra:
    MsgBox "Doölo k chybÏ v hlavnÌ procedu¯e: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    GoTo Cleanup
End Sub

'====================================================================================================
' SEKCE A: SPR¡VA CACHE
'====================================================================================================
Private Function NactiCache() As Object
    ' AH:AP
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet, cacheDict As Object, lastRow As Long, r As Long
    Set cacheDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then Set NactiCache = cacheDict: Exit Function
    
    lastRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, "AH").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Set NactiCache = cacheDict: Exit Function
    
    Dim dataRange As Variant
    dataRange = wsCache.Range("AH2:AP" & lastRow).Value
    
    For r = 1 To UBound(dataRange, 1)
        Dim singleEntry As Object, idKey As Long
        If IsNumeric(dataRange(r, 1)) And dataRange(r, 1) > 0 Then
            Set singleEntry = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
            idKey = CLng(dataRange(r, 1))
            singleEntry.Add "MAL_ID", idKey
            singleEntry.Add "Title", dataRange(r, 2)
            singleEntry.Add "MyRating", IIf(IsNumeric(dataRange(r, 3)), CInt(dataRange(r, 3)), 0)
            singleEntry.Add "CommunityScore", IIf(IsNumeric(dataRange(r, 4)), CDbl(dataRange(r, 4)), 0)
            singleEntry.Add "ScorePercentage", dataRange(r, 5)
            singleEntry.Add "Difference", IIf(IsNumeric(dataRange(r, 6)), CDbl(dataRange(r, 6)), 0)
            singleEntry.Add "VoteCount", IIf(IsNumeric(dataRange(r, 7)), CLng(dataRange(r, 7)), 0)
            singleEntry.Add "URL", dataRange(r, 8)
            singleEntry.Add "LastUpdate", IIf(IsDate(dataRange(r, 9)), CDate(dataRange(r, 9)), CDate(0))
            Set cacheDict(idKey) = singleEntry
        End If
    Next r
    Set NactiCache = cacheDict
End Function

Private Sub UlozCache(cacheDict As Object)
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet, key As Variant, r As Long
    On Error Resume Next: Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME): On Error GoTo 0
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then
        Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ThisWorkbook.Sheets.count))
        wsCache.Name = CACHE_SHEET_NAME
    End If
    
    wsCache.Range("AH:AP").ClearContents
    Dim headers As Variant
    headers = Array("MAL_ID", "Title", "MyRating", "CommunityScore", "ScorePercentage", "Difference", "VoteCount", "URL", "LastUpdate")
    wsCache.Range("AH1").Resize(1, UBound(headers) + 1).Value = headers
    
    If cacheDict.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim outputArray() As Variant
    Dim dictCount As Long: dictCount = cacheDict.count
    ReDim outputArray(1 To dictCount, 1 To 9)
    
    r = 1
    For Each key In cacheDict.keys
        Dim item As Object: Set item = cacheDict(key)
        outputArray(r, 1) = item("MAL_ID")
        outputArray(r, 2) = item("Title")
        outputArray(r, 3) = item("MyRating")
        outputArray(r, 4) = item("CommunityScore")
        outputArray(r, 5) = item("ScorePercentage")
        outputArray(r, 6) = item("Difference")
        outputArray(r, 7) = item("VoteCount")
        outputArray(r, 8) = item("URL")
        outputArray(r, 9) = item("LastUpdate")
        r = r + 1
    Next key
    
    wsCache.Range("AH2").Resize(dictCount, 9).Value = outputArray
    wsCache.Columns("AH:AP").AutoFit
End Sub

'====================================================================================================
' SEKCE B: JIKAN API (Zachov·no)
'====================================================================================================
Private Function GetJikanData(ByVal malID As Long, ByVal userScore As Integer) As Object
    On Error GoTo ErrGetData
    Dim detailsJson As Object, statsJson As Object
    Dim communityScore As Double
    Dim scorePercentage As String: scorePercentage = "N/A"
    Dim voteCount As Long: voteCount = 0
    
    Dim detailUrl As String: detailUrl = "https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & malID
    Set detailsJson = FetchJikanApiData(detailUrl)
    If detailsJson Is Nothing Then GoTo ErrGetData
    
    If detailsJson("data").Exists("score") And Not IsNull(detailsJson("data")("score")) Then
        communityScore = CDbl(detailsJson("data")("score"))
    Else
        communityScore = 0: GoTo ErrGetData
    End If
    
    Dim statsUrl As String: statsUrl = "https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & malID & "/statistics"
    Set statsJson = FetchJikanApiData(statsUrl)
    If Not statsJson Is Nothing Then
        If statsJson("data").Exists("scores") Then
            Dim item As Object
            On Error Resume Next
            For Each item In statsJson("data")("scores")
                If CLng(item("score")) = CLng(userScore) Then
                    voteCount = item("votes")
                    scorePercentage = "'" & Format(item("percentage"), "0.0") & "%"
                    Exit For
                End If
            Next item
            On Error GoTo 0
        End If
    End If
    
    Dim dataDict As Object: Set dataDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dataDict.Add "MAL_ID", malID
    dataDict.Add "CommunityScore", communityScore
    dataDict.Add "ScorePercentage", scorePercentage
    dataDict.Add "VoteCount", voteCount
    Set GetJikanData = dataDict
    Exit Function
ErrGetData:
    Set GetJikanData = Nothing
End Function

Private Function FetchJikanApiData(ByVal requestUrl As String) As Object
    ' Pouûijeme STATIC, aby se instance objektu zachovala mezi vol·nÌmi funkce
    Static httpReq As Object
    Dim attempt As Long, currentDelay As Long
    
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    
    ' 1. Lazy Loading: Vytvo¯Ìme objekt pouze jednou (p¯i prvnÌm vol·nÌ)
    If httpReq Is Nothing Then
        Set httpReq = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    End If
    
    ' 2. Retry Loop: ÿeöÌ pouze komunikaci, nevytv·¯Ì zbyteËnÏ novÈ objekty
    For attempt = 1 To MAX_RETRIES
        ' Reset objektu pro nov˝ poûadavek pomocÌ .Open
        httpReq.Open "GET", requestUrl, False
        httpReq.sEnd
        
        If httpReq.status = 200 Then
            ' ⁄spÏch - vr·tÌme parsovan˝ JSON
            Set FetchJikanApiData = JsonConverter.ParseJson(httpReq.responseText)
            Exit Function
        Else
            ' Ne˙spÏch - Ëek·me (Exponential Backoff)
            If attempt < MAX_RETRIES Then
                currentDelay = RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * (2 ^ (attempt - 1))
                Sleep currentDelay
            End If
        End If
    Next attempt

' Pokud dojdeme sem, vöechny pokusy selhaly
Cleanup:
    Set FetchJikanApiData = Nothing
    Exit Function

ErrHandler:
    ' Pokud nastane chyba (nap¯. p¯i CreateObject nebo .Send), zalogujeme a konËÌme
    ' Debug.Print "Error in FetchJikanApiData: " & Err.Description
    Resume Cleanup
End Function

'====================================================================================================
' SEKCE C: VðSTUP A POMOCN… FUNKCE
'====================================================================================================
Private Function FormatVoteCount(votes As Long) As String
    If votes >= 1000000 Then
        FormatVoteCount = Replace(Format(votes / 1000000, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " mil."
    ElseIf votes >= 1000 Then
        FormatVoteCount = Round(votes / 1000, 0) & " tis."
    Else
        FormatVoteCount = CStr(votes)
    End If
End Function

Private Sub VytvorPrehledyRozdilu(wsTarget As Worksheet, negativeData As Object, positiveData As Object)
    Dim shp As Shape
    On Error Resume Next
    For Each shp In wsTarget.Shapes
        If left(shp.Name, Len(UNIQUE_PREFIX)) = UNIQUE_PREFIX And InStr(1, shp.Name, "_Line") > 0 Then shp.Delete
    Next shp
    On Error GoTo 0
    VytvorJedenPrehled wsTarget, negativeData, "BG2", "Hodnotil jsem HŸÿE neû pr˘mÏr", RGB(153, 0, 0), RGB(255, 230, 230), RGB(200, 0, 0)
    VytvorJedenPrehled wsTarget, positiveData, "BN2", "Hodnotil jsem L…PE neû pr˘mÏr", RGB(0, 102, 51), RGB(230, 255, 242), RGB(0, 153, 0)
End Sub

Private Sub VytvorJedenPrehled(ws As Worksheet, dataList As Object, startCell As String, title As String, headerColor As Long, contentColor As Long, diffColor As Long)
    Dim tbHeader As Shape, tbContent As Shape, lineShape As Shape, charRange As Object
    
    Dim specificPrefix As String: specificPrefix = UNIQUE_PREFIX & Replace(startCell, "2", "")
    Dim headerName As String: headerName = specificPrefix & "_Header"
    Dim contentName As String: contentName = specificPrefix & "_Content"
    Dim lineNames(1 To 6) As String
    Dim i As Integer
    For i = 1 To 6
        lineNames(i) = specificPrefix & "_Line" & i
    Next i

    On Error Resume Next
    For i = 1 To 6
        ws.Shapes(lineNames(i)).Delete
    Next i
    On Error GoTo 0

    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbHeader = ws.Shapes(headerName)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If tbHeader Is Nothing Then
        Dim topPos As Double, leftPos As Double, headerHeight As Double, contentHeight As Double, boxWidth As Double
        With ws.Range(startCell)
            topPos = .top: leftPos = .left
        End With
        headerHeight = 30: boxWidth = 420: contentHeight = 160
        Set tbHeader = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, leftPos, topPos, boxWidth, headerHeight)
        tbHeader.Name = headerName
    End If
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbContent = ws.Shapes(contentName)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If tbContent Is Nothing Then
        Set tbContent = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height, tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.Height * 5.3)
        tbContent.Name = contentName
    End If
    
    With tbHeader
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = headerColor
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAlignCenter
            .TextRange.text = title
            With .TextRange.Font
                .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 18: .Bold = msoTrue
                .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            End With
        End With
    End With
    
    With tbContent
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = contentColor
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
        With .TextFrame2
            .TextRange.text = ""
            With .TextRange.Font.Fill
                .Visible = msoTrue
                .Solid
                .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
            .TextRange.Font.Italic = msoFalse
            .MarginLeft = 10: .MarginRight = 10: .MarginTop = 10: .MarginBottom = 10
        End With
    End With

    Dim animeCount As Integer, currentAnime As Object
    
    For Each currentAnime In dataList
        If animeCount >= POCET_ANIME_V_PREHLEDU Then Exit For
        animeCount = animeCount + 1
        
        ' --- 1. SestavenÌ ¯etÏzce v pamÏti (StringBuilder pattern) ---
        Dim formattedPerc As String
        formattedPerc = currentAnime("ScorePercentage")
        If left(formattedPerc, 1) = "'" Then formattedPerc = Mid(formattedPerc, 2)
        
        Dim sRank As String: sRank = animeCount & ". "
        Dim sTitle As String: sTitle = currentAnime("Title")
        Dim sLabelMy As String: sLabelMy = "MÈ hodnocenÌ: "
        Dim sValMy As String: sValMy = currentAnime("MyRating") & "/10"
        Dim sLabelComm As String: sLabelComm = " vs. komunitnÌ: "
        Dim sValComm As String: sValComm = Format(currentAnime("CommunityScore"), "0.00") & "/10"
        Dim sLabelDiff As String: sLabelDiff = " (RozdÌl: "
        Dim sValDiff As String: sValDiff = Format(currentAnime("Difference"), "0.00")
        Dim sLabelDiffEnd As String: sLabelDiffEnd = ")"
        
        Dim sLineVotes As String
        ' Zde se nic nemÏnÌ na textu, jen si ho p¯ipravÌme pro vloûenÌ
        sLineVotes = "S m˝m hodnocenÌm souhlasÌ: " & FormatVoteCount(currentAnime("VoteCount")) & " uûivatel˘ (" & formattedPerc & ")"
        
        Dim sFullBlock As String
        sFullBlock = sRank & sTitle & vbCrLf & _
                     sLabelMy & sValMy & sLabelComm & sValComm & sLabelDiff & sValDiff & sLabelDiffEnd & vbCrLf & _
                     sLineVotes
                      
        If animeCount > 1 Then sFullBlock = vbCrLf & vbCrLf & sFullBlock
        
        ' --- 2. VloûenÌ textu najednou (Vol·nÌ Excel objektu pouze 1x) ---
        Set charRange = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(sFullBlock)
        
        ' --- 3. Form·tov·nÌ (relativnÏ k vloûenÈmu bloku) ---
        Dim curPos As Long: curPos = 1
        If animeCount > 1 Then curPos = curPos + 2 ' P¯eskoËit ˙vodnÌ vbCrLf a vbCrLf
        
        ' Rank "1. "
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sRank)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sRank)
        
        ' Title (Bold + Italic)
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sTitle)).Font: .Bold = msoTrue: .Italic = msoTrue: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sTitle) + 1 ' +1 za vbCrLf
        
        ' "MÈ hodnocenÌ: "
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLabelMy)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLabelMy)
        
        ' "X/10"
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sValMy)).Font: .Bold = msoTrue: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sValMy)
        
        ' " vs. komunitnÌ: "
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLabelComm)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLabelComm)
        
        ' "Y.YY/10"
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sValComm)).Font: .Bold = msoTrue: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sValComm)
        
        ' " (RozdÌl: "
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLabelDiff)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLabelDiff)
        
        ' "Z.ZZ" (BarevnÏ)
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sValDiff)).Font: .Bold = msoTrue: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = diffColor: End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sValDiff)
        
        ' ")"
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLabelDiffEnd)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLabelDiffEnd) + 1 ' +1 za vbCrLf
        
        ' --- T¯etÌ ¯·dek: Form·tov·nÌ (VoteCount tuËnÏ + Procenta tuËnÏ) ---
        Dim sLine3Base As String: sLine3Base = "S m˝m hodnocenÌm souhlasÌ: "
        Dim sLine3Count As String: sLine3Count = FormatVoteCount(currentAnime("VoteCount"))
        Dim sLine3Users As String: sLine3Users = " uûivatel˘ ("
        Dim sLine3Perc As String: sLine3Perc = formattedPerc
        Dim sLine3Close As String: sLine3Close = ")"
        
        ' 1. Base text
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLine3Base)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLine3Base)
        
        ' 2. Count (TuËnÏ)
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLine3Count)).Font: .Bold = msoTrue: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLine3Count)
        
        ' 3. " uûivatel˘ ("
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLine3Users)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLine3Users)
        
        ' 4. Procenta (TuËnÏ)
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLine3Perc)).Font: .Bold = msoTrue: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        curPos = curPos + Len(sLine3Perc)

        ' 5. ")"
        With charRange.Characters(curPos, Len(sLine3Close)).Font: .Bold = msoFalse: .Italic = msoFalse: .size = 11: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        ' Konec form·tov·nÌ tohoto bloku
        
    Next currentAnime
    
    Dim borderColor As Long: borderColor = RGB(0, 0, 0)
    Dim borderWidth As Double: borderWidth = 1.5
    Set lineShape = ws.Shapes.AddLine(tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top): With lineShape: .Name = lineNames(1): .line.weight = borderWidth: .line.ForeColor.RGB = borderColor: End With
    Set lineShape = ws.Shapes.AddLine(tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height): With lineShape: .Name = lineNames(2): .line.weight = borderWidth: .line.ForeColor.RGB = borderColor: End With
    Set lineShape = ws.Shapes.AddLine(tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height): With lineShape: .Name = lineNames(3): .line.weight = borderWidth: .line.ForeColor.RGB = borderColor: End With
    Set lineShape = ws.Shapes.AddLine(tbContent.left, tbContent.top, tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height): With lineShape: .Name = lineNames(4): .line.weight = borderWidth: .line.ForeColor.RGB = borderColor: End With
    Set lineShape = ws.Shapes.AddLine(tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top, tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height): With lineShape: .Name = lineNames(5): .line.weight = borderWidth: .line.ForeColor.RGB = borderColor: End With
    Set lineShape = ws.Shapes.AddLine(tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height): With lineShape: .Name = lineNames(6): .line.weight = borderWidth: .line.ForeColor.RGB = borderColor: End With
End Sub

Private Sub DrawLine(ws As Worksheet, x1, y1, x2, y2, nm As String, clr As Long)
    Dim lObj As Shape
    Set lObj = ws.Shapes.AddLine(x1, y1, x2, y2)
    lObj.Name = nm
    lObj.line.weight = 1.5
    lObj.line.ForeColor.RGB = clr
End Sub

Private Function GetUpdateTierDays(releaseDate As Variant) As Long
    On Error GoTo EH
    If Not IsDate(releaseDate) Then
        GetUpdateTierDays = 0
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Dim da As Long
    da = DateDiff("d", CDate(releaseDate), Date)
    
    If da < 0 Then
        GetUpdateTierDays = 3
    ElseIf da <= 183 Then
        GetUpdateTierDays = 3
    ElseIf da <= 365 Then
        GetUpdateTierDays = 7
    ElseIf da <= 1095 Then
        GetUpdateTierDays = 30
    Else
        GetUpdateTierDays = 180
    End If
    Exit Function
EH:
    GetUpdateTierDays = 0
End Function

Private Sub SortArrayListByDictKey(list As Object, key As String, ascending As Boolean)
    If list.count < 2 Then Exit Sub
    QuickSortArrayList list, 0, list.count - 1, key, ascending
End Sub

Private Sub QuickSortArrayList(list As Object, First As Long, Last As Long, key As String, ascending As Boolean)
    Dim pivotVal As Double, Temp As Object
    Dim low As Long, high As Long
    
    low = First: high = Last
    ' Pivot je uprost¯ed; oËek·v·me, ûe klÌË (nap¯. Difference) je ËÌslo
    pivotVal = CDbl(list((low + high) \ 2)(key))
    
    Do
        If ascending Then
            While CDbl(list(low)(key)) < pivotVal: low = low + 1: Wend
            While CDbl(list(high)(key)) > pivotVal: high = high - 1: Wend
        Else
            While CDbl(list(low)(key)) > pivotVal: low = low + 1: Wend
            While CDbl(list(high)(key)) < pivotVal: high = high - 1: Wend
        End If
        
        If low <= high Then
            Set Temp = list(low): list(low) = list(high): list(high) = Temp
            low = low + 1: high = high - 1
        End If
    Loop While low <= high
    
    If First < high Then QuickSortArrayList list, First, high, key, ascending
    If low < Last Then QuickSortArrayList list, low, Last, key, ascending
End Sub

'====================================================================================================
' MODUL: Graf Ëasu (OPTIMALIZOV¡NO)
'====================================================================================================
Public Sub VytvorGrafCasuPodleHodnoceni(Optional wsData As Worksheet, Optional wsCiel As Worksheet, Optional lr As Long)
    On Error GoTo Chyba
    If wsData Is Nothing Then Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    If wsCiel Is Nothing Then Set wsCiel = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    If lr = 0 Then lr = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    Dim dataArr As Variant
    ' NaËteme sloupce I, J, K (Epizody, »as, HodnocenÌ). Rozsah I:K
    ' I=Col 1, J=Col 2, K=Col 3
    dataArr = wsData.Range("I2:K" & lr).Value
    
    Dim dataDict As Object: Set dataDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim colorDict As Object: Set colorDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim firstOccurrenceRow As Object: Set firstOccurrenceRow = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To 10: dataDict(CStr(i)) = 0: Next i
    dataDict("-") = 0
    colorDict("-") = RGB(160, 160, 160)
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        Dim eps As Variant: eps = dataArr(i, 1)
        Dim dur As Variant: dur = dataArr(i, 2)
        Dim rat As Variant: rat = dataArr(i, 3)
        
        If IsNumeric(eps) And IsNumeric(dur) And eps > 0 And dur > 0 Then
            Dim mins As Double: mins = CDbl(eps) * CDbl(dur)
            Dim rKey As String
            
            If IsNumeric(rat) And rat >= 1 And rat <= 10 Then
                rKey = CStr(Int(rat))
                If Not firstOccurrenceRow.Exists(rKey) Then firstOccurrenceRow(rKey) = i + 1
            Else
                rKey = "-"
            End If
            dataDict(rKey) = dataDict(rKey) + mins
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' NaËÌst barvy (jen 10 ËtenÌ)
    Dim k As Variant
    For Each k In firstOccurrenceRow.keys
        colorDict(k) = wsData.Cells(firstOccurrenceRow(k), "K").DisplayFormat.Interior.Color
    Next k
    
    ' Data pro graf
    Dim kat(0 To 10) As String, vals(0 To 10) As Double
    For i = 1 To 10
        kat(10 - i) = CStr(i): vals(10 - i) = Round(dataDict(CStr(i)) / 60, 2)
    Next i
    kat(10) = "-": vals(10) = Round(dataDict("-") / 60, 2)
    Dim totalHours As Double: totalHours = Application.WorksheetFunction.Sum(vals)
    
    ' Graf
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject
    On Error Resume Next: Set chtObj = wsCiel.ChartObjects("GrafCasPodleHodnoceni")
    On Error GoTo Chyba
    
    ' Dim dbgStep Removed
    On Error GoTo Chyba
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chtObj = wsCiel.ChartObjects.Add(left:=500, top:=50, Width:=550, Height:=350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafCasPodleHodnoceni"
        
        With chtObj.Chart
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered
            .HasLegend = False
            .HasTitle = True
            
            ' DEBUG SECTION FOR CHART TITLE - REMOVED, KEPT SAFE LOGIC
            On Error Resume Next
            .ChartTitle.text = "HodnocenÌ vs Ëas sledov·nÌ"
            .ChartTitle.Font.size = 16
            .Axes(xlCategory).ReversePlotOrder = True
            On Error GoTo Chyba
            
            If .SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        End With
    End If
    
    With chtObj.Chart
        If .SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        
        .SeriesCollection(1).values = vals
        .SeriesCollection(1).XValues = kat
        
        ' Oprava pro GapWidth
        .ChartGroups(1).GapWidth = 100
        
        Dim sc As Series: Set sc = .SeriesCollection(1)
        sc.ApplyDataLabels
        
        Dim j As Long
        For j = 1 To sc.Points.count
            Dim pt As Point: Set pt = sc.Points(j)
            Dim catName As String: catName = kat(j - 1)
            Dim valV As Double: valV = vals(j - 1)
            
            If colorDict.Exists(catName) Then pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = colorDict(catName) _
            Else pt.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(128, 128, 128)
            
            If valV > 0 Then
                pt.HasDataLabel = True
                pt.DataLabel.text = Replace(Format(valV, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " h (" & _
                                    Replace(Format((valV / totalHours) * 100, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " %)"
                pt.DataLabel.Font.Bold = True
            Else
                pt.HasDataLabel = False
            End If
        Next j
    End With
    
    UpdateStatsTextBox wsCiel, chtObj, "TextBoxCasPodleHodnoceni", "Celkem hodin: " & Replace(Format(totalHours, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " (" & Replace(Format(totalHours / 24, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " dnÌ)"
    Exit Sub
Chyba:
    MsgBox "Chyba Graf »asu: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'====================================================================================================
' MODUL: Graf poËet epizod (OPTIMALIZOV¡NO)
'====================================================================================================
Public Sub VytvorGrafPoctuEpizod(Optional wsData As Worksheet, Optional wsCiel As Worksheet, Optional lr As Long)
    On Error GoTo Chyba
    If wsData Is Nothing Then Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    If wsCiel Is Nothing Then Set wsCiel = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    If lr = 0 Then lr = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    Dim dataArr As Variant
    ' Sloupce D, I, K, M. Rozsah D:M.
    ' D=1, I=6, K=8, M=10
    dataArr = wsData.Range("D2:M" & lr).Value
    
    Dim countDict As Object: Set countDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim sumDict As Object: Set sumDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim cats As Variant: cats = Array("Movie", "1", "2-6", "7-13", "14-26", "27-52", "53-100", "?")
    Dim i As Long
    For i = LBound(cats) To UBound(cats): countDict(cats(i)) = 0: sumDict(cats(i)) = 0: Next i
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        Dim dateEnd As Variant: dateEnd = dataArr(i, 10)
        Dim catKey As String
        
        If Not IsDate(dateEnd) Then
            catKey = "?"
        Else
            Dim eps As Variant: eps = dataArr(i, 6)
            Dim typ As String: typ = CStr(dataArr(i, 1))
            If UCase(typ) = "MOVIE" Then
                catKey = "Movie"
            Else
                Select Case eps
                    Case 1: catKey = "1"
                    Case 2 To 6: catKey = "2-6"
                    Case 7 To 13: catKey = "7-13"
                    Case 14 To 26: catKey = "14-26"
                    Case 27 To 52: catKey = "27-52"
                    Case 53 To 100: catKey = "53-100"
                    Case Else: catKey = "?"
                End Select
            End If
        End If
        
        countDict(catKey) = countDict(catKey) + 1
        If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, 8)) Then sumDict(catKey) = sumDict(catKey) + CDbl(dataArr(i, 8))
    Next i
    
    Dim pocty() As Long, avgs() As Variant
    ReDim pocty(LBound(cats) To UBound(cats))
    ReDim avgs(LBound(cats) To UBound(cats))
    Dim totalC As Long: totalC = 0
    
    For i = LBound(cats) To UBound(cats)
        Dim k As String: k = cats(i)
        pocty(i) = countDict(k)
        If k <> "?" Then totalC = totalC + countDict(k)
        If countDict(k) > 0 Then avgs(i) = sumDict(k) / countDict(k) Else avgs(i) = 0
    Next i
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject
    On Error Resume Next: Set chtObj = wsCiel.ChartObjects("GrafEpizodyHodnoceni")
    On Error GoTo Chyba
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
         Set chtObj = wsCiel.ChartObjects.Add(left:=50, top:=350, Width:=600, Height:=350)
         chtObj.Name = "GrafEpizodyHodnoceni"
         With chtObj.Chart
            .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
            .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
         End With
    End If
    
    With chtObj.Chart
        .SeriesCollection(1).values = pocty: .SeriesCollection(1).XValues = cats
        .SeriesCollection(2).values = avgs: .SeriesCollection(2).AxisGroup = xlSecondary: .SeriesCollection(2).ChartType = xlLineMarkers
        
        Dim sc As Series: Set sc = .SeriesCollection(1)
        Dim j As Long
        For j = 1 To sc.Points.count
             If pocty(j - 1) > 0 Then
                 sc.Points(j).HasDataLabel = True
                 If totalC > 0 And cats(j - 1) <> "?" Then
                     sc.Points(j).DataLabel.text = "# " & pocty(j - 1) & vbLf & "(" & Replace(Format((pocty(j - 1) / totalC) * 100, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " %)"
                 Else
                     sc.Points(j).DataLabel.text = "# " & pocty(j - 1)
                 End If
             Else
                 sc.Points(j).HasDataLabel = False
             End If
        Next j
    End With
    Exit Sub
Chyba:
    MsgBox "Chyba Graf Epizody: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' === QuickSort Helper ===
Private Sub QuickSort2D(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal First As Long, ByVal Last As Long, ByVal KeyCol As Long)
    Dim pivot As Variant, TempArr As Variant
    Dim low As Long, high As Long
    low = First: high = Last
    pivot = arr((low + high) \ 2, KeyCol)
    Do
        While arr(low, KeyCol) < pivot: low = low + 1: Wend
        While arr(high, KeyCol) > pivot: high = high - 1: Wend
        If low <= high Then
             ' Swap rows
             Dim k As Long
             For k = LBound(arr, 2) To UBound(arr, 2)
                 Dim t As Variant
                 t = arr(low, k): arr(low, k) = arr(high, k): arr(high, k) = t
             Next k
             low = low + 1: high = high - 1
        End If
    Loop While low <= high
    If First < high Then QuickSort2D arr, First, high, KeyCol
    If low < Last Then QuickSort2D arr, low, Last, KeyCol
End Sub






--- KONEC K”DU [Graphs_Ratings] ---

Modul: Graph_Dub
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Graph_Dub] ---
Option Explicit

'================================================================================================
'##### HLAVNÕ SPOUäTÃCÕ MAKRO (CENTRALIZOVAN¡ DATA - OPTIMALIZOV¡NO) #####
'================================================================================================
Public Sub AktualizovatVsechnyGrafyDabing()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Dim wsData As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim arrData As Variant
    Dim dictComments As Object
    Dim rngComments As Range, cell As Range
    Dim dictAgregovanaData As Object
    
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    
    ' óóó OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ (START) óóó
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = False
        .Calculation = xlCalculationManual
        .EnableEvents = False
    End With
    
    ' óóó KROK 1: NA»TENÕ DAT DO PAMÃTI óóó
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "P").End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        MsgBox "é·dn· data pro dabing.", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    ' NaËteme oblast J2 aû P(lastRow).
    ' Indexy v poli arrData (relativnÏ k J):
    ' 1 = J (»as na epizodu)
    ' 2 = K (HodnocenÌ)
    ' 6 = O (Celkov˝ Ëas)
    ' 7 = P (Dabing text)
    arrData = wsData.Range("J2:P" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' óóó KROK 2: RYCHL… NA»TENÕ KOMENT¡ÿŸ óóó
    Set dictComments = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    On Error Resume Next
    Set rngComments = wsData.Range("P2:P" & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    If Not rngComments Is Nothing Then
        For Each cell In rngComments
            dictComments(cell.row) = cell.Comment.text
        Next cell
    End If
    
    ' óóó KROK 3: JEDNOR¡ZOV¡ AGREGACE DAT óóó
    ' V˝stup: Dictionary s klÌËem Jazyk a Hodnotou Array(Count, SumRating, RatedCount, SumTime)
    Set dictAgregovanaData = AgregovatDataDabing(arrData, dictComments)
    
    If dictAgregovanaData.count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "é·dn· platn· dabingov· data.", vbInformation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    ' óóó KROK 4: PÿED¡NÕ AGREGOVANðCH DAT PROCEDUR¡M óóó
    Call VytvorGrafDabing_Count(dictAgregovanaData)
    Call VytvorGrafDabing_Avg(dictAgregovanaData)
    Call VytvorGrafDabing_Time(dictAgregovanaData)
    
CleanExit:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    MsgBox "Kritick· chyba v modulu Dabing: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### POMOCN¡ FUNKCE: AGREGACE DAT (JEDINð PRŸCHOD + REGEX) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Function AgregovatDataDabing(dataArr As Variant, dictComments As Object) As Object
    Dim dict As Object
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dict.CompareMode = vbTextCompare ' Case Insensitive
    
    ' P¯edvyplnÏnÌ klÌË˘ (volitelnÈ, ale dobrÈ pro po¯·dek)
    dict.Add "JAP", Array(0, 0#, 0, 0#)
    dict.Add "ENG", Array(0, 0#, 0, 0#)
    dict.Add "CZ", Array(0, 0#, 0, 0#)
    dict.Add "SK", Array(0, 0#, 0, 0#)
    
    Dim i As Long, currentRow As Long
    Dim cellContent As String, cellP As String
    Dim valRating As Variant, valTimeEp As Double, valTotalTime As Double
    Dim dabArr As Variant, dab As Variant
    Dim arrStats As Variant ' (Count, SumRating, RatedCount, SumTime)
    Dim komentar As String, casZpracovan As Boolean
    
    ' Regex objekt (vytvo¯Ìme jen jednou)
    Dim regEx As Object
    Set regEx = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    With regEx
        .Global = True: .IgnoreCase = True
        .Pattern = "([A-Z]+)\s*:\s*(\d+)"
    End With
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        currentRow = i + 1
        
        cellP = Trim(dataArr(i, 7)) ' Sloupec P (Dubbing)
        valRating = dataArr(i, 2)   ' Sloupec K (Rating)
        valTimeEp = CDbl(Nz(dataArr(i, 1), 0))   ' Sloupec J (Time/Ep)
        valTotalTime = CDbl(Nz(dataArr(i, 6), 0)) ' Sloupec O (Total Time)
        
        If Len(cellP) > 0 Then
            dabArr = Split(cellP, ";")
            
            ' óóó A) Z¡KLADNÕ STATISTIKY (Count, Rating) óóó
            For Each dab In dabArr
                dab = UCase(Trim(dab))
                If dab <> "" Then
                    If Not dict.Exists(dab) Then dict.Add dab, Array(0, 0#, 0, 0#)
                    arrStats = dict(dab)
                    
                    ' Count
                    arrStats(0) = arrStats(0) + 1
                    
                    ' Rating
                    If IsNumeric(valRating) And Not IsEmpty(valRating) Then
                        arrStats(1) = arrStats(1) + CDbl(valRating)
                        arrStats(2) = arrStats(2) + 1
                    End If
                    
                    dict(dab) = arrStats ' Uloûit zpÏt (Array je Value Type p¯i p¯i¯azenÌ)
                End If
            Next dab
            
            ' óóó B) »AS (SloûitÏjöÌ logika s koment·¯i) óóó
            casZpracovan = False
            
            ' 1. Check Comment
            komentar = ""
            If dictComments.Exists(currentRow) Then komentar = dictComments(currentRow)
            
            If Len(komentar) > 0 And valTimeEp > 0 Then
                If regEx.Test(komentar) Then
                    Dim matches As Object, match As Object
                    Dim epCnt As Long
                    Set matches = regEx.Execute(komentar)
                    For Each match In matches
                        dab = UCase(match.SubMatches(0))
                        epCnt = CLng(match.SubMatches(1))
                        
                        If epCnt > 0 And dict.Exists(dab) Then
                            arrStats = dict(dab)
                            arrStats(3) = arrStats(3) + (epCnt * valTimeEp)
                            dict(dab) = arrStats
                        End If
                    Next match
                    casZpracovan = True
                End If
            End If
            
            ' 2. Pokud nenÌ split time v koment·¯i, rozpoËÌtat rovnomÏrnÏ
            If Not casZpracovan And valTotalTime > 0 Then
                Dim countValidDabs As Long
                countValidDabs = 0
                ' SpoËÌtat validnÌ
                For Each dab In dabArr
                    If Trim(dab) <> "" Then countValidDabs = countValidDabs + 1
                Next dab
                
                If countValidDabs > 0 Then
                    Dim timePerDab As Double
                    timePerDab = valTotalTime / countValidDabs
                    For Each dab In dabArr
                        dab = UCase(Trim(dab))
                        If dab <> "" And dict.Exists(dab) Then
                            arrStats = dict(dab)
                            arrStats(3) = arrStats(3) + timePerDab
                            dict(dab) = arrStats
                        End If
                    Next dab
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' ⁄klid pr·zdn˝ch (ty co majÌ Count 0) - nap¯. pokud jsme p¯edvyplnili SK a nenÌ tam
    Dim k As Variant
    For Each k In dict.keys
        If dict(k)(0) = 0 Then dict.Remove k
    Next k
    
    Set AgregovatDataDabing = dict
End Function

'================================================================================================
'##### 1) TLA»ÕTKO (Beze zmÏny) #####
'================================================================================================
Public Sub VytvorTlacitkoGrafDabing()
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    Dim ws As Worksheet, rng As Range, btn As Shape
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Set rng = ws.Range("DL1")
    
    rng.ColumnWidth = 27.14: rng.RowHeight = 24.75
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set btn = ws.Shapes("btnAktualizaceDabing")
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    
    If btn Is Nothing Then
        Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
        btn.Name = "btnAktualizaceDabing"
    Else
        btn.left = rng.left: btn.top = rng.top: btn.Width = rng.Width: btn.Height = rng.Height
    End If
    
    With btn
        .OnAction = "AktualizovatVsechnyGrafyDabing"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
        .line.Visible = msoTrue: .line.weight = 1.5: .line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle: .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter: .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat grafy"
            With .TextRange.Font
                .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
        End With
    End With
    Exit Sub
ErrBtn:
    MsgBox "Chyba tlaËÌtka dabing: " & err.Description
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### 2) GRAF PO»TU (BAR CHART - AGREGOVAN¡ DATA) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorGrafDabing_Count(dictData As Object)
    Dim wsC As Worksheet
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    Dim keysArray As Variant, valuesArray As Variant
    Dim totalDabingCount As Long
    Dim i As Long
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro zachov·nÌ form·tov·nÌ
    Dim oldYAxisMax As Double, oldYAxisMin As Double, oldYAxisMajorUnit As Double
    Dim oldChartTitle As String, oldChartTitleFontSize As Double
    Dim oldCategoryFontSize As Double
    
    Set wsC = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    If dictData.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    keysArray = dictData.keys
    ReDim valuesArray(0 To UBound(keysArray))
    
    ' Extract Count (Index 0)
    For i = 0 To UBound(keysArray)
        valuesArray(i) = dictData(keysArray(i))(0)
    Next i
    
    totalDabingCount = Application.Sum(valuesArray)
    
    ' Bubble Sort (Descending)
    Dim X As Long, Y As Long, tmpV As Long, tmpK As String
    For X = LBound(valuesArray) To UBound(valuesArray) - 1
        For Y = X + 1 To UBound(valuesArray)
            If valuesArray(X) < valuesArray(Y) Then
                tmpV = valuesArray(X): valuesArray(X) = valuesArray(Y): valuesArray(Y) = tmpV
                tmpK = keysArray(X): keysArray(X) = keysArray(Y): keysArray(Y) = tmpK
            End If
        Next Y
    Next X
    
    ' --- GRAF ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafDabingu")
    
    If Not chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht.Axes(xlValue)
            oldYAxisMax = .MaximumScale: oldYAxisMin = .MinimumScale: oldYAxisMajorUnit = .MajorUnit
        End With
        If cht.HasTitle Then
            oldChartTitle = cht.ChartTitle.text: oldChartTitleFontSize = cht.ChartTitle.Font.size
        End If
        oldCategoryFontSize = cht.Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Font.size
    Else
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(100, 400, 500, 300)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafDabingu"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "PoËet anime podle dabingu"
            .ChartTitle.Font.size = 14: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False
            .Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Font.size = 10
            .Axes(xlCategory).ReversePlotOrder = True
        End With
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Update Data
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .XValues = keysArray
        .values = valuesArray
        
        If cht.ChartType <> xlBarClustered Then
            cht.ChartType = xlBarClustered
            On Error Resume Next
            cht.Axes(xlCategory).ReversePlotOrder = True
            On Error GoTo 0
        End If
        
        If Not .HasDataLabels Then
            .ApplyDataLabels
            .DataLabels.Position = xlLabelPositionOutsideEnd
            .DataLabels.Font.size = 10: .DataLabels.Font.Bold = True
        End If
        
        For i = 1 To .Points.count
            .Points(i).DataLabel.text = valuesArray(i - 1) & " (" & Format(valuesArray(i - 1) / totalDabingCount, "0.0%") & ")"
            .Points(i).DataLabel.Font.Bold = True
        Next i
    End With
    
    ' Restore Settings
    With cht
        If oldChartTitle <> "" Then .ChartTitle.text = oldChartTitle
        If oldChartTitleFontSize <> 0 Then .ChartTitle.Font.size = oldChartTitleFontSize
        With .Axes(xlValue)
            If oldYAxisMax <> 0 Then .MaximumScale = oldYAxisMax
            If oldYAxisMin <> 0 Then .MinimumScale = oldYAxisMin
            If oldYAxisMajorUnit <> 0 Then .MajorUnit = oldYAxisMajorUnit
        End With
        If oldCategoryFontSize <> 0 Then .Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Font.size = oldCategoryFontSize
    End With
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### 3) GRAF HODNOCENÕ (AGREGOVAN¡ DATA) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorGrafDabing_Avg(dictData As Object)
    Const TOP_N As Long = 10
    Dim wsC As Worksheet, chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    Dim i As Long, keysArr As Variant
    Dim arrStats As Variant
    Dim isNewChart As Boolean
    Dim oldYAxisMax As Double, oldYAxisMin As Double, oldYAxisMajorUnit As Double
    Dim oldValueAxisHasTitle As Boolean
    
    Set wsC = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    If dictData.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    keysArr = dictData.keys
    Dim avgs() As Double
    ReDim avgs(0 To UBound(keysArr))
    
    For i = 0 To UBound(keysArr)
        arrStats = dictData(keysArr(i))
        ' Index 1 = SumRating, Index 2 = RatedCount
        If arrStats(2) > 0 Then
            avgs(i) = arrStats(1) / arrStats(2)
        Else
            avgs(i) = 0
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' Bubble Sort (Rating Desc)
    Dim a As Long, b As Long, tmpD As Double, tmpS As String
    For a = LBound(avgs) To UBound(avgs) - 1
        For b = a + 1 To UBound(avgs)
            If avgs(b) > avgs(a) Then
                tmpD = avgs(a): avgs(a) = avgs(b): avgs(b) = tmpD
                tmpS = keysArr(a): keysArr(a) = keysArr(b): keysArr(b) = tmpS
            End If
        Next b
    Next a
    
    ' TOP N
    Dim actualN As Long: actualN = IIf(UBound(keysArr) + 1 < TOP_N, UBound(keysArr) + 1, TOP_N)
    Dim finalKeys() As String, finalAvgs() As Double
    ReDim finalKeys(0 To actualN - 1): ReDim finalAvgs(0 To actualN - 1)
    
    For i = 0 To actualN - 1
        finalKeys(i) = keysArr(i)
        finalAvgs(i) = avgs(i)
    Next i
    
    ' Chart
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafDabingAvgRating")
    If Not chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNewChart = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht.Axes(xlValue)
            oldYAxisMax = .MaximumScale: oldYAxisMin = .MinimumScale: oldYAxisMajorUnit = .MajorUnit
            oldValueAxisHasTitle = .HasTitle
        End With
    Else
        isNewChart = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(100, 750, 500, 300)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafDabingAvgRating"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ dabingu"
            .HasLegend = False
        End With
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .XValues = finalKeys
        .values = finalAvgs
        .ApplyDataLabels
        For i = 1 To .Points.count
            .Points(i).DataLabel.text = Replace(Format(finalAvgs(i - 1), "0.00"), ".", ",")
            .Points(i).DataLabel.Font.Bold = True
        Next i
    End With
    
    With cht.Axes(xlValue)
        If isNewChart Then
            .HasTitle = True: .AxisTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ"
        Else
            .HasTitle = oldValueAxisHasTitle
            If oldValueAxisHasTitle Then .AxisTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ"
        End If
        If oldYAxisMax <> 0 Then .MaximumScale = oldYAxisMax Else .MaximumScale = 10
        If oldYAxisMin <> 0 Then .MinimumScale = oldYAxisMin Else .MinimumScale = 0
        If oldYAxisMajorUnit <> 0 Then .MajorUnit = oldYAxisMajorUnit Else .MajorUnit = 1
    End With
End Sub

'================================================================================================
'##### 4) GRAF »ASU (AGREGOVAN¡ DATA) #####
'================================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorGrafDabing_Time(dictData As Object)
    Dim wsC As Worksheet, chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    Dim i As Long, keysArr As Variant, valuesArray As Variant
    Dim arrStats As Variant
    Dim oldYAxisMin As Double, oldYAxisMax As Double
    
    Set wsC = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    If dictData.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    keysArr = dictData.keys
    ReDim valuesArray(0 To UBound(keysArr))
    
    For i = 0 To UBound(keysArr)
        ' Index 3 = SumTime (minuty) -> To Hours
        valuesArray(i) = dictData(keysArr(i))(3) / 60
    Next i
    
    ' Sort
    Dim X As Long, Y As Long, tV As Double, tK As String
    For X = LBound(valuesArray) To UBound(valuesArray) - 1
        For Y = X + 1 To UBound(valuesArray)
            If valuesArray(X) < valuesArray(Y) Then
                tV = valuesArray(X): valuesArray(X) = valuesArray(Y): valuesArray(Y) = tV
                tK = keysArr(X): keysArr(X) = keysArr(Y): keysArr(Y) = tK
            End If
        Next Y
    Next X
    
    ' Chart
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafCasDabing")
    If Not chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht.Axes(xlValue)
           If Not .MinimumScaleIsAuto Then oldYAxisMin = .MinimumScale Else oldYAxisMin = -1
           If Not .MaximumScaleIsAuto Then oldYAxisMax = .MaximumScale Else oldYAxisMax = -1
        End With
    Else
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(100, 1100, 500, 300)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafCasDabing"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Celkov˝ Ëas sledov·nÌ podle dabingu"
            .ChartTitle.Font.size = 14: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False
        End With
        oldYAxisMin = -1: oldYAxisMax = -1
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .XValues = keysArr
        .values = valuesArray
        .Name = "»as"
        .ApplyDataLabels
        Dim hodiny As Double, dny As Double
        For i = 1 To .Points.count
            hodiny = valuesArray(i - 1)
            dny = hodiny / 24
            .Points(i).DataLabel.text = Replace(Format(hodiny, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " h" & vbLf & "(" & Replace(Format(dny, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " dnÌ)"
            .Points(i).DataLabel.Font.Bold = True
            On Error Resume Next
            .Points(i).DataLabel.Font.size = 10
            On Error GoTo 0
        Next i
    End With
    
    With cht.Axes(xlValue)
        If oldYAxisMin <> -1 Then .MinimumScale = oldYAxisMin Else .MinimumScaleIsAuto = True
        If oldYAxisMax <> -1 Then .MaximumScale = oldYAxisMax Else .MaximumScaleIsAuto = True
    End With
End Sub

' --- Pomocn· funkce ---
Private Function Nz(Value As Variant, ValueIfNull As Variant) As Variant
    If IsEmpty(Value) Or IsNull(Value) Or Value = "" Then
        Nz = ValueIfNull
    Else
        Nz = Value
    End If
End Function


--- KONEC K”DU [Graph_Dub] ---

Modul: Graph_Status_List_Airing
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Graph_Status_List_Airing] ---
Option Explicit

' ===========================================
' Modul: Anime Airing (JIKAN API VERZE)
' Optimalizace: Caching ËtenÌm vlastnÌho v˝stupu (TextBox)
' Upraveno: Centrovan· tlaËÌtka, specifickÈ tuËnÈ pÌsmo a kurzÌva, Oprava Outlooku
' ===========================================

' --- WinAPI pro Sleep a Timezones ---
#If VBA7 Then
    Private Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As LongPtr)
    Private Type SYSTEMTIME
        wYear As Integer: wMonth As Integer: wDayOfWeek As Integer: wDay As Integer
        wHour As Integer: wMinute As Integer: wSecond As Integer: wMilliseconds As Integer
    End Type
    Private Declare PtrSafe Function SystemTimeToTzSpecificLocalTime Lib "kernel32" (ByVal lpTimeZoneInformation As LongPtr, ByRef lpUniversalTime As SYSTEMTIME, ByRef lpLocalTime As SYSTEMTIME) As Long
#Else
    Private Declare Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As Long)
    Private Type SYSTEMTIME
        wYear As Integer: wMonth As Integer: wDayOfWeek As Integer: wDay As Integer
        wHour As Integer: wMinute As Integer: wSecond As Integer: wMilliseconds As Integer
    End Type
    Private Declare Function SystemTimeToTzSpecificLocalTime Lib "kernel32" (ByVal lpTimeZoneInformation As Long, ByRef lpUniversalTime As SYSTEMTIME, ByRef lpLocalTime As SYSTEMTIME) As Long
#End If

' --- Konstanty ---
Private Const JST_OFFSET_HOURS As Long = 9
Private Const API_DELAY_MS As Long = 350 ' Jikan rate limit protection
Private Const BTN_PREFIX As String = "btnAiring_"


' --- UI Konstanty ---
Private Const BTN_WIDTH As Double = 28
Private Const BTN_HEIGHT As Double = 16
Private Const BTN_MARGIN_LEFT As Double = 425
Private Const ENTRY_BLOCK_HEIGHT As Double = 36
Private Const BTN_VERTICAL_GAP As Double = 4
Private Const ENTRY_TOP_OFFSET As Double = 12
Private Const MAX_KEY_LEN As Long = 15

' ==========================
' Outlook ñ konstanty (vloûte ˙plnÏ nahoru pod Option Explicit)
' ==========================
Private Const olTaskItem As Long = 3
Private Const olRecursWeekly As Long = 1
Private Const olFolderTasks As Long = 13

' Dny v t˝dnu pro Outlook
Private Const olSunday As Long = 1
Private Const olMonday As Long = 2
Private Const olTuesday As Long = 4
Private Const olWednesday As Long = 8
Private Const olThursday As Long = 16
Private Const olFriday As Long = 32   ' <--- Toto je ta chybÏjÌcÌ promÏnn· (ËÌslo 32)
Private Const olSaturday As Long = 64

' ====================== HLAVNÕ SPUäTÃCÕ MAKRO ======================
Public Sub VytvorGrafyPokracovani()
    Dim prevCalc As XlCalculation
    prevCalc = Application.Calculation
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    Dim wsData As Worksheet, wsChart As Worksheet
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsChart = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")

    ' 1. Generov·nÌ grafu status˘
    Call UpdateStatusChart(wsData, wsChart)

    ' 2. NaËtenÌ existujÌcÌho obsahu z TextBoxu (Cache)
    Dim cachedTimes As Object
    Set cachedTimes = GetExistingTimesFromTextBox(wsChart)

    ' 3. Zpracov·nÌ Airing Anime
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim airingData() As Variant
    Dim airingCount As Long: airingCount = 0
    Dim statusQ As String
    
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "Q").End(xlUp).row

    For i = 2 To lastRow
        statusQ = UCase(Trim(wsData.Cells(i, "Q").Value))
        
        If statusQ = "AIRING!" Then
            airingCount = airingCount + 1
            ' ZMÃNA: ReDim na 6 sloupc˘ (6. sloupec bude ID pro uloûenÌ do cache)
            ReDim Preserve airingData(1 To 6, 1 To airingCount)
            
            Dim animeName As String: animeName = Trim(wsData.Cells(i, "C").Value)
            ' OdstranÏnÌ tvrd˝ch mezer pro jistotu
            animeName = Replace(animeName, Chr(160), " ")
            
            Dim startDate As Variant: startDate = wsData.Cells(i, "L").Value
            Dim watchedEp As Variant: watchedEp = wsData.Cells(i, "I").Value
            
            ' ZMÃNA: ID pot¯ebujeme hned teÔ
            Dim malID As Long: malID = ExtractMalID(wsData.Cells(i, "C"))
            Dim strMalId As String: strMalId = CStr(malID)
            
            Dim broadcastTime As String
            
            ' A) KONTROLA CACHE PODLE ID (nikoliv podle jmÈna)
            If cachedTimes.Exists(strMalId) Then
                broadcastTime = cachedTimes(strMalId)
                If InStr(broadcastTime, "N/A") > 0 Or InStr(broadcastTime, "Chyba") > 0 Then
                    broadcastTime = FetchBroadcastFromJikan(malID)
                End If
            Else
                ' B) NenÌ v cache -> Vol·me API
                If malID > 0 Then
                    Application.StatusBar = "Stahuji data pro: " & animeName
                    broadcastTime = FetchBroadcastFromJikan(malID)
                    DoEvents
                Else
                    broadcastTime = "N/A (ChybÌ ID)"
                End If
            End If
            
            ' UloûenÌ do pole
            airingData(1, airingCount) = GetSortKeyFromString(broadcastTime)
            airingData(2, airingCount) = animeName
            airingData(3, airingCount) = startDate
            airingData(4, airingCount) = watchedEp
            airingData(5, airingCount) = broadcastTime
            airingData(6, airingCount) = strMalId ' <--- NOV…: Ukl·d·me ID
        End If
    Next i

    Application.StatusBar = False

    ' 4. Se¯azenÌ pole
    If airingCount > 1 Then SortAiringArray airingData, airingCount

    ' 5. VykreslenÌ do TextBoxu a aktualizace tlaËÌtek
    Call RenderTextBoxContent(wsChart, airingData, airingCount)
    
    ' 6. ⁄klid
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = prevCalc
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = prevCalc
    MsgBox "Chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' ====================== JIKAN API LOGIKA ======================

Private Function FetchBroadcastFromJikan(ByVal malID As Long) As String
    Sleep API_DELAY_MS
    
    Dim url As String
    url = "https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & malID
    
    Dim httpReq As Object
    Set httpReq = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    
    On Error Resume Next
    httpReq.Open "GET", url, False
    httpReq.sEnd
    
    If httpReq.status <> 200 Then
        FetchBroadcastFromJikan = "N/A (API " & httpReq.status & ")"
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Dim json As Object
    Set json = JsonConverter.ParseJson(httpReq.responseText)
    
    If json Is Nothing Then FetchBroadcastFromJikan = "Chyba JSON": Exit Function
    If Not json.Exists("data") Then FetchBroadcastFromJikan = "N/A (Data)": Exit Function
    
    Dim data As Object: Set data = json("data")
    
    If data("status") = "Finished Airing" Then
        FetchBroadcastFromJikan = "DokonËeno"
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    If IsNull(data("broadcast")("day")) Or IsNull(data("broadcast")("time")) Then
        FetchBroadcastFromJikan = "N/A (Nezn·m˝ Ëas)"
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Dim jstDay As String: jstDay = data("broadcast")("day")
    Dim jstTime As String: jstTime = data("broadcast")("time")
    
    FetchBroadcastFromJikan = ConvertJSTtoLocalWinAPI(jstDay, jstTime)
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

' ====================== »ASOV… FUNKCE (WINAPI) ======================

Private Function ConvertJSTtoLocalWinAPI(ByVal jstDay As String, ByVal jstTime As String) As String
    Dim baseDate As Date
    Select Case LCase(Trim(jstDay))
        Case "mondays":    baseDate = DateSerial(2000, 1, 3)
        Case "tuesdays":   baseDate = DateSerial(2000, 1, 4)
        Case "wednesdays": baseDate = DateSerial(2000, 1, 5)
        Case "thursdays":  baseDate = DateSerial(2000, 1, 6)
        Case "fridays":    baseDate = DateSerial(2000, 1, 7)
        Case "saturdays":  baseDate = DateSerial(2000, 1, 8)
        Case "sundays":    baseDate = DateSerial(2000, 1, 9)
        Case Else:         ConvertJSTtoLocalWinAPI = "N/A (Den)": Exit Function
    End Select
    
    Dim h As Integer, m As Integer
    h = CInt(Split(jstTime, ":")(0))
    m = CInt(Split(jstTime, ":")(1))
    
    Dim dtJST As Date
    dtJST = baseDate + TimeSerial(h, m, 0)
    
    Dim dtUTC As Date
    dtUTC = DateAdd("h", -JST_OFFSET_HOURS, dtJST)
    
    Dim dtLocal As Date
    dtLocal = UtcToLocal(dtUTC)
    
    Dim czechDay As String
    Select Case Weekday(dtLocal, vbMonday)
        Case 1: czechDay = "pondÏlÌ"
        Case 2: czechDay = "˙ter˝"
        Case 3: czechDay = "st¯edu"
        Case 4: czechDay = "Ëtvrtek"
        Case 5: czechDay = "p·tek"
        Case 6: czechDay = "sobotu"
        Case 7: czechDay = "nedÏli"
    End Select
    
    Dim prefix As String
    If czechDay = "˙ter˝" Or czechDay = "st¯edu" Or czechDay = "Ëtvrtek" Then prefix = "ve " Else prefix = "v "
    
    ConvertJSTtoLocalWinAPI = prefix & czechDay & " " & Format(dtLocal, "hh:mm")
End Function

Private Function UtcToLocal(ByVal dtUTC As Date) As Date
    Dim stUTC As SYSTEMTIME, stLocal As SYSTEMTIME
    With stUTC
        .wYear = year(dtUTC): .wMonth = Month(dtUTC): .wDay = Day(dtUTC)
        .wHour = hour(dtUTC): .wMinute = minute(dtUTC): .wSecond = Second(dtUTC)
    End With
    
    If SystemTimeToTzSpecificLocalTime(0, stUTC, stLocal) <> 0 Then
        UtcToLocal = DateSerial(stLocal.wYear, stLocal.wMonth, stLocal.wDay) + _
                     TimeSerial(stLocal.wHour, stLocal.wMinute, stLocal.wSecond)
    Else
        UtcToLocal = dtUTC
    End If
End Function

' ====================== CACHING & PARSING ======================

Private Function GetExistingTimesFromTextBox(ByVal ws As Worksheet) As Object
    Dim dict As Object
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim shp As Shape
    Set shp = ws.Shapes("txtBoxAiringAnimeContent")
    If shp Is Nothing Then Set GetExistingTimesFromTextBox = dict: Exit Function
    
    ' Cache je nynÌ uloûena v AlternativeText ve form·tu: ID=»as|ID=»as|...
    Dim metaString As String
    metaString = shp.AlternativeText
    
    If metaString = "" Then Set GetExistingTimesFromTextBox = dict: Exit Function
    
    Dim pairs() As String
    pairs = Split(metaString, "|")
    
    Dim i As Long, parts() As String
    For i = LBound(pairs) To UBound(pairs)
        If InStr(pairs(i), "=") > 0 Then
            parts = Split(pairs(i), "=")
            ' parts(0) je ID (String), parts(1) je »as
            Dim cleanId As String
            cleanId = Trim(parts(0))
            If cleanId <> "" Then dict(cleanId) = parts(1)
        End If
    Next i
    
    Set GetExistingTimesFromTextBox = dict
End Function

' ====================== POMOCN… FUNKCE ======================

Private Function ExtractMalID(ByVal cell As Range) As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    If cell.Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
        Dim parts() As String
        parts = Split(cell.Hyperlinks(1).Address, "/")
        Dim k As Long
        For k = LBound(parts) To UBound(parts)
            If IsNumeric(parts(k)) And parts(k) <> "" Then
                ExtractMalID = CLng(parts(k))
                Exit Function
            End If
        Next k
    End If
    ExtractMalID = 0
End Function

' === NAHRADIT CELOU FUNKCI GetSortKeyFromString ===
Private Function GetSortKeyFromString(ByVal czechTimeStr As String) As Long
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "N/A") > 0 Or czechTimeStr = "" Then GetSortKeyFromString = 9999999: Exit Function
    
    Dim dayVal As Long
    ' 1=PondÏlÌ ... 7=NedÏle
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "pondÏlÌ") > 0 Then dayVal = 1
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "˙ter˝") > 0 Then dayVal = 2
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "st¯edu") > 0 Then dayVal = 3
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "Ëtvrtek") > 0 Then dayVal = 4
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "p·tek") > 0 Then dayVal = 5
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "sobotu") > 0 Then dayVal = 6
    If InStr(czechTimeStr, "nedÏli") > 0 Then dayVal = 7
    
    If dayVal = 0 Then GetSortKeyFromString = 9999999: Exit Function

    ' --- SMART SORT LOGIKA ---
    ' ZÌsk·me dneönÌ den (1=Po, 7=Ne)
    Dim todayVal As Long
    todayVal = Weekday(Date, vbMonday)
    
    ' VypoËÌt·me "vzd·lenost" ve dnech od dneöka (0 = dnes, 1 = zÌtra...)
    Dim dayDiff As Long
    dayDiff = dayVal - todayVal
    
    ' Pokud je den "minulost" v tomto t˝dnu (nap¯. je St¯eda a anime je v PondÏlÌ),
    ' p¯iËteme 7, aby se ¯adilo jako "p¯ÌötÌ PondÏlÌ"
    If dayDiff < 0 Then dayDiff = dayDiff + 7
    
    ' --- PARSOV¡NÕ »ASU ---
    Dim timePart As String
    timePart = Trim(Right(czechTimeStr, 5))
    Dim h As Long, m As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    h = CLng(Split(timePart, ":")(0))
    m = CLng(Split(timePart, ":")(1))
    
    ' V˝sledn˝ klÌË: Dny_od_dneöka * 10000 + Hodina * 100 + Minuta
    GetSortKeyFromString = (dayDiff * 10000) + (h * 100) + m
End Function
Private Sub SortAiringArray(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal count As Long)
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, k As Long
    Dim Temp As Variant
    For i = 1 To count - 1
        For j = i + 1 To count
            If arr(1, i) > arr(1, j) Then
                For k = 1 To 6
                    Temp = arr(k, i): arr(k, i) = arr(k, j): arr(k, j) = Temp
                Next k
            End If
        Next j
    Next i
End Sub

' ====================== VYKRESLOV¡NÕ (UI - KOMPLETNÕ) ======================

Private Sub RenderTextBoxContent(ByVal ws As Worksheet, ByVal data As Variant, ByVal count As Long)
    ' ZmÏna: Upraveno pro ukl·d·nÌ Cache (ID=»as) do AlternativeText
    
    Dim txtContent As Shape
    Set txtContent = GetOrCreateTextBox(ws)
    
    ' Reset Cache (pokud je seznam pr·zdn˝ nebo se bude p¯episovat)
    txtContent.AlternativeText = ""
    
    If count = 0 Then
        With txtContent.TextFrame2
            .TextRange.text = "Nesleduji û·dn· vysÌlan· Anime"
            .TextRange.Font.size = 18
            .TextRange.Font.Bold = msoTrue
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
        End With
        CleanupAiringButtons ws, BTN_PREFIX, CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Dim fullText As String: fullText = ""
    Dim ranges As New Collection ' Format: Array(StartPos, Length, Type)
    Dim usedButtons As Object: Set usedButtons = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' PromÏnn· pro budov·nÌ cache ¯etÏzce (ID=»as|ID=»as...)
    Dim cacheBuilder As String: cacheBuilder = ""
    
    ' Definice ¯etÏzc˘ pro popisky
    Const LBL_START As String = "ZaË·tek sledov·nÌ: "
    Const LBL_EP As String = " / poËet zhlÈdnut˝ch epizod: "
    Const LBL_TIME As String = " / nov· epizoda: "
    
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To count
        ' NaËtenÌ dat z pole (nynÌ oËek·v·me 6 sloupc˘)
        Dim aName As String: aName = data(2, i)
        Dim aStart As String: aStart = Format(data(3, i), "DD.MM.YYYY")
        Dim aEp As String: aEp = data(4, i)
        Dim aTime As String: aTime = data(5, i)
        Dim aID As String: aID = ""
        
        ' BezpeËnostnÌ kontrola, kdyby pole nemÏlo 6. sloupec (star· verze pole)
        On Error Resume Next
        aID = data(6, i)
        On Error GoTo 0
        
        ' --- 1. Budov·nÌ Cache (ukl·d·me ID a Ëas) ---
        If aID <> "" And aID <> "0" Then
            If cacheBuilder <> "" Then cacheBuilder = cacheBuilder & "|"
            cacheBuilder = cacheBuilder & aID & "=" & aTime
        End If
        
        ' --- 2. Budov·nÌ viditelnÈho textu ---
        
        ' OddÏlovaË mezi anime
        If fullText <> "" Then fullText = fullText & vbLf & vbLf
        
        ' A) ÿ·dek: N·zev (HEADER)
        Dim headerStr As String
        headerStr = i & ". " & aName
        
        Dim startPosHeader As Long
        startPosHeader = Len(fullText) + 1
        
        fullText = fullText & headerStr & vbLf
        
        ' P¯id·nÌ do kolekce pro form·tov·nÌ (Header = Bold + Italic)
        ranges.Add Array(startPosHeader, Len(headerStr), "HEADER")
        
        ' B) ÿ·dek: Detaily
        Dim currentLen As Long
        currentLen = Len(fullText)
        
        ' SestavenÌ ¯etÏzce detail˘
        Dim detailsStr As String
        detailsStr = LBL_START & aStart & LBL_EP & aEp & LBL_TIME & aTime
        fullText = fullText & detailsStr
        
        ' V˝poËet pozic pro tuËnÈ pÌsmo
        ' Datum (aStart)
        Dim datePos As Long
        datePos = currentLen + Len(LBL_START) + 1
        ranges.Add Array(datePos, Len(aStart), "BOLD")
        
        ' PoËet epizod (aEp)
        Dim epPos As Long
        epPos = datePos + Len(aStart) + Len(LBL_EP)
        ranges.Add Array(epPos, Len(aEp), "BOLD")
        
        ' »as vysÌl·nÌ (aTime)
        Dim timePos As Long
        timePos = epPos + Len(aEp) + Len(LBL_TIME)
        ranges.Add Array(timePos, Len(aTime), "BOLD")
        
        ' --- 3. TlaËÌtko ---
        Dim btnKey As String
        btnKey = EnsureAiringButton(ws, txtContent, aName, aTime, i)
        usedButtons(btnKey) = True
    Next i
    
    ' --- UloûenÌ Cache do metadat TextBoxu ---
    txtContent.AlternativeText = cacheBuilder
    
    ' --- Aplikace textu a styl˘ ---
    With txtContent.TextFrame2
        .TextRange.text = fullText
        .TextRange.Font.size = 11
        .TextRange.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
        
        ' RESET styl˘ (vöe norm·lnÌ)
        .TextRange.Font.Bold = msoFalse
        .TextRange.Font.Italic = msoFalse
        
        .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorTop
        .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorNone
        
        Dim rng As Variant
        For Each rng In ranges
            Dim rStart As Long: rStart = rng(0)
            Dim rLen As Long: rLen = rng(1)
            Dim rType As String: rType = rng(2)
            
            If rType = "HEADER" Then
                ' N·zev: TuËnÏ a KurzÌva
                .TextRange.Characters(rStart, rLen).Font.Bold = msoTrue
                .TextRange.Characters(rStart, rLen).Font.Italic = msoTrue
            ElseIf rType = "BOLD" Then
                ' Hodnoty: Jen TuËnÏ
                .TextRange.Characters(rStart, rLen).Font.Bold = msoTrue
            End If
        Next rng
    End With
    
    CleanupAiringButtons ws, BTN_PREFIX, usedButtons
End Sub

Private Function GetOrCreateTextBox(ByVal ws As Worksheet) As Shape
    On Error Resume Next
    Set GetOrCreateTextBox = ws.Shapes("txtBoxAiringAnimeContent")
    If GetOrCreateTextBox Is Nothing Then
        Set GetOrCreateTextBox = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, 50, 60, 450, 250)
        GetOrCreateTextBox.Name = "txtBoxAiringAnimeContent"
        GetOrCreateTextBox.line.Visible = msoFalse
        GetOrCreateTextBox.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
    End If
End Function

' ====================== GRAF STATUSŸ ======================

Public Sub UpdateStatusChart(ByVal wsData As Worksheet, ByVal wsChart As Worksheet)
    Dim dictStatus As Object, dictColors As Object
    Set dictStatus = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictColors = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long, status As String
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "Q").End(xlUp).row

    For i = 2 To lastRow
        status = Trim(wsData.Cells(i, "Q").Value)
        If Len(status) > 0 Then
            If UCase(left(status, 8)) = "EXISTUJE" Then status = "Existuje dalöÌ obsah"
            dictStatus(status) = dictStatus(status) + 1
            If Not dictColors.Exists(status) Then dictColors(status) = wsData.Cells(i, "Q").DisplayFormat.Interior.Color
        End If
    Next i

    Dim keysArr As Variant, valsArr As Variant
    If dictStatus.count > 0 Then
        keysArr = dictStatus.keys: valsArr = dictStatus.items
        Dim a As Long, b As Long, tmpKey As Variant, tmpVal As Variant
        For a = LBound(valsArr) To UBound(valsArr) - 1
            For b = a + 1 To UBound(valsArr)
                If valsArr(b) > valsArr(a) Then
                    tmpVal = valsArr(a): valsArr(a) = valsArr(b): valsArr(b) = tmpVal
                    tmpKey = keysArr(a): keysArr(a) = keysArr(b): keysArr(b) = tmpKey
                End If
            Next b
        Next a
    Else
        Exit Sub
    End If

    Dim btnUpdate As Shape
    Const BUTTON_NAME As String = "btnAktualizacePokracovani"
    On Error Resume Next: wsChart.Shapes(BUTTON_NAME).Delete: On Error GoTo 0
    
    With wsChart.Range("DY1")
        Set btnUpdate = wsChart.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, .left, .top, .Width, .Height)
    End With
    With btnUpdate
        .Name = BUTTON_NAME
        .OnAction = "'" & ThisWorkbook.Name & "'!VytvorGrafyPokracovani"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
        .line.Visible = msoTrue: .line.weight = 1.5: .line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        
        With .TextFrame2
            .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat graf a seznam"
            .TextRange.Font.size = 11
            .TextRange.Font.Bold = msoTrue
            .TextRange.Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .TextRange.ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
        End With
    End With

    Dim cht As ChartObject
    Const CHART_NAME As String = "GrafPokracovani"
    On Error Resume Next: Set cht = wsChart.ChartObjects(CHART_NAME): On Error GoTo 0
    
    If cht Is Nothing Then
        Set cht = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(550, 20, 400, 300)
        cht.Name = CHART_NAME
        cht.Chart.ChartType = xlPie
        cht.Chart.HasTitle = True
        cht.Chart.ChartTitle.text = "RozdÏlenÌ status˘ pokraËov·nÌ"
    End If
    
    With cht.Chart.SeriesCollection(1)
        .values = valsArr
        .XValues = keysArr
        Dim total As Double: total = Application.WorksheetFunction.Sum(valsArr)
        Dim iPt As Long
        For iPt = 1 To .Points.count
            Dim key As String: key = keysArr(iPt - 1)
            .Points(iPt).HasDataLabel = True
            .Points(iPt).DataLabel.text = key & ": " & valsArr(iPt - 1) & " (" & Format(valsArr(iPt - 1) / total, "0.0%") & ")"
            If dictColors.Exists(key) Then .Points(iPt).Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = dictColors(key)
        Next iPt
