    End With
End Sub

' ====================== SPR¡VA TLA»ÕTEK (SG - UPRAVENO) ======================

Private Function EnsureAiringButton(ByVal ws As Worksheet, ByVal txt As Shape, ByVal animeName As String, ByVal czechTime As String, ByVal itemIndex As Long) As String
    Dim baseKey As String, key As String
    baseKey = BTN_PREFIX & CleanKey(animeName)
    key = baseKey

    Dim leftPos As Double, topPos As Double
    leftPos = txt.left + BTN_MARGIN_LEFT
    topPos = txt.top + (itemIndex - 1) * (ENTRY_BLOCK_HEIGHT + BTN_VERTICAL_GAP) + ENTRY_TOP_OFFSET

    Dim shp As Shape
    On Error Resume Next: Set shp = ws.Shapes(key): On Error GoTo 0

    If shp Is Nothing Then
        Dim idx As Long: idx = 1
        Do While ShapeExistsOnSheet(ws, key)
            idx = idx + 1: key = baseKey & "_" & CStr(idx)
        Loop
        
        Set shp = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRoundedRectangle, leftPos, topPos, BTN_WIDTH, BTN_HEIGHT)
        With shp
            .Name = key
            .OnAction = "'" & ThisWorkbook.Name & "'!ToggleAiringReminderChart"
            .line.weight = 1
            .TextFrame2.TextRange.text = "SG"
            .TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.size = 9
            
            .TextFrame2.VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .TextFrame2.HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .TextFrame2.TextRange.ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
            
            .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(180, 180, 180)
            .AlternativeText = BuildMeta(animeName, czechTime, "", False)
        End With
    Else
        shp.left = leftPos: shp.top = topPos
        
        shp.TextFrame2.TextRange.ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
        shp.TextFrame2.VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
        shp.TextFrame2.HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
        
        Dim mName As String, mTime As String, mEntry As String, mActive As Boolean
        ParseMeta shp.AlternativeText, mName, mTime, mEntry, mActive
        shp.AlternativeText = BuildMeta(animeName, czechTime, mEntry, mActive)
        
        If mActive Then shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89) Else shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(180, 180, 180)
        shp.OnAction = "'" & ThisWorkbook.Name & "'!ToggleAiringReminderChart"
    End If

    EnsureAiringButton = key
End Function

Private Sub CleanupAiringButtons(ByVal ws As Worksheet, ByVal prefix As String, ByVal usedNames As Object)
    Dim i As Long
    For i = ws.Shapes.count To 1 Step -1
        Dim shp As Shape: Set shp = ws.Shapes(i)
        If left(shp.Name, Len(prefix)) = prefix Then
            If Not usedNames.Exists(shp.Name) Then
                Dim an As String, tm As String, en As String, act As Boolean
                ParseMeta shp.AlternativeText, an, tm, en, act
                If Len(en) > 0 Then DeleteOutlookItemByEntryID en
                shp.Delete
            End If
        End If
    Next i
End Sub

' ====================== OUTLOOK LOGIKA (OPRAVENO) ======================

Public Sub ToggleAiringReminderChart()
    ' KliknutÌ na tlaËÌtko "SG"
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim callerName As String: callerName = Application.Caller
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ActiveSheet
    Dim shp As Shape: Set shp = ws.Shapes(callerName)

    Dim an As String, tm As String, entry As String, active As Boolean
    ParseMeta shp.AlternativeText, an, tm, entry, active

    If Not active Then
        ' ZAPNOUT
        Dim newId As String
        newId = CreateWeeklyRecurringTask(an & ": nov· epizoda", tm)
        If Len(newId) > 0 Then
            shp.AlternativeText = BuildMeta(an, tm, newId, True)
            shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89) ' Zelen·
        Else
            MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se vytvo¯it ˙kol v Outlooku.", vbExclamation
        End If
    Else
        ' VYPNOUT
        DeleteOutlookItemByEntryID entry
        shp.AlternativeText = BuildMeta(an, tm, "", False)
        shp.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(180, 180, 180) ' äed·
    End If
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba tlaËÌtka: " & err.Description
End Sub

Private Function CreateWeeklyRecurringTask(ByVal subjectText As String, ByVal czechTimeStr As String) As String
    On Error GoTo ErrCreate

    Dim olApp As Object, olNS As Object, taskFolder As Object
    Dim t As Object, rp As Object
    Dim dowMask As Long, baseTime As Date, nextOcc As Date

    ' 1. Parsov·nÌ Ëasu (Default: P·tek 18:00)
    If Not ParseCzechDayTime(czechTimeStr, dowMask, baseTime) Then
        dowMask = olFriday
        baseTime = TimeSerial(18, 0, 0)
    End If

    ' 2. Inicializace Outlooku
    Set olApp = CreateObject("Outlook.Application")
    Set olNS = olApp.GetNamespace("MAPI")
    Set taskFolder = olNS.GetDefaultFolder(olFolderTasks)
    If taskFolder Is Nothing Then GoTo ErrCreate

    ' 3. Vytvo¯enÌ ˙kolu
    Set t = taskFolder.items.Add(olTaskItem)
    t.Subject = subjectText
    t.categories = "Anime"

    ' 4. NastavenÌ opakov·nÌ (OPRAVENO)
    Set rp = t.GetRecurrencePattern
    rp.RecurrenceType = olRecursWeekly
    rp.Interval = 1
    rp.DayOfWeekMask = dowMask
    rp.PatternStartDate = Date
    rp.NoEndDate = True
    
    ' !!! ZDE BðVALA CHYBA: NesmÌme nastavovat EndTime/StartTime pro Pattern,
    ' pokud m·me NoEndDate = True a jde o Task. »as vy¯eöÌme p¯es ReminderTime nÌûe.
    
    ' 5. V˝poËet nejbliûöÌho termÌnu
    ' P¯ed·v·me pouze Ëasovou sloûku z baseTime
    nextOcc = NextOccurrenceFromMask(dowMask, TimeSerial(hour(baseTime), minute(baseTime), 0), Now)

    t.startDate = CDate(Int(nextOcc))
    t.DueDate = CDate(Int(nextOcc))
    
    ' NastavenÌ p¯ipomÌnky
    t.ReminderSet = True
    If nextOcc <= Now Then nextOcc = DateAdd("n", 1, Now) ' Pojistka pro minulost
    t.ReminderTime = nextOcc

    t.Save
    CreateWeeklyRecurringTask = t.entryId
    Exit Function

' ---- Fallback pro p¯Ìpad chyby ----
ErrCreate:
    On Error GoTo ErrFinal
    ' ZkusÌme vytvo¯it alespoÚ jednor·zov˝ ˙kol bez opakov·nÌ
    Dim t2 As Object
    If olNS Is Nothing Then
        Set olApp = CreateObject("Outlook.Application")
        Set olNS = olApp.GetNamespace("MAPI")
    End If
    Set taskFolder = olNS.GetDefaultFolder(olFolderTasks)
    Set t2 = taskFolder.items.Add(olTaskItem)
    t2.Subject = subjectText
    t2.categories = "Anime"

    Dim dMask As Long, tm As Date, occ As Date
    If Not ParseCzechDayTime(czechTimeStr, dMask, tm) Then
        dMask = olFriday: tm = TimeSerial(18, 0, 0)
    End If
    occ = NextOccurrenceFromMask(dMask, tm, Now)
    If occ <= Now Then occ = DateAdd("n", 1, Now)

    t2.startDate = CDate(Int(occ))
    t2.DueDate = CDate(Int(occ))
    t2.ReminderSet = True
    t2.ReminderTime = occ
    t2.Save

    CreateWeeklyRecurringTask = t2.entryId
    Exit Function

ErrFinal:
    Debug.Print "CreateWeeklyRecurringTask failed: " & err.Number & " - " & err.Description
    CreateWeeklyRecurringTask = ""
End Function

Private Function NextOccurrenceFromMask(ByVal mask As Long, ByVal tm As Date, ByVal fromDT As Date) As Date
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 0 To 13
        Dim dt As Date
        dt = DateAdd("d", i, DateSerial(year(fromDT), Month(fromDT), Day(fromDT))) + tm
        If DayMatchesMask(dt, mask) And dt >= fromDT Then
            NextOccurrenceFromMask = dt
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    NextOccurrenceFromMask = Date + 1 + tm
End Function

Private Function DayMatchesMask(ByVal dt As Date, ByVal mask As Long) As Boolean
    Dim wd As Integer: wd = Weekday(dt, vbSunday)
    Dim olMaskVal As Long
    Select Case wd
        Case 1: olMaskVal = 1
        Case 2: olMaskVal = 2
        Case 3: olMaskVal = 4
        Case 4: olMaskVal = 8
        Case 5: olMaskVal = 16
        Case 6: olMaskVal = 32
        Case 7: olMaskVal = 64
    End Select
    DayMatchesMask = ((mask And olMaskVal) <> 0)
End Function

Private Function DeleteOutlookItemByEntryID(ByVal entryId As String) As Boolean
    If entryId = "" Then Exit Function
    Dim olApp As Object, olNS As Object, item As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    Set olApp = CreateObject("Outlook.Application")
    Set olNS = olApp.GetNamespace("MAPI")
    Set item = olNS.GetItemFromID(entryId)
    If Not item Is Nothing Then item.Delete: DeleteOutlookItemByEntryID = True
End Function

Private Function ParseCzechDayTime(ByVal czech As String, ByRef dayMask As Long, ByRef outTime As Date) As Boolean
    Dim d As Long
    czech = LCase(czech)
    If InStr(czech, "pondÏl") > 0 Then d = 2
    If InStr(czech, "˙ter") > 0 Then d = 4
    If InStr(czech, "st¯ed") > 0 Then d = 8
    If InStr(czech, "Ëtvr") > 0 Then d = 16
    If InStr(czech, "p·tek") > 0 Then d = 32
    If InStr(czech, "sobot") > 0 Then d = 64
    If InStr(czech, "nedÏl") > 0 Then d = 1
    
    If d = 0 Then Exit Function
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(Trim(czech), " ")
    Dim timeStr As String: timeStr = parts(UBound(parts))
    outTime = TimeValue(timeStr)
    
    If err.Number = 0 Then
        dayMask = d
        ParseCzechDayTime = True
    End If
End Function

' ====================== POMOCN… FUNKCE (STRING/META) ======================

Private Function CleanKey(ByVal s As String) As String
    Dim t As String: t = LCase(Trim(s))
    t = Replace(t, " ", "_")
    Dim i As Long, ch As String, res As String
    For i = 1 To Len(t)
        ch = Mid(t, i, 1)
        If ch Like "[a-z0-9_]" Then res = res & ch
    Next i
    If Len(res) > MAX_KEY_LEN Then res = left(res, MAX_KEY_LEN)
    CleanKey = res
End Function

Private Function ShapeExistsOnSheet(ByVal ws As Worksheet, ByVal nm As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    ShapeExistsOnSheet = Not ws.Shapes(nm) Is Nothing
End Function

Private Function BuildMeta(ByVal Name As String, ByVal tim As String, ByVal entryId As String, ByVal active As Boolean) As String
    BuildMeta = "name=" & Name & "|time=" & tim & "|entry=" & entryId & "|active=" & IIf(active, "1", "0")
End Function

Private Sub ParseMeta(ByVal meta As String, ByRef Name As String, ByRef tim As String, ByRef entryId As String, ByRef active As Boolean)
    Dim parts() As String, p As Variant, k() As String
    parts = Split(meta, "|")
    active = False
    For Each p In parts
        k = Split(p, "=")
        If UBound(k) = 1 Then
            Select Case k(0)
                Case "name": Name = k(1)
                Case "time": tim = k(1)
                Case "entry": entryId = k(1)
                Case "active": active = (k(1) = "1")
            End Select
        End If
    Next p
End Sub



--- KONEC K”DU [Graph_Status_List_Airing] ---

Modul: Data_All_sorts_of_things
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Data_All_sorts_of_things] ---
Option Explicit

' ********************************************************************************
' KONFIGURACE A KONSTANTY
' ********************************************************************************
' PrvnÌ rok, kter˝ sledujeme (Sloupec G)
Private Const ROK_START As Integer = 2024

' PoslednÌ rok, kter˝ sledujeme (ZmÏÚ na 2027, 2028 atd.)
Private Const ROK_KONEC As Integer = 2026

' Sloupec, kde zaËÌn· ROK_START (G = 7)
Private Const COL_START_INDEX As Integer = 7

' Datum, od kterÈho se poËÌtajÌ detailnÌ statistiky (staröÌ sledov·nÌ se ignoruje pro roËnÌ stats)
Private Const DATUM_POCATKU_MERENI As Date = #1/1/2018#

' Mapov·nÌ sloupc˘ v poli dat
Private Const COL_IDX_NAME As Long = 1      ' C (N·zev)
Private Const COL_IDX_EPS As Long = 7       ' I (PoËet epizod)
Private Const COL_IDX_MINS As Long = 8      ' J (DÈlka epizody)
Private Const COL_IDX_START As Long = 10    ' L (Datum zaË·tku)
Private Const COL_IDX_REWATCH As Long = 12  ' N (PoËet rewatch˘)
Private Const COL_IDX_TOTAL As Long = 13    ' O (Celkov˝ Ëas)

' ********************************************************************************
' HLAVNÕ SPOUäTÃCÕ PROCEDURA
' ********************************************************************************
Public Sub AktualizovatDataRewatchu()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    Dim wsAnimeList As Worksheet
    Dim wsInfo As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim arrData As Variant
    Dim dictComments As Object
    
    Set wsAnimeList = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsInfo = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")

    ' óóó OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ óóó
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = False
        .Calculation = xlCalculationManual
        .EnableEvents = False
    End With

    ' 1. NaËtenÌ dat
    lastRow = wsAnimeList.Cells(wsAnimeList.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then GoTo CleanExit
    
    arrData = wsAnimeList.Range("C2:O" & lastRow).Value
    Set dictComments = GetCommentsDictionary(wsAnimeList, "N")
    
    Dim dictCommentsI As Object
    Set dictCommentsI = GetCommentsDictionary(wsAnimeList, "I")

    ' 2. SpuötÏnÌ NOV… hlavnÌ v˝poËetnÌ procedury (Single Pass)
    Call ZpracovatKompletniData(arrData, dictComments, dictCommentsI, wsInfo)

CleanExit:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "Chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume CleanExit
End Sub

' ********************************************************************************
' NOV¡ HLAVNÕ PROCEDURA: JEDNOTN… ZPRACOV¡NÕ (SINGLE PASS OPTIMIZATION)
' ********************************************************************************
' Tato procedura nahrazuje p˘vodnÌ "ZpracovatSeznamyRewatchu" a "ZpracovatCasSledovani".
' Proch·zÌ data pouze jednou a poËÌt· vöe najednou.
Private Sub ZpracovatKompletniData(dataArr As Variant, commentsDict As Object, commentsDictI As Object, wsOut As Worksheet)
    
    ' --- POLE A PROMÃNN… PRO »AS A EPIZODY ---
    Dim totalMinCelkem As Double, totalEpCelkem As Long
    Dim rwMinCelkem As Double, rwEpCelkem As Long
    Dim totalMin() As Double, totalEp() As Long
    Dim rwMin() As Double, rwEp() As Long
    
    ReDim totalMin(ROK_START To ROK_KONEC)
    ReDim totalEp(ROK_START To ROK_KONEC)
    ReDim rwMin(ROK_START To ROK_KONEC)
    ReDim rwEp(ROK_START To ROK_KONEC)
    
    ' --- POLE A PROMÃNN… PRO SEZNAMY ---
    Dim rwCountCelkem As Long
    Dim rwListCelkem As Object ' ArrayList
    Dim rwCounts() As Long
    Dim rwLists() As Object ' Pole ArrayList˘
    
    ReDim rwCounts(ROK_START To ROK_KONEC)
    ReDim rwLists(ROK_START To ROK_KONEC)
    Set rwListCelkem = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    rwCountCelkem = 0
    
    Dim Y As Long
    For Y = ROK_START To ROK_KONEC
        Set rwLists(Y) = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
        rwCounts(Y) = 0
        totalMin(Y) = 0: totalEp(Y) = 0: rwMin(Y) = 0: rwEp(Y) = 0
    Next Y

    ' --- PROMÃNN… PRO SMY»KU ---
    Dim i As Long
    Dim animeName As String, commentText As String
    Dim epsPerWatch As Long, singleWatchMins As Double
    Dim firstWatchDate As Date
    Dim yr As Integer
    
    ' Regex pro parsov·nÌ koment·¯˘ sloupce I (EP: X-Y; dd.mm.yyyy)
    Dim regEpI As Object
    Set regEpI = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    regEpI.Pattern = "EP:\s*(\d+)\s*(?:-\s*(\d+))?;\s*(\d{1,2}\.\d{1,2}\.\d{4})"
    regEpI.Global = True
    Dim usedCommentI As Boolean
    Dim epLinesI As Variant, eLineI As Variant
    Dim eMatchesI As Object
    Dim epSI As Long, epEI As Long, epDI As Date, epMinsI As Double
    Dim timePerEpI As Double

    ' ==============================================================================
    ' HLAVNÕ SMY»KA - JEDEN PRŸCHOD VäEMI DATY
    ' ==============================================================================
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        animeName = dataArr(i, COL_IDX_NAME)
        
        ' A) Z·kladnÌ validace epizod a Ëasu
        If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, COL_IDX_EPS)) And IsNumeric(dataArr(i, COL_IDX_MINS)) Then
            epsPerWatch = dataArr(i, COL_IDX_EPS)
            singleWatchMins = epsPerWatch * dataArr(i, COL_IDX_MINS)
        Else
            epsPerWatch = 0: singleWatchMins = 0
        End If
        
        ' B) Zpracov·nÌ PRVNÕHO ZHL…DNUTÕ (First Watch)
        If IsDate(dataArr(i, COL_IDX_START)) Then
            firstWatchDate = dataArr(i, COL_IDX_START)
            
            If firstWatchDate >= DATUM_POCATKU_MERENI Then
                ' CelkovÈ souËty
                If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, COL_IDX_TOTAL)) Then
                    totalMinCelkem = totalMinCelkem + dataArr(i, COL_IDX_TOTAL)
                Else
                    totalMinCelkem = totalMinCelkem + singleWatchMins
                End If
                
                If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, COL_IDX_REWATCH)) Then
                    totalEpCelkem = totalEpCelkem + (1 + dataArr(i, COL_IDX_REWATCH)) * epsPerWatch
                Else
                    totalEpCelkem = totalEpCelkem + epsPerWatch
                End If
                
                ' RoËnÌ souËty (First watch) ó p¯es koment·¯e sloupce I pokud existujÌ
                usedCommentI = False
                If commentsDictI.Exists(i + 1) And epsPerWatch > 0 Then
                    timePerEpI = singleWatchMins / epsPerWatch
                    epLinesI = Split(commentsDictI(i + 1), Chr$(10))
                    For Each eLineI In epLinesI
                        Set eMatchesI = regEpI.Execute(CStr(eLineI))
                        If eMatchesI.count > 0 Then
                            epSI = CLng(eMatchesI(0).SubMatches(0))
                            If eMatchesI(0).SubMatches(1) <> "" Then epEI = CLng(eMatchesI(0).SubMatches(1)) Else epEI = epSI
                            On Error Resume Next
                            epDI = CDate(eMatchesI(0).SubMatches(2))
                            On Error GoTo 0
                            
                            epMinsI = (epEI - epSI + 1) * timePerEpI
                            yr = year(epDI)
                            If yr >= ROK_START And yr <= ROK_KONEC Then
                                totalMin(yr) = totalMin(yr) + epMinsI
                                totalEp(yr) = totalEp(yr) + (epEI - epSI + 1)
                            End If
                            usedCommentI = True
                        End If
                    Next eLineI
                End If
                
                ' Fallback: bez koment·¯˘ õ cel˝ Ëas do roku data zaË·tku
                If Not usedCommentI Then
                    yr = year(firstWatchDate)
                    If yr >= ROK_START And yr <= ROK_KONEC Then
                        totalMin(yr) = totalMin(yr) + singleWatchMins
                        totalEp(yr) = totalEp(yr) + epsPerWatch
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If
        
        ' C) Zpracov·nÌ REWATCHŸ (Pokud existujÌ)
        If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, COL_IDX_REWATCH)) And dataArr(i, COL_IDX_REWATCH) > 0 Then
            If commentsDict.Exists(i + 1) Then
                commentText = commentsDict(i + 1)
                
                ' >>> VOL¡NÕ NOV…HO MASTER PARSERU <<<
                ' P¯ed·v·me mu veöker· pole odkazem (ByRef), aby je naplnil najednou.
                Call MasterParsujKomentar(commentText, animeName, epsPerWatch, singleWatchMins, _
                                          rwLists, rwCounts, rwListCelkem, rwCountCelkem, _
                                          totalMin, totalEp, rwMin, rwEp, rwMinCelkem, rwEpCelkem)
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' ==============================================================================
    ' Z¡PIS VðSLEDKŸ (Kombinace z·pis˘ z obou p˘vodnÌch procedur)
    ' ==============================================================================
    
    ' 1. Z·pis CELKOVðCH dat (Sloupec F = 6)
    With wsOut
        ' »as a Epizody
        .Cells(3, 6).Value = totalMinCelkem / 1440
        .Cells(4, 6).Value = FormatujCasCesky(totalMinCelkem / 1440)
        Call AddRewatchTimeComment(.Cells(3, 6), rwMinCelkem, totalMinCelkem)
        
        .Cells(5, 6).Value = totalEpCelkem
        Call AddRewatchEpisodesComment(.Cells(5, 6), rwEpCelkem, totalEpCelkem)
        
        If totalEpCelkem > 0 Then .Cells(6, 6).Value = totalMinCelkem / totalEpCelkem Else .Cells(6, 6).Value = 0
        
        ' Seznamy rewatch˘
        .Cells(7, 6).Value = rwCountCelkem
        Call CreateAndAddRewatchComment(.Cells(7, 6), rwListCelkem)
    End With
    
    ' 2. Z·pis RO»NÕCH dat (Dynamicky G, H, I...)
    Dim targetCol As Integer
    For Y = ROK_START To ROK_KONEC
        targetCol = COL_START_INDEX + (Y - ROK_START)
        
        With wsOut
            ' »as a Epizody
            .Cells(3, targetCol).Value = totalMin(Y) / 1440
            .Cells(4, targetCol).Value = FormatujCasCesky(totalMin(Y) / 1440)
            Call AddRewatchTimeComment(.Cells(3, targetCol), rwMin(Y), totalMin(Y))
            
            .Cells(5, targetCol).Value = totalEp(Y)
            Call AddRewatchEpisodesComment(.Cells(5, targetCol), rwEp(Y), totalEp(Y))
            
            If totalEp(Y) > 0 Then .Cells(6, targetCol).Value = totalMin(Y) / totalEp(Y) Else .Cells(6, targetCol).Value = 0
            
            ' Seznamy rewatch˘
            .Cells(7, targetCol).Value = rwCounts(Y)
            Call CreateAndAddRewatchComment(.Cells(7, targetCol), rwLists(Y))
        End With
    Next Y
    
    ' 3. Fin·lnÌ form·tov·nÌ
    Dim endCol As Integer: endCol = COL_START_INDEX + (ROK_KONEC - ROK_START)
    wsOut.Range(wsOut.Cells(3, 6), wsOut.Cells(3, endCol)).NumberFormat = "[h]:mm"
    wsOut.Range(wsOut.Cells(5, 6), wsOut.Cells(5, endCol)).NumberFormat = "0"
    wsOut.Range(wsOut.Cells(6, 6), wsOut.Cells(6, endCol)).NumberFormat = "0.0"
    wsOut.Range(wsOut.Cells(7, 6), wsOut.Cells(7, endCol)).NumberFormat = "0"
End Sub

' ********************************************************************************
' NOVð MASTER PARSER (Srdce optimalizace)
' ********************************************************************************
' Tato procedura zpracuje text koment·¯e jen jednou a vyt·hne z nÏj data
' jak pro seznamy (kdy a co), tak pro statistiky (kolik minut a epizod).
Private Sub MasterParsujKomentar(txt As String, aName As String, epsPerWatch As Long, singleMins As Double, _
                                 ByRef rwLists() As Object, ByRef rwCounts() As Long, _
                                 ByRef listAll As Object, ByRef cntAll As Long, _
                                 ByRef totMin() As Double, ByRef totEp() As Long, _
                                 ByRef rwMin() As Double, ByRef rwEp() As Long, _
                                 ByRef rwMinAll As Double, ByRef rwEpAll As Long)

    Dim lines() As String
    Dim rwNum As String, dateStrForList As String
    Dim rwDate As Date
    Dim yr As Integer
    Dim timePerEp As Double
    Dim iLine As Long, entry As String
    Dim posDot As Long, posEps As Long
    
    If epsPerWatch > 0 Then timePerEp = singleMins / epsPerWatch Else timePerEp = 0
    
    lines = Split(txt, Chr$(10))
    
    For iLine = 0 To UBound(lines)
        entry = lines(iLine)
        rwDate = #12:00:00 AM#
        rwNum = ""
        dateStrForList = ""
        
        On Error Resume Next ' BezpeËnost pro parsov·nÌ
        
        ' --- TYP 1: »¡STE»Nð REWATCH (Partial: "; EPs:") ---
        posEps = InStr(1, entry, "; EPs:", vbTextCompare)
        If posEps > 0 Then
            ' A) ZÌsk·nÌ dat pro SEZNAM
            posDot = InStr(1, entry, ".")
            If posDot > 0 Then
                rwNum = Trim$(left$(entry, posDot - 1))
                dateStrForList = Trim$(Mid$(entry, posDot + 1))
            Else
                rwNum = "999"
                dateStrForList = Trim$(entry)
            End If
            
            Dim posEpsInner As Long: posEpsInner = InStr(1, dateStrForList, "; EPs:", vbTextCompare)
            If posEpsInner > 0 Then dateStrForList = Trim$(left$(dateStrForList, posEpsInner - 1))
            rwDate = ParseDateString(dateStrForList) ' ZkusÌme parsovat datum pro urËenÌ roku
            
            Dim formattedDate As String: formattedDate = FormatRewatchDate(dateStrForList)
            
            ' Z·pis do glob·lnÌho seznamu
            cntAll = cntAll + 1
            listAll.Add Array(CInt(rwNum), aName, formattedDate)
            
            ' Z·pis do roËnÌho seznamu (pokud m·me datum)
            If rwDate <> #12:00:00 AM# And rwDate >= DATUM_POCATKU_MERENI Then
                yr = year(rwDate)
                If yr >= ROK_START And yr <= ROK_KONEC Then
                    rwCounts(yr) = rwCounts(yr) + 1
                    rwLists(yr).Add Array(CInt(rwNum), aName, formattedDate)
                End If
            End If
            
            ' B) V˝poËet »ASU (DetailnÌ rozpad po dnech)
            Dim epArr() As String
            Dim rwStart As Date, rwEnd As Date, curDate As Date
            Dim numDays As Long, k As Long
            Dim epsDay As Long, minDay As Double
            Dim datePartRaw As String, epPartRaw As String
            Dim posDash As Long
            
            datePartRaw = Trim$(Mid$(entry, posDot + 1, posEps - posDot - 1))
            epPartRaw = Trim$(Mid$(entry, posEps + 6))
            
            epArr = Split(epPartRaw, ",")
            
            posDash = InStr(1, datePartRaw, "-")
            If posDash > 0 Then
                rwStart = CDate(Trim$(left$(datePartRaw, posDash - 1)))
                rwEnd = CDate(Trim$(Mid$(datePartRaw, posDash + 1)))
            Else
                rwStart = CDate(datePartRaw): rwEnd = rwStart
            End If
            
            numDays = CLng(rwEnd) - CLng(rwStart) + 1
            
            If UBound(epArr) + 1 = numDays Then
                For k = 0 To numDays - 1
                    curDate = rwStart + k
                    yr = year(curDate)
                    epsDay = CLng(Trim$(epArr(k)))
                    minDay = epsDay * timePerEp
                    
                    If minDay > 0 Then
                        rwMinAll = rwMinAll + minDay: rwEpAll = rwEpAll + epsDay
                        If yr >= ROK_START And yr <= ROK_KONEC Then
                            totMin(yr) = totMin(yr) + minDay: totEp(yr) = totEp(yr) + epsDay
                            rwMin(yr) = rwMin(yr) + minDay: rwEp(yr) = rwEp(yr) + epsDay
                        End If
                    End If
                Next k
            End If
            
        ' --- TYP 2: NEUR»ITO ("NetuöÌm p¯esnÏ") ---
        ElseIf InStr(1, entry, "NetuöÌm p¯esnÏ", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
            ' A) SEZNAM
            posDot = InStr(1, entry, ".")
            If posDot > 0 Then
                If IsNumeric(Trim$(left$(entry, posDot - 1))) Then
                    rwNum = Trim$(left$(entry, posDot - 1))
                Else
                    rwNum = "999"
                End If
            Else
                rwNum = "999"
            End If
            
            cntAll = cntAll + 1
            listAll.Add Array(CLng(rwNum), aName, "(netuöÌm p¯esnÏ)")
            
            ' B) »AS (Jen celkov˝, ne roËnÌ)
            rwMinAll = rwMinAll + singleMins: rwEpAll = rwEpAll + epsPerWatch

        ' --- TYP 3: PLNð REWATCH S DATEM ---
        ElseIf InStr(1, entry, ".") > 0 Then
            posDot = InStr(1, entry, ".")
            ' A) ZÌsk·nÌ dat pro SEZNAM a ROK
            rwNum = Trim$(left$(entry, posDot - 1))
            dateStrForList = Trim$(Mid$(entry, posDot + 1))
            rwDate = ParseDateString(dateStrForList)
            
            Dim fDate3 As String: fDate3 = FormatRewatchDate(dateStrForList)
            
            If rwDate <> #12:00:00 AM# And rwDate >= DATUM_POCATKU_MERENI Then
                yr = year(rwDate)
                
                ' Z·pis do seznam˘
                cntAll = cntAll + 1
                listAll.Add Array(CInt(rwNum), aName, fDate3)
                If yr >= ROK_START And yr <= ROK_KONEC Then
                    rwCounts(yr) = rwCounts(yr) + 1
                    rwLists(yr).Add Array(CInt(rwNum), aName, fDate3)
                End If
                
                ' B) Z·pis »ASU
                rwMinAll = rwMinAll + singleMins: rwEpAll = rwEpAll + epsPerWatch
                If yr >= ROK_START And yr <= ROK_KONEC Then
                    totMin(yr) = totMin(yr) + singleMins: totEp(yr) = totEp(yr) + epsPerWatch
                    rwMin(yr) = rwMin(yr) + singleMins: rwEp(yr) = rwEp(yr) + epsPerWatch
                End If
            End If
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0
    Next iLine
End Sub


' ********************************************************************************
' POMOCN… FUNKCE (ZŸST¡VAJÕ BEZ ZMÃNY)
' ********************************************************************************
Function ParseDateString(dateStr As String) As Date
    On Error GoTo ErrDate
    Dim cleanStr As String: cleanStr = Trim$(dateStr)
    
    Dim pDash As Long: pDash = InStr(1, cleanStr, "-")
    If pDash > 0 Then cleanStr = Trim$(left$(cleanStr, pDash - 1))
    
    Dim pSpace As Long: pSpace = InStr(1, cleanStr, " ")
    
    If pSpace > 0 Then
        Dim sPart0 As String: sPart0 = Trim$(left$(cleanStr, pSpace - 1))
        Dim sPart1 As String: sPart1 = Trim$(Mid$(cleanStr, pSpace + 1))
        
        If InStr(1, sPart0, ".") > 0 Then
            ParseDateString = CDate(cleanStr)
        Else
            Dim mNum As Integer: mNum = ConvertCzechMonthToNumber(sPart0)
            If mNum > 0 And IsNumeric(sPart1) Then ParseDateString = DateSerial(CInt(sPart1), mNum, 1)
        End If
    Else
        ParseDateString = CDate(cleanStr)
    End If
    Exit Function
ErrDate:
    ParseDateString = #12:00:00 AM#
End Function

Function GetCommentsDictionary(ws As Worksheet, colLetter As String) As Object
    Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim rngComments As Range
    On Error Resume Next
    Set rngComments = ws.Columns(colLetter).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If Not rngComments Is Nothing Then
        Dim cell As Range
        For Each cell In rngComments
            dict.Add cell.row, cell.Comment.text
        Next cell
    End If
    Set GetCommentsDictionary = dict
End Function

Function ConvertCzechMonthToNumber(monthName As String) As Integer
    Select Case LCase(monthName)
        Case "leden": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 1: Case "˙nor": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 2
        Case "b¯ezen": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 3: Case "duben": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 4
        Case "kvÏten": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 5: Case "Ëerven": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 6
        Case "Ëervenec": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 7: Case "srpen": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 8
        Case "z·¯Ì": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 9: Case "¯Ìjen": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 10
        Case "listopad": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 11: Case "prosinec": ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 12
        Case Else: ConvertCzechMonthToNumber = 0
    End Select
End Function

Private Function HHmmFromMinutes(ByVal minutesVal As Double) As String
    Dim m As Long: m = CLng(Application.Max(0, Round(minutesVal, 0)))
    HHmmFromMinutes = (m \ 60) & ":" & Format(m Mod 60, "00")
End Function

Sub AddRewatchTimeComment(targetCell As Range, rewatchMinutes As Double, Optional totalMinutes As Double = -1)
    If Not targetCell.Comment Is Nothing Then targetCell.Comment.Delete
    If totalMinutes < 0 Then totalMinutes = CDbl(targetCell.Value) * 1440#
    Dim s1prefix As String: s1prefix = "Z toho rewatchnuto: "
    Dim s2prefix As String: s2prefix = "»as sledov·nÌ bez rewatch˘: "
    Dim s1val As String: s1val = HHmmFromMinutes(rewatchMinutes)
    Dim s2val As String: s2val = HHmmFromMinutes(Application.Max(0, totalMinutes - rewatchMinutes))
    Dim line1 As String: line1 = s1prefix & s1val & " (hh:mm)"
    Dim line2 As String: line2 = s2prefix & s2val & " (hh:mm)"
    targetCell.AddComment line1 & Chr(10) & line2
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame
        .Characters(Start:=Len(s1prefix) + 1, length:=Len(s1val) + 1).Font.Bold = True
        .Characters(Start:=Len(line1) + 1 + Len(s2prefix), length:=Len(s2val) + 1).Font.Bold = True
        .AutoSize = True
    End With
    targetCell.Comment.Visible = False
End Sub

Sub AddRewatchEpisodesComment(targetCell As Range, rewatchEpisodes As Long, Optional totalEpisodes As Long = -1)
    If Not targetCell.Comment Is Nothing Then targetCell.Comment.Delete
    If totalEpisodes < 0 Then totalEpisodes = 0
    Dim s1prefix As String: s1prefix = "Z toho rewatchnuto: "
    Dim s2prefix As String: s2prefix = "PoËet zhlÈdnut˝ch origin·lnÌch epizod: "
    Dim s1val As String: s1val = CStr(Application.Max(0, rewatchEpisodes)) & " epizod"
    Dim s2val As String: s2val = CStr(Application.Max(0, totalEpisodes - rewatchEpisodes)) & " epizod"
    Dim line1 As String: line1 = s1prefix & s1val
    Dim line2 As String: line2 = s2prefix & s2val
    targetCell.AddComment line1 & Chr(10) & line2
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame
        .Characters(Start:=Len(s1prefix) + 1, length:=Len(s1val) + 1).Font.Bold = True
        .Characters(Start:=Len(line1) + 1 + Len(s2prefix), length:=Len(s2val) + 1).Font.Bold = True
        .AutoSize = True
    End With
    targetCell.Comment.Visible = False
End Sub

Sub CreateAndAddRewatchComment(targetCell As Range, dataList As Object)
    If Not targetCell.Comment Is Nothing Then targetCell.Comment.Delete
    If dataList Is Nothing Or dataList.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim listArray() As Variant: listArray = dataList.ToArray()
    QuickSort listArray, LBound(listArray), UBound(listArray)
    
    Dim i As Long
    Dim count As Long: count = UBound(listArray) - LBound(listArray) + 1
    ReDim linesArray(0 To count - 1) As String
    ReDim dictBoldPos(0 To count - 1) As Long
    ReDim dictBoldLen(0 To count - 1) As Long
    
    Dim currentPos As Long: currentPos = 1
    Dim dateLen As Long, fullLine As String
    Dim dtStr As String
    
    For i = 0 To count - 1
        dtStr = CStr(listArray(i + LBound(listArray))(2))
        fullLine = listArray(i + LBound(listArray))(0) & ". Rewatch; " & listArray(i + LBound(listArray))(1) & " " & dtStr
        linesArray(i) = fullLine
        
        dateLen = Len(dtStr)
        dictBoldPos(i) = currentPos + Len(fullLine) - dateLen
        dictBoldLen(i) = dateLen
        
        currentPos = currentPos + Len(fullLine) + 1 ' +1 for Chr(10)
    Next i
    
    targetCell.AddComment Join(linesArray, Chr(10))
    targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = True
    
    For i = 0 To count - 1
        targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.Characters(dictBoldPos(i), dictBoldLen(i)).Font.Bold = True
    Next i
    
    targetCell.Comment.Visible = False
End Sub

Function FormatRewatchDate(rawDateString As String) As String
    On Error GoTo DateParseError
    Dim trimmedStr As String
    Dim pEps As Long
    
    ' 1. OËiötÏnÌ o "EPs" Ë·st (pokud existuje)
    pEps = InStr(1, rawDateString, "; EPs:", vbTextCompare)
    If pEps > 0 Then
        trimmedStr = Trim$(left$(rawDateString, pEps - 1))
    Else
        trimmedStr = Trim$(rawDateString)
    End If

    ' 2. Zpracov·nÌ rozsah˘ (pokud obsahuje pomlËku)
    Dim pDash As Long: pDash = InStr(1, trimmedStr, "-")
    If pDash > 0 Then
        Dim sStart As String: sStart = Trim$(left$(trimmedStr, pDash - 1))
        Dim sEnd As String: sEnd = Trim$(Mid$(trimmedStr, pDash + 1))
        
        ' Konec je obvykle plnÈ datum, to je n·ö kotevnÌ bod
        Dim dEnd As Date
        dEnd = CDate(sEnd)
        
        Dim dStart As Date
        ' A) Start je plnÈ datum (nap¯. 31.12.2025)
        If IsDate(sStart) Then
            dStart = CDate(sStart)
        Else
            ' B) Start je jen ËÌslo dne (nap¯. "22" nebo "22.")
            Dim cleanStart As String: cleanStart = Replace$(sStart, ".", "")
            If IsNumeric(cleanStart) Then
                ' DopoËÌt·me mÏsÌc a rok podle koncovÈho data
                dStart = DateSerial(year(dEnd), Month(dEnd), CInt(cleanStart))
            Else
                ' C) Start je den a mÏsÌc bez roku (nap¯. "31.12.")
                ' ZkusÌme to sloûit s rokem koncovÈho data, nebo nechat Excel rozhodnout
                On Error Resume Next
                dStart = CDate(sStart & year(dEnd))
                If err.Number <> 0 Then dStart = CDate(sStart)
                On Error GoTo DateParseError
            End If
        End If
        
        ' 3. Porovn·nÌ a form·tov·nÌ (Moûnost B)
        If year(dStart) = year(dEnd) And Month(dStart) = Month(dEnd) Then
            ' Stejn˝ mÏsÌc a rok -> zkr·cen˝ form·t: "22. - 23.03.2025"
            FormatRewatchDate = "(" & Format$(dStart, "dd") & ". - " & Format$(dEnd, "dd.mm.yyyy") & ")"
        Else
            ' R˘zn˝ mÏsÌc nebo rok -> pln˝ form·t: "31.12.2025 - 01.01.2026"
            FormatRewatchDate = "(" & Format$(dStart, "dd.mm.yyyy") & " - " & Format$(dEnd, "dd.mm.yyyy") & ")"
        End If

    ' 4. OstatnÌ p¯Ìpady (bez pomlËky)
    ElseIf InStr(1, trimmedStr, "NetuöÌm", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
        FormatRewatchDate = "(netuöÌm p¯esnÏ)"
    Else
        ' JednoduchÈ datum
        FormatRewatchDate = "(" & Format$(CDate(trimmedStr), "dd.mm.yyyy") & ")"
    End If
    
    Exit Function

DateParseError:
    ' Z·chrann· brzda: vr·tÌ p˘vodnÌ text v z·vork·ch, pokud selûe parsov·nÌ
    FormatRewatchDate = "(" & trimmedStr & ")"
End Function

Private Sub QuickSort(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal First As Long, ByVal Last As Long)
    Dim pivot As Variant, Temp As Variant, i As Long, j As Long
    If First >= Last Then Exit Sub
    i = First: j = Last: pivot = arr((First + Last) \ 2)
    
    Dim p0 As Long: p0 = pivot(0)
    Dim p1U As String: p1U = UCase(pivot(1))
    
    Do
        Do While (arr(i)(0) < p0) Or (arr(i)(0) = p0 And UCase(arr(i)(1)) < p1U): i = i + 1: Loop
        Do While (arr(j)(0) > p0) Or (arr(j)(0) = p0 And UCase(arr(j)(1)) > p1U): j = j - 1: Loop
        If i <= j Then
            Temp = arr(i): arr(i) = arr(j): arr(j) = Temp
            i = i + 1: j = j - 1
        End If
    Loop While i <= j
    
    If First < j Then QuickSort arr, First, j
    If i < Last Then QuickSort arr, i, Last
End Sub

Function FormatujCasCesky(ExcelTimeValue As Double) As String
    Dim totalMinutes As Long, days As Long, hours As Long, result As String
    totalMinutes = Round(ExcelTimeValue * 1440, 0)
    days = Int(totalMinutes / 1440)
    hours = Int((totalMinutes Mod 1440) / 60)
    Select Case days
        Case 0: result = ""
        Case 1: result = "1 den"
        Case 2 To 4: result = days & " dny"
        Case Else: result = days & " dnÌ"
    End Select
    If days > 0 And hours > 0 Then result = result & " "
    Select Case hours
        Case 0: If days = 0 Then result = "0 hodin"
        Case 1: result = result & "1 hodina"
        Case 2 To 4: result = result & hours & " hodiny"
        Case Else: result = result & hours & " hodin"
    End Select
    FormatujCasCesky = result
End Function

Sub VytvorTlacitkoAktualizaceRewatch()
    Dim wsInfo As Worksheet: Set wsInfo = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    On Error Resume Next: wsInfo.Shapes("btnAktualizaceRewatch").Delete: On Error GoTo 0
    Dim rng As Range: Set rng = wsInfo.Range("D1")
    Dim btn As Shape: Set btn = wsInfo.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = "btnAktualizaceRewatch"
        .OnAction = "AktualizovatDataRewatchu"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .line.Visible = msoTrue: .line.weight = 1.5: .line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle: .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False: .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat data"
            With .TextRange.Font
                .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True
                .Fill.Visible = msoTrue: .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
            End With
        End With
    End With
    MsgBox "TlaËÌtko bylo aktualizov·no."
End Sub

--- KONEC K”DU [Data_All_sorts_of_things] ---

Modul: Graphs_Monthly_Daily_Watch_Time
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Graphs_Monthly_Daily_Watch_Time] ---
Option Explicit

' --- PomocnÈ funkce ---
Function Nz(Expression As Variant, Optional ValueIfNull As Variant) As Variant
    If IsMissing(ValueIfNull) Then ValueIfNull = ""
    If IsNull(Expression) Or IsEmpty(Expression) Then
        Nz = ValueIfNull
    Else
        Nz = Expression
    End If
End Function

Function GetMonthNumber(monthName As String) As Integer
    Select Case LCase(Trim(monthName))
        Case "leden": GetMonthNumber = 1
        Case "˙nor": GetMonthNumber = 2
        Case "b¯ezen": GetMonthNumber = 3
        Case "duben": GetMonthNumber = 4
        Case "kvÏten": GetMonthNumber = 5
        Case "Ëerven": GetMonthNumber = 6
        Case "Ëervenec": GetMonthNumber = 7
        Case "srpen": GetMonthNumber = 8
        Case "z·¯Ì": GetMonthNumber = 9
        Case "¯Ìjen": GetMonthNumber = 10
        Case "listopad": GetMonthNumber = 11
        Case "prosinec": GetMonthNumber = 12
        Case Else: GetMonthNumber = 0
    End Select
End Function

Sub QuickSortMonthlyData(ByRef names As Variant, ByRef values As Variant, ByRef dates As Variant, ByVal First As Long, ByVal Last As Long)
    Dim pivotDate As Date, tempName As String, tempValue As Double, tempDate As Date
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    If First < Last Then
        pivotDate = dates((First + Last) \ 2)
        i = First: j = Last
        Do
            Do While dates(i) < pivotDate: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While dates(j) > pivotDate: j = j - 1: Loop
            If i <= j Then
                tempName = names(i): names(i) = names(j): names(j) = tempName
                tempValue = values(i): values(i) = values(j): values(j) = tempValue
                tempDate = dates(i): dates(i) = dates(j): dates(j) = tempDate
                i = i + 1: j = j - 1
            End If
        Loop Until i > j
        If First < j Then QuickSortMonthlyData names, values, dates, First, j
        If i < Last Then QuickSortMonthlyData names, values, dates, i, Last
    End If
End Sub

Sub QuickSortArray(arr, ByVal First As Long, ByVal Last As Long, ByVal col As Long)
    Dim pivot As Variant, Temp As Variant, i As Long, j As Long
    If First < Last Then
        pivot = arr((First + Last) \ 2, col)
        i = First: j = Last
        Do
            Do While arr(i, col) < pivot: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While arr(j, col) > pivot: j = j - 1: Loop
            If i <= j Then
                Temp = arr(i, 1): arr(i, 1) = arr(j, 1): arr(j, 1) = Temp
                Temp = arr(i, 2): arr(i, 2) = arr(j, 2): arr(j, 2) = Temp
                i = i + 1: j = j - 1
            End If
        Loop Until i > j
        If First < j Then QuickSortArray arr, First, j, col
        If i < Last Then QuickSortArray arr, i, Last, col
    End If
End Sub

Function SkloÚujDen(pocet As Long) As String
    Select Case pocet
        Case 1: SkloÚujDen = "den"
        Case 2, 3, 4: SkloÚujDen = "dny"
        Case Else: SkloÚujDen = "dnÌ"
    End Select
End Function

Private Sub SortDates(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal l As Long, ByVal r As Long)
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Variant, Y As Variant
    i = l: j = r
    X = arr((l + r) \ 2)
    Do While i <= j
        Do While arr(i) < X: i = i + 1: Loop
        Do While arr(j) > X: j = j - 1: Loop
        If i <= j Then
            Y = arr(i): arr(i) = arr(j): arr(j) = Y
            i = i + 1: j = j - 1
        End If
    Loop
    If l < j Then SortDates arr, l, j
    If i < r Then SortDates arr, i, r
End Sub

Sub VykresliMesicniGraf(ByRef dictM As Object, ByVal filterEnd As Date)
    Dim wsObecne As Worksheet: Set wsObecne = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Dim cht As ChartObject
    
    ' Filtrace klÌË˘, kterÈ jsou mimo rozsah (jen pojistka)
    Dim finalDict As Object: Set finalDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim key As Variant
    For Each key In dictM.keys
        If CDate("1 " & key) <= filterEnd Then finalDict.Add key, dictM(key)
    Next key
    
    If finalDict.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' P¯Ìprava polÌ pro graf
    Dim MNames() As String, MVals() As Double, MDates() As Date
    ReDim MNames(1 To finalDict.count), MVals(1 To finalDict.count), MDates(1 To finalDict.count)
    
    Dim i As Long: i = 1
    For Each key In finalDict.keys
        MNames(i) = LCase(key)
        MVals(i) = Round(finalDict(key) / 60, 1) ' P¯evod na hodiny
        MDates(i) = CDate("1 " & key)
        i = i + 1
    Next key
    
    Call QuickSortMonthlyData(MNames, MVals, MDates, 1, finalDict.count)
    
    ' VykreslenÌ
    On Error Resume Next
    Set cht = wsObecne.ChartObjects("AnimeMonthlyWatchChart")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If cht Is Nothing Then
        Set cht = wsObecne.ChartObjects.Add(left:=550, Width:=600, top:=650, Height:=350)
        cht.Name = "AnimeMonthlyWatchChart"
        cht.Chart.ChartType = xlColumnClustered
    End If
    
    With cht.Chart
        .HasTitle = True
        .ChartTitle.text = "Sledov·nÌ Anime v roce 2026 (dny, hodiny a minuty)"
        If .SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        .SeriesCollection(1).values = MVals
        .SeriesCollection(1).XValues = MNames
        .SeriesCollection(1).ApplyDataLabels
    End With
    
    ' Form·tov·nÌ popisk˘ (vËetnÏ tvÈ gramatiky)
    Dim totalHours As Double: totalHours = Application.WorksheetFunction.Sum(MVals)
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(MVals)
        Dim hVal As Double: hVal = MVals(i)
        
        ' 1. »as (HH:MM)
        Dim tMin As Long: tMin = Round(hVal * 60, 0)
        Dim txtTime As String: txtTime = Int(tMin / 60) & ":" & Format(tMin Mod 60, "00")
        
        ' 2. Dny (OPRAVENO: val -> hVal)
        Dim valDays As Double: valDays = hVal / 24
        
        ' 3. SkloÚov·nÌ (OPRAVENO: sjednocenÌ n·zvu promÏnnÈ na sSuffix)
        Dim sSuffix As String
        If valDays = 1# Then
            sSuffix = "den"
        ElseIf valDays > 0# And valDays < 1# Then
            sSuffix = "dne"
        ElseIf (valDays >= 2# And valDays < 5# And (valDays - Fix(valDays) = 0)) Then
            sSuffix = "dny"
        Else
            sSuffix = "dnÌ"
        End If
        
        Dim txtDays As String: txtDays = Replace(Format(valDays, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " " & sSuffix
        
        ' 4. Procenta
        Dim txtPerc As String: txtPerc = "0%"
        If totalHours > 0 Then txtPerc = Replace(Format(hVal / totalHours, "0.0%"), ".", ",")
        
        ' 5. Z·pis do grafu
        With cht.Chart.SeriesCollection(1).Points(i).DataLabel
            .text = txtTime & vbLf & txtDays & vbLf & "(" & txtPerc & ")"
            .Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
            .Font.size = 9
            .Font.Bold = True
        End With
    Next i
End Sub

Sub VykresliDenniGraf(ByRef dictD As Object, ByVal fStart As Date, ByVal fEnd As Date)
    Dim wsObecne As Worksheet: Set wsObecne = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Dim chartObj As ChartObject
    
    ' --- OPRAVA: O¯ÌznutÌ budoucnosti ---
    Dim effectiveEndDate As Date
    If fEnd > Date Then effectiveEndDate = Date Else effectiveEndDate = fEnd
    ' -------------------------------------
    
    ' DoplnÏnÌ nulov˝ch dn˘ (pouze do effectiveEndDate)
    Dim d As Date
    For d = fStart To effectiveEndDate
        If Not dictD.Exists(d) Then dictD.Add d, 0
    Next d
    
    ' Filtrace dictionary (aby neobsahoval dny nad effectiveEndDate, pokud je anal˝za tam p¯idala)
    Dim finalDict As Object: Set finalDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim key As Variant
    For Each key In dictD.keys
        If CDate(key) >= fStart And CDate(key) <= effectiveEndDate Then
            finalDict.Add key, dictD(key)
        End If
    Next key
    
    If finalDict.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' P¯evod dictionary na pole pro QuickSort
    Dim arrData As Variant
    ReDim arrData(1 To finalDict.count, 1 To 2)
    Dim i As Long: i = 1
    
    For Each key In finalDict.keys
        arrData(i, 1) = key
        arrData(i, 2) = Round(finalDict(key), 1)
        i = i + 1
    Next key
    
    Call QuickSortArray(arrData, 1, finalDict.count, 1)
    
    ' VykreslenÌ
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chartObj = wsObecne.ChartObjects("AnimeWatchChart")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If chartObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chartObj = wsObecne.ChartObjects.Add(left:=10, Width:=800, top:=100, Height:=400)
        chartObj.Name = "AnimeWatchChart"
        chartObj.Chart.ChartType = xlLine
    End If
    
    With chartObj.Chart
        .HasTitle = True
        .ChartTitle.text = "Sledov·nÌ Anime v roce 2026 (minuty dennÏ)"
        If .SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        .SeriesCollection(1).values = Application.Index(arrData, 0, 2)
        .SeriesCollection(1).XValues = Application.Index(arrData, 0, 1)
    End With
    
    ' V˝pis pr˘mÏru
    Dim sumTime As Double: sumTime = Application.WorksheetFunction.Sum(Application.Index(arrData, 0, 2))
    Dim daysCount As Long: daysCount = DateDiff("d", fStart, effectiveEndDate) + 1
    Dim avgM As Double: If daysCount > 0 Then avgM = sumTime / daysCount
    
    Dim txt As String
    txt = "Pr˘mÏrn˝ Ëas sledov·nÌ za den v obdobÌ: " & Format(avgM / 1440, "h:mm") & " (h:mm)"
    wsObecne.Range("FA2").Value = txt
    
    ' --- ROLLING AVERAGES PRO POZN¡MKU FA2 ---
    Dim sum7 As Double, sum30 As Double, sum180 As Double
    Dim cnt7 As Long, cnt30 As Long, cnt180 As Long
    Dim dLoop As Date, dayVal As Double, daysBack As Long
    Dim sixMonthStart As Date: sixMonthStart = DateAdd("m", -6, effectiveEndDate)
    If sixMonthStart < fStart Then sixMonthStart = fStart
    
    For dLoop = fStart To effectiveEndDate
        dayVal = 0
        If dictD.Exists(dLoop) Then dayVal = dictD(dLoop)
        daysBack = DateDiff("d", dLoop, effectiveEndDate)
        
        If daysBack < 7 Then sum7 = sum7 + dayVal: cnt7 = cnt7 + 1
        If daysBack < 30 Then sum30 = sum30 + dayVal: cnt30 = cnt30 + 1
        If dLoop >= sixMonthStart Then sum180 = sum180 + dayVal: cnt180 = cnt180 + 1
    Next dLoop
    
    Dim avg7 As Double, avg30 As Double, avg180 As Double
    If cnt7 > 0 Then avg7 = sum7 / cnt7
    If cnt30 > 0 Then avg30 = sum30 / cnt30
    If cnt180 > 0 Then avg180 = sum180 / cnt180
    
    ' äipky a rozdÌly ñ vöechny vs. celkov˝ pr˘mÏr obdobÌ (avgM z buÚky)
    Dim diff7 As Double: diff7 = avg7 - avgM
    Dim diff30 As Double: diff30 = avg30 - avgM
    Dim diff180 As Double: diff180 = avg180 - avgM
    
    Dim arrow7 As String, arrow30 As String, arrow180 As String
    If diff7 > 1 Then
        arrow7 = ChrW(9650)
    ElseIf diff7 < -1 Then
        arrow7 = ChrW(9660)
    Else
        arrow7 = ChrW(9654)
    End If
    If diff30 > 1 Then
        arrow30 = ChrW(9650)
    ElseIf diff30 < -1 Then
        arrow30 = ChrW(9660)
    Else
        arrow30 = ChrW(9654)
    End If
    If diff180 > 1 Then
        arrow180 = ChrW(9650)
    ElseIf diff180 < -1 Then
        arrow180 = ChrW(9660)
    Else
        arrow180 = ChrW(9654)
    End If
    
    Dim diffTxt7 As String, diffTxt30 As String, diffTxt180 As String
    If diff7 >= 0 Then diffTxt7 = "+" & Format(Abs(diff7) / 1440, "h:mm") Else diffTxt7 = "-" & Format(Abs(diff7) / 1440, "h:mm")
    If diff30 >= 0 Then diffTxt30 = "+" & Format(Abs(diff30) / 1440, "h:mm") Else diffTxt30 = "-" & Format(Abs(diff30) / 1440, "h:mm")
    If diff180 >= 0 Then diffTxt180 = "+" & Format(Abs(diff180) / 1440, "h:mm") Else diffTxt180 = "-" & Format(Abs(diff180) / 1440, "h:mm")
    ' »asy pro tuËnÈ form·tov·nÌ
    Dim time7 As String: time7 = Format(avg7 / 1440, "h:mm")
    Dim time30 As String: time30 = Format(avg30 / 1440, "h:mm")
    Dim time180 As String: time180 = Format(avg180 / 1440, "h:mm")
    
    ' SestavenÌ pozn·mky s mezerami pro zarovn·nÌ
    Dim label7 As String: label7 = "PoslednÌch 7 dnÌ:"
    Dim label30 As String: label30 = "PoslednÌch 30 dnÌ:"
    Dim label180 As String: label180 = "PoslednÌch 6 mÏsÌc˘:"
    
    ' Zarovn·nÌ na dÈlku nejdelöÌho labelu + 1 mezera
    Dim maxLen As Long: maxLen = Len(label180) + 1
    label7 = label7 & Space(maxLen - Len(label7))
    label30 = label30 & Space(maxLen - Len(label30))
    label180 = label180 & " "
    
    Dim noteTxt As String
    noteTxt = label7 & time7 & " " & arrow7 & " (" & diffTxt7 & ")" & vbLf & _
              label30 & time30 & " " & arrow30 & " (" & diffTxt30 & ")" & vbLf & _
              label180 & time180 & " " & arrow180 & " (" & diffTxt180 & ")"
    
    ' Z·pis pozn·mky do FA2
    On Error Resume Next
    wsObecne.Range("FA2").Comment.Delete
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    Dim cmt As Comment
    Set cmt = wsObecne.Range("FA2").AddComment(noteTxt)
    
    ' AutoSize + monospace font pro zarovn·nÌ
    cmt.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = True
    cmt.Shape.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Name = "Consolas"
    cmt.Shape.TextFrame.Characters.Font.size = 10
    
    ' TuËnÈ form·tov·nÌ Ëas˘ (hled·me InStr v kaûdÈm ¯·dku)
    Dim cmtText As String: cmtText = cmt.Shape.TextFrame.Characters.text
    Dim pos As Long, searchFrom As Long
    
    ' ÿ·dek 1
    searchFrom = 1
    pos = InStr(searchFrom, cmtText, time7)
    If pos > 0 Then cmt.Shape.TextFrame.Characters(pos, Len(time7)).Font.Bold = True
    
    ' ÿ·dek 2 (hledat za prvnÌm vbLf)
    searchFrom = InStr(1, cmtText, vbLf) + 1
    pos = InStr(searchFrom, cmtText, time30)
    If pos > 0 Then cmt.Shape.TextFrame.Characters(pos, Len(time30)).Font.Bold = True
    
    ' ÿ·dek 3 (hledat za druh˝m vbLf)
    searchFrom = InStr(searchFrom, cmtText, vbLf) + 1
    pos = InStr(searchFrom, cmtText, time180)
    If pos > 0 Then cmt.Shape.TextFrame.Characters(pos, Len(time180)).Font.Bold = True
End Sub

Sub VypoctiStreak(ByRef dictD As Object, ByVal fStart As Date, ByVal fEnd As Date)
    Dim wsObecne As Worksheet: Set wsObecne = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    ' Najdi nejstaröÌ datum v datech pro spr·vn˝ v˝poËet streaku p¯es hranice obdobÌ
    Dim minDate As Date: minDate = fStart
    Dim kk As Variant
    For Each kk In dictD.keys
        If CDate(kk) < minDate Then minDate = CDate(kk)
    Next kk
    
    Dim d As Date
    Dim currStreak As Long, maxStreak As Long
    Dim currStart As Date, currEnd As Date
    Dim maxStart As Date, maxEnd As Date
    Dim tempStart As Date
    
    currStreak = 0: maxStreak = 0
    Dim inStreak As Boolean: inStreak = False
    
    ' O¯ÌznutÌ budoucnosti pro v˝poËet streaku
    Dim effectiveEndDate As Date
    Dim maxDataDate As Date: maxDataDate = minDate
    Dim k As Variant
    For Each k In dictD.keys
        If CDate(k) > maxDataDate And dictD(k) >= 20 Then maxDataDate = CDate(k)
    Next k
    
    If maxDataDate > Date Then effectiveEndDate = maxDataDate Else effectiveEndDate = Date
    If effectiveEndDate > fEnd Then effectiveEndDate = fEnd
    
    ' 1. V˝poËet (Historick˝ nejdelöÌ)
    For d = minDate To effectiveEndDate
        If dictD.Exists(d) And dictD(d) >= 20 Then
            If Not inStreak Then
                inStreak = True
                tempStart = d
                currStreak = 1
            Else
                currStreak = currStreak + 1
            End If
            
            If currStreak > maxStreak Then
                maxStreak = currStreak
                maxStart = tempStart
                maxEnd = d
            End If
        Else
            inStreak = False
            currStreak = 0
        End If
    Next d
    If inStreak And currStreak > maxStreak Then
        maxStreak = currStreak
        maxStart = tempStart
        maxEnd = effectiveEndDate
    End If

    ' 2. V˝poËet AKTU¡LNÕHO streaku
    Dim actStreak As Long: actStreak = 0
    Dim actStart As Date, actEnd As Date
    Dim lastDate As Date: lastDate = 0
    
    If dictD.Exists(effectiveEndDate) And dictD(effectiveEndDate) >= 20 Then
        lastDate = effectiveEndDate
    ElseIf dictD.Exists(effectiveEndDate - 1) And dictD(effectiveEndDate - 1) >= 20 Then
        lastDate = effectiveEndDate - 1
    End If
    
    If lastDate > 0 Then
        actEnd = lastDate
        d = lastDate
        Do While d >= minDate
            If dictD.Exists(d) And dictD(d) >= 20 Then
                actStreak = actStreak + 1
                actStart = d
                d = d - 1
            Else
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
    End If
    
    ' 3. Z·pis do buÚky
    Dim txt As String
    txt = "Watch Streak: " & actStreak & " " & SkloÚujDen(actStreak) & " (nejdelöÌ: " & maxStreak & " " & SkloÚujDen(maxStreak) & ")"
    wsObecne.Range("EZ2").Value = txt
    
    ' 4. Pr·ce s KOMENT¡ÿEM (Zachov·nÌ velikosti + Text + Form·tov·nÌ)
    Dim cmt As Comment
    Dim existingText As String
    Dim customText As String
    Dim newNote As String
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro uloûenÌ velikosti
    Dim oldWidth As Double
    Dim oldHeight As Double
    Dim hadComment As Boolean
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set cmt = wsObecne.Range("EZ2").Comment
    
    ' Z¡LOHA VELIKOSTI A TEXTU
    If Not cmt Is Nothing Then
        existingText = cmt.text
        oldWidth = cmt.Shape.Width   ' <--- UloûÌme öÌ¯ku
        oldHeight = cmt.Shape.Height ' <--- UloûÌme v˝öku
        hadComment = True
    Else
        existingText = ""
        hadComment = False
    End If
    On Error GoTo ErrWatchStreak
    
    ' Filtrujeme starÈ automatickÈ ¯·dky, zbytek (tv˘j text) si nech·me
    If Len(existingText) > 0 Then
        Dim lines() As String
        lines = Split(existingText, vbLf)
        Dim i As Long
        For i = 0 To UBound(lines)
            Dim ln As String: ln = Trim(lines(i))
            ' Hled·me klÌËov· slova, kter· znaËÌ automatick˝ text
            If InStr(1, ln, "Current Watch Streak") = 0 And _
               InStr(1, ln, "Longest Watch Streak") = 0 And _
               InStr(1, ln, "Current:") = 0 And _
               InStr(1, ln, "Longest:") = 0 And _
               ln <> "" Then
                customText = customText & lines(i) & vbLf
            End If
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' SestavenÌ novÈ pozn·mky
    Dim strAct As String, strMax As String
    
    ' Form·t: "Current Watch Streak: 01.01.2025 - 05.01.2025"
    If actStreak > 0 Then
        strAct = "Current Watch Streak: " & Format(actStart, "dd.mm.yyyy") & " - " & Format(actEnd, "dd.mm.yyyy")
    Else
        strAct = "Current Watch Streak: N/A"
    End If
    
    If maxStreak > 0 Then
        strMax = "Longest Watch Streak: " & Format(maxStart, "dd.mm.yyyy") & " - " & Format(maxEnd, "dd.mm.yyyy")
    Else
        strMax = "Longest Watch Streak: N/A"
    End If
    
    newNote = strAct & vbLf & strMax
    If Len(customText) > 0 Then newNote = newNote & vbLf & left(customText, Len(customText) - 1)
    
    ' Aplikace novÈho textu
    On Error Resume Next
    wsObecne.Range("EZ2").Comment.Delete
    Set cmt = wsObecne.Range("EZ2").AddComment(newNote)
    
    ' OBNOVENÕ VELIKOSTI
    If hadComment Then
        cmt.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = False ' MusÌme vypnout AutoSize, aby platily rozmÏry
        cmt.Shape.Width = oldWidth
        cmt.Shape.Height = oldHeight
    Else
        cmt.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = True ' Pokud koment·¯ nebyl, nech·me ho automaticky
    End If
    
    ' TuËnÈ pÌsmo JEN PRO DATUMY
    With cmt.Shape.TextFrame
        Dim pStart As Long
        
        ' TuËnÏ pro Current
        If actStreak > 0 Then
            ' Najdi prvnÌ datum
            pStart = InStr(1, .Characters.text, Format(actStart, "dd.mm.yyyy"))
            If pStart > 0 Then .Characters(pStart, 10).Font.Bold = True
            ' Najdi druhÈ datum
            pStart = InStr(pStart + 10, .Characters.text, Format(actEnd, "dd.mm.yyyy"))
            If pStart > 0 Then .Characters(pStart, 10).Font.Bold = True
        End If
        
        ' TuËnÏ pro Longest
        If maxStreak > 0 Then
            Dim startLongest As Long
            startLongest = InStr(1, .Characters.text, "Longest Watch Streak")
            
            If startLongest > 0 Then
                pStart = InStr(startLongest, .Characters.text, Format(maxStart, "dd.mm.yyyy"))
                If pStart > 0 Then .Characters(pStart, 10).Font.Bold = True
                
                pStart = InStr(pStart + 10, .Characters.text, Format(maxEnd, "dd.mm.yyyy"))
                If pStart > 0 Then .Characters(pStart, 10).Font.Bold = True
            End If
        End If
    End With
    
    Exit Sub
ErrWatchStreak:
    ' Tich˝ exit
End Sub

' --- PROCEDURA PRO VYTVOÿENÕ TLA»ÕTKA A SPUäTÃNÕ OBOU AKTUALIZACÕ ---
Public Sub AktualizovatVsechnyGrafyCezTlacitko()
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    Dim ws As Worksheet, btn As Shape, rng As Range
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Set rng = ws.Range("CM1")
    rng.ColumnWidth = 19.29
    rng.RowHeight = 24.75
    On Error Resume Next
    ws.Shapes("btnAktualizaceGrafu").Delete
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = "btnAktualizaceGrafu"
        .OnAction = "SpustitAktualizaciObouGrafu"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
        With .line: .Visible = msoTrue: .weight = 1.5: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .MarginBottom = 0: .MarginLeft = 0: .MarginRight = 0: .MarginTop = 0
            With .TextRange
                .text = "Aktualizovat grafy, v˝poËty a History Log"
                With .Font: .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True: End With
                With .Font.Fill: .Visible = msoTrue: .Solid: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
            End With
        End With
    End With
    Exit Sub
ErrBtn:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i vytv·¯enÌ spoleËnÈho aktualizaËnÌho tlaËÌtka: " & vbCrLf & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' --- CENTR¡LNÕ ANALðZA DAT (J¡DRO SINGLE-PASS) ---
Private Sub AnalyzujDataCentralne(ByRef dataArr As Variant, ByRef CommentsI() As String, ByRef CommentsN() As String, _
                                  ByVal lastRow As Long, ByVal fStart As Date, ByVal fEnd As Date, _
                                  ByRef dictD As Object, ByRef dictM As Object, _
                                  ByRef dictStreakD As Object)
    
    Dim i As Long, k As Long
    Dim regEp As Object, regN As Object, matches As Object
    
    ' Inicializace Regexu jednou
    Set regEp = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp"): regEp.Pattern = "EP:\s*(\d+)\s*(?:-\s*(\d+))?;\s*(\d{1,2}\.\d{1,2}\.\d{4})": regEp.Global = True
    Set regN = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp"): regN.Pattern = "\d{1,2}\.\d{1,2}\.\d{4}": regN.Global = True
    
    Dim epDur As Double, totEps As Long
    Dim watchTime As Double, adjTime As Double, rwCount As Long
    Dim useCmtI As Boolean
    Dim curDate As Date, monthKey As String
    Dim minsToAdd As Double
    Dim useCmtIStreak As Boolean
    
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        ' NaËtenÌ z·kladnÌch ˙daj˘ z pole
        epDur = 0: totEps = 0
        If IsNumeric(Nz(dataArr(i, 10))) Then epDur = CDbl(Nz(dataArr(i, 10))) ' J
        If IsNumeric(Nz(dataArr(i, 9))) Then totEps = CLng(Nz(dataArr(i, 9))) ' I
        
        useCmtI = False
        useCmtIStreak = False
        
        ' --- A. ZPRACOV¡NÕ SLOUPCE I (EPISODES) ---
        If Len(CommentsI(i)) > 0 And epDur > 0 Then
            Dim lines As Variant, ln As Variant
            lines = Split(CommentsI(i), vbLf)
            For Each ln In lines
                Set matches = regEp.Execute(ln)
                If matches.count > 0 Then
                    Dim epStart As Long, epEnd As Long, epDate As Date
                    epStart = CLng(Nz(matches(0).SubMatches(0)))
                    If Nz(matches(0).SubMatches(1)) <> "" Then epEnd = CLng(Nz(matches(0).SubMatches(1))) Else epEnd = epStart
                    On Error Resume Next
                    epDate = CDate(Nz(matches(0).SubMatches(2)))
                    On Error GoTo 0
                    
                    If epDate <= fEnd Then
                        minsToAdd = (epEnd - epStart + 1) * epDur
                        ' Streak slovnÌk (bez dolnÌ hranice)
                        dictStreakD(epDate) = dictStreakD(epDate) + minsToAdd
                        useCmtIStreak = True
                        ' HlavnÌ slovnÌky (s dolnÌ hranicÌ)
                        If epDate >= fStart Then
                            dictD(epDate) = dictD(epDate) + minsToAdd
                            monthKey = Format(epDate, "mmmm yyyy")
                            dictM(monthKey) = dictM(monthKey) + minsToAdd
                            useCmtI = True
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Next ln
        End If
        
        ' --- B. ZPRACOV¡NÕ Z¡KLADNÕHO »ASU A REWATCHŸ (L, M, N, O) ---
        If IsDate(Nz(dataArr(i, 12))) And IsNumeric(Nz(dataArr(i, 15))) Then
            watchTime = CDbl(Nz(dataArr(i, 15))) ' O
            If watchTime > 0 Then
                rwCount = val(Nz(dataArr(i, 14))) ' N
                If rwCount > 0 Then adjTime = watchTime / (rwCount + 1) Else adjTime = watchTime
                
                ' Rewatch koment·¯e (N)
                If Len(CommentsN(i)) > 0 Then
                    Dim linesN As Variant, lnN As Variant
                    linesN = Split(CommentsN(i), vbLf)
                    For Each lnN In linesN
                        ' Logika pro "; EPs:"
                        If InStr(1, lnN, "; EPs:", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                            Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(lnN, "; EPs:")
                            Dim dPart As String: dPart = Trim(Mid(parts(0), InStr(parts(0), ".") + 1))
                            Dim epsArr() As String: epsArr = Split(Trim(parts(1)), ",")
                            
                            Dim rwS As Date, rwE As Date
                            If InStr(dPart, "-") > 0 Then
                                rwS = CDate(Trim(Split(dPart, "-")(0))): rwE = CDate(Trim(Split(dPart, "-")(1)))
                            Else
                                rwS = CDate(dPart): rwE = rwS
                            End If
                            
                            Dim nDays As Long: nDays = DateDiff("d", rwS, rwE) + 1
                            If UBound(epsArr) + 1 = nDays Then
                                Dim tPerEp As Double: If totEps > 0 Then tPerEp = adjTime / totEps
                                For k = 0 To nDays - 1
                                    curDate = rwS + k
                                    minsToAdd = CLng(Trim(epsArr(k))) * tPerEp
                                    If curDate <= fEnd Then
                                        dictStreakD(curDate) = dictStreakD(curDate) + minsToAdd
                                        If curDate >= fStart Then
                                            dictD(curDate) = dictD(curDate) + minsToAdd
                                            monthKey = Format(curDate, "mmmm yyyy")
                                            dictM(monthKey) = dictM(monthKey) + minsToAdd
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                Next k
                            End If
                        ' Logika pro star˝ form·t data
                        ElseIf regN.Test(lnN) Then
                            Set matches = regN.Execute(lnN)
                            Dim rS As Date, rE As Date
                            rS = CDate(Nz(matches(0)))
                            If matches.count > 1 Then rE = CDate(Nz(matches(1))) Else rE = rS
                            
                            Dim daysRW As Long: daysRW = DateDiff("d", rS, rE) + 1
                            If daysRW < 1 Then daysRW = 1
                            minsToAdd = adjTime / daysRW
                            For k = 0 To daysRW - 1
                                curDate = rS + k
                                If curDate <= fEnd Then
                                    dictStreakD(curDate) = dictStreakD(curDate) + minsToAdd
                                    If curDate >= fStart Then
                                        dictD(curDate) = dictD(curDate) + minsToAdd
                                        monthKey = Format(curDate, "mmmm yyyy")
                                        dictM(monthKey) = dictM(monthKey) + minsToAdd
                                    End If
                                End If
                            Next k
                        End If
                    Next lnN
                End If
                
                ' Z·kladnÌ rozsah (pokud nebyly EPs v I)
                If (Not useCmtI) Or (Not useCmtIStreak) Then
                    Dim sDate As Date: sDate = CDate(Nz(dataArr(i, 12)))
                    Dim eDate As Date
                    If IsDate(Nz(dataArr(i, 13))) Then eDate = CDate(Nz(dataArr(i, 13))) Else eDate = Date
                    
                    If sDate <= eDate Then
                        Dim diff As Long: diff = DateDiff("d", sDate, eDate) + 1
                        If diff < 1 Then diff = 1
                        minsToAdd = adjTime / diff
                        For k = 0 To diff - 1
                            curDate = sDate + k
                            If curDate <= fEnd Then
                                If (Not useCmtIStreak) Then
                                    dictStreakD(curDate) = dictStreakD(curDate) + minsToAdd
                                End If
                                If (Not useCmtI) And curDate >= fStart Then
                                    dictD(curDate) = dictD(curDate) + minsToAdd
                                    monthKey = Format(curDate, "mmmm yyyy")
                                    dictM(monthKey) = dictM(monthKey) + minsToAdd
                                End If
                            End If
                        Next k
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
End Sub

' --- HLAVNÕ PROCEDURA (ÿÕDÕCÕ) ---
Public Sub SpustitAktualizaciObouGrafu()
    On Error GoTo ErrMaster
    
    ' 1. OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ
    Dim oldCalc As XlCalculation: oldCalc = Application.Calculation
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    
    ' 2. PÿÕPRAVA DAT (ZDROJE)
    Dim wsAnime As Worksheet: Set wsAnime = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("ANIME LIST")
    Dim lastRow As Long: lastRow = wsAnime.Cells(wsAnime.Rows.count, "L").End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then MsgBox "é·dn· data.", vbExclamation: GoTo CleanExit
    
    ' NaËtenÌ hodnot do pole (Array)
    Dim dataArr As Variant: dataArr = wsAnime.Range("A1:Q" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' NaËtenÌ koment·¯˘ do pamÏti (Caching)
    Dim CommentsI() As String, CommentsN() As String
    ReDim CommentsI(1 To lastRow): ReDim CommentsN(1 To lastRow)
    Dim rngCmt As Range, cell As Range
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set rngCmt = wsAnime.Range("I2:I" & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    If Not rngCmt Is Nothing Then
        For Each cell In rngCmt: CommentsI(cell.row) = cell.Comment.text: Next cell
    End If
    Set rngCmt = Nothing
    Set rngCmt = wsAnime.Range("N2:N" & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    If Not rngCmt Is Nothing Then
        For Each cell In rngCmt: CommentsN(cell.row) = cell.Comment.text: Next cell
    End If
    On Error GoTo ErrMaster

    ' 3. PÿÕPRAVA VðSTUPNÕCH OBJEKTŸ (SlovnÌky)
    Dim dictDaily As Object: Set dictDaily = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim dictMonthly As Object: Set dictMonthly = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim dictStreakDaily As Object: Set dictStreakDaily = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' 4. PÿÕPRAVA »ASOV…HO FILTRU
    Dim wsObecne As Worksheet: Set wsObecne = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Dim filterStart As Date, filterEnd As Date
    If IsDate(wsObecne.Range("EH2").Value) Then filterStart = CDate(wsObecne.Range("EH2").Value) Else filterStart = DateSerial(2000, 1, 1)
    If IsDate(wsObecne.Range("EI2").Value) Then filterEnd = CDate(wsObecne.Range("EI2").Value) Else filterEnd = Date + 365

    ' <<< ZDE TVŸJ K”D PRO REWATCHE >>>
    Call AktualizovatDataRewatchu
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    ' <<< KONEC >>>

    ' 5. JEDINð PRŸCHOD DATY (SINGLE PASS ANALðZA)
    ' Tato procedura naplnÌ dictDaily a dictMonthly najednou
    Call AnalyzujDataCentralne(dataArr, CommentsI, CommentsN, lastRow, filterStart, filterEnd, dictDaily, dictMonthly, dictStreakDaily)
    
    ' 6. VYKRESLENÕ GRAFŸ A VðPO»TY (PouûÌvajÌ uû hotovÈ slovnÌky)
    Call VykresliMesicniGraf(dictMonthly, filterEnd)
    Call VykresliDenniGraf(dictDaily, filterStart, filterEnd)
    Call VypoctiStreak(dictStreakDaily, filterStart, filterEnd)
    
    ' 7. EXTERNÕ LOGY
    Call SpustitVytvoreniHistoryLog
    Call GenerateAdvancedTimeline_V22
    Call RunPythonOrchestrator

CleanExit:
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    Application.Calculation = oldCalc
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Vöechny grafy a v˝poËty byly ˙spÏönÏ aktualizov·ny (Single-Pass).", vbInformation
    Exit Sub

ErrMaster:
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

--- KONEC K”DU [Graphs_Monthly_Daily_Watch_Time] ---

Modul: LIST_Last_and_Longest_Watched
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [LIST_Last_and_Longest_Watched] ---
' Fin·lnÌ modul: modPrehledy
Option Explicit

' VäECHNY DEKLARACE PLATN… PRO CELð MODUL:
Const ZARADIT_POLOZKY_BEZ_POZNAMKY As Boolean = True

' NASTAVENÕ PO»TU POLOéEK:
Const POCET_ZOBRAZOVANYCH_POSLEDNICH As Long = 8
Const POCET_ZOBRAZOVANYCH_SERII As Long = 8

'====================================================================================
' *** HLAVNÕ OVL¡DACÕ PROCEDURY ***
'====================================================================================

' 1) Vytvo¯enÌ tlaËÌtka
Public Sub VytvorAktualizacniTlacitkoAnimePrehled()
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim rng As Range
    Dim btn As Shape
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Set rng = ws.Range("CG1")
    
    With rng
        .ColumnWidth = 27.14
        .RowHeight = 24.75
    End With
    
    On Error Resume Next
    ws.Shapes("btnAktualizaceAnimePrehled").Delete
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    
    With btn
        .Name = "btnAktualizaceAnimePrehled"
        .OnAction = "AktualizujVsechnyAnimePrehledy"
        
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
        With .line
            .Visible = msoTrue
            .weight = 1.5
            .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        End With
        
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat listy"
            With .TextRange.Font
                .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True
            End With
            With .TextRange.Font.Fill
                .Visible = msoTrue
                .Solid
                .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
        End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
    End With

    Exit Sub
ErrBtn:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i vytv·¯enÌ tlaËÌtka: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' 2) HlavnÌ procedura - SPOUäTÃ»
Public Sub AktualizujVsechnyAnimePrehledy()
    On Error GoTo ChybaHlavnihoMakra

    Dim wsData As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim arrData As Variant
    
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    
    ' --- OPTIMALIZACE PROSTÿEDÕ ---
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        MsgBox "é·dn· data v Anime Listu.", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanUpHlavnihoMakra
    End If
    
    ' NA»TENÕ DAT DO PAMÃTI (Range C2 aû Q_poslednÌ)
    arrData = wsData.Range("C2:Q" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' --- Krok 1: PoslednÌ zhlÈdnut· ---
    VytvorPrehled_PosledniZhlednute arrData
    
    ' --- Krok 2: Souhrn sÈriÌ ---
    VytvorPrehled_NejdelsiSerie arrData, wsData

CleanUpHlavnihoMakra:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Exit Sub

ChybaHlavnihoMakra:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i aktualizaci: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'====================================================================================
' *** POMOCN¡ FUNKCE PRO ÿAZENÕ ***
'====================================================================================
Private Sub BubbleSort2D(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal SortColIndex As Long, Optional descending As Boolean = True)
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, k As Long
    Dim Temp As Variant
    Dim condition As Boolean
    
    For i = LBound(arr, 1) To UBound(arr, 1) - 1
        For j = i + 1 To UBound(arr, 1)
            If descending Then
                condition = (arr(j, SortColIndex) > arr(i, SortColIndex))
            Else
                condition = (arr(j, SortColIndex) < arr(i, SortColIndex))
            End If
            
            If condition Then
                For k = LBound(arr, 2) To UBound(arr, 2)
                    Temp = arr(i, k)
                    arr(i, k) = arr(j, k)
                    arr(j, k) = Temp
                Next k
            End If
        Next j
    Next i
End Sub

'====================================================================================
' *** SEKCE A: PÿEHLED POSLEDNÕCH ZHL…DNUTðCH ***
'====================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorPrehled_PosledniZhlednute(arrMain As Variant)
    Dim wsTarget As Worksheet
    Dim arrFiltered() As Variant
    Dim i As Long, count As Long, r As Long
    
    Dim tbHeader As Shape, tbContent As Shape
    Dim defaultTopPos As Double, defaultLeftPos As Double
    Dim borderColor As Long: borderColor = RGB(0, 0, 0)
    
    Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    ' 1. Filtrace dat v pamÏti
    ReDim arrFiltered(1 To UBound(arrMain, 1), 1 To 5)
    count = 0
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(arrMain, 1)
        Dim valEnd As Variant: valEnd = arrMain(i, 11) ' M
        Dim valName As String: valName = CStr(arrMain(i, 1)) ' C
        
        If IsDate(valEnd) And Len(valName) > 0 Then
            count = count + 1
            arrFiltered(count, 1) = valName
            arrFiltered(count, 2) = arrMain(i, 10) ' Start
            arrFiltered(count, 3) = valEnd     ' End
            If IsNumeric(arrMain(i, 13)) Then arrFiltered(count, 4) = CLng(arrMain(i, 13)) Else arrFiltered(count, 4) = 0
            If IsNumeric(arrMain(i, 9)) Then arrFiltered(count, 5) = CInt(arrMain(i, 9)) Else arrFiltered(count, 5) = -1
        End If
    Next i
    
    If count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim arrFinal() As Variant
    ReDim arrFinal(1 To count, 1 To 5)
    For i = 1 To count
        For r = 1 To 5
            arrFinal(i, r) = arrFiltered(i, r)
        Next r
    Next i
    
    ' 2. Se¯azenÌ podle DATA KONCE
    BubbleSort2D arrFinal, 3, True
    
    ' 3. Vykreslov·nÌ
    With wsTarget.Range("BG27")
        defaultTopPos = .top
        defaultLeftPos = .left
    End With
