    On Error Resume Next
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeOverviewHeaderTop").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeOverviewHeaderLeft").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeOverviewHeaderRight").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeOverviewContentLeft").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeOverviewContentRight").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeOverviewContentBottom").Delete
    On Error GoTo 0

    ' HlaviËka
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbHeader = wsTarget.Shapes("txtAnimeOverviewHeader")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If tbHeader Is Nothing Then
        Set tbHeader = wsTarget.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, defaultLeftPos, defaultTopPos, 300, 30)
        tbHeader.Name = "txtAnimeOverviewHeader"
    End If
    
    With tbHeader
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
        .TextFrame2.TextRange.text = "PoslednÌ zhlÈdnut· Anime"
        With .TextFrame2.TextRange.Font
            .Bold = msoTrue: .size = 18: .Name = "Aptos Narrow"
        End With
    End With
    
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeOverviewHeaderTop", tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeOverviewHeaderLeft", tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeOverviewHeaderRight", tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height, borderColor, 1.5

    ' Obsah
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbContent = wsTarget.Shapes("txtAnimeOverviewContent")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If tbContent Is Nothing Then
        Set tbContent = wsTarget.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, defaultLeftPos, defaultTopPos + 30, 400, 300)
        tbContent.Name = "txtAnimeOverviewContent"
    End If
    
    With tbContent
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
        .TextFrame2.TextRange.text = ""
    End With
    
    Dim limit As Long: limit = IIf(count > POCET_ZOBRAZOVANYCH_POSLEDNICH, POCET_ZOBRAZOVANYCH_POSLEDNICH, count)
    Dim tr As Object
    
    For i = 1 To limit
        If i > 1 Then tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter vbCrLf & vbCrLf
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(i & ". ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrFinal(i, 1) & vbCrLf)
        FormatTxt tr, True, True
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("ZaË·tek sledov·nÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(Format(arrFinal(i, 2), "DD.MM.YYYY"))
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / konec sledov·nÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(Format(arrFinal(i, 3), "DD.MM.YYYY") & vbCrLf)
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("DÈlka sledov·nÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        
        Dim mins As Long: mins = arrFinal(i, 4)
        Dim hrs As Double: hrs = Round(mins / 60, 1)
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(mins & " minut (" & Replace(hrs, ".", ",") & " hodin)")
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(" / hodnocenÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        
        Dim rt As String
        If arrFinal(i, 5) >= 0 Then rt = arrFinal(i, 5) & "/10" Else rt = "?/10"
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(rt)
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
    Next i
    
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeOverviewContentLeft", tbContent.left, tbContent.top, tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeOverviewContentRight", tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top, tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeOverviewContentBottom", tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5

End Sub

'====================================================================================
' *** SEKCE B: SOUHRN NEJDELäÕCH S…RIÕ (Oprava dle p˘vodnÌho modulu) ***
'====================================================================================
Private Sub VytvorPrehled_NejdelsiSerie(arrMain As Variant, wsData As Worksheet)
    Dim wsTarget As Worksheet
    Dim dictSeries As Object
    Set dictSeries = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim i As Long
    Dim sName As String
    Dim rngComments As Range
    
    Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Set rngComments = wsData.Range("C2").Resize(UBound(arrMain, 1), 1)
    
    ' --- 1. AGREGACE DAT ---
    For i = 1 To UBound(arrMain, 1)
        sName = GetSeriesNameFromComment(rngComments.Cells(i, 1))
        
        If sName <> "" Then
            ' PouûÌv·me CDbl, aby to Ëetlo desetinnÈ Ë·rky jako v p˘vodnÌm modulu
            Dim eps As Long: If IsNumeric(arrMain(i, 7)) Then eps = CLng(arrMain(i, 7)) Else eps = 0
            Dim timePerEp As Double: If IsNumeric(arrMain(i, 8)) Then timePerEp = CDbl(arrMain(i, 8)) Else timePerEp = 0
            Dim rating As Double: If IsNumeric(arrMain(i, 9)) Then rating = CDbl(arrMain(i, 9)) Else rating = -1
            
            If Not dictSeries.Exists(sName) Then
                ' [TotalMin, TotalEp, SumRating, CountRating, NumParts]
                dictSeries.Add sName, Array(0#, 0, 0#, 0, 0)
            End If
            
            Dim stats As Variant
            stats = dictSeries(sName)
            
            stats(0) = stats(0) + (CDbl(timePerEp) * CDbl(eps)) ' Minuty
            stats(1) = stats(1) + eps               ' Epizody
            If rating >= 0 Then
                stats(2) = stats(2) + rating        ' Suma hodnocenÌ
                stats(3) = stats(3) + 1             ' PoËet hodnocenÌ
            End If
            stats(4) = stats(4) + 1                 ' PoËet Ë·stÌ
            
            dictSeries(sName) = stats
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictSeries.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' --- 2. PÿEVOD NA POLE A ÿAZENÕ ---
    Dim arrExport() As Variant
    ReDim arrExport(1 To dictSeries.count, 1 To 5)
    
    Dim key As Variant, r As Long
    r = 0
    For Each key In dictSeries.keys
        r = r + 1
        Dim dStats As Variant: dStats = dictSeries(key)
        
        arrExport(r, 1) = key           ' JmÈno
        arrExport(r, 2) = dStats(0)     ' Minuty (Double)
        arrExport(r, 3) = dStats(1)     ' Epizody
        If dStats(3) > 0 Then arrExport(r, 4) = dStats(2) / dStats(3) Else arrExport(r, 4) = 0
        arrExport(r, 5) = dStats(4)     ' Parts
    Next key
    
    BubbleSort2D arrExport, 2, True
    
    ' --- 3. VYKRESLOV¡NÕ (Podle p˘vodnÌho designu) ---
    Dim tbHeader As Shape, tbContent As Shape
    Dim defaultTopPos As Double, defaultLeftPos As Double
    Dim borderColor As Long: borderColor = RGB(0, 0, 0)
    
    With wsTarget.Range("BN1")
        defaultTopPos = .top + 50
        defaultLeftPos = .left - 10
    End With
    
    ' ⁄klid
    On Error Resume Next
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeSummaryHeaderTop").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeSummaryHeaderLeft").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeSummaryHeaderRight").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeSummaryContentLeft").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeSummaryContentRight").Delete
    wsTarget.Shapes("lineAnimeSummaryContentBottom").Delete
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' HlaviËka (S VðPLNÕ)
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbHeader = wsTarget.Shapes("txtAnimeSummaryHeader")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If tbHeader Is Nothing Then
        Set tbHeader = wsTarget.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, defaultLeftPos, defaultTopPos, 400, 30)
        tbHeader.Name = "txtAnimeSummaryHeader"
        tbHeader.Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        tbHeader.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(128, 0, 0)
        tbHeader.Fill.Transparency = 0
        tbHeader.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        tbHeader.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.Solid
        tbHeader.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255)
    End If
    
    With tbHeader
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
        .TextFrame2.TextRange.text = "NejdelöÌ zhlÈdnutÈ Anime sÈrie"
        .TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Bold = msoTrue
        .TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.size = 18
        .TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
        .TextFrame2.VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
        .TextFrame2.HorizontalAnchor = msoAlignCenter
    End With
    
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeSummaryHeaderTop", tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeSummaryHeaderLeft", tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeSummaryHeaderRight", tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top, tbHeader.left + tbHeader.Width, tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    
    ' Obsah (S VðPLNÕ a PŸVODNÕM FORM¡TOV¡NÕM)
    Dim limit As Long: limit = IIf(UBound(arrExport, 1) > POCET_ZOBRAZOVANYCH_SERII, POCET_ZOBRAZOVANYCH_SERII, UBound(arrExport, 1))

    ' V˝poËet v˝chozÌ v˝öky POUZE pro p¯Ìpad, ûe pole jeötÏ neexistuje
    Dim calcHeight As Double
    calcHeight = (limit * 3 * 14) + (limit * 10)
    If calcHeight < 100 Then calcHeight = 100
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbContent = wsTarget.Shapes("txtAnimeSummaryContent")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If tbContent Is Nothing Then
        ' Pokud neexistuje, vytvo¯Ìme ho s v˝chozÌ vypoËÌtanou v˝ökou
        Set tbContent = wsTarget.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, defaultLeftPos, defaultTopPos + 30, 400, calcHeight)
        tbContent.Name = "txtAnimeSummaryContent"
        tbContent.Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        tbContent.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(128, 0, 0)
        tbContent.Fill.Transparency = 0
        tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.Solid
        tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255)
    Else
        ' Pokud existuje, NEMÃNÕME VðäKU.
        ' Pouze zajistÌme, ûe zaËÌn· p¯esnÏ pod hlaviËkou.
        tbContent.left = tbHeader.left
        tbContent.top = tbHeader.top + tbHeader.Height
    End If
    
    With tbContent
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
        .TextFrame2.TextRange.text = ""
    End With
    
    Dim tr As Object
    For i = 1 To limit
        If i > 1 Then tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter vbCrLf & vbCrLf
        
        ' 1. VðPO»ET DAT (PÿESNÃ JAKO V PŸVODNÕM MODULU)
        
        ' Minuty: P¯evedeme na Long (zaokrouhlenÌ/o¯ÌznutÌ), aby to bylo celÈ ËÌslo
        Dim totalMinutes As Long: totalMinutes = arrExport(i, 2)
        
        ' Hodiny: PoËÌt·me z totalMinutes
        Dim totalHoursDecimal As Double: totalHoursDecimal = totalMinutes / 60
        Dim totalHoursFormatted As String
        
        ' Form·tov·nÌ hodin (kopie logiky p˘vodnÌho modulu)
        If totalHoursDecimal > 0 Then
             If totalHoursDecimal = Int(totalHoursDecimal) Then
                 totalHoursFormatted = Format(totalHoursDecimal, "0")
             Else
                 totalHoursFormatted = Format(totalHoursDecimal, "0.0")
                 totalHoursFormatted = Replace(totalHoursFormatted, Application.DecimalSeparator, ",")
                 If Right(totalHoursFormatted, 2) = ",0" Then
                     totalHoursFormatted = left(totalHoursFormatted, Len(totalHoursFormatted) - 2)
                 End If
             End If
        End If
        
        ' Dny: PoËÌt·me z totalHoursDecimal
        Dim totalDaysDecimal As Double: totalDaysDecimal = totalHoursDecimal / 24
        Dim totalDaysFormatted As String
        
        ' Form·tov·nÌ dn˘ (kopie logiky p˘vodnÌho modulu)
        If totalDaysDecimal > 0 Then
             If totalDaysDecimal = Int(totalDaysDecimal) Then
                 totalDaysFormatted = Format(totalDaysDecimal, "0")
             Else
                 totalDaysFormatted = Format(totalDaysDecimal, "0.0")
                 totalDaysFormatted = Replace(totalDaysFormatted, Application.DecimalSeparator, ",")
                 If Right(totalDaysFormatted, 2) = ",0" Then
                     totalDaysFormatted = left(totalDaysFormatted, Len(totalDaysFormatted) - 2)
                 End If
             End If
        End If
        
        ' SestavenÌ textu pro dÈlku
        Dim durationTextFormatted As String
        durationTextFormatted = totalMinutes & " minut"
        If totalHoursDecimal > 0 Then durationTextFormatted = durationTextFormatted & " (" & totalHoursFormatted & " hodin)"
        If totalDaysDecimal > 0 Then durationTextFormatted = durationTextFormatted & " (" & totalDaysFormatted & " dnÌ)"
        
        ' HodnocenÌ (kopie logiky p˘vodnÌho modulu - 0.#)
        Dim avgVal As Double: avgVal = arrExport(i, 4)
        Dim avgRatingFormatted As String
        If avgVal > 0 Then
            If avgVal = Int(avgVal) Then
                avgRatingFormatted = Format(avgVal, "0")
            Else
                avgRatingFormatted = Replace(Format(avgVal, "0.#"), ".", ",")
            End If
        Else
            avgRatingFormatted = "??"
        End If
        
        ' 2. VYPISOV¡NÕ DO TEXTBOXU
        
        ' ÿ·dek 1: N·zev
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(i & ". ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrExport(i, 1) & vbCrLf)
        FormatTxt tr, True, True
        
        ' ÿ·dek 2: DÈlka
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("DÈlka sledov·nÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(durationTextFormatted & vbCrLf)
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
        
        ' ÿ·dek 3: Info
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("PoËet dÌl˘: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrExport(i, 5) & " / ")
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("poËet epizod: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(arrExport(i, 3) & " / ")
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
        
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter("pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ: ")
        FormatTxt tr, False, False
        Set tr = tbContent.TextFrame2.TextRange.Characters.InsertAfter(avgRatingFormatted & "/10")
        FormatTxt tr, True, False
    Next i
    
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeSummaryContentLeft", tbContent.left, tbContent.top, tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeSummaryContentRight", tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top, tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5
    DrawLine wsTarget, "lineAnimeSummaryContentBottom", tbContent.left, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, tbContent.left + tbContent.Width, tbContent.top + tbContent.Height, borderColor, 1.5

End Sub

'====================================================================================
' *** POMOCN… FUNKCE ***
'====================================================================================

Function GetSeriesNameFromComment(cell As Range) As String
    Dim commentText As String
    Dim lines As Variant, line As Variant

    If Not cell.Comment Is Nothing Then
        commentText = cell.Comment.text
        lines = Split(commentText, vbLf)
        For Each line In lines
            If InStr(1, Trim(line), "N·zev sÈrie:", vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
                GetSeriesNameFromComment = Trim(Mid(line, InStr(1, line, ":") + 1))
                Exit Function
            End If
        Next line
    End If
    
    If ZARADIT_POLOZKY_BEZ_POZNAMKY Then
        GetSeriesNameFromComment = CStr(cell.Value)
    Else
        GetSeriesNameFromComment = ""
    End If
End Function

Private Sub DrawLine(ws As Worksheet, sName As String, x1 As Double, y1 As Double, x2 As Double, y2 As Double, col As Long, w As Double)
    Dim ln As Shape
    Set ln = ws.Shapes.AddLine(x1, y1, x2, y2)
    With ln
        .Name = sName
        .line.ForeColor.RGB = col
        .line.weight = w
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub FormatTxt(rng As Object, bBold As Boolean, bItalic As Boolean)
    With rng.Font
        .Name = "Aptos Narrow"
        .size = 11
        .Bold = bBold
        .Italic = bItalic
    End With
End Sub
--- KONEC K”DU [LIST_Last_and_Longest_Watched] ---

Modul: List6
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [List6] ---
Option Explicit

Private Sub TextBox1_Change()
End Sub

Private Sub txtPoznamky_Change()
End Sub

' **************************************************************************************************
' * HLAVNÕ UD¡LOST LISTU: ÿÕDÕ VäE PO VðBÃRU ANIME V BU“CE A1                                    *
' **************************************************************************************************
Private Sub Worksheet_Change(ByVal Target As Range)
    ' 1. Kontrola: ZmÏna probÏhla v buÚce A1
    If Not Intersect(Target, Me.Range("A1")) Is Nothing Then
        
        Dim fullText As String
        fullText = Target.Value
        
        ' Pokud je buÚka pr·zdn·, nic nedÏl·me
        If Len(Trim(fullText)) = 0 Then Exit Sub

        ' --- A) O»IäTÃNÕ N¡ZVU OD OM¡»KY Z DROPDOWNU ---
        Application.EnableEvents = False ' Vypnout ud·losti
        
        Dim animeName As String
        ' Pokud text obsahuje svislÌtko, vezmeme Ë·st p¯ed nÌm
        If InStr(1, fullText, " | ") > 0 Then
            animeName = Trim(Split(fullText, " | ")(0))
        Else
            animeName = Trim(fullText)
        End If
        
        ' ZapÌöeme Ëist˝ n·zev zpÏt do buÚky
        Target.Value = animeName
        
        ' --- B) VYTVOÿENÕ ODKAZU A FORM¡TOV¡NÕ (APTOS NARROW, 18, KURZÕVA, BÕL¡, #002060) ---
        Call NastavitHyperlinkProA1(Target, animeName)
        
        ' --- C) DALäÕ AUTOMATIZACE (Epizody, AI, Pozn·mky) ---
        
        ' 1. Kontrola epizod (Jikan API)
        If Application.WorksheetFunction.CountA(Me.Range("B3:B50")) = 0 Then
            On Error Resume Next
            AutoFillEpisodesFromMAL
            On Error GoTo 0
        End If
        
        ' 2. Aktualizace Gemini Promptu
        AktualizujGeminiPrompt animeName
        
        ' 3. P¯edvyplnÏnÌ pozn·mek
        PredvyplnitSablonyPoznamek
        
        ' 4. Aktualizace Dropdownu
        Application.EnableEvents = True
        Call UpdateAdvancedDropdownForReview
        
        ' Pojistka
        If Not Application.EnableEvents Then Application.EnableEvents = True
        
    End If
End Sub

' **************************************************************************************************
' * POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA: VYTVOÿÕ PROKLIK A NASTAVÕ DESIGN                                            *
' **************************************************************************************************
Private Sub NastavitHyperlinkProA1(ByVal Target As Range, ByVal animeName As String)
    Dim wsList As Worksheet
    Dim foundRange As Range
    
    ' Oöet¯enÌ chyby listu
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsList = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsList Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    ' 1. NajÌt Anime v seznamu
    On Error Resume Next
    Set foundRange = wsList.Columns("C:C").Find(What:=animeName, LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole, MatchCase:=False)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' 2. Logika odkazu
    If Not foundRange Is Nothing Then
        ' Smaûeme starÈ odkazy
        Target.Hyperlinks.Delete
        
        ' P¯id·me nov˝ odkaz
        Me.Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=Target, _
                          Address:="", _
                          subAddress:="'" & wsList.Name & "'!" & foundRange.Address, _
                          ScreenTip:="P¯ejÌt na z·znam v ANIME LIST", _
                          TextToDisplay:=animeName
    Else
        ' Pokud nenalezeno, jen smaûeme odkaz (text z˘stane)
        Target.Hyperlinks.Delete
    End If
    
    ' 3. APLIKACE POéADOVAN…HO DESIGNU
    ' Aplikujeme to vûdy (aù uû je tam odkaz nebo ne), aby to vypadalo konzistentnÏ.
    
    ' A) Zarovn·nÌ a Barva pozadÌ (#002060)
    With Target
        .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter
        .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
        .Interior.Color = RGB(0, 32, 96) ' HEX #002060
    End With
    
    ' B) Form·t PÌsma (Aptos Narrow, 18, KurzÌva, BÌl·)
    With Target.Font
        .Name = "Aptos Narrow"      ' Font
        .size = 18                  ' Velikost
        .Bold = True                ' TuËnÏ (nadpisy b˝vajÌ tuËnÈ, pokud nechcete, dejte False)
        .Italic = True              ' KurzÌva
        .Color = vbWhite            ' BÌl· barva
        .Underline = xlUnderlineStyleNone ' Bez podtrûenÌ
    End With
End Sub




--- KONEC K”DU [List6] ---

Modul: Table_Anime_Rating
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Table_Anime_Rating] ---
Option Explicit

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * HLAVNÕ PROCEDURA PRO EXPORT HODNOCENÕ (FIN¡LNÕ VERZE S VYLEPäENðM FORM¡TOV¡NÕM)                                   *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Sub ExportAnimeReview()

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    
    ' --- OPTIMALIZACE VðKONU (PÿIDAT SEM) ---
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    ' ----------------------------------------

    ' --- Deklarace promÏnn˝ch ---
    Dim animeName As String
    Dim notesContent As String
    Dim episodeRatingsList As String
    Dim categoryRatingsList As String
    Dim avgEpisodeRatingFormatted As String
    Dim weightedAvgCategoryFormatted As String
    Dim finalRatingFormatted As String
    Dim shpNotes As Shape
    Dim lastEpisodeRow As Long
    Dim lastCategoryRow As Long
    Dim categoryRatingValues As New Collection
    Dim episodeRatingValues As New Collection

    Const NOTES_TEXTBOX_NAME As String = "Anime_HodnocenÌ_Pozn·mky"

    ' --- NaËtenÌ dat a pozn·mek ---
    animeName = Trim(CStr(ws.Range("A1").Value))

    If animeName = "" Or animeName = "N/A" Then
        MsgBox "UpozornÏnÌ: N·zev anime v buÚce A1 je pr·zdn˝ nebo neplatn˝. Export do seznamu nebyl proveden.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' NOVð K”D
On Error Resume Next
notesContent = Trim(CStr(ws.OLEObjects("txtPoznamky").Object.text))
On Error GoTo 0
If notesContent = "" Then notesContent = "é·dnÈ pozn·mky."

    ' --- SestavenÌ textu pro HodnocenÌ epizod (sloupce A a B) ---
    episodeRatingsList = ""
    lastEpisodeRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "A").End(xlUp).row

    Dim startEpText As String, endEpText As String, currentEpRating As String
    startEpText = ""

    Dim episodeRow As Long
    For episodeRow = 3 To lastEpisodeRow + 1
        Dim epNumberText As String, epRating As Variant, formattedEpRating As String
        Dim isFlushRow As Boolean
        isFlushRow = (episodeRow > lastEpisodeRow)

        Dim processThisRow As Boolean
        processThisRow = False

        If isFlushRow Then
            processThisRow = True
            formattedEpRating = "FORCE_FLUSH"
        Else
            epNumberText = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(episodeRow, "A").Value))
            epRating = ws.Cells(episodeRow, "B").Value

            If (Not IsEmpty(epNumberText) And InStr(1, epNumberText, "EP ") = 1) And _
               (IsNumeric(epRating) And CDbl(epRating) >= 1 And CDbl(epRating) <= 10) Then
                formattedEpRating = FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(CDbl(epRating)) & "/10"
                episodeRatingValues.Add formattedEpRating
                processThisRow = True
            End If
        End If

        If processThisRow Then
            If startEpText = "" Then
                startEpText = epNumberText
                endEpText = epNumberText
                currentEpRating = formattedEpRating
            ElseIf formattedEpRating = currentEpRating And Not isFlushRow Then
                endEpText = epNumberText
            Else
                If startEpText <> "" Then
                    If episodeRatingsList <> "" Then
                        episodeRatingsList = episodeRatingsList & ", "
                    End If

                    If startEpText = endEpText Then
                        episodeRatingsList = episodeRatingsList & startEpText & " -> " & currentEpRating
                    Else
                        episodeRatingsList = episodeRatingsList & startEpText & " - " & Trim(Mid(endEpText, 4)) & " -> " & currentEpRating
                    End If
                End If

                startEpText = epNumberText
                endEpText = epNumberText
                currentEpRating = formattedEpRating
            End If
        End If
    Next episodeRow
    If episodeRatingsList = "" Then episodeRatingsList = "é·dn· data k hodnocenÌ epizod."

    ' --- SestavenÌ textu pro HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ (sloupce D a E) ---
    categoryRatingsList = ""
    lastCategoryRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "D").End(xlUp).row

    Dim groupedCategoryNames As String, currentCatRating As String
    groupedCategoryNames = ""

    Dim categoryRow As Long
    For categoryRow = 3 To lastCategoryRow + 1
        Dim categoryName As String, categoryRating As Variant, formattedRating As String
        Dim isCatFlushRow As Boolean
        isCatFlushRow = (categoryRow > lastCategoryRow)

        Dim processThisCatRow As Boolean
        processThisCatRow = False

        If isCatFlushRow Then
            processThisCatRow = True
            formattedRating = "FORCE_FLUSH"
        Else
            categoryName = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(categoryRow, "D").Value))
            categoryRating = ws.Cells(categoryRow, "E").Value

            If (Not IsEmpty(categoryName)) And _
               (IsNumeric(categoryRating) And CDbl(categoryRating) >= 1 And CDbl(categoryRating) <= 10) Then
                formattedRating = FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(CDbl(categoryRating)) & "/10"
                categoryRatingValues.Add formattedRating
                processThisCatRow = True
            End If
        End If

        If processThisCatRow Then
            If groupedCategoryNames = "" Then
                groupedCategoryNames = categoryName
                currentCatRating = formattedRating
            ElseIf formattedRating = currentCatRating And Not isCatFlushRow Then
                groupedCategoryNames = groupedCategoryNames & "/" & categoryName
            Else
                If groupedCategoryNames <> "" Then
                    If categoryRatingsList <> "" Then
                        categoryRatingsList = categoryRatingsList & ", "
                    End If
                    categoryRatingsList = categoryRatingsList & groupedCategoryNames & " -> " & currentCatRating
                End If

                groupedCategoryNames = categoryName
                currentCatRating = formattedRating
            End If
        End If
    Next categoryRow
    If categoryRatingsList = "" Then categoryRatingsList = "é·dn· data k hodnocenÌ kategoriÌ."

    ' --- NaËtenÌ vypoËten˝ch pr˘mÏr˘ z bunÏk ---
    Dim tempVal As Variant

    tempVal = ws.Range("G21").Value
    If IsError(tempVal) Or IsEmpty(tempVal) Then
        avgEpisodeRatingFormatted = "N/A/10"
    Else
        avgEpisodeRatingFormatted = CStr(tempVal)
        If Right(avgEpisodeRatingFormatted, 3) <> "/10" Then avgEpisodeRatingFormatted = avgEpisodeRatingFormatted & "/10"
    End If

    tempVal = ws.Range("G18").Value
    If IsError(tempVal) Or IsEmpty(tempVal) Then
        weightedAvgCategoryFormatted = "N/A/10"
    Else
        weightedAvgCategoryFormatted = CStr(tempVal)
        If Right(weightedAvgCategoryFormatted, 3) <> "/10" Then weightedAvgCategoryFormatted = weightedAvgCategoryFormatted & "/10"
    End If

    tempVal = ws.Range("G24").Value
    If IsError(tempVal) Or IsEmpty(tempVal) Then
        finalRatingFormatted = "N/A/10"
    Else
        finalRatingFormatted = FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(CDbl(tempVal)) & "/10"
    End If

    ' --- SestavenÌ celÈho obsahu pro export ---
    Dim outputContent As String
    outputContent = animeName & vbCrLf & _
                    "Pozn·mky: " & notesContent & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "HodnocenÌ epizod:" & vbCrLf & episodeRatingsList & vbCrLf & _
                    "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ epizod: " & avgEpisodeRatingFormatted & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:" & vbCrLf & categoryRatingsList & vbCrLf & _
                    "Pr˘mÏrnÈ v·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ: " & weightedAvgCategoryFormatted & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "Fin·lnÌ hodnocenÌ: " & finalRatingFormatted

    ' --- EXPORT A FORM¡TOV¡NÕ POZN¡MKY V "ANIME LIST" ---
    Dim animeListWs As Worksheet, foundRange As Range, targetCell As Range
    Dim response As VbMsgBoxResult
    Dim titleLength As Long, finalRatingStart As Long, finalRatingLength As Long
    Dim searchStartPos As Long, foundPos As Long, ratingValue As Variant
    Dim labelStart As Long

    On Error Resume Next
    Set animeListWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    If animeListWs Is Nothing Then MsgBox "Chyba: List 'ANIME LIST' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub

    Set foundRange = animeListWs.Columns("C:C").Find(What:=animeName, LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole, MatchCase:=False)

    If Not foundRange Is Nothing Then
        Set targetCell = animeListWs.Cells(foundRange.row, "K")
        If Not targetCell.Comment Is Nothing Then
            response = MsgBox("Pozn·mka pro anime '" & animeName & "' jiû existuje." & vbCrLf & "P¯ejete si ji p¯epsat?", vbYesNo + vbExclamation, "P¯epsat pozn·mku?")
            If response = vbYes Then targetCell.Comment.Delete Else MsgBox "Export zruöen.", vbInformation: Exit Sub
        End If

        With targetCell.AddComment(outputContent)
            .Visible = False
            With .Shape.TextFrame.Characters.Font: .Name = "Tahoma": .size = 9: .Bold = False: .Italic = False: End With

            titleLength = Len(animeName)
            If titleLength > 0 Then
                With .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=1, length:=titleLength).Font: .Bold = True: .Italic = True: End With
            End If

            finalRatingStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "Fin·lnÌ hodnocenÌ: ")
            If finalRatingStart > 0 Then
                finalRatingLength = Len("Fin·lnÌ hodnocenÌ: ") + Len(finalRatingFormatted)
                With .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=finalRatingStart, length:=finalRatingLength).Font: .Bold = True: .size = 11: End With
            End If

            labelStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "Pozn·mky:")
            If labelStart > 0 Then .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=labelStart, length:=Len("Pozn·mky:")).Font.Bold = True

            labelStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "HodnocenÌ epizod:")
            If labelStart > 0 Then .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=labelStart, length:=Len("HodnocenÌ epizod:")).Font.Bold = True

            Dim currentEpSearchStart As Long
            currentEpSearchStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "HodnocenÌ epizod:") + Len("HodnocenÌ epizod:" & vbCrLf)
            Dim ratingText As String, tempFoundPos As Long
            For Each ratingValue In episodeRatingValues
                ratingText = CStr(ratingValue)
                tempFoundPos = InStr(currentEpSearchStart, outputContent, ratingText)
                Do While tempFoundPos > 0
                    If tempFoundPos >= Len(" -> ") + 1 Then
                        If Mid(outputContent, tempFoundPos - Len(" -> "), Len(" -> ")) = " -> " Then
                            .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=tempFoundPos, length:=Len(ratingText)).Font.Bold = True
                        End If
                    End If
                    tempFoundPos = InStr(tempFoundPos + Len(ratingText), outputContent, ratingText)
                Loop
            Next ratingValue

            labelStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ epizod:")
            If labelStart > 0 Then .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=labelStart, length:=Len("Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ epizod: " & avgEpisodeRatingFormatted)).Font.Bold = True

            labelStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:")
            If labelStart > 0 Then .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=labelStart, length:=Len("HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:")).Font.Bold = True

            Dim currentCatSearchStart As Long
            currentCatSearchStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:") + Len("HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:" & vbCrLf)
            For Each ratingValue In categoryRatingValues
                ratingText = CStr(ratingValue)
                tempFoundPos = InStr(currentCatSearchStart, outputContent, ratingText)
                Do While tempFoundPos > 0
                    If tempFoundPos >= Len(" -> ") + 1 Then
                        If Mid(outputContent, tempFoundPos - Len(" -> "), Len(" -> ")) = " -> " Then
                            .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=tempFoundPos, length:=Len(ratingText)).Font.Bold = True
                        End If
                    End If
                    tempFoundPos = InStr(tempFoundPos + Len(ratingText), outputContent, ratingText)
                Loop
            Next ratingValue

            labelStart = InStr(1, outputContent, "Pr˘mÏrnÈ v·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ:")
            If labelStart > 0 Then .Shape.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=labelStart, length:=Len("Pr˘mÏrnÈ v·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ: " & weightedAvgCategoryFormatted)).Font.Bold = True

' --- OBNOVENÕ NASTAVENÕ (PÿIDAT SEM) ---
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    ' ---------------------------------------

        End With
        MsgBox "HodnocenÌ pro '" & animeName & "' bylo ˙spÏönÏ exportov·no/aktualizov·no.", vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "UpozornÏnÌ: Anime '" & animeName & "' nebylo nalezeno v listu 'ANIME LIST'.", vbExclamation
    End If

End Sub

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * PROCEDURY PRO TVORBU A FORM¡TOV¡NÕ OVL¡DACÕCH PRVKŸ                                                              *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Sub VytvorTlacitkoExportu()
    Dim ws As Worksheet, rng As Range, btn As Shape
    Const BUTTON_NAME As String = "btnExportAnimeReview"
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    On Error Resume Next
    ws.Shapes(BUTTON_NAME).Delete
    On Error GoTo 0
    Set rng = ws.Range("O1")
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = BUTTON_NAME
        .OnAction = "ExportAnimeReview"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        With .line: .Visible = msoTrue: .weight = 1.5: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "Exportovat hodnocenÌ do pozn·mky"
            With .TextRange.Font: .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True: End With
            With .TextRange.Font.Fill: .Visible = msoTrue: .Solid: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89): End With
        End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
    End With
    MsgBox "TlaËÌtko 'Exportovat hodnocenÌ' bylo vytvo¯eno/aktualizov·no.", vbInformation
End Sub



' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * POMOCN… FUNKCE A UDF FUNKCE PRO EXCEL                                                                           *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Public Function GetWeightedCategoryAverageNew(ratingRange As Range, weightRange As Range) As String
    Dim rCell As Range, wCell As Range, sumOfProducts As Double, sumOfWeights As Double, result As Double, i As Long
    sumOfProducts = 0: sumOfWeights = 0
    If ratingRange.Cells.count <> weightRange.Cells.count Then GetWeightedCategoryAverageNew = "Chyba": Exit Function
    For i = 1 To ratingRange.Cells.count
        Set rCell = ratingRange.Cells(i): Set wCell = weightRange.Cells(i)
        If IsNumeric(rCell.Value) And Not IsEmpty(rCell.Value) And IsNumeric(wCell.Value) And Not IsEmpty(wCell.Value) Then
            If rCell.Value >= 1 And rCell.Value <= 10 Then
                sumOfProducts = sumOfProducts + (CDbl(rCell.Value) * CDbl(wCell.Value))
                sumOfWeights = sumOfWeights + CDbl(wCell.Value)
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    If sumOfWeights > 0 Then result = sumOfProducts / sumOfWeights Else GetWeightedCategoryAverageNew = "N/A": Exit Function
    GetWeightedCategoryAverageNew = FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(result) & "/10"
End Function

Public Function GetEpisodeAverageNew(episodeRatingRange As Range) As String
    Dim cell As Range, sumOfEpisodeRatings As Double, episodeCount As Long, result As Double
    sumOfEpisodeRatings = 0: episodeCount = 0
    For Each cell In episodeRatingRange.Cells
        If IsNumeric(cell.Value) And Not IsEmpty(cell.Value) Then
            If cell.Value >= 1 And cell.Value <= 10 Then
                sumOfEpisodeRatings = sumOfEpisodeRatings + CDbl(cell.Value)
                episodeCount = episodeCount + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next cell
    If episodeCount > 0 Then result = sumOfEpisodeRatings / episodeCount Else GetEpisodeAverageNew = "N/A": Exit Function
    GetEpisodeAverageNew = FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(result) & "/10"
End Function

Private Function FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(ByVal num As Double) As String
    Dim formattedNum As String
    formattedNum = Format(num, "0.00")
    If Right(formattedNum, 3) = ".00" Or Right(formattedNum, 3) = ",00" Then
        formattedNum = left(formattedNum, Len(formattedNum) - 3)
    ElseIf Right(formattedNum, 1) = "0" And (InStr(formattedNum, ".") > 0 Or InStr(formattedNum, ",") > 0) Then
        formattedNum = left(formattedNum, Len(formattedNum) - 1)
    End If
    formattedNum = Replace(formattedNum, ".", ",")
    FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros = formattedNum
End Function


' ====================================================================================================================
' =============================================   NOV¡ SEKCE: IMPORT   ===============================================
' ====================================================================================================================

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * HLAVNÕ PROCEDURA PRO IMPORT HODNOCENÕ Z POZN¡MKY (OPAK EXPORTU)                                                  *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Sub ImportAnimeReview()
    Dim ws As Worksheet, animeListWs As Worksheet
    Dim animeName As String
    Dim foundRange As Range, targetCell As Range
    Dim rawText As String

    Const NOTES_TEXTBOX_NAME As String = "Anime_HodnocenÌ_Pozn·mky"

    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    animeName = Trim(CStr(ws.Range("A1").Value))
    If animeName = "" Or animeName = "N/A" Then
        MsgBox "UpozornÏnÌ: N·zev anime v buÚce A1 je pr·zdn˝ nebo neplatn˝. Import z pozn·mky neprobÏhl.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' BEZPE»NOST: import povolen jen kdyû jsou pr·zdnÈ pozn·mky + epizody (B) + kategorie (E) + fin·lnÌ (G24)
    If Not IsTargetClear(ws, NOTES_TEXTBOX_NAME) Then
        MsgBox "Import zruöen. Pro import musÌ b˝t pr·zdnÈ:" & vbCrLf & _
               "ï TextovÈ pole s pozn·mkami" & vbCrLf & _
               "ï HodnocenÌ epizod (sloupec B)" & vbCrLf & _
               "ï HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ (sloupec E)" & vbCrLf & _
               "ï Fin·lnÌ hodnocenÌ (buÚka G24)", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    On Error Resume Next
    Set animeListWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    If animeListWs Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: List 'ANIME LIST' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' Najdi ¯·dek anime a vezmi pozn·mku z K
    Set foundRange = animeListWs.Columns("C:C").Find(What:=animeName, LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole, MatchCase:=False)
    If foundRange Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Anime '" & animeName & "' nebylo nalezeno v listu 'ANIME LIST'.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    Set targetCell = animeListWs.Cells(foundRange.row, "K")
    If targetCell.Comment Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Pro anime '" & animeName & "' nebyla nalezena û·dn· pozn·mka (koment·¯) ve sloupci K.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    rawText = targetCell.Comment.text

    ' --- Rozparsuj sekce z textu pozn·mky ---
    Dim notesText As String, episodesLine As String, categoriesLine As String, finalRatingText As String
    notesText = ExtractBetween(rawText, "Pozn·mky: ", "HodnocenÌ epizod:")
    episodesLine = ExtractBetween(rawText, "HodnocenÌ epizod:", "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ epizod:")
    categoriesLine = ExtractBetween(rawText, "HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:", "Pr˘mÏrnÈ v·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ:")
    finalRatingText = ExtractAfter(rawText, "Fin·lnÌ hodnocenÌ:")

    ' --- Zapiö pozn·mky zpÏt do textovÈho pole, kdyû existuje ---
    On Error Resume Next
    ws.OLEObjects("txtPoznamky").Object.text = IIf(Trim(notesText) <> "", Trim(notesText), "é·dnÈ pozn·mky.")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' =========================================================================================
    ' NOV¡ »¡ST: ZÕSK¡NÕ PO»TU EPIZOD Z API (Jikan)
    ' =========================================================================================
    Dim apiTotalEps As Long
    Dim malURL As String, malID As String
    
    apiTotalEps = 0 ' Default
    
    ' 1. ZÌskat odkaz z Hyperlinku
    If foundRange.Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
        malURL = foundRange.Hyperlinks(1).Address
        ' 2. ZÌskat ID
        malID = ExtractMalID(malURL)
        ' 3. Zavolat API (pokud m·me ID)
        If malID <> "" Then
            Application.StatusBar = "Importuji a zjiöùuji poËet epizod z API..."
            apiTotalEps = GetEpisodeCountFromJikan(malID)
            Application.StatusBar = False
        End If
    End If
    ' =========================================================================================

    ' --- Naparsuj a vraù hodnocenÌ epizod do B podle EP v A + API count ---
    Dim importedEpisodes As Long
    If Len(Trim(episodesLine)) > 0 And InStr(1, episodesLine, "é·dn· data", vbTextCompare) = 0 Then
        ' ZDE PÿED¡V¡ME apiTotalEps DO FUNKCE
        importedEpisodes = ApplyEpisodesFromLine(ws, episodesLine, apiTotalEps)
    Else
        ' Film / bez epizod -> Pokud API vr·tilo poËet, pouûijeme ho, jinak 1
        Dim fallbackCount As Long
        fallbackCount = IIf(apiTotalEps > 0, apiTotalEps, 1)
        ResizeEpisodesGridAB ws, fallbackCount
    End If

    ' --- Naparsuj a vraù hodnocenÌ kategoriÌ do E podle n·zv˘ v D ---
    Dim importedCategories As Long
    If Len(Trim(categoriesLine)) > 0 And InStr(1, categoriesLine, "é·dn· data", vbTextCompare) = 0 Then
        importedCategories = ApplyCategoriesFromLine(ws, categoriesLine)
    End If

    ' --- Import fin·lnÌho hodnocenÌ do G24 (pokud ho najdeme) ---
    Dim finalStatus As String
    Dim vFinal As Variant
    vFinal = ParseRating(finalRatingText)
    If IsError(vFinal) Then
        finalStatus = "nenalezeno"
    Else
        If ws.Range("G24").HasFormula Then
            finalStatus = "ponech·no (G24 m· vzorec)"
        Else
            ws.Range("G24").NumberFormat = "General"
            ws.Range("G24").Value2 = CDbl(vFinal)
            ForceNumericGeneral ws.Range("G24")
            finalStatus = "zaps·no"
        End If
    End If

    MsgBox "Import z pozn·mky dokonËen:" & vbCrLf & _
           "ï Pozn·mky: " & IIf(Trim(notesText) <> "", "zaps·ny", "pr·zdnÈ/nezmÏnÏny") & vbCrLf & _
           "ï Epizody: " & importedEpisodes & " hodnot zaps·no" & IIf(apiTotalEps > 0, " (M¯Ìûka nastavena na " & apiTotalEps & " EP dle API)", "") & vbCrLf & _
           "ï Kategorie: " & importedCategories & " hodnot zaps·no" & vbCrLf & _
           "ï Fin·lnÌ hodnocenÌ: " & finalStatus, vbInformation
End Sub


' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * VYTVOÿENÕ TLA»ÕTKA PRO IMPORT                                                                                    *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Sub VytvorTlacitkoImportu()
    Dim ws As Worksheet, rng As Range, btn As Shape
    Const BUTTON_NAME As String = "btnImportAnimeReview"
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    On Error Resume Next
    ws.Shapes(BUTTON_NAME).Delete
    On Error GoTo 0

    Set rng = ws.Range("O2")
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = BUTTON_NAME
        .OnAction = "ImportAnimeReview"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        With .line: .Visible = msoTrue: .weight = 1.5: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "NaËÌst z pozn·mky"
            With .TextRange.Font: .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True: End With
            With .TextRange.Font.Fill: .Visible = msoTrue: .Solid: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89): End With
        End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
    End With
    MsgBox "TlaËÌtko 'NaËÌst z pozn·mky' bylo vytvo¯eno/aktualizov·no.", vbInformation
End Sub

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * POMOCN… FUNKCE PRO IMPORT                                                                                        *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Private Function ExtractBetween(ByVal fullText As String, ByVal header As String, ByVal nextHeader As String) As String
    Dim s As Long, e As Long, t As String
    s = InStr(1, fullText, header, vbTextCompare)
    If s = 0 Then ExtractBetween = "": Exit Function
    s = s + Len(header)
    If Mid$(fullText, s, 2) = vbCrLf Then s = s + 2
    e = InStr(s, fullText, nextHeader, vbTextCompare)
    If e = 0 Then
        t = Mid$(fullText, s)
    Else
        t = Mid$(fullText, s, e - s)
        If Right$(t, 2) = vbCrLf Then t = left$(t, Len(t) - 2)
    End If
    ExtractBetween = Trim$(t)
End Function

Private Function ExtractAfter(ByVal fullText As String, ByVal header As String) As String
    Dim s As Long, t As String
    s = InStr(1, fullText, header, vbTextCompare)
    If s = 0 Then ExtractAfter = "": Exit Function
    s = s + Len(header)
    If Mid$(fullText, s, 2) = vbCrLf Then s = s + 2
    t = Mid$(fullText, s)
    ExtractAfter = Trim$(t)
End Function

' Najde prvnÌ ¯·dek bloku epizod (prvnÌ "EP *" od ¯·dku 3 nÌû)
Private Function FindFirstEpRow(ws As Worksheet) As Long
    Dim r As Long, lastA As Long, s As String
    lastA = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "A").End(xlUp).row
    For r = 3 To lastA + 200
        s = Trim$(CStr(ws.Cells(r, "A").Value))
        If Len(s) >= 4 And UCase$(left$(s, 3)) = "EP " Then FindFirstEpRow = r: Exit Function
    Next r
    FindFirstEpRow = 3
End Function

' P¯izp˘sobÌ velikost bloku epizod pouze v A:B (insert/delete CELLS), ne hromadnÈ ¯·dky listu.
Private Sub ResizeEpisodesGridAB(ws As Worksheet, ByVal desiredCount As Long)
    If desiredCount < 1 Then desiredCount = 1

    Dim startRow As Long: startRow = FindFirstEpRow(ws)

    ' zjiötÏnÌ aktu·lnÌ souvislÈ dÈlky bloku "EP *"
    Dim curCount As Long, r As Long, s As String
    r = startRow
    Do While True
        s = Trim$(CStr(ws.Cells(r, "A").Value))
        If Len(s) >= 4 And UCase$(left$(s, 3)) = "EP " Then
            curCount = curCount + 1
            r = r + 1
        Else
            Exit Do
        End If
    Loop
    If curCount = 0 Then curCount = 1

    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    If desiredCount < curCount Then
        ' zkraù: smaû p¯ebyteËnÈ buÚky A:B (shift up) ñ neovlivnÌ ostatnÌ sloupce
        ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow + desiredCount, "A"), ws.Cells(startRow + curCount - 1, "B")).Delete Shift:=xlUp
    ElseIf desiredCount > curCount Then
        ' prodluû: vloû chybÏjÌcÌ buÚky A:B (shift down) a nakopÌruj form·t
        Dim toAdd As Long: toAdd = desiredCount - curCount
        ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow + curCount, "A"), ws.Cells(startRow + curCount + toAdd - 1, "B")).Insert Shift:=xlDown
        ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow + curCount - 1, "A"), ws.Cells(startRow + curCount - 1, "B")).Copy
        ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow + curCount, "A"), ws.Cells(startRow + curCount + toAdd - 1, "B")).PasteSpecial xlPasteFormats
        Application.CutCopyMode = False
        ' vyËistit hodnoty u novÏ vloûen˝ch bunÏk B
        ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow + curCount, "B"), ws.Cells(startRow + curCount + toAdd - 1, "B")).ClearContents
    End If

    ' popiö EP 1..N
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 0 To desiredCount - 1
        ws.Cells(startRow + i, "A").Value = "EP " & (i + 1)
    Next i

    ' pro jistotu jeötÏ vyËisti p·r ¯·dk˘ pod blokem (jen A:B)
    ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow + desiredCount, "A"), ws.Cells(startRow + desiredCount + 50, "B")).ClearContents

    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
End Sub

' PR¡ZDNOST cÌlov˝ch polÌ (pozn·mky + B + E + G24)
Private Function IsTargetClear(ws As Worksheet, ByVal NOTES_TEXTBOX_NAME As String) As Boolean
    Dim notesEmpty As Boolean, epsEmpty As Boolean, catsEmpty As Boolean, finalRatingEmpty As Boolean
    Dim shp As Shape

    ' --- 1. DEFINICE POVOLEN… äABLONY (Aby import proöel i s nÌ) ---
    Dim allowedTemplate As String
    allowedTemplate = "OP:, ED:" & vbCrLf & _
                      "-" & vbCrLf & _
                      "OST:" & vbCrLf & _
                      "-" & vbCrLf & _
                      "OstatnÌ pozn·mky:" & vbCrLf & _
                      "X" & vbCrLf & _
                      "-" & vbCrLf & _
                      "KONTEXT K PÿÕBÃHU A KATEGORIÕM:"

    ' --- 2. KONTROLA TEXTOV…HO POLE ---
    Dim t As String
    On Error Resume Next
    t = Trim$(CStr(ws.OLEObjects("txtPoznamky").Object.text))
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Pole je "ËistÈ", pokud: je pr·zdnÈ NEBO je tam "é·dnÈ pozn·mky." NEBO je tam p¯esnÏ öablona
    If t = "" Or StrComp(t, "é·dnÈ pozn·mky.", vbTextCompare) = 0 Then
        notesEmpty = True
    ElseIf StrComp(t, allowedTemplate, vbTextCompare) = 0 Then
        notesEmpty = True
    Else
        notesEmpty = False
    End If

    ' --- 3. KONTROLA EPIZOD (Sloupec B) ---
    Dim lastRowA As Long, r As Long, epTxt As String
    lastRowA = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "A").End(xlUp).row
    epsEmpty = True
    For r = 3 To lastRowA
        epTxt = Trim$(CStr(ws.Cells(r, "A").Value))
        If InStr(1, epTxt, "EP ", vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
            If Trim$(CStr(ws.Cells(r, "B").Value)) <> "" Then
                epsEmpty = False: Exit For
            End If
        End If
    Next r

    ' --- 4. KONTROLA KATEGORIÕ (Sloupec E) ---
    Dim lastRowD As Long
    lastRowD = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "D").End(xlUp).row
    catsEmpty = True
    For r = 3 To lastRowD
        If Trim$(CStr(ws.Cells(r, "D").Value)) <> "" Then
            If Trim$(CStr(ws.Cells(r, "E").Value)) <> "" Then
                catsEmpty = False: Exit For
            End If
        End If
    Next r

    ' --- 5. KONTROLA FIN¡LNÕHO HODNOCENÕ (G24) ---
    finalRatingEmpty = IsEmpty(ws.Range("G24").Value)

    ' --- VðSLEDEK ---
    IsTargetClear = (notesEmpty And epsEmpty And catsEmpty And finalRatingEmpty)
End Function

Private Function ParseRating(ByVal ratingText As String) As Variant
    Dim t As String, decSep As String
    t = Trim$(ratingText)
    If InStr(1, t, "/10", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then t = Replace$(t, "/10", "", , , vbTextCompare)
    t = Trim$(t)
    If t = "" Or UCase$(t) = "N/A" Then
        ParseRating = CVErr(xlErrNA)
        Exit Function
    End If
    decSep = Application.DecimalSeparator
    t = Replace$(Replace$(t, ".", decSep), ",", decSep)
    On Error GoTo Fail
    ParseRating = CDbl(t)
    Exit Function
Fail:
    ParseRating = CVErr(xlErrValue)
End Function

Private Function ApplyEpisodesFromLine(ws As Worksheet, ByVal episodesLine As String, Optional ByVal apiTotalCount As Long = 0) As Long
    Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim parts() As String, i As Long, maxEpNo As Long
    parts = Split(episodesLine, ", ")

    ' --- PARSING EXISTUJÕCÕCH DAT Z POZN¡MKY ---
    For i = LBound(parts) To UBound(parts)
        Dim g As String, pArrow As Long, leftPart As String, rightPart As String
        g = Trim$(parts(i))
        If g = "" Then GoTo NextI
        pArrow = InStr(1, g, "->", vbTextCompare)
        If pArrow = 0 Then GoTo NextI
        leftPart = Trim$(left$(g, pArrow - 1))
        rightPart = Trim$(Mid$(g, pArrow + 2))

        Dim v As Variant: v = ParseRating(rightPart)
        If IsError(v) Then GoTo NextI

        If InStr(1, leftPart, "EP ", vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
            Dim rest As String: rest = Trim$(Mid$(leftPart, 4))
            Dim a As Long, b As Long
            If InStr(1, rest, "-", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                Dim ab() As String: ab = Split(rest, "-")
                If UBound(ab) = 1 Then
                    a = CLng(Trim$(ab(0))): b = CLng(Trim$(ab(1)))
                Else
                    GoTo NextI
                End If
            Else
                a = CLng(rest): b = a
            End If
            Dim n As Long
            If a > 0 And b >= a Then
                For n = a To b
                    dict(CStr(n)) = CDbl(v)
                Next n
                If b > maxEpNo Then maxEpNo = b
            End If
        End If
NextI:
    Next i

    ' --- ⁄PRAVA: LOGIKA PRO VELIKOST MÿÕéKY ---
    ' Pouûijeme buÔ maximum z pozn·mek, nebo ËÌslo z API (pokud je vÏtöÌ)
    Dim desired As Long
    desired = IIf(maxEpNo > 0, maxEpNo, 1)
    
    If apiTotalCount > desired Then
        desired = apiTotalCount
    End If

    ' 1) P¯izp˘sobenÌ velikosti bloku A:B
    ResizeEpisodesGridAB ws, desired

    ' 2) Z·pis hodnot
    Dim startRow As Long, r As Long, lastRow As Long, epTxt As String, epNum As Long, cnt As Long
    startRow = FindFirstEpRow(ws)
    lastRow = startRow + desired - 1

    For r = startRow To lastRow
        epTxt = Trim$(CStr(ws.Cells(r, "A").Value))
        If InStr(1, epTxt, "EP ", vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
            On Error Resume Next: epNum = CLng(Trim$(Mid$(epTxt, 4))): On Error GoTo 0
            
            ' Pokud existuje hodnocenÌ v dictionary, zapÌöeme ho
            If epNum > 0 And dict.Exists(CStr(epNum)) Then
                ws.Cells(r, "B").NumberFormat = "General"
                ws.Cells(r, "B").Value2 = CDbl(dict(CStr(epNum)))
                cnt = cnt + 1
            Else
                ' Pokud ne, buÚku vyËistÌme (bude p¯ipravena k vyplnÏnÌ)
                ws.Cells(r, "B").ClearContents
            End If
        End If
    Next r

    ' 3) Form·tov·nÌ na ËÌsla
    ForceNumericGeneral ws.Range(ws.Cells(startRow, "B"), ws.Cells(lastRow, "B"))

    ApplyEpisodesFromLine = cnt
End Function

Private Function ApplyCategoriesFromLine(ws As Worksheet, ByVal categoriesLine As String) As Long
    Dim parts() As String, i As Long, cnt As Long
    parts = Split(categoriesLine, ", ")

    Dim lastRow As Long: lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "D").End(xlUp).row

    For i = LBound(parts) To UBound(parts)
        Dim g As String, pArrow As Long, leftPart As String, rightPart As String
        g = Trim$(parts(i))
        If g = "" Then GoTo NextI
        pArrow = InStr(1, g, "->", vbTextCompare)
        If pArrow = 0 Then GoTo NextI
        leftPart = Trim$(left$(g, pArrow - 1))
        rightPart = Trim$(Mid$(g, pArrow + 2))

        Dim v As Variant: v = ParseRating(rightPart)
        If IsError(v) Then GoTo NextI

        Dim names() As String, j As Long
        names = Split(leftPart, "/")
        For j = LBound(names) To UBound(names)
            Dim nm As String: nm = Trim$(names(j))
            If nm <> "" Then
                Dim rr As Range
                Set rr = ws.Range("D3:D" & lastRow).Find(What:=nm, LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole, MatchCase:=False)
                If Not rr Is Nothing Then
                    ws.Cells(rr.row, "E").NumberFormat = "General"
                    ws.Cells(rr.row, "E").Value2 = CDbl(v)
                    cnt = cnt + 1
                End If
            End If
        Next j
NextI:
    Next i

    ForceNumericGeneral ws.Range("E3:E" & lastRow)

    ApplyCategoriesFromLine = cnt
End Function

Private Sub ForceNumericGeneral(ByVal rng As Range)
    Dim c As Range, s As String, decSep As String
    If rng Is Nothing Then Exit Sub

    decSep = Application.DecimalSeparator
    rng.NumberFormat = "General"

    For Each c In rng.Cells
        If Not IsEmpty(c.Value) Then
            s = Trim$(CStr(c.Value))
            If Right$(s, 1) = "," Or Right$(s, 1) = "." Then s = left$(s, Len(s) - 1)
            s = Replace$(Replace$(s, ".", decSep), ",", decSep)

            If IsNumeric(s) Then
                On Error Resume Next
                c.NumberFormat = "General"
                c.Value2 = CDbl(s)
                On Error GoTo 0
            End If
        End If
    Next c

    rng.NumberFormat = "General"
End Sub

' ====================================================================================================================
' ===================================  SEKCE: EXPORT PRO AI RECENZI (FIN¡LNÕ VERZE 4.1) ================================
' ====================================================================================================================

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * HLAVNÕ PROCEDURA PRO VYTVOÿENÕ PROMPTU PRO AI (BEZ WIKIPEDIE)                                                    *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Public Sub ExportReviewForAI()
    ' --- Inicializace ---
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")

    ' --- Deklarace promÏnn˝ch ---
    Dim animeName As String, notesContent As String
    Dim finalRatingFormatted As String, fullEpisodeList As String, fullCategoryList As String

    ' --- NaËtenÌ z·kladnÌch dat ---
    animeName = Trim(CStr(ws.Range("A1").Value))
    If animeName = "" Or animeName = "N/A" Then
        MsgBox "UpozornÏnÌ: N·zev anime v buÚce A1 je pr·zdn˝ nebo neplatn˝.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' --- SbÏr dat z Excelu ---
    On Error Resume Next
    notesContent = Trim(CStr(ws.OLEObjects("txtPoznamky").Object.text))
    On Error GoTo 0
    If notesContent = "" Then notesContent = "é·dnÈ pozn·mky."

    ' SestavenÌ detailnÌho seznamu hodnocenÌ epizod
    fullEpisodeList = ""
    Dim lastEpisodeRow As Long: lastEpisodeRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "A").End(xlUp).row
    Dim episodeRow As Long
    For episodeRow = 3 To lastEpisodeRow
        Dim epNumberText As String: epNumberText = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(episodeRow, "A").Value))
        Dim epRating As Variant: epRating = ws.Cells(episodeRow, "B").Value
        If (InStr(1, epNumberText, "EP ") = 1) And (IsNumeric(epRating) And CDbl(epRating) >= 1 And CDbl(epRating) <= 10) Then
            fullEpisodeList = fullEpisodeList & "- " & epNumberText & ": " & FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(CDbl(epRating)) & "/10" & vbCrLf
        End If
    Next episodeRow
    If fullEpisodeList = "" Then fullEpisodeList = "é·dn· data k hodnocenÌ epizod."

    ' SestavenÌ detailnÌho seznamu hodnocenÌ kategoriÌ
    fullCategoryList = ""
    Dim lastCategoryRow As Long: lastCategoryRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "D").End(xlUp).row
    Dim categoryRow As Long
    For categoryRow = 3 To lastCategoryRow
        Dim categoryName As String: categoryName = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(categoryRow, "D").Value))
        Dim categoryRating As Variant: categoryRating = ws.Cells(categoryRow, "E").Value
        If (Not IsEmpty(categoryName)) And (IsNumeric(categoryRating) And CDbl(categoryRating) >= 1 And CDbl(categoryRating) <= 10) Then
            fullCategoryList = fullCategoryList & "- " & categoryName & ": " & FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(CDbl(categoryRating)) & "/10" & vbCrLf
        End If
    Next categoryRow
    If fullCategoryList = "" Then fullCategoryList = "é·dn· data k hodnocenÌ kategoriÌ."
    
    ' NaËtenÌ fin·lnÌho hodnocenÌ
    Dim tempVal As Variant: tempVal = ws.Range("G24").Value
    If IsError(tempVal) Or IsEmpty(tempVal) Then finalRatingFormatted = "N/A" Else finalRatingFormatted = FormatNumberWithTrimmedZeros(CDbl(tempVal)) & "/10"

    ' --- SestavenÌ fin·lnÌho promptu ---
    Dim promptTemplate As String
    promptTemplate = GetPromptInstructionsTemplate()
    
    Dim inspirationalReviews As String: inspirationalReviews = GetSpecificReviews()
    If left(inspirationalReviews, 5) = "Chyba" Then MsgBox inspirationalReviews, vbCritical: Exit Sub

    ' NahrazenÌ z·stupn˝ch symbol˘ skuteËn˝mi daty
    Dim finalPrompt As String
    finalPrompt = Replace(promptTemplate, "{inspirationalReviews}", inspirationalReviews)
    finalPrompt = Replace(finalPrompt, "{animeName}", animeName)
    finalPrompt = Replace(finalPrompt, "{notesContent}", notesContent)
    finalPrompt = Replace(finalPrompt, "{finalRating}", finalRatingFormatted)
    finalPrompt = Replace(finalPrompt, "{fullEpisodeList}", Trim(fullEpisodeList))
    finalPrompt = Replace(finalPrompt, "{fullCategoryList}", Trim(fullCategoryList))
    
    ' --- ZkopÌrov·nÌ do schr·nky a ozn·menÌ ---
    CopyToClipboard finalPrompt
    'MsgBox "Prompt pro AI byl ˙spÏönÏ sestaven a zkopÌrov·n do schr·nky (bez Wikipedia dat).", vbInformation, "Hotovo"
End Sub

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * FUNKCE, KTER¡ VRACÕ äABLONU PROMPTU (BEZ WIKIPEDIE)                                                              *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Private Function GetPromptInstructionsTemplate() As String
    Dim p1 As String, p2 As String, p3 As String, p4 As String
    
    p1 = "Ahoj, jsem fanouöek anime a hodnotÌm kaûd˝ seri·l, kter˝ zhlÈdnu. Pom˘ûeö mi vytvo¯it narativnÌ recenzi na z·kladÏ m˝ch specifick˝ch poûadavk˘ a stylu." & vbCrLf & _
         "HLAVNÕ CÕL A NEJDŸLEéITÃJäÕ PRAVIDLO: D…LKA VðSLEDN… RECENZE MUSÕ BðT VéDY MEZI 215 A 230 SLOVY. Tomuto poûadavku dej absolutnÌ prioritu." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "MŸJ SYST…M HODNOCENÕ (PRO TVŸJ KONTEXT):" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "Filozofie:" & vbCrLf & _
         "Ñ(10 -> peak story/enjoyment) (9 -> High above average story/enjoyment) (8 -> Slightly above average story/enjoyment) (7 -> Average story; below average enjoyment) (6 -> bad story/didn't enjoy) (5 -> I felt, like I'm wasting time). ZaËÌn·m na 8/10 a potom je to na show, jestli se mi bude lÌbit a p˘jde to nahoru nebo dol˘.ì Maxim·lnÌ hodnocenÌ je 10, to platÌ i u hodnocenÌ epizod a kategoriÌ."

    p2 = "Data, kter· ti poskytnu: Ke kaûdÈmu anime ti d·m svÈ osobnÌ pozn·mky, hodnocenÌ jednotliv˝ch epizod a hodnocenÌ v r˘zn˝ch kategoriÌch. HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ a epizod poskytnu ve v˝st¯iûku, a pokud ne, tak je souË·stÌ textov˝ch pozn·mek. Kdyû zhlÈdnu vÌce Anime, tak ti poölu pozn·mky pro vöechny. Pamatuj si, ûe ti je pokaûdÈ poölu v po¯adÌ, ve kterÈm jsem je zhlÈdl. Moje pozn·mky majÌ vûdy p¯ednost p¯ed informacemi z internetu." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "Kategorie a jejich v·hy: HodnotÌm kategorie u Anime (jejich vlastnosti) a majÌ u mÏ r˘znÈ v·hy, protoûe mÏ zajÌm· t¯eba vÌce p¯ÌbÏh neû OST. Zde jsou v·hy pro kategorie, kde nejvyööÌ si cenÌm vÌce, ale p¯esto jsou vöechny d˘leûitÈ:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "Animace = 2, CGI = 1,8, MC = 3, VedlejöÌ postavy = 2,5, Waifu = 1,5, Plot = 4, Pacing = 1,5, Story Conclusion = 1,5, Originalita = 2,5, Emoce = 3,5, Enjoyment = 4, OP = 1, ED = 0,5, OST = 2"
         
    p3 = "PRAVIDLA PRO PSANÕ RECENZE:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "Styl a form·t: Inspiruj se stylem a form·tem m˝ch p¯Ìklad˘ (viz nÌûe). Recenze musÌ b˝t Ëtiv·, narativnÌ a tÈmÏ¯ spoiler-free (nastÌnit premisu, ale nevyzradit klÌËovÈ zvraty)." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "ZaË·tek: Vûdy zaËni recenzi tuËn˝m n·zvem danÈho anime, tento n·zev implementuj i do samotnÈ recenze na zaË·tku" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "NavozenÌ atmosfÈry: ⁄vod recenze by mÏl barvitÏ popsat v˝chozÌ situaci hlavnÌ postavy a celkovou atmosfÈru seri·lu." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "Pr·ce s pozn·mkami: Nejen zmiÚuj body z m˝ch pozn·mek, ale detailnÏ je rozepiö. ZamÏ¯ se na popis pocit˘ postav, jejich vnit¯nÌho svÏta a vysvÏtlov·nÌ souvislostÌ mezi ud·lostmi. NezapomeÚ, ûe hodnotÌm takÈ epizody, takûe t¯eba vÏnuj vÌce pozornosti dÏji v epizodÏ, kter· se mi obzvl·ötÏ lÌbila" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "Integrace hodnocenÌ: HodnocenÌ jednotliv˝ch kategoriÌ (nap¯. Animace, Plot, MC) vpleù p¯irozenÏ do textu v z·vork·ch, p¯esnÏ jako v p¯Ìkladech."
         
    p4 = "INSPIRA»NÕ RECENZE (PRO PÿIPOMENUTÕ STYLU):" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "{inspirationalReviews}" & vbCrLf & _
         "DATA PRO AKTU¡LNÕ RECENZI:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "N¡ZEV ANIME:" & vbCrLf & "{animeName}" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "MOJE POZN¡MKY A FIN¡LNÕ VERDIKT:" & vbCrLf & _
         "- OsobnÌ pozn·mky: {notesContent}" & vbCrLf & _
         "- Fin·lnÌ verdikt: {finalRating}" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
         "DETAILNÕ HODNOCENÕ EPIZOD:" & vbCrLf & "{fullEpisodeList}" & vbCrLf & _
         "DETAILNÕ HODNOCENÕ KATEGORIÕ:" & vbCrLf & "{fullCategoryList}" & vbCrLf & _
         "Z¡VÃRE»N… PÿIPOMENUTÕ: Pamatuj, nejd˘leûitÏjöÌ ze vöeho je dodrûet dÈlku recenze mezi 215 a 230 slovy."
         
    GetPromptInstructionsTemplate = p1 & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & p2 & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & p3 & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & p4
End Function

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * FUNKCE PRO NA»TENÕ SPECIFICKðCH INSPIRA»NÕCH RECENZÕ Z KOMENT¡ÿŸ (POUZE TEXT POZN¡MEK)                             *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Private Function GetSpecificReviews() As String
    Dim titlesToFind As Variant: titlesToFind = Array("Lord of Mysteries", "Secrets of the Silent Witch", "Log Horizon, S01")
    Dim result As String: result = ""
    
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    If ws Is Nothing Then GetSpecificReviews = "Chyba: List 'ANIME LIST' nebyl nalezen.": Exit Function
    
    Dim title As Variant
    For Each title In titlesToFind
        Dim foundRange As Range: Set foundRange = ws.Columns("C:C").Find(What:=CStr(title), LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole, MatchCase:=False)
        If Not foundRange Is Nothing Then
            Dim targetCell As Range: Set targetCell = ws.Cells(foundRange.row, "K")
            If Not targetCell.Comment Is Nothing Then
                ' NOV¡ LOGIKA: Extrahujeme pouze text pozn·mky
                Dim fullCommentText As String: fullCommentText = targetCell.Comment.text
                Dim narrativeText As String: narrativeText = ExtractReviewNotes(fullCommentText)
                result = result & "Ñ" & CStr(title) & "ì" & vbCrLf & narrativeText & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
            Else
                result = result & "Chyba: Koment·¯ pro '" & CStr(title) & "' nebyl nalezen." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
            End If
        Else
            result = result & "Chyba: Anime '" & CStr(title) & "' nebylo nalezeno." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
        End If
    Next title
    
    If Trim(result) = "" Then GetSpecificReviews = "Chyba: é·dn· z inspiraËnÌch recenzÌ nebyla nalezena." Else GetSpecificReviews = Trim(result)
End Function

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * NOV¡ POMOCN¡ FUNKCE K EXTRAKCI POUZE NARATIVNÕ »¡STI RECENZE Z KOMENT¡ÿE                                          *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Private Function ExtractReviewNotes(ByVal fullText As String) As String
    Dim startPos As Long, endPos As Long
    Dim startMarker As String, endMarker As String
    
    startMarker = "Pozn·mky:"
    endMarker = "HodnocenÌ epizod:"
    
    ' Najdi zaË·tek textu (za "Pozn·mky:")
    startPos = InStr(1, fullText, startMarker, vbTextCompare)
    If startPos = 0 Then
        ExtractReviewNotes = "(Text pozn·mek v koment·¯i nenalezen)"
        Exit Function
    End If
    startPos = startPos + Len(startMarker)
    
    ' Najdi konec textu (p¯ed "HodnocenÌ epizod:")
    endPos = InStr(startPos, fullText, endMarker, vbTextCompare)
    
    ' Pokud koneËn˝ marker nenÌ nalezen, vezmi vöe aû do konce
    If endPos = 0 Then
        ExtractReviewNotes = Trim(Mid(fullText, startPos))
    Else
        ExtractReviewNotes = Trim(Mid(fullText, startPos, endPos - startPos))
    End If
End Function



' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * PROCEDURA PRO ZKOPÕROV¡NÕ TEXTU DO SCHR¡NKY                                                                      *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Private Sub CopyToClipboard(ByVal textToCopy As String)
    On Error GoTo err
    Dim dataObj As Object: Set dataObj = CreateObject("new:{1C3B4210-F441-11CE-B9EA-00AA006B1A69}")
    dataObj.SetText textToCopy
    dataObj.PutInClipboard
    Set dataObj = Nothing
    Exit Sub
err:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i kopÌrov·nÌ do schr·nky.", vbCritical
End Sub


' ====================================================================================================================
' ===================================   NOV¡ SEKCE: JIKAN API AUTOMATIZACE   =========================================
' ====================================================================================================================

' HlavnÌ procedura volan· zmÏnou v A1
Sub AutoFillEpisodesFromMAL()
    Dim wsEval As Worksheet, wsList As Worksheet
    Dim animeName As String
    Dim foundRange As Range
    Dim malURL As String, malID As String
    Dim episodeCount As Long
    
    Set wsEval = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    animeName = Trim(CStr(wsEval.Range("A1").Value))
    
    ' 1. NajÌt Anime v ANIME LIST
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsList = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    If wsList Is Nothing Then Exit Sub ' List neexistuje
    
    Set foundRange = wsList.Columns("C:C").Find(What:=animeName, LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole, MatchCase:=False)
    
    If foundRange Is Nothing Then
        ' Anime nenalezeno v seznamu - nic nedÏl·me (uûivatel ho moûn· teprve pÌöe)
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' 2. ZÌskat URL z HypertextovÈho odkazu
    If foundRange.Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
        malURL = foundRange.Hyperlinks(1).Address
    Else
        MsgBox "Anime '" & animeName & "' nalezeno v seznamu, ale chybÌ mu hypertextov˝ odkaz na MAL.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' 3. Extrahovat ID
    malID = ExtractMalID(malURL)
    If malID = "" Then
        MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se zÌskat ID z odkazu: " & malURL, vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' 4. ZÌskat poËet epizod z Jikan API
    Application.StatusBar = "Zjiöùuji poËet epizod pro: " & animeName & "..."
    episodeCount = GetEpisodeCountFromJikan(malID)
    Application.StatusBar = False
    
    ' 5. Aplikovat zmÏnu
    If episodeCount > 0 Then
        ' Zde vol·me tvou existujÌcÌ funkci pro zmÏnu m¯Ìûky
        ResizeEpisodesGridAB wsEval, episodeCount
        'MsgBox "NaËten poËet epizod: " & episodeCount, vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "API vr·tilo nezn·m˝ poËet epizod (Anime moûn· st·le vych·zÌ nebo chyba API).", vbInformation
    End If
End Sub

' Pomocn· funkce: Vyt·hne ËÌslo ID z URL (nap¯. .../anime/52991/...)
Private Function ExtractMalID(ByVal url As String) As String
    Dim parts() As String
    Dim i As Long
    
    ' Normalizace lomÌtek
    url = Replace(url, "\", "/")
    parts = Split(url, "/")
    
    ' Hled·me Ë·st, kter· je ËistÏ ËÌseln· a je za "anime" (nebo prostÏ ËÌseln· v URL struktu¯e MAL)
    For i = LBound(parts) To UBound(parts)
        If IsNumeric(parts(i)) And parts(i) <> "" Then
            ' Jednoduch· heuristika: MAL ID je obvykle ËÌslo v cestÏ
            ExtractMalID = parts(i)
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    ExtractMalID = ""
End Function

' Pomocn· funkce: Zavol· API a vr·tÌ poËet epizod
Private Function GetEpisodeCountFromJikan(ByVal malID As String) As Long
    Dim http As Object
    Dim jsonResponse As String
    Dim episodes As Long
    
    Set http = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    ' Odesl·nÌ poûadavku (synchronnÏ)
    http.Open "GET", "https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & malID, False
    http.sEnd
    
    If http.status = 200 Then
        jsonResponse = http.responseText
        ' Jednoduch˝ parsing JSONu bez knihovny (hled·me "episodes":»ÕSLO)
        episodes = ParseEpisodesFromJSON(jsonResponse)
        GetEpisodeCountFromJikan = episodes
    Else
        ' Chyba komunikace
        GetEpisodeCountFromJikan = 0
    End If
    
    Exit Function

ErrorHandler:
    GetEpisodeCountFromJikan = 0
End Function

' Jednoduch˝ Regex parser pro nalezenÌ hodnoty "episodes"
Private Function ParseEpisodesFromJSON(ByVal json As String) As Long
    Dim regEx As Object
    Dim matches As Object
    
    Set regEx = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    With regEx
        .Global = False
        .IgnoreCase = True
        .MultiLine = True
        ' Hled· vzor: "episodes": n·sledovanÈ p¯Ìpadn˝mi mezerami a ËÌslem
        .Pattern = """episodes""\s*:\s*(\d+)"
    End With
    
    If regEx.Test(json) Then
        Set matches = regEx.Execute(json)
        ParseEpisodesFromJSON = CLng(matches(0).SubMatches(0))
    Else
        ' Pokud je null nebo nenalezeno
        ParseEpisodesFromJSON = 0
    End If
End Function

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * AKTUALIZACE GEMINI PROMPTU DO BU“KY Q2 (S ⁄PRAVOU "S0X" -> "SEASON X")                                          *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Sub AktualizujGeminiPrompt(ByVal animeName As String)
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim fullText As String
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    
    ' --- NOV¡ »¡ST: ⁄PRAVA N¡ZVU (S0X -> SEASON X) ---
    ' P¯Ìklad: "Bleach, S02" -> "Bleach SEASON 2"
    ' P¯Ìklad: "Overlord, S04" -> "Overlord SEASON 4"
    Dim regExName As Object
    Set regExName = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    With regExName
        .Global = True
        .IgnoreCase = True
        ' Pattern hled·: Ë·rka, mezera, S, volitelnÏ nula (0?), a pak ËÌslice (\d+)
        .Pattern = ", S0?(\d+)"
    End With
    
    ' Pokud se vzor najde, nahradÌ se slovem " SEASON " a nalezen˝m ËÌslem ($1)
    If regExName.Test(animeName) Then
        animeName = regExName.Replace(animeName, " SEASON $1")
    End If
    ' --------------------------------------------------

    ' Abychom se vyhnuli chybÏ "Too many line continuations", musÌme text skl·dat po Ë·stech.
    
    ' 1. »¡ST: ⁄vod a instrukce
    fullText = "Jsi analytik specializovan˝ na anime. Tv˝m ˙kolem je vytvo¯it detailnÌ, striktnÏ faktick˝ a popisn˝ rozbor dÌla [PLACEHOLDER]. " & _
               "Tv˘j v˝stup se bude skl·dat ze dvou oddÏlen˝ch Ë·stÌ: 1. ShrnutÌ DÏje a 2. DeskriptivnÌ Anal˝za Komponent˘. " & _
               "Ve druhÈ Ë·sti se vyhni jakÈmukoli hodnocenÌ nebo subjektivnÌm soud˘m (nap¯. ""dobr˝"", ""öpatn˝"", ""p˘sobiv˝""). " & _
               "Pouze popisuj fakta a uv·dÏj konkrÈtnÌ p¯Ìklady." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
               
    ' 2. »¡ST: ShrnutÌ dÏje
    fullText = fullText & "»·st 1: ShrnutÌ DÏje" & vbCrLf & _
               "V tÈto Ë·sti shrÚ p¯ÌbÏh s d˘razem na kontext, zaznamenanÈ emoce postav a popis klÌËov˝ch akcÌ a konverzacÌ. Form·t p¯izp˘sob podle typu dÌla." & vbCrLf & _
               "A) Pro SERI¡L: Postupuj chronologicky po epizod·ch." & vbCrLf & _
               "EP 1: [Popis dÏje, kontextu a klÌËov˝ch moment˘ epizody.]" & vbCrLf & _
               "EP 2: [Popis dÏje, kontextu a klÌËov˝ch moment˘ epizody.]" & vbCrLf & _
               "(PokraËuj pro vöechny epizody)" & vbCrLf & _
               "B) Pro FILM: RozdÏl dÏj na t¯i logickÈ Ë·sti." & vbCrLf & _
               "⁄vodnÌ Ë·st (expozice): [Popis v˝chozÌ situace, p¯edstavenÌ postav a nastolenÌ ˙st¯ednÌho konfliktu.]" & vbCrLf & _
               "St¯ednÌ Ë·st (konfrontace): [Popis hlavnÌch p¯ek·ûek, dÏjov˝ch zvrat˘ a v˝voje konfliktu.]" & vbCrLf & _
               "Z·vÏreËn· Ë·st (rozuzlenÌ): [Popis vyvrcholenÌ, ¯eöenÌ hlavnÌho konfliktu a stavu postav na konci p¯ÌbÏhu.]" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf

    ' 3. »¡ST: Anal˝za komponent˘ (ZaË·tek)
    fullText = fullText & "»·st 2: DeskriptivnÌ Anal˝za Komponent˘" & vbCrLf & _
               "V tÈto Ë·sti proveÔ faktick˝ rozbor jednotliv˝ch komponent˘ dÌla. Tv˝m ˙kolem je popsat, ""jak"" a ""co"" je pouûito, nikoli ""jak dob¯e""." & vbCrLf & _
               "Animace: Popiö pouûit˝ vizu·lnÌ styl (nap¯. realistick˝, stylizovan˝, moe). UveÔ p¯Ìklady scÈn s vysokou plynulostÌ pohybu (nap¯. souboje) a scÈn, kde je animace statiËtÏjöÌ (nap¯. dialogy). ZmiÚ pr·ci s barvami a osvÏtlenÌm v klÌËov˝ch momentech." & vbCrLf & _
               "CGI: Identifikuj, kde je CGI pouûito (nap¯. vozidla, monstra, komplexnÌ pozadÌ, davy). Popiö, jak je integrov·no s tradiËnÌ 2D animacÌ (je vizu·lnÏ oddÏlenÈ, nebo se snaûÌ splynout?)." & vbCrLf & _
               "MC (HlavnÌ postava): Popiö v˝chozÌ stav hlavnÌ postavy, jejÌ stanoven˝ cÌl nebo motivaci. ZmiÚ 2-3 klÌËovÈ ud·losti v p¯ÌbÏhu, kterÈ formujÌ jejÌ charakterov˝ v˝voj." & vbCrLf & _
               "VedlejöÌ postavy: Popiö funkce nejd˘leûitÏjöÌch vedlejöÌch postav (nap¯. mentor, rival, komick· ˙leva, spojenec). UveÔ, jak˝m konkrÈtnÌm zp˘sobem ovlivÚujÌ hlavnÌ postavu nebo posouvajÌ dÏj vp¯ed." & vbCrLf & _
