               "Waifu / V˝raznÈ ûenskÈ postavy: Popiö klÌËovÈ ûenskÈ postavy. ZamÏ¯ se na jejich povahovÈ rysy, design a jejich roli v p¯ÌbÏhu (nap¯. hybatelka dÏje, mor·lnÌ kompas, cÌl hlavnÌ postavy)." & vbCrLf & _
               "Plot (Struktura p¯ÌbÏhu): Popiö typ narativu (nap¯. line·rnÌ, epizodick˝, s flashbacky). Identifikuj hlavnÌ z·pletku a p¯ÌpadnÈ vedlejöÌ dÏjovÈ linky." & vbCrLf

    ' 4. »¡ST: Anal˝za komponent˘ (PokraËov·nÌ a z·vÏr)
    fullText = fullText & "Pacing (Tempo vypr·vÏnÌ): Popiö rychlost dÏje. Jsou ud·losti rychlÈ a akËnÌ, nebo je kladen d˘raz na pomalejöÌ budov·nÌ atmosfÈry a dialogy? UveÔ p¯Ìklad rychlÈ a pomalÈ pas·ûe v dÌle." & vbCrLf & _
               "Story Conclusion (Z·vÏr p¯ÌbÏhu): Popiö, jak jsou uzav¯eny hlavnÌ dÏjovÈ linky. Jedn· se o uzav¯en˝ konec, nebo otev¯en˝ konec ponech·vajÌcÌ prostor pro interpretaci Ëi pokraËov·nÌ?" & vbCrLf & _
               "Originalita: Popiö hlavnÌ premisu a zasazenÌ dÌla. ZmiÚ, kterÈ zn·mÈ û·nrovÈ tropy vyuûÌv· (nap¯. isekai, turnajov˝ form·t, ""enemies to lovers"") a jestli p¯in·öÌ nÏjakÈ unik·tnÌ koncepty nebo neobvyklÈ zpracov·nÌ tÏchto trop˘." & vbCrLf & _
               "Emoce: Identifikuj scÈny navrûenÈ k vyvol·nÌ specifick˝ch emocÌ. Popiö, jakÈ techniky jsou v tÏchto scÈn·ch pouûity (nap¯. ""ve scÈnÏ X je pouûita pomal· klavÌrnÌ hudba a detailnÌ z·bÏry na slzy postavy"", ""v souboji Y je pouûit rychl˝ st¯ih a heavy metalov˝ soundtrack"")." & vbCrLf & _
               "Enjoyment (Faktory z·bavnosti): Identifikuj a popiö klÌËovÈ prvky, kterÈ jsou v dÌle zdrojem z·bavy. M˘ûe se jednat o: konkrÈtnÌ typ humoru, komplexnost souboj˘, strategickÈ prvky, romantickÈ interakce, momenty öoku/p¯ekvapenÌ atd." & vbCrLf & _
               "OST (Soundtrack): Popiö p¯evaûujÌcÌ styl hudby v dÌle (nap¯. orchestr·lnÌ, elektronick·, rockov·). UveÔ p¯Ìklady, p¯i jak˝ch typech scÈn se opakovanÏ objevujÌ urËitÈ hudebnÌ motivy (nap¯. hlavnÌ hrdina m· sv˘j hudebnÌ motiv, kter˝ hraje bÏhem jeho vÌtÏzstvÌ)."

    ' NahrazenÌ z·stupnÈho symbolu (nynÌ uû s p¯ÌpadnÏ upraven˝m n·zvem SEASON X)
    fullText = Replace(fullText, "[PLACEHOLDER]", "[" & animeName & "]")
    
    ' Z·pis p¯Ìmo do buÚky Q2
    ws.Range("Q2").Value = fullText
    
End Sub

' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * PÿEDVYPLNÃNÕ äABLONY POZN¡MEK (POKUD JSOU PR¡ZDN…)                                                               *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Sub PredvyplnitSablonyPoznamek()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim objNotes As Object
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set objNotes = ws.OLEObjects("txtPoznamky").Object
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If objNotes Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    ' Kontrola: Vyplnit pouze pokud je textovÈ pole pr·zdnÈ nebo obsahuje jen "é·dnÈ pozn·mky."
    Dim currentText As String
    currentText = Trim(objNotes.text)
    
    If currentText = "" Or currentText = "é·dnÈ pozn·mky." Then
        objNotes.text = "OP:, ED:" & vbCrLf & _
                        "-" & vbCrLf & _
                        "OST:" & vbCrLf & _
                        "-" & vbCrLf & _
                        "OstatnÌ pozn·mky:" & vbCrLf & _
                        "X" & vbCrLf & _
                        "-" & vbCrLf & _
                        "KONTEXT K PÿÕBÃHU A KATEGORIÕM:"
    End If
End Sub


' ********************************************************************************************************************
' * OPTIMALIZOVAN¡ FUNKCE: POKRO»ILð DROPDOWN (POLE + SPECIALCELLS PRO KOMENT¡ÿE)                                  *
' ********************************************************************************************************************
Sub UpdateAdvancedDropdownForReview()
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet, wsTarget As Worksheet, wsCache As Worksheet
    Dim tblStats As ListObject
    Dim arrStats As Variant, arrSourceData As Variant
    Dim dictStats As Object, dictWeights As Object, dictSeries As Object
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim outputList() As Variant
    Dim outputRow As Long
    
    ' --- PromÏnnÈ pro cyklus ---
    Dim rawName As String, strFH As String, strAvgEp As String, strAvgCat As String, strSerie As String
    Dim valFH As Variant, valEpCount As Variant
    Dim epCount As Long
    Dim avgEpVal As Double, avgCatVal As Double
    Dim currentStats As Variant
    
    ' --- PromÏnnÈ pro optimalizaci koment·¯˘ ---
    Dim rngAllNames As Range, rngComments As Range, cCom As Range
    Dim txtCom As String
    
    ' NastavenÌ list˘
    Set wsSource = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HODNOCENÕ ANIME")
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("MAL Cache + Interactive Rating")
    
    ' VypnutÌ aktualizacÌ pro maxim·lnÌ rychlost
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = False
        .Calculation = xlCalculationManual
        .EnableEvents = False
    End With
    
    ' 1. NA»TENÕ VAH KATEGORIÕ
    Set dictWeights = GetCategoryWeights()
    
    ' 2. NA»TENÕ STATISTIK Z TABULKY (Rychle do pole)
    Set dictStats = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tblStats = wsCache.ListObjects("ZdrojDatKombinovany")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not tblStats Is Nothing Then
        If tblStats.ListRows.count > 0 Then
            arrStats = tblStats.DataBodyRange.Value2
            
            Dim aName As String, AType As String, aItem As String, aRating As Double
            Dim weight As Double
            Dim dictData As Variant
            
            For i = 1 To UBound(arrStats, 1)
                aName = CStr(arrStats(i, 1))
                AType = CStr(arrStats(i, 2))
                aItem = CStr(arrStats(i, 3))
                aRating = CDbl(arrStats(i, 4))
                
                If Not dictStats.Exists(aName) Then
                    ' 0: SumEp, 1: CountEp, 2: SumCatWeighted, 3: SumCatWeights
                    dictStats.Add aName, Array(0#, 0, 0#, 0#)
                End If
                
                dictData = dictStats(aName)
                
                If AType = "Epizoda" Then
                    dictData(0) = dictData(0) + aRating
                    dictData(1) = dictData(1) + 1
                ElseIf AType = "Kategorie" Then
                    If dictWeights.Exists(aItem) Then weight = dictWeights(aItem) Else weight = 1
                    dictData(2) = dictData(2) + (aRating * weight)
                    dictData(3) = dictData(3) + weight
                End If
                
                dictStats(aName) = dictData
            Next i
        End If
    End If
    
    ' 3. HLAVNÕ DATA A KOMENT¡ÿE (SPECIALCELLS)
    lastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then GoTo Cleanup
    
    ' A) NaËtenÌ dat do pole (C, I, K)
    arrSourceData = wsSource.Range(wsSource.Cells(2, "C"), wsSource.Cells(lastRow, "K")).Value2
    
    ' B) NaËtenÌ koment·¯˘ pomocÌ SpecialCells (JEN BUNKY S KOMENT¡ÿI)
    Set dictSeries = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictSeries.CompareMode = vbTextCompare ' Nerozliöovat velk·/mal· pÌsmena
    
    Set rngAllNames = wsSource.Range("C2:C" & lastRow)
    On Error Resume Next
    Set rngComments = rngAllNames.SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Projdeme jen buÚky, kterÈ majÌ koment·¯
    If Not rngComments Is Nothing Then
        For Each cCom In rngComments
            txtCom = cCom.Comment.text
            If InStr(1, txtCom, "N·zev sÈrie:", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                ' UloûÌme si N·zev Anime (hodnotu buÚky) jako klÌË
                dictSeries(Trim(CStr(cCom.Value))) = True
            End If
        Next cCom
    End If
    
    ' 4. SESTAVENÕ VðSTUPNÕHO POLE
    ReDim outputList(1 To UBound(arrSourceData, 1), 1 To 1)
    outputRow = 1
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(arrSourceData, 1)
        rawName = Trim(CStr(arrSourceData(i, 1))) ' Sloupec C
        
        If rawName <> "" Then
            valEpCount = arrSourceData(i, 7)      ' Sloupec I
            valFH = arrSourceData(i, 9)           ' Sloupec K
            
            ' A) FH
            If IsNumeric(valFH) And Not IsEmpty(valFH) Then
                strFH = Format(valFH, "0") & "/10"
            Else
                strFH = "N/A"
            End If
            
            ' B) Pr˘mÏry
            strAvgEp = "N/A"
            strAvgCat = "N/A"
            
            If dictStats.Exists(rawName) Then
                currentStats = dictStats(rawName)
                If currentStats(1) > 0 Then
                    avgEpVal = currentStats(0) / currentStats(1)
                    strAvgEp = Format(avgEpVal, "0.00") & "/10"
                End If
                If currentStats(3) > 0 Then
                    avgCatVal = currentStats(2) / currentStats(3)
                    strAvgCat = Format(avgCatVal, "0.00") & "/10"
                End If
            End If
            
            ' C) SÈrie (nynÌ bleskovÏ ze slovnÌku)
            strSerie = "NE"
            If dictSeries.Exists(rawName) Then strSerie = "ANO"
            
            ' D) PoËet epizod pro podmÌnku
            epCount = 0
            If IsNumeric(valEpCount) And Not IsEmpty(valEpCount) Then epCount = CLng(valEpCount)
            
            ' E) V˝sledn˝ string
            Dim finalStr As String
            finalStr = rawName & " | FH: " & strFH
            
            If epCount <> 1 Then
                finalStr = finalStr & " | AVG EP: " & strAvgEp
            End If
            
            finalStr = finalStr & " | AVG CAT: " & strAvgCat & " | SouË·st sÈrie = " & strSerie
            
            outputList(outputRow, 1) = finalStr
            outputRow = outputRow + 1
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' 5. Z¡PIS A NASTAVENÕ
    Dim rowsToWrite As Long
    rowsToWrite = outputRow - 1
    
    wsCache.Columns("CQ").Clear
    
    If rowsToWrite > 0 Then
        Dim rngTarget As Range
        Set rngTarget = wsCache.Range("CQ1").Resize(rowsToWrite, 1)
        rngTarget.Value = outputList
        
        ' Se¯azenÌ
        With wsCache.Sort
            .SortFields.Clear
            .SortFields.Add key:=wsCache.Range("CQ1"), SortOn:=xlSortOnValues, Order:=xlAscending
            .SetRange rngTarget
            .header = xlNo
            .MatchCase = False
            .Apply
        End With
        
        ' Validace
        ThisWorkbook.names.Add Name:="DropdownSource_Review_Advanced", RefersTo:=rngTarget
        
        With wsTarget.Range("A1").Validation
            .Delete
            .Add Type:=xlValidateList, AlertStyle:=xlValidAlertStop, Operator:=xlBetween, Formula1:="=DropdownSource_Review_Advanced"
            .IgnoreBlank = True
            .InCellDropdown = True
            .ShowInput = True
            .ShowError = False
        End With
    End If

Cleanup:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
End Sub

' POMOCN¡ FUNKCE: DEFINICE VAH
Private Function GetCategoryWeights() As Object
    Dim d As Object
    Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' ZADAN… V¡HY
    d.Add "Animace", 2#
    d.Add "CGI", 1.8
    d.Add "MC", 3#
    d.Add "VedlejöÌ postavy", 2.5
    d.Add "Waifu", 1.5
    d.Add "Plot", 4#
    d.Add "Pacing", 1.5
    d.Add "Story Conclusion", 1.5
    d.Add "Originalita", 2.5
    d.Add "Emoce", 3.5
    d.Add "Enjoyment", 4#
    d.Add "OP", 1#
    d.Add "ED", 0.5
    d.Add "OST", 2#
    
    Set GetCategoryWeights = d
End Function







--- KONEC K”DU [Table_Anime_Rating] ---

Modul: List7
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [List7] ---
Option Explicit

' ==============================================================================
' PROMÃNN… PRO UCHOV¡NÕ STAVU ZVðRAZNÃNÕ
' ==============================================================================
Private m_HighlightedRange As Range
Private m_OriginalColor As Long
Private m_IsHighlighted As Boolean

' ==============================================================================
' 1. PROCEDURA: KLIKNUTÕ NA ODKAZ
' ==============================================================================
Private Sub Worksheet_FollowHyperlink(ByVal Target As Hyperlink)
    Dim targetRange As Range
    Dim targetSheetName As String
    Dim subAddress As String
    Dim linkText As String
    
    subAddress = Target.subAddress
    If subAddress = "" Then Exit Sub
    
    ' ZÌsk·me text odkazu (oöet¯eno pro p¯Ìpad chyb)
    On Error Resume Next
    linkText = UCase(Trim(Target.TextToDisplay))
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' 1. ZÕSK¡NÕ CÕLE
    On Error Resume Next
    Set targetRange = Application.Range(subAddress)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not targetRange Is Nothing Then
        targetSheetName = targetRange.Parent.Name
        
        ' Jsme na spr·vnÈm listu?
        If ActiveSheet.Name = targetSheetName Then
            
            ' A) POKUD JE TO ODKAZ "ZPÃT NA ZA»¡TEK" -> JEN SCROLLOVAT A KONEC
            ' (Tento blok zajistÌ, ûe se nic neobarvÌ)
            If linkText = "ZPÃT NA ZA»¡TEK" Then
                ' Resetujeme p¯ÌpadnÈ p¯edchozÌ zv˝raznÏnÌ z jinÈho odkazu
                ResetHighlight
                
                ' Scrollujeme na cÌl (A3)
                ActiveWindow.ScrollRow = targetRange.row
                targetRange.Select
                Exit Sub ' <--- Tady procedura konËÌ, d·l k barvenÌ nedojde
            End If
            
            ' ==================================================================
            ' B) POKUD JE TO BÃéNð ODKAZ (DATA/HEATMAPA) -> POKRA»UJEME
            ' ==================================================================
            
            ' 1. Pokud uû je nÏco jinÈho zv˝raznÏno, vr·tÌme to do p˘vodnÌho stavu
            ResetHighlight
            
            ' 2. Scrollujeme tak, aby ¯·dek byl 1. viditeln˝
            ActiveWindow.ScrollRow = targetRange.row
            
            ' 3. ZVðRAZNÃNÕ NOV…HO ÿ¡DKU
            Set m_HighlightedRange = Me.Range("A" & targetRange.row & ":D" & targetRange.row)
            
            ' UloûÌme si p˘vodnÌ barvu
            m_OriginalColor = m_HighlightedRange.Cells(1, 1).Interior.Color
            
            ' Aplikujeme ûlutou #FFFFA7
            m_HighlightedRange.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 167)
            m_IsHighlighted = True
            
            ' Vybereme ¯·dek
            targetRange.Select
        End If
    End If
End Sub

' ==============================================================================
' 2. PROCEDURA: ZMÃNA VðBÃRU (Deaktivuje ûlutou p¯i kliknutÌ jinam)
' ==============================================================================
Private Sub Worksheet_SelectionChange(ByVal Target As Range)
    ' Pokud nenÌ nic zv˝raznÏno, nic nedÏl·me
    If Not m_IsHighlighted Then Exit Sub
    If m_HighlightedRange Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    ' Kontrola: Kliknul uûivatel MIMO zv˝raznÏnou oblast?
    If Intersect(Target, m_HighlightedRange) Is Nothing Then
        ResetHighlight
    End If
End Sub

' ==============================================================================
' 3. POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO RESET BARVY (Abychom neopakovali kÛd)
' ==============================================================================
Private Sub ResetHighlight()
    If m_IsHighlighted And Not m_HighlightedRange Is Nothing Then
        ' Vr·tÌme p˘vodnÌ barvu
        m_HighlightedRange.Interior.Color = m_OriginalColor
        
        ' VyËistÌme promÏnnÈ
        Set m_HighlightedRange = Nothing
        m_IsHighlighted = False
        m_OriginalColor = 0
    End If
End Sub
--- KONEC K”DU [List7] ---

Modul: Table_History_Log
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Table_History_Log] ---
' Modul 2 (Kombinovan˝)
Option Explicit

' =========================================================================================
' === GLOB¡LNÕ PROMÃNN…
' =========================================================================================
Public g_CachedData() As Variant
Public g_CachedHash As String
Public g_SortBy As String
Public g_SearchFilter As String
Public g_DateRowMap As Object

' =========================================================================================
' === OVL¡DACÕ PROCEDURY PRO TLA»ÕTKA
' =========================================================================================

Public Sub VytvoritTlacitkaRazeni()
    ' Tato procedura vytvo¯Ì nebo aktualizuje ovl·dacÌ tlaËÌtka
    Dim wsLog As Worksheet
    Set wsLog = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("HISTORY LOG")

    ' St·vajÌcÌ tlaËÌtka
    VytvorNeboAktualizujTlacitko wsLog, "btnSortName", wsLog.Range("E1"), "ÿadit dle poËtu Anime", "SortLogByAnimeCount", RGB(173, 216, 230)
    VytvorNeboAktualizujTlacitko wsLog, "btnSortEpisodes", wsLog.Range("F1"), "ÿadit dle Epizod", "SortLogByEpisodes", RGB(144, 238, 144)
    VytvorNeboAktualizujTlacitko wsLog, "btnSortTime", wsLog.Range("G1"), "ÿadit dle »asu", "SortLogByTime", RGB(255, 255, 224)
    VytvorNeboAktualizujTlacitko wsLog, "btnSortDate", wsLog.Range("H1"), "ÿadit dle Data", "SortLogByDate", RGB(255, 192, 203)
    
    ' <<< NOV… TLA»ÕTKO PRO VYHLED¡V¡NÕ >>>
    VytvorNeboAktualizujTlacitko wsLog, "btnSearch", wsLog.Range("I1"), "ÿadit dle Anime Ëi Anime sÈrie", "SearchAndFilterLog", RGB(220, 220, 220) ' SvÏtle öed·
    
    MsgBox "Ovl·dacÌ tlaËÌtka byla ˙spÏönÏ vytvo¯ena/aktualizov·na.", vbInformation
End Sub

Private Sub VytvorNeboAktualizujTlacitko(ws As Worksheet, ByVal btnName As String, rng As Range, text As String, macroName As String, colorValue As Long)
    Dim btn As Button
    
    ' PokusÌ se najÌt existujÌcÌ tlaËÌtko podle jeho programovÈho jmÈna
    On Error Resume Next
    Set btn = ws.Buttons(btnName)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If btn Is Nothing Then
        ' TlaËÌtko neexistuje, vytvo¯Ìme ho na v˝chozÌ pozici
        Set btn = ws.Buttons.Add(rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
        btn.Name = btnName ' P¯i¯adÌme unik·tnÌ jmÈno pro budoucÌ identifikaci
    End If
    
    ' Aplikujeme vlastnosti a form·tov·nÌ (pro novÈ i pro existujÌcÌ tlaËÌtko)
    With btn
        .Caption = text
        .OnAction = macroName
        
        ' NastavenÌ pÌsma
        With .Font
            .Name = "Aptos Narrow"
            .size = 11
            .Bold = True
        End With
        
        ' PokroËilÈ form·tov·nÌ p¯es objekt ShapeRange
        With .ShapeRange
            ' NastavenÌ barvy v˝plnÏ
            With .Fill
                .Visible = msoTrue
                .ForeColor.RGB = colorValue
                .Solid
            End With
            
            ' NastavenÌ ohraniËenÌ
            With .line
                .Visible = msoTrue
                .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0) ' »ern· barva
                .weight = 1.5 ' Tlouöùka 1.5 bodu
            End With
        End With
    End With
End Sub

' <<< NOV¡ PROCEDURA PRO VYHLED¡V¡NÕ >>>
Public Sub SearchAndFilterLog()
    Dim searchTerm As String
    searchTerm = InputBox("Zadejte n·zev Anime nebo sÈrie, kterou chcete vyhledat:", "Vyhled·v·nÌ")
    
    ' Pokud uûivatel klikne na Storno nebo nech· pole pr·zdnÈ
    If searchTerm = "" Then Exit Sub
    
    ' NastavÌme glob·lnÌ filtr a vypneme specifickÈ ¯azenÌ
    g_SearchFilter = searchTerm
    g_SortBy = "Date" ' Po vyhled·nÌ vûdy ¯adÌme podle data pro p¯ehlednost
    
    ' SpustÌme hlavnÌ proceduru
    SpustitVytvoreniHistoryLog
End Sub

' <<< UPRAVEN… PROCEDURY PRO ÿAZENÕ - NYNÕ RESETUJÕ FILTR >>>
Public Sub SortLogByAnimeCount()
    g_SearchFilter = "" ' Reset filtru
    g_SortBy = "AnimeCount"
    SpustitVytvoreniHistoryLog
End Sub

Public Sub SortLogByEpisodes()
    g_SearchFilter = "" ' Reset filtru
    g_SortBy = "Episodes"
    SpustitVytvoreniHistoryLog
End Sub

Public Sub SortLogByTime()
    g_SearchFilter = "" ' Reset filtru
    g_SortBy = "Time"
    SpustitVytvoreniHistoryLog
End Sub

Public Sub SortLogByDate()
    g_SearchFilter = "" ' Reset filtru
    g_SortBy = "Date"
    SpustitVytvoreniHistoryLog
End Sub

' =========================================================================================
' === HLAVNÕ OVL¡DACÕ PROCEDURA
' =========================================================================================
Public Sub SpustitVytvoreniHistoryLog()


    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    Dim wsAnime As Worksheet, wsLog As Worksheet
    Dim currentHash As String
    
    Set wsAnime = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsLog = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("HISTORY LOG")
    
    If g_SortBy = "" And g_SearchFilter = "" Then g_SortBy = "Date"
    
    currentHash = CreateStateHash(wsAnime) & g_SearchFilter

    If currentHash = g_CachedHash And IsArrayInitialized(g_CachedData) Then
        ' Pouûijeme data z cache
    Else
        g_CachedData = PripravitDataProLog(wsAnime)
        g_CachedHash = currentHash
    End If

    ZapsatLog wsLog, g_CachedData
    
    Call GenerovatGrafZhlÈdnut˝chEpizod_FinalniVerze_AtytoJeUzOstre(g_CachedData)
    Call VytvoritHeatmapu(g_CachedData, "HISTORY LOG", "E38", g_DateRowMap)
    
    ' <<< NOV¡ »¡ST PRO ⁄PRAVU NADPISU V A1 >>>
    If g_SearchFilter <> "" Then
        wsLog.Range("A1").Value = "Historie sledov·nÌ '" & g_SearchFilter & "'"
    Else
        wsLog.Range("A1").Value = "Historie sledov·nÌ od poË·tku vÏk˘ (ANIME)"
    End If
    ' <<< KONEC NOV… »¡STI >>>


    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Nastala kritick· chyba p¯i vytv·¯enÌ History Logu: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' =========================================================================================
' === ZPRACOV¡NÕ DAT (UPRAVENO PRO FILTROV¡NÕ)
' =========================================================================================

Private Function CreateStateHash(ws As Worksheet) As String
    ' OPTIMALIZOVAN¡ VERZE 2.0: Bleskov˝ hash bez iterace objekt˘
    
    Dim lastRow As Long
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        CreateStateHash = "empty"
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Dim hashParts(1 To 5) As String
    
    ' 1. PoËet ¯·dk˘
    hashParts(1) = CStr(lastRow)
    
    ' 2. SouËet sloupce O (celkov˝ Ëas)
    hashParts(2) = CStr(Application.WorksheetFunction.Sum(ws.Range("O2:O" & lastRow)))
    
    ' 3. SouËet sloupce I (poËet epizod)
    hashParts(3) = CStr(Application.WorksheetFunction.Sum(ws.Range("I2:I" & lastRow)))
    
    ' 4. PoËet koment·¯˘ (OPTIMALIZOV¡NO - SpecialCells)
    ' MÌsto For Each, kterÈ trv· dlouho, se zept·me Excelu p¯Ìmo na poËet bunÏk s koment·¯i.
    ' SpecialCells vyhodÌ chybu, pokud nic nenajde, proto On Error Resume Next.
    Dim countCmt As Long
    countCmt = 0
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim rngComments As Range
    ' ZajÌm· n·s jen sloupec I a N (epizody a rewatche)
    Set rngComments = ws.Range("I2:I" & lastRow & ",N2:N" & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    If Not rngComments Is Nothing Then
        countCmt = rngComments.count ' Okamûit˝ poËet bunÏk s koment·¯em
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    hashParts(4) = CStr(countCmt)
    
    ' 5. PoslednÌ n·zev anime (pro detekci smaz·nÌ poslednÌho ¯·dku)
    hashParts(5) = CStr(ws.Cells(lastRow, "C").Value)
    
    CreateStateHash = Join(hashParts, "|")
End Function


Private Sub ProcessWatchPeriod(ByRef dictLog As Object, ByVal animeName As String, ByVal startDate As Date, ByVal endDate As Date, ByVal totalEpisodes As Long, ByVal timeForPeriod As Double, ByVal sourceRow As Long)
    If totalEpisodes <= 0 Or timeForPeriod <= 0 Or startDate > endDate Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim numDays As Long
    numDays = (endDate - startDate) + 1 ' OPTIMALIZACE: NativnÌ matematika mÌsto DateDiff
    
    Dim epsPerDay As Long: epsPerDay = totalEpisodes \ numDays
    Dim remainderEps As Long: remainderEps = totalEpisodes Mod numDays
    
    Dim epCounter As Long: epCounter = 1
    Dim k As Long
    Dim currentDate As Date
    Dim epsForThisDay As Long
    Dim logKey As String
    
    For k = 0 To numDays - 1
        currentDate = startDate + k ' OPTIMALIZACE: NativnÌ matematika mÌsto DateAdd
        epsForThisDay = epsPerDay
        If remainderEps > 0 Then
            epsForThisDay = epsForThisDay + 1
            remainderEps = remainderEps - 1
        End If
        
        If epsForThisDay > 0 Then
            ' OPTIMALIZACE: RychlejöÌ klÌË (CLng)
            logKey = CLng(currentDate) & "|" & animeName
            
            If Not dictLog.Exists(logKey) Then
                dictLog.Add logKey, CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                dictLog(logKey).Add "Date", currentDate
                dictLog(logKey).Add "Name", animeName
                dictLog(logKey).Add "Minutes", 0
                dictLog(logKey).Add "Episodes", CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                dictLog(logKey).Add "SourceRow", sourceRow
            End If
            
            If totalEpisodes > 0 Then
                dictLog(logKey)("Minutes") = dictLog(logKey)("Minutes") + (epsForThisDay * (timeForPeriod / totalEpisodes))
            End If

            Dim j As Long
            For j = 1 To epsForThisDay
                If epCounter <= totalEpisodes Then
                    If Not dictLog(logKey)("Episodes").Exists(epCounter) Then
                        dictLog(logKey)("Episodes").Add epCounter, Nothing
                    End If
                    epCounter = epCounter + 1
                End If
            Next j
        End If
    Next k
End Sub

' <<< NOV¡ POMOCN¡ FUNKCE PRO ZÕSK¡NÕ SHODUJÕCÕCH SE ÿ¡DKŸ (OPTIMALIZOVAN¡) >>>
Private Function GetMatchingAnimeRows(ws As Worksheet, searchTerm As String) As Collection
    Set GetMatchingAnimeRows = New Collection
    Dim lastRow As Long
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Function

    ' 1. NaËtenÌ dat do pole (Name)
    Dim dataName As Variant
    dataName = ws.Range("C2:C" & lastRow).Value

    ' 2. NaËtenÌ koment·¯˘ do pamÏti (BLESKOV…)
    Dim cmtData() As String
    ReDim cmtData(1 To lastRow)
    Dim rngCmt As Range, cell As Range
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set rngCmt = ws.Range("C2:C" & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not rngCmt Is Nothing Then
        For Each cell In rngCmt
            cmtData(cell.row) = cell.Comment.text
        Next cell
    End If

    Dim i As Long
    Dim animeName As String
    Dim lSearch As String
    Dim seriesNamePattern As String
    
    lSearch = LCase(searchTerm)
    seriesNamePattern = "N·zev sÈrie: " & searchTerm
    
    ' 3. Rychl· smyËka v pamÏti
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        ' A. Kontrola jmÈna
        animeName = CStr(dataName(i - 1, 1))
        If InStr(1, LCase(animeName), lSearch) > 0 Then
            GetMatchingAnimeRows.Add i
        Else
            ' B. Kontrola koment·¯e (pokud existuje)
            If Len(cmtData(i)) > 0 Then
                If InStr(1, cmtData(i), seriesNamePattern, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                    GetMatchingAnimeRows.Add i
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
End Function

Private Function PripravitDataProLog(wsAnime As Worksheet) As Variant
    ' --- HlavnÌ deklarace ---
    Dim dictLog As Object, lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim rowsToProcess As Collection, loopVar As Variant
    Dim dataArray As Variant
    Dim regEp As Object, regN As Object
    Dim useCommentI As Boolean
    
    ' <<< NOV… PROMÃNN… PRO CACHE KOMENT¡ÿŸ >>>
Dim CommentsI() As String
Dim CommentsN() As String
Dim rngCmt As Range
Dim cell As Range

    ' --- Deklarace pro hlavnÌ smyËku ---
    Dim animeName As String, epDuration As Double, totalEpisodes As Long
    Dim watchTime As Double, rewatchCount As Long, timePerSession As Double

    ' --- Deklarace pro vnit¯nÌ smyËky a parsov·nÌ ---
    Dim linesEp As Variant, lineEp As Variant, matchesEp As Object
    Dim firstEp As Long, lastEp As Long, epDate As Date, j As Long, k As Long, logKey As String
    Dim linesN As Variant, lineN As Variant, matchesN As Object, rwStart As Date, rwEnd As Date
    Dim rewatchAnimeName As String

    ' --- Deklarace specificky pro novou logiku EPs: ---
    Dim parts() As String, datePart As String, epCountsPart As String, epCounts() As String
    Dim numDays As Long, currentDate As Date, epsForDay As Long
    Dim timePerEp As Double, epCounterForRewatch As Long
    
    ' --- TÏlo funkce ---
    Set dictLog = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    lastRow = wsAnime.Cells(wsAnime.Rows.count, "L").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        PripravitDataProLog = Array()
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    If g_SearchFilter <> "" Then
        Set rowsToProcess = GetMatchingAnimeRows(wsAnime, g_SearchFilter)
        If rowsToProcess.count = 0 Then
             PripravitDataProLog = Array()
             Exit Function
        End If
    Else
        Set rowsToProcess = New Collection
        For i = 2 To lastRow
            rowsToProcess.Add i
        Next i
    End If
    
    dataArray = wsAnime.Range("A1:O" & lastRow).Value

' <<< NOVð BLOK: CACHING KOMENT¡ÿŸ >>>
ReDim CommentsI(1 To lastRow)
ReDim CommentsN(1 To lastRow)

On Error Resume Next
Set rngCmt = wsAnime.Range("I2:I" & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
If Not rngCmt Is Nothing Then
    For Each cell In rngCmt
        CommentsI(cell.row) = cell.Comment.text
    Next cell
End If

Set rngCmt = Nothing
Set rngCmt = wsAnime.Range("N2:N" & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
If Not rngCmt Is Nothing Then
    For Each cell In rngCmt
        CommentsN(cell.row) = cell.Comment.text
    Next cell
End If
On Error GoTo 0
' <<< KONEC NOV…HO BLOKU >>>



    Set regEp = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    regEp.Pattern = "EP:\s*(\d+)\s*(?:-\s*(\d+))?;\s*(\d{1,2}\.\d{1,2}\.\d{4})"
    regEp.Global = True
    Set regN = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    regN.Pattern = "\d{1,2}\.\d{1,2}\.\d{4}"
    regN.Global = True
    
    For Each loopVar In rowsToProcess
        i = CLng(loopVar)
        useCommentI = False
        
        animeName = Nz(dataArray(i, 3), "[Nezn·mÈ Anime]")
        If IsNumeric(Nz(dataArray(i, 10))) Then epDuration = CDbl(Nz(dataArray(i, 10))) Else epDuration = 0
        If IsNumeric(Nz(dataArray(i, 9))) Then totalEpisodes = CLng(Nz(dataArray(i, 9))) Else totalEpisodes = 0
        
        ' NOV… (VLOéIT):
If Len(CommentsI(i)) > 0 And epDuration > 0 Then
    linesEp = Split(CommentsI(i), vbLf)

            For Each lineEp In linesEp
                Set matchesEp = regEp.Execute(lineEp)
                If matchesEp.count > 0 Then
                    firstEp = CLng(Nz(matchesEp(0).SubMatches(0)))
                    If Nz(matchesEp(0).SubMatches(1)) <> "" Then lastEp = CLng(Nz(matchesEp(0).SubMatches(1))) Else lastEp = firstEp
                    epDate = CDate(Nz(matchesEp(0).SubMatches(2)))
                    ' OPTIMALIZACE: RychlejöÌ klÌË
                    logKey = CLng(epDate) & "|" & animeName
                    If Not dictLog.Exists(logKey) Then
                        dictLog.Add logKey, CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                        dictLog(logKey).Add "Date", epDate: dictLog(logKey).Add "Name", animeName
                        dictLog(logKey).Add "Minutes", 0: dictLog(logKey).Add "Episodes", CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                    dictLog(logKey).Add "SourceRow", i
                    End If
                    dictLog(logKey)("Minutes") = dictLog(logKey)("Minutes") + (lastEp - firstEp + 1) * epDuration
                    For j = firstEp To lastEp
                        If Not dictLog(logKey)("Episodes").Exists(j) Then dictLog(logKey)("Episodes").Add j, Nothing
                    Next j
                    useCommentI = True
                End If
            Next lineEp
        End If
        
        If IsDate(Nz(dataArray(i, 12))) And IsNumeric(Nz(dataArray(i, 15))) Then
            watchTime = CDbl(Nz(dataArray(i, 15)))
            rewatchCount = val(Nz(dataArray(i, 14)))
            
            If watchTime > 0 Then
                If rewatchCount > 0 Then timePerSession = watchTime / (rewatchCount + 1) Else timePerSession = watchTime
                
                ' NOV… (VLOéIT):
If Len(CommentsN(i)) > 0 Then
    linesN = Split(CommentsN(i), vbLf)

                    For Each lineN In linesN
                        rewatchAnimeName = animeName
                        If InStr(lineN, ".") > 0 Then
                            Dim rewatchNumberPart As String
                            rewatchNumberPart = Trim(Split(lineN, ".")(0))
                            If IsNumeric(rewatchNumberPart) And CLng(rewatchNumberPart) > 0 Then
                                rewatchAnimeName = animeName & "|RW|" & rewatchNumberPart
                            End If
                        End If

                        '--- NOV¡ LOGIKA: PrioritnÌ zpracov·nÌ form·tu "; EPs:" ---
                        If InStr(1, lineN, "; EPs:", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                            parts = Split(lineN, "; EPs:")
                            datePart = Trim(Mid(parts(0), InStr(parts(0), ".") + 1))
                            epCountsPart = Trim(parts(1))
                            epCounts = Split(epCountsPart, ",")
                            
                            If InStr(datePart, "-") > 0 Then
                                rwStart = CDate(Trim(Split(datePart, "-")(0)))
                                rwEnd = CDate(Trim(Split(datePart, "-")(1)))
                            Else
                                rwStart = CDate(datePart)
                                rwEnd = rwStart
                            End If
                            
                            numDays = (rwEnd - rwStart) + 1 ' OPTIMALIZACE
                            
                            If UBound(epCounts) + 1 = numDays Then
                                If totalEpisodes > 0 Then timePerEp = timePerSession / totalEpisodes Else timePerEp = 0
                                
                                epCounterForRewatch = 1
                                
                                For k = 0 To numDays - 1
                                    currentDate = rwStart + k ' OPTIMALIZACE
                                    epsForDay = CLng(Trim(epCounts(k)))
                                    
                                    If epsForDay > 0 Then
                                        ' OPTIMALIZACE: RychlejöÌ klÌË
                                        logKey = CLng(currentDate) & "|" & rewatchAnimeName
                                        If Not dictLog.Exists(logKey) Then
                                            dictLog.Add logKey, CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                                            dictLog(logKey).Add "Date", currentDate
                                            dictLog(logKey).Add "Name", rewatchAnimeName
                                            dictLog(logKey).Add "Minutes", 0
                                            dictLog(logKey).Add "Episodes", CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                                            dictLog(logKey).Add "SourceRow", i
                                        End If
                                        
                                        dictLog(logKey)("Minutes") = dictLog(logKey)("Minutes") + (epsForDay * timePerEp)
                                        
                                        For j = 1 To epsForDay
                                            If Not dictLog(logKey)("Episodes").Exists(epCounterForRewatch) Then
                                                dictLog(logKey)("Episodes").Add epCounterForRewatch, Nothing
                                            End If
                                            epCounterForRewatch = epCounterForRewatch + 1
                                        Next j
                                    End If
                                Next k
                            End If
                        '--- PŸVODNÕ LOGIKA pro ostatnÌ form·ty ---
                        Else
                            Set matchesN = regN.Execute(lineN)
                            If matchesN.count > 0 Then
                                rwStart = CDate(matchesN(0).Value)
                                If matchesN.count > 1 Then rwEnd = CDate(matchesN(1).Value) Else rwEnd = rwStart
                                ProcessWatchPeriod dictLog, rewatchAnimeName, rwStart, rwEnd, totalEpisodes, timePerSession, i
                            End If
                        End If
                    Next lineN
                End If
                
                If Not useCommentI Then
                    Dim originalStartDate As Date, originalEndDate As Date
                    originalStartDate = CDate(Nz(dataArray(i, 12)))
                    If IsDate(Nz(dataArray(i, 13))) Then originalEndDate = CDate(Nz(dataArray(i, 13))) Else originalEndDate = originalStartDate
                    ProcessWatchPeriod dictLog, animeName, originalStartDate, originalEndDate, totalEpisodes, timePerSession, i
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next loopVar
    
    Dim outputData() As Variant
    If dictLog.count = 0 Then
        PripravitDataProLog = Array()
        Exit Function
    End If
    ' <<< ZMÃNA STRUKTURY: NynÌ 6 sloupc˘ (6. je raw Episode Count) >>>
    ReDim outputData(1 To dictLog.count, 1 To 6)
    Dim keys As Variant: keys = dictLog.keys
    For i = 0 To dictLog.count - 1
        outputData(i + 1, 1) = dictLog(keys(i))("Date")
        outputData(i + 1, 2) = dictLog(keys(i))("Name")
        outputData(i + 1, 3) = FormatEpisodes(dictLog(keys(i))("Episodes"))
        outputData(i + 1, 4) = dictLog(keys(i))("Minutes")
        outputData(i + 1, 5) = dictLog(keys(i))("SourceRow")
        outputData(i + 1, 6) = dictLog(keys(i))("Episodes").count ' P¯edpoËÌtan˝ poËet epizod (Long)
    Next i
    PripravitDataProLog = outputData
End Function

' =========================================================================================
' === VYKRESLENÕ TABULKY A FORM¡TOV¡NÕ (OPTIMALIZOVAN¡ VERZE - BATCH)
' =========================================================================================
Private Sub ZapsatLog(wsLog As Worksheet, ByRef outputData() As Variant)
    
    ' 1. VypnutÌ vöeho, co brzdÌ (pro jistotu)
    Dim oldCalc As Long
    oldCalc = Application.Calculation
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    If wsLog.AutoFilterMode Then wsLog.AutoFilterMode = False
    
    ' 2. VyËiötÏnÌ star˝ch dat (HromadnÏ)
    Dim lastRow As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    lastRow = wsLog.Cells.Find(What:="*", SearchOrder:=xlByRows, SearchDirection:=xlPrevious).row
    If err.Number <> 0 Then lastRow = 3
    On Error GoTo 0
    If lastRow < 3 Then lastRow = 3

With wsLog.Range("A3:D" & lastRow) ' ZmÏna na E pro jistotu, i kdyû E je skrytÈ
        .UnMerge ' <<< TOTO JE TA OPRAVA: RozdÏlÌ p¯ÌpadnÈ slouËenÈ buÚky
        .ClearContents
        .ClearComments
        .Interior.ColorIndex = xlNone
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlNone
        .Font.Bold = False
        .Font.Italic = False
        .RowHeight = 15
        .WrapText = False
        .VerticalAlignment = xlBottom
        .Hyperlinks.Delete
    End With
    
    ' 3. Kontrola dat
    If Not IsArrayInitialized(outputData) Then
        wsLog.Range("A3").Value = "Pro zadan˝ filtr nebyly nalezeny û·dnÈ z·znamy."
        wsLog.Range("A3").Font.Italic = True
        Application.Calculation = oldCalc
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' 4. P¯Ìprava datov˝ch struktur
    Dim dayDetails As Object: Set dayDetails = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim i As Long
    Dim minDate As Date, maxDate As Date
    minDate = CDate(outputData(1, 1))
    maxDate = CDate(outputData(1, 1))

    ' Agregace dat (stejnÈ jako d¯Ìve)
    For i = 1 To UBound(outputData, 1)
        Dim entryDate As Date: entryDate = CDate(outputData(i, 1))
        If Not dayDetails.Exists(entryDate) Then
            dayDetails.Add entryDate, New Collection
        End If
        ' Ukl·d·me: Name, Episodes, Minutes, SourceRow, [EpisodeCount]
        Dim epCountRaw As Long
        If UBound(outputData, 2) >= 6 Then
            epCountRaw = CLng(outputData(i, 6))
        Else
            epCountRaw = ParseEpisodeCount(outputData(i, 3))
        End If
        dayDetails(entryDate).Add Array(outputData(i, 2), outputData(i, 3), outputData(i, 4), outputData(i, 5), epCountRaw)
        
        If entryDate < minDate Then minDate = entryDate
        If entryDate > maxDate Then maxDate = entryDate
    Next i
    
    Dim yesterday As Date: yesterday = Date - 1
    If g_SearchFilter = "" Then
        If maxDate < yesterday Then maxDate = yesterday
    End If
    
    If dayDetails.count = 0 Then
        Application.Calculation = oldCalc
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' 5. T¯ÌdÏnÌ dn˘ (stejnÈ jako d¯Ìve)
    Dim daysArray() As Variant
    Dim sortedDates As Collection: Set sortedDates = New Collection ' Pro uloûenÌ po¯adÌ
    
    If g_SortBy <> "Date" Then
        ' ... logika pro ¯azenÌ dle statistik ...
        ReDim daysArray(1 To dayDetails.count, 1 To 6)
        Dim dayKey As Variant, idx As Long: idx = 1
        Dim detailsCollection As Collection, detail As Variant
        Dim daySumMinutes As Double, daySumEpisodes As Long
        
        For Each dayKey In dayDetails.keys
            Set detailsCollection = dayDetails(dayKey)
            daySumMinutes = 0: daySumEpisodes = 0
            For Each detail In detailsCollection
                daySumEpisodes = daySumEpisodes + CLng(detail(4)) ' OPTIMALIZACE: PouûitÌ p¯edpoËÌtanÈho
                daySumMinutes = daySumMinutes + detail(2)
            Next detail
            daysArray(idx, 1) = dayKey
            daysArray(idx, 2) = daySumEpisodes
            daysArray(idx, 3) = daySumMinutes
            daysArray(idx, 4) = detailsCollection(1)(0)
            Set daysArray(idx, 5) = detailsCollection
            daysArray(idx, 6) = detailsCollection.count
            idx = idx + 1
        Next dayKey

' NOV…:
Select Case g_SortBy
    Case "Episodes": QuickSort2DArray daysArray, 2, 1, UBound(daysArray, 1), False
    Case "Time": QuickSort2DArray daysArray, 3, 1, UBound(daysArray, 1), False
    Case "AnimeCount": QuickSort2DArray daysArray, 6, 1, UBound(daysArray, 1), False
End Select

        
        ' P¯evedeme pole zpÏt na kolekci pro jednotn˝ pr˘chod
        Dim sortedItems As Collection: Set sortedItems = New Collection
        For i = 1 To UBound(daysArray, 1)
            sortedItems.Add daysArray(i, 5) ' Collection detail˘
            ' UloûÌme si metadata dne do "hlaviËky" v kolekci? Ne, udÏl·me to jednoduöeji.
            ' Pro tento ˙Ëel si udÏl·me pomocnou strukturu, abychom mohli iterovat line·rnÏ.
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' ==================================================================
    ' === HLAVNÕ F¡ZE: PÿÕPRAVA VELK…HO POLE PRO Z¡PIS (BATCH) ===
    ' ==================================================================
    
    ' Odhadneme poËet ¯·dk˘ (PoËet z·znam˘ + PoËet dnÌ + Rezerva pro pr·zdnÈ dny)
    Dim estimatedRows As Long
    estimatedRows = UBound(outputData, 1) + dayDetails.count + DateDiff("d", minDate, maxDate) + 10
    
    Dim finalData() As Variant
    ReDim finalData(1 To estimatedRows, 1 To 4)
    Dim writeIdx As Long: writeIdx = 0
    
    ' Kolekce pro odloûenÈ form·tov·nÌ (Range objekty - nynÌ pole string˘ pro Buffer)
    ' ZmÏna: MÌsto Unionu budeme pouûÌvat Buffer
    Dim strGreen As String, strBlue As String
    Dim countGreen As Long, countBlue As Long
    
    Dim rngBoldText As Range, rngItalicText As Range
    Dim richData As Collection: Set richData = New Collection ' Pro hyperlinky a koment·¯e
    
    Dim currentDate As Date
    Dim emptyStartDate As Date, emptyEndDate As Date: emptyStartDate = 0
    
    ' Pomocn· promÏnn· pro cyklus
    Dim loopDays As Variant
    
    ' Logika pr˘chodu (DvÏ vÏtve: Se¯azenÈ vs Datum)
    If g_SortBy <> "Date" Then
        ' --- VÏtev A: ÿazenÌ dle statistik ---
        For i = 1 To UBound(daysArray, 1)
            writeIdx = writeIdx + 1
            ' HlaviËka dne
            finalData(writeIdx, 1) = "(" & daysArray(i, 6) & "x)"
            finalData(writeIdx, 2) = "(" & daysArray(i, 2) & "x)"
            finalData(writeIdx, 3) = FormatWatchTime(daysArray(i, 3), True)
            finalData(writeIdx, 4) = daysArray(i, 1) ' Datum
            
            ' P¯idat do Green Bufferu
            AddRowToBuffer strGreen, countGreen, writeIdx + 2
            
            Set detailsCollection = daysArray(i, 5)
            For Each detail In detailsCollection
                writeIdx = writeIdx + 1
                ProcessDetailRow finalData, writeIdx, detail, richData
            Next detail
        Next i
        
    Else
        ' --- VÏtev B: ÿazenÌ dle Data (vËetnÏ pr·zdn˝ch dnÌ) ---
        For currentDate = maxDate To minDate Step -1
            If dayDetails.Exists(currentDate) Then
                ' 1. Vy¯eöit p¯edchozÌ pr·zdnÈ dny
                If emptyStartDate <> 0 Then
                    emptyEndDate = currentDate + 1
                    writeIdx = writeIdx + 1
                    
                    finalData(writeIdx, 1) = "Nic nebylo zhlÈdnuto"
                    finalData(writeIdx, 2) = "(0x)"
                    finalData(writeIdx, 3) = ":-("
                    
                    If emptyStartDate = emptyEndDate Then
                         finalData(writeIdx, 4) = emptyStartDate
                    Else
                         finalData(writeIdx, 4) = FormatDateRange(emptyEndDate, emptyStartDate)
                    End If
                    
                    ' P¯idat do Blue Bufferu a Italic
                    AddRowToBuffer strBlue, countBlue, writeIdx + 2
                    AddToRange rngItalicText, wsLog.Cells(writeIdx + 2, 1)
                    
                    emptyStartDate = 0
                End If
                
                ' 2. Zapsat aktu·lnÌ den
                Set detailsCollection = dayDetails(currentDate)
                daySumMinutes = 0: daySumEpisodes = 0
                For Each detail In detailsCollection
                    daySumEpisodes = daySumEpisodes + CLng(detail(4)) ' OPTIMALIZACE
                    daySumMinutes = daySumMinutes + detail(2)
                Next detail
                
                writeIdx = writeIdx + 1
                finalData(writeIdx, 1) = "(" & detailsCollection.count & "x)"
                finalData(writeIdx, 2) = "(" & daySumEpisodes & "x)"
                finalData(writeIdx, 3) = FormatWatchTime(daySumMinutes, True)
                finalData(writeIdx, 4) = currentDate
                
                ' P¯idat do Green Bufferu
                AddRowToBuffer strGreen, countGreen, writeIdx + 2
                
                ' 3. Zapsat detaily
                For Each detail In detailsCollection
                    writeIdx = writeIdx + 1
                    ProcessDetailRow finalData, writeIdx, detail, richData
                Next detail
            Else
                If emptyStartDate = 0 Then emptyStartDate = currentDate
            End If
        Next currentDate
        
        ' Dojezd pr·zdn˝ch dnÌ na konci
        If emptyStartDate <> 0 Then
            emptyEndDate = minDate
            writeIdx = writeIdx + 1
            finalData(writeIdx, 1) = "Nic nebylo zhlÈdnuto"
            finalData(writeIdx, 2) = "(0x)"
            finalData(writeIdx, 3) = ":-("
            If emptyStartDate = emptyEndDate Then
                 finalData(writeIdx, 4) = emptyStartDate
            Else
                 finalData(writeIdx, 4) = FormatDateRange(emptyEndDate, emptyStartDate)
            End If
            AddRowToBuffer strBlue, countBlue, writeIdx + 2
            AddToRange rngItalicText, wsLog.Cells(writeIdx + 2, 1)
        End If
    End If
    
    ' ==================================================================
    ' === F¡ZE Z¡PISU A FORM¡TOV¡NÕ (BATCH) ===
    ' ==================================================================
    
    ' 1. Hromadn˝ z·pis dat (BLESKOV…)
    If writeIdx > 0 Then
        wsLog.Range("A3").Resize(writeIdx, 4).Value = finalData
        
        ' Form·tov·nÌ sloupce s datem (D)
        wsLog.Range("D3").Resize(writeIdx, 1).NumberFormat = "dd\.mm\.yyyy"
        ' Kde je textov˝ rozsah, tam to Excel nech· jako text, kde je datum, bude datum.
    End If
    
        ' <<< NOVð BLOK: VYTVOÿENÕ MAPY DATUM õ ÿ¡DEK (Z Buffru Green) >>>
    Set g_DateRowMap = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' Proch·zÌme Green Buffer (pokud existuje)
    ' Parsov·nÌ bufferu je sloûitÈ, ale pro mapu staËÌ datum.
    ' JednoduööÌ: UdÏlat to v samostatnÈm pr˘chodu nebo p¯i aplikaci form·tu.
    ' Nech·me to na aplikaci form·tu nÌûe.

    
' =========================================================================================
    ' === NOV¡ SEKVENCE BARVENÕ A OHRANI»ENÕ (äEDð DESIGN) ===
    ' =========================================================================================
    
    Dim tableRange As Range
    
    ' 1. Aplikace z·kladnÌho designu na celou tabulku (pokud existujÌ data)
    ' Toto vytvo¯Ì "öed˝ podklad" (#BFBFBF) a öedÈ linky (#808080)
    If writeIdx > 0 Then
        Set tableRange = wsLog.Range("A3:D" & (writeIdx + 2))
        
        With tableRange
            ' V˝plÚ: SvÏtle öed· #BFBFBF (RGB 191, 191, 191)
            .Interior.Color = RGB(191, 191, 191)
            
            ' Vnit¯nÌ horizont·lnÌ Ë·ry: TmavöÌ öed· #808080 (RGB 128, 128, 128)
            With .Borders(xlInsideHorizontal)
                .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                .weight = xlThin
                .Color = RGB(128, 128, 128)
            End With
            
            ' Vnit¯nÌ vertik·lnÌ Ë·ry: »ernÈ (RGB 0, 0, 0)
            With .Borders(xlInsideVertical)
                .LineStyle = xlContinuous
                .weight = xlThin
                .Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
            
            ' VnÏjöÌ ohraniËenÌ celÈ tabulky: »ernÈ a st¯ednÏ tlustÈ
            .BorderAround LineStyle:=xlContinuous, weight:=xlMedium, Color:=RGB(0, 0, 0)
        End With
    End If

    ' 2. Aplikace form·tu z Buffer˘ (ZelenÈ a ModrÈ oblasti) - OPTIMALIZOVAN¡ BATCH VERZE (OPRAVEN¡)
    ' Toto se prov·dÌ Aé PO z·kladnÌm n·tÏru, aby se öed· barva p¯epsala
    
    Dim rngUnionG As Range, cntG As Long
    Dim rngUnionB As Range, cntB As Long
    
    ' Aplikace ZelenÈ (Headers)
    If strGreen <> "" Then
        Dim partsG() As String
        partsG = Split(strGreen, ",")
        Dim pG As Variant
        Dim rngG As Range
        
        cntG = 0
        Set rngUnionG = Nothing
        
        For Each pG In partsG
            If pG <> "" Then
                Set rngG = wsLog.Range(pG)
                
                ' 1. P¯id·nÌ do Unionu
                If rngUnionG Is Nothing Then
                    Set rngUnionG = rngG
                Else
                    Set rngUnionG = Union(rngUnionG, rngG)
                End If
                cntG = cntG + 1
                
                ' 2. FLUSH po 40 poloûk·ch (aby se aplikovaly form·ty a uvolnil Union)
                If cntG >= 40 Then
                    With rngUnionG
                        .Font.Bold = True
                        .Interior.Color = RGB(142, 217, 115)
                        .Font.Color = vbBlack ' !!! D˘leûitÈ: Text musÌ b˝t vidÏt (Ëern˝)
                        
                        ' Aplikace hranic pro celou oblast Unionu (Excel to udÏl· chyt¯e pro kaûdou Area)
                        With .Borders(xlEdgeTop)
                            .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlMedium: .Color = vbBlack
                        End With
                        With .Borders(xlEdgeBottom)
                            .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlThin: .Color = vbBlack
                        End With
                        .Borders(xlInsideHorizontal).LineStyle = xlNone
                    End With
                    Set rngUnionG = Nothing
                    cntG = 0
                End If
                
                ' 3. Mapu dat musÌme ¯eöit zvl·öù (rychlÈ Memory operace)
                Dim cellDate As Range
                Set cellDate = rngG.Cells(1, 4)
                If IsDate(cellDate.Value) Then
                    If Not g_DateRowMap.Exists(CDate(cellDate.Value)) Then
                        g_DateRowMap.Add CDate(cellDate.Value), cellDate.row
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        Next pG
        
        ' 4. Final FLUSH zbytku
        If Not rngUnionG Is Nothing Then
            With rngUnionG
                .Font.Bold = True
                .Interior.Color = RGB(142, 217, 115)
                .Font.Color = vbBlack
                
                With .Borders(xlEdgeTop)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlMedium: .Color = vbBlack
                End With
                With .Borders(xlEdgeBottom)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlThin: .Color = vbBlack
                End With
                .Borders(xlInsideHorizontal).LineStyle = xlNone
            End With
            Set rngUnionG = Nothing
        End If
    End If
    
    ' Aplikace ModrÈ (Empty)
    If strBlue <> "" Then
        Dim partsB() As String
        partsB = Split(strBlue, ",")
        Dim pB As Variant
        Dim rngB As Range
        
        cntB = 0
        Set rngUnionB = Nothing
        
        For Each pB In partsB
            If pB <> "" Then
                Set rngB = wsLog.Range(pB)
                
                ' 1. P¯id·nÌ do Unionu
                If rngUnionB Is Nothing Then
                    Set rngUnionB = rngB
                Else
                    Set rngUnionB = Union(rngUnionB, rngB)
                End If
                cntB = cntB + 1
                
                ' 2. Zarovn·nÌ Textu (MusÌme ¯eöit per-row, protoûe to z·visÌ na obsahu)
                ' Toto nelze efektivnÏ batchovat v jednom kroku, pokud se liöÌ.
                ' Ale je to rychl· vlastnost.
                If InStr(rngB.Cells(1, 4).text, "-") > 0 Then
                     rngB.Cells(1, 4).WrapText = True
                     rngB.HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft
                Else
                     rngB.Range("A1:C1").HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft
                     rngB.Cells(1, 4).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
                End If
                
                ' 3. FLUSH po 40 poloûk·ch
                If cntB >= 40 Then
                    With rngUnionB
                        .Font.Bold = True
                        .Interior.Color = RGB(97, 203, 243)
                        .Font.Color = vbBlack ' !!! Text viditeln˝
                        .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
                        .RowHeight = 30
                        
                        With .Borders(xlEdgeTop)
                            .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlMedium: .Color = vbBlack
                        End With
                        With .Borders(xlEdgeBottom)
                            .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlMedium: .Color = vbBlack
                        End With
                        .Borders(xlInsideHorizontal).LineStyle = xlNone
                    End With
                    Set rngUnionB = Nothing
                    cntB = 0
                End If
            End If
        Next pB
        
        ' 4. Final FLUSH ModrÈ
        If Not rngUnionB Is Nothing Then
            With rngUnionB
                .Font.Bold = True
                .Interior.Color = RGB(97, 203, 243)
                .Font.Color = vbBlack
                .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
                .RowHeight = 30
                With .Borders(xlEdgeTop)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlMedium: .Color = vbBlack
                End With
                With .Borders(xlEdgeBottom)
                    .LineStyle = xlContinuous: .weight = xlMedium: .Color = vbBlack
                End With
                .Borders(xlInsideHorizontal).LineStyle = xlNone
            End With
            Set rngUnionB = Nothing
        End If
    End If
    
    If Not rngItalicText Is Nothing Then
        rngItalicText.Font.Italic = True
    End If

    ' (P˘vodnÌ sekce 3. "OhraniËenÌ celÈ tabulky" je nynÌ integrov·na v bodÏ 1, takûe ji maûeme)

    ' =========================================================================================
    ' === KONEC NOV… SEKVENCE ===
    ' =========================================================================================

    ' 4. Aplikace "Bohat˝ch" dat (Hyperlinky, Koment·¯e, Bold Search) - MusÌ b˝t cyklus
    ' Toto je jedin· pomalejöÌ Ë·st, ale dÏl· se jen pro relevantnÌ ¯·dky
    Dim item As Variant
    Dim rNum As Long, sRow As Long
    Dim fName As String, rewNum As String
    Dim cCell As Range
    
    For Each item In richData
        rNum = item(0) ' Row Index (absolutnÌ v listu)
        fName = item(1) ' Display Name
        sRow = item(2) ' Source Row ID
        rewNum = item(3) ' Rewatch Text
        
        Set cCell = wsLog.Cells(rNum, 1)
        
        ' Hyperlink
        If sRow > 0 Then
            wsLog.Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=cCell, Address:="", subAddress:="'ANIME LIST'!C" & sRow, ScreenTip:="P¯ejÌt na z·znam v Anime Listu"
            cCell.Font.ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
            cCell.Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleNone
        End If
        
        ' Zv˝raznÏnÌ hled·nÌ (Bold)
        If g_SearchFilter <> "" Then
            Dim sPos As Long
            sPos = InStr(1, fName, g_SearchFilter, vbTextCompare)
            If sPos > 0 Then
                cCell.Characters(Start:=sPos, length:=Len(g_SearchFilter)).Font.Bold = True
            End If
        End If
        
        ' Koment·¯
        If rewNum <> "" Then
            cCell.AddComment rewNum & ". Rewatch"
            cCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = True
            cCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    Next item

' ==================================================================
    ' === FIN¡LNÕ FORM¡TOV¡NÕ SLOUPCE D (OPRAVA ZAROVN¡NÕ 2.0) ===
    ' ==================================================================
    
    If writeIdx > 0 Then
        ' 1. F¡ZE: Z·kladnÌ n·tÏr - Vöechno DOPRAVA a na STÿED
        ' TÌm vy¯eöÌme zelenÈ ¯·dky a klasick· data.
        With wsLog.Range("D3:D" & (writeIdx + 2))
            .HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
            .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
            .NumberFormat = "dd\.mm\.yyyy"
            .WrapText = False
        End With
        
        ' 2. F¡ZE: V˝jimka pro ModrÈ ¯·dky s pomlËkou
        ' Projdeme pouze buÚky ve sloupci D, kterÈ pat¯Ì do modrÈ oblasti (NynÌ p¯es buffer)
        If strBlue <> "" Then
             Dim partsB2() As String
             partsB2 = Split(strBlue, ",")
             Dim pB2 As Variant
             Dim rngB2 As Range
             
             For Each pB2 In partsB2
                If pB2 <> "" Then
                    ' Pouze buÚka D v danÈm ¯·dku
                    Set rngB2 = wsLog.Range(pB2).Cells(1, 4)
                    If InStr(1, CStr(rngB2.Value), "-") > 0 Then
                        rngB2.HorizontalAlignment = xlLeft
                        rngB2.WrapText = True
                    End If
                End If
             Next pB2
        End If
    End If

    ' ObnovenÌ nastavenÌ
    Application.Calculation = oldCalc

End Sub

' === POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO BATCH BUFFER (OPTIMALIZACE UNION) ===
Private Sub AddRowToBuffer(ByRef buffer As String, ByRef count As Long, ByVal rowIdx As Long)
    ' P¯id· adresu do bufferu. Pokud buffer p¯ekroËÌ limit, zpracov·nÌ se dÏl· v hlavnÌ smyËce (zde jen hromadÌme string)
    ' Ale pro jednoduchost v VBA stringy snesou hodnÏ.
    ' Limit address stringu pro Range() je 255 znak˘.
    ' Proto pouûÌv·me trik: OddÏlÌme Ë·rkou a v hlavnÌ smyËce pak Splitneme a projdeme.
    ' TÌm se vyhneme Union objektu, ale st·le musÌme volat Range().
    ' Pro 3000 poloûek bude string obrovsk˝, to nevadÌ? VBA String m· 2GB.
    ' Ale Split trv·. Je to rychlejöÌ neû Union? ANO, ¯·dovÏ. Union musÌ p¯epoËÌtat strom.
    
    Dim newAddr As String
    newAddr = "A" & rowIdx & ":D" & rowIdx
    
    If buffer = "" Then
        buffer = newAddr
    Else
        buffer = buffer & "," & newAddr
    End If
    count = count + 1
End Sub

' === POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO UNION (Zachov·no pro Italics) ===
Private Sub AddToRange(ByRef rng As Range, ByVal newRng As Range)
    If rng Is Nothing Then
        Set rng = newRng
    Else
        Set rng = Union(rng, newRng)
    End If
End Sub

' === POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO PÿÕPRAVU ÿ¡DKU ===
Private Sub ProcessDetailRow(ByRef finalData() As Variant, ByVal idx As Long, ByVal detail As Variant, ByRef richData As Collection)
    Dim fullAnimeName As String: fullAnimeName = detail(0)
    Dim displayName As String
    Dim rewatchNum As String
    
    If InStr(fullAnimeName, "|RW|") > 0 Then
        Dim parts() As String
        parts = Split(fullAnimeName, "|RW|")
        displayName = parts(0)
        rewatchNum = parts(1)
    Else
        displayName = fullAnimeName
        rewatchNum = ""
    End If
    
    ' Z·pis do pole (Text)
    finalData(idx, 1) = displayName
    finalData(idx, 2) = detail(1) ' Episodes
    finalData(idx, 3) = FormatWatchTime(detail(2), False) ' Time
    ' Datum (sloupec 4) nech·v·me pr·zdnÈ pro detaily
    
    ' UloûenÌ metadat pro pozdÏjöÌ form·tov·nÌ
    ' Array Structure: [RowIndex, DisplayName, SourceRow, RewatchNum]
    ' RowIndex v listu je idx + 2 (protoûe zaËÌn·me na A3)
    richData.Add Array(idx + 2, displayName, CLng(detail(3)), rewatchNum)
End Sub

' =========================================================================================
' === POMOCN… FUNKCE A PROCEDURY (HISTORY LOG)
' =========================================================================================
Function IsArrayInitialized(arr As Variant) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    IsArrayInitialized = (UBound(arr, 1) >= LBound(arr, 1))
    If err.Number <> 0 Then IsArrayInitialized = False
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

Function FormatWatchTime(ByVal totalMinutes As Double, ByVal isSummary As Boolean) As String
    If totalMinutes <= 0 Then
        FormatWatchTime = "0 min"
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Dim roundedMinutes As Long
    roundedMinutes = Round(totalMinutes, 0)
    
    Dim hoursDecimal As Double
    hoursDecimal = totalMinutes / 60
    
    Dim hoursString As String
    hoursString = Replace(Format(hoursDecimal, "0.0"), ".", ",")

    If isSummary Then
        FormatWatchTime = roundedMinutes & " min (" & hoursString & " hod)"
    Else
        If totalMinutes < 60 Then
            FormatWatchTime = roundedMinutes & " min"
        Else
            FormatWatchTime = roundedMinutes & " min (" & hoursString & " hod)"
        End If
    End If
End Function

Function FormatEpisodes(ByVal epDict As Object) As String
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    If epDict.count = 0 Then
        FormatEpisodes = "(0x)"
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim keys As Variant
    keys = epDict.keys
    If Not IsNumeric(keys(0)) Then
        FormatEpisodes = keys(0)
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim totalCount As Long: totalCount = epDict.count
    Dim nums() As Long, i As Long
    ReDim nums(0 To epDict.count - 1)
    For i = 0 To UBound(keys)
        nums(i) = CLng(keys(i))
    Next i
    QuickSort1DArray nums, 0, UBound(nums)
    Dim episodeRangeString As String, startRange As Long
    startRange = nums(0)
    For i = 1 To UBound(nums)
        If nums(i) <> nums(i - 1) + 1 Then
            If startRange = nums(i - 1) Then
                episodeRangeString = episodeRangeString & startRange & ", "
            Else
                episodeRangeString = episodeRangeString & startRange & "-" & nums(i - 1) & ", "
            End If
            startRange = nums(i)
        End If
    Next i
    If startRange = nums(UBound(nums)) Then
        episodeRangeString = episodeRangeString & startRange
    Else
        episodeRangeString = episodeRangeString & startRange & "-" & nums(UBound(nums))
    End If
    If Right(episodeRangeString, 2) = ", " Then
        episodeRangeString = left(episodeRangeString, Len(episodeRangeString) - 2)
    End If
    FormatEpisodes = "(" & totalCount & "x) EP " & episodeRangeString
CleanExit:
    If err.Number <> 0 Then FormatEpisodes = "Chyba form·tov·nÌ"
End Function

Function ParseEpisodeCount(ByVal epString As String) As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim startPos As Long, endPos As Long
    startPos = InStr(1, epString, "(")
    endPos = InStr(startPos, epString, "x)")
    If startPos > 0 And endPos > 0 Then
        ParseEpisodeCount = CLng(Mid(epString, startPos + 1, endPos - startPos - 1))
    Else
        ParseEpisodeCount = 0
    End If
End Function



' === QUICKSORT PRO 1D POLE (N¡HRADA ZA BUBBLESORT) ===
Private Sub QuickSort1DArray(ByRef arr() As Long, ByVal First As Long, ByVal Last As Long)
    Dim pivot As Long, Temp As Long
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    
    If First >= Last Then Exit Sub
    
    pivot = arr((First + Last) \ 2)
    i = First
    j = Last
    
    Do
        Do While arr(i) < pivot: i = i + 1: Loop
        Do While arr(j) > pivot: j = j - 1: Loop
        
        If i <= j Then
            Temp = arr(i)
            arr(i) = arr(j)
            arr(j) = Temp
            i = i + 1
            j = j - 1
        End If
    Loop Until i > j
    
    If First < j Then QuickSort1DArray arr, First, j
    If i < Last Then QuickSort1DArray arr, i, Last
End Sub


Function Nz(Expression As Variant, Optional ValueIfNull As Variant) As Variant
    If IsMissing(ValueIfNull) Then ValueIfNull = ""
    If IsNull(Expression) Or IsEmpty(Expression) Then
        Nz = ValueIfNull
    Else
        Nz = Expression
    End If
End Function

Private Function FormatDateRange(startDate As Date, endDate As Date) As String
    ' Form·tuje rozsah datum˘. VéDY pouûÌv· pln˝ form·t dd.mm.yyyy.
    If startDate = endDate Then
        FormatDateRange = Format(startDate, "dd.mm.yyyy")
    Else
        FormatDateRange = Format(startDate, "dd.mm.yyyy") & " - " & Format(endDate, "dd.mm.yyyy")
    End If
End Function

' =========================================================================================
' <<< ZCELA PÿEPRACOVAN¡ A OPTIMALIZOVAN¡ PROCEDURA PRO GRAF >>>
' =========================================================================================
Public Sub GenerovatGrafZhlÈdnut˝chEpizod_FinalniVerze_AtytoJeUzOstre(ByRef sourceData() As Variant)
    On Error GoTo Chyba

    Dim wsInfo As Worksheet
    Set wsInfo = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("HISTORY LOG")

    On Error Resume Next
    Dim chartExists As Boolean, shapeEpExists As Boolean, shapeHrExists As Boolean
    chartExists = (wsInfo.ChartObjects("GrafZhlÈdnut˝chEpizod").Name <> "")
    shapeEpExists = (wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemEpizodText").Name <> "")
    shapeHrExists = (wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemHodinText").Name <> "")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not IsArrayInitialized(sourceData) Then
        If chartExists Then wsInfo.ChartObjects("GrafZhlÈdnut˝chEpizod").Visible = False
        If shapeEpExists Then wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemEpizodText").Visible = False
        If shapeHrExists Then wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemHodinText").Visible = False
        GoTo Cleanup
    Else
        If chartExists Then wsInfo.ChartObjects("GrafZhlÈdnut˝chEpizod").Visible = True
        If shapeEpExists Then wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemEpizodText").Visible = True
        If shapeHrExists Then wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemHodinText").Visible = True
    End If

    Dim dailyEpisodes As Object, chtEpisodes As ChartObject
    Dim filterStartDate As Date, filterEndDate As Date, i As Long
    Set dailyEpisodes = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

    Dim today As Date: today = Date

    If g_SearchFilter <> "" Then
        filterStartDate = CDate(sourceData(1, 1))
        filterEndDate = CDate(sourceData(1, 1))
        For i = 1 To UBound(sourceData, 1)
            If CDate(sourceData(i, 1)) < filterStartDate Then filterStartDate = CDate(sourceData(i, 1))
            If CDate(sourceData(i, 1)) > filterEndDate Then filterEndDate = CDate(sourceData(i, 1))
        Next i
    Else
        If Not IsDate(wsInfo.Range("AW2").Value) Or Not IsDate(wsInfo.Range("BB2").Value) Then
            MsgBox "ProsÌm, zadejte platnÈ datumy do bunÏk AW2 a BB2.", vbExclamation
            GoTo Cleanup
        End If
        filterStartDate = CDate(wsInfo.Range("AW2").Value)
        filterEndDate = CDate(wsInfo.Range("BB2").Value)
    End If
    
    If filterEndDate > today Then filterEndDate = today

    Dim totalMinutesCount As Double: totalMinutesCount = 0
    For i = 1 To UBound(sourceData, 1)
        Dim currentDate As Date: currentDate = CDate(sourceData(i, 1))
        If currentDate >= filterStartDate And currentDate <= filterEndDate Then
            Dim epCount As Long
            ' OPTIMALIZACE: PouûitÌ p¯edpoËÌtanÈho sloupce 6 (CLng)
            If UBound(sourceData, 2) >= 6 Then
                epCount = CLng(sourceData(i, 6))
            Else
                epCount = ParseEpisodeCount(sourceData(i, 3)) ' Fallback
            End If
            
            If Not dailyEpisodes.Exists(currentDate) Then
                dailyEpisodes.Add currentDate, epCount
            Else
                dailyEpisodes(currentDate) = dailyEpisodes(currentDate) + epCount
            End If
            
            totalMinutesCount = totalMinutesCount + CDbl(sourceData(i, 4))
        End If
    Next i

    For currentDate = filterStartDate To filterEndDate
        If Not dailyEpisodes.Exists(currentDate) Then
            dailyEpisodes.Add currentDate, 0
        End If
    Next currentDate

    Dim elementCount As Long: elementCount = dailyEpisodes.count
    If elementCount = 0 Then GoTo Cleanup
    
    ' <<< ZDE JE KLÕ»OV¡ ZMÃNA: Pole chartDates je nynÌ typu Double >>>
    Dim chartDates() As Double, chartValues() As Long
    ReDim chartDates(1 To elementCount), chartValues(1 To elementCount)
    
    Dim keys As Variant: keys = dailyEpisodes.keys
    QuickSort1DVariant keys, 0, UBound(keys)
    
    Dim totalEpisodesCount As Long: totalEpisodesCount = 0
    Dim j As Long
    For j = 0 To UBound(keys)
        ' P¯ev·dÌme datum na Double, stejnÏ jako v p˘vodnÌm kÛdu
        chartDates(j + 1) = CDbl(CDate(keys(j)))
        chartValues(j + 1) = dailyEpisodes(keys(j))
        totalEpisodesCount = totalEpisodesCount + chartValues(j + 1)
    Next j
    
    Dim daysInRange As Long
    daysInRange = DateDiff("d", filterStartDate, filterEndDate) + 1
    Dim dynamicChartTitle As String
    
    Dim startDateFmt As String
    If year(filterStartDate) <> year(filterEndDate) Then
        startDateFmt = "dd.mm.yyyy"
    Else
        startDateFmt = "dd.mm."
    End If

    If g_SearchFilter <> "" Then
        dynamicChartTitle = "PoËet epizod za " & daysInRange & " dnÌ sledov·nÌ " & g_SearchFilter & " (" & Format(filterStartDate, startDateFmt) & " - " & Format(filterEndDate, "dd.mm.yyyy") & ")"
    Else
        dynamicChartTitle = "PoËet epizod za " & daysInRange & " " & IIf(daysInRange = 1, "den", "dnÌ") & " (" & Format(filterStartDate, startDateFmt) & " - " & Format(filterEndDate, "dd.mm.yyyy") & ")"
    End If
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtEpisodes = wsInfo.ChartObjects("GrafZhlÈdnut˝chEpizod")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If chtEpisodes Is Nothing Then
        Dim leftChart As Double, topChart As Double, wChart As Double, hChart As Double
        leftChart = wsInfo.Range("W4").left: topChart = wsInfo.Range("W4").top
        wChart = 600: hChart = 400
        Set chtEpisodes = wsInfo.ChartObjects.Add(leftChart, topChart, wChart, hChart)
        chtEpisodes.Name = "GrafZhlÈdnut˝chEpizod"
        With chtEpisodes.Chart
             .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
             .HasTitle = True
             .HasLegend = False
        End With
    End If
    
    With chtEpisodes.Chart
        .ChartTitle.text = dynamicChartTitle
        If .SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        With .SeriesCollection(1)
            .XValues = chartDates
            .values = chartValues
        End With
    End With

    Dim shpTotalEpisodes As Shape, shpTotalHours As Shape
    Dim episodesPerDay As Long
    If daysInRange > 0 Then episodesPerDay = Application.WorksheetFunction.RoundDown(totalEpisodesCount / daysInRange, 0) Else episodesPerDay = 0
    Dim episodesValueText As String
    episodesValueText = totalEpisodesCount & " (" & episodesPerDay & " EP/den)"
    Dim totalTextEpisodes As String
    totalTextEpisodes = "Celkem epizod v obdobÌ: " & episodesValueText
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set shpTotalEpisodes = wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemEpizodText")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If shpTotalEpisodes Is Nothing Then
        Set shpTotalEpisodes = wsInfo.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, chtEpisodes.left, chtEpisodes.top + chtEpisodes.Height + 10, 300, 25)
        shpTotalEpisodes.Name = "CelkemEpizodText"
        shpTotalEpisodes.line.Visible = msoFalse
        shpTotalEpisodes.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
        With shpTotalEpisodes.TextFrame.Characters.Font
            .Name = "Calibri"
            .size = 14
        End With
    End If
    shpTotalEpisodes.TextFrame.Characters.text = totalTextEpisodes
    shpTotalEpisodes.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=InStr(totalTextEpisodes, ":") + 2, length:=Len(episodesValueText)).Font.Bold = True
    
    Dim totalHours As Double: totalHours = totalMinutesCount / 60
    Dim avgHoursPerDay As Double
    If daysInRange > 0 Then avgHoursPerDay = totalHours / daysInRange Else avgHoursPerDay = 0
    Dim hoursValueText As String: hoursValueText = Replace(Format(totalHours, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " (" & Replace(Format(avgHoursPerDay, "0.0"), ".", ",") & "h/den)"
    Dim totalTextHours As String
    totalTextHours = "Celkem hodin v obdobÌ: " & hoursValueText

    On Error Resume Next
    Set shpTotalHours = wsInfo.Shapes("CelkemHodinText")
    On Error GoTo 0

    If shpTotalHours Is Nothing Then
        Set shpTotalHours = wsInfo.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, shpTotalEpisodes.left, shpTotalEpisodes.top + shpTotalEpisodes.Height + 5, shpTotalEpisodes.Width, shpTotalEpisodes.Height)
        shpTotalHours.Name = "CelkemHodinText"
        shpTotalHours.line.Visible = msoFalse
        shpTotalHours.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
        With shpTotalHours.TextFrame.Characters.Font
            .Name = "Calibri"
            .size = 14
        End With
    End If
    shpTotalHours.TextFrame.Characters.text = totalTextHours
    shpTotalHours.TextFrame.Characters(Start:=InStr(totalTextHours, ":") + 2, length:=Len(hoursValueText)).Font.Bold = True

Cleanup:
    Set wsInfo = Nothing
    Set dailyEpisodes = Nothing
    Set chtEpisodes = Nothing
    Set shpTotalEpisodes = Nothing
    Set shpTotalHours = Nothing
    Exit Sub
Chyba:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i generov·nÌ/aktualizaci grafu: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    GoTo Cleanup
End Sub

' === QUICKSORT PRO 2D POLE (OPRAVEN¡ VERZE) ===
Private Sub QuickSort2DArray(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal sortCol As Long, ByVal First As Long, ByVal Last As Long, Optional ascending As Boolean = True)
    Dim pivot As Variant, Temp As Variant
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, k As Long
    Dim numCols As Long
    
    If First >= Last Then Exit Sub
    
    numCols = UBound(arr, 2)
    pivot = arr((First + Last) \ 2, sortCol)
    i = First
    j = Last
    
    Do
        If ascending Then
            Do While arr(i, sortCol) < pivot: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While arr(j, sortCol) > pivot: j = j - 1: Loop
        Else
            Do While arr(i, sortCol) > pivot: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While arr(j, sortCol) < pivot: j = j - 1: Loop
        End If
        
        If i <= j Then
            ' OPRAVEN¡ »¡ST: BezpeËnÈ prohozenÌ cel˝ch ¯·dk˘ (vËetnÏ objekt˘)
            For k = LBound(arr, 2) To numCols
                
                ' 1. Uloûit arr(i, k) do temp
                If IsObject(arr(i, k)) Then
                    Set Temp = arr(i, k)
                Else
                    Temp = arr(i, k)
                End If
                
                ' 2. P¯esunout arr(j, k) do arr(i, k)
                If IsObject(arr(j, k)) Then
                    Set arr(i, k) = arr(j, k)
                Else
                    arr(i, k) = arr(j, k)
                End If
                
                ' 3. P¯esunout temp do arr(j, k)
                If IsObject(Temp) Then
                    Set arr(j, k) = Temp
                Else
                    arr(j, k) = Temp
                End If
                
            Next k
            
            i = i + 1
            j = j - 1
        End If
    Loop Until i > j
    
    If First < j Then QuickSort2DArray arr, sortCol, First, j, ascending
    If i < Last Then QuickSort2DArray arr, sortCol, i, Last, ascending
End Sub

' === QUICKSORT PRO 1D VARIANT POLE (pro Dictionary.Keys) ===
Private Sub QuickSort1DVariant(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal First As Long, ByVal Last As Long)
    Dim pivot As Variant, Temp As Variant
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    
    If First >= Last Then Exit Sub
    
    pivot = arr((First + Last) \ 2)
    i = First
    j = Last
    
    Do
        Do While arr(i) < pivot: i = i + 1: Loop
        Do While arr(j) > pivot: j = j - 1: Loop
        
        If i <= j Then
            Temp = arr(i)
            arr(i) = arr(j)
            arr(j) = Temp
            i = i + 1
            j = j - 1
        End If
    Loop Until i > j
    
    If First < j Then QuickSort1DVariant arr, First, j
    If i < Last Then QuickSort1DVariant arr, i, Last
End Sub
' =========================================================================================
' === OPTIMALIZOVANð MODUL PRO HEATMAPU
' =========================================================================================
Public Sub VytvoritHeatmapu(ByRef dataCache() As Variant, ByVal targetSheetName As String, ByVal targetCellAddress As String, Optional ByRef dateRowMap As Object = Nothing)
    On Error GoTo Chyba
    
    ' 1. Maxim·lnÌ vypnutÌ brzd Excelu
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    Dim oldCalc As Long
    oldCalc = Application.Calculation
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    
    Dim wsLog As Worksheet
    Set wsLog = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(targetSheetName)
    
    Dim targetRange As Range
    Set targetRange = wsLog.Range(targetCellAddress)

    Const HEATMAP_WEEKS As Integer = 53
    Const STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE As String = "HeatmapStatsEpisodes"
    Const STATS_HOURS_SHAPE As String = "HeatmapStatsHours"
    
    ' Definice barevn˝ch ˙rovnÌ
    Const HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1 As Integer = 2
    Const HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2 As Integer = 6
    Const HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3 As Integer = 13
    Const HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4 As Integer = 19

    If Not IsArrayInitialized(dataCache) Then
        ' VyËiötÏnÌ p¯i pr·zdn˝ch datech
        targetRange.Resize(12, HEATMAP_WEEKS + 1).Clear
        targetRange.Offset(5, (HEATMAP_WEEKS / 2) - 5).Value = "Pro filtr nebyly nalezeny û·dnÈ z·znamy."
        On Error Resume Next
        wsLog.Shapes(STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE).Visible = False
        wsLog.Shapes(STATS_HOURS_SHAPE).Visible = False
        On Error GoTo 0
        GoTo Konec
    Else
        On Error Resume Next
