        wsLog.Shapes(STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE).Visible = True
        wsLog.Shapes(STATS_HOURS_SHAPE).Visible = True
        On Error GoTo 0
    End If
    
    GenerovatHeatmapu_Core dataCache, targetRange, wsLog, HEATMAP_WEEKS, STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE, STATS_HOURS_SHAPE, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4, dateRowMap

Konec:
    ' ObnovenÌ nastavenÌ
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    Application.Calculation = oldCalc
    Exit Sub
Chyba:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    Application.Calculation = oldCalc
    MsgBox "P¯i generov·nÌ heatmapy nastala kritick· chyba: " & vbCrLf & err.Description, vbCritical, "Chyba Heatmapy"
End Sub

Private Sub GenerovatHeatmapu_Core(ByRef dataCache() As Variant, ByRef targetRange As Range, ByRef wsLog As Worksheet, ByVal HEATMAP_WEEKS As Integer, ByVal STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE As String, ByVal STATS_HOURS_SHAPE As String, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1 As Integer, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2 As Integer, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3 As Integer, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4 As Integer, Optional ByRef dateRowMap As Object = Nothing)
    
    ' --- 1. PÿÕPRAVA DAT (Hashmapa) ---
    Dim dailyTotals As Object
    Set dailyTotals = ZiskatDataProHeatmapu_Core(dataCache)
    
    If dailyTotals Is Nothing Or dailyTotals.count = 0 Then Exit Sub

    ' ZjiötÏnÌ rozsahu dat
    Dim minDate As Date, maxDate As Date
    Dim keys As Variant: keys = dailyTotals.keys
    minDate = CDate(keys(0)): maxDate = CDate(keys(0))
    Dim dKey As Variant
    For Each dKey In keys
        If CDate(dKey) > maxDate Then maxDate = CDate(dKey)
    Next dKey
    
    ' V˝poËet startovnÌho data (vûdy pondÏlÌ p¯ed X t˝dny)
    Dim startDate As Date
    startDate = maxDate - (HEATMAP_WEEKS * 7) + 1
    startDate = startDate - (Weekday(startDate, vbMonday) - 1)
    
    ' Rychl˝ souËet statistik pro Shapes
    Dim totalEpisodesInPeriod As Long: totalEpisodesInPeriod = 0
    Dim totalMinutesInPeriod As Double: totalMinutesInPeriod = 0
    Dim tempDate As Date
    For tempDate = startDate To maxDate
        If dailyTotals.Exists(tempDate) Then
            totalEpisodesInPeriod = totalEpisodesInPeriod + dailyTotals(tempDate)("Episodes")
            totalMinutesInPeriod = totalMinutesInPeriod + dailyTotals(tempDate)("Minutes")
        End If
    Next tempDate
    
    ' --- 2. HROMADN¡ PÿÕPRAVA OBLASTI (Batch Processing) ---
    Dim fullHeatmapArea As Range
    ' Oblast pro dny (7 ¯·dk˘ x 53 sloupc˘) - posunuto o 2 dol˘ a 1 doprava
    Set fullHeatmapArea = targetRange.Offset(2, 1).Resize(7, HEATMAP_WEEKS)
    
    ' VyËiötÏnÌ a z·kladnÌ form·t NAJEDNOU
    ' KROK 1: Resize na 11 ¯·dk˘ (E38 aû E48). ÿ·dek 49 z˘stane nedotËen.
    With targetRange.Resize(11, HEATMAP_WEEKS + 1)
        .Clear
        .Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow" ' Nebo tv˘j font
        
        ' KROK 3 (NEIMPLEMENTOV¡NO): é·dnÈ barvenÌ pozadÌ. Z˘stane bÌlÈ po .Clear
    End With
    
    ' NastavenÌ popisk˘ dn˘
    targetRange.Offset(2, 0).Value = "Po"
    targetRange.Offset(4, 0).Value = "St"
    targetRange.Offset(6, 0).Value = "P·"
    
    With targetRange.Offset(2, 0).Resize(5)
        .Font.size = 8
        .Font.Bold = True
        .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter
        .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
    End With

    ' Aplikace m¯Ìûky a DEFAULTNÕ BARVY (Level 0) na celou oblast nar·z
    With fullHeatmapArea
        .Interior.Color = RGB(235, 237, 240) ' äed· (Level 0) - vnit¯ek m¯Ìûky
        .Font.Color = RGB(235, 237, 240)     ' Skryje text "XX" pro hyperlinky
        With .Borders
            .LineStyle = xlContinuous
            .Color = vbWhite
            .weight = xlThin
        End With
    End With
    
    ' SpecifickÈ ohraniËenÌ pravÈ strany m¯Ìûky (vnit¯nÌ)
    With fullHeatmapArea.Columns(HEATMAP_WEEKS).Borders(xlEdgeRight)
        .LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .weight = xlMedium
        .ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
    End With

    ' Aktualizace Shapes
    Call VytvorNeboAktualizujStatistiky_Core(wsLog, totalEpisodesInPeriod, totalMinutesInPeriod, startDate, maxDate, STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE, STATS_HOURS_SHAPE)

    ' --- 3. HLAVNÕ SMY»KA ---
    ' Pouûijeme pole pro mÏsÌce, abychom nezapisovali do bunÏk v kaûdÈm cyklu
    Dim arrMonths() As Variant
    ReDim arrMonths(1 To 1, 1 To HEATMAP_WEEKS)
    
    ' BATCH 3.0: Object-Based Batching (Union s limitem)
    ' Toto je kompromis mezi rychlostÌ a stabilitou. Union se resetuje kaûd˝ch 50 bunÏk,
    ' coû zabr·nÌ exponenci·lnÌmu zpomalenÌ, ale vyhne se problÈm˘m s dÈlkou stringu u Range().
    Dim rngLevel1 As Range, cntLevel1 As Long
    Dim rngLevel2 As Range, cntLevel2 As Long
    Dim rngLevel3 As Range, cntLevel3 As Long
    Dim rngLevel4 As Range, cntLevel4 As Long
    Dim rngLevel5 As Range, cntLevel5 As Long
    
    Dim c As Long, r As Long
    Dim currentMonth As Integer: currentMonth = 0
    Dim currentDate As Date, mondayDate As Date
    Dim cell As Range
    Dim episodeCount As Long
    Dim minutesForDay As Double
    Dim cmtText As String
    
    ' Pro zrychlenÌ koment·¯˘ a hyperlink˘
    Dim hasActivity As Boolean
    
    For c = 1 To HEATMAP_WEEKS
        mondayDate = startDate + ((c - 1) * 7)
        
        ' Logika mÏsÌc˘ (do pole)
        If Month(mondayDate) <> currentMonth Then
            currentMonth = Month(mondayDate)
            arrMonths(1, c) = Format(mondayDate, "mmm")
        End If

        For r = 1 To 7
            currentDate = mondayDate + (r - 1)
            If currentDate > maxDate Then GoTo LoopFinished
            
            ' ZÌsk·nÌ dat
            If dailyTotals.Exists(currentDate) Then
                episodeCount = dailyTotals(currentDate)("Episodes")
                minutesForDay = dailyTotals(currentDate)("Minutes")
                hasActivity = (episodeCount > 0)
            Else
                episodeCount = 0
                minutesForDay = 0
                hasActivity = False
            End If
            
            Set cell = fullHeatmapArea.Cells(r, c)
            
            ' A. BarvenÌ (Object Batch) a Hyperlinky
            If hasActivity Then
                ' 1. Hyperlink (MusÌ b˝t PRVNÕ, aby Batch Color p¯epsal modrou barvu odkazu)
                If Not dateRowMap Is Nothing Then
                    If dateRowMap.Exists(currentDate) Then
                          wsLog.Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=cell, Address:="", subAddress:="'" & wsLog.Name & "'!D" & dateRowMap(currentDate), _
                                                           ScreenTip:="P¯ejÌt na z·znamy", TextToDisplay:="XX"
                    End If
                End If
                
                ' 2. BarvenÌ (Object Batch)
                Select Case episodeCount
                    Case 1 To HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1:      AddCellToBatch rngLevel1, cntLevel1, cell, RGB(155, 233, 168)
                    Case Is <= HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2:     AddCellToBatch rngLevel2, cntLevel2, cell, RGB(64, 196, 99)
                    Case Is <= HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3:     AddCellToBatch rngLevel3, cntLevel3, cell, RGB(48, 161, 78)
                    Case Is <= HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4:     AddCellToBatch rngLevel4, cntLevel4, cell, RGB(33, 110, 57)
                    Case Else:                            AddCellToBatch rngLevel5, cntLevel5, cell, RGB(25, 80, 45)
                End Select
            End If
            
            ' C. Koment·¯e
            If hasActivity Then
                Dim episodeText As String
                Select Case episodeCount
                    Case 1: episodeText = " epizoda"
                    Case 2 To 4: episodeText = " epizody"
                    Case Else: episodeText = " epizod"
                End Select
                cmtText = Format(currentDate, "d. mmmm yyyy") & vbCrLf & _
                          episodeCount & episodeText & " (" & Replace(Format(minutesForDay / 60, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " h)"
            Else
                cmtText = Format(currentDate, "d. mmmm yyyy")
            End If
            
            cell.AddComment cmtText
            cell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = True
            
        Next r
    Next c

LoopFinished:
    
    ' --- 4. FIN¡LNÕ Z¡PIS A DO-BARVENÕ (Flush zbytek) ---
    
    ' Z·pis mÏsÌc˘ nar·z
    With targetRange.Offset(0, 1).Resize(1, HEATMAP_WEEKS)
        .Value = arrMonths
        .Font.size = 9
        .Font.Bold = True
        .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter
        .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
    End With
    
    ' Flush zb˝vajÌcÌch cell˘ v Union objektech
    FlushBatch rngLevel1, RGB(155, 233, 168)
    FlushBatch rngLevel2, RGB(64, 196, 99)
    FlushBatch rngLevel3, RGB(48, 161, 78)
    FlushBatch rngLevel4, RGB(33, 110, 57)
    FlushBatch rngLevel5, RGB(25, 80, 45)

    ' OdstranÏnÌ podtrûenÌ u hyperlink˘
    fullHeatmapArea.Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleNone
    
    ' --- 5. DODATE»N… OHRANI»ENÕ (QoL Fix - KROK 2) ---
    ' ... (zbytek kÛdu z˘st·v·) ...

    ' A. SpodnÌ ohraniËenÌ Legendy (ÿ·dek 48)
    ' Toto je 11. ¯·dek oblasti (Offset 10). PouûÌv·me xlEdgeBottom, abychom nezasahovali do ¯·dku 49.
    With targetRange.Offset(10, 0).Resize(1, HEATMAP_WEEKS + 1).Borders(xlEdgeBottom)
        .LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .weight = xlMedium
        .ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
    End With

    ' B. LevÈ ohraniËenÌ pro BG38-BG48 (Svisl· Ë·ra uzavÌrajÌcÌ pravou stranu)
    ' Resize nastaven na 11, aby konËil na ¯·dku 48.
    With targetRange.Offset(0, HEATMAP_WEEKS + 1).Resize(11, 1).Borders(xlEdgeLeft)
        .LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .weight = xlMedium
        .ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
    End With
    
    ' C. HornÌ ohraniËenÌ pro E38-BF38
    With targetRange.Resize(1, HEATMAP_WEEKS + 1).Borders(xlEdgeTop)
        .LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .weight = xlMedium
        .ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
    End With

    ' VykreslenÌ legendy
    Call VykreslitLegendu_Core(targetRange, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4)

End Sub

Private Sub AddCellToBatch(ByRef rng As Range, ByRef cnt As Long, ByVal cell As Range, ByVal colorRGB As Long)
    If rng Is Nothing Then
        Set rng = cell
    Else
        Set rng = Union(rng, cell)
    End If
    cnt = cnt + 1
    
    ' Flush kaûd˝ch 40 poloûek (Prevence "Method Union Failed" nebo zpomalenÌ)
    If cnt >= 40 Then
        rng.Interior.Color = colorRGB
        rng.Font.Color = colorRGB
        Set rng = Nothing
        cnt = 0
    End If
End Sub

Private Sub FlushBatch(ByRef rng As Range, ByVal colorRGB As Long)
    If Not rng Is Nothing Then
        rng.Interior.Color = colorRGB
        rng.Font.Color = colorRGB
        Set rng = Nothing
    End If
End Sub

Private Sub VykreslitLegendu_Core(ByRef targetRange As Range, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1 As Integer, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2 As Integer, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3 As Integer, ByVal HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4 As Integer)
    Dim legendCell As Range
    
    targetRange.Offset(10, 1).Value = "MÈnÏ"
    
    Set legendCell = targetRange.Offset(10, 2)
    legendCell.Interior.Color = DefinovatBarvu_Core(0, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4)
    AddCommentToCell legendCell, "é·dn· aktivita (0 epizod)"

    Set legendCell = targetRange.Offset(10, 3)
    legendCell.Interior.Color = DefinovatBarvu_Core(1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4)
    Dim level1Text As String
    If HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1 = 1 Then
        level1Text = "1 epizoda"
    Else
        level1Text = "1 aû " & HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1 & " epizody"
    End If
    AddCommentToCell legendCell, level1Text

    Set legendCell = targetRange.Offset(10, 4)
    legendCell.Interior.Color = DefinovatBarvu_Core(HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1 + 1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4)
    Dim level2Text As String
    level2Text = (HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1 + 1) & " aû " & HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2 & " epizod"
    AddCommentToCell legendCell, level2Text

    Set legendCell = targetRange.Offset(10, 5)
    legendCell.Interior.Color = DefinovatBarvu_Core(HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2 + 1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4)
    Dim level3Text As String
    level3Text = (HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2 + 1) & " aû " & HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3 & " epizod"
    AddCommentToCell legendCell, level3Text

    Set legendCell = targetRange.Offset(10, 6)
    legendCell.Interior.Color = DefinovatBarvu_Core(HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3 + 1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4)
    Dim level4Text As String
    level4Text = (HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3 + 1) & " aû " & HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4 & " epizod"
    AddCommentToCell legendCell, level4Text
    
    ' === NOVð BLOK PRO 5. BARVU ===
    Set legendCell = targetRange.Offset(10, 7)
    legendCell.Interior.Color = DefinovatBarvu_Core(HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4 + 1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_1, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_2, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_3, HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4)
    Dim level5Text As String
    level5Text = "VÌce neû " & HEATMAP_COLOR_LEVEL_4 & " epizod"
    AddCommentToCell legendCell, level5Text
    ' === KONEC NOV…HO BLOKU ===
    
    targetRange.Offset(10, 8).Value = "VÌce"
    targetRange.Offset(10, 1).Resize(1, 8).Font.size = 8
    
' <<< ⁄PRAVA: St¯ednÏ tlustÈ dolnÌ ohraniËenÌ pro buÚku E48 (Offset 10, 0) >>>
    With targetRange.Offset(10, 0).Borders(xlEdgeBottom)
        .LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .weight = xlMedium ' ZmÏnÏno z xlThick na xlMedium
        .ColorIndex = xlAutomatic
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub AddCommentToCell(ByVal targetCell As Range, ByVal commentText As String)
    On Error Resume Next
    targetCell.Comment.Delete
    On Error GoTo 0
    targetCell.AddComment commentText
    targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = True
End Sub

Private Sub VytvorNeboAktualizujStatistiky_Core(ws As Worksheet, totalEpisodes As Long, totalMinutes As Double, startDate As Date, endDate As Date, ByVal STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE As String, ByVal STATS_HOURS_SHAPE As String)
    Dim totalDays As Long: totalDays = DateDiff("d", startDate, endDate) + 1
    
    Dim avgEpisodes As Double
    If totalDays > 0 Then avgEpisodes = totalEpisodes / totalDays Else avgEpisodes = 0
    
    Dim firstLineEp As String: firstLineEp = "Celkem epizod v obdobÌ:"
    Dim secondLineEp As String: secondLineEp = totalEpisodes & " (" & Application.WorksheetFunction.RoundDown(avgEpisodes, 0) & " EP/den)"
    
    Dim shpEpisodes As Shape
    On Error Resume Next
    Set shpEpisodes = ws.Shapes(STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If shpEpisodes Is Nothing Then
        Set shpEpisodes = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, ws.Range("E36").left, ws.Range("E36").top, 200, 35)
        shpEpisodes.Name = STATS_EPISODES_SHAPE
        shpEpisodes.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
        shpEpisodes.line.Visible = msoFalse
    End If
    
    With shpEpisodes.TextFrame2
        .WordWrap = msoTrue
        .AutoSize = msoAutoSizeNone
        .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
        With .TextRange
            .text = firstLineEp & vbCrLf & secondLineEp
            .Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
            .Font.size = 9
            .Font.Bold = msoFalse
            .Paragraphs(1).ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
            .Paragraphs(2).ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
            .Paragraphs(2).Font.Bold = msoTrue
        End With
    End With
    
    Dim totalHours As Double: totalHours = totalMinutes / 60
    Dim avgHours As Double
    If totalDays > 0 Then avgHours = totalHours / totalDays Else avgHours = 0
    
    Dim totalHoursStr As String: totalHoursStr = Replace(Format(totalHours, "0.0"), ".", ",")
    Dim avgHoursStr As String: avgHoursStr = Replace(Format(avgHours, "0.0"), ".", ",")
    
    Dim firstLineHr As String: firstLineHr = "Celkem hodin v obdobÌ:"
    Dim secondLineHr As String: secondLineHr = totalHoursStr & " (" & avgHoursStr & " h/den)"
    
    Dim shpHours As Shape
    On Error Resume Next
    Set shpHours = ws.Shapes(STATS_HOURS_SHAPE)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If shpHours Is Nothing Then
        Set shpHours = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, ws.Range("AX36").left, ws.Range("AX36").top, 200, 35)
        shpHours.Name = STATS_HOURS_SHAPE
        shpHours.Fill.Visible = msoFalse
        shpHours.line.Visible = msoFalse
    End If
    
    With shpHours.TextFrame2
        .WordWrap = msoTrue
        .AutoSize = msoAutoSizeNone
        .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
        With .TextRange
            .text = firstLineHr & vbCrLf & secondLineHr
            .Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
            .Font.size = 9
            .Font.Bold = msoFalse
            .Paragraphs(1).ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
            .Paragraphs(2).ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
            .Paragraphs(2).Font.Bold = msoTrue
        End With
    End With
End Sub

Private Function ZiskatDataProHeatmapu_Core(ByRef data() As Variant) As Object
    Dim dictTotals As Object
    Set dictTotals = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    If Not IsArrayInitialized(data) Then
        Set ZiskatDataProHeatmapu_Core = Nothing
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To UBound(data, 1)
        Dim currentDate As Date: currentDate = CDate(data(i, 1))
        Dim episodeCount As Long
        Dim minutesForEntry As Double: minutesForEntry = CDbl(data(i, 4))
        
        ' OPTIMALIZACE: Heatmapa Ëte p¯Ìmo ze sloupce 6
        If UBound(data, 2) >= 6 Then
            episodeCount = CLng(data(i, 6))
        Else
            Dim episodeString As String: episodeString = data(i, 3)
            episodeCount = ParseEpisodeCount(episodeString)
        End If
        
        If dictTotals.Exists(currentDate) Then
            dictTotals(currentDate)("Episodes") = dictTotals(currentDate)("Episodes") + episodeCount
            dictTotals(currentDate)("Minutes") = dictTotals(currentDate)("Minutes") + minutesForEntry
        Else
            Dim dayData As Object
            Set dayData = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
            dayData.Add "Episodes", episodeCount
            dayData.Add "Minutes", minutesForEntry
            
            dictTotals.Add currentDate, dayData
        End If
    Next i
    
    Set ZiskatDataProHeatmapu_Core = dictTotals
End Function

Private Function DefinovatBarvu_Core(pocetEpizod As Long, ByVal L1 As Integer, ByVal L2 As Integer, ByVal l3 As Integer, ByVal l4 As Integer) As Long
    Select Case pocetEpizod
        Case 0:
            DefinovatBarvu_Core = RGB(235, 237, 240) ' äed·
        Case 1 To L1:
            DefinovatBarvu_Core = RGB(155, 233, 168) ' Level 1
        Case (L1 + 1) To L2:
            DefinovatBarvu_Core = RGB(64, 196, 99)   ' Level 2
        Case (L2 + 1) To l3:
            DefinovatBarvu_Core = RGB(48, 161, 78)   ' Level 3
        Case (l3 + 1) To l4:
            DefinovatBarvu_Core = RGB(33, 110, 57)   ' Level 4 (p˘vodnÌ nejtmavöÌ)
        Case Is > l4:
            DefinovatBarvu_Core = RGB(25, 80, 45)    ' Level 5 (nov· nejtmavöÌ)
        Case Else:
            DefinovatBarvu_Core = RGB(235, 237, 240)
    End Select
End Function


--- KONEC K”DU [Table_History_Log] ---

Modul: Graphs_Ratings_Interactive
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Graphs_Ratings_Interactive] ---
Option Explicit

' =================================================================================================
' === MODUL PRO AKTUALIZACI DAT (FIN¡LNÕ, ROBUSTNÕ VERZE S POUéITÕM TABULKY)
' =================================================================================================

'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' PROCEDURA PRO VYTVOÿENÕ AKTUALIZA»NÕHO TLA»ÕTKA
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Public Sub VytvorTlacitkoAktualizace()
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim rng As Range
    Dim btn As Shape
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Set rng = ws.Range("BE1")
    
    rng.ColumnWidth = 28
    rng.RowHeight = 24.75
    
    On Error Resume Next
        ws.Shapes("btnAktualizaceGrafuAnalyzy").Delete
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = "btnAktualizaceGrafuAnalyzy"
        .OnAction = "AktualizovatDataProGraf"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
        With .line
            .Visible = msoTrue
            .weight = 1.5
            .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        End With
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat Anime data"
            With .TextRange.Font
                .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True
            End With
            With .TextRange.Font.Fill
                .Visible = msoTrue
                .Solid
                .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
        End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
    End With
    
    MsgBox "TlaËÌtko pro aktualizaci dat bylo vytvo¯eno v buÚce BE1.", vbInformation
    Exit Sub
    
ErrBtn:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i vytv·¯enÌ tlaËÌtka: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' HLAVNÕ PROCEDURA PRO AKTUALIZACI DAT (FIN¡LNÕ VERZE S VYUéITÕM POLE)
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Public Sub AktualizovatDataProGraf()
    Dim dataWs As Worksheet, animeListWs As Worksheet
    Dim tbl As ListObject
    Dim pt As PivotTable
    Dim pc As PivotCache
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim animeName As String, commentText As String
    
    ' === PromÏnnÈ pro pole ===
    Dim dataArray() As Variant ' Naöe hlavnÌ datovÈ pole
    Dim arrRow As Long         ' Aktu·lnÌ ¯·dek v poli (mÌsto writeRow)
    Dim estimatedRows As Long
    ' =========================
    
    Const DATA_SHEET_NAME As String = "MAL Cache + Interactive Rating"
    Const ANIME_SHEET_NAME As String = "ANIME LIST"
    Const PIVOT_TABLE_NAME As String = "PivotGrafAnalyza"
    Const TABLE_SOURCE_NAME As String = "ZdrojDatKombinovany"

    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual ' ZastavÌme i v˝poËty
    Application.EnableEvents = False ' ZastavÌme ud·losti
    On Error GoTo CleanExit

    ' === KROK 1: NALEZENÕ LISTŸ ===
    On Error Resume Next
    Set dataWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(DATA_SHEET_NAME)
    Set animeListWs = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ANIME_SHEET_NAME)
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    If dataWs Is Nothing Or animeListWs Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "List '" & DATA_SHEET_NAME & "' nebo '" & ANIME_SHEET_NAME & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If

    ' P¯Ìprava cÌlovÈ tabulky
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbl = dataWs.ListObjects(TABLE_SOURCE_NAME)
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    
    If tbl Is Nothing Then
        ' Tabulka neexistuje -> musÌme vyËistit oblast a p¯ipravit hlaviËky
        dataWs.Range("A:D").ClearContents
        dataWs.Range("A1").Value = "N·zev Anime"
        dataWs.Range("B1").Value = "Typ"
        dataWs.Range("C1").Value = "Poloûka"
        dataWs.Range("D1").Value = "HodnocenÌ"
    Else
        ' Tabulka existuje -> vymaûeme jen data, zachov·me strukturu a vazby na Pivoty
        If Not tbl.DataBodyRange Is Nothing Then
            tbl.DataBodyRange.Delete
        End If
    End If

    ' Zpracov·nÌ dat do pole
    
    ' --- 3a. P¯Ìprava parsovacÌch n·stroj˘ (RegExp) ---
    Dim reCat As Object, reEp As Object
    Set reCat = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    With reCat
        .Global = True
        .IgnoreCase = True
        .Pattern = "([^->]+?)\s*->\s*([\d,./]+)"
    End With
    
    Set reEp = CreateObject("VBScript.RegExp")
    With reEp
        .Global = True
        .IgnoreCase = True
        .Pattern = "EP\s*(\d+)(?:\s*-\s*(\d+))?\s*->\s*([\d,\.]+)"
    End With
    
    ' --- 3b. P¯Ìprava datovÈho pole ---
    lastRow = animeListWs.Cells(animeListWs.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    ' Odhad velikosti pole (50 poloûek na anime)
    estimatedRows = lastRow * 50
    If estimatedRows < 2000 Then estimatedRows = 2000
    
    ' Pole je "p¯eklopenÈ": 4 sloupce (prvnÌ dimenze), N ¯·dk˘ (druh· dimenze)
    ReDim dataArray(1 To 4, 1 To estimatedRows)
    arrRow = 1
    
    ' HlavnÌ smyËka p¯es koment·¯e
    Dim cmt As Comment
    
    For Each cmt In animeListWs.Comments
        ' ZÌsk·me buÚku, ke kterÈ koment·¯ pat¯Ì
        If cmt.Parent.Column = 11 Then ' Sloupec K (Rating)
            i = cmt.Parent.row
            If i > 1 Then ' P¯eskoËÌme hlaviËku
                commentText = cmt.text
                animeName = CStr(animeListWs.Cells(i, "C").Value)
                
                If animeName <> "" Then
                    Call ParseKategorieDoPole(arrRow, dataArray, animeName, commentText, reCat)
                    Call ParseEpizodyDoPole(arrRow, dataArray, animeName, commentText, reEp)
                    Call ParsePoznamkyDoPole(arrRow, dataArray, animeName, commentText)
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next cmt
    

    ' Z·pis dat do listu a aktualizace tabulky
    
    If arrRow > 1 Then
        ReDim Preserve dataArray(1 To 4, 1 To arrRow - 1)
        
        Dim targetRange As Range
        Set targetRange = dataWs.Range("A2").Resize(arrRow - 1, 4)
        
        targetRange.Value = TransposeArray(dataArray)
        
        If tbl Is Nothing Then
            Set tbl = dataWs.ListObjects.Add(xlSrcRange, dataWs.Range("A1").Resize(arrRow, 4), , xlYes)
            tbl.Name = TABLE_SOURCE_NAME
            tbl.TableStyle = "TableStyleMedium9"
            dataWs.Columns("D").NumberFormat = "0.00"
        Else
            ' Pokud existovala, jen se ujistÌme, ûe zahrnuje celou oblast dat
            tbl.Resize dataWs.Range("A1").Resize(arrRow, 4)
        End If
    Else
        MsgBox "Nebyla nalezena û·dn· data pro anal˝zu.", vbInformation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    
    ' ObnovenÌ kontingenËnÌch tabulek
    On Error Resume Next
    Set pt = dataWs.PivotTables(PIVOT_TABLE_NAME)
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    
    If Not pt Is Nothing Then
        ' Pokud tabulka existuje, obnovÌme jejÌ Cache.
        ' TÌm by se mÏly obnovit vöechny ostatnÌ tabulky, kterÈ na tÈto Cache z·visÌ.
        pt.PivotCache.Refresh
    Else
        ' Pokud hlavnÌ pivot neexistuje, zkusÌme najÌt jinÈ
        Dim ptFound As Boolean: ptFound = False
        For Each pt In dataWs.PivotTables
            pt.RefreshTable
            ptFound = True
        Next pt
        
        If Not ptFound Then
             MsgBox "é·dnÈ kontingenËnÌ tabulky nebyly nalezeny.", vbExclamation
        End If
    End If
    

    ' Aktualizace grafu
    ' =========================================================
    Call VytvorGrafAnimeHype
    
CleanExit:
    Set reCat = Nothing
    Set reEp = Nothing
    Erase dataArray
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    
    If err.Number <> 0 Then
        MsgBox "Nastala chyba v 'AktualizovatDataProGraf': " & err.Description, vbCritical
    Else
        'MsgBox "Data byla ˙spÏönÏ aktualizov·na!", vbInformation
    End If
End Sub

'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' PROCEDURA PRO VYTVOÿENÕ GRAFU "ANIME HYPE QUADRANTS" (FIN¡LNÕ VERZE)
' KaûdÈ Anime je vlastnÌ sÈrie -> N·zev se uk·ûe p¯i najetÌ myöÌ
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Public Sub VytvorGrafAnimeHype()
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Dim wsData As Worksheet, wsChart As Worksheet
    Dim tbl As ListObject
    Dim arrData As Variant
    Dim i As Long
    
    ' -- NASTAVENÕ LISTŸ --
    Set wsChart = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("MAL Cache + Interactive Rating")
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbl = wsData.ListObjects("ZdrojDatKombinovany")
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    
    If tbl Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Zdrojov· tabulka nebyla nalezena.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    arrData = tbl.DataBodyRange.Value
    
    ' -- AGREGACE DAT --
    Dim dict As Object
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim animeName As String, itemCat As String
    Dim valRating As Double
    Dim currentStats As Variant
    
    ' Zpracov·nÌ dat
    For i = 1 To UBound(arrData, 1)
        If CStr(arrData(i, 2)) = "Kategorie" Then
            animeName = CStr(arrData(i, 1))
            itemCat = CStr(arrData(i, 3))
            valRating = CDbl(arrData(i, 4))
            
            If Not dict.Exists(animeName) Then
                ' 0=SumX, 1=CntX, 2=SumY, 3=CntY, 4=Enjoyment, 5=SumTotal, 6=CntTotal
                dict.Add animeName, Array(0#, 0, 0#, 0, 0#, 0#, 0)
            End If
            currentStats = dict(animeName)
            
            Select Case itemCat
                Case "Animace", "CGI", "OP", "ED", "OST"
                    currentStats(0) = currentStats(0) + valRating
                    currentStats(1) = currentStats(1) + 1
                Case "Plot", "Pacing", "Story Conclusion", "Emoce", "Originalita"
                    currentStats(2) = currentStats(2) + valRating
                    currentStats(3) = currentStats(3) + 1
                Case "Enjoyment"
                    currentStats(4) = valRating
            End Select
            currentStats(5) = currentStats(5) + valRating
            currentStats(6) = currentStats(6) + 1
            dict(animeName) = currentStats
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dict.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' -- PÿÕPRAVA GRAFU --
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False ' ZrychlenÌ vykreslov·nÌ
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    Dim xMin As Double, xMax As Double, yMin As Double, yMax As Double
    Dim isNew As Boolean
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects("GrafAnimeHype")
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsChart.ChartObjects.Add(50, 500, 600, 450)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafAnimeHype"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        cht.ChartType = xlBubble
        xMin = 5: xMax = 10: yMin = 5: yMax = 10
        
        With cht
            .HasTitle = True
            ' --- ZMÃNA NADPISU ZDE ---
            .ChartTitle.text = "Kvalita (technika vs. hloubka)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 14: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht.Axes(xlCategory): xMin = .MinimumScale: xMax = .MaximumScale: End With
        With cht.Axes(xlValue): yMin = .MinimumScale: yMax = .MaximumScale: End With
        
        ' I u existujÌcÌho grafu aktualizujeme nadpis, kdyby byl star˝
        With cht
            .HasTitle = True
            .ChartTitle.text = "Kvalita (technika vs. hloubka)"
        End With
    End If
    
    ' Smaz·nÌ star˝ch sÈriÌ
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 0
        cht.SeriesCollection(1).Delete
    Loop
    
    ' -- VYTV¡ÿENÕ S…RIÕ (JEDNA S…RIE = JEDNO ANIME) --
    Dim key As Variant
    Dim xVal As Double, yVal As Double, sizeVal As Double, avgTotal As Double
    Dim ser As Series
    
    For Each key In dict.keys
        currentStats = dict(key)
        
        If currentStats(1) > 0 And currentStats(3) > 0 And currentStats(6) > 0 Then
            xVal = currentStats(0) / currentStats(1)
            yVal = currentStats(2) / currentStats(3)
            avgTotal = currentStats(5) / currentStats(6)
            
            ' Mocnina pro zv˝raznÏnÌ rozdÌl˘ velikosti
            sizeVal = avgTotal ^ 6
            
            Set ser = cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            With ser
                .Name = key
                .XValues = Array(xVal)
                .values = Array(yVal)
                .BubbleSizes = Array(sizeVal)
                
                ' Barva
                If currentStats(4) > avgTotal Then
                    ' Modr· (Teal)
                    .Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(23, 169, 192)
                    .Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(10, 80, 90)
                Else
                    ' HnÏd· (Gold)
                    .Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(191, 135, 38)
                    .Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(100, 70, 20)
                End If
                .Format.line.Visible = msoTrue
                .Format.line.weight = 0.5
            End With
        End If
    Next key
    
    ' -- FORM¡TOV¡NÕ --
    cht.HasLegend = False
    
    ' NastavenÌ mÏ¯Ìtka bublin
    On Error Resume Next
    cht.ChartGroups(1).BubbleScale = 15
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    
    ' Osa Y (Hloubka)
    With cht.Axes(xlValue)
        .MinimumScale = yMin: .MaximumScale = yMax
        .HasTitle = True
        .AxisTitle.text = "Hloubka (Plot + Pacing + Story Conclusion + Emoce + Originalita)"
        .AxisTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
        .AxisTitle.Font.Bold = True
        .Crosses = xlAxisCrossesMinimum
    End With
    
    ' Osa X (Technika)
    With cht.Axes(xlCategory)
        .MinimumScale = xMin: .MaximumScale = xMax
        .HasTitle = True
        .AxisTitle.text = "Technick· kvalita (Animace + CGI + OP + ED + OST)"
        .AxisTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow"
        .AxisTitle.Font.Bold = True
        .Crosses = xlAxisCrossesMinimum
    End With

    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    'MsgBox "Graf aktualizov·n! NajeÔ myöÌ na bublinu pro n·zev.", vbInformation
    Exit Sub

ErrHandler:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO ZPRACOV¡NÕ KATEGORIÕ (Z¡PIS DO POLE)
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub ParseKategorieDoPole(ByRef arrRow As Long, ByRef dataArray As Variant, _
                                 ByVal animeName As String, ByVal commentText As String, _
                                 ByVal rE As Object)
    
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Dim startPos As Long, endPos As Long, catBlock As String
    startPos = InStr(1, commentText, "HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:", vbTextCompare)
    
    If startPos > 0 Then
        startPos = startPos + Len("HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:")
        endPos = InStr(startPos, commentText, "Pr˘mÏrnÈ v·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ:", vbTextCompare)
        If endPos = 0 Then endPos = Len(commentText) + 1
        catBlock = Trim(Mid(commentText, startPos, endPos - startPos))
        
        Dim matches As Object, match As Object
        Set matches = rE.Execute(catBlock)

        For Each match In matches
            Dim combinedCategoryNames As String: combinedCategoryNames = Trim(match.SubMatches(0))
            Dim scoreStr As String: scoreStr = Trim(match.SubMatches(1))
            Dim scoreValue As Double, scorePart As String

            On Error Resume Next
            scorePart = Trim(Split(scoreStr, "/")(0))
            scorePart = Replace(scorePart, ",", ".")
            On Error GoTo ErrHandler
            
            
            scoreValue = val(scorePart)
            
            If scoreValue > 0 Then
                
                Dim singleCategories As Variant, singleCat As Variant
                singleCategories = Split(combinedCategoryNames, "/")
                
                For Each singleCat In singleCategories
                    ' Zkontrolujeme, zda m·me v poli mÌsto
                    Call CheckArraySize(arrRow, dataArray)
                    
                    ' Z·pis je "p¯eklopen˝" (SLOUPEC, ÿ¡DEK)
dataArray(1, arrRow) = animeName
dataArray(2, arrRow) = "Kategorie"
dataArray(3, arrRow) = Trim(singleCat)
dataArray(4, arrRow) = scoreValue
                    arrRow = arrRow + 1 ' Posuneme ËÌtaË ¯·dk˘ pole
                Next singleCat
            End If
        Next match
    End If
    
    Exit Sub
    
ErrHandler:
    MsgBox "Chyba v 'ParseKategorieDoPole': " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO ZPRACOV¡NÕ EPIZOD (Z¡PIS DO POLE)
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub ParseEpizodyDoPole(ByRef arrRow As Long, ByRef dataArray As Variant, _
                               ByVal animeName As String, ByVal commentText As String, _
                               ByVal rE As Object)
    
    Dim epNum As Long, epStart As Long, epEnd As Long, ratingValue As Double
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    
    Dim startPos As Long, endPos As Long, block As String
    startPos = InStr(1, commentText, "HodnocenÌ epizod:", vbTextCompare)
    
    If startPos > 0 Then
        startPos = startPos + Len("HodnocenÌ epizod:")
        endPos = InStr(startPos, commentText, "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ epizod:", vbTextCompare)
        If endPos = 0 Then endPos = Len(commentText) + 1
        block = Trim(Mid(commentText, startPos, endPos - startPos))

        If rE.Test(block) Then
            Dim matches As Object, match As Object
            Set matches = rE.Execute(block)

            For Each match In matches
                epStart = CLng(match.SubMatches(0))
                If match.SubMatches(1) <> "" Then epEnd = CLng(match.SubMatches(1)) Else epEnd = epStart

                Dim ratingRaw As String
                ratingRaw = match.SubMatches(2)
                ratingRaw = Replace(ratingRaw, ",", ".")
                ratingValue = val(ratingRaw)

                If ratingValue <= 0 Or ratingValue > 10 Then GoTo SkipMatch

                For epNum = epStart To epEnd
                    ' Zkontrolujeme, zda m·me v poli mÌsto
                    Call CheckArraySize(arrRow, dataArray)
                    
                    ' Z·pis je "p¯eklopen˝" (SLOUPEC, ÿ¡DEK)
dataArray(1, arrRow) = animeName
dataArray(2, arrRow) = "Epizoda"
dataArray(3, arrRow) = "EP " & epNum
dataArray(4, arrRow) = ratingValue
                    arrRow = arrRow + 1 ' Posuneme ËÌtaË ¯·dk˘ pole
                Next epNum
SkipMatch:
            Next match
        End If
    End If
    
    Exit Sub
    
ErrHandler:
    MsgBox "P¯i parsov·nÌ hodnocenÌ epizod nastala chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO ZPRACOV¡NÕ POZN¡MEK (Z¡PIS DO POLE)
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub ParsePoznamkyDoPole(ByRef arrRow As Long, ByRef dataArray As Variant, _
                                ByVal animeName As String, ByVal commentText As String)
    
    Dim noteText As String
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    
    Dim startPos As Long, endPos As Long, endPos1 As Long, endPos2 As Long
    startPos = InStr(1, commentText, "Pozn·mky:", vbTextCompare)
    
    If startPos > 0 Then
        startPos = startPos + Len("Pozn·mky:")
        endPos1 = InStr(startPos, commentText, "HodnocenÌ epizod:", vbTextCompare)
        endPos2 = InStr(startPos, commentText, "HodnocenÌ kategoriÌ:", vbTextCompare)

' Najdeme nejbliûöÌ n·sledujÌcÌ sekci
        If endPos1 > 0 And endPos2 > 0 Then
            ' ObÏ sekce existujÌ, vezmeme tu bliûöÌ
            If endPos1 < endPos2 Then
                endPos = endPos1
            Else
                endPos = endPos2
            End If
        ElseIf endPos1 > 0 Then
            ' Existuje jen sekce Epizod
            endPos = endPos1
        ElseIf endPos2 > 0 Then
            ' Existuje jen sekce KategoriÌ
            endPos = endPos2
        Else
            ' é·dn· dalöÌ sekce neexistuje
            endPos = 0
        End If

        If endPos > startPos Then
            noteText = Trim(Mid(commentText, startPos, endPos - startPos))
        Else
            noteText = Trim(Mid(commentText, startPos))
        End If
        
        If Trim(noteText) <> "" Then
            ' Zkontrolujeme, zda m·me v poli mÌsto
            Call CheckArraySize(arrRow, dataArray)
            
            ' Z·pis je "p¯eklopen˝" (SLOUPEC, ÿ¡DEK)
dataArray(1, arrRow) = animeName
dataArray(2, arrRow) = "Pozn·mka"
dataArray(3, arrRow) = noteText
dataArray(4, arrRow) = vbNullString
            arrRow = arrRow + 1 ' Posuneme ËÌtaË ¯·dk˘ pole
        End If
    End If
    
    Exit Sub

ErrHandler:
    MsgBox "Nastala chyba v procedu¯e ParsePoznamkyDoPole: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub



'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' POMOCN¡ PROCEDURA PRO DYNAMICK… ZVÃTäOV¡NÕ POLE
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Private Sub CheckArraySize(ByVal arrRow As Long, ByRef dataArray As Variant, Optional ByVal Increment As Long = 10000)
    If arrRow > UBound(dataArray, 2) Then
        ReDim Preserve dataArray(1 To 4, 1 To UBound(dataArray, 2) + Increment)
    End If
End Sub

'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
' VLASTNÕ FUNKCE PRO TRANSPOZICI POLE (obch·zÌ limit 255 znak˘)
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Private Function TransposeArray(ByVal arr As Variant) As Variant
    Dim lbound1 As Long, ubound1 As Long
    Dim lbound2 As Long, ubound2 As Long
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    Dim transposedArr As Variant
    
    ' ZjistÌme rozmÏry p˘vodnÌho pole
    lbound1 = LBound(arr, 1)
    ubound1 = UBound(arr, 1)
    lbound2 = LBound(arr, 2)
    ubound2 = UBound(arr, 2)
    
    ' Vytvo¯Ìme novÈ pole s prohozen˝mi dimenzemi
    ReDim transposedArr(lbound2 To ubound2, lbound1 To ubound1)
    
    ' Projdeme a prohodÌme ¯·dky/sloupce
    For i = lbound1 To ubound1
        For j = lbound2 To ubound2
            transposedArr(j, i) = arr(i, j)
        Next j
    Next i
    
    ' Vr·tÌme novÈ, prohozenÈ pole
    TransposeArray = transposedArr
End Function

--- KONEC K”DU [Graphs_Ratings_Interactive] ---

Modul: LIST_Downloaded_Anime_Lenght
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [LIST_Downloaded_Anime_Lenght] ---
Option Explicit

' ===================================================================
' === KONSTANTY Z OBOU MODULŸ ===
' ===================================================================

' --- Konstanty z modulu pro v˝poËet pr˘mÏru ---
Private Const SW_HIDE As Long = 0
Private Const TEMP_FILE_NAME As String = "mediainfo_temp.txt"

' --- Konstanty z modulu pro anal˝zu sloûek ---
Private Const ROOT_FOLDER_PATH As String = "C:\Users\macou\Desktop\Anime watching or planned to watch"
Private Const TARGET_SHEET_NAME As String = "ANIME LIST"
Private Const COLOR_SUMMARY As Long = &HDD9EED
Private Const COLOR_FOLDER_NAME As Long = 49407
Private Const COLOR_DEFAULT As Long = vbWhite

' ===================================================================
' === PROCEDURA PRO VðPO»ET PRŸMÃRN… D…LKY (PŸVODNÃ MODUL 1) ===
' ===================================================================

Public Sub SpocitejPrumer_FinalniReseni_V2()
    Dim fileDialog As fileDialog
    Dim selectedFile As Variant
    Dim totalMilliseconds As Double
    Dim fileCount As Long
    Dim fso As Object
    Dim mediaInfoPath As String
    Dim tempFilePath As String
    
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    
    ' Krok 1: NajÌt MediaInfo.exe
    mediaInfoPath = "C:\Users\macou\OneDrive - äKODA AUTO VYSOK¡ äKOLA o.p.s\OsobnÌ PC\Excel Projekt - nemazat\Anime_List\MediaInfo.exe"
    
    If Not fso.FileExists(mediaInfoPath) Then
        ' Pokud nenÌ nalezen vedle seöitu, zept·me se uûivatele
        MsgBox "Soubor 'MediaInfo.exe' nebyl nalezen vedle seöitu." & vbCrLf & _
               "ProsÌm, v dalöÌm oknÏ ho najdÏte ruËnÏ.", vbInformation, "NajÌt n·stroj"
        
        Set fileDialog = Application.fileDialog(3) ' msoFileDialogFilePicker
        With fileDialog
            .title = "NajdÏte soubor MediaInfo.exe"
            .AllowMultiSelect = False
            .Filters.Clear
            .Filters.Add "Aplikace", "*.exe"
            
            If .Show = -1 Then
                mediaInfoPath = .SelectedItems(1)
                If LCase(fso.GetFileName(mediaInfoPath)) <> "mediainfo.exe" Then
                    MsgBox "Nebyl vybr·n soubor 'MediaInfo.exe'. Akce zruöena.", vbExclamation
                    Exit Sub
                End If
            Else
                Exit Sub ' Uûivatel zruöil v˝bÏr
            End If
        End With
    End If
    
    tempFilePath = fso.GetParentFolderName(mediaInfoPath) & "\" & TEMP_FILE_NAME
    
    ' Krok 2: V˝bÏr .mkv soubor˘
    Set fileDialog = Application.fileDialog(3)
    With fileDialog
        .title = "Vyberte .mkv soubory pro v˝poËet (Ctrl+A pro vöechny)"
        .AllowMultiSelect = True
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "MKV Soubory", "*.mkv"
        
        If .Show = -1 Then
            totalMilliseconds = 0
            fileCount = 0
            
            For Each selectedFile In .SelectedItems
                Dim commandParams As String
                commandParams = "--Output=""General;%Duration%"" """ & selectedFile & """ > """ & tempFilePath & """"
                
                Dim process As Object
                Set process = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
                process.Run "cmd /c """"" & mediaInfoPath & """ " & commandParams & """", SW_HIDE, True
                
                If fso.FileExists(tempFilePath) Then
                    Dim fileStream As Object, durationStr As String
                    Set fileStream = fso.OpenTextFile(tempFilePath, 1) ' ForReading
                    If Not fileStream.AtEndOfStream Then
                        durationStr = fileStream.ReadAll
                    End If
                    fileStream.Close
                    
                    If IsNumeric(durationStr) Then
                        totalMilliseconds = totalMilliseconds + CDbl(durationStr)
                        fileCount = fileCount + 1
                    End If
                    
                    fso.DeleteFile tempFilePath
                End If
            Next selectedFile
        Else
            Exit Sub
        End If
    End With
    
    ' Krok 3: ZobrazenÌ v˝sledku
    If fileCount > 0 Then
        Dim averageMinutes As Double
        averageMinutes = (totalMilliseconds / 1000) / 60 / fileCount
        
        Dim formattedResult As String
        formattedResult = Replace(Format(averageMinutes, "0.000"), ".", ",")
        
        MsgBox "Zpracov·no soubor˘: " & fileCount & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "Pr˘mÏrn· dÈlka epizody je: " & formattedResult & " min", vbInformation, "V˝poËet dokonËen"
    Else
        MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se zpracovat û·dn˝ z vybran˝ch soubor˘.", vbExclamation, "Nezpracov·no"
    End If
End Sub

' ===================================================================
' === PROCEDURY PRO ANALðZU SLOéEK (PŸVODNÃ MODUL 2) ===
' ===================================================================

Public Sub VypisStazeneAnimeDoPole_Final()
    ' --- Deklarace promÏnn˝ch ---
    Dim fso As Object, rootFolder As Object, subFolder As Object
    Dim outputBox As Shape, targetSheet As Worksheet, tr As Object
    Dim totalSizeAllFolders As Double, totalFilesAllFolders As Long
    Dim folderInfo As Collection
    Dim results As Variant, folderData As Variant
    
    ' --- Inicializace a kontroly ---
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    If Not fso.FolderExists(ROOT_FOLDER_PATH) Then
        MsgBox "Sloûka nenalezena: " & ROOT_FOLDER_PATH, vbCritical, "Chyba"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set targetSheet = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(TARGET_SHEET_NAME)
    Set outputBox = targetSheet.Shapes("StazeneAnime")
    On Error GoTo 0
    If targetSheet Is Nothing Or outputBox Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "List '" & TARGET_SHEET_NAME & "' nebo textovÈ pole 'StazeneAnime' nebylo nalezeno.", vbCritical, "Chyba"
        Exit Sub
    End If

    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    ' --- Krok 1: SbÏr vöech dat ---
    Set folderInfo = New Collection
    totalSizeAllFolders = 0
    totalFilesAllFolders = 0
    
    Set rootFolder = fso.GetFolder(ROOT_FOLDER_PATH)
    For Each subFolder In rootFolder.SubFolders
        results = GetFolderStats(subFolder.path, fso) ' <-- P¯idali jsme fso jako parametr
        folderInfo.Add Array(subFolder.Name, subFolder.SubFolders.count, results(1))
        totalSizeAllFolders = totalSizeAllFolders + results(0)
        totalFilesAllFolders = totalFilesAllFolders + results(1)
    Next subFolder
    
    ' --- Krok 2: Inkrement·lnÌ z·pis a form·tov·nÌ textu ---
    outputBox.TextFrame2.TextRange.text = ""
    Set tr = outputBox.TextFrame2.TextRange

    ' -- Z·pis souhrnnÈho ¯·dku --
    Dim summaryPart As String
    summaryPart = Format(totalSizeAllFolders / (1024 ^ 3), "0.0") & " GB, " & GetCzechPluralEPs(totalFilesAllFolders)
    
    With tr.InsertAfter("StaûenÈ Anime: ")
        .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = COLOR_DEFAULT
    End With
    With tr.InsertAfter(summaryPart)
        .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = COLOR_SUMMARY
    End With

    ' -- Z·pis jednotliv˝ch sloûek --
    For Each folderData In folderInfo
        Dim folderNamePart As String, subfolderCount As Long, fileCount As Long
        Dim dilyText As String, lineSuffix As String
        
        folderNamePart = folderData(0)
        subfolderCount = folderData(1)
        fileCount = folderData(2)
        
        ' *** NOV¡ LOGIKA PRO "DÕLY" A SESTAVENÕ KONCOVKY ***
        If subfolderCount = 0 And fileCount > 0 Then
            dilyText = "1 dÌl" ' Speci·lnÌ p¯Ìpad: û·dnÈ podsloûky, ale soubory existujÌ
        Else
            dilyText = GetCzechPluralDily(subfolderCount)
        End If
        
        ' SestavenÌ koncovky na z·kladÏ toho, zda se jedn· o "1 dÌl"
        If dilyText = "1 dÌl" Then
            ' Pokud je v˝sledek "1 dÌl", zobrazÌme jen poËet epizod
            lineSuffix = " (" & GetCzechPluralEPs(fileCount) & ")"
        Else
            ' V ostatnÌch p¯Ìpadech zobrazÌme dÌly i epizody
            lineSuffix = " (" & dilyText & ", " & GetCzechPluralEPs(fileCount) & ")"
        End If
        
        ' VloûenÌ a obarvenÌ textu po Ë·stech pro p¯esnou kontrolu
        With tr.InsertAfter(vbCrLf & "- ")
            .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = COLOR_DEFAULT
        End With
        With tr.InsertAfter(folderNamePart)
            .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = COLOR_FOLDER_NAME
        End With
        With tr.InsertAfter(lineSuffix)
            .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = COLOR_DEFAULT
        End With
    Next folderData

    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    'MsgBox "Anal˝za byla dokonËena a data byla zaps·na a obarvena.", vbInformation, "Hotovo"
End Sub

' ===================================================================
' === PomocnÈ funkce pro skloÚov·nÌ a rekurzivnÌ anal˝zu ===
' ===================================================================

Private Function GetCzechPluralDily(ByVal count As Long) As String
    Select Case count
        Case 1
            GetCzechPluralDily = "1 dÌl"
        Case 2 To 4
            GetCzechPluralDily = count & " dÌly"
        Case Else ' Zahrnuje 0 a 5 a vÌce
            GetCzechPluralDily = count & " dÌl˘"
    End Select
End Function

Private Function GetCzechPluralEPs(ByVal count As Long) As String
    If count = 1 Then
        GetCzechPluralEPs = "1 EP"
    Else
        GetCzechPluralEPs = count & " EPs"
    End If
End Function

Private Function GetFolderStats(ByVal sPath As String, fso As Object) As Variant
    ' --- DEKLARACE ---
    Dim totalSize As Double
    Dim fileCount As Long
    Dim currentFolder As Object, subFolder As Object, file As Object
    Dim subFolderStats As Variant
    
    ' --- Inicializace ---
    totalSize = 0
    fileCount = 0
    
    On Error Resume Next ' Ignoruje chyby, nap¯. p¯i nedostatku opr·vnÏnÌ ke sloûce
    Set currentFolder = fso.GetFolder(sPath)
    If err.Number <> 0 Then
        ' Pokud nelze p¯istoupit ke sloûce, vr·tÌme nuly
        GetFolderStats = Array(0, 0)
        Exit Function
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0

    ' --- Zpracov·nÌ soubor˘ v aktu·lnÌ sloûce ---
    For Each file In currentFolder.Files
        totalSize = totalSize + file.size ' Celkov· velikost se st·le poËÌt· ze VäECH soubor˘

        ' Zv˝öÌme poËet "epizod" jen pokud m· soubor koncovku .mkv
        If LCase(fso.GetExtensionName(file.Name)) = "mkv" Then
            fileCount = fileCount + 1
        End If
    Next file
    
    ' --- RekurzivnÌ vol·nÌ pro vöechny podsloûky ---
    For Each subFolder In currentFolder.SubFolders
        subFolderStats = GetFolderStats(subFolder.path, fso) ' RekurzivnÌ vol·nÌ
        totalSize = totalSize + subFolderStats(0)
        fileCount = fileCount + subFolderStats(1)
    Next subFolder
    
    GetFolderStats = Array(totalSize, fileCount)
End Function



--- KONEC K”DU [LIST_Downloaded_Anime_Lenght] ---

Modul: OneDrive_YT_Pomocnik
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [OneDrive_YT_Pomocnik] ---
Option Explicit

'====================================================================================================
' MODUL: Poloautomatick˝ pomocnÌk pro hled·nÌ odkaz˘ (YouTube + OneDrive Smart)
' Popis: Makro identifikuje pÌsniËky bez odkazu, se¯adÌ je podle n·zvu Anime (sloupec I)
'        a umoûÚuje vloûit buÔ p¯Ìm˝ OneDrive odkaz (kter˝ automaticky upravÌ),
'        nebo vyhledat video na YouTube.
' Autor: Gemini
' Verze: 1.5 (Integrace Smart OneDrive logiky + oprava sloupc˘ po posunu)
'====================================================================================================

Public Sub ZpracujYouTubeFrontu()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim radek As Long, i As Long, j As Long
    Dim posledniRadek As Long
    ' Pole ukl·d·: 1=N·zev Anime (I), 2=N·zev PÌsniËky (K), 3=»Ìslo ¯·dku
    Dim frontaArr() As Variant
    Dim pocetChybicich As Long
    Dim bunka As Range, bunkaTypu As Range
    
    Dim animeNazev As String, typVidea As String, nazevPisnicky As String, nazevAutora As String
    Dim dotaz As String, youtubeURL As String, vlozenyOdkaz As String
    Dim formulaText As String
    Dim odpoved As VbMsgBoxResult

    ' --- Krok 1: NastavenÌ a p¯Ìprava ---
    On Error GoTo ChybaProcedury
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME FAV OP + ED + OST")
    
    ' --- Krok 2: SestavenÌ fronty ---
    ' Hled·me poslednÌ ¯·dek ve sloupci K (PÌsniËky)
    posledniRadek = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "K").End(xlUp).row
    pocetChybicich = 0
    
    ' SpoËÌt·me chybÏjÌcÌ
    For radek = 2 To posledniRadek
        If Not ws.Cells(radek, "K").Formula Like "=*HYPERLINK(*" And Not ws.Cells(radek, "K").Formula Like "=*HYPERTEXTOVð.ODKAZ(*" Then
            If ws.Cells(radek, "K").Value <> "" Then
                pocetChybicich = pocetChybicich + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next radek
    
    If pocetChybicich = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Vöechny pÌsniËky jiû majÌ p¯i¯azen˝ odkaz. NenÌ co zpracov·vat.", vbInformation, "Hotovo"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ReDim frontaArr(1 To pocetChybicich, 1 To 3)
    
    j = 1
    For radek = 2 To posledniRadek
        If Not ws.Cells(radek, "K").Formula Like "=*HYPERLINK(*" And Not ws.Cells(radek, "K").Formula Like "=*HYPERTEXTOVð.ODKAZ(*" Then
            If ws.Cells(radek, "K").Value <> "" Then
                ' Sloupec I = N·zev Anime (pro t¯ÌdÏnÌ)
                frontaArr(j, 1) = ws.Cells(radek, "I").Value
                ' Sloupec K = N·zev PÌsniËky
                frontaArr(j, 2) = ws.Cells(radek, "K").Value
                ' »Ìslo ¯·dku
                frontaArr(j, 3) = radek
                j = j + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next radek

    ' --- T¯ÌdÏnÌ pole podle N·zvu Anime (Bubble Sort) ---
    Dim tempAnime As String, tempSong As String, tempRow As Long
    For i = 1 To pocetChybicich - 1
        For j = i + 1 To pocetChybicich
            If UCase(frontaArr(i, 1)) > UCase(frontaArr(j, 1)) Then
                tempAnime = frontaArr(j, 1): frontaArr(j, 1) = frontaArr(i, 1): frontaArr(i, 1) = tempAnime
                tempSong = frontaArr(j, 2): frontaArr(j, 2) = frontaArr(i, 2): frontaArr(i, 2) = tempSong
                tempRow = frontaArr(j, 3): frontaArr(j, 3) = frontaArr(i, 3): frontaArr(i, 3) = tempRow
            End If
        Next j
    Next i

    ' --- Krok 3: ⁄vodnÌ dialog ---
    odpoved = MsgBox("Nalezeno " & pocetChybicich & " OP/ED bez odkazu." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                     "Fronta je se¯azena podle N¡ZVU ANIME (A-Z)." & vbCrLf & _
                     "Chcete pokraËovat?", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "Start")
    If odpoved = vbNo Then Exit Sub
    
    ' --- Krok 4: HlavnÌ smyËka ---
    For i = 1 To pocetChybicich
        radek = frontaArr(i, 3)
        Set bunka = ws.Cells(radek, "K") ' PÌsniËka je v K
        
        animeNazev = ws.Cells(radek, "I").Value   ' Anime je v I
        nazevPisnicky = bunka.Value
        nazevAutora = ws.Cells(radek, "L").Value  ' Autor je v L
        
        ' --- »tenÌ TYPU videa (P¯edpoklad: Sloupec J, mezi I a K) ---
        ' P˘vodnÏ C, posun +7 -> J. Pokud to nesedÌ, zmÏÚ "J" nÌûe.
        Set bunkaTypu = ws.Cells(radek, "J")
        
        If Not bunkaTypu.Comment Is Nothing Then
            Dim commentText As String
            commentText = bunkaTypu.Comment.text
            Dim poziceZalomeni As Long
            poziceZalomeni = InStr(commentText, vbLf)
            If poziceZalomeni > 0 Then
                typVidea = Trim(Mid(commentText, poziceZalomeni + 1))
            Else
                typVidea = commentText
            End If
        Else
            typVidea = bunkaTypu.Value
        End If
        
        ' 1. KROK: DOTAZ NA ONEDRIVE
        vlozenyOdkaz = InputBox("Zpracov·v· se: " & animeNazev & vbCrLf & _
                                "Skladba: " & nazevPisnicky & " (" & typVidea & ")" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                                "M·ö p¯Ìm˝ odkaz na OneDrive/SharePoint?" & vbCrLf & _
                                ">>> Pokud NE, nechte pr·zdnÈ a stisknÏte ENTER (otev¯e se YouTube).", _
                                "Zdroj odkazu (" & (pocetChybicich - i + 1) & " zb˝v·)")

        ' 2. KROK: LOGIKA ODKAZU
        If vlozenyOdkaz <> "" Then
            ' --- A) Zpracov·nÌ OneDrive odkazu (Smart Logic) ---
            Dim rawUrl As String
            Dim parts() As String
            Dim basePart As String
            Dim eToken As String
            Dim paramArr() As String
            Dim pIter As Variant
            
            rawUrl = vlozenyOdkaz
            eToken = ""
            
            ' RozdÏlenÌ na z·klad a parametry
            parts = Split(rawUrl, "?")
            basePart = parts(0)
            
            ' Hled·nÌ tokenu "e=" v parametrech
            If UBound(parts) > 0 Then
                paramArr = Split(parts(1), "&")
                For Each pIter In paramArr
                    If left(pIter, 2) = "e=" Then
                        eToken = pIter
                        Exit For
                    End If
                Next pIter
            End If
            
            ' SestavenÌ fin·lnÌho linku
            If eToken <> "" Then
                ' Pouze z·kladnÌ URL + token (bez download=1)
                vlozenyOdkaz = basePart & "?" & eToken
            Else
                ' Pouze z·kladnÌ URL (bez download=1)
                vlozenyOdkaz = basePart
            End If
            
        Else
            ' --- B) YouTube vyhled·v·nÌ (pokud byl InputBox pr·zdn˝) ---
            dotaz = Replace(animeNazev & " " & typVidea & " " & nazevPisnicky & " " & nazevAutora, " ", "+")
            youtubeURL = "https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=" & dotaz & "&sp=EgIYAToAMAE%3D"
            ThisWorkbook.FollowHyperlink Address:=youtubeURL
            
            vlozenyOdkaz = InputBox("YouTube hled·nÌ pro: " & nazevPisnicky & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                                    "1. ZkopÌrujte URL videa." & vbCrLf & _
                                    "2. Vloûte sem:", "Vloûit YouTube odkaz")
        End If

        ' 3. KROK: Z¡PIS DO BU“KY
        If vlozenyOdkaz <> "" Then
            formulaText = "=HYPERLINK(""" & vlozenyOdkaz & """,""" & Replace(nazevPisnicky, """", "''") & """)"
            bunka.Formula = formulaText
            
            With bunka
                .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Color = vbBlack: .Font.size = 11: .Font.Italic = True
                .Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleNone
                .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
            End With
        End If
        
        If (pocetChybicich - i) > 0 Then
            odpoved = MsgBox("Zb˝v· " & (pocetChybicich - i) & " odkaz˘." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & "PokraËovat?", _
                             vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "DalöÌ?")
            If odpoved = vbNo Then Exit For
        End If
    Next i
    
    MsgBox "Hotovo.", vbInformation, "Konec"

Konec:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Exit Sub
ChybaProcedury:
    MsgBox "Chyba: " & vbCrLf & err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume Konec
End Sub





--- KONEC K”DU [OneDrive_YT_Pomocnik] ---

Modul: Table_Anime_Recommendations
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Table_Anime_Recommendations] ---

    Public Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As LongPtr)

    Public Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As Long)
#End If

' ===================================================================================
' == ANILIST CUSTOM TAGS ADDON ==
' ===================================================================================
Const ENABLE_ANILIST_TAGS As Boolean = True
Const ANILIST_API_URL As String = "https://graphql.anilist.co"
Const ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS As Boolean = False
Const ANILIST_MIN_RANK As Long = 30
' ===================================================================================

' --- GLOB¡LNÕ NASTAVENÕ A KONSTANTY ---
Const HELPER_SHEET_NAME As String = "MAL Cache + Interactive Rating"
' Velikost obr·zk˘ v pixelech
Const IMG_HEIGHT_PX As Long = 142
Const IMG_WIDTH_PX As Long = 101
' Velikost bunÏk v pixelech
Const ROW_HEIGHT_PX As Long = 144
Const COLUMN_B_WIDTH_PX As Long = 103
Const MAX_RECS_TO_DISPLAY As Long = 16

' === KONSTANTY PRO ÿÕZENÕ API LIMITŸ ===
Const USE_ADAPTIVE_DELAY As Boolean = True
Const API_DELAY_MS As Long = 366
Const INITIAL_DELAY_MS As Long = 100
Const RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS As Long = 388
Const MAX_RETRIES As Long = 3

' === KONSTANTY PRO VðPO»ET RELEVANCE ===
Const RELEVANCE_W_IN_PLAN As Long = 8
Const RELEVANCE_W_MAL_SCORE As Long = 20
Const RELEVANCE_W_GENRE_THEME As Long = 16
Const RELEVANCE_W_LENGTH As Long = 8
Const RELEVANCE_W_POPULARITY As Long = 8
Const RELEVANCE_W_VOTES As Long = 50

' -- NastavenÌ pro dÈlku anime --
Const IDEAL_EPISODES As Long = 13
Const IDEAL_DURATION_MIN As Long = 24
Const MAX_PENALTY_RANGE_MIN As Long = 480

' -- PrahovÈ hodnoty --
Const THRESHOLD_HIGH As Long = 75
Const THRESHOLD_MEDIUM As Long = 45

' -- NastavenÌ pro popularitu --
Const POP_TIER1_ULTRA As Long = 50000
Const POP_TIER2_HIDDEN As Long = 100000
Const POP_TIER3_NORMAL As Long = 500000
Const POP_TIER4_KNOWN As Long = 1000000

' -- NastavenÌ pro poËet hlas˘ --
Const MAX_VOTES_FOR_SCORE As Long = 120
Const MIN_SCORE_FOR_POP_BONUS As Double = 6.5

' ===================================================================================
' == HTTP SINGLETON & OPTIMALIZACE ==
' ===================================================================================
Private m_HttpReq As Object ' Zde se uloûÌ instance pro opakovanÈ pouûitÌ

' Funkce, kter· vr·tÌ existujÌcÌ instanci, nebo vytvo¯Ì novou (Lazy Loading)
Private Function GetHttpObject() As Object
    If m_HttpReq Is Nothing Then
        Set m_HttpReq = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    End If
    Set GetHttpObject = m_HttpReq
End Function

' Procedura pro vyËiötÏnÌ pamÏti po dokonËenÌ
Private Sub CleanUpHttpObject()
    Set m_HttpReq = Nothing
End Sub
' ===================================================================================

' ===================================================================================
' == HLAVNÕ MAKRA ==
' ===================================================================================

' MAKRO 1: Aktualizuje a form·tuje seznam pro dropdown v˝bÏr
Public Sub UpdateAnimeListDropdownSource()
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet, wsHelper As Worksheet, wsTarget As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long, itemCount As Long
    Dim dataArray As Variant
    Dim oversizedList() As Variant

    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsSource = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    If wsSource Is Nothing Then MsgBox "Zdrojov˝ list 'ANIME LIST' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    Set wsHelper = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(HELPER_SHEET_NAME)
    If wsHelper Is Nothing Then MsgBox "V·ö skryt˝ list '" & HELPER_SHEET_NAME & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DOPORU»ENÕ, CO SLEDOVAT")
    If wsTarget Is Nothing Then MsgBox "CÌlov˝ list 'DOPORU»ENÕ, CO SLEDOVAT' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    On Error GoTo 0

    ' === OPRAVA CHYBY 50290 ===
    ' Pouûijeme On Error Resume Next, protoûe pokud je aktivnÌ okno VBA editoru,
    ' p¯Ìkaz ScreenUpdating m˘ûe selhat. To niËemu nevadÌ, makro m˘ûe pokraËovat.
    On Error Resume Next
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    On Error GoTo 0
    ' ==========================
    
    Application.Cursor = xlWait

    lastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow <= 1 Then GoTo Cleanup
    
    dataArray = wsSource.Range("C1:O" & lastRow).Value
    ReDim oversizedList(1 To lastRow - 1, 1 To 3)
    itemCount = 0
    
    ' Optimalizace: Vytv·¯Ìme ArrayList pouze jednou mimo cyklus
    Dim parts As Object: Set parts = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")

    For i = 2 To lastRow
        parts.Clear ' Recyklujeme objekt mÌsto vytv·¯enÌ novÈho
        Dim sortableDate As String, malID As Long
        
        malID = 0
        On Error Resume Next
        If wsSource.Cells(i, "C").Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
            Dim urlParts() As String
            urlParts = Split(wsSource.Cells(i, "C").Hyperlinks(1).Address, "/")
            If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then malID = CLng(urlParts(4))
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0
        
        If malID > 0 Then
            itemCount = itemCount + 1
            
            Dim timeFormatted As String
            If IsNumeric(dataArray(i, 13)) And dataArray(i, 13) > 0 Then
                timeFormatted = "DÈlka: " & Round(CDbl(dataArray(i, 13)), 0) & " min (" & Format(Round(CDbl(dataArray(i, 13)) / 60, 1), "0.0") & " h)"
            Else
                timeFormatted = "DÈlka: N/A"
            End If
            
            parts.Add dataArray(i, 1) ' N·zev
            parts.Add "FH: " & dataArray(i, 9) & "/10"
            
            ' Filtrov·nÌ "X"
            Dim valTheme As String
            If Not IsEmpty(dataArray(i, 5)) Then
                valTheme = Trim(CStr(dataArray(i, 5)))
                If valTheme <> "" And UCase(valTheme) <> "X" Then parts.Add valTheme
            End If

            Dim valGenre As String
            If Not IsEmpty(dataArray(i, 6)) Then
                valGenre = Trim(CStr(dataArray(i, 6)))
                If valGenre <> "" And UCase(valGenre) <> "X" Then parts.Add valGenre
            End If
            
            parts.Add timeFormatted
            
            If IsDate(dataArray(i, 11)) Then sortableDate = Format(CDate(dataArray(i, 11)), "YYYY-MM-DD") Else sortableDate = "1900-01-01"

            oversizedList(itemCount, 1) = sortableDate
            oversizedList(itemCount, 2) = malID
            oversizedList(itemCount, 3) = Join(parts.ToArray, " | ")
        End If
    Next i
    
    If itemCount = 0 Then GoTo Cleanup
    
    Dim finalList() As Variant
    ReDim finalList(1 To itemCount, 1 To 3)
    For i = 1 To itemCount
        finalList(i, 1) = oversizedList(i, 1)
        finalList(i, 2) = oversizedList(i, 2)
        finalList(i, 3) = oversizedList(i, 3)
    Next i
    
    QuickSort2DArray finalList, 1, False

    wsHelper.Range("BT:BU").ClearContents
    
    ' Optimalizace: Bulk z·pis mÌsto cell-by-cell
    Dim outputBT() As Variant, outputBU() As Variant
    ReDim outputBT(1 To itemCount, 1 To 1)
    ReDim outputBU(1 To itemCount, 1 To 1)
    For i = 1 To itemCount
        outputBT(i, 1) = finalList(i, 3)
        outputBU(i, 1) = finalList(i, 2)
    Next i
    wsHelper.Range("BT1:BT" & itemCount).Value = outputBT
    wsHelper.Range("BU1:BU" & itemCount).Value = outputBU
    
    ThisWorkbook.names.Add Name:="SeznamAnimeFormatted", RefersTo:=wsHelper.Range("BT1:BT" & itemCount)
    With wsTarget.Range("E2").Validation
        .Delete
        .Add Type:=xlValidateList, Formula1:="=SeznamAnimeFormatted"
    End With

Cleanup:
    ' Aktualizace informativnÌho koment·¯e s nastavenÌm
    CreateSettingsInfoComment wsTarget
    
    Application.Cursor = xlDefault
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    If itemCount > 0 Then MsgBox "Seznam pro v˝bÏr byl ˙spÏönÏ aktualizov·n.", vbInformation
End Sub


' MAKRO 2: Generuje doporuËenÌ pro vybranÈ anime
Public Sub GenerateRecommendations()
    Dim ws As Worksheet, wsSource As Worksheet, wsHelper As Worksheet
    Dim animeTitle As String, animeID As Long
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    Dim outputRange As Range
    Dim watchedList As Object: Set watchedList = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim recommendations As Object: Set recommendations = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    
    Dim StartTime As Single
    Dim remainingTime As Single
    Dim etaText As String
    Dim avgTimePerItem As Single
    Dim lastIterationTime As Single
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("DOPORU»ENÕ, CO SLEDOVAT")
    If ws Is Nothing Then MsgBox "List 'DOPORU»ENÕ, CO SLEDOVAT' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    Set wsSource = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    If wsSource Is Nothing Then MsgBox "Zdrojov˝ list 'ANIME LIST' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    Set wsHelper = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(HELPER_SHEET_NAME)
    If wsHelper Is Nothing Then MsgBox "V·ö skryt˝ list '" & HELPER_SHEET_NAME & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If ws.Range("E2").Hyperlinks.count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "V buÚce E2 chybÌ hypertextov˝ odkaz na anime." & vbCrLf & "Vyberte prosÌm anime ze seznamu znovu.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If

    Dim urlAddress As String
    Dim urlParts() As String
    urlAddress = ws.Range("E2").Hyperlinks(1).Address
    urlParts = Split(urlAddress, "/")
    animeID = CLng(urlParts(UBound(urlParts)))
    animeTitle = ws.Range("E2").Value

    Dim sourceDetails As Object: Set sourceDetails = GetAnimeDetails(animeID)
    If sourceDetails Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se naËÌst detaily pro zdrojovÈ anime. Makro bude ukonËeno.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    Dim sourceScore As Double
    If sourceDetails.Exists("score") And Not IsNull(sourceDetails("score")) Then
        sourceScore = CDbl(sourceDetails("score"))
    End If

    Application.Cursor = xlWait
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    ' Aktualizace informativnÌho koment·¯e s nastavenÌm
    CreateSettingsInfoComment ws

    ' »iötÏnÌ
    ws.Range("A4:T19").ClearContents
    ws.Range("A4:T19").ClearComments
    ws.Range("A4:T19").Interior.ColorIndex = xlNone ' VyËistit starÈ barvy pozadÌ
    ws.Range("A4:T19").Borders.LineStyle = xlNone
    For j = 4 To 19
        On Error Resume Next
        ws.Range("E" & j & ":T" & j).UnMerge
        On Error GoTo 0
    Next j
    Dim shp As Shape
For i = ws.Shapes.count To 1 Step -1
        Set shp = ws.Shapes(i)
        ' === ZDE JE ZMÃNA: P¯id·no AddToPlanBtn_* do podmÌnky ===
        If shp.Type = msoPicture Or _
           shp.Name Like "RelevanceBG_*" Or _
           shp.Name Like "RelevancePie_*" Or _
           shp.Name Like "UserRecLink_*" Or _
           shp.Name Like "AddToPlanBtn_*" Or _
           shp.Type = msoTextBox Then
            shp.Delete
        End If
    Next i

    Dim lastRowSource As Long: lastRowSource = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRowSource > 1 Then
        Dim sourceCell As Range, malID As Long
        For Each sourceCell In wsSource.Range("C2:C" & lastRowSource)
            If sourceCell.Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
                On Error Resume Next
                urlParts = Split(sourceCell.Hyperlinks(1).Address, "/")
                If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then
                    malID = CLng(urlParts(4))
                    If Not watchedList.Exists(malID) Then watchedList.Add malID, True
                End If
                On Error GoTo 0
            End If
        Next sourceCell
    End If
    
    Dim userRatings As Variant: userRatings = PrecalculateUserRatings()
    If IsEmpty(userRatings) Then
        Dim emptyDict As Object: Set emptyDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
        userRatings = Array(emptyDict, emptyDict)
    End If
    
    ws.Columns("B").ColumnWidth = (COLUMN_B_WIDTH_PX - 5) / 7

    If Not USE_ADAPTIVE_DELAY Then Sleep API_DELAY_MS
    Dim recommendationsUrl As String: recommendationsUrl = "https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & animeID & "/recommendations"
    Dim httpReq As Object: Set httpReq = GetHttpObject() ' <--- POUéITÕ SINGLETONU
    httpReq.Open "GET", recommendationsUrl, False: httpReq.sEnd
    Dim parsedJson As Object: Set parsedJson = JsonConverter.ParseJson(httpReq.responseText)

    If parsedJson.Exists("data") And parsedJson("data").count > 0 Then
        Dim totalRecs As Long: totalRecs = parsedJson("data").count
        Dim processedCount As Long: processedCount = 0
        StartTime = Timer
        lastIterationTime = StartTime

        For Each item In parsedJson("data")
            processedCount = processedCount + 1
            Dim currentItemTime As Single: currentItemTime = Timer - lastIterationTime
            lastIterationTime = Timer
            
            If avgTimePerItem = 0 Then avgTimePerItem = currentItemTime Else avgTimePerItem = (currentItemTime * 0.1) + (avgTimePerItem * 0.9)
            remainingTime = avgTimePerItem * (totalRecs - processedCount)
            
            If remainingTime > 60 Then
                etaText = " | Zb˝v·: " & Format(remainingTime \ 60, "0") & "m " & Format(remainingTime Mod 60, "0") & "s"
            ElseIf remainingTime >= 0 Then
                etaText = " | Zb˝v·: " & Format(remainingTime, "0") & "s"
            Else
                etaText = ""
            End If

            Application.StatusBar = "Zpracov·v·m " & processedCount & " z " & totalRecs & " doporuËenÌ... (ID: " & item("entry")("mal_id") & ")" & etaText
            
            Dim recId As Long: recId = item("entry")("mal_id")
            Dim votes As Long: votes = item("votes")
            
            If Not watchedList.Exists(recId) Then
                ' Optimalizace: Stahujeme jen detaily, stats aû pozdÏji
                Dim detailsJson As Object: Set detailsJson = FetchJikanApiData("https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & recId)
                
                If Not detailsJson Is Nothing Then
                    Dim details As Object: Set details = detailsJson("data")
                    Dim recData() As Variant
                    ReDim recData(0 To 6)
                    
                    Set recData(0) = CalculateRelevance(details, userRatings(0), userRatings(1), votes)
                    recData(1) = details("mal_id")
                    If details.Exists("title_english") And Not IsNull(details("title_english")) Then recData(2) = details("title_english") Else recData(2) = details("title")
                    If IsNull(details("score")) Then recData(3) = 0 Else recData(3) = CDbl(details("score"))
                    If IsNull(details("synopsis")) Then recData(4) = "" Else recData(4) = CleanSynopsisText(details("synopsis"))
                    Set recData(5) = details
                    Set recData(6) = Nothing ' Stats zatÌm nic
                    
                    recommendations.Add recData
                End If
                
                If USE_ADAPTIVE_DELAY Then Sleep INITIAL_DELAY_MS Else Sleep API_DELAY_MS
                DoEvents
            End If
        Next item
    End If
    
    ' Se¯azenÌ podle relevance
    Dim swapped As Boolean, Temp As Variant
    Do
        swapped = False
        For i = 0 To recommendations.count - 2
            If recommendations(i)(0)("total") < recommendations(i + 1)(0)("total") Then
                Temp = recommendations(i)
                recommendations(i) = recommendations(i + 1)
                recommendations(i + 1) = Temp
                swapped = True
            End If
        Next i
    Loop While swapped
    
    ' Anilist Tagy Batch
    Dim anilistTagsDict As Object
    If ENABLE_ANILIST_TAGS And recommendations.count > 0 Then
        Dim displayLimit As Long
        If recommendations.count > MAX_RECS_TO_DISPLAY Then displayLimit = MAX_RECS_TO_DISPLAY - 1 Else displayLimit = recommendations.count - 1
        Application.StatusBar = "Stahuji AniList tagy pro TOP " & (displayLimit + 1) & " anime..."
        Dim malIds As Object: Set malIds = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
        Dim idIndex As Long
        For idIndex = 0 To displayLimit
            malIds.Add CLng(recommendations(idIndex)(1))
        Next idIndex
        Set anilistTagsDict = FetchAnilistTags_Batch(malIds)
        Application.StatusBar = "Zpracov·v·m zobrazenÌ..."
    End If
    
    ' Z·pis a barvenÌ
    Dim outputRow As Long: outputRow = 4
    If recommendations.count > 0 Then
        If recommendations.count > MAX_RECS_TO_DISPLAY Then displayLimit = MAX_RECS_TO_DISPLAY - 1 Else displayLimit = recommendations.count - 1

        For i = 0 To displayLimit
            Dim currentRec As Variant: currentRec = recommendations(i)
            Dim currentStats As Object: Set currentStats = Nothing
            
            Application.StatusBar = "Zpracov·v·m detaily a statistiky pro: " & currentRec(2)
            
            Dim statsJsonFinal As Object
            Set statsJsonFinal = FetchJikanApiData("https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & currentRec(1) & "/statistics")
            If Not statsJsonFinal Is Nothing Then
                Set currentStats = statsJsonFinal("data")
                Set currentRec(6) = currentStats
            End If

           ' === 1. ZmÏna barvy pozadÌ pro buÚku Relevance (A) ===
            ws.Cells(outputRow, "A").Interior.Color = RGB(191, 191, 191)
            
            CreateRelevanceIndicator ws.Cells(outputRow, "A"), currentRec(0), currentRec(5), sourceScore
            InsertImageFromURL ws.Cells(outputRow, "B"), currentRec(5)
            
            ' === NOV…: Vytvo¯enÌ pozn·mky o sÈrii ve sloupci B ===
            If ENABLE_ANILIST_TAGS And Not anilistTagsDict Is Nothing Then
