                Dim currentMalId_B As Long: currentMalId_B = CLng(currentRec(1))
                If anilistTagsDict.Exists(currentMalId_B) Then
                    ' Vyt·hneme data o vztazÌch (klÌË "relations")
                    Dim relData As Object: Set relData = anilistTagsDict(currentMalId_B)("relations")
                    Call CreateAnilistRelationsComment(ws.Cells(outputRow, "B"), relData)
                End If
            End If
            ' ====================================================
            
            ' === 2. ZmÏna barvy pozadÌ pro N·zev (C) ===
            ws.Cells(outputRow, "C").Interior.Color = RGB(191, 191, 191)
            
            With ws.Cells(outputRow, "C")
                .Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=.Cells(1, 1), Address:="https://myanimelist.net/anime/" & currentRec(1), TextToDisplay:=currentRec(2)
                
                ' === ⁄PRAVA PRO TAGY: Data majÌ nynÌ jinou strukturu ===
                If ENABLE_ANILIST_TAGS And Not anilistTagsDict Is Nothing Then
                    Dim currentMalId_C As Long: currentMalId_C = CLng(currentRec(1))
                    If anilistTagsDict.Exists(currentMalId_C) Then
                        ' Vyt·hneme seznam tag˘ (klÌË "tags")
                        Dim tagsData As Object: Set tagsData = anilistTagsDict(currentMalId_C)("tags")
                        Call CreateAnilistTagComment(.Cells(1, 1), CStr(currentRec(2)), tagsData)
                    End If
                End If
                ' =======================================================
                
                .WrapText = True: .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Italic = True: .Font.Color = vbBlack: .Font.size = 14
                .Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleNone: .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
            End With
            
            CreateScoreStatsComment ws.Cells(outputRow, "D"), currentStats
            
            ' === 3. ZmÏna barvy pozadÌ pro HodnocenÌ (D) - Gradient ===
            Dim scoreVal As Double: scoreVal = currentRec(3)
            ' Pouûije funkci GetColorGradient pro ök·lu 6.0 (Ëerven·) aû 9.31 (zelen·)
            ws.Cells(outputRow, "D").Interior.Color = GetColorGradient(scoreVal, 6#, 9.31)
            
            With ws.Cells(outputRow, "D")
                .Value = Format(currentRec(3), "0.00") & "/10"
                .Font.Bold = True: .Font.size = 18: .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter: .VerticalAlignment = xlCenter
            End With
            
            Application.DisplayAlerts = False
            ws.Range("E" & outputRow & ":T" & outputRow).Merge
            Application.DisplayAlerts = True
            
            ' === 4. ZmÏna barvy pozadÌ pro Popis (E:T) ===
            ws.Range("E" & outputRow & ":T" & outputRow).Interior.Color = RGB(191, 191, 191) ' #F1A983
            
            With ws.Cells(outputRow, "E")
                .Value = currentRec(4)
                .WrapText = True: .VerticalAlignment = xlTop: .Font.Italic = True
            End With
            
            ' === NOV…: TlaËÌtko pro p¯id·nÌ do PTW (S kontrolou existence) ===
            ' Vyt·hneme informaci z relevance dat (index 0), klÌË "plan_s" (1 = je v pl·nu, 0 = nenÌ)
            Dim isUserPlanning As Boolean
            isUserPlanning = (currentRec(0)("plan_s") = 1)
            
            CreateAddToPlanButton ws, outputRow, CLng(currentRec(1)), isUserPlanning
            ' =========================================
            
            CreateUserRecLinkBox ws, outputRow, animeID, currentRec(1)
            
            outputRow = outputRow + 1
        Next i
    End If
    
    If outputRow > 4 Then
        Set outputRange = ws.Range("A4:T" & outputRow - 1)
        outputRange.BorderAround weight:=xlMedium
        outputRange.Borders(xlInsideHorizontal).weight = xlMedium
        outputRange.Borders(xlInsideVertical).weight = xlThin
        outputRange.Columns("B").Borders(xlEdgeLeft).weight = xlMedium
        outputRange.Columns("B").Borders(xlEdgeRight).weight = xlMedium
    End If

Cleanup:
    CleanUpHttpObject ' <--- PÿIDAT TENTO ÿ¡DEK (UvolnÌ HTTP objekt z pamÏti)
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Cursor = xlDefault
    If recommendations.count = 0 And animeTitle <> "" Then
        MsgBox "Pro '" & animeTitle & "' nebyla nalezena û·dn· doporuËenÌ.", vbInformation
    End If
End Sub

' ===================================================================================
' == POMOCN… FUNKCE ==
' ===================================================================================
Private Function FormatVotesCount(ByVal votes As Long) As String
    Dim numPart As String
    Dim textPart As String
    
    If votes >= 1000000 Then
        numPart = FormatDecimal(Round(CDbl(votes) / 1000000, 1))
        textPart = " mil."
    ElseIf votes >= 1000 Then
        numPart = FormatDecimal(Round(CDbl(votes) / 1000, 1))
        textPart = " tis."
    Else
        numPart = CStr(votes)
        textPart = ""
    End If
    FormatVotesCount = numPart & textPart
End Function

Private Function FormatDecimal(num As Double) As String
    FormatDecimal = Replace(Format(num, "0.0"), ".", ",")
End Function

Private Sub CreateScoreStatsComment(ByRef targetCell As Range, ByVal statsData As Object)
    On Error GoTo Cleanup
    If statsData Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    If Not statsData.Exists("scores") Then Exit Sub
    
    ' Optimalizace: SlouËenÌ 3 cykl˘ do jednoho pr˘chodu
    Dim scores(1 To 10) As Object
    Dim item As Object
    Dim totalVotes As Long: totalVotes = 0
    Dim maxPercentage As Double: maxPercentage = 0
    
    For Each item In statsData("scores")
        Set scores(item("score")) = item
        totalVotes = totalVotes + item("votes")
        If item("percentage") > maxPercentage Then maxPercentage = item("percentage")
    Next item
    
    If totalVotes = 0 Then Exit Sub
    If maxPercentage = 0 Then maxPercentage = 100
    
    Dim formattedTotalVotes As String: formattedTotalVotes = FormatVotesCount(totalVotes)
    Dim header As String: header = "Statistika hodnocenÌ: " & formattedTotalVotes & " uûivatel˘"
    Dim separator As String: separator = String(59, "-")
    
    Dim commentText As String
    commentText = header & vbCrLf & separator & vbCrLf
    
    Const MAX_BAR_WIDTH As Long = 35
    Dim barChar As String: barChar = ChrW(9608)
    
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 10 To 1 Step -1
        Dim scoreLine As String, bar As String, statsPart As String, formattedVotes As String
        bar = ""
        Dim percentage As Double: percentage = 0
        
        If Not scores(i) Is Nothing Then
            percentage = scores(i)("percentage")
            formattedVotes = FormatVotesCount(scores(i)("votes"))
            
            If percentage > 0 Then
                Dim barWidth As Long
                barWidth = Round((percentage / maxPercentage) * (MAX_BAR_WIDTH - 1), 0) + 1
                bar = WorksheetFunction.Rept(barChar, barWidth)
            End If
            
            If InStr(formattedVotes, "tis") > 0 Or InStr(formattedVotes, "mil") > 0 Then
                statsPart = FormatDecimal(percentage) & "% (" & formattedVotes & ")"
            Else
                statsPart = FormatDecimal(percentage) & "% (" & formattedVotes & ")"
            End If
        Else
            statsPart = "0,0% (0)"
        End If
        
        scoreLine = Right("  " & i, 2) & ": " & bar & String(MAX_BAR_WIDTH - Len(bar) + 2, " ") & statsPart
        commentText = commentText & scoreLine
        If i > 1 Then commentText = commentText & vbCrLf
    Next i
    
    targetCell.ClearComments
    targetCell.AddComment Trim(commentText)
    
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape
        .TextFrame.AutoSize = True
        With .TextFrame.Characters
            .Font.Name = "Consolas"
            .Font.size = 9
            
            Dim startPos As Long, endPos As Long, length As Long
            startPos = InStr(1, .text, ": ") + 2
            endPos = InStr(1, .text, " uûivatel˘")
            If startPos > 2 And endPos > 0 Then
                length = endPos - startPos
                .Characters(startPos, length).Font.Bold = True
            End If
            
            Dim searchStartPos As Long: searchStartPos = 1
            For i = 10 To 1 Step -1
                Dim lineStartMarker As String: lineStartMarker = Right("  " & i, 2) & ": "
                Dim lineStartPos As Long: lineStartPos = InStr(searchStartPos, .text, lineStartMarker)
                
                If lineStartPos > 0 Then
                    .Characters(lineStartPos, Len(lineStartMarker)).Font.Bold = True
                    Dim percentEndPos As Long: percentEndPos = InStr(lineStartPos, .text, "%")
                    If percentEndPos > 0 Then
                        Dim percentStartPos As Long: percentStartPos = InStrRev(.text, " ", percentEndPos) + 1
                        If percentStartPos > 1 Then
                             .Characters(percentStartPos, percentEndPos - percentStartPos + 1).Font.Bold = True
                        End If
                    End If
                    searchStartPos = lineStartPos + 1
                End If
            Next i
        End With
    End With
Cleanup:
End Sub

Private Function GetAnimeDetails(ByVal animeID As Long) As Object
    Dim detailUrl As String: detailUrl = "https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & animeID
    Dim httpReq As Object: Set httpReq = GetHttpObject() ' <--- ZMÃNA
    
    On Error Resume Next
    httpReq.Open "GET", detailUrl, False
    httpReq.sEnd
    
    If httpReq.status = 200 Then
        Set GetAnimeDetails = JsonConverter.ParseJson(httpReq.responseText)("data")
    Else
        Set GetAnimeDetails = Nothing
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

Private Sub InsertImageFromURL(ByRef targetCell As Range, ByVal details As Object)
    Dim pic As Object, http As Object, stream As Object, tempPath As String
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = targetCell.Worksheet
    Dim url As String
    Dim attempts As Integer

    On Error Resume Next
    If details Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    If Not details.Exists("images") Then Exit Sub
    url = details("images")("jpg")("image_url")
    If url = "" Then Exit Sub
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    For attempts = 1 To 3
        On Error Resume Next
        Set http = GetHttpObject()
        http.Open "GET", url, False
        http.sEnd
        
        If http.status = 200 Then
            Dim rowHeightPoints As Double: rowHeightPoints = ROW_HEIGHT_PX * 72 / 96
            Dim imgHeightPoints As Double: imgHeightPoints = IMG_HEIGHT_PX * 72 / 96
            Dim imgWidthPoints As Double: imgWidthPoints = IMG_WIDTH_PX * 72 / 96

            targetCell.RowHeight = rowHeightPoints

            Set stream = CreateObject("ADODB.Stream"): stream.Open: stream.Type = 1: stream.Write http.responseBody
            tempPath = Environ("TEMP") & "\temp_anime_img.jpg"
            stream.SaveToFile tempPath, 2: stream.Close
            
            Set pic = ws.Shapes.AddPicture(tempPath, msoFalse, msoTrue, targetCell.left, targetCell.top, imgWidthPoints, imgHeightPoints)
            
            With pic
                .LockAspectRatio = msoFalse
                .Height = imgHeightPoints
                .Width = imgWidthPoints
                .top = targetCell.top + (targetCell.Height - .Height) / 2
                .left = targetCell.left + (targetCell.Width - .Width) / 2
            End With
            Kill tempPath
            
            Set http = Nothing: Set stream = Nothing: Set pic = Nothing
            On Error GoTo 0
            Exit For
        Else
            Set http = Nothing
            Sleep API_DELAY_MS
        End If
    Next attempts
End Sub

Private Function FetchJikanApiData(ByVal requestUrl As String) As Object
    Dim httpReq As Object
    Dim attempt As Long
    Dim currentDelay As Long
    
    On Error GoTo Cleanup
    
    ' ZÌsk·me Singleton instanci
    Set httpReq = GetHttpObject()
    
    For attempt = 1 To MAX_RETRIES
        ' U Singletonu musÌme b˝t opatrnÌ s chybami, Open resetuje objekt
        httpReq.Open "GET", requestUrl, False
        httpReq.sEnd
        
        If httpReq.status = 200 Then
            Set FetchJikanApiData = JsonConverter.ParseJson(httpReq.responseText)
            Exit Function
        Else
            Debug.Print "API Error: Status " & httpReq.status & " for URL: " & requestUrl & " on attempt " & attempt
            If attempt < MAX_RETRIES Then
                currentDelay = RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * (2 ^ (attempt - 1))
                Sleep currentDelay
            End If
        End If
    Next attempt
    
Cleanup:
    Set FetchJikanApiData = Nothing
    ' POZOR: Zde NESMÕME nastavit httpReq = Nothing, protoûe je to Singleton!
End Function

Private Sub CreateUserRecLinkBox(ByRef ws As Worksheet, ByVal targetRow As Long, ByVal sourceAnimeId As Long, ByVal recommendedAnimeId As Long)
    Dim recLinkBox As Shape
    Dim targetCell As Range
    Dim url As String
    
    url = "https://myanimelist.net/recommendations/anime/" & sourceAnimeId & "-" & recommendedAnimeId
    
    Set targetCell = ws.Range("T" & targetRow)
    
    Const BOX_HEIGHT As Single = 15
    Const BOTTOM_PADDING As Single = 3
    
    Set recLinkBox = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, _
        targetCell.left + targetCell.Width - 110, _
        targetCell.top + targetCell.Height - BOX_HEIGHT - BOTTOM_PADDING, _
        105, BOX_HEIGHT)
    
    recLinkBox.Name = "UserRecLink_" & targetRow
    
    With recLinkBox
        With .TextFrame2.TextRange
            .text = "Uûivatelsk˝ posudek"
            .Font.size = 9
            .Font.Name = "Arial"
            .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 50, 100) ' TmavÏ modr˝ text
            .Font.Bold = msoTrue ' <--- ZMÃNA: TuËnÈ pÌsmo
        End With
        
        .Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(191, 191, 191) ' Lososov· barva
        
        .line.Visible = msoFalse ' <--- ZMÃNA: OdstranÏno ohraniËenÌ
        
        ws.Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=recLinkBox, Address:=url, ScreenTip:="Zobrazit p¯ÌmÈ doporuËenÌ mezi tÏmito dvÏma anime"
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub QuickSort2DArray(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal sortColumn As Long, Optional ascending As Boolean = True)
    ' QuickSort wrapper pro 2D pole - O(n log n) mÌsto O(n2)
    If Not IsArray(arr) Then Exit Sub
    QuickSort2D_Recursive arr, sortColumn, LBound(arr, 1), UBound(arr, 1), ascending
End Sub

Private Sub QuickSort2D_Recursive(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal sortCol As Long, ByVal lowIdx As Long, ByVal highIdx As Long, ByVal ascending As Boolean)
    Dim pivotIdx As Long
    If lowIdx < highIdx Then
        pivotIdx = Partition2D(arr, sortCol, lowIdx, highIdx, ascending)
        QuickSort2D_Recursive arr, sortCol, lowIdx, pivotIdx - 1, ascending
        QuickSort2D_Recursive arr, sortCol, pivotIdx + 1, highIdx, ascending
    End If
End Sub

Private Function Partition2D(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal sortCol As Long, ByVal lowIdx As Long, ByVal highIdx As Long, ByVal ascending As Boolean) As Long
    Dim pivotVal As Variant
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, k As Long
    Dim Temp As Variant
    
    pivotVal = arr(highIdx, sortCol)
    i = lowIdx - 1
    
    For j = lowIdx To highIdx - 1
        Dim compare As Boolean
        If ascending Then
            compare = (arr(j, sortCol) <= pivotVal)
        Else
            compare = (arr(j, sortCol) >= pivotVal)
        End If
        
        If compare Then
            i = i + 1
            ' Swap cel˝ ¯·dek
            For k = LBound(arr, 2) To UBound(arr, 2)
                Temp = arr(i, k)
                arr(i, k) = arr(j, k)
                arr(j, k) = Temp
            Next k
        End If
    Next j
    
    ' Swap pivot do spr·vnÈ pozice
    For k = LBound(arr, 2) To UBound(arr, 2)
        Temp = arr(i + 1, k)
        arr(i + 1, k) = arr(highIdx, k)
        arr(highIdx, k) = Temp
    Next k
    
    Partition2D = i + 1
End Function


Private Function CalculateRelevance(ByVal details As Object, ByVal genreRatings As Object, ByVal themeRatings As Object, ByVal votesCount As Long) As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim breakdown As Object: Set breakdown = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim totalScore As Double
    Dim animeID As Long: animeID = details("mal_id")
    
    Dim planScore As Double: planScore = IsInPlanToWatch(details)
    Dim malScoreValue As Double: malScoreValue = IIf(IsNull(details("score")), 0, CDbl(details("score")))
    Dim malScoreNormalized As Double: malScoreNormalized = malScoreValue / 10
    Dim genreThemeScore As Double: genreThemeScore = GetGenreThemeScore(details, genreRatings, themeRatings)
    Dim episodes As Long: episodes = details("episodes")
    Dim durationStr As String: durationStr = details("duration")
    Dim lengthScore As Double: lengthScore = GetLengthScore(episodes, durationStr)
    Dim votesScore As Double: votesScore = GetVotesScore(votesCount)
    Dim popScore As Double
    If malScoreValue >= MIN_SCORE_FOR_POP_BONUS Then
        Dim members As Long: members = details("members")
        popScore = GetPopularityScore(members)
    End If
    
    breakdown("plan_s") = planScore
    breakdown("mal_s_val") = malScoreValue
    breakdown("mal_s_norm") = malScoreNormalized
    breakdown("genre_s") = genreThemeScore
    breakdown("length_s") = lengthScore
    breakdown("votes_s") = votesScore
    breakdown("pop_s") = popScore
    breakdown("votes_c") = votesCount
    If details.Exists("members") Then breakdown("members_c") = details("members") Else breakdown("members_c") = 0
    
    breakdown("plan_p") = planScore * RELEVANCE_W_IN_PLAN
    breakdown("mal_p") = malScoreNormalized * RELEVANCE_W_MAL_SCORE
    breakdown("genre_p") = genreThemeScore * RELEVANCE_W_GENRE_THEME
    breakdown("length_p") = lengthScore * RELEVANCE_W_LENGTH
    breakdown("votes_p") = votesScore * RELEVANCE_W_VOTES
    breakdown("pop_p") = popScore * RELEVANCE_W_POPULARITY
    
    totalScore = breakdown("plan_p") + breakdown("mal_p") + breakdown("genre_p") + _
                 breakdown("length_p") + breakdown("votes_p") + breakdown("pop_p")
    breakdown("total") = totalScore
    Set CalculateRelevance = breakdown
End Function

Private Function IsInPlanToWatch(ByVal details As Object) As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim wsPlan As Worksheet
    Dim searchRange As Range
    Dim foundCell As Range
    Dim animeTitle As String
    If details Is Nothing Then Exit Function
    If details.Exists("title_english") And Not IsNull(details("title_english")) Then
        animeTitle = details("title_english")
    Else
        animeTitle = details("title")
    End If
    Set wsPlan = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME PLAN TO WATCH + FUTURES")
    If wsPlan Is Nothing Then Exit Function
    Set searchRange = wsPlan.Range("G3:G" & wsPlan.Cells(wsPlan.Rows.count, "G").End(xlUp).row)
    Set foundCell = searchRange.Find(animeTitle, LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlPart)
    If Not foundCell Is Nothing Then IsInPlanToWatch = 1 Else IsInPlanToWatch = 0
End Function

Private Function GetLengthScore(ByVal episodes As Long, ByVal durationString As String) As Double
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim durationMinutes As Long
    durationMinutes = CLng(Split(durationString, " ")(0))
    If episodes <= 0 Then episodes = 1
    Dim totalMinutes As Long: totalMinutes = episodes * durationMinutes
    Dim idealMinutes As Long: idealMinutes = IDEAL_EPISODES * IDEAL_DURATION_MIN
    Dim diff As Long: diff = Abs(totalMinutes - idealMinutes)
    If diff >= MAX_PENALTY_RANGE_MIN Then
        GetLengthScore = 0
    Else
        GetLengthScore = 1 - (diff / MAX_PENALTY_RANGE_MIN)
    End If
End Function

Private Sub CreateRelevanceIndicator(ByRef targetCell As Range, ByVal relevanceData As Object, ByVal details As Object, ByVal sourceScore As Double)
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = targetCell.Worksheet
    Dim top As Double, left As Double, size As Double
    Dim bgCircle As Shape, fillPie As Shape
    Dim text As String
    Dim score As Double
    
    score = relevanceData("total")
    If score > 100 Then score = 100
    If score < 0 Then score = 0
    
    size = Application.Min(targetCell.Width, targetCell.Height) * 0.6
    left = targetCell.left + (targetCell.Width - size) / 2
    top = targetCell.top + (targetCell.Height - size) / 2 - 10
    
    ' === 1. ZMÃNA: PozadÌ koleËka je »ERN… ===
    Set bgCircle = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeOval, left, top, size, size)
    With bgCircle
        .Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0) ' »ern·
        .line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .line.weight = 1.5
        .Name = "RelevanceBG_" & targetCell.Address(False, False)
    End With
    
    If score > 0.1 Then
        Set fillPie = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapePie, left, top, size, size)
        With fillPie
            .line.Visible = msoFalse
            ' === 2. ZMÃNA: Barva kol·Ëe dynamicky podle relevance (0-100) ===
            .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = GetColorGradient(score, 0, 100)
            .Rotation = -90
            .Adjustments(2) = score * 3.6
            .Name = "RelevancePie_" & targetCell.Address(False, False)
        End With
    End If
    
    If score >= THRESHOLD_HIGH Then
        text = "Vysok·"
    ElseIf score >= THRESHOLD_MEDIUM Then
        text = "St¯ednÌ"
    Else
        text = "NÌzk·"
    End If
    
    With targetCell
        .Value = text
        .HorizontalAlignment = xlCenter
        .VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignBottom
        .Font.Bold = True
        .Font.Color = vbBlack
        .Font.size = 14
        .Offset(0, 1).RowHeight = ROW_HEIGHT_PX
    End With
    
    ' Pozn·mka (Comment)
    Dim commentText As String, separator As String
    separator = "---------------------------------------"
    Dim totalHeader As String: totalHeader = "Celkov· Relevance: "
    Dim totalValue As String: totalValue = Format(score, "0.0") & " / 100"
    
    ' (Zkr·ceno pro p¯ehlednost - zbytek logiky koment·¯e je stejn˝)
    Dim planDescText As String: planDescText = "(" & IIf(relevanceData("plan_s") = 1, "Ano", "Ne") & ")"
    Dim planResultPart As String: planResultPart = Format(relevanceData("plan_p"), "0.0") & " b."
    Dim malDescText As String: malDescText = "(" & IIf(relevanceData("mal_s_val") > sourceScore, "M· vyööÌ hodnocenÌ", "Nem· vyööÌ hodnocenÌ") & ")"
    Dim malResultPart As String: malResultPart = Format(relevanceData("mal_p"), "0.0") & " b."
    Dim genreDescText As String: genreDescText = "(" & IIf(relevanceData("genre_s") * 10 > 7.5, "Nadpr˘mÏrn· shoda", "Pr˘mÏrn· shoda") & ")"
    Dim genreResultPart As String: genreResultPart = Format(relevanceData("genre_p"), "0.0") & " b."
    Dim lengthDescText As String: lengthDescText = "(" & relevanceData("length_s") & ")" ' Zjednoduöeno pro p¯Ìklad
    Dim lengthResultPart As String: lengthResultPart = Format(relevanceData("length_p"), "0.0") & " b."
    Dim votesDescText As String: votesDescText = "(" & relevanceData("votes_c") & "x doporuËeno)"
    Dim votesResultPart As String: votesResultPart = Format(relevanceData("votes_p"), "0.0") & " b."
    Dim popDescText As String: popDescText = "(" & GetPopularityTierName(relevanceData("members_c")) & ")"
    Dim popResultPart As String: popResultPart = Format(relevanceData("pop_p"), "0.0") & " b."

    ' ... Zde by byl kompletnÌ text koment·¯e jako v p˘vodnÌm kÛdu ...
    ' Pro ˙sporu mÌsta v tÈto odpovÏdi ponech·v·m logiku vloûenÌ stejnou, protoûe nebyla poûadavkem zmÏny.
    ' Jednoduöe pouûij kÛd z p¯edchozÌ verze Sub CreateRelevanceIndicator, pouze zaË·tek s Shapes je zmÏnÏn.
    
    ' POZOR: Pro kompletnost vkl·d·m plnou verzi sestavenÌ koment·¯e, aby to fungovalo:
    Dim planHeaderText As String: planHeaderText = "V pl·nu (Plan to Watch): "
    Dim planCalcPart As String: planCalcPart = "(" & Format(relevanceData("plan_s"), "0.00") & " * " & RELEVANCE_W_IN_PLAN & ") = "
    
    Dim malHeaderText As String: malHeaderText = "MAL SkÛre (" & Format(relevanceData("mal_s_val"), "0.00") & "/10): "
    Dim malCalcPart As String: malCalcPart = "(" & Format(relevanceData("mal_s_norm"), "0.00") & " * " & RELEVANCE_W_MAL_SCORE & ") = "
    
    Dim genreHeaderText As String: genreHeaderText = "é·nry a TÈmata: "
    Dim genreCalcPart As String: genreCalcPart = "(" & Format(relevanceData("genre_s"), "0.00") & " * " & RELEVANCE_W_GENRE_THEME & ") = "
    
    Dim lengthHeaderText As String: lengthHeaderText = "DÈlka Anime: "
    ' Znovu dopoËÌtat length text
    Dim durationText As String, totalMinutes As Long, episodes As Long, durationPerEp As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    If Not IsNull(details("episodes")) And IsNumeric(details("episodes")) Then episodes = CLng(details("episodes"))
    If episodes > 0 And InStr(1, CStr(details("duration")), "per ep", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
        durationPerEp = CLng(Split(CStr(details("duration")), " ")(0))
        totalMinutes = episodes * durationPerEp
        durationText = Format(totalMinutes / 60, "0.0") & " h / " & episodes & " EP"
    Else
        durationText = details("duration")
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    If durationText = "" Then durationText = "N/A"
    lengthDescText = "(" & durationText & ")"
    
    Dim lengthCalcPart As String: lengthCalcPart = "(" & Format(relevanceData("length_s"), "0.00") & " * " & RELEVANCE_W_LENGTH & ") = "
    
    Dim votesHeaderText As String: votesHeaderText = "Hlasy doporuËenÌ: "
    Dim votesCalcPart As String: votesCalcPart = "(" & Format(relevanceData("votes_s"), "0.00") & " * " & RELEVANCE_W_VOTES & ") = "
    
    Dim popHeaderText As String: popHeaderText = "Popularita: "
    Dim popCalcPart As String: popCalcPart = "(" & Format(relevanceData("pop_s"), "0.00") & " * " & RELEVANCE_W_POPULARITY & ") = "

    commentText = totalHeader & totalValue & vbCrLf & _
                  separator & vbCrLf & _
                  planHeaderText & planDescText & vbCrLf & _
                  planCalcPart & planResultPart & vbCrLf & _
                  vbCrLf & _
                  malHeaderText & malDescText & vbCrLf & _
                  malCalcPart & malResultPart & vbCrLf & _
                  vbCrLf & _
                  genreHeaderText & genreDescText & vbCrLf & _
                  genreCalcPart & genreResultPart & vbCrLf & _
                  vbCrLf & _
                  lengthHeaderText & lengthDescText & vbCrLf & _
                  lengthCalcPart & lengthResultPart & vbCrLf & _
                  vbCrLf & _
                  votesHeaderText & votesDescText & vbCrLf & _
                  votesCalcPart & votesResultPart & vbCrLf & _
                  vbCrLf & _
                  popHeaderText & popDescText & vbCrLf & _
                  popCalcPart & popResultPart

    targetCell.ClearComments
    targetCell.AddComment commentText
    targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.AutoSize = True
    
    Dim startPos As Long
    startPos = InStr(1, commentText, totalValue)
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.Characters(startPos, Len(totalValue)).Font
        .Bold = True
        .Italic = False
    End With
    
    Dim descs As Variant: descs = Array(planDescText, malDescText, genreDescText, lengthDescText, votesDescText, popDescText)
    Dim d As Variant
    For Each d In descs
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, CStr(d))
        If startPos > 0 Then
            With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.Characters(startPos, Len(CStr(d))).Font
                .Bold = False
                .Italic = True
            End With
        End If
    Next d
    
    Dim results As Variant: results = Array(planResultPart, malResultPart, genreResultPart, lengthResultPart, votesResultPart, popResultPart)
    Dim r As Variant
    Dim searchStartPos As Long: searchStartPos = 1
    For Each r In results
        startPos = InStr(searchStartPos, commentText, CStr(r))
        If startPos > 0 Then
            With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame.Characters(startPos, Len(CStr(r))).Font
                .Bold = True
                .Italic = False
            End With
            searchStartPos = startPos + 1
        End If
    Next r
End Sub

Private Function GetGenreThemeScore(ByVal details As Object, ByVal genreRatings As Object, ByVal themeRatings As Object) As Double
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim totalScore As Double: totalScore = 0
    Dim itemCount As Long: itemCount = 0
    If details.Exists("genres") Then
        For Each genre In details("genres")
            Dim genreName As String: genreName = genre("name")
            If genreRatings.Exists(genreName) Then
                totalScore = totalScore + genreRatings(genreName)
                itemCount = itemCount + 1
            End If
        Next genre
    End If
    If details.Exists("themes") Then
        For Each Theme In details("themes")
            Dim themeName As String: themeName = Theme("name")
            If themeRatings.Exists(themeName) Then
                totalScore = totalScore + themeRatings(themeName)
                itemCount = itemCount + 1
            End If
        Next Theme
    End If
    If itemCount > 0 Then
        GetGenreThemeScore = (totalScore / itemCount) / 10
    Else
        GetGenreThemeScore = 0.5
    End If
End Function

Private Function PrecalculateUserRatings() As Variant
    Dim wsList As Worksheet
    Set wsList = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    If wsList Is Nothing Then Exit Function
    Dim genreCounts As Object: Set genreCounts = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim genreSums As Object: Set genreSums = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim themeCounts As Object: Set themeCounts = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim themeSums As Object: Set themeSums = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim lastRow As Long: lastRow = wsList.Cells(wsList.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Function
    Dim dataRange As Variant: dataRange = wsList.Range("G2:K" & lastRow).Value
    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    Dim rating As Double
    Dim items() As String, item As Variant
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataRange, 1)
        If IsNumeric(dataRange(i, 5)) And Not IsEmpty(dataRange(i, 5)) Then
            rating = CDbl(dataRange(i, 5))
            If Not IsEmpty(dataRange(i, 1)) Then
                items = Split(dataRange(i, 1), ";")
                For j = LBound(items) To UBound(items)
                    item = Trim(items(j))
                    If item <> "" Then
                        themeCounts(item) = themeCounts(item) + 1
                        themeSums(item) = themeSums(item) + rating
                    End If
                Next j
            End If
            If Not IsEmpty(dataRange(i, 2)) Then
                items = Split(dataRange(i, 2), ";")
                For j = LBound(items) To UBound(items)
                    item = Trim(items(j))
                    If item <> "" Then
                        genreCounts(item) = genreCounts(item) + 1
                        genreSums(item) = genreSums(item) + rating
                    End If
                Next j
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    Dim genreRatings As Object: Set genreRatings = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    For Each item In genreCounts.keys
        genreRatings(item) = genreSums(item) / genreCounts(item)
    Next item
    Dim themeRatings As Object: Set themeRatings = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    For Each item In themeCounts.keys
        themeRatings(item) = themeSums(item) / themeCounts(item)
    Next item
    PrecalculateUserRatings = Array(genreRatings, themeRatings)
End Function

Private Function GetPopularityScore(ByVal memberCount As Long) As Double
    Select Case memberCount
        Case 1 To POP_TIER1_ULTRA: GetPopularityScore = 1#
        Case Is <= POP_TIER2_HIDDEN: GetPopularityScore = 0.75
        Case Is <= POP_TIER3_NORMAL: GetPopularityScore = 0.4
        Case Is <= POP_TIER4_KNOWN: GetPopularityScore = 0.1
        Case Else: GetPopularityScore = 0
    End Select
End Function

Private Function GetPopularityTierName(ByVal memberCount As Long) As String
    Select Case memberCount
        Case 1 To POP_TIER1_ULTRA: GetPopularityTierName = "Hidden gem ultra"
        Case Is <= POP_TIER2_HIDDEN: GetPopularityTierName = "Hidden gem"
        Case Is <= POP_TIER3_NORMAL: GetPopularityTierName = "Normal"
        Case Is <= POP_TIER4_KNOWN: GetPopularityTierName = "Quite known"
        Case Else: GetPopularityTierName = "Mainstream"
    End Select
End Function

Private Function GetVotesScore(ByVal votesCount As Long) As Double
    On Error Resume Next
    If votesCount <= 1 Then
        GetVotesScore = 0
    ElseIf votesCount >= MAX_VOTES_FOR_SCORE Then
        GetVotesScore = 1
    Else
        GetVotesScore = Log(votesCount) / Log(MAX_VOTES_FOR_SCORE)
    End If
End Function

Private Function CleanSynopsisText(ByVal rawSynopsis As String) As String
    Dim cleanedText As String
    cleanedText = rawSynopsis
    cleanedText = Replace(cleanedText, "[Written by MAL Rewrite]", "")
    cleanedText = Replace(cleanedText, vbCrLf, " ")
    cleanedText = Replace(cleanedText, vbLf, " ")
    cleanedText = Replace(cleanedText, vbCr, " ")
    Do While InStr(cleanedText, "  ") > 0
        cleanedText = Replace(cleanedText, "  ", " ")
    Loop
    CleanSynopsisText = Trim(cleanedText)
End Function

Private Function FetchAnilistTags_Batch(ByVal malIds As Object) As Object
    ' Tato funkce provede JEDINð hromadn˝ (batch) dotaz na AniList API
    ' Vr·tÌ slovnÌk: Key = MAL_ID, Value = Dictionary s klÌËi "tags" a "relations"
    
    Dim http As Object
    Dim query As String
    Dim payload As String
    Dim i As Long
    Dim resultDict As Object: Set resultDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    If malIds Is Nothing Or malIds.count = 0 Then
        Set FetchAnilistTags_Batch = resultDict
        Exit Function
    End If

' --- 1. SestavenÌ GraphQL dotazu (PÿID¡NO: season, seasonYear) ---
    query = "query {"
    For i = 0 To malIds.count - 1
        query = query & " m" & i & ": Media(idMal: " & malIds(i) & ", type: ANIME) { " & _
                "idMal format episodes duration season seasonYear " & _
                "tags { name rank isMediaSpoiler } " & _
                "relations { edges { relationType node { format episodes duration } } } " & _
                "}"
    Next i
    query = query & " }"
    
' --- 2. P¯Ìprava HTTP POST poûadavku ---
    payload = "{ ""query"": " & JsonConverter.ConvertToJson(query) & " }"
    
    Set http = GetHttpObject() ' <--- ZMÃNA
    http.Open "POST", ANILIST_API_URL, False
    http.setRequestHeader "Content-Type", "application/json"
    http.setRequestHeader "Accept", "application/json"
    http.sEnd payload
    
    ' --- 3. Zpracov·nÌ odpovÏdi ---
    If http.status = 200 Then
        Dim jsonResponse As Object: Set jsonResponse = JsonConverter.ParseJson(http.responseText)
        If Not jsonResponse.Exists("data") Then GoTo ErrorHandler
        
        Dim data As Object: Set data = jsonResponse("data")
        Dim recKey As Variant
        
        For Each recKey In data.keys
            Dim recData As Object: Set recData = data(recKey)
            
            If Not recData Is Nothing Then
                Dim malID As Long: malID = recData("idMal")
                
                ' === A) Zpracov·nÌ TAGŸ ===
                Dim tagsList As Object: Set tagsList = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
                Dim tag As Variant
                For Each tag In recData("tags")
                    If CLng(tag("rank")) >= ANILIST_MIN_RANK Then
                        If ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS Or (Not ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS And Not CBool(tag("isMediaSpoiler"))) Then
                            Dim tagInfo As Object: Set tagInfo = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                            tagInfo("name") = CStr(tag("name"))
                            tagInfo("rank") = CLng(tag("rank"))
                            tagsList.Add tagInfo
                        End If
                    End If
                Next tag
                ' Se¯azenÌ tag˘
                Dim swapped As Boolean, j As Long, Temp As Variant
                Do
                    swapped = False
                    For j = 0 To tagsList.count - 2
                        If tagsList(j)("rank") < tagsList(j + 1)("rank") Then
                            Set Temp = tagsList(j)
                            Set tagsList(j) = tagsList(j + 1)
                            Set tagsList(j + 1) = Temp
                            swapped = True
                        End If
                    Next j
                Loop While swapped
                
                ' === B) Zpracov·nÌ RELATION INFO (Novinka) ===
                Dim relInfo As Object: Set relInfo = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                
                ' Z·kladnÌ info o tomto anime
                relInfo("format") = CStr(recData("format"))
                If IsNull(recData("episodes")) Then relInfo("episodes") = 0 Else relInfo("episodes") = CLng(recData("episodes"))
                If IsNull(recData("duration")) Then relInfo("duration") = 0 Else relInfo("duration") = CLng(recData("duration"))
                
                ' -- NOV…: ZÌsk·nÌ sezÛny --
                Dim sSn As String, sYr As String
                If IsNull(recData("season")) Then sSn = "" Else sSn = CStr(recData("season"))
                If IsNull(recData("seasonYear")) Then sYr = "" Else sYr = CStr(recData("seasonYear"))
                relInfo("season_text") = sSn & " " & sYr
                ' --------------------------
                
                ' PoËÌtadla
                Dim cntSeqPre As Long: cntSeqPre = 0
                Dim cntSide As Long: cntSide = 0
                Dim cntSpin As Long: cntSpin = 0
                Dim cntAlt As Long: cntAlt = 0
                Dim franchiseEp As Long: franchiseEp = relInfo("episodes")
                Dim franchiseMin As Long: franchiseMin = relInfo("episodes") * relInfo("duration")
                
                Dim edge As Variant
                If recData.Exists("relations") Then
                    For Each edge In recData("relations")("edges")
                        Dim rType As String: rType = edge("relationType")
                        Dim rNode As Object: Set rNode = edge("node")
                        
                        If Not rNode Is Nothing Then
                            ' Statistiky typ˘
                            Select Case rType
                                Case "SEQUEL", "PREQUEL": cntSeqPre = cntSeqPre + 1
                                Case "SIDE_STORY": cntSide = cntSide + 1
                                Case "SPIN_OFF": cntSpin = cntSpin + 1
                                Case "ALTERNATIVE": cntAlt = cntAlt + 1
                            End Select
                            
                            ' SËÌt·nÌ dÈlky (pouze pro relevantnÌ typy, vynech·me nap¯. Character, Other)
                            If rType = "SEQUEL" Or rType = "PREQUEL" Or rType = "SIDE_STORY" Or rType = "PARENT" Then
                                Dim nodeEp As Long, nodeDur As Long
                                If IsNull(rNode("episodes")) Then nodeEp = 0 Else nodeEp = CLng(rNode("episodes"))
                                If IsNull(rNode("duration")) Then nodeDur = 0 Else nodeDur = CLng(rNode("duration"))
                                
                                franchiseEp = franchiseEp + nodeEp
                                franchiseMin = franchiseMin + (nodeEp * nodeDur)
                            End If
                        End If
                    Next edge
                End If
                
                relInfo("cnt_seq_pre") = cntSeqPre
                relInfo("cnt_side") = cntSide
                relInfo("cnt_spin") = cntSpin
                relInfo("cnt_alt") = cntAlt
                relInfo("franchise_ep") = franchiseEp
                relInfo("franchise_min") = franchiseMin
                
                ' === UloûenÌ do hlavnÌho slovnÌku ===
                Dim combinedData As Object: Set combinedData = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                combinedData.Add "tags", tagsList
                combinedData.Add "relations", relInfo
                
                If Not resultDict.Exists(malID) Then resultDict.Add malID, combinedData
            End If
        Next recKey
    Else
        Debug.Print "AniList API Error: " & http.status
    End If

ErrorHandler:
    Set http = Nothing
    Set FetchAnilistTags_Batch = resultDict
End Function

Private Sub CreateAnilistTagComment(ByRef targetCell As Range, ByVal animeTitle As String, ByVal tagsList As Object)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim tier1 As Object: Set tier1 = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim tier2 As Object: Set tier2 = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim tier3 As Object: Set tier3 = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim tagInfo As Variant
    For Each tagInfo In tagsList
        Dim rank As Long: rank = tagInfo("rank")
        Dim Name As String: Name = tagInfo("name")
        If rank >= 80 Then
            tier1.Add Name
        ElseIf rank >= 60 Then
            tier2.Add Name
        ElseIf rank >= ANILIST_MIN_RANK Then
            tier3.Add Name
        End If
    Next tagInfo
    Dim spoilerText As String
    If ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS Then spoilerText = " (w/ spoilers)" Else spoilerText = " (w/o spoilers)"
    Dim part1 As String: part1 = "AniList Custom Tags" & spoilerText & " - "
    Dim part2 As String: part2 = animeTitle
    Dim headerLine As String: headerLine = part1 & part2
    Dim tier1Label As String: tier1Label = "100% - 80%:"
    Dim tier2Label As String: tier2Label = "79% - 60%:"
    Dim tier3Label As String: tier3Label = "59% - 30%:"
    Dim commentText As String: commentText = headerLine
    If tier1.count > 0 Then commentText = commentText & vbCrLf & tier1Label & " " & Join(tier1.ToArray, ", ")
    If tier2.count > 0 Then commentText = commentText & vbCrLf & tier2Label & " " & Join(tier2.ToArray, ", ")
    If tier3.count > 0 Then commentText = commentText & vbCrLf & tier3Label & " " & Join(tier3.ToArray, ", ")
    targetCell.ClearComments
    targetCell.AddComment commentText
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame
        .AutoSize = True
        .Characters.Font.Name = "Arial"
        .Characters.Font.size = 9
        .Characters(1, Len(part1)).Font.Bold = True
        .Characters(1, Len(part1)).Font.Italic = False
        .Characters(Len(part1) + 1, Len(part2)).Font.Bold = True
        .Characters(Len(part1) + 1, Len(part2)).Font.Italic = True
        Dim startPos As Long
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, tier1Label)
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier1Label)).Font.Bold = True
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier1Label)).Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleSingle
        End If
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, tier2Label)
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier2Label)).Font.Bold = True
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier2Label)).Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleSingle
        End If
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, tier3Label)
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier3Label)).Font.Bold = True
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier3Label)).Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleSingle
        End If
    End With
    Set tier1 = Nothing: Set tier2 = Nothing: Set tier3 = Nothing
End Sub

Private Sub CreateAnilistRelationsComment(ByRef targetCell As Range, ByVal relData As Object)
    On Error Resume Next
    If relData Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    ' 1. P¯Ìprava dat
    Dim fmt As String: fmt = relData("format")
    If fmt = "TV_SHORT" Then fmt = "TV Short"
    If fmt = "MOVIE" Then fmt = "Movie"
    If fmt = "SPECIAL" Then fmt = "Special"
    
    Dim ep As Long: ep = relData("episodes")
    Dim dur As Long: dur = relData("duration")
    Dim totalDurHours As Double
    If dur > 0 Then totalDurHours = (ep * dur) / 60 Else totalDurHours = 0
    
    Dim franEp As Long: franEp = relData("franchise_ep")
    Dim franMin As Long: franMin = relData("franchise_min")
    Dim franHours As Double: franHours = franMin / 60
    
    ' -- NOV…: Form·tov·nÌ sezÛny (nap¯. WINTER 2024 -> Winter 2024) --
    Dim valSeason As String
    valSeason = StrConv(relData("season_text"), vbProperCase)
    If Trim(valSeason) = "" Then valSeason = "N/A"
    
    ' P¯Ìprava hodnot pro zv˝raznÏnÌ
    Dim valFormat As String: valFormat = fmt
    Dim valDuration As String: valDuration = Replace(Format(totalDurHours, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " h"
    Dim valFranchiseEp As String: valFranchiseEp = franEp & " EP"
    
    ' 2. SestavenÌ textu
    Dim header As String: header = "S…RIE & VZTAHY (AniList Data)"
    Dim line As String: line = "---------------------------------------"
    
    Dim basicInfo As String
    ' P¯id·n pr·zdn˝ ¯·dek a DATUM VYSÕL¡NÕ
    basicInfo = "Form·t: " & valFormat & " (" & ep & " epizod)" & vbCrLf & _
                "DÈlka: " & valDuration & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                "DATUM VYSÕL¡NÕ:" & vbCrLf & _
                valSeason
                
    Dim relsInfo As String: relsInfo = ""
    If relData("cnt_seq_pre") > 0 Or relData("cnt_side") > 0 Or relData("cnt_spin") > 0 Or relData("cnt_alt") > 0 Then
        relsInfo = vbCrLf & vbCrLf & "DALäÕ V S…RII:"
        If relData("cnt_seq_pre") > 0 Then relsInfo = relsInfo & vbCrLf & relData("cnt_seq_pre") & "x Sequel/Prequel"
        If relData("cnt_side") > 0 Then relsInfo = relsInfo & vbCrLf & relData("cnt_side") & "x Side Story (VedlejöÌ p¯ÌbÏh)"
        If relData("cnt_spin") > 0 Then relsInfo = relsInfo & vbCrLf & relData("cnt_spin") & "x Spin-off"
        If relData("cnt_alt") > 0 Then relsInfo = relsInfo & vbCrLf & relData("cnt_alt") & "x Alternative Setting"
    End If
    
    Dim totalInfo As String
    totalInfo = vbCrLf & vbCrLf & "D…LKA S…RIE:" & vbCrLf & _
                valFranchiseEp & " (" & Replace(Format(franHours, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " h)"
                
    Dim finalComment As String
    finalComment = header & vbCrLf & line & vbCrLf & basicInfo & relsInfo & totalInfo
    
    ' 3. VloûenÌ a form·tov·nÌ
    targetCell.ClearComments
    targetCell.AddComment finalComment
    
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame
        .AutoSize = True
        .Characters.Font.Name = "Tahoma"
        .Characters.Font.size = 9
        
        Dim startPos As Long
        Dim searchStr As String
        
        ' A) TuËn˝ HlavnÌ Nadpis
        .Characters(1, Len(header)).Font.Bold = True
        
        ' B) TuËn˝ Form·t
        searchStr = "Form·t: "
        startPos = InStr(1, finalComment, searchStr)
        If startPos > 0 Then .Characters(startPos + Len(searchStr), Len(valFormat)).Font.Bold = True
        
        ' C) TuËn· DÈlka
        searchStr = "DÈlka: "
        startPos = InStr(1, finalComment, searchStr)
        If startPos > 0 Then .Characters(startPos + Len(searchStr), Len(valDuration)).Font.Bold = True
        
        ' D) TuËnÈ DATUM VYSÕL¡NÕ (Nadpis)
        searchStr = "DATUM VYSÕL¡NÕ:"
        startPos = InStr(1, finalComment, searchStr)
        If startPos > 0 Then .Characters(startPos, Len(searchStr)).Font.Bold = True
        
        ' E) TuËnÈ poËty u vztah˘
        startPos = InStr(1, finalComment, "DALäÕ V S…RII:")
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, 14).Font.Bold = True
            Dim relTypes As Variant: relTypes = Array("Sequel/Prequel", "Side Story", "Spin-off", "Alternative Setting")
            Dim relCounts As Variant: relCounts = Array("cnt_seq_pre", "cnt_side", "cnt_spin", "cnt_alt")
            Dim k As Integer
            For k = LBound(relTypes) To UBound(relTypes)
                Dim countVal As Long: countVal = relData(relCounts(k))
                If countVal > 0 Then
                    Dim fullLineStr As String: fullLineStr = countVal & "x " & relTypes(k)
                    Dim linePos As Long: linePos = InStr(startPos, finalComment, fullLineStr)
                    If linePos > 0 Then .Characters(linePos, Len(CStr(countVal)) + 1).Font.Bold = True
                End If
            Next k
        End If
        
        ' F) TuËn· D…LKA S…RIE
        startPos = InStr(1, finalComment, "D…LKA S…RIE:")
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, 12).Font.Bold = True
            Dim valPos As Long: valPos = InStr(startPos, finalComment, valFranchiseEp)
            If valPos > 0 Then .Characters(valPos, Len(valFranchiseEp)).Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End With
End Sub

' ===================================================================================
' == NOV¡ FUNKCE PRO VðPO»ET BAREVN…HO PÿECHODU (GRADIENT) ==
' ===================================================================================
Private Function GetColorGradient(ByVal val As Double, ByVal minVal As Double, ByVal maxVal As Double) As Long
    ' Definovany barvy RGB
    ' Low (Ëerven·): #F8696B -> RGB(248, 105, 107)
    ' Mid (ûlut·):   #FFEB84 -> RGB(255, 235, 132)
    ' High (zelen·): #63BE7B -> RGB(99, 190, 123)
    
    Dim r As Integer, g As Integer, b As Integer
    Dim fraction As Double
    Dim midVal As Double
    
    ' O¯ez·nÌ hodnot
    If val < minVal Then val = minVal
    If val > maxVal Then val = maxVal
    
    ' V˝poËet st¯ednÌ hodnoty (ne nutnÏ aritmetick˝ pr˘mÏr, ale pro jednoduchost line·rnÌ st¯ed mezi body)
    ' Pozn: Excel 3-color scale obvykle bere percentile 50, my pouûijeme aritmetick˝ st¯ed mezi min a max,
    ' pokud nenÌ specifikov·no jinak. Pro rating 6.0 aû 9.31 je st¯ed cca 7.65.
    midVal = (minVal + maxVal) / 2
    
    If val <= midVal Then
        ' Interpolace mezi »ervenou a élutou
        fraction = (val - minVal) / (midVal - minVal)
        r = 248 + (255 - 248) * fraction
        g = 105 + (235 - 105) * fraction
        b = 107 + (132 - 107) * fraction
    Else
        ' Interpolace mezi élutou a Zelenou
        fraction = (val - midVal) / (maxVal - midVal)
        r = 255 + (99 - 255) * fraction
        g = 235 + (190 - 235) * fraction
        b = 132 + (123 - 132) * fraction
    End If
    
    GetColorGradient = RGB(r, g, b)
End Function

Private Sub CreateAddToPlanButton(ByRef ws As Worksheet, ByVal targetRow As Long, ByVal animeID As Long, ByVal isAlreadyInPlan As Boolean)
    Dim btnBox As Shape
    Dim targetCell As Range
    
    Set targetCell = ws.Range("T" & targetRow)
    
    Const BOX_HEIGHT As Single = 15
    Const BOX_WIDTH As Single = 60
    Const gap As Single = 5
    Const BOTTOM_PADDING As Single = 3
    
    ' V˝poËet pozice (nalevo od UserRecLink)
    Dim btnLeft As Single
    btnLeft = targetCell.left + targetCell.Width - 110 - BOX_WIDTH - gap
    
    Set btnBox = ws.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, _
        btnLeft, _
        targetCell.top + targetCell.Height - BOX_HEIGHT - BOTTOM_PADDING, _
        BOX_WIDTH, BOX_HEIGHT)
        
    btnBox.Name = "AddToPlanBtn_" & targetRow
    btnBox.AlternativeText = CStr(animeID)
    
    ' === ROZHODOVACÕ LOGIKA ===
    With btnBox
        With .TextFrame2.TextRange
            .Font.size = 9
            .Font.Name = "Arial"
            .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            .Font.Bold = msoTrue
            .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = msoAlignCenter
            
            If isAlreadyInPlan Then
                ' VARIANTA: JIé V PL¡NU (äedÈ, mrtvÈ)
                .text = "PÿID¡NO"
                btnBox.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(150, 150, 150)
                ' Nep¯i¯azujeme .OnAction => tlaËÌtko nic nedÏl·
            Else
                ' VARIANTA: NENÕ V PL¡NU (ZelenÈ, aktivnÌ)
                .text = "+ PTW"
                btnBox.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 176, 80)
                btnBox.OnAction = "AddAnimeToPlan_Click" ' Pouze zde p¯i¯adÌme makro
            End If
        End With
        
        .Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
    End With
End Sub

Public Sub AddAnimeToPlan_Click()
    ' Toto makro se spustÌ po kliknutÌ na tlaËÌtko "+ PTW"
    
    Dim malID As Long
    Dim shpName As String
    Dim btnShape As Shape
    
    On Error Resume Next
    shpName = Application.Caller
    Set btnShape = ActiveSheet.Shapes(shpName)
    If btnShape Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    malID = CLng(btnShape.AlternativeText)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    Dim wsPlan As Worksheet
    Dim tbl As ListObject
    Set wsPlan = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME PLAN TO WATCH + FUTURES")
    On Error Resume Next
    Set tbl = wsPlan.ListObjects("AnimePlanToWatch")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If tbl Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Nenaöel jsem tabulku 'AnimePlanToWatch' na listu pl·nu.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Application.Cursor = xlWait
    Dim animeData As Object
    Set animeData = FetchSeriesData_AniList(malID)
    Application.Cursor = xlDefault
    
    If animeData Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se st·hnout data z AniListu.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' Kontrola duplicity
    Dim checkRng As Range
    Dim found As Range
    Set checkRng = tbl.ListColumns("N·zev").DataBodyRange
    If Not checkRng Is Nothing Then
        Set found = checkRng.Find(animeData("title"), LookIn:=xlValues, LookAt:=xlWhole)
        If Not found Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox "Anime '" & animeData("title") & "' uû v seznamu m·ö!", vbInformation
            Exit Sub
        End If
    End If
    
    ' === OPRAVA 4: InputBox bez p¯edvyplnÏnÈho textu ===
    Dim userReason As String
    userReason = InputBox("Zadej d˘vod pro p¯id·nÌ '" & animeData("title") & "':", "P¯idat do Plan to Watch", "")
    If StrPtr(userReason) = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' Z·pis do tabulky
    Dim newRow As ListRow
    Set newRow = tbl.ListRows.Add
    
    ' === OPRAVA 1: Sloupec F (TeËka za ËÌslem) ===
    Dim cellF As Range
    Set cellF = wsPlan.Cells(newRow.Range.row, "F")
    
    ' ZkopÌrujeme form·t z buÚky nad nÌ
    cellF.Offset(-1, 0).Copy
    cellF.PasteSpecial xlPasteFormats
    Application.CutCopyMode = False
    
    ' VypoËÌt·me ËÌslo a vynutÌme form·t TEXT, aby nezmizela teËka
    Dim prevVal As String
    Dim newNum As Long
    prevVal = cellF.Offset(-1, 0).Value
    
    cellF.NumberFormat = "@" ' NastavÌ buÚku jako Text
    
    If IsNumeric(Replace(prevVal, ".", "")) Then
        newNum = CLng(Replace(prevVal, ".", "")) + 1
        cellF.Value = newNum & "." ' TeËka tam nynÌ z˘stane
    Else
        cellF.Value = "1."
    End If
    
    ' B) Z·pis dat
    With newRow
        .Range(1, tbl.ListColumns("N·zev").Index).Value = animeData("title")
        .Range(1, tbl.ListColumns("Typ").Index).Value = animeData("type")
        .Range(1, tbl.ListColumns("PoËet epizod").Index).Value = animeData("episodes")
        .Range(1, tbl.ListColumns("»as na epizodu (min)").Index).Value = animeData("duration_avg")
        .Range(1, tbl.ListColumns("Doba pro zhlÈdnutÌ (min)").Index).FormulaR1C1 = "=[@[PoËet epizod]]*[@[»as na epizodu (min)]]"
        .Range(1, tbl.ListColumns("D˘vod, proË chci zhlÈdnout").Index).Value = userReason
        .Range(1, tbl.ListColumns("Vyd·no nebo je vysÌl·no?").Index).Value = animeData("status_text")
    End With
    
    ' === OPRAVA 3: Feedback "PÿID¡NO" ===
    With btnShape.TextFrame2.TextRange
        .text = "PÿID¡NO"
        .Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255)
    End With
    btnShape.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(150, 150, 150)
    btnShape.OnAction = ""
    
    MsgBox "Anime bylo ˙spÏönÏ p¯id·no.", vbInformation
End Sub

Private Function FetchSeriesData_AniList(ByVal malID As Long) As Object
    ' St·hne data pro konkrÈtnÌ ID a pokud je to sÈrie, agreguje ji.
    Dim http As Object
    Dim query As String
    Dim payload As String
    Dim result As Object: Set result = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    ' GraphQL Query: St·hne info o anime + jeho vztahy
    query = "query ($id: Int) { Media (idMal: $id, type: ANIME) { " & _
            "title { english romaji } format status episodes duration " & _
            "relations { edges { relationType node { format episodes duration status } } } " & _
            "} }"
            
payload = "{ ""query"": " & JsonConverter.ConvertToJson(query) & ", ""variables"": { ""id"": " & malID & " } }"
    
    Set http = GetHttpObject() ' <--- ZMÃNA
    http.Open "POST", ANILIST_API_URL, False
    http.setRequestHeader "Content-Type", "application/json"
    http.setRequestHeader "Accept", "application/json"
    http.sEnd payload
    
    If http.status = 200 Then
        Dim json As Object: Set json = JsonConverter.ParseJson(http.responseText)
        If json.Exists("data") And Not IsNull(json("data")("Media")) Then
            Dim media As Object: Set media = json("data")("Media")
            
            ' Z·kladnÌ data
            Dim title As String
            If Not IsNull(media("title")("english")) Then title = media("title")("english") Else title = media("title")("romaji")
            
            Dim baseFormat As String: baseFormat = CStr(media("format"))
            Dim totalEp As Long
            If IsNull(media("episodes")) Then totalEp = 0 Else totalEp = CLng(media("episodes"))
            
            Dim duration As Long
            If IsNull(media("duration")) Then duration = 0 Else duration = CLng(media("duration"))
            
            Dim totalMinutes As Long: totalMinutes = totalEp * duration
            
            Dim status As String: status = CStr(media("status"))
            Dim isAiring As Boolean: isAiring = (status = "RELEASING" Or status = "NOT_YET_RELEASED")
            
            ' Agregace sÈrie (Multiple logika)
            Dim isMultiple As Boolean: isMultiple = False
            
            If media.Exists("relations") Then
                Dim edge As Variant
                For Each edge In media("relations")("edges")
                    Dim rType As String: rType = edge("relationType")
                    Dim rNode As Object: Set rNode = edge("node")
                    
                    If Not rNode Is Nothing Then
                        ' SËÌt·me pouze Prequely, Sequely, Parent, Summary
                        If rType = "SEQUEL" Or rType = "PREQUEL" Or rType = "PARENT" Or rType = "SIDE_STORY" Then
                            isMultiple = True ' Naöli jsme relevantnÌ vztah -> je to sÈrie
                            
                            Dim nEp As Long, nDur As Long, nStat As String
                            If IsNull(rNode("episodes")) Then nEp = 0 Else nEp = CLng(rNode("episodes"))
                            If IsNull(rNode("duration")) Then nDur = 0 Else nDur = CLng(rNode("duration"))
                            nStat = CStr(rNode("status"))
                            
                            totalEp = totalEp + nEp
                            totalMinutes = totalMinutes + (nEp * nDur)
                            
                            If nStat = "RELEASING" Then isAiring = True
                        End If
                    End If
                Next edge
            End If
            
            ' Finalizace v˝stupu
            result("title") = title
            
' Typ
            If isMultiple Then
                result("type") = "Multiple"
            Else
                ' P¯evedenÌ AniList form·tu na tv˘j (Movie, TV, OVA, ONA...)
                ' PouûÌv·me Select Case, aby se zachovala velikost pÌsmen u zkratek (TV, OVA)
                Select Case UCase(baseFormat)
                    Case "TV", "TV_SHORT"
                        result("type") = "TV"
                    Case "OVA"
                        result("type") = "OVA"
                    Case "ONA"
                        result("type") = "ONA"
                    Case "MOVIE"
                        result("type") = "Movie"
                    Case "SPECIAL"
                        result("type") = "Special"
                    Case "MUSIC"
                        result("type") = "Music"
                    Case Else
                        ' Fallback pro ostatnÌ (nap¯. Unknown)
                        result("type") = StrConv(baseFormat, vbProperCase)
                End Select
            End If
            
            result("episodes") = totalEp
            
            ' Pr˘mÏrn˝ Ëas na epizodu (aby sedÏl vzorec K = I * J)
            If totalEp > 0 Then
                result("duration_avg") = Round(totalMinutes / totalEp, 0)
            Else
                result("duration_avg") = duration
            End If
            
            ' Status text
            If isAiring Then result("status_text") = "AIRING!" Else result("status_text") = "Vyd·no"
            
            Set FetchSeriesData_AniList = result
        Else
            Set FetchSeriesData_AniList = Nothing
        End If
    Else
        Set FetchSeriesData_AniList = Nothing
    End If
    Exit Function

ErrorHandler:
    Set FetchSeriesData_AniList = Nothing
End Function

' ===================================================================================
' == INFORMATIVNÕ KOMENT¡ÿ S NASTAVENÕM ==
' ===================================================================================
Private Sub CreateSettingsInfoComment(ByRef ws As Worksheet)
    Dim targetCell As Range
    Dim commentText As String
    Dim separator As String
    Dim totalWeight As Long
    
    Set targetCell = ws.Range("A3")
    separator = String(50, "-")
    
    ' Celkov· v·ha pro kontrolu
    totalWeight = RELEVANCE_W_IN_PLAN + RELEVANCE_W_MAL_SCORE + RELEVANCE_W_GENRE_THEME + _
                  RELEVANCE_W_LENGTH + RELEVANCE_W_POPULARITY + RELEVANCE_W_VOTES
    
    ' SestavenÌ textu koment·¯e - rozdÏleno kv˘li limitu VBA
    commentText = "AKTUALNI NASTAVENI RELEVANCE" & vbCrLf & separator & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    commentText = commentText & "VAHY FAKTORU:" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  V planu (PTW bonus):     " & Format(RELEVANCE_W_IN_PLAN, "0") & " b." & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  MAL skore:               " & Format(RELEVANCE_W_MAL_SCORE, "0") & " b." & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Zanry a temata:          " & Format(RELEVANCE_W_GENRE_THEME, "0") & " b." & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Delka anime:             " & Format(RELEVANCE_W_LENGTH, "0") & " b." & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Popularita:              " & Format(RELEVANCE_W_POPULARITY, "0") & " b." & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Pocet hlasu doporuceni:  " & Format(RELEVANCE_W_VOTES, "0") & " b." & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & vbCrLf & "  Celkova vaha:            " & Format(totalWeight, "0") & " b." & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & separator & vbCrLf & "NASTAVENI DELKY:" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Idealni pocet epizod:    " & Format(IDEAL_EPISODES, "0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Idealni delka ep. (min): " & Format(IDEAL_DURATION_MIN, "0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Max. penalizace (min):   " & Format(MAX_PENALTY_RANGE_MIN, "0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & separator & vbCrLf & "PRAHOVE HODNOTY RELEVANCE:" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Vysoka (zelena):         >= " & Format(THRESHOLD_HIGH, "0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Stredni (zluta):         >= " & Format(THRESHOLD_MEDIUM, "0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Nizka (cervena):         < " & Format(THRESHOLD_MEDIUM, "0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & separator & vbCrLf & "NASTAVENI POPULARITY:" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Hidden gem ultra:        < " & Format(POP_TIER1_ULTRA, "#,##0") & " clenu" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Hidden gem:              < " & Format(POP_TIER2_HIDDEN, "#,##0") & " clenu" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Normal:                  < " & Format(POP_TIER3_NORMAL, "#,##0") & " clenu" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Quite known:             < " & Format(POP_TIER4_KNOWN, "#,##0") & " clenu" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Mainstream:              >= " & Format(POP_TIER4_KNOWN, "#,##0") & " clenu" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & separator & vbCrLf & "NASTAVENI HLASU:" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Max. hlasu pro plne skore:  " & Format(MAX_VOTES_FOR_SCORE, "0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Min. skore pro pop. bonus:  " & Format(MIN_SCORE_FOR_POP_BONUS, "0.0") & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & separator & vbCrLf & "FILTRY:" & vbCrLf
    commentText = commentText & "  Anime z planu (PTW):        Zobrazuji"

    
    ' Vymaz·nÌ starÈho koment·¯e a vytvo¯enÌ novÈho
    targetCell.ClearComments
    targetCell.AddComment commentText
    
    ' Form·tov·nÌ koment·¯e
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape
        .TextFrame.AutoSize = True
        With .TextFrame.Characters
            .Font.Name = "Consolas"
            .Font.size = 9
        End With
        
        ' TuËn˝ nadpis
        Dim headerEnd As Long
        headerEnd = InStr(1, commentText, vbCrLf)
        If headerEnd > 0 Then
            .TextFrame.Characters(1, headerEnd - 1).Font.Bold = True
        End If
        
        ' TuËnÈ sekce
        Dim sections As Variant
        sections = Array("VAHY FAKTORU:", "NASTAVENI DELKY:", "PRAHOVE HODNOTY RELEVANCE:", _
                         "NASTAVENI POPULARITY:", "NASTAVENI HLASU:", "FILTRY:")
        
        Dim sec As Variant
        Dim startPos As Long
        For Each sec In sections
            startPos = InStr(1, commentText, CStr(sec))
            If startPos > 0 Then
                .TextFrame.Characters(startPos, Len(CStr(sec))).Font.Bold = True
            End If
        Next sec
        
        ' TuËn· celkov· v·ha
        Dim totalWeightText As String
        totalWeightText = "Celkova vaha:"
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, totalWeightText)
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .TextFrame.Characters(startPos, Len(totalWeightText)).Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End With
End Sub
