Private Type json_Options
    ' VBA only stores 15 significant digits, so any numbers larger than that are truncated
    ' This can lead to issues when BIGINT's are used (e.g. for Ids or Credit Cards), as they will be invalid above 15 digits
    ' See: http://support.microsoft.com/kb/269370
    '
    ' By default, VBA-JSON will use String for numbers longer than 15 characters that contain only digits
    ' to override set `JsonConverter.JsonOptions.UseDoubleForLargeNumbers = True`
    UseDoubleForLargeNumbers As Boolean

    ' The JSON standard requires object keys to be quoted (" or '), use this option to allow unquoted keys
    AllowUnquotedKeys As Boolean

    ' The solidus (/) is not required to be escaped, use this option to escape them as \/ in ConvertToJson
    EscapeSolidus As Boolean
End Type
Public JsonOptions As json_Options

' ============================================= '
' Public Methods
' ============================================= '

''
' Convert JSON string to object (Dictionary/Collection)
'
' @method ParseJson
' @param {String} json_String
' @return {Object} (Dictionary or Collection)
' @throws 10001 - JSON parse error
''
Public Function ParseJson(ByVal JsonString As String) As Object
    Dim json_Index As Long
    json_Index = 1

    ' Remove vbCr, vbLf, and vbTab from json_String
    JsonString = VBA.Replace(VBA.Replace(VBA.Replace(JsonString, VBA.vbCr, ""), VBA.vbLf, ""), VBA.vbTab, "")

    json_SkipSpaces JsonString, json_Index
    Select Case VBA.Mid$(JsonString, json_Index, 1)
    Case "{"
        Set ParseJson = json_ParseObject(JsonString, json_Index)
    Case "["
        Set ParseJson = json_ParseArray(JsonString, json_Index)
    Case Else
        ' Error: Invalid JSON string
        err.Raise 10001, "JSONConverter", json_ParseErrorMessage(JsonString, json_Index, "Expecting '{' or '['")
    End Select
End Function

''
' Convert object (Dictionary/Collection/Array) to JSON
'
' @method ConvertToJson
' @param {Variant} JsonValue (Dictionary, Collection, or Array)
' @param {Integer|String} Whitespace "Pretty" print json with given number of spaces per indentation (Integer) or given string
' @return {String}
''
Public Function ConvertToJson(ByVal JsonValue As Variant, Optional ByVal Whitespace As Variant, Optional ByVal json_CurrentIndentation As Long = 0) As String
    Dim json_Buffer As String
    Dim json_BufferPosition As Long
    Dim json_BufferLength As Long
    Dim json_Index As Long
    Dim json_LBound As Long
    Dim json_UBound As Long
    Dim json_IsFirstItem As Boolean
    Dim json_Index2D As Long
    Dim json_LBound2D As Long
    Dim json_UBound2D As Long
    Dim json_IsFirstItem2D As Boolean
    Dim json_Key As Variant
    Dim json_Value As Variant
    Dim json_DateStr As String
    Dim json_Converted As String
    Dim json_SkipItem As Boolean
    Dim json_PrettyPrint As Boolean
    Dim json_Indentation As String
    Dim json_InnerIndentation As String

    json_LBound = -1
    json_UBound = -1
    json_IsFirstItem = True
    json_LBound2D = -1
    json_UBound2D = -1
    json_IsFirstItem2D = True
    json_PrettyPrint = Not IsMissing(Whitespace)

    Select Case VBA.VarType(JsonValue)
    Case VBA.vbNull
        ConvertToJson = "null"
    Case VBA.vbDate
        ' Date
        json_DateStr = ConvertToIso(VBA.CDate(JsonValue))

        ConvertToJson = """" & json_DateStr & """"
    Case VBA.vbString
        ' String (or large number encoded as string)
        If Not JsonOptions.UseDoubleForLargeNumbers And json_StringIsLargeNumber(JsonValue) Then
            ConvertToJson = JsonValue
        Else
            ConvertToJson = """" & json_Encode(JsonValue) & """"
        End If
    Case VBA.vbBoolean
        If JsonValue Then
            ConvertToJson = "true"
        Else
            ConvertToJson = "false"
        End If
    Case VBA.vbArray To VBA.vbArray + VBA.vbByte
        If json_PrettyPrint Then
            If VBA.VarType(Whitespace) = VBA.vbString Then
                json_Indentation = VBA.String$(json_CurrentIndentation + 1, Whitespace)
                json_InnerIndentation = VBA.String$(json_CurrentIndentation + 2, Whitespace)
            Else
                json_Indentation = VBA.Space$((json_CurrentIndentation + 1) * Whitespace)
                json_InnerIndentation = VBA.Space$((json_CurrentIndentation + 2) * Whitespace)
            End If
        End If

        ' Array
        json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, "[", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength

        On Error Resume Next

        json_LBound = LBound(JsonValue, 1)
        json_UBound = UBound(JsonValue, 1)
        json_LBound2D = LBound(JsonValue, 2)
        json_UBound2D = UBound(JsonValue, 2)

        If json_LBound >= 0 And json_UBound >= 0 Then
            For json_Index = json_LBound To json_UBound
                If json_IsFirstItem Then
                    json_IsFirstItem = False
                Else
                    ' Append comma to previous line
                    json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, ",", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                End If

                If json_LBound2D >= 0 And json_UBound2D >= 0 Then
                    ' 2D Array
                    If json_PrettyPrint Then
                        json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbNewLine, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                    End If
                    json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Indentation & "[", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength

                    For json_Index2D = json_LBound2D To json_UBound2D
                        If json_IsFirstItem2D Then
                            json_IsFirstItem2D = False
                        Else
                            json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, ",", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                        End If

                        json_Converted = ConvertToJson(JsonValue(json_Index, json_Index2D), Whitespace, json_CurrentIndentation + 2)

                        ' For Arrays/Collections, undefined (Empty/Nothing) is treated as null
                        If json_Converted = "" Then
                            ' (nest to only check if converted = "")
                            If json_IsUndefined(JsonValue(json_Index, json_Index2D)) Then
                                json_Converted = "null"
                            End If
                        End If

                        If json_PrettyPrint Then
                            json_Converted = vbNewLine & json_InnerIndentation & json_Converted
                        End If

                        json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Converted, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                    Next json_Index2D

                    If json_PrettyPrint Then
                        json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbNewLine, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                    End If

                    json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Indentation & "]", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                    json_IsFirstItem2D = True
                Else
                    ' 1D Array
                    json_Converted = ConvertToJson(JsonValue(json_Index), Whitespace, json_CurrentIndentation + 1)

                    ' For Arrays/Collections, undefined (Empty/Nothing) is treated as null
                    If json_Converted = "" Then
                        ' (nest to only check if converted = "")
                        If json_IsUndefined(JsonValue(json_Index)) Then
                            json_Converted = "null"
                        End If
                    End If

                    If json_PrettyPrint Then
                        json_Converted = vbNewLine & json_Indentation & json_Converted
                    End If

                    json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Converted, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                End If
            Next json_Index
        End If

        On Error GoTo 0

        If json_PrettyPrint Then
            json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbNewLine, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength

            If VBA.VarType(Whitespace) = VBA.vbString Then
                json_Indentation = VBA.String$(json_CurrentIndentation, Whitespace)
            Else
                json_Indentation = VBA.Space$(json_CurrentIndentation * Whitespace)
            End If
        End If

        json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Indentation & "]", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength

        ConvertToJson = json_BufferToString(json_Buffer, json_BufferPosition)

    ' Dictionary or Collection
    Case VBA.vbObject
        If json_PrettyPrint Then
            If VBA.VarType(Whitespace) = VBA.vbString Then
                json_Indentation = VBA.String$(json_CurrentIndentation + 1, Whitespace)
            Else
                json_Indentation = VBA.Space$((json_CurrentIndentation + 1) * Whitespace)
            End If
        End If

        ' Dictionary
        If VBA.TypeName(JsonValue) = "Dictionary" Then
            json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, "{", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
            For Each json_Key In JsonValue.keys
                ' For Objects, undefined (Empty/Nothing) is not added to object
                json_Converted = ConvertToJson(JsonValue(json_Key), Whitespace, json_CurrentIndentation + 1)
                If json_Converted = "" Then
                    json_SkipItem = json_IsUndefined(JsonValue(json_Key))
                Else
                    json_SkipItem = False
                End If

                If Not json_SkipItem Then
                    If json_IsFirstItem Then
                        json_IsFirstItem = False
                    Else
                        json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, ",", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                    End If

                    If json_PrettyPrint Then
                        json_Converted = vbNewLine & json_Indentation & """" & json_Key & """: " & json_Converted
                    Else
                        json_Converted = """" & json_Key & """:" & json_Converted
                    End If

                    json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Converted, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                End If
            Next json_Key

            If json_PrettyPrint Then
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbNewLine, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength

                If VBA.VarType(Whitespace) = VBA.vbString Then
                    json_Indentation = VBA.String$(json_CurrentIndentation, Whitespace)
                Else
                    json_Indentation = VBA.Space$(json_CurrentIndentation * Whitespace)
                End If
            End If

            json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Indentation & "}", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength

        ' Collection
        ElseIf VBA.TypeName(JsonValue) = "Collection" Then
            json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, "[", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
            For Each json_Value In JsonValue
                If json_IsFirstItem Then
                    json_IsFirstItem = False
                Else
                    json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, ",", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                End If

                json_Converted = ConvertToJson(json_Value, Whitespace, json_CurrentIndentation + 1)

                ' For Arrays/Collections, undefined (Empty/Nothing) is treated as null
                If json_Converted = "" Then
                    ' (nest to only check if converted = "")
                    If json_IsUndefined(json_Value) Then
                        json_Converted = "null"
                    End If
                End If

                If json_PrettyPrint Then
                    json_Converted = vbNewLine & json_Indentation & json_Converted
                End If

                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Converted, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
            Next json_Value

            If json_PrettyPrint Then
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbNewLine, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength

                If VBA.VarType(Whitespace) = VBA.vbString Then
                    json_Indentation = VBA.String$(json_CurrentIndentation, Whitespace)
                Else
                    json_Indentation = VBA.Space$(json_CurrentIndentation * Whitespace)
                End If
            End If

            json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Indentation & "]", json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
        End If

        ConvertToJson = json_BufferToString(json_Buffer, json_BufferPosition)
    Case VBA.vbInteger, VBA.vbLong, VBA.vbSingle, VBA.vbDouble, VBA.vbCurrency, VBA.vbDecimal
        ' Number (use decimals for numbers)
        ConvertToJson = VBA.Replace(JsonValue, ",", ".")
    Case Else
        ' vbEmpty, vbError, vbDataObject, vbByte, vbUserDefinedType
        ' Use VBA's built-in to-string
        On Error Resume Next
        ConvertToJson = JsonValue
        On Error GoTo 0
    End Select
End Function

' ============================================= '
' Private Functions
' ============================================= '

Private Function json_ParseObject(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long) As Dictionary
    Dim json_Key As String
    Dim json_NextChar As String

    Set json_ParseObject = New Dictionary
    json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
    If VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) <> "{" Then
        err.Raise 10001, "JSONConverter", json_ParseErrorMessage(json_String, json_Index, "Expecting '{'")
    Else
        json_Index = json_Index + 1

        Do
            json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
            If VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) = "}" Then
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
                Exit Function
            ElseIf VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) = "," Then
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
                json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
            End If

            json_Key = json_ParseKey(json_String, json_Index)
            json_NextChar = json_Peek(json_String, json_Index)
            If json_NextChar = "[" Or json_NextChar = "{" Then
                Set json_ParseObject.item(json_Key) = json_ParseValue(json_String, json_Index)
            Else
                json_ParseObject.item(json_Key) = json_ParseValue(json_String, json_Index)
            End If
        Loop
    End If
End Function

Private Function json_ParseArray(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long) As Collection
    Set json_ParseArray = New Collection

    json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
    If VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) <> "[" Then
        err.Raise 10001, "JSONConverter", json_ParseErrorMessage(json_String, json_Index, "Expecting '['")
    Else
        json_Index = json_Index + 1

        Do
            json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
            If VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) = "]" Then
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
                Exit Function
            ElseIf VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) = "," Then
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
                json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
            End If

            json_ParseArray.Add json_ParseValue(json_String, json_Index)
        Loop
    End If
End Function

Private Function json_ParseValue(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long) As Variant
    json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
    Select Case VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1)
    Case "{"
        Set json_ParseValue = json_ParseObject(json_String, json_Index)
    Case "["
        Set json_ParseValue = json_ParseArray(json_String, json_Index)
    Case """", "'"
        json_ParseValue = json_ParseString(json_String, json_Index)
    Case Else
        If VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 4) = "true" Then
            json_ParseValue = True
            json_Index = json_Index + 4
        ElseIf VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 5) = "false" Then
            json_ParseValue = False
            json_Index = json_Index + 5
        ElseIf VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 4) = "null" Then
            json_ParseValue = Null
            json_Index = json_Index + 4
        ElseIf VBA.InStr("+-0123456789", VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1)) Then
            json_ParseValue = json_ParseNumber(json_String, json_Index)
        Else
            err.Raise 10001, "JSONConverter", json_ParseErrorMessage(json_String, json_Index, "Expecting 'STRING', 'NUMBER', null, true, false, '{', or '['")
        End If
    End Select
End Function

Private Function json_ParseString(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long) As String
    Dim json_Quote As String
    Dim json_Char As String
    Dim json_Code As String
    Dim json_Buffer As String
    Dim json_BufferPosition As Long
    Dim json_BufferLength As Long

    json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index

    ' Store opening quote to look for matching closing quote
    json_Quote = VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1)
    json_Index = json_Index + 1

    Do While json_Index > 0 And json_Index <= Len(json_String)
        json_Char = VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1)

        Select Case json_Char
        Case "\"
            ' Escaped string, \\, or \/
            json_Index = json_Index + 1
            json_Char = VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1)

            Select Case json_Char
            Case """", "\", "/", "'"
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Char, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Case "b"
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbBack, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Case "f"
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbFormFeed, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Case "n"
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbCrLf, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Case "r"
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbCr, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Case "t"
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, vbTab, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Case "u"
                ' Unicode character escape (e.g. \u00a9 = Copyright)
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
                json_Code = VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 4)
                json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, VBA.ChrW(VBA.val("&h" + json_Code)), json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
                json_Index = json_Index + 4
            End Select
        Case json_Quote
            json_ParseString = json_BufferToString(json_Buffer, json_BufferPosition)
            json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Exit Function
        Case Else
            json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Char, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
            json_Index = json_Index + 1
        End Select
    Loop
End Function

Private Function json_ParseNumber(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long) As Variant
    Dim json_Char As String
    Dim json_Value As String
    Dim json_IsLargeNumber As Boolean

    json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index

    Do While json_Index > 0 And json_Index <= Len(json_String)
        json_Char = VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1)

        If VBA.InStr("+-0123456789.eE", json_Char) Then
            ' Unlikely to have massive number, so use simple append rather than buffer here
            json_Value = json_Value & json_Char
            json_Index = json_Index + 1
        Else
            ' Excel only stores 15 significant digits, so any numbers larger than that are truncated
            ' This can lead to issues when BIGINT's are used (e.g. for Ids or Credit Cards), as they will be invalid above 15 digits
            ' See: http://support.microsoft.com/kb/269370
            '
            ' Fix: Parse -> String, Convert -> String longer than 15/16 characters containing only numbers and decimal points -> Number
            ' (decimal doesn't factor into significant digit count, so if present check for 15 digits + decimal = 16)
            json_IsLargeNumber = IIf(InStr(json_Value, "."), Len(json_Value) >= 17, Len(json_Value) >= 16)
            If Not JsonOptions.UseDoubleForLargeNumbers And json_IsLargeNumber Then
                json_ParseNumber = json_Value
            Else
                ' VBA.Val does not use regional settings, so guard for comma is not needed
                json_ParseNumber = VBA.val(json_Value)
            End If
            Exit Function
        End If
    Loop
End Function

Private Function json_ParseKey(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long) As String
    ' Parse key with single or double quotes
    If VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) = """" Or VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) = "'" Then
        json_ParseKey = json_ParseString(json_String, json_Index)
    ElseIf JsonOptions.AllowUnquotedKeys Then
        Dim json_Char As String
        Do While json_Index > 0 And json_Index <= Len(json_String)
            json_Char = VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1)
            If (json_Char <> " ") And (json_Char <> ":") Then
                json_ParseKey = json_ParseKey & json_Char
                json_Index = json_Index + 1
            Else
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
    Else
        err.Raise 10001, "JSONConverter", json_ParseErrorMessage(json_String, json_Index, "Expecting '""' or '''")
    End If

    ' Check for colon and skip if present or throw if not present
    json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
    If VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) <> ":" Then
        err.Raise 10001, "JSONConverter", json_ParseErrorMessage(json_String, json_Index, "Expecting ':'")
    Else
        json_Index = json_Index + 1
    End If
End Function

Private Function json_IsUndefined(ByVal json_Value As Variant) As Boolean
    ' Empty / Nothing -> undefined
    Select Case VBA.VarType(json_Value)
    Case VBA.vbEmpty
        json_IsUndefined = True
    Case VBA.vbObject
        Select Case VBA.TypeName(json_Value)
        Case "Empty", "Nothing"
            json_IsUndefined = True
        End Select
    End Select
End Function

Private Function json_Encode(ByVal json_Text As Variant) As String
    ' Reference: http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4627.txt
    ' Escape: ", \, /, backspace, form feed, line feed, carriage return, tab
    Dim json_Index As Long
    Dim json_Char As String
    Dim json_AscCode As Long
    Dim json_Buffer As String
    Dim json_BufferPosition As Long
    Dim json_BufferLength As Long

    For json_Index = 1 To VBA.Len(json_Text)
        json_Char = VBA.Mid$(json_Text, json_Index, 1)
        json_AscCode = VBA.AscW(json_Char)

        ' When AscW returns a negative number, it returns the twos complement form of that number.
        ' To convert the twos complement notation into normal binary notation, add 0xFFF to the return result.
        ' https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/kb/272138
        If json_AscCode < 0 Then
            json_AscCode = json_AscCode + 65536
        End If

        ' From spec, ", \, and control characters must be escaped (solidus is optional)

        Select Case json_AscCode
        Case 34
            ' " -> 34 -> \"
            json_Char = "\"""
        Case 92
            ' \ -> 92 -> \\
            json_Char = "\\"
        Case 47
            ' / -> 47 -> \/ (optional)
            If JsonOptions.EscapeSolidus Then
                json_Char = "\/"
            End If
        Case 8
            ' backspace -> 8 -> \b
            json_Char = "\b"
        Case 12
            ' form feed -> 12 -> \f
            json_Char = "\f"
        Case 10
            ' line feed -> 10 -> \n
            json_Char = "\n"
        Case 13
            ' carriage return -> 13 -> \r
            json_Char = "\r"
        Case 9
            ' tab -> 9 -> \t
            json_Char = "\t"
        Case 0 To 31, 127 To 65535
            ' Non-ascii characters -> convert to 4-digit hex
            json_Char = "\u" & VBA.Right$("0000" & VBA.Hex$(json_AscCode), 4)
        End Select

        json_BufferAppend json_Buffer, json_Char, json_BufferPosition, json_BufferLength
    Next json_Index

    json_Encode = json_BufferToString(json_Buffer, json_BufferPosition)
End Function

Private Function json_Peek(json_String As String, ByVal json_Index As Long, Optional json_NumberOfCharacters As Long = 1) As String
    ' "Peek" at the next number of characters without incrementing json_Index (ByVal instead of ByRef)
    json_SkipSpaces json_String, json_Index
    json_Peek = VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, json_NumberOfCharacters)
End Function

Private Sub json_SkipSpaces(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long)
    ' Increment index to skip over spaces
    Do While json_Index > 0 And json_Index <= VBA.Len(json_String) And VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_Index, 1) = " "
        json_Index = json_Index + 1
    Loop
End Sub

Private Function json_StringIsLargeNumber(json_String As Variant) As Boolean
    ' Check if the given string is considered a "large number"
    ' (See json_ParseNumber)

    Dim json_Length As Long
    Dim json_CharIndex As Long
    json_Length = VBA.Len(json_String)

    ' Length with be at least 16 characters and assume will be less than 100 characters
    If json_Length >= 16 And json_Length <= 100 Then
        Dim json_CharCode As String

        json_StringIsLargeNumber = True

        For json_CharIndex = 1 To json_Length
            json_CharCode = VBA.Asc(VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_CharIndex, 1))
            Select Case json_CharCode
            ' Look for .|0-9|E|e
            Case 46, 48 To 57, 69, 101
                ' Continue through characters
            Case Else
                json_StringIsLargeNumber = False
                Exit Function
            End Select
        Next json_CharIndex
    End If
End Function

Private Function json_ParseErrorMessage(json_String As String, ByRef json_Index As Long, ErrorMessage As String)
    ' Provide detailed parse error message, including details of where and what occurred
    '
    ' Example:
    ' Error parsing JSON:
    ' {"abcde":True}
    '          ^
    ' Expecting 'STRING', 'NUMBER', null, true, false, '{', or '['

    Dim json_StartIndex As Long
    Dim json_StopIndex As Long

    ' Include 10 characters before and after error (if possible)
    json_StartIndex = json_Index - 10
    json_StopIndex = json_Index + 10
    If json_StartIndex <= 0 Then
        json_StartIndex = 1
    End If
    If json_StopIndex > VBA.Len(json_String) Then
        json_StopIndex = VBA.Len(json_String)
    End If

    json_ParseErrorMessage = "Error parsing JSON:" & VBA.vbNewLine & _
                             VBA.Mid$(json_String, json_StartIndex, json_StopIndex - json_StartIndex + 1) & VBA.vbNewLine & _
                             VBA.Space$(json_Index - json_StartIndex) & "^" & VBA.vbNewLine & _
                             ErrorMessage
End Function

Private Sub json_BufferAppend(ByRef json_Buffer As String, _
                              ByRef json_Append As Variant, _
                              ByRef json_BufferPosition As Long, _
                              ByRef json_BufferLength As Long)
    ' VBA can be slow to append strings due to allocating a new string for each append
    ' Instead of using the traditional append, allocate a large empty string and then copy string at append position
    '
    ' Example:
    ' Buffer: "abc  "
    ' Append: "def"
    ' Buffer Position: 3
    ' Buffer Length: 5
    '
    ' Buffer position + Append length > Buffer length -> Append chunk of blank space to buffer
    ' Buffer: "abc       "
    ' Buffer Length: 10
    '
    ' Put "def" into buffer at position 3 (0-based)
    ' Buffer: "abcdef    "
    '
    ' Approach based on cStringBuilder from vbAccelerator
    ' http://www.vbaccelerator.com/home/VB/Code/Techniques/RunTime_Debug_Tracing/VB6_Tracer_Utility_zip_cStringBuilder_cls.asp
    '
    ' and clsStringAppend from Philip Swannell
    ' https://github.com/VBA-tools/VBA-JSON/pull/82

    Dim json_AppendLength As Long
    Dim json_LengthPlusPosition As Long

    json_AppendLength = VBA.Len(json_Append)
    json_LengthPlusPosition = json_AppendLength + json_BufferPosition

    If json_LengthPlusPosition > json_BufferLength Then
        ' Appending would overflow buffer, add chunk
        ' (double buffer length or append length, whichever is bigger)
        Dim json_AddedLength As Long
        json_AddedLength = IIf(json_AppendLength > json_BufferLength, json_AppendLength, json_BufferLength)

        json_Buffer = json_Buffer & VBA.Space$(json_AddedLength)
        json_BufferLength = json_BufferLength + json_AddedLength
    End If

    ' Note: Namespacing with VBA.Mid$ doesn't work properly here, throwing compile error:
    ' Function call on left-hand side of assignment must return Variant or Object
    Mid$(json_Buffer, json_BufferPosition + 1, json_AppendLength) = CStr(json_Append)
    json_BufferPosition = json_BufferPosition + json_AppendLength
End Sub

Private Function json_BufferToString(ByRef json_Buffer As String, ByVal json_BufferPosition As Long) As String
    If json_BufferPosition > 0 Then
        json_BufferToString = VBA.left$(json_Buffer, json_BufferPosition)
    End If
End Function

''
' VBA-UTC v1.0.6
' (c) Tim Hall - https://github.com/VBA-tools/VBA-UtcConverter
'
' UTC/ISO 8601 Converter for VBA
'
' Errors:
' 10011 - UTC parsing error
' 10012 - UTC conversion error
' 10013 - ISO 8601 parsing error
' 10014 - ISO 8601 conversion error
'
' @module UtcConverter
' @author tim.hall.engr@gmail.com
' @license MIT (http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.php)
'' ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ '

' (Declarations moved to top)

' ============================================= '
' Public Methods
' ============================================= '

''
' Parse UTC date to local date
'
' @method ParseUtc
' @param {Date} UtcDate
' @return {Date} Local date
' @throws 10011 - UTC parsing error
''
Public Function ParseUtc(utc_UtcDate As Date) As Date
    On Error GoTo utc_ErrorHandling

#If Mac Then
    ParseUtc = utc_ConvertDate(utc_UtcDate)
#Else
    Dim utc_TimeZoneInfo As utc_TIME_ZONE_INFORMATION
    Dim utc_LocalDate As utc_SYSTEMTIME

    utc_GetTimeZoneInformation utc_TimeZoneInfo
    utc_SystemTimeToTzSpecificLocalTime utc_TimeZoneInfo, utc_DateToSystemTime(utc_UtcDate), utc_LocalDate

    ParseUtc = utc_SystemTimeToDate(utc_LocalDate)
#End If

    Exit Function

utc_ErrorHandling:
    err.Raise 10011, "UtcConverter.ParseUtc", "UTC parsing error: " & err.Number & " - " & err.Description
End Function

''
' Convert local date to UTC date
'
' @method ConvertToUrc
' @param {Date} utc_LocalDate
' @return {Date} UTC date
' @throws 10012 - UTC conversion error
''
Public Function ConvertToUtc(utc_LocalDate As Date) As Date
    On Error GoTo utc_ErrorHandling

#If Mac Then
    ConvertToUtc = utc_ConvertDate(utc_LocalDate, utc_ConvertToUtc:=True)
#Else
    Dim utc_TimeZoneInfo As utc_TIME_ZONE_INFORMATION
    Dim utc_UtcDate As utc_SYSTEMTIME

    utc_GetTimeZoneInformation utc_TimeZoneInfo
    utc_TzSpecificLocalTimeToSystemTime utc_TimeZoneInfo, utc_DateToSystemTime(utc_LocalDate), utc_UtcDate

    ConvertToUtc = utc_SystemTimeToDate(utc_UtcDate)
#End If

    Exit Function

utc_ErrorHandling:
    err.Raise 10012, "UtcConverter.ConvertToUtc", "UTC conversion error: " & err.Number & " - " & err.Description
End Function

''
' Parse ISO 8601 date string to local date
'
' @method ParseIso
' @param {Date} utc_IsoString
' @return {Date} Local date
' @throws 10013 - ISO 8601 parsing error
''
Public Function ParseIso(utc_IsoString As String) As Date
    On Error GoTo utc_ErrorHandling

    Dim utc_Parts() As String
    Dim utc_DateParts() As String
    Dim utc_TimeParts() As String
    Dim utc_OffsetIndex As Long
    Dim utc_HasOffset As Boolean
    Dim utc_NegativeOffset As Boolean
    Dim utc_OffsetParts() As String
    Dim utc_Offset As Date

    utc_Parts = VBA.Split(utc_IsoString, "T")
    utc_DateParts = VBA.Split(utc_Parts(0), "-")
    ParseIso = VBA.DateSerial(VBA.CInt(utc_DateParts(0)), VBA.CInt(utc_DateParts(1)), VBA.CInt(utc_DateParts(2)))

    If UBound(utc_Parts) > 0 Then
        If VBA.InStr(utc_Parts(1), "Z") Then
            utc_TimeParts = VBA.Split(VBA.Replace(utc_Parts(1), "Z", ""), ":")
        Else
            utc_OffsetIndex = VBA.InStr(1, utc_Parts(1), "+")
            If utc_OffsetIndex = 0 Then
                utc_NegativeOffset = True
                utc_OffsetIndex = VBA.InStr(1, utc_Parts(1), "-")
            End If

            If utc_OffsetIndex > 0 Then
                utc_HasOffset = True
                utc_TimeParts = VBA.Split(VBA.left$(utc_Parts(1), utc_OffsetIndex - 1), ":")
                utc_OffsetParts = VBA.Split(VBA.Right$(utc_Parts(1), Len(utc_Parts(1)) - utc_OffsetIndex), ":")

                Select Case UBound(utc_OffsetParts)
                Case 0
                    utc_Offset = TimeSerial(VBA.CInt(utc_OffsetParts(0)), 0, 0)
                Case 1
                    utc_Offset = TimeSerial(VBA.CInt(utc_OffsetParts(0)), VBA.CInt(utc_OffsetParts(1)), 0)
                Case 2
                    ' VBA.Val does not use regional settings, use for seconds to avoid decimal/comma issues
                    utc_Offset = TimeSerial(VBA.CInt(utc_OffsetParts(0)), VBA.CInt(utc_OffsetParts(1)), Int(VBA.val(utc_OffsetParts(2))))
                End Select

                If utc_NegativeOffset Then: utc_Offset = -utc_Offset
            Else
                utc_TimeParts = VBA.Split(utc_Parts(1), ":")
            End If
        End If

        Select Case UBound(utc_TimeParts)
        Case 0
            ParseIso = ParseIso + VBA.TimeSerial(VBA.CInt(utc_TimeParts(0)), 0, 0)
        Case 1
            ParseIso = ParseIso + VBA.TimeSerial(VBA.CInt(utc_TimeParts(0)), VBA.CInt(utc_TimeParts(1)), 0)
        Case 2
            ' VBA.Val does not use regional settings, use for seconds to avoid decimal/comma issues
            ParseIso = ParseIso + VBA.TimeSerial(VBA.CInt(utc_TimeParts(0)), VBA.CInt(utc_TimeParts(1)), Int(VBA.val(utc_TimeParts(2))))
        End Select

        ParseIso = ParseUtc(ParseIso)

        If utc_HasOffset Then
            ParseIso = ParseIso - utc_Offset
        End If
    End If

    Exit Function

utc_ErrorHandling:
    err.Raise 10013, "UtcConverter.ParseIso", "ISO 8601 parsing error for " & utc_IsoString & ": " & err.Number & " - " & err.Description
End Function

''
' Convert local date to ISO 8601 string
'
' @method ConvertToIso
' @param {Date} utc_LocalDate
' @return {Date} ISO 8601 string
' @throws 10014 - ISO 8601 conversion error
''
Public Function ConvertToIso(utc_LocalDate As Date) As String
    On Error GoTo utc_ErrorHandling

    ConvertToIso = VBA.Format$(ConvertToUtc(utc_LocalDate), "yyyy-mm-ddTHH:mm:ss.000Z")

    Exit Function

utc_ErrorHandling:
    err.Raise 10014, "UtcConverter.ConvertToIso", "ISO 8601 conversion error: " & err.Number & " - " & err.Description
End Function

' ============================================= '
' Private Functions
' ============================================= '

#If Mac Then

Private Function utc_ConvertDate(utc_Value As Date, Optional utc_ConvertToUtc As Boolean = False) As Date
    Dim utc_ShellCommand As String
    Dim utc_Result As utc_ShellResult
    Dim utc_Parts() As String
    Dim utc_DateParts() As String
    Dim utc_TimeParts() As String

    If utc_ConvertToUtc Then
        utc_ShellCommand = "date -ur `date -jf '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' " & _
            "'" & VBA.Format$(utc_Value, "yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm:ss") & "' " & _
            " +'%s'` +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'"
    Else
        utc_ShellCommand = "date -jf '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z' " & _
            "'" & VBA.Format$(utc_Value, "yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm:ss") & " +0000' " & _
            "+'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'"
    End If

    utc_Result = utc_ExecuteInShell(utc_ShellCommand)

    If utc_Result.utc_Output = "" Then
        err.Raise 10015, "UtcConverter.utc_ConvertDate", "'date' command failed"
    Else
        utc_Parts = Split(utc_Result.utc_Output, " ")
        utc_DateParts = Split(utc_Parts(0), "-")
        utc_TimeParts = Split(utc_Parts(1), ":")

        utc_ConvertDate = DateSerial(utc_DateParts(0), utc_DateParts(1), utc_DateParts(2)) + _
            TimeSerial(utc_TimeParts(0), utc_TimeParts(1), utc_TimeParts(2))
    End If
End Function

Private Function utc_ExecuteInShell(utc_ShellCommand As String) As utc_ShellResult
#If VBA7 Then
    Dim utc_File As LongPtr
    Dim utc_Read As LongPtr
#Else
    Dim utc_File As Long
    Dim utc_Read As Long
#End If

    Dim utc_Chunk As String

    On Error GoTo utc_ErrorHandling
    utc_File = utc_popen(utc_ShellCommand, "r")

    If utc_File = 0 Then: Exit Function

    Do While utc_feof(utc_File) = 0
        utc_Chunk = VBA.Space$(50)
        utc_Read = CLng(utc_fread(utc_Chunk, 1, Len(utc_Chunk) - 1, utc_File))
        If utc_Read > 0 Then
            utc_Chunk = VBA.left$(utc_Chunk, CLng(utc_Read))
            utc_ExecuteInShell.utc_Output = utc_ExecuteInShell.utc_Output & utc_Chunk
        End If
    Loop

utc_ErrorHandling:
    utc_ExecuteInShell.utc_ExitCode = CLng(utc_pclose(utc_File))
End Function

#Else

Private Function utc_DateToSystemTime(utc_Value As Date) As utc_SYSTEMTIME
    utc_DateToSystemTime.utc_wYear = VBA.year(utc_Value)
    utc_DateToSystemTime.utc_wMonth = VBA.Month(utc_Value)
    utc_DateToSystemTime.utc_wDay = VBA.Day(utc_Value)
    utc_DateToSystemTime.utc_wHour = VBA.hour(utc_Value)
    utc_DateToSystemTime.utc_wMinute = VBA.minute(utc_Value)
    utc_DateToSystemTime.utc_wSecond = VBA.Second(utc_Value)
    utc_DateToSystemTime.utc_wMilliseconds = 0
End Function

Private Function utc_SystemTimeToDate(utc_Value As utc_SYSTEMTIME) As Date
    utc_SystemTimeToDate = DateSerial(utc_Value.utc_wYear, utc_Value.utc_wMonth, utc_Value.utc_wDay) + _
        TimeSerial(utc_Value.utc_wHour, utc_Value.utc_wMinute, utc_Value.utc_wSecond)
End Function

#End If

Modul: List9
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [List9] ---
Private Sub Worksheet_Change(ByVal Target As Range)
    If Not Intersect(Target, Me.Range("E2")) Is Nothing Then
        Dim fullText As String
        fullText = Target.Value

        If fullText = "" Then Exit Sub
        
        Application.EnableEvents = False
        
        Dim wsHelper As Worksheet
        Dim matchRow As Long
        Dim animeID As Long
        Dim animeTitle As String
        
        On Error Resume Next
        Set wsHelper = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("MAL Cache + Interactive Rating")
        If wsHelper Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox "Pomocn˝ list 'MAL Cache + Interactive Rating' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
            GoTo ReEnableEvents
        End If

        ' OPRAVA ZDE: Hled·me PÿESNOU shodu s cel˝m textem z dropdownu
        matchRow = Application.WorksheetFunction.match(fullText, wsHelper.Range("BT:BT"), 0)
        
        If err.Number = 0 Then
            ' "OËistÌme" text a nech·me jen n·zev Aé TEœ, kdyû m·me shodu
            animeTitle = Trim(Split(fullText, "|")(0))
            Target.Value = animeTitle
            
            animeID = wsHelper.Cells(matchRow, "BU").Value
            
            ' Smaûeme starÈ odkazy a p¯id·me nov˝
            Me.Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=Target, Address:="https://myanimelist.net/anime/" & animeID, TextToDisplay:=animeTitle
            
            ' Aplikujeme poûadovanÈ form·tov·nÌ
            With Target.Font
                .Bold = True
                .Italic = True
                .size = 14
                .Color = vbBlack
                .Underline = xlUnderlineStyleNone
            End With
        Else
            ' Pokud by z nÏjakÈho d˘vodu shoda nebyla nalezena, jen oËistÌme text
            Target.Value = Trim(Split(fullText, "|")(0))
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0

ReEnableEvents:
        Application.EnableEvents = True
    End If
End Sub
--- KONEC K”DU [List9] ---

Modul: Control_EP_Theme_Genre
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Control_EP_Theme_Genre] ---
' ===================================================================================
' == SAMOSTATNð KONTROLNÕ MODUL PRO "ANIME LIST" ==
' ===================================================================================

' --- Deklarace pro API a stahov·nÌ ---
#If VBA7 Then
    Public Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As LongPtr)
#Else
    Public Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As Long)
#End If

' --- Pot¯ebnÈ konstanty ---
Const API_DELAY_MS As Long = 400
Const ANIME_LIST_SHEET As String = "ANIME LIST"
Const COL_TITLE As String = "C"
Const COL_EPISODES As String = "I"
Const COL_GENRES As String = "H"
Const COL_THEMES As String = "G"

' --- Seznam ignorovan˝ch znaËek ---
Const IGNORED_GENRES As String = "Award Winning"
' --- Hodnota "X" se bude chovat jako pr·zdn· buÚka ---
Const VYLUCKA_JAKO_PRAZDNE As String = "X"

' --- HLAVNÕ KONTROLNÕ MAKRO ---
Public Sub KontrolaDatAnimeListu()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ANIME_LIST_SHEET)
    If ws Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "List '" & ANIME_LIST_SHEET & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If

    Application.Cursor = xlWait
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim malID As Long
    Dim discrepancies As String: discrepancies = ""
    Dim errorCount As Long: errorCount = 0

    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, COL_TITLE).End(xlUp).row

    For i = 2 To lastRow
        malID = 0
        ' ZÌsk·nÌ MAL ID z odkazu
        On Error Resume Next
        If ws.Cells(i, COL_TITLE).Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
            Dim urlParts() As String
            urlParts = Split(ws.Cells(i, COL_TITLE).Hyperlinks(1).Address, "/")
            If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then malID = CLng(urlParts(4))
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0
        
        If malID > 0 Then
            Application.StatusBar = "Kontroluji ¯·dek " & i & " z " & lastRow & "..."
            
            ' ZÌsk·nÌ aktu·lnÌch dat z API
            Dim details As Object: Set details = GetAnimeDetails(malID)
            
            If Not details Is Nothing Then
                Dim animeTitle As String: animeTitle = ws.Cells(i, COL_TITLE).Value
                Dim currentDiscrepancy As String: currentDiscrepancy = ""
                
                ' 1. Porovn·nÌ poËtu epizod
                Dim excelEpisodes As String: excelEpisodes = CStr(ws.Cells(i, COL_EPISODES).Value)
                Dim apiEpisodes As String
                If details.Exists("episodes") And Not IsNull(details("episodes")) Then apiEpisodes = CStr(details("episodes")) Else apiEpisodes = "?"
                If excelEpisodes <> apiEpisodes Then
                    currentDiscrepancy = currentDiscrepancy & vbTab & "- PoËet epizod (Vy: " & excelEpisodes & ", MAL: " & apiEpisodes & ")" & vbCrLf
                End If
                
                ' 2. Porovn·nÌ û·nr˘
                If Not AreTagsMatching(CStr(ws.Cells(i, COL_GENRES).Value), details("genres")) Then
                    currentDiscrepancy = currentDiscrepancy & vbTab & "- é·nry se neshodujÌ." & vbCrLf
                End If

                ' 3. Porovn·nÌ tÈmat
                If Not AreTagsMatching(CStr(ws.Cells(i, COL_THEMES).Value), details("themes")) Then
                    currentDiscrepancy = currentDiscrepancy & vbTab & "- TÈmata se neshodujÌ." & vbCrLf
                End If

                ' Pokud jsme pro danÈ anime naöli chybu, p¯id·me ji do celkovÈho seznamu
                If currentDiscrepancy <> "" Then
                    errorCount = errorCount + 1
                    discrepancies = discrepancies & errorCount & ". " & animeTitle & vbCrLf & currentDiscrepancy & vbCrLf
                End If
                
                Sleep API_DELAY_MS
            End If
        End If
    Next i

    Application.StatusBar = False
    Application.Cursor = xlDefault
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True

    ' ZobrazenÌ v˝sledk˘
    If discrepancies = "" Then
        MsgBox "Kontrola dokonËena. Vöechna data na listu 'ANIME LIST' se shodujÌ s datab·zÌ MAL.", vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "Bylo nalezeno " & errorCount & " nesrovnalostÌ:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & discrepancies, vbExclamation
    End If
End Sub


' --- POMOCN… FUNKCE PRO TENTO MODUL ---

Private Function AreTagsMatching(ByVal excelString As String, ByVal apiCollection As Object) As Boolean
' Porovn· string oddÏlen˝ st¯ednÌky s kolekcÌ tag˘ z API. Ignoruje po¯adÌ a definovanÈ v˝jimky.
On Error GoTo CleanFail
' === NOV¡ ⁄PRAVA (X = pr·zdnÈ) ===
' Pokud je v Excelu hodnota rovna "X", povaûuj ji za pr·zdn˝ ¯etÏzec
If Trim(excelString) = VYLUCKA_JAKO_PRAZDNE Then
excelString = ""
End If
' === KONEC ⁄PRAVY ===

' ZÌsk·nÌ tag˘ z API a jejich filtrace
Dim apiList As Object: Set apiList = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    If Not apiCollection Is Nothing Then
        Dim item As Object
        For Each item In apiCollection
            Dim tagName As String: tagName = CStr(item("name"))
            ' P¯eskoËÌme û·nry, kterÈ jsou v seznamu ignorovan˝ch
            If InStr(1, ";" & IGNORED_GENRES & ";", ";" & tagName & ";", vbTextCompare) = 0 Then
                apiList.Add tagName
            End If
        Next item
    End If
    apiList.Sort
    Dim apiTags As String: apiTags = Join(apiList.ToArray, ";")
    
    ' ZÌsk·nÌ tag˘ z Excelu
    Dim excelList As Object: Set excelList = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim excelParts() As String: excelParts = Split(excelString, ";")
    Dim part As Variant
    For Each part In excelParts
        If Trim(part) <> "" Then excelList.Add Trim(part)
    Next part
    excelList.Sort
    Dim excelTags As String: excelTags = Join(excelList.ToArray, ";")
    
    AreTagsMatching = (LCase(apiTags) = LCase(excelTags))
    Exit Function
    
CleanFail:
    AreTagsMatching = False
End Function

Private Function GetAnimeDetails(ByVal animeID As Long) As Object
    ' Tato funkce je zkopÌrovan· z hlavnÌho modulu, aby byl tento modul sobÏstaËn˝.
    Dim detailUrl As String: detailUrl = "https://api.jikan.moe/v4/anime/" & animeID
    Dim httpReq As Object: Set httpReq = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    httpReq.Open "GET", detailUrl, False
    httpReq.sEnd
    
    If httpReq.status = 200 Then
        ' Pot¯ebujeme JsonConverter - ujistÏte se, ûe je v projektu
        On Error Resume Next
        Set GetAnimeDetails = JsonConverter.ParseJson(httpReq.responseText)("data")
        If err.Number <> 0 Then Set GetAnimeDetails = Nothing
        On Error GoTo 0
    Else
        Set GetAnimeDetails = Nothing
    End If
End Function
--- KONEC K”DU [Control_EP_Theme_Genre] ---

Modul: LIST_Watch_Overview
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [LIST_Watch_Overview] ---
'==================================================================================================
' Module:       FinalTimelineGenerator_V22_ManualPositioning
' Author:       Gemini (upraveno dle poûadavk˘)
' Created on:   15.10.2025
' Last Updated: 09.02.2026
' Description:  Verze 22 implementuje n·sledujÌcÌ zmÏny:
'               1. Zachov·v· form·tov·nÌ (v˝plÚ, ohraniËenÌ) "TimelineBase".
'               2. Seskupuje hlaviËky a obsahovÈ boxy pro kaûd˝ mÏsÌc zvl·öù.
'               3. Zachov·v· manu·lnÏ upravenÈ pozice mÏsÌËnÌch box˘ po znovuspuötÏnÌ.
'                  (AutomatickÈ centrov·nÌ a rozmisùov·nÌ je vypnuto).
'==================================================================================================
'
' -==============================================================================================¨
' ¶                        !!! PRO AI - VéDY TOTO AKTUALIZUJ PÿI ZMÃN¡CH !!!                     ¶
' L==============================================================================================-
'
' -¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¨
' -                           PROCES ZÕSK¡NÕ NEJLEPäÕHO ANIME MÃSÕCE                             -
' L¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶-
'
' Modul generuje vizu·lnÌ Ëasovou osu s mÏsÌËnÌmi boxy obsahujÌcÌ statistiky sledovan˝ch anime.
' Pro KAéDð MÃSÕC probÌh· v˝bÏr "NejlepöÌ Anime" podle n·sledujÌcÌ hierarchie priorit:
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  HIERARCHIE VðBÃRU (Priority od 1 do 3):
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   PRIORITA 1: TOP 10 ANIME (Shapes "Top10_Anime_1" aû "Top10_Anime_10")
'   ¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶
'   ï NaËte n·zvy sÈriÌ z AlternativeText shapes na listu "OBECN… INFORMACE"
'   ï Kontroluje od ranku 1 do 10 (prvnÌ nalezen· shoda vyhr·v·)
'   ï PODMÕNKY pro v˝hru:
'     a) SÈrie se musÌ vyskytovat v danÈm mÏsÌci
'     b) Tento mÏsÌc musÌ b˝t PRVNÕ VðSKYT sÈrie (dle slovnÌku seriesFirstAppearance)
'     c) SÈrie jeötÏ nesmÌ b˝t v "pamÏti vÌtÏz˘" (top10WinnersList)
'   ï Po v˝h¯e se sÈrie p¯id· do top10WinnersList (nem˘ûe vyhr·t znovu)
'
'   PRIORITA 2: HONOURABLE MENTIONS (Shapes "HM_Anime_1" aû "HM_Anime_20")
'   ¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶
'   ï SpustÌ se POUZE pokud Priorita 1 nenaöla vÌtÏze
'   ï NaËte n·zvy z AlternativeText shapes (hmAnimeList slovnÌk)
'   ï Typy shody:
'     - S…RIE: Shoda n·zvu sÈrie anime s HM (kontroluje prvnÌ v˝skyt)
'     - STANDALONE: P¯Ìm· shoda n·zvu anime (nekontroluje prvnÌ v˝skyt)
'   ï VyhodnocenÌ:
'     - Pokud 1 HM = automatick˝ vÌtÏz
'     - Pokud vÌce HM = pouûije se bÏûn· logika POUZE na tuto podmnoûinu
'
'   PRIORITA 3: BÃéN¡ LOGIKA (é·dn· priorita nenaöla vÌtÏze)
'   ¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶
'   ï Analyzuje vöechna anime v mÏsÌci
'   ï RozhodovacÌ kritÈria (v po¯adÌ):
'     1. WINNER BY COUNT: SÈrie s nejvÌce dÌly na max. hodnocenÌ mÏsÌce
'     2. OUTLIER DETECTION: DÌl sÈrie s hodnocenÌm o 2+ body vyööÌm neû ostatnÌ
'     3. S…RIE S 2+ DÕLY: SÈrie kde alespoÚ 2 dÌly majÌ hodnocenÌ >= nejlepöÌ standalone
'     4. STANDALONE: JednotlivÈ anime s nejvyööÌm hodnocenÌm
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  PRAVIDLA PRO S…RIE VS. STANDALONE:
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   ï S…RIE: Anime s vyplnÏn˝m "N·zev sÈrie:" v koment·¯i buÚky C (sloupec ANIME LIST)
'   ï STANDALONE: Anime bez sÈrie, nebo sÈrie s pouze 1 dÌlem v mÏsÌci
'   ï SÈrie s 1 dÌlem v mÏsÌci = p¯evedena na standalone pro ˙Ëely hodnocenÌ
'   ï Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ sÈrie = souËet hodnocenÌ vöech dÌl˘ / poËet dÌl˘
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  OUTLIER DETECTION (Konstanta OUTLIER_RATING_THRESHOLD = 2):
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   ï Aplikuje se na nejlÈpe hodnocenou sÈrii mÏsÌce
'   ï Pokud m· sÈrie 2+ dÌl˘ a rozdÌl mezi 1. a 2. nejvyööÌm hodnocenÌm >= 2 body:
'     õ MÌsto sÈrie vyhr·v· ten konkrÈtnÌ dÌl (nap¯. "Attack on Titan S3E22")
'   ï P¯Ìklad: SÈrie m· dÌly s hodnocenÌm [10, 7.5, 8] õ rozdÌl 10-8 = 2 õ dÌl s 10 vyhr·v·
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  DALäÕ STATISTIKY MÃSÕCE:
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   ï NEJDELäÕ ANIME: V˝poËet (poËet epizod ◊ dÈlka epizody) pro sÈrie i standalone
'   ï NEJPO»ETNÃJäÕ TYPY: Top 3 typy (TV, Movie, OVA...) - sloupec D
'   ï NEJPO»ETNÃJäÕ é¡NRY: Top 3 û·nry - sloupec H, delimiter ";"
'   ï NEJPO»ETNÃJäÕ T…MATA: Top 3 tÈmata - sloupec G, delimiter ";"
'   ï NEJPO»ETNÃJäÕ TAGY: Top 6 AniList tag˘ z koment·¯e sloupce G (exkluduje û·nry/tÈmata)
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  DŸLEéIT… SLOVNÕKY A KOLEKCE:
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   ï seriesFirstAppearance: SlovnÌk {n·zev_sÈrie õ datum_prvnÌho_v˝skytu}
'     - Skenuje CELOU historii p¯ed filtrovan˝m obdobÌm
'     - PouûÌv· se pro ovÏ¯enÌ "prvnÌ v˝skyt" u Top10 a HM
'
'   ï top10WinnersList: SlovnÌk {n·zev_sÈrie õ True}
'     - "PamÏù" - sÈrie kter· vyhr·la nem˘ûe vyhr·t znovu
'     - PlnÌ se pr˘bÏûnÏ bÏhem zpracov·nÌ mÏsÌc˘
'
'   ï hmAnimeList: SlovnÌk {LCase(n·zev) õ True}
'     - NaËÌt· se z AlternativeText shapes "HM_Anime_X"
'
'   ï monthlyData: SlovnÌk {yyyy-mm õ Collection(animeInfo)}
'     - HlavnÌ datov· struktura s anime pro kaûd˝ mÏsÌc
'
'   ï existingPositions: SlovnÌk {yyyy-mm õ Array(left, top)}
'     - Ukl·d· pozice existujÌcÌch box˘ pro zachov·nÌ manu·lnÌch ˙prav
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  STRUKTURA animeInfo POLE (1 TO 9):
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   (1) = N·zev anime (sloupec C)
'   (2) = N·zev sÈrie (z koment·¯e sloupce C, funkce GetSeriesNameFromComment)
'   (3) = HodnocenÌ (sloupec K)
'   (4) = PoËet epizod (sloupec I)
'   (5) = é·nry (sloupec H)
'   (6) = TÈmata (sloupec G)
'   (7) = DÈlka epizody v minut·ch (sloupec J)
'   (8) = Typ (TV, Movie, OVA... - sloupec D)
'   (9) = AniList tagy (z koment·¯e sloupce G, funkce GetTagsFromComment)
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  POMOCN… FUNKCE:
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   ï GetSeriesNameFromComment(cell): Extrahuje "N·zev sÈrie:" z koment·¯e buÚky
'   ï GetTagsFromComment(cell): Extrahuje AniList tagy z koment·¯e (form·t "100%-80%: Tag1, Tag2")
'   ï GetTopItemsWithCount(col, colIdx, delim, limit, exclude): PoËÌt· a ¯adÌ top poloûky
'   ï ExtractNamesFromCountString(str): Extrahuje ËistÈ n·zvy z form·tu "Action (5x), Drama (2x)"
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  VIZU¡LNÕ VðSTUP - MÃSÕ»NÕ BOX:
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   -¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¨
'   - ˙nor 2025: +15 (celkem 847 Anime)   -  ã HlaviËka (tuËnÏ, +15 zelenÏ)
'   -¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶-
'   - NejlepöÌ Anime: SÈrie X (9.5/10)    -  ã Podtrûen˝ label, kurzÌva n·zev
'   - NejdelöÌ Anime: Film Y (2.5 h)      -
'   - NejpoËetnÏjöÌ typy: TV (10x), ...   -
'   - NejpoËetnÏjöÌ û·nry: Action (8x)... -
'   - NejpoËetnÏjöÌ tÈmata: School (5x)...-
'   - NejpoËetnÏjöÌ AniList tagy: ...     -
'   L¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶¶-
'
' ===============================================================================================
'  IMPLEMENTOVAN… OPTIMALIZACE (09.02.2026):
' ===============================================================================================
'
'   1. QUICKSORT O(n log n) mÌsto Bubble Sort O(n2)
'      - Funkce: QuickSortDescending pro ¯azenÌ top poloûek
'      - PouûÌv· se v: GetTopItemsWithCount
'
'   2. BULK NA»TENÕ DAT DO POLE
'      - Cel˝ rozsah C2:M{lastRow} naËten jednÌm vol·nÌm Range.Value
'      - Koment·¯e pre-cachov·ny do slovnÌk˘ commentsC a commentsG
'      - Eliminace tisÌc˘ jednotliv˝ch Cells(i, "X").Value vol·nÌ
'
'   3. SLOU»ENÕ SMY»EK
'      - P˘vodnÏ 2 smyËky: seriesFirstAppearance + monthlyData
'      - NynÌ 1 slouËen· smyËka prov·dÌ obÏ operace souËasnÏ
'
'   4. NATIVNÕ VBA FUNKCE
'      - IIf mÌsto Application.WorksheetFunction.Min
'
'==================================================================================================

Option Explicit

' ===============================================================================================
' POMOCN… FUNKCE (OPTIMALIZOVAN…)
' ===============================================================================================

' QuickSort pro 2D pole - ¯adÌ sestupnÏ podle sloupce 2 (hodnoty)
' Sloûitost O(n log n) mÌsto O(n2) u Bubble Sort
Private Sub QuickSortDescending(ByRef arr As Variant, ByVal low As Long, ByVal high As Long)
    Dim pivot As Long, i As Long, j As Long
    Dim tempKey As Variant, tempVal As Variant
    
    If low < high Then
        pivot = arr((low + high) \ 2, 2) ' Pivot je hodnota uprost¯ed
        i = low: j = high
        
        Do While i <= j
            Do While arr(i, 2) > pivot: i = i + 1: Loop ' Hled·me menöÌ neû pivot (sestupnÏ)
            Do While arr(j, 2) < pivot: j = j - 1: Loop ' Hled·me vÏtöÌ neû pivot
            
            If i <= j Then
                ' Swap
                tempKey = arr(i, 1): tempVal = arr(i, 2)
                arr(i, 1) = arr(j, 1): arr(i, 2) = arr(j, 2)
                arr(j, 1) = tempKey: arr(j, 2) = tempVal
                i = i + 1: j = j - 1
            End If
        Loop
        
        ' RekurzivnÌ vol·nÌ
        If low < j Then QuickSortDescending arr, low, j
        If i < high Then QuickSortDescending arr, i, high
    End If
End Sub

Private Function GetSeriesNameFromComment(cell As Range) As String
    If Not cell.Comment Is Nothing Then
        Dim lines As Variant
        lines = Split(cell.Comment.text, vbLf)
        Dim line As Variant
        For Each line In lines
            If InStr(1, Trim(line), "N·zev sÈrie:", vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
                GetSeriesNameFromComment = Trim(Mid(line, InStr(1, line, ":") + 1))
                Exit Function
            End If
        Next line
    End If
    GetSeriesNameFromComment = ""
End Function


Private Function GetTopItemsWithCount(ByVal dataCollection As Collection, ByVal colIndex As Integer, _
                                      ByVal delimiter As String, ByVal limitCount As Integer, _
                                      Optional ByVal excludeString As String = "") As String
    
    Dim dict As Object, item As Variant, subItem As Variant
    Dim arr As Variant, sortedArr As Variant, result As String
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, Temp As Variant, key As Variant
    Dim trimmedItem As String
    
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dict.CompareMode = vbTextCompare ' Ignorovat velikost pÌsmen
    
    ' P¯Ìprava "Blacklistu" (slov k vylouËenÌ)
    Dim excludeDict As Object: Set excludeDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    excludeDict.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    If excludeString <> "" Then
        Dim exArr As Variant: exArr = Split(excludeString, "|")
        For Each item In exArr
            If Trim(item) <> "" Then excludeDict(Trim(item)) = True
        Next item
    End If
    
    ' SbÏr dat
    For Each item In dataCollection
        If item(colIndex) <> "" Then
            ' Pokud je delimiter pr·zdn˝, bereme celou buÚku jako jednu hodnotu (pro Typy)
            If delimiter = "" Then
                arr = Array(item(colIndex))
            Else
                arr = Split(item(colIndex), delimiter)
            End If
            
            For Each subItem In arr
                trimmedItem = Trim(subItem)
                
                ' Logika filtrace
                Dim isExcluded As Boolean: isExcluded = False
                If LCase(trimmedItem) = "x" Then isExcluded = True ' Star· v˝jimka
                If excludeDict.Exists(trimmedItem) Then isExcluded = True ' Nov· v˝jimka (kolize)
                
                If trimmedItem <> "" And Not isExcluded Then
                    If dict.Exists(trimmedItem) Then
                        dict(trimmedItem) = dict(trimmedItem) + 1
                    Else
                        dict(trimmedItem) = 1
                    End If
                End If
            Next subItem
        End If
    Next item
    
    If dict.count = 0 Then GetTopItemsWithCount = "N/A": Exit Function
    
    ' P¯enos do pole pro ¯azenÌ
    ReDim sortedArr(1 To dict.count, 1 To 2)
    i = 1
    For Each key In dict.keys
        sortedArr(i, 1) = key
        sortedArr(i, 2) = dict(key)
        i = i + 1
    Next key
    
    ' ÿazenÌ pomocÌ QuickSort O(n log n) mÌsto Bubble Sort O(n2)
    If dict.count > 1 Then QuickSortDescending sortedArr, 1, dict.count
    
    ' SestavenÌ v˝sledku (optimalizovan· Min funkce)
    Dim maxItems As Long
    maxItems = IIf(limitCount < dict.count, limitCount, dict.count)
    For i = 1 To maxItems
        result = result & sortedArr(i, 1) & " (" & sortedArr(i, 2) & "x), "
    Next i
    
    If Len(result) > 2 Then
        GetTopItemsWithCount = left(result, Len(result) - 2)
    Else
        GetTopItemsWithCount = "N/A"
    End If
End Function

' Pomocn· funkce pro extrakci Ëist˝ch n·zv˘ z v˝slednÈho ¯etÏzce "Action (5x), Drama (2x)"
Private Function ExtractNamesFromCountString(ByVal countString As String) As String
    If countString = "N/A" Or countString = "" Then Exit Function
    Dim parts As Variant, p As Variant
    Dim finalStr As String
    parts = Split(countString, ",")
    For Each p In parts
        ' O¯Ìzneme vöe od z·vorky "(" d·l
        Dim bracketPos As Long: bracketPos = InStr(1, p, "(")
        If bracketPos > 1 Then
            finalStr = finalStr & Trim(left(p, bracketPos - 1)) & "|"
        End If
    Next p
    ExtractNamesFromCountString = finalStr
End Function


Sub GenerateAdvancedTimeline_V22()

    ' --- KONSTANTY A NASTAVENÕ ---
    Const MAX_WIDTH As Single = 1440
    Const MAX_HEIGHT As Single = 478.5
    Const TARGET_CELL As String = "EH14"
    Const ITEMS_PER_ROW As Integer = 6
    Const HORIZONTAL_SPACING As Single = 45
    Const VERTICAL_SPACING As Single = 50
    Const BOX_WIDTH As Single = 275
    Const BOX_HEIGHT As Single = 160 ' Nov· sjednocen· v˝öka (110 + 30 pro hlaviËku)
    ' Const HEADER_HEIGHT As Single = 40 ' --> Jiû nenÌ pot¯eba
    Const OUTLIER_RATING_THRESHOLD As Double = 2
    ' === NOV… KONSTANTY PRO VZHLED ===
    Const BOX_FILL_COLOR As Long = vbWhite ' (vbWhite je to samÈ jako RGB(255, 255, 255))
    Const COUNT_TEXT_COLOR As Long = 5287936 ' (RGB(146, 208, 80))
    Const FONT_SIZE_HEADER As Single = 12
    Const FONT_SIZE_CONTENT As Single = 9
    ' ===================================
    
    ' === KONSTANTY PRO SCHODOVIT… ROZLOéENÕ ===
    Const STAIR_GROUP_SIZE As Integer = 3       ' PoËet schod˘ ve skupinÏ
    Const STAIR_STEP_X As Single = 85        ' Posun doprava na kaûdÈm schodu
    Const STAIR_STEP_Y As Single = 160         ' Posun dol˘ na kaûdÈm schodu (musÌ b˝t >= BOX_HEIGHT=160)
    Const STAIR_GROUP_GAP As Single = 75      ' Mezera mezi skupinami (navÌc k poslednÌmu schodu)
    ' ==========================================

    ' === NOV… KONSTANTY PRO KONEKTORY ===
    Const CONNECTOR_COLOR As Long = 10498160      ' (RGB(170, 170, 170) - äed·)
    Const CONNECTOR_WEIGHT As Single = 2          ' (Tlouöùka v bodech)
    Const CONNECTOR_ARROW_STYLE As Long = msoArrowheadTriangle ' (Styl öipky)
    ' ===================================

    ' --- PromÏnnÈ ---
    Dim wsAnimeList As Worksheet, wsTarget As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long, j As Long
    Dim completionDate As Date, monthKey As String, key As Variant, prevKey As Variant
    Dim monthlyData As Object, sortedKeys As Object
    Dim runningTotal As Long
    Dim startTop As Single, startLeft As Single
    Dim shpMonthBox As Shape, shpConnector As Shape, shpBase As Shape
    Dim previousMonthBox As Shape ' P¯ejmenov·no z previousHeader
    Dim objList As New Collection
    Dim filterStartDate As Date, filterEndDate As Date
    Dim existingPositions As Object, shp As Shape ' NOV… promÏnnÈ pro pozicov·nÌ
    Dim totalAnimeCount As Long ' NOV¡ promÏnn· pro celkov˝ poËet
    Dim top10WinnersList As Object

    ' === NOV¡ PROMÃNN¡ PRO HM ANIME ===
    Dim hmAnimeList As Object
    ' ===================================

    ' === NOV… PROMÃNN… PRO KONTROLU PRVNÕHO VðSKYTU ===
    Dim seriesFirstAppearance As Object ' SlovnÌk pro prvnÌ v˝skyt sÈrie
    Dim k As Long ' Pomocn· promÏnn· pro smyËku
    ' ===================================================

    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    ' --- 1. PÿÕPRAVA ---
    Set wsAnimeList = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    Set wsTarget = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    ' === NOVð BLOK: NaËtenÌ seznamu Honourable Mentions ===
    Set hmAnimeList = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim hmShape As Shape
    Dim hmIndex As Long
    
    
    For hmIndex = 1 To 20
        On Error Resume Next
        Set hmShape = wsTarget.Shapes("HM_Anime_" & hmIndex)
        On Error GoTo 0
        
        If Not hmShape Is Nothing Then
            If hmShape.AlternativeText <> "" Then
                ' Ukl·d·me jako LCase pro snadnÈ porovn·nÌ
                hmAnimeList.Add LCase(hmShape.AlternativeText), True
            End If
        End If
        Set hmShape = Nothing ' Reset pro dalöÌ smyËku
    Next hmIndex
    ' ========================================================
    
    ' --- ZjiötÏnÌ celkovÈho poËtu vöech anime ---
    On Error Resume Next ' Pro p¯Ìpad, ûe by byl list pr·zdn˝
    totalAnimeCount = wsAnimeList.Cells(wsAnimeList.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row - 1
    If totalAnimeCount < 0 Then totalAnimeCount = 0
    On Error GoTo 0
    ' ------------------------------------------
    
    ' NaËtenÌ a validace datumovÈho filtru
    If Not IsDate(wsTarget.Range("EH2").Value) Or Not IsDate(wsTarget.Range("EI2").Value) Then
        MsgBox "ProsÌm, zadejte platnÈ poË·teËnÌ a koncovÈ datum do bunÏk DU2 a EH2.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    filterStartDate = CDate(wsTarget.Range("EH2").Value)
    filterEndDate = CDate(wsTarget.Range("EI2").Value)
    If filterStartDate > filterEndDate Then
        MsgBox "PoË·teËnÌ datum nem˘ûe b˝t pozdÏjöÌ neû koncovÈ datum.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' --- ROZLOéENÕ STARðCH SKUPIN (NUTN… PRO NA»TENÕ POZIC) ---
    On Error Resume Next
    wsTarget.Shapes("AdvancedTimelineGroup_V22").Ungroup ' Opraven˝ n·zev na V22
    wsTarget.Shapes("TimelineElementsGroup").Ungroup
    On Error GoTo 0
    ' -------------------------------------------------------
    
    ' ---------- ULOéENÕ POZIC EXISTUJÕCÕCH MÃSÕCŸ ----------
    Set existingPositions = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    For Each shp In wsTarget.Shapes
        If shp.Name Like "MonthGroup_*" Then
            Dim nameKey As String
            nameKey = Mid(shp.Name, 12) ' ZÌsk· "rrrr-mm" z "MonthGroup_rrrr-mm"
            If Not existingPositions.Exists(nameKey) Then
                existingPositions.Add nameKey, Array(shp.left, shp.top)
            End If
        End If
    Next shp
    ' ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    
' === NOVð K”D: Smaz·nÌ vöech star˝ch prvk˘ (kromÏ TimelineBase) ===
    
    For i = wsTarget.Shapes.count To 1 Step -1
        Set shp = wsTarget.Shapes(i)
        
        ' Maûeme VäECHNY starÈ komponenty, kromÏ TimelineBase
        If (shp.Name Like "MonthGroup_*") Or _
           (shp.Name Like "Connector_*") Or _
           (shp.Name = "TimelineElementsGroup") Or _
           (shp.Name = "AdvancedTimelineGroup_V22") Then
           
            shp.Delete
            
        End If
    Next i
    ' -----------------------------------------------------------------

    ' P¯Ìprava z·kladnÌho pl·tna
    On Error Resume Next
    Set shpBase = wsTarget.Shapes("TimelineBase")
    On Error GoTo 0

    If shpBase Is Nothing Then
        Set shpBase = wsTarget.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, wsTarget.Range(TARGET_CELL).left, wsTarget.Range(TARGET_CELL).top, MAX_WIDTH, MAX_HEIGHT)
        With shpBase
            .Name = "TimelineBase"
            .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(242, 242, 242)
            .line.Visible = msoFalse
        End With
    Else
        ' ---------- UPRAVEN¡ »¡ST: Neresetuje se form·tov·nÌ, jen pozice a velikost ---
        shpBase.Width = MAX_WIDTH
        shpBase.Height = MAX_HEIGHT
        shpBase.left = wsTarget.Range(TARGET_CELL).left
        shpBase.top = wsTarget.Range(TARGET_CELL).top
        ' Form·tov·nÌ (Fill, Line) z˘st·v· zachov·no dle manu·lnÌch ˙prav
        ' --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    End If
    
    ' === NOV…: NastavenÌ ohraniËenÌ pro TimelineBase ===
    With shpBase.line
        .Visible = msoTrue
        .ForeColor.RGB = vbBlack ' (RGB(0, 0, 0))
        .weight = 1.5 ' Tlouöùka 1,5 bodu
    End With
    ' ==================================================
    
    shpBase.ZOrder msoSendToBack

    ' --- 2. SBÃR PODROBNðCH DAT ---
    Set monthlyData = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    lastRow = wsAnimeList.Cells(wsAnimeList.Rows.count, "M").End(xlUp).row
    
    ' ===============================================================================================
    ' OPTIMALIZACE: Bulk naËtenÌ dat do pole (1 vol·nÌ mÌsto tisÌc˘)
    ' ===============================================================================================
    Dim dataArr As Variant       ' HlavnÌ data: C, D, G, H, I, J, K, M (sloupce 3,4,7,8,9,10,11,13)
    Dim commentsC As Object      ' SlovnÌk {¯·dek õ n·zev sÈrie z koment·¯e C}
    Dim commentsG As Object      ' SlovnÌk {¯·dek õ AniList tagy z koment·¯e G}
    
    ' NaËtenÌ dat jednÌm vol·nÌm - sloupce C:M (3-13)
    dataArr = wsAnimeList.Range("C2:M" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' Pre-cache koment·¯˘ (musÌme iterovat, ale jen jednou pro oba ˙Ëely)
    Set commentsC = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set commentsG = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim rowIdx As Long
    For rowIdx = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        ' Koment·¯ ze sloupce C (n·zev sÈrie)
        If Not wsAnimeList.Cells(rowIdx + 1, "C").Comment Is Nothing Then
            commentsC(rowIdx) = GetSeriesNameFromComment(wsAnimeList.Cells(rowIdx + 1, "C"))
        Else
            commentsC(rowIdx) = ""
        End If
        ' Koment·¯ ze sloupce G (AniList tagy)
        If Not wsAnimeList.Cells(rowIdx + 1, "G").Comment Is Nothing Then
            commentsG(rowIdx) = GetTagsFromComment(wsAnimeList.Cells(rowIdx + 1, "G"))
        Else
            commentsG(rowIdx) = ""
        End If
    Next rowIdx
    
    ' ===============================================================================================
    ' OPTIMALIZACE: Jedna slouËen· smyËka mÌsto dvou (seriesFirstAppearance + monthlyData)
    ' ===============================================================================================
    Set seriesFirstAppearance = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim tempSeriesName As Variant
    Dim tempDate As Date
    Dim lcaseSeriesName As String
    
    runningTotal = 0
    
    For rowIdx = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        ' dataArr sloupce: 1=C, 2=D, 3=E, 4=F, 5=G, 6=H, 7=I, 8=J, 9=K, 10=L, 11=M
        If IsDate(dataArr(rowIdx, 11)) Then ' Sloupec M = datum dokonËenÌ
            tempDate = CDate(dataArr(rowIdx, 11))
            tempSeriesName = commentsC(rowIdx)
            
            ' === Aktualizace seriesFirstAppearance (pro celou historii) ===
            If tempSeriesName <> "" Then
                lcaseSeriesName = LCase(tempSeriesName)
                If Not seriesFirstAppearance.Exists(lcaseSeriesName) Then
                    seriesFirstAppearance.Add lcaseSeriesName, tempDate
                ElseIf tempDate < CDate(seriesFirstAppearance(lcaseSeriesName)) Then
                    seriesFirstAppearance(lcaseSeriesName) = tempDate
                End If
            End If
            
            ' === SbÏr dat pro filtrovanÈ obdobÌ ===
            If tempDate >= filterStartDate And tempDate <= filterEndDate Then
                monthKey = Format(tempDate, "yyyy-mm")
                
                Dim animeInfo(1 To 9) As Variant
                animeInfo(1) = dataArr(rowIdx, 1)  ' C = N·zev anime
                animeInfo(2) = tempSeriesName       ' N·zev sÈrie (uû naËteno)
                animeInfo(3) = dataArr(rowIdx, 9)  ' K = HodnocenÌ
                animeInfo(4) = dataArr(rowIdx, 7)  ' I = PoËet epizod
                animeInfo(5) = dataArr(rowIdx, 6)  ' H = é·nry
                animeInfo(6) = dataArr(rowIdx, 5)  ' G = TÈmata
                animeInfo(7) = dataArr(rowIdx, 8)  ' J = DÈlka epizody
                animeInfo(8) = dataArr(rowIdx, 2)  ' D = Typ (TV, Movie...)
                animeInfo(9) = commentsG(rowIdx)    ' AniList tagy (uû naËteno)
                
                If Not monthlyData.Exists(monthKey) Then Set monthlyData(monthKey) = New Collection
                monthlyData(monthKey).Add animeInfo
                
            ElseIf tempDate < filterStartDate Then
                runningTotal = runningTotal + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next rowIdx
    
    If monthlyData.count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Pro zadanÈ obdobÌ nebyly nalezeny û·dnÈ z·znamy.", vbInformation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Set sortedKeys = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    For Each key In monthlyData.keys: sortedKeys.Add key: Next key
    sortedKeys.Sort

    ' --- 3. ALGORITMUS PRO KRESLENÕ ---
    startLeft = wsTarget.Range(TARGET_CELL).left
    startTop = wsTarget.Range(TARGET_CELL).top
    j = 1
    prevKey = ""
    
    Set top10WinnersList = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

    For Each key In sortedKeys
        ' ... (veöker· logika anal˝zy dat z˘st·v· naprosto stejn·) ...
        ' Vloûte sem veökerou logiku anal˝zy dat z p˘vodnÌho skriptu
        ' od "Dim monthAnimeCollection As Collection" aû po "Dim topThemesText As String: ..."
        ' Tato Ë·st se nemÏnÌ.
        
        Dim monthAnimeCollection As Collection
        Set monthAnimeCollection = monthlyData(key)
        
        ' === NOV¡ PROMÃNN¡ PRO ANALðZU NEJLEPäÕHO ANIME ===
    Dim collectionForBestAnime As Collection
    Set collectionForBestAnime = monthAnimeCollection ' V˝chozÌ stav = vöechna anime
    ' ===================================================
        
        ' === OPRAVA CHYBY PO»ÕTADLA ===
    ' Zapamatujeme si p˘vodnÌ poËet, neû kolekci moûn· p¯epÌöeme
    Dim originalMonthCount As Long
    originalMonthCount = monthAnimeCollection.count
    ' ==============================
        
        ' === NOV¡ LOGIKA: PRIORITA TOP 10 ANIME (s prioritou ranku) ===
        Dim forcedBestAnimeName As String: forcedBestAnimeName = ""
        Dim rankNum As Long
        
        For rankNum = 1 To 10
            Dim topShape As Shape
            Dim topSeriesName As String
            
            On Error Resume Next
            Set topShape = wsTarget.Shapes("Top10_Anime_" & rankNum)
            On Error GoTo 0 ' Vypnout On Error co nejd¯Ìve
            
            If Not topShape Is Nothing Then
                topSeriesName = topShape.AlternativeText ' NaËteme n·zev sÈrie z Alt Textu
                
                If topSeriesName <> "" Then ' PokraËujeme, jen pokud je nÏjak˝ n·zev nastaven
                    ' NynÌ ovÏ¯Ìme, zda se tato sÈrie v tomto mÏsÌci v˘bec vyskytuje
                    Dim anime As Variant
                    Dim foundInMonth As Boolean: foundInMonth = False
                    For Each anime In monthAnimeCollection
                        ' anime(2) je "N·zev sÈrie" z GetSeriesNameFromComment
                        ' Porovn·v·me n·zev z Top10 s n·zvem sÈrie u z·znamu
                        If LCase(anime(2)) = LCase(topSeriesName) Then
                            foundInMonth = True
                            Exit For
                        End If
                    Next anime
                    
If foundInMonth Then
                    
' === NOV¡ PODMÕNKA: OVÃÿENÕ "PAMÃTI" A PRVNÕHO VðSKYTU ===
' Zkontrolujeme, zda toto anime jiû nevyhr·lo v minulosti
If Not top10WinnersList.Exists(LCase(topSeriesName)) Then

' NOV¡ KONTROLA: OvÏ¯Ìme, zda je toto mÏsÌc prvnÌho v˝skytu sÈrie
Dim firstAppearanceMonth As String: firstAppearanceMonth = ""
Dim currentLcaseSeriesName As String: currentLcaseSeriesName = LCase(topSeriesName)

' NaËteme datum prvnÌho v˝skytu z naöeho novÈho slovnÌku
If seriesFirstAppearance.Exists(currentLcaseSeriesName) Then
firstAppearanceMonth = Format(seriesFirstAppearance(currentLcaseSeriesName), "yyyy-mm")
End If

' Priorita platÌ POUZE, pokud aktu·lnÌ mÏsÌc (key) je mÏsÌcem prvnÌho v˝skytu
' (Nebo pokud sÈrii ve slovnÌku nem·me, coû by se nemÏlo st·t, ale pro jistotu)
If firstAppearanceMonth = key Or firstAppearanceMonth = "" Then

' JeötÏ nevyhr·lo A JE TO PRVNÕ VðSKYT, takûe ho m˘ûeme pouûÌt
forcedBestAnimeName = topSeriesName ' UloûÌme n·zev, kter˝ m· vyhr·t
' Naöli jsme nejvyööÌ rank pro tento mÏsÌc, m˘ûeme skonËit hled·nÌ
Exit For

End If ' Konec kontroly firstAppearanceMonth = key

End If ' Konec kontroly top10WinnersList.Exists


                    End If
                End If
            End If
Next rankNum
    ' ==========================================================

    ' === NOV¡ LOGIKA: KONTROLA HONOURABLE MENTIONS (HM) ===
    ' Tato logika se spustÌ jen tehdy, pokud nebyl nalezen û·dn˝ TOP 10 vÌtÏz
    
    If forcedBestAnimeName = "" And hmAnimeList.count > 0 Then
        Dim hmAnimeCollection As Collection
        Set hmAnimeCollection = New Collection

        
        ' 1. Najdeme vöechna HM anime v tomto mÏsÌci, KTER¡ SPL“UJÕ PODMÕNKU PRVNÕHO VðSKYTU
        For Each anime In monthAnimeCollection
            Dim hmCheckName As String: hmCheckName = LCase(anime(1))
            Dim hmCheckSeriesName As String: hmCheckSeriesName = LCase(anime(2))
            
            Dim isHM As Boolean: isHM = False
            Dim isFirstAppearance As Boolean: isFirstAppearance = False ' V˝chozÌ stav
            Dim seriesNameForCheck As String: seriesNameForCheck = ""

            If hmCheckSeriesName <> "" And hmAnimeList.Exists(hmCheckSeriesName) Then
                ' Naöli jsme shodu podle N¡ZVU S…RIE
                isHM = True
                seriesNameForCheck = hmCheckSeriesName ' MusÌme zkontrolovat prvnÌ v˝skyt tÈto sÈrie
            ElseIf hmCheckSeriesName = "" And hmAnimeList.Exists(hmCheckName) Then
                ' Naöli jsme shodu podle N¡ZVU ANIME (je to standalone)
                isHM = True
                isFirstAppearance = True ' U standalone titul˘ prvnÌ v˝skyt nekontrolujeme (nenÌ v dict.)
            End If
            
            ' Provedeme kontrolu prvnÌho v˝skytu (jen pokud to nenÌ standalone)
            If isHM Then
                If Not isFirstAppearance Then ' MusÌme zkontrolovat (je to sÈrie)
                    firstAppearanceMonth = ""
                    
                    ' NaËteme datum prvnÌho v˝skytu z naöeho slovnÌku (F·ze A)
                    If seriesFirstAppearance.Exists(seriesNameForCheck) Then
                        firstAppearanceMonth = Format(seriesFirstAppearance(seriesNameForCheck), "yyyy-mm")
                    End If

                    ' PodmÌnka projde, POUZE pokud aktu·lnÌ mÏsÌc (key) je mÏsÌcem prvnÌho v˝skytu
                    ' (Nebo pokud sÈrii ve slovnÌku nem·me, coû by se nemÏlo st·t, ale pro jistotu)
                    If firstAppearanceMonth = key Or firstAppearanceMonth = "" Then
                        isFirstAppearance = True
                    End If
                End If
                
                ' Fin·lnÌ kontrola: Je to HM A (je to prvnÌ v˝skyt NEBO standalone)?
                If isFirstAppearance Then
                    hmAnimeCollection.Add anime
                End If
            End If
        Next anime
        
        ' 2. VyhodnocenÌ n·lez˘
        If hmAnimeCollection.count = 1 Then
