            ' Naölo se p¯esnÏ jedno HM anime, to je vÌtÏz
            If hmAnimeCollection.item(1)(2) <> "" Then ' M· n·zev sÈrie?
                forcedBestAnimeName = hmAnimeCollection.item(1)(2)
            Else ' Nem·, pouûij n·zev anime
                forcedBestAnimeName = hmAnimeCollection.item(1)(1)
            End If
            
            ' TÌmto se nastavÌ HM vÌtÏz a p¯eskoËÌ se standardnÌ logika
            
ElseIf hmAnimeCollection.count > 1 Then
            ' Naölo se vÌce HM anime. Pouûijeme bÏûnou logiku POUZE na nÏ.
            ' *** OPRAVA: NastavÌme POUZE kolekci pro "NejlepöÌ Anime" ***
            ' P˘vodnÌ "monthAnimeCollection" z˘st·v· nedotËena.
            Set collectionForBestAnime = hmAnimeCollection
            
        End If
        ' Pokud hmAnimeCollection.Count = 0, nedÏl· se nic, pokraËuje se na bÏûnou logiku.
        
    End If
    ' ==========================================================

        ' === OPRAVA CHYBY PO»ÕTADLA ===
    runningTotal = runningTotal + originalMonthCount
    ' ==============================
        Dim bestStandaloneRating As Double: bestStandaloneRating = -1
        Dim bestStandaloneName As String: bestStandaloneName = "N/A"
        Dim longestStandaloneName As String: longestStandaloneName = "N/A"
        Dim longestStandaloneDuration As Double: longestStandaloneDuration = -1
        Dim seriesData As Object: Set seriesData = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
        For Each anime In collectionForBestAnime
            Dim seriesName As Variant: seriesName = anime(2)
            Dim currentDuration As Double
            If IsNumeric(anime(4)) And IsNumeric(anime(7)) Then currentDuration = (CLng(anime(4)) * CDbl(anime(7)))
            If seriesName <> "" Then
                If Not seriesData.Exists(seriesName) Then
                    Set seriesData(seriesName) = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                    Set seriesData(seriesName)("originals") = New Collection
                    seriesData(seriesName)("duration") = 0
                End If
                seriesData(seriesName)("originals").Add anime
                seriesData(seriesName)("duration") = seriesData(seriesName)("duration") + currentDuration
            Else
                If IsNumeric(anime(3)) Then
                    If CDbl(anime(3)) > bestStandaloneRating Then bestStandaloneRating = CDbl(anime(3)): bestStandaloneName = anime(1)
                End If
                If currentDuration > longestStandaloneDuration Then longestStandaloneDuration = currentDuration: longestStandaloneName = anime(1)
            End If
        Next anime
        Dim keysToRemove As Object: Set keysToRemove = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
        For Each tempSeriesName In seriesData.keys
            If seriesData(tempSeriesName)("originals").count = 1 Then
                Dim singleAnime As Variant: singleAnime = seriesData(tempSeriesName)("originals").item(1)
                Dim singleDuration As Double
                If IsNumeric(singleAnime(4)) And IsNumeric(singleAnime(7)) Then singleDuration = (CLng(singleAnime(4)) * CDbl(singleAnime(7)))
                If IsNumeric(singleAnime(3)) Then
                    If CDbl(singleAnime(3)) > bestStandaloneRating Then bestStandaloneRating = CDbl(singleAnime(3)): bestStandaloneName = singleAnime(1)
                End If
                If singleDuration > longestStandaloneDuration Then longestStandaloneDuration = singleDuration: longestStandaloneName = singleAnime(1)
                keysToRemove.Add tempSeriesName
            End If
        Next tempSeriesName
        For Each tempSeriesName In keysToRemove
            seriesData.Remove tempSeriesName
        Next tempSeriesName
        Dim bestSeriesAvgRating As Double: bestSeriesAvgRating = -1
        Dim bestSeriesName As String: bestSeriesName = "N/A"
        Dim longestSeriesName As String: longestSeriesName = "N/A"
        Dim longestSeriesDuration As Double: longestSeriesDuration = -1
        Dim originalAnime As Variant
        For Each seriesName In seriesData.keys
            Dim sumRating As Double: sumRating = 0: Dim countRating As Integer: countRating = 0
            For Each originalAnime In seriesData(seriesName)("originals")
                If IsNumeric(originalAnime(3)) Then sumRating = sumRating + CDbl(originalAnime(3)): countRating = countRating + 1
            Next originalAnime
            If countRating > 0 Then
                Dim avgRating As Double: avgRating = sumRating / countRating
                seriesData(seriesName)("avgRating") = avgRating
                If avgRating > bestSeriesAvgRating Then bestSeriesAvgRating = avgRating: bestSeriesName = seriesName
            End If
            If seriesData(seriesName)("duration") > longestSeriesDuration Then longestSeriesDuration = seriesData(seriesName)("duration"): longestSeriesName = seriesName
        Next seriesName
        Dim bestTitleText As String, showSeriesAsBest As Boolean: showSeriesAsBest = False
        Dim outlierPartName As String: outlierPartName = "": Dim outlierPartRating As Double: outlierPartRating = -1
        Dim winnerByCountName As String: winnerByCountName = ""
        Dim maxMonthRating As Double: maxMonthRating = bestStandaloneRating
        For Each seriesName In seriesData.keys
            For Each originalAnime In seriesData(seriesName)("originals")
                If IsNumeric(originalAnime(3)) Then
                    If CDbl(originalAnime(3)) > maxMonthRating Then maxMonthRating = CDbl(originalAnime(3))
                End If
            Next originalAnime
        Next seriesName
        If maxMonthRating > -1 Then
            Dim maxCount As Integer: maxCount = 0
            Dim bestCountSeriesName As String: bestCountSeriesName = ""
            If bestStandaloneRating = maxMonthRating Then maxCount = 1
            For Each seriesName In seriesData.keys
                Dim currentCount As Integer: currentCount = 0
                For Each originalAnime In seriesData(seriesName)("originals")
                    If IsNumeric(originalAnime(3)) Then
                        If CDbl(originalAnime(3)) = maxMonthRating Then currentCount = currentCount + 1
                    End If
                Next originalAnime
                If currentCount > maxCount Then
                    maxCount = currentCount
                    bestCountSeriesName = seriesName
                ElseIf currentCount = maxCount And maxCount > 1 Then
                    If seriesData(seriesName)("avgRating") > seriesData(bestCountSeriesName)("avgRating") Then
                        bestCountSeriesName = seriesName
                    End If
                End If
            Next seriesName
            If maxCount > 1 Then winnerByCountName = bestCountSeriesName
        End If
        If bestSeriesName <> "N/A" Then
            Dim ratingsList As Object: Set ratingsList = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
            For Each originalAnime In seriesData(bestSeriesName)("originals")
                If IsNumeric(originalAnime(3)) Then ratingsList.Add CDbl(originalAnime(3))
            Next originalAnime
            If ratingsList.count >= 2 Then
                ratingsList.Sort: ratingsList.Reverse
                If ratingsList(0) - ratingsList(1) >= OUTLIER_RATING_THRESHOLD Then
                    For Each originalAnime In seriesData(bestSeriesName)("originals")
                        If IsNumeric(originalAnime(3)) And CDbl(originalAnime(3)) = ratingsList(0) Then
                            outlierPartName = originalAnime(1): outlierPartRating = ratingsList(0): Exit For
                        End If
                    Next originalAnime
                End If
            End If
            Dim highRatedPartsCount As Integer: highRatedPartsCount = 0
            For Each originalAnime In seriesData(bestSeriesName)("originals")
                If IsNumeric(originalAnime(3)) Then
                    If CDbl(originalAnime(3)) >= bestStandaloneRating Then highRatedPartsCount = highRatedPartsCount + 1
                End If
            Next originalAnime
            If highRatedPartsCount >= 2 Then showSeriesAsBest = True
        End If
        Dim formattedRating As String
        If winnerByCountName <> "" Then
            formattedRating = Replace(Format(seriesData(winnerByCountName)("avgRating"), "0.0"), ",0", "")
            bestTitleText = "NejlepöÌ Anime: " & winnerByCountName & " (" & formattedRating & "/10)"
        ElseIf outlierPartRating > bestStandaloneRating Then
            If Int(outlierPartRating) = outlierPartRating Then formattedRating = Format(outlierPartRating, "0") Else formattedRating = Replace(Format(outlierPartRating, "0.0"), ",0", "")
            bestTitleText = "NejlepöÌ Anime: " & outlierPartName & " (" & formattedRating & "/10)"
        ElseIf showSeriesAsBest Then
            formattedRating = Replace(Format(bestSeriesAvgRating, "0.0"), ",0", "")
            bestTitleText = "NejlepöÌ Anime: " & bestSeriesName & " (" & formattedRating & "/10)"
        Else
            If bestStandaloneRating = -1 Then
                bestTitleText = "NejlepöÌ Anime: N/A"
            Else
                If Int(bestStandaloneRating) = bestStandaloneRating Then formattedRating = Format(bestStandaloneRating, "0") Else formattedRating = Replace(Format(bestStandaloneRating, "0.0"), ",0", "")
                bestTitleText = "NejlepöÌ Anime: " & bestStandaloneName & " (" & formattedRating & "/10)"
                End If
            End If
' === PÿEPS¡NÕ NEJLEPäÕHO ANIME PODLE PRIORITY TOP 10 ===
        ' forcedBestAnimeName byl nastaven na zaË·tku anal˝zy mÏsÌce
        If forcedBestAnimeName <> "" Then
            Dim forcedRating As Double: forcedRating = -1
            Dim formattedRatingStr As String
            
            ' 1. Zkusit najÌt v sÈriÌch (pro pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ)
            If seriesData.Exists(forcedBestAnimeName) Then
                 If IsNumeric(seriesData(forcedBestAnimeName)("avgRating")) Then
                    forcedRating = seriesData(forcedBestAnimeName)("avgRating")
                 End If
            ' 2. Pokud nenÌ v sÈriÌch (byla to jen 1 Ë·st), najÌt ji v p˘vodnÌ kolekci
            Else
                Dim animeCheck As Variant
                For Each animeCheck In monthAnimeCollection
                    ' Hled·me buÔ shodu v n·zvu sÈrie (animeCheck(2)) nebo v n·zvu samotnÈm (animeCheck(1))
                    If LCase(animeCheck(2)) = LCase(forcedBestAnimeName) Or LCase(animeCheck(1)) = LCase(forcedBestAnimeName) Then
                        If IsNumeric(animeCheck(3)) Then
                            forcedRating = CDbl(animeCheck(3)) ' vezme hodnocenÌ tÈ jednÈ Ë·sti
                            Exit For
                        End If
                    End If
                Next animeCheck
            End If
            
            ' Form·tov·nÌ v˝sledku
            If forcedRating <> -1 Then
                If Int(forcedRating) = forcedRating Then formattedRatingStr = Format(forcedRating, "0") Else formattedRatingStr = Replace(Format(forcedRating, "0.0"), ",0", "")
                bestTitleText = "NejlepöÌ Anime: " & forcedBestAnimeName & " (" & formattedRatingStr & "/10)"
            Else
                bestTitleText = "NejlepöÌ Anime: " & forcedBestAnimeName & " (N/A)"
            End If
            

            ' UloûÌme vÌtÏze, aby se p¯ÌötÏ nemohl znovu objevit
            If Not top10WinnersList.Exists(LCase(forcedBestAnimeName)) Then
                top10WinnersList.Add LCase(forcedBestAnimeName), True
            End If
            ' =============================
            
        End If
' === OPRAVA: ZNOVU-VðPO»ET "NEJDELäÕHO" A "TOP" Z PŸVODNÕ KOLEKCE ===
    
    ' 1. V˝poËet NejdelöÌho Anime (z p˘vodnÌ monthAnimeCollection)
    Dim l_standaloneName As String: l_standaloneName = "N/A"
    Dim l_standaloneDur As Double: l_standaloneDur = -1
    Dim l_seriesData As Object: Set l_seriesData = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim l_seriesName As String, l_seriesDur As Double: l_seriesDur = -1
    
    For Each anime In monthAnimeCollection ' <-- D˘leûitÈ: PouûÌv·me monthAnimeCollection
        Dim l_currentDur As Double
        If IsNumeric(anime(4)) And IsNumeric(anime(7)) Then l_currentDur = (CLng(anime(4)) * CDbl(anime(7)))
        
        Dim l_series As Variant: l_series = anime(2)
        If l_series <> "" Then
            If Not l_seriesData.Exists(l_series) Then
                l_seriesData.Add l_series, 0
            End If
            l_seriesData(l_series) = l_seriesData(l_series) + l_currentDur
        Else
            If l_currentDur > l_standaloneDur Then l_standaloneDur = l_currentDur: l_standaloneName = anime(1)
        End If
    Next anime
    
    For Each l_series In l_seriesData.keys
        If l_seriesData(l_series) > l_seriesDur Then l_seriesDur = l_seriesData(l_series): l_seriesName = l_series
    Next l_series
    
    Dim longestTitleText As String, finalLongestName As String, finalLongestDuration As Double
    If l_seriesDur > l_standaloneDur Then
        finalLongestName = l_seriesName: finalLongestDuration = l_seriesDur
    Else
        finalLongestName = l_standaloneName: finalLongestDuration = l_standaloneDur
    End If
    longestTitleText = "NejdelöÌ Anime: " & finalLongestName & " (" & Replace(Format(finalLongestDuration / 60, "0.0"), ",0", "") & " h)"
    
    ' === LOGIKA PRO STATISTIKY (é·nry, TÈmata, Tagy, Typy) ===
    
    ' 1. Typy (Limit 3, Sloupec 8, bez delimiteru)
    Dim topTypesText As String
    topTypesText = "NejpoËetnÏjöÌ typy: " & GetTopItemsWithCount(monthAnimeCollection, 8, "", 3)
    
    ' 2. é·nry (Limit 3, Sloupec 5, delimiter ";")
    Dim rawGenres As String
    rawGenres = GetTopItemsWithCount(monthAnimeCollection, 5, ";", 3)
    Dim topGenresText As String: topGenresText = "NejpoËetnÏjöÌ û·nry: " & rawGenres
    
    ' 3. TÈmata (Limit 3, Sloupec 6, delimiter ";")
    Dim rawThemes As String
    rawThemes = GetTopItemsWithCount(monthAnimeCollection, 6, ";", 3)
    Dim topThemesText As String: topThemesText = "NejpoËetnÏjöÌ tÈmata: " & rawThemes
    
    ' 4. AniList Tagy (Limit 6, Sloupec 9, delimiter ",") + EXKLUZE
    ' Nejprve zjistÌme, kdo vyhr·l v é·nrech a TÈmatech, abychom je mohli ignorovat
    Dim winnersToExclude As String
    winnersToExclude = ExtractNamesFromCountString(rawGenres) & ExtractNamesFromCountString(rawThemes)
    
    Dim rawTags As String
    ' Vol·me funkci s parametrem excludeString
    rawTags = GetTopItemsWithCount(monthAnimeCollection, 9, ",", 6, winnersToExclude)
    Dim topTagsText As String: topTagsText = "NejpoËetnÏjöÌ AniList tagy: " & rawTags
    
    ' ================================================================
    
    ' ... d·le n·sleduje kÛd pro pozicov·nÌ (existingPositions) ...
    ' ====================================================================
        Dim currentX As Single, currentY As Single
        If existingPositions.Exists(CStr(key)) Then
            ' Pouûije uloûenou pozici, pokud existuje
            currentX = existingPositions(CStr(key))(0)
            currentY = existingPositions(CStr(key))(1)
        Else
            ' VypoËÌt· novou pozici pro novÈ mÏsÌce
            ' SchodovitÈ rozloûenÌ: skupiny po 3, kaûd˝ schod kles· diagon·lnÏ
            Dim stairGroup As Integer: stairGroup = Int((j - 1) / STAIR_GROUP_SIZE)
            Dim stairStep As Integer: stairStep = (j - 1) Mod STAIR_GROUP_SIZE
            
            ' X = z·klad skupiny (posun za p¯edchozÌ skupiny) + posun schodu
            currentX = startLeft + stairGroup * (STAIR_GROUP_SIZE * STAIR_STEP_X + STAIR_GROUP_GAP) + stairStep * STAIR_STEP_X
            ' Y = zaË·tek + posun schodu dol˘
            currentY = startTop + stairStep * STAIR_STEP_Y
        End If
        ' -----------------------------------------------------------------
        
        ' === NOV¡ KRESLÕCÕ LOGIKA PRO V23 (JEDEN BOX) ===
        
        ' --- 1. SestavenÌ fin·lnÌho textu ---
        Dim headerCaption As String, headerCountInfo As String, headerText As String
        headerCaption = LCase(Format(CDate(key & "-01"), "MMMM yyyy"))
        ' === OPRAVA CHYBY PO»ÕTADLA ===
    headerCountInfo = "+" & originalMonthCount
    ' ==============================
        ' Text hlaviËky (1. ¯·dek)
        headerText = headerCaption & ": " & headerCountInfo & " (celkem " & runningTotal & " Anime)"
        
        ' Text obsahu (dalöÌ ¯·dky)
    Dim contentText As String
    ' PÿID¡NO: topTagsText a topTypesText
    contentText = bestTitleText & vbCrLf & _
                  longestTitleText & vbCrLf & _
                  topTypesText & vbCrLf & _
                  topGenresText & vbCrLf & _
                  topThemesText & vbCrLf & _
                  topTagsText
        
        ' Fin·lnÌ text pro cel˝ box
        Dim finalBlockText As String
        finalBlockText = headerText & vbCrLf & contentText
        
        ' --- 2. Vytvo¯enÌ jednoho boxu ---
        Set shpMonthBox = wsTarget.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRoundedRectangle, currentX, currentY, BOX_WIDTH, BOX_HEIGHT)
        
        With shpMonthBox
            .Name = "MonthGroup_" & key ' Box je rovnou fin·lnÌ objekt
            .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            .line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(68, 84, 106)
            .TextFrame2.TextRange.text = finalBlockText
            .TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.size = 9.5
            .TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            .TextFrame2.MarginLeft = 5
            .TextFrame2.MarginRight = 5
            .TextFrame2.MarginTop = 5
            .TextFrame2.MarginBottom = 5

            ' --- 3. KombinovanÈ form·tov·nÌ ---
            
            ' A) Form·tov·nÌ hlaviËky (Paragraph 1)
            With .TextFrame2.TextRange.Paragraphs(1)
                .Font.Bold = True
                .Font.size = 12
                ' Zelen˝ text pro "+xx"
                Dim countPos As Long
                countPos = InStr(1, .text, headerCountInfo)
                If countPos > 0 Then
                    .Characters(countPos, Len(headerCountInfo)).Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = COUNT_TEXT_COLOR
                End If
            End With

            ' B) Form·tov·nÌ obsahu (Paragraphs 2-5)
            Dim para As Object ' TextRange2
            Dim pIndex As Long
            ' ZaËÌn·me od odstavce 2
            For pIndex = 2 To .TextFrame2.TextRange.Paragraphs.count
                Set para = .TextFrame2.TextRange.Paragraphs(pIndex)
                
                ' PodtrûenÌ popisk˘
                Dim colonPos As Long: colonPos = InStr(1, para.text, ":")
                If colonPos > 0 Then
                    para.Characters(1, colonPos - 1).Font.UnderlineStyle = msoUnderlineSingleLine
                    
                    ' KurzÌva pro n·zvy (hled·me "NejlepöÌ Anime" nebo "NejdelöÌ Anime")
                    If left(para.text, 9) = "NejlepöÌ" Or left(para.text, 9) = "NejdelöÌ" Then
                        Dim parenPos As Long: parenPos = InStr(colonPos, para.text, "(")
                        If parenPos > 0 And parenPos > colonPos + 2 Then
                            para.Characters(colonPos + 2, parenPos - (colonPos + 2)).Font.Italic = msoTrue
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
                
                ' TuËnÈ z·vorky
                Dim startParen As Long: startParen = 1
                Do
                    startParen = InStr(startParen, para.text, "(")
                    If startParen > 0 Then
                        Dim endParen As Long: endParen = InStr(startParen, para.text, ")")
                        If endParen > 0 Then
                            para.Characters(startParen, endParen - startParen + 1).Font.Bold = True
                            startParen = endParen + 1
                        Else: Exit Do
                        End If
                    Else: Exit Do
                    End If
                Loop
            Next pIndex
        End With
        
        ' P¯id·me fin·lnÌ box rovnou do seznamu
        objList.Add shpMonthBox
        ' ===================================================

' --- 4. ODSTRANÃN¡ GENERACE äIPEK ---
        ' Zde byla logika pro shpConnector, nynÌ je odstranÏna/p¯eskoËena.
        ' ------------------------------------
        
        Set previousMonthBox = shpMonthBox ' UloûÌme aktu·lnÌ box pro p¯ÌötÌ smyËku
        prevKey = key
        j = j + 1
    Next key

    ' --- 4. FIN¡LNÕ SESKUPENÕ ---
    Dim timelineGroup As Shape, finalGroup As Shape
    Dim shapeNames() As String
    ReDim shapeNames(1 To objList.count)
    For i = 1 To objList.count: shapeNames(i) = objList.item(i).Name: Next i

    If objList.count > 0 Then
        Set timelineGroup = wsTarget.Shapes.Range(shapeNames).Group
        timelineGroup.Name = "TimelineElementsGroup"

        ' ---------- ODSTRANÃN¡ »¡ST: AutomatickÈ centrov·nÌ je vypnuto ----------
        ' timelineGroup.left = shpBase.left + (shpBase.Width - timelineGroup.Width) / 2
        ' timelineGroup.top = shpBase.top + (shpBase.Height - timelineGroup.Height) / 2
        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------

        Set finalGroup = wsTarget.Shapes.Range(Array(shpBase.Name, timelineGroup.Name)).Group
        finalGroup.Name = "AdvancedTimelineGroup_V22"
    End If
    
Set wsAnimeList = Nothing: Set wsTarget = Nothing: Set monthlyData = Nothing: Set sortedKeys = Nothing: Set existingPositions = Nothing: Set hmAnimeList = Nothing
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    'MsgBox "DetailnÌ Ëasov· osa V22 byla ˙spÏönÏ vygenerov·na/aktualizov·na!", vbInformation

End Sub

Private Function GetTagsFromComment(cell As Range) As String
    If cell.Comment Is Nothing Then Exit Function
    
    Dim lines As Variant, line As Variant
    Dim result As String
    ' RozdÏlÌme koment·¯ na ¯·dky
    lines = Split(cell.Comment.text, vbLf)
    
    For Each line In lines
        ' Hled·me ¯·dky s procenty, nap¯. "100% - 80%: Tag1, Tag2"
        If InStr(1, line, "% -") > 0 And InStr(1, line, ":") > 0 Then
            Dim tagsPart As String
            ' Vezmeme vöe za dvojteËkou
            tagsPart = Trim(Mid(line, InStr(1, line, ":") + 1))
            If tagsPart <> "" Then
                result = result & tagsPart & ", "
            End If
        End If
    Next line
    
    ' OdstranÌme Ë·rku na konci
    If Len(result) > 2 Then
        GetTagsFromComment = left(result, Len(result) - 2)
    End If
End Function
--- KONEC K”DU [LIST_Watch_Overview] ---

Modul: LIST_AniList_Tags
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [LIST_AniList_Tags] ---
Option Explicit

' --- Deklarace pro API ---
#If VBA7 Then
    Public Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As LongPtr)
#Else
    Public Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As Long)
#End If

' ===================================================================================
' == UéIVATELSK… NASTAVENÕ MODULU ==
' ===================================================================================
' --- NastavenÌ list˘ ---
Private Const ANIME_SHEET_NAME As String = "ANIME LIST"
Private Const MAL_ID_COLUMN As String = "C" ' Sloupec s N·zvem a MAL ID odkazem
Private Const RELEASE_DATE_COLUMN As String = "F" ' Sloupec s datem vyd·nÌ
Private Const TAG_OUTPUT_COLUMN As String = "G" ' Sloupec "TÈmata", kam vloûÌme pozn·mku

' --- NastavenÌ pro Cache ---
Private Const CACHE_SHEET_NAME As String = "MAL Cache + Interactive Rating"
Private Const CACHE_START_COLUMN As String = "BX" ' Odsud zaËne z·pis cache
Private Const ANILIST_CACHE_EXPIRY_DAYS As Long = 365

' --- NastavenÌ pro AniList API ---
Private Const ANILIST_API_URL As String = "https://graphql.anilist.co"
Private Const ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS As Boolean = False
Private Const ANILIST_MIN_RANK As Long = 30
Private Const ANILIST_CHUNK_SIZE As Long = 20

' --- NastavenÌ pro Word Cloud (Add-on) ---
Private Const WC_OUTPUT_SHEET As String = "OBECN… INFORMACE"
Private Const WC_DATA_SHEET As String = "MAL Cache + Interactive Rating"
Private Const WC_DATA_WORD_COL As String = "CC"
Private Const WC_DATA_COUNT_COL As String = "CD"
Private Const WC_SHAPE_PREFIX As String = "WC_Tag_"
Private Const WC_BACKGROUND_NAME As String = "WC_Tag_Background"
Private Const WC_MIN_RELEVANCE_SCORE As Long = 100
Private Const WC_MIN_FONT_SIZE As Long = 14
Private Const WC_MAX_FONT_SIZE As Long = 72
Private Const WC_COLOR_THRESHOLD As Long = 500
Private Const CACHE_TAGS_OFFSET As Long = 2
Private Const WC_MAX_WORDS_TO_DRAW As Long = 180

' --- NastavenÌ pro DB Popis˘ Tag˘ (Tooltipy) ---
Private Const TAG_DB_COL_NAME As String = "BP" ' Sloupec pro n·zev tagu
Private Const TAG_DB_COL_DESC As String = "BQ" ' Sloupec pro popis
Private dictTagDescriptions As Object ' Glob·lnÌ cache pro rychlÈ ËtenÌ

' --- NastavenÌ pro filtraci duplicit ---
Private Const FILTER_MAL_DUPLICATES As Boolean = True
Private Const FILTER_IGNORE_LIST As String = "boys love|girls love"
Private Const TAG_BLACKLIST_MARKER As String = "[[BLACKLIST]]"

' --- Pro rychl˝ koliznÌ test ---
Private Const WC_OVERLAP_RECENT_N As Long = 200

' --- Glob·lnÌ promÏnnÈ pro Word Cloud ---
Private wcSheet As Worksheet
Private wcShpNameCounter As Long

' --- NastavenÌ pro Pivot Table ---
Private Const PIVOT_DATA_SHEET As String = "MAL Cache + Interactive Rating"
Private Const PIVOT_DATA_START_COL As String = "CG"
Private Const PIVOT_TABLE_NAME As String = "tbl_TagPivotData"

' --- NastavenÌ pro API limity ---
Private Const RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS As Long = 800
Private Const MAX_RETRIES As Long = 3
Private Const SINGLE_REQUEST_DELAY_MS As Long = 800

' --- Spatial Hash (M¯Ìûka) ---
Private Const SH_CELL_SIZE As Long = 60
Private shGrid() As Object
Private shCols As Long, shRows As Long
Private shLeft As Single, shTop As Single
' ===================================================================================

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' TlaËÌtko
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Public Sub VytvorTlacitkoAnilistTagy()
    On Error GoTo ErrBtnTagy
    Dim ws As Worksheet, btn As Shape, rng As Range
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    
    On Error Resume Next: ws.Shapes("btnAktualizaceAnilistTagy").Delete: On Error GoTo ErrBtnTagy
    
    Set rng = ws.Range("BJ1")
    rng.ColumnWidth = 27.14
    rng.RowHeight = 24.75
    
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = "btnAktualizaceAnilistTagy"
        .OnAction = "AktualizovatTagyZAnilistu"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
        With .line: .Visible = msoTrue: .weight = 1.5: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat AniList Tagy"
            With .TextRange.Font: .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True: End With
            With .TextRange.Font.Fill: .Visible = msoTrue: .Solid: .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
        End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
    End With
    
    Exit Sub
ErrBtnTagy:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i tvorbÏ tlaËÌtka: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' ===================================================================================
' == HLAVNÕ MAKRO ==
' ===================================================================================
Public Sub AktualizovatTagyZAnilistu()
    Dim ws As Worksheet, wsCache As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim malID As Long
    Dim animeName As String
    Dim releaseDate As Date
    Dim tagData As Object
    Dim targetCell As Range
    Dim statusBarText As String
    Dim processedCount As Long: processedCount = 0
    Dim failedCount As Long: failedCount = 0
    Dim cacheUsedCount As Long: cacheUsedCount = 0
    Dim skippedTouchCount As Long: skippedTouchCount = 0
    Dim skippedUnfinished As Long: skippedUnfinished = 0

    Dim idChunk As Object: Set idChunk = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim malIdToRow As Object: Set malIdToRow = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim malIdToName As Object: Set malIdToName = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim chunkCount As Long: chunkCount = 1
    Dim cacheDict As Object
    
    Dim linkDict As Object
    Set linkDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim hl As Hyperlink

    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

    ' === OPTIMALIZACE 1: VypnutÌ vöeho, co zdrûuje ===
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = False
        .Calculation = xlCalculationManual ' KlÌËovÈ pro rychlost!
        .EnableEvents = False
        .Cursor = xlWait
        statusBarText = .StatusBar
    End With

    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ANIME_SHEET_NAME)
    If ws Is Nothing Then MsgBox "List '" & ANIME_SHEET_NAME & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: GoTo Cleanup

    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then MsgBox "Cache list '" & CACHE_SHEET_NAME & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: GoTo Cleanup

    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, MAL_ID_COLUMN).End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then MsgBox "Na listu '" & ANIME_SHEET_NAME & "' nebyla nalezena û·dn· data.", vbInformation: GoTo Cleanup

    Application.StatusBar = "Krok 1/4: NaËÌt·m cache..."
    Set cacheDict = LoadCache(wsCache)

    Application.StatusBar = "Krok 2/4: Proch·zÌm seznam (Batch Read)..."
    Dim idsToFetch As Object: Set idsToFetch = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    
    ' === OPTIMALIZACE 2: NaËtenÌ dat do pole v pamÏti ===
    Dim dataArr As Variant
    dataArr = ws.Range("C2:M" & lastRow).Value2
    
    Dim cID As Variant, cReleaseDate As Variant, cFinish As Variant
    Dim currentRow As Long
    
    Application.StatusBar = "Optimalizace: Mapuji odkazy..."
    ' MÌsto sah·nÌ na kaûdou buÚku zvl·öù, projedeme kolekci Hyperlinks jednou
    For Each hl In ws.Hyperlinks
        ' UloûÌme si adresu odkazu pod klÌËem ËÌsla ¯·dku
        If hl.Range.Column = ws.Range(MAL_ID_COLUMN & "1").Column Then
            linkDict(hl.Range.row) = hl.Address
        End If
    Next hl
    
    Dim expiryDate As Date
    expiryDate = Date - ANILIST_CACHE_EXPIRY_DAYS
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        currentRow = i + 1 ' Pole zaËÌn· ¯·dkem 2
        
        cID = dataArr(i, 1)             ' Sloupec C
        cReleaseDate = dataArr(i, 4)    ' Sloupec F
        cFinish = dataArr(i, 11)        ' Sloupec M
        
        malID = 0
        
        If Not IsEmpty(cFinish) Then
             Dim rawUrl As String
             malID = 0
             If linkDict.Exists(currentRow) Then
                rawUrl = linkDict(currentRow)
                ' Zde jen rychl· extrakce ID z textovÈho ¯etÏzce rawUrl (Split)
                Dim urlParts() As String
                urlParts = Split(rawUrl, "/")
                If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then
                    malID = CLng(urlParts(4))
                End If
             End If
             animeName = CStr(cID)
             
             If malID > 0 Then
                ' Pokud cFinish (sloupec M) nenÌ pr·zdn˝, povaûujeme anime za dokonËenÈ
                ' Data uû m·me v pamÏti, nemusÌme volat Dictionary
                If Len(CStr(cFinish)) > 0 Then
                    
                    Dim needsFetch As Boolean: needsFetch = False
                    Dim knownRow As Long: knownRow = 0
                    
                    If cacheDict.Exists(malID) Then
                        knownRow = cacheDict(malID)("Row")
                        
                        ' --- NOV…: Kontrola Blacklistu ---
    If cacheDict(malID)("Tags") = TAG_BLACKLIST_MARKER Then
        needsFetch = False ' Navûdy ignorovat
    Else
                        Dim cacheDate As Date: cacheDate = cacheDict(malID)("Date")
                        
                        Dim isNewAnime As Boolean
                        If IsNumeric(cReleaseDate) Then releaseDate = CDate(cReleaseDate) Else releaseDate = Date
                        isNewAnime = (releaseDate > expiryDate)
                        
                        If (isNewAnime And DateDiff("d", cacheDate, Date) > 30) Then
                            needsFetch = True
                        Else
                            If Not HasComment(ws.Cells(currentRow, TAG_OUTPUT_COLUMN)) Then
                                Dim tagsList As Object
                                Set tagsList = ParseCacheStringToTagsList(cacheDict(malID)("Tags"))
                                Call FormatAnilistCommentForList(ws.Cells(currentRow, TAG_OUTPUT_COLUMN), animeName, tagsList)
                                Set tagsList = Nothing
                                cacheUsedCount = cacheUsedCount + 1
                            Else
                                skippedTouchCount = skippedTouchCount + 1
                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                    Else
                        needsFetch = True
                    End If
                    
                    If needsFetch Then
                        idsToFetch.Add malID
                        If Not malIdToRow.Exists(malID) Then
                            malIdToRow.Add malID, currentRow
                            malIdToName.Add malID, animeName
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    skippedUnfinished = skippedUnfinished + 1
                End If
             End If
        End If
    Next i

    If idsToFetch.count = 0 Then
        GoTo AfterDownload
    End If

    Dim totalProcessed As Long: totalProcessed = 0
    Dim idKey As Variant
    Dim kRow As Long

    For Each idKey In idsToFetch
        malID = CLng(idKey)
        idChunk.Add malID
        totalProcessed = totalProcessed + 1

        If (idChunk.count >= ANILIST_CHUNK_SIZE) Or (totalProcessed = idsToFetch.count) Then
            Application.StatusBar = "Krok 3/4: Stahuji d·vku " & chunkCount & "..."
            Set tagData = FetchAnilistTags_Batch(idChunk.ToArray)

            If Not tagData Is Nothing Then
                Dim innerKey As Variant, currentId As Long
                For Each innerKey In tagData.keys
                    currentId = CLng(innerKey)
                    If malIdToRow.Exists(currentId) Then
                        Set tagsList = tagData(currentId)
                        
                        Call FormatAnilistCommentForList(ws.Cells(malIdToRow(currentId), TAG_OUTPUT_COLUMN), malIdToName(currentId), tagsList)
                        
                        ' Optimalizace z·pisu
                        kRow = 0
                        If cacheDict.Exists(currentId) Then kRow = cacheDict(currentId)("Row")
                        Call UpdateCacheSheet(wsCache, currentId, malIdToName(currentId), tagsList, kRow)
                        
                        processedCount = processedCount + 1
                    End If
                Next innerKey
Else
    ' Fallback - D·vka selhala, jedeme po jednom a hled·me vinÌka
    Dim singleID As Variant
    Application.StatusBar = "Krok 3/4: D·vka selhala, hled·m neexistujÌcÌ Anime..."
    
    For Each singleID In idChunk
        malID = CLng(singleID)
        Set tagData = FetchAnilistTags_Batch(Array(malID))
        
        kRow = 0
        If cacheDict.Exists(malID) Then kRow = cacheDict(malID)("Row")
        
        ' Pokud tagData obsahuje ID, znamen· to ˙spÏch (i kdyû je seznam tag˘ pr·zdn˝)
        If Not tagData Is Nothing Then
            If tagData.count > 0 Then
                ' ⁄SPÃCH: ID existuje
                Dim tl As Object: Set tl = tagData(malID)
                Call FormatAnilistCommentForList(ws.Cells(malIdToRow(malID), TAG_OUTPUT_COLUMN), malIdToName(malID), tl)
                
                ' Zde je nutnÈ poslat String, protoûe UpdateCacheSheet oËek·v· (Variant/String)
                ' MusÌme lehce upravit UpdateCacheSheet, viz bod 4 nÌûe,
                ' NEBO tady udÏlat konverzi ruËnÏ, pokud jsme UpdateCacheSheet nezmÏnili.
                ' P¯edpokl·d·m, ûe pouûijeö ˙pravu UpdateCacheSheet z bodu 4.
                Call UpdateCacheSheet(wsCache, malID, malIdToName(malID), tl, kRow)
                
                processedCount = processedCount + 1
            Else
                ' CHYBA 404: API vr·tilo pr·zdn˝ objekt = ID neexistuje -> BLACKLIST
                Call UpdateCacheSheet(wsCache, malID, malIdToName(malID), TAG_BLACKLIST_MARKER, kRow)
                failedCount = failedCount + 1
            End If
        Else
            ' CHYBA SÕTÃ/JIN¡: TakÈ radÏji blacklistnout nebo zkusit p¯ÌötÏ?
            ' Pokud funkce vracÌ Nothing, je to obvykle hard error.
            ' Pro jistotu blacklistneme, aù to nebrzdÌ p¯ÌötÏ.
            Call UpdateCacheSheet(wsCache, malID, malIdToName(malID), TAG_BLACKLIST_MARKER, kRow)
            failedCount = failedCount + 1
        End If
        
        Sleep SINGLE_REQUEST_DELAY_MS
    Next singleID
End If

            idChunk.Clear
            Set tagData = Nothing
            chunkCount = chunkCount + 1
        End If
    Next idKey

AfterDownload:
    Application.StatusBar = "Krok 4/4: P¯ipravuji data pro kontingenËnÌ tabulku..."
    Call PripravitPivotDataProTagy
    
    Application.StatusBar = "Krok 5/5: Generuji graf v·ûen˝ch tag˘..."
    Call VytvorGrafVazenychTagu
    
    Dim lastGenStr As String, resp As VbMsgBoxResult
    On Error Resume Next
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then
        lastGenStr = "(nelze zjistit)"
    ElseIf IsDate(wsCache.Range("CN4").Value) Then
        lastGenStr = Format(wsCache.Range("CN4").Value, "dd.mm.yyyy HH:nn")
    Else
        lastGenStr = CStr(wsCache.Range("CN4").Value)
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0

    resp = MsgBox("Chceö teÔ vygenerovat Word Cloud?" & vbCrLf & "PoslednÌ generace: " & lastGenStr, _
                  vbQuestion + vbYesNo, "Word Cloud")
    If resp = vbYes Then Call GenerovatTagCloud(False)

Cleanup:
    With Application
        .StatusBar = False
        .Cursor = xlDefault
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic ' NutnÈ vr·tit zpÏt!
        .EnableEvents = True
        .ScreenUpdating = True
    End With
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "Doölo k neoËek·vanÈ chybÏ:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & "Chyba Ë. " & err.Number & " - " & err.Description
    Resume Cleanup
End Sub

Private Function HasComment(ByVal c As Range) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    HasComment = Not (c.Comment Is Nothing)
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

' ===================================================================================
' == POMOCN… FUNKCE (API & CACHE) ==
' ===================================================================================

Private Function GetMalIdFromLink(ByRef targetCell As Range) As Long
    Dim urlParts() As String
    GetMalIdFromLink = 0
    On Error Resume Next
    If targetCell.Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
        urlParts = Split(targetCell.Hyperlinks(1).Address, "/")
        If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then
            GetMalIdFromLink = CLng(urlParts(4))
        End If
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

Private Function FetchAnilistTags_Batch(ByVal malIds As Variant) As Object
    Dim http As Object, query As String, payload As String, i As Long
    Dim resultDict As Object: Set resultDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    ' Pomocn˝ slovnÌk pro sbÏr popis˘ (N·zev -> Popis)
    Dim descBatch As Object: Set descBatch = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim attempt As Long, lastStatus As Long, retryAfterHdr As String, delayMs As Long

    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    If Not IsArray(malIds) Then Set FetchAnilistTags_Batch = resultDict: Exit Function
    If UBound(malIds) < LBound(malIds) Then Set FetchAnilistTags_Batch = resultDict: Exit Function

    query = "query {"
    For i = LBound(malIds) To UBound(malIds)
        ' UPRAVENO: P¯id·no pole 'description' do dotazu
        query = query & " m" & i & ": Media(idMal: " & malIds(i) & ", type: ANIME) { idMal title { english romaji } tags { name rank description isMediaSpoiler } }"
    Next i
    query = query & " }"
    
    ' Oöet¯enÌ uvozovek v JSON payloadu
    payload = "{" & Chr(34) & "query" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34) & query & Chr(34) & "}"

    For attempt = 1 To MAX_RETRIES
        Set http = CreateObject("WinHttp.WinHttpRequest.5.1")
        http.Open "POST", ANILIST_API_URL, False
        http.setRequestHeader "Content-Type", "application/json"
        http.setRequestHeader "Accept", "application/json"
        On Error Resume Next
        http.sEnd payload
        http.waitForResponse (5)
        On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
        lastStatus = http.status

        If lastStatus = 200 Then
            Exit For
        ElseIf lastStatus = 404 Then
            Set http = Nothing: Exit For
        ElseIf lastStatus = 429 Then
            retryAfterHdr = "": On Error Resume Next: retryAfterHdr = http.getResponseHeader("Retry-After"): On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
            If Len(retryAfterHdr) > 0 Then delayMs = CLng(val(retryAfterHdr)) * 1000 Else delayMs = 3000
            Set http = Nothing: If attempt < MAX_RETRIES Then Sleep delayMs
        Else
            Set http = Nothing: If attempt < MAX_RETRIES Then Sleep RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * (2 ^ (attempt - 1))
        End If
    Next attempt

    If http Is Nothing Or lastStatus <> 200 Then Set FetchAnilistTags_Batch = Nothing: Exit Function

    Dim jsonResponse As Object: Set jsonResponse = JsonConverter.ParseJson(http.responseText)
    If Not jsonResponse.Exists("data") Then GoTo ErrorHandler
    Dim data As Object: Set data = jsonResponse("data")
    Dim recKey As Variant

    For Each recKey In data.keys
        Dim recData As Object: Set recData = data(recKey)
        If recData Is Nothing Then
            Dim idx As Long: idx = CLng(Mid$(CStr(recKey), 2))
            Dim missingId As Long: missingId = CLng(malIds(idx))
            If Not resultDict.Exists(missingId) Then resultDict.Add missingId, CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
        Else
            Dim thisMalId As Long: thisMalId = recData("idMal")
            Dim tagsList As Object: Set tagsList = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
            Dim tag As Variant
            
            For Each tag In recData("tags")
                If CLng(tag("rank")) >= ANILIST_MIN_RANK Then
                    If ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS Or (Not ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS And Not CBool(tag("isMediaSpoiler"))) Then
                        Dim tagName As String: tagName = CStr(tag("name"))
                        Dim skipTag As Boolean: skipTag = False
                        If FILTER_MAL_DUPLICATES Then If InStr(1, FILTER_IGNORE_LIST, "|" & LCase(tagName) & "|") > 0 Then skipTag = True
                        
                        If Not skipTag Then
                            Dim tagInfo As Object: Set tagInfo = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                            tagInfo("name") = tagName
                            tagInfo("rank") = CLng(tag("rank"))
                            tagsList.Add tagInfo
                            
                            ' UPRAVENO: SbÏr popisu do pomocnÈho slovnÌku
                            If Not IsNull(tag("description")) Then
                                If Not descBatch.Exists(tagName) Then
                                    descBatch(tagName) = CStr(tag("description"))
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Next tag
            
            ' Sort desc (beze zmÏny)
            Dim swapped As Boolean, j As Long, Temp As Variant
            Do
                swapped = False
                For j = 0 To tagsList.count - 2
                    If tagsList(j)("rank") < tagsList(j + 1)("rank") Then
                        Set Temp = tagsList(j): Set tagsList(j) = tagsList(j + 1): Set tagsList(j + 1) = Temp: swapped = True
                    End If
                Next j
            Loop While swapped
            
            If Not resultDict.Exists(thisMalId) Then resultDict.Add thisMalId, tagsList
        End If
    Next recKey

    ' UPRAVENO: UloûenÌ nov˝ch popis˘ do datab·ze (Cache list)
    Call SaveNewTagDescriptions(descBatch)

ErrorHandler:
    Set http = Nothing
    Set FetchAnilistTags_Batch = resultDict
End Function

' ===================================================================================
' == NOV… POMOCN… FUNKCE PRO CACHE ==
' ===================================================================================

Private Function LoadCache(wsCache As Worksheet) As Object
    ' Optimalizace: Cache + Index ¯·dku
    Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim lastCacheRow As Long
    Dim cacheData As Variant
    Dim i As Long, malID As Long
    
    lastCacheRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, CACHE_START_COLUMN).End(xlUp).row
    If lastCacheRow < 2 Then Set LoadCache = dict: Exit Function
    
    cacheData = wsCache.Range(CACHE_START_COLUMN & "2").Resize(lastCacheRow - 1, 4).Value2
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(cacheData, 1)
        If IsNumeric(cacheData(i, 1)) Then
            malID = CLng(cacheData(i, 1))
            If Not dict.Exists(malID) Then
                Dim entry As Object: Set entry = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
                entry("Name") = CStr(cacheData(i, 2))
                entry("Tags") = CStr(cacheData(i, 3))
                entry("Date") = CDate(cacheData(i, 4))
                entry("Row") = i + 1
                dict.Add malID, entry
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    Set LoadCache = dict
End Function

Private Sub UpdateCacheSheet(wsCache As Worksheet, malID As Long, animeName As String, tagsInput As Variant, Optional knownRow As Long = 0)
    ' Optimalizace: P¯Ìm˝ z·pis na ¯·dek
    Dim targetRow As Long, saveString As String
    
    ' RozliöenÌ, zda jde o Blacklist (String) nebo seznam tag˘ (Object)
    If VarType(tagsInput) = vbString Then
        saveString = CStr(tagsInput)
    Else
        saveString = ConvertTagsListToSaveString(tagsInput)
    End If
    
    If knownRow > 0 Then targetRow = knownRow Else targetRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, CACHE_START_COLUMN).End(xlUp).row + 1
    
    With wsCache
        .Cells(targetRow, CACHE_START_COLUMN).Value2 = malID
        .Cells(targetRow, CACHE_START_COLUMN).Offset(0, 1).Value2 = animeName
        .Cells(targetRow, CACHE_START_COLUMN).Offset(0, 2).Value2 = saveString
        .Cells(targetRow, CACHE_START_COLUMN).Offset(0, 3).Value2 = Date
    End With
End Sub

Private Function ConvertTagsListToSaveString(tagsList As Variant) As String
    If tagsList Is Nothing Then Exit Function
    If tagsList.count = 0 Then Exit Function
    Dim parts As Object: Set parts = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim tagInfo As Variant
    For Each tagInfo In tagsList
        parts.Add tagInfo("name") & ":" & tagInfo("rank")
    Next tagInfo
    ConvertTagsListToSaveString = Join(parts.ToArray, ";")
End Function

Private Function ParseCacheStringToTagsList(ByVal cacheString As String) As Object
    Dim tagsList As Object: Set tagsList = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    If cacheString = "" Then Set ParseCacheStringToTagsList = tagsList: Exit Function
    Dim tagsArr As Variant: tagsArr = Split(cacheString, ";")
    Dim parts As Variant, i As Long
    For i = LBound(tagsArr) To UBound(tagsArr)
        parts = Split(tagsArr(i), ":")
        If UBound(parts) = 1 Then
            Dim tagInfo As Object: Set tagInfo = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
            tagInfo("name") = CStr(parts(0))
            tagInfo("rank") = CLng(parts(1))
            tagsList.Add tagInfo
        End If
    Next i
    Set ParseCacheStringToTagsList = tagsList
End Function

' ===================================================================================
' == FORM¡TOV¡NÕ POZN¡MKY ==
' ===================================================================================
Private Sub FormatAnilistCommentForList(ByRef targetCell As Range, ByVal animeTitle As String, ByVal tagsList As Object)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim tier1 As Object: Set tier1 = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim tier2 As Object: Set tier2 = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim tier3 As Object: Set tier3 = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    
    Dim tagInfo As Variant
    For Each tagInfo In tagsList
        Dim rank As Long: rank = tagInfo("rank")
        Dim Name As String: Name = tagInfo("name")
        If rank >= 80 Then tier1.Add Name Else If rank >= 60 Then tier2.Add Name Else If rank >= ANILIST_MIN_RANK Then tier3.Add Name
    Next tagInfo
    
    Dim spoilerText As String
    If ANILIST_INCLUDE_SPOILERS Then spoilerText = " (w/ spoilers)" Else spoilerText = " (w/o spoilers)"
    
    Dim part1 As String: part1 = "AniList Custom Tags" & spoilerText & " - "
    Dim part2 As String: part2 = animeTitle
    Dim headerLine As String: headerLine = part1 & part2
    Dim tier1Label As String: tier1Label = "100% - 80%:"
    Dim tier2Label As String: tier2Label = "79% - 60%:"
    Dim tier3Label As String: tier3Label = "59% - 30%:"
    
    Dim commentText As String: commentText = headerLine
    If tier1.count > 0 Then commentText = commentText & vbCrLf & tier1Label & " " & Join(tier1.ToArray, ", ")
    If tier2.count > 0 Then commentText = commentText & vbCrLf & tier2Label & " " & Join(tier2.ToArray, ", ")
    If tier3.count > 0 Then commentText = commentText & vbCrLf & tier3Label & " " & Join(tier3.ToArray, ", ")

    targetCell.ClearComments
    targetCell.AddComment commentText
    
    With targetCell.Comment.Shape.TextFrame
        .AutoSize = True
        .Characters.Font.Name = "Arial"
        .Characters.Font.size = 9
        .Characters(1, Len(part1)).Font.Bold = True
        .Characters(1, Len(part1)).Font.Italic = False
        .Characters(Len(part1) + 1, Len(part2)).Font.Bold = True
        .Characters(Len(part1) + 1, Len(part2)).Font.Italic = True
        
        Dim startPos As Long
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, tier1Label)
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier1Label)).Font.Bold = True
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier1Label)).Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleSingle
        End If
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, tier2Label)
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier2Label)).Font.Bold = True
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier2Label)).Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleSingle
        End If
        startPos = InStr(1, commentText, tier3Label)
        If startPos > 0 Then
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier3Label)).Font.Bold = True
            .Characters(startPos, Len(tier3Label)).Font.Underline = xlUnderlineStyleSingle
        End If
    End With
    Set tier1 = Nothing: Set tier2 = Nothing: Set tier3 = Nothing
End Sub

' ===================================================================================
' == WORD CLOUD ADD-ON ==
' ===================================================================================
Public Sub GenerovatTagCloud(Optional ByVal ShowPrompt As Boolean = True)
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet, wsOut As Worksheet
    Dim lastGenStr As String, resp As VbMsgBoxResult, StartTime As Double, SecondsElapsed As Double
    Dim bgShape As Shape
    
    ' --- UPRAVENO: NaËtenÌ popis˘ do pamÏti ---
    Call InitTagDescriptionCache
    ' ------------------------------------------
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    Set wsOut = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WC_OUTPUT_SHEET)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then lastGenStr = "(nelze zjistit)" Else If IsDate(wsCache.Range("CN4").Value) Then lastGenStr = Format(wsCache.Range("CN4").Value, "dd.mm.yyyy HH:nn") Else lastGenStr = "(nikdy)"
    
    If ShowPrompt Then
        resp = MsgBox("Vygenerovat Word Cloud?" & vbCrLf & "PoslednÌ generace: " & lastGenStr, vbQuestion + vbYesNo, "Word Cloud")
        If resp <> vbYes Then Exit Sub
    End If
    
    StartTime = Timer
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    Call maint
    If wsOut Is Nothing Then MsgBox "List '" & WC_OUTPUT_SHEET & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    Set bgShape = CreateWordCloudBackground(wsOut)
    If bgShape Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    Call VytvoritSamotnyCloud(bgShape)
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    SecondsElapsed = Round(Timer - StartTime, 2)
    On Error Resume Next
    If Not wsCache Is Nothing Then
        wsCache.Range("CN4").Value = Now
        wsCache.Range("CN4").NumberFormat = "dd.mm.yyyy hh:mm"
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    If ShowPrompt Then MsgBox "Word Cloud byl ˙spÏönÏ vygenerov·n za " & SecondsElapsed & " sekund.", vbInformation
End Sub

Private Function CreateWordCloudBackground(ByVal ws As Worksheet) As Shape
    Dim topCell As Range, btmCell As Range
    Dim bgLeft As Single, bgTop As Single, bgWidth As Single, bgHeight As Single
    On Error Resume Next
    Set topCell = ws.Range("AZ3"): Set btmCell = ws.Range("BK13")
    If topCell Is Nothing Or btmCell Is Nothing Then Exit Function
    On Error GoTo 0
    bgLeft = topCell.left: bgTop = topCell.top
    bgWidth = (btmCell.left + btmCell.Width) - bgLeft: bgHeight = (btmCell.top + btmCell.Height) - bgTop
    Set CreateWordCloudBackground = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, bgLeft, bgTop, bgWidth, bgHeight)
    With CreateWordCloudBackground
        .Name = WC_BACKGROUND_NAME: .Fill.Visible = msoTrue: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(191, 191, 191): .Fill.Transparency = 0
        .line.Visible = msoTrue: .line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): .line.weight = 1.5: .ZOrder msoSendToBack
    End With
End Function

Private Sub PripravitDataProTagCloud()
    ' (Stejn· logika jako p¯edtÌm, je OK)
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet, wsData As Worksheet, dictRelevance As Object
    Dim lastCacheRow As Long, i As Long, cacheData As Variant
    Dim tagString As String, tagsArr As Variant, parts As Variant
    Dim tagName As String, tagRank As Long, tagKey As Variant
    Dim sortData As Variant, r As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WC_DATA_SHEET)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    Set dictRelevance = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictRelevance.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    lastCacheRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, CACHE_START_COLUMN).End(xlUp).row
    If lastCacheRow < 2 Then Exit Sub
    
    cacheData = wsCache.Range(wsCache.Cells(2, CACHE_START_COLUMN).Offset(0, CACHE_TAGS_OFFSET), wsCache.Cells(lastCacheRow, CACHE_START_COLUMN).Offset(0, CACHE_TAGS_OFFSET)).Value
    For i = LBound(cacheData, 1) To UBound(cacheData, 1)
        tagString = CStr(cacheData(i, 1))
        If tagString <> "" Then
            tagsArr = Split(tagString, ";")
            For Each tagKey In tagsArr
                parts = Split(tagKey, ":")
                If UBound(parts) = 1 Then
                    tagName = CStr(parts(0)): tagRank = CLng(parts(1))
                    dictRelevance(tagName) = dictRelevance(tagName) + tagRank
                End If
            Next tagKey
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictRelevance.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    ReDim sortData(0 To dictRelevance.count - 1, 0 To 1)
    r = 0
    For Each tagKey In dictRelevance.keys
        sortData(r, 0) = tagKey: sortData(r, 1) = dictRelevance(tagKey): r = r + 1
    Next tagKey
    
    Call QuickSortArray(sortData, , , 1)
    
    Dim firstDataRow As Long: firstDataRow = 2
    Dim lastOldRow As Long
    lastOldRow = Application.Max(wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, WC_DATA_WORD_COL).End(xlUp).row, wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, WC_DATA_COUNT_COL).End(xlUp).row)
    If lastOldRow >= firstDataRow Then
        wsData.Range(wsData.Cells(firstDataRow, WC_DATA_WORD_COL), wsData.Cells(lastOldRow, WC_DATA_WORD_COL)).ClearContents
        wsData.Range(wsData.Cells(firstDataRow, WC_DATA_COUNT_COL), wsData.Cells(lastOldRow, WC_DATA_COUNT_COL)).ClearContents
    End If
    
    r = firstDataRow
    For i = UBound(sortData, 1) To LBound(sortData, 1) Step -1
        If sortData(i, 1) >= WC_MIN_RELEVANCE_SCORE Then
            wsData.Cells(r, WC_DATA_WORD_COL).Value = sortData(i, 0)
            wsData.Cells(r, WC_DATA_COUNT_COL).Value = sortData(i, 1)
            r = r + 1
        End If
    Next i
End Sub

Private Sub VytvoritSamotnyCloud(ByVal bgShape As Shape)
    Dim i As Long, curWord As String, xP As Long, yP As Long
    Dim bgTop As Single, bgLeft As Single, bgWidth As Single, bgHeight As Single
    
    bgTop = bgShape.top + 5: bgLeft = bgShape.left + 5
    bgWidth = bgShape.Width - 10: bgHeight = bgShape.Height - 10
    If bgWidth < 0 Then bgWidth = 0
    If bgHeight < 0 Then bgHeight = 0
    
    Call InitSpatialGrid(bgShape)
    wcShpNameCounter = 1
    
    On Error Resume Next: Set wcSheet = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WC_OUTPUT_SHEET): On Error GoTo 0
    Randomize Timer
    
    Dim topWords As Variant: topWords = GetTopKWordsFromData(WC_MAX_WORDS_TO_DRAW)
    If IsEmpty(topWords) Then MsgBox "é·dn· data pro Cloud.", vbInformation: Exit Sub
    
    Dim itcount As Long, wordsDrawn As Long: wordsDrawn = 0
    Dim newTop As Single, newLeft As Single, wordShape As Shape
    Dim w As String, s As Long
    
    For i = LBound(topWords, 1) To UBound(topWords, 1)
        w = CStr(topWords(i, 1)): s = CLng(topWords(i, 2))
        curWord = addWord(w, s, yP, xP)
        If containsTalls(w) Then wcSheet.Shapes(curWord).Height = Int(wcSheet.Shapes(curWord).Height * 1.15)
        
        itcount = 0
        Set wordShape = wcSheet.Shapes(curWord)
        Do
            itcount = itcount + 1
            newTop = bgTop + Int(Rnd() * (bgHeight - wordShape.Height))
            newLeft = bgLeft + Int(Rnd() * (bgWidth - wordShape.Width))
            If newTop < bgTop Then newTop = bgTop
            If newLeft < bgLeft Then newLeft = bgLeft
            wordShape.top = newTop: wordShape.left = newLeft
            
            If itcount > 3000 Then wordShape.Delete: Exit Do
        Loop While overlaptest(wordShape)
        
        If itcount <= 3000 Then
            wordsDrawn = wordsDrawn + 1
            Call AddToSpatialGrid(wordShape)
            If wordsDrawn >= WC_MAX_WORDS_TO_DRAW Then Exit For
        End If
    Next i
End Sub

Private Function addWord(rword As String, rScore As Long, rTop, rLeft) As String
    Dim currAdd As Object, rSize As Integer, rColor As Long
    
    ' ZÌsk·nÌ popisu z pamÏti
    Dim tipText As String: tipText = ""
    If Not dictTagDescriptions Is Nothing Then
        If dictTagDescriptions.Exists(rword) Then
            tipText = CleanDescriptionForTooltip(dictTagDescriptions(rword))
        End If
    End If
    
    Select Case rScore
        Case Is > 10000: rSize = 72: rColor = RGB(230, 0, 0)
        Case Is > 6000: rSize = 48: rColor = RGB(255, 100, 0)
        Case Is > 3000: rSize = 32: rColor = RGB(60, 60, 60)
        Case Is > 1000: rSize = 22: rColor = RGB(100, 100, 100)
        Case Else: rSize = 14: rColor = RGB(150, 150, 150)
    End Select
    
    Set currAdd = wcSheet.Shapes.AddTextbox(msoTextOrientationHorizontal, rLeft, rTop, 120, 80)
    
    With wcSheet.Shapes(currAdd.Name)
        .TextFrame.Characters.text = rword
        .TextFrame.Characters.Font.size = rSize
        .TextFrame.Characters.Font.Color = rColor
        .TextFrame.AutoSize = msoAutoSizeShapeToFitText
        .line.Visible = msoFalse
        
        ' UPRAVENO: Pr˘hledn· v˝plÚ pro lepöÌ klikatelnost a tooltip
        .Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255, 255, 255)
        .Fill.Transparency = 1 ' 100% pr˘hlednost = neviditelnÈ, ale existujÌcÌ pro myö
        
        ' UPRAVENO: P¯id·nÌ Tooltipu (pokud existuje popis)
        If Len(tipText) > 0 Then
            wcSheet.Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=wcSheet.Shapes(currAdd.Name), Address:="", subAddress:="", ScreenTip:=tipText
        End If

        .TextFrame.VerticalOverflow = xlOartVerticalOverflowOverflow
        .TextFrame.HorizontalOverflow = xlOartHorizontalOverflowOverflow
        .TextFrame.VerticalAlignment = xlVAlignCenter
        .TextFrame.MarginLeft = 1: .TextFrame.MarginRight = 1: .TextFrame.MarginTop = 0: .TextFrame.MarginBottom = 0
        
        If containsTalls(rword) Then .Height = .Height * 0.57 Else .Height = .Height * 0.4
        .top = rTop
        
        wcShpNameCounter = wcShpNameCounter + 1
        currAdd.Name = WC_SHAPE_PREFIX & wcShpNameCounter
        addWord = currAdd.Name
    End With
    
End Function

Private Function GetTopKWordsFromData(ByVal k As Long) As Variant
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WC_DATA_SHEET)
    Dim lastRow As Long: lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, WC_DATA_WORD_COL).End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Function
    Dim n As Long: n = lastRow - 1
    Dim sortData() As Variant: ReDim sortData(0 To n - 1, 0 To 1)
    Dim r As Long, idx As Long: idx = 0
    For r = 2 To lastRow
        If Len(ws.Cells(r, WC_DATA_WORD_COL).Value) > 0 And IsNumeric(ws.Cells(r, WC_DATA_COUNT_COL).Value) Then
            sortData(idx, 0) = CStr(ws.Cells(r, WC_DATA_WORD_COL).Value)
            sortData(idx, 1) = CLng(ws.Cells(r, WC_DATA_COUNT_COL).Value)
            idx = idx + 1
        End If
    Next r
    If idx = 0 Then Exit Function
    If idx < n Then ReDim Preserve sortData(0 To idx - 1, 0 To 1)
    Call QuickSortArray(sortData, , , 1)
    Dim takeN As Long: takeN = Application.Min(k, UBound(sortData, 1) + 1)
    Dim outArr() As Variant: ReDim outArr(1 To takeN, 1 To 2)
    Dim i As Long, src As Long: src = UBound(sortData, 1)
    For i = 1 To takeN
        outArr(i, 1) = sortData(src, 0): outArr(i, 2) = sortData(src, 1): src = src - 1
    Next i
    GetTopKWordsFromData = outArr
End Function

' --- Spatial Hash ---
Private Sub InitSpatialGrid(ByVal bgShape As Shape)
    Dim w As Single, h As Single, c As Long, r As Long
    shLeft = bgShape.left: shTop = bgShape.top: w = bgShape.Width: h = bgShape.Height
    shCols = Application.WorksheetFunction.RoundUp(w / SH_CELL_SIZE, 0)
    shRows = Application.WorksheetFunction.RoundUp(h / SH_CELL_SIZE, 0)
    ReDim shGrid(0 To shCols, 0 To shRows)
    For c = 0 To shCols: For r = 0 To shRows: Set shGrid(c, r) = New Collection: Next r: Next c
End Sub

Private Sub AddToSpatialGrid(ByVal shp As Shape)
    Dim c1 As Long, c2 As Long, r1 As Long, r2 As Long, c As Long, r As Long
    Call GetGridBounds(shp, c1, c2, r1, r2)
    For c = c1 To c2: For r = r1 To r2: shGrid(c, r).Add shp: Next r: Next c
End Sub

Private Sub GetGridBounds(ByVal shp As Shape, ByRef c1 As Long, ByRef c2 As Long, ByRef r1 As Long, ByRef r2 As Long)
    Dim l As Single, t As Single, ri As Single, bo As Single
    l = shp.left - shLeft: t = shp.top - shTop: ri = l + shp.Width: bo = t + shp.Height
    c1 = Int(l / SH_CELL_SIZE): r1 = Int(t / SH_CELL_SIZE): c2 = Int(ri / SH_CELL_SIZE): r2 = Int(bo / SH_CELL_SIZE)
    If c1 < 0 Then c1 = 0
    If r1 < 0 Then r1 = 0
    If c2 > shCols Then c2 = shCols
    If r2 > shRows Then r2 = shRows
End Sub

Private Function ShapesOverlap(oSh1 As Shape, oSh2 As Shape) As Boolean
    Dim L1 As Single, r1 As Single, T1 As Single, B1 As Single
    Dim L2 As Single, r2 As Single, t2 As Single, B2 As Single
    L1 = oSh1.left: r1 = L1 + oSh1.Width: T1 = oSh1.top: B1 = T1 + oSh1.Height
    L2 = oSh2.left: r2 = L2 + oSh2.Width: t2 = oSh2.top: B2 = t2 + oSh2.Height
    If L1 < r2 And r1 > L2 And T1 < B2 And B1 > t2 Then ShapesOverlap = True
End Function

Private Function overlaptest(shape1 As Shape) As Boolean
    Dim c1 As Long, c2 As Long, r1 As Long, r2 As Long, c As Long, r As Long
    Dim cellColl As Collection, candidate As Shape
    Call GetGridBounds(shape1, c1, c2, r1, r2)
    For c = c1 To c2
        For r = r1 To r2
            Set cellColl = shGrid(c, r)
            If cellColl.count > 0 Then
                For Each candidate In cellColl
                    If candidate.Name <> WC_BACKGROUND_NAME Then
                        If ShapesOverlap(shape1, candidate) Then overlaptest = True: Exit Function
                    End If
                Next candidate
            End If
        Next r
    Next c
    overlaptest = False
End Function

Private Sub maint()
    Dim shp As Shape
    On Error Resume Next: Set wcSheet = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WC_OUTPUT_SHEET)
    If wcSheet Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    For Each shp In wcSheet.Shapes
        If left(shp.Name, Len(WC_SHAPE_PREFIX)) = WC_SHAPE_PREFIX Then shp.Delete
    Next shp
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

Private Function containsTalls(rword As String) As Boolean
    If InStr(rword, "t") Or InStr(rword, "l") Or InStr(rword, "k") Or InStr(rword, "h") Or InStr(rword, "d") Or InStr(rword, "b") Then containsTalls = True
End Function

Public Sub QuickSortArray(ByRef SortArray As Variant, Optional lngMin As Long = -1, Optional lngMax As Long = -1, Optional lngColumn As Long = 0)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, varMid As Variant, arrRowTemp As Variant, lngColTemp As Long
    If IsEmpty(SortArray) Then Exit Sub
    If lngMin = -1 Then lngMin = LBound(SortArray, 1)
    If lngMax = -1 Then lngMax = UBound(SortArray, 1)
    If lngMin >= lngMax Then Exit Sub
    i = lngMin: j = lngMax: varMid = SortArray((lngMin + lngMax) \ 2, lngColumn)
    While i <= j
        While SortArray(i, lngColumn) < varMid And i < lngMax: i = i + 1: Wend
        While varMid < SortArray(j, lngColumn) And j > lngMin: j = j - 1: Wend
        If i <= j Then
            ReDim arrRowTemp(LBound(SortArray, 2) To UBound(SortArray, 2))
            For lngColTemp = LBound(SortArray, 2) To UBound(SortArray, 2)
                arrRowTemp(lngColTemp) = SortArray(i, lngColTemp)
                SortArray(i, lngColTemp) = SortArray(j, lngColTemp)
                SortArray(j, lngColTemp) = arrRowTemp(lngColTemp)
            Next lngColTemp
            Erase arrRowTemp: i = i + 1: j = j - 1
        End If
    Wend
    If (lngMin < j) Then Call QuickSortArray(SortArray, lngMin, j, lngColumn)
    If (i < lngMax) Then Call QuickSortArray(SortArray, i, lngMax, lngColumn)
End Sub

' === NOV¡ POMOCN¡ FUNKCE PRO PIVOT TABLE ===
' SlouûÌ pro rychlÈ zjiötÏnÌ statusu dokonËenÌ jen v procedu¯e PripravitPivotDataProTagy
Private Function GetFinishedAnimeDict() As Object
    Dim d As Object: Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ANIME_SHEET_NAME)
    Dim lastRow As Long: lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, MAL_ID_COLUMN).End(xlUp).row
    ' NaËteme sloupec M (Finish) do pole pro rychlost
    ' M je 13. sloupec? Pokud je A=1, M=13. Pokud tabulka zacina na A.
    ' Zde predpokladame standardni A1 layout.
    Dim finishArr As Variant
    finishArr = ws.Range("M1:M" & lastRow).Value2
    
    Dim hl As Hyperlink, r As Long, urlParts() As String, malID As Long
    
    For Each hl In ws.Hyperlinks
        If hl.Range.Column = ws.Range(MAL_ID_COLUMN & "1").Column Then
            r = hl.Range.row
            If r <= UBound(finishArr, 1) Then
                If Len(CStr(finishArr(r, 1))) > 0 Then
                    ' Extrakce ID
                    urlParts = Split(hl.Address, "/")
                    If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then
                         malID = CLng(urlParts(4))
                         d(malID) = True
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next hl
    Set GetFinishedAnimeDict = d
End Function

Public Sub PripravitPivotDataProTagy()
    Dim ws As Worksheet, wsCache As Worksheet
    Dim lastCacheRow As Long, cacheData As Variant, startCell As Range, lo As ListObject
    Dim dataRows As Long, r As Long, i As Long, tblRange As Range
    
    Dim malID As Long, animeName As String, tagString As String
    Dim tagsArr As Variant, tagKey As Variant, parts As Variant
    Dim finishedDict As Object
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual

    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(PIVOT_DATA_SHEET)
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If ws Is Nothing Or wsCache Is Nothing Then GoTo Cleanup

    ' Zde pouûijeme optimalizovan˝ lok·lnÌ slovnÌk
    Set finishedDict = GetFinishedAnimeDict()

    Set startCell = ws.Range(PIVOT_DATA_START_COL & "1")
    lastCacheRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, CACHE_START_COLUMN).End(xlUp).row
    If lastCacheRow < 2 Then GoTo Cleanup
    cacheData = wsCache.Range(wsCache.Cells(2, CACHE_START_COLUMN), wsCache.Cells(lastCacheRow, CACHE_START_COLUMN).Offset(0, CACHE_TAGS_OFFSET)).Value

    dataRows = 0
    For i = 1 To UBound(cacheData, 1)
        If IsNumeric(cacheData(i, 1)) Then
            malID = CLng(cacheData(i, 1))
            ' Zde kontrolujeme p¯es slovnÌk, ne p¯es cFinish
            If finishedDict.Exists(malID) Then
                If Len(CStr(cacheData(i, 3))) > 0 Then
                    tagsArr = Split(CStr(cacheData(i, 3)), ";")
                    For Each tagKey In tagsArr
                        parts = Split(tagKey, ":")
                        If UBound(parts) = 1 Then If IsNumeric(parts(1)) Then dataRows = dataRows + 1
                    Next tagKey
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i

    startCell.Value = "Pivot_Anime": startCell.Offset(0, 1).Value = "Pivot_Tag": startCell.Offset(0, 2).Value = "Pivot_Rank"
    On Error Resume Next: Set lo = ws.ListObjects(PIVOT_TABLE_NAME): On Error GoTo 0
    If lo Is Nothing Then
        Set tblRange = ws.Range(startCell, startCell.Offset(Application.Max(1, dataRows), 2))
        Set lo = ws.ListObjects.Add(xlSrcRange, tblRange, , xlYes)
        lo.Name = PIVOT_TABLE_NAME
    Else
        If Not lo.DataBodyRange Is Nothing Then lo.DataBodyRange.ClearContents
        On Error Resume Next: lo.Resize ws.Range(startCell, startCell.Offset(1, 2)): On Error GoTo 0
        lo.Resize ws.Range(startCell, startCell.Offset(Application.Max(1, dataRows), 2))
    End If

    If dataRows > 0 Then
        Dim arrData() As Variant: ReDim arrData(1 To dataRows, 1 To 3)
        r = 1
        For i = 1 To UBound(cacheData, 1)
            If IsNumeric(cacheData(i, 1)) Then
                malID = CLng(cacheData(i, 1))
                ' Zde kontrolujeme p¯es slovnÌk
                If finishedDict.Exists(malID) Then
                    animeName = CStr(cacheData(i, 2)): tagString = CStr(cacheData(i, 3))
                    If Len(tagString) > 0 Then
                        tagsArr = Split(tagString, ";")
                        For Each tagKey In tagsArr
                            parts = Split(tagKey, ":")
                            If UBound(parts) = 1 Then
                                If IsNumeric(parts(1)) Then
                                    arrData(r, 1) = animeName: arrData(r, 2) = CStr(parts(0)): arrData(r, 3) = CLng(parts(1))
                                    r = r + 1
                                End If
                            End If
                        Next tagKey
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        Next i
        startCell.Offset(1, 0).Resize(dataRows, 3).Value = arrData
    End If
    lo.Range.Columns.AutoFit
Cleanup:
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic: Application.ScreenUpdating = True
End Sub

'====================================================================================================
'== GRAF: OPTIMALIZOVAN¡ VERZE S ARRAY READ
'====================================================================================================

Public Sub VytvorGrafVazenychTagu()
    Dim wsData As Worksheet, wsCache As Worksheet, wsCiel As Worksheet
    Dim dictSumaVah As Object, dictSumaVazenychHodnoceni As Object
    Dim cacheDict As Object
    Dim lastDataRow As Long, i As Long, malID As Long
    Dim hodnoceni As Variant, vaha As Double
    Dim tagString As String, tagsArr As Variant, tagKey As Variant, parts As Variant
    Dim tagName As String, tagRank As Long
    
    ' === OPTIMALIZACE: NaËteme sloupec hodnocenÌ A status do pole ===
    Dim ratingAndFinishArr As Variant
    Dim cFinish As Variant
    
    Set dictSumaVah = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary"): dictSumaVah.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    Set dictSumaVazenychHodnoceni = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary"): dictSumaVazenychHodnoceni.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    On Error GoTo ChybaGrafuTagu

    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(ANIME_SHEET_NAME)
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    Set wsCiel = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WC_OUTPUT_SHEET)
    
    Set cacheDict = LoadCache(wsCache)
    
    If cacheDict.count = 0 Then MsgBox "Cache je pr·zdn·.", vbExclamation: GoTo CleanupGrafTagu
    
    lastDataRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, MAL_ID_COLUMN).End(xlUp).row
    
    ' NaËteme sloupec hodnocenÌ (K) a Finish (M) najednou (K:M)
    If lastDataRow < 2 Then GoTo CleanupGrafTagu
    ratingAndFinishArr = wsData.Range("K2:M" & lastDataRow).Value2
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(ratingAndFinishArr, 1)
        hodnoceni = ratingAndFinishArr(i, 1) ' Sloupec K
        cFinish = ratingAndFinishArr(i, 3)   ' Sloupec M
        
        If IsNumeric(hodnoceni) And hodnoceni >= 1 And hodnoceni <= 10 Then
            malID = GetMalIdFromLink(wsData.Cells(i + 1, MAL_ID_COLUMN)) ' i+1 protoûe pole zaËÌn· na ¯·dku 2
            
            ' Zde jiû cFinish existuje (naËetli jsme ho do pole)
            If Len(CStr(cFinish)) > 0 Then
                If cacheDict.Exists(malID) Then
                    tagString = cacheDict(malID)("Tags")
                    If tagString <> "" Then
                        tagsArr = Split(tagString, ";")
                        For Each tagKey In tagsArr
                            parts = Split(tagKey, ":")
                            
                            ' === OPRAVA CHYBY SUBSCRIPT OUT OF RANGE ===
                            ' P˘vodnÌ kÛd s "And" zp˘soboval p·d u [[BLACKLIST]],
                            ' protoûe VBA vyhodnocuje obÏ strany podmÌnky.
                            If UBound(parts) = 1 Then
                                If IsNumeric(parts(1)) Then
                                    tagName = CStr(parts(0))
                                    tagRank = CLng(parts(1))
                                    vaha = tagRank / 100
                                    dictSumaVah(tagName) = dictSumaVah(tagName) + vaha
                                    dictSumaVazenychHodnoceni(tagName) = dictSumaVazenychHodnoceni(tagName) + (CDbl(hodnoceni) * vaha)
                                End If
                            End If
                            ' ===========================================
                            
                        Next tagKey
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i

    Const MIN_SUMA_VAH As Double = 3#
    Dim finalScores As Object: Set finalScores = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim key As Variant
    
    For Each key In dictSumaVah.keys
        If dictSumaVah(key) >= MIN_SUMA_VAH Then
            finalScores(key) = dictSumaVazenychHodnoceni(key) / dictSumaVah(key)
        End If
    Next key
    
    If finalScores.count = 0 Then GoTo CleanupGrafTagu

    Dim sortedList As Object: Set sortedList = SortDictionaryByValue(finalScores, False)
    Dim topCount As Long: topCount = Application.Min(20, sortedList.count)
    Dim kategorie() As String: ReDim kategorie(1 To topCount)
    Dim hodnoty() As Double: ReDim hodnoty(1 To topCount)
    Dim j As Long
    
    For j = 1 To topCount
        kategorie(j) = sortedList(j - 1)(0)
        hodnoty(j) = sortedList(j - 1)(1)
    Next j
    Call ReverseArrayInPlace(kategorie)
    Call ReverseArrayInPlace(hodnoty)

    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, grafNazev As String: grafNazev = "GrafVazeneTagy"
    On Error Resume Next: Set chtObj = wsCiel.ChartObjects(grafNazev): On Error GoTo ChybaGrafuTagu
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Dim rngKotva As Range: Set rngKotva = wsCiel.Range("AY14")
        Set chtObj = wsCiel.ChartObjects.Add(rngKotva.left, rngKotva.top, 450, 300)
        chtObj.Name = grafNazev
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered: .HasLegend = False: .HasTitle = True
            If .SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
            With .SeriesCollection(1): .Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(46, 117, 182): .ApplyDataLabels: .DataLabels.Format.TextFrame2.TextRange.Font.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0): End With
            With .Axes(xlValue): .MinimumScale = 0: .MaximumScale = 10: .HasTitle = True: .AxisTitle.text = "V·ûenÈ pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ": End With
            .Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Font.size = 10
        End With
    End If

    Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    With cht
        .ChartTitle.text = "Top " & topCount & " AniList tag˘ (V·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ)"
        .Axes(xlCategory).Crosses = xlMaximum
        With .Axes(xlValue): .MinimumScaleIsAuto = True: .MaximumScale = 10: End With
        If .SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then .SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        With .SeriesCollection(1)
            .values = hodnoty: .XValues = kategorie: .ApplyDataLabels: .DataLabels.NumberFormatLinked = False
        End With
    End With

CleanupGrafTagu:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Exit Sub
ChybaGrafuTagu:
    MsgBox "Chyba grafu: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume CleanupGrafTagu
End Sub

Private Function SortDictionaryByValue(dict As Object, ByVal ascending As Boolean) As Object
    Dim list As Object: Set list = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    Dim key As Variant: For Each key In dict.keys: list.Add Array(key, dict(key)): Next key
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, Temp As Variant, condition As Boolean
    If list.count < 2 Then Set SortDictionaryByValue = list: Exit Function
    For i = 0 To list.count - 2
        For j = i + 1 To list.count - 1
            If ascending Then condition = (list(i)(1) > list(j)(1)) Else condition = (list(i)(1) < list(j)(1))
            If condition Then Temp = list(j): list(j) = list(i): list(i) = Temp
        Next j
    Next i
    Set SortDictionaryByValue = list
End Function

Private Sub ReverseArrayInPlace(ByRef arr As Variant)
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, Temp As Variant
    i = LBound(arr): j = UBound(arr)
    Do While i < j: Temp = arr(i): arr(i) = arr(j): arr(j) = Temp: i = i + 1: j = j - 1: Loop
End Sub


' ===================================================================================
' == SPR¡VA POPISŸ TAGŸ (TOOLTIP DB) ==
' ===================================================================================
Private Sub InitTagDescriptionCache()
    ' NaËte celou datab·zi popis˘ do pamÏti (BP:BQ)
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, data As Variant, i As Long
    
    Set dictTagDescriptions = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictTagDescriptions.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    lastRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, TAG_DB_COL_NAME).End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' NaËteme data najednou do pole (rychlost)
