    data = wsCache.Range(TAG_DB_COL_NAME & "2:" & TAG_DB_COL_DESC & lastRow).Value2
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(data, 1)
        If Not IsEmpty(data(i, 1)) Then
            ' KlÌË = N·zev tagu, Hodnota = Popis
            dictTagDescriptions(CStr(data(i, 1))) = CStr(data(i, 2))
        End If
    Next i
End Sub

Private Sub SaveNewTagDescriptions(ByVal newTagsDict As Object)
    ' UloûÌ novÈ popisy na list, pokud tam jeötÏ nejsou
    If newTagsDict Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    If newTagsDict.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, key As Variant
    Dim updateArr As Object
    Set updateArr = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    
    ' Nejd¯Ìv naËteme aktu·lnÌ stav, abychom nezapisovali duplicity
    If dictTagDescriptions Is Nothing Then Call InitTagDescriptionCache
    
    For Each key In newTagsDict.keys
        If Not dictTagDescriptions.Exists(key) Then
            dictTagDescriptions.Add key, newTagsDict(key) ' P¯idat do pamÏti
            updateArr.Add Array(key, newTagsDict(key))    ' P¯idat do fronty na z·pis
        End If
    Next key
    
    If updateArr.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' Z·pis na list
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CACHE_SHEET_NAME)
    lastRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, TAG_DB_COL_NAME).End(xlUp).row + 1
    
    Dim finalArr() As Variant
    ReDim finalArr(1 To updateArr.count, 1 To 2)
    Dim i As Long
    
    For i = 0 To updateArr.count - 1
        finalArr(i + 1, 1) = updateArr(i)(0)
        finalArr(i + 1, 2) = updateArr(i)(1)
    Next i
    
    wsCache.Cells(lastRow, TAG_DB_COL_NAME).Resize(updateArr.count, 2).Value2 = finalArr
End Sub

Private Function CleanDescriptionForTooltip(ByVal txt As String) As String
    ' OËistÌ text pro ScreenTip (max 255 znak˘, û·dnÈ enterry)
    Dim res As String
    res = Replace(txt, vbCrLf, " ")
    res = Replace(res, vbCr, " ")
    res = Replace(res, vbLf, " ")
    res = Replace(res, "  ", " ") ' Odstranit dvojitÈ mezery
    
    If Len(res) > 250 Then
        res = left(res, 250) & "..."
    End If
    CleanDescriptionForTooltip = res
End Function



--- KONEC K”DU [LIST_AniList_Tags] ---

Modul: LIST_TOP10_HM_ANIME
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [LIST_TOP10_HM_ANIME] ---
Sub Spravovat_Top10_HM()
    ' Deklarace promÏnn˝ch
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim rankInput As Variant
    Dim rankNum As Long
    Dim animeName As Variant
    Dim currentName As String
    Dim imagePath As Variant
    Dim maxLimit As Long
    
    ' --- NOV… PROMÃNN… PRO VðBÃR REéIMU ---
    Dim editMode As VbMsgBoxResult
    Dim shapePrefix As String
    Dim promptTitle As String
    Dim rankPrompt As String
    ' ---------------------------------------
    
    ' --- CÌl na spr·vn˝ list ---
    ' Zde musÌ b˝t p¯esn˝ n·zev tvÈho listu
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    If ws Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: List 'OBECN… INFORMACE' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0 ' Reset error handling

' --- Krok 1: Zeptat se, co chceme mÏnit (Top 10 vs HM) ---
    editMode = MsgBox("Co chceö spravovat?" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                        "Ano = TOP 10" & vbCrLf & _
                        "Ne = Honourable Mentions", _
                        vbYesNoCancel + vbQuestion, "V˝bÏr Reûimu ⁄prav")
    
    Select Case editMode
        Case vbYes ' --- REéIM TOP 10 ---
            shapePrefix = "Top10_Anime_"
            promptTitle = "TOP 10"
            maxLimit = 10 ' Top 10 z˘st·v· 10
            rankPrompt = "Kter˝ rank (1-" & maxLimit & ") chceö zmÏnit?"
            
        Case vbNo ' --- REéIM HONOURABLE MENTIONS ---
            shapePrefix = "HM_Anime_"
            promptTitle = "Honourable Mention"
            maxLimit = 20 ' <--- ZDE SI ZMÃ“ PO»ET HM (nap¯. na 20)
            rankPrompt = "Kterou pozici HM (1-" & maxLimit & ") chceö zmÏnit?"
            
        Case vbCancel
            Exit Sub ' Uûivatel stiskl Storno
    End Select

    ' --- Krok 2: Zeptat se na Rank / Pozici ---
    ' Pouûijeme Application.InputBox, protoûe umÌ lÈpe ovÏ¯it "Cancel"
    rankInput = Application.InputBox(prompt:=rankPrompt, _
                                     title:="Krok 2: V˝bÏr Pozice (" & promptTitle & ")", _
                                     Type:=1) ' Type 1 = »Ìslo
    
    ' Kontrola, zda uûivatel klikl na "Cancel" (vr·tÌ False)
    If rankInput = False Then Exit Sub
    
    rankNum = CLng(rankInput)
    
' Kontrola platnÈho rozsahu
    If rankNum < 1 Or rankNum > maxLimit Then
        MsgBox "Neplatn· pozice. Zadej prosÌm ËÌslo od 1 do " & maxLimit & ".", vbCritical, "Chyba"
        Exit Sub
    End If



' --- Krok 3: NajÌt objekt a zeptat se na N·zev ---
    ' PokusÌme se najÌt objekt se jmÈnem (nap¯. "Top10_Anime_5" nebo "HM_Anime_3")
    On Error Resume Next
    ' ZDE JE TA KLÕ»OV¡ ZMÃNA:
    Set shp = ws.Shapes(shapePrefix & rankNum)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Pokud objekt neexistuje, makro skonËÌ
    If shp Is Nothing Then
        ' I TATO HL¡äKA JE UPRAVEN¡:
        MsgBox "Chyba: Objekt '" & shapePrefix & rankNum & "' nebyl na listu 'OBECN… INFORMACE' nalezen." & vbCrLf & _
               "Zkontroluj, zda jsi objekt spr·vnÏ pojmenoval.", vbCritical, "Chyba Objektu"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' NaËtenÌ souËasnÈho Alt Textu, aby se zobrazil v InputBoxu
    currentName = shp.AlternativeText
    
    animeName = Application.InputBox(prompt:="Zadej n·zev pro " & promptTitle & " #" & rankNum & ":", _
                                     title:="Krok 3: N·zev Anime", _
                                     Default:=currentName, _
                                     Type:=2) ' Type 2 = Text
                                     
    ' Kontrola, zda uûivatel klikl na "Cancel" (vr·tÌ "False" jako string)
    If animeName = "False" Then Exit Sub

    ' --- Krok 4: Zeptat se na Obr·zek ---
    imagePath = Application.GetOpenFilename(FileFilter:="Obr·zky (*.jpg; *.jpeg; *.png; *.bmp),*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.bmp", _
                                          title:="Krok 4: Vyber obr·zek pro " & promptTitle & " #" & rankNum)
                                          
    ' Kontrola, zda uûivatel klikl na "Cancel" (vr·tÌ False)
    If imagePath = False Then Exit Sub

    ' --- Krok 3: NajÌt objekt a zeptat se na N·zev ---
    ' PokusÌme se najÌt objekt se jmÈnem (nap¯. "Top10_Anime_5" nebo "HM_Anime_3")
    On Error Resume Next
    Set shp = ws.Shapes(shapePrefix & rankNum)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Pokud objekt neexistuje, makro skonËÌ
    If shp Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: Objekt '" & shapePrefix & rankNum & "' nebyl na listu 'OBECN… INFORMACE' nalezen." & vbCrLf & _
               "Zkontroluj, zda jsi objekt spr·vnÏ pojmenoval.", vbCritical, "Chyba Objektu"
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' --- Krok 4: Aktualizace Objektu ---
    ' Zablokov·nÌ aktualizace obrazovky, aby vkl·d·nÌ neprobliklo
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    On Error Resume Next ' Oöet¯enÌ chyb p¯i pr·ci s objektem
    With shp
        ' NastavenÌ novÈho n·zvu
        .AlternativeText = CStr(animeName)
        
        ' VloûenÌ novÈho obr·zku jako v˝plÚ
        .Fill.Visible = msoTrue
        .Fill.UserPicture CStr(imagePath)
        ' Tento ¯·dek zajistÌ, ûe se obr·zek p¯izp˘sobÌ, ale nerozt·hne
        .Fill.TextureTile = msoFalse
    End With
    
    ' Kontrola, jestli vloûenÌ probÏhlo v po¯·dku
    If err.Number <> 0 Then
        MsgBox "Doölo k chybÏ p¯i vkl·d·nÌ obr·zku nebo nastavov·nÌ textu." & vbCrLf & "Error: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    Else
        ' PotvrzenÌ o ˙spÏchu
        MsgBox promptTitle & " #" & rankNum & " byl ˙spÏönÏ aktualizov·n na '" & animeName & "'.", vbInformation, "Hotovo"
    End If
    
    On Error GoTo 0
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    
End Sub

--- KONEC K”DU [LIST_TOP10_HM_ANIME] ---

Modul: LIST_FAV_CHARS
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [LIST_FAV_CHARS] ---
' Vloûit do novÈho modulu (nap¯. mod_Top10_Postavy)

Option Explicit

' Konstanta pro z·kladnÌ URL API
Private Const JIKAN_API_URL As String = "https://api.jikan.moe"

'================================================================================
' MAKRO: Spravovat_Top10_Postavy
' ⁄»EL: HlavnÌ makro pro spr·vu Top 10 postav pomocÌ JIKAN API.
'================================================================================
Sub Spravovat_Top10_Postavy()
    ' --- Deklarace promÏnn˝ch ---
    
    ' Pro Excel
    Dim wsInfo As Worksheet
    Dim shpImage As Shape
    Dim shpText As Shape
    Dim rankInput As Variant
    Dim rankNum As Long
    Dim currentAltText As String
    Dim currentCharID As String
    Dim currentAnimeName As String
    Dim hLink As Hyperlink
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro Krok 1 (V˝bÏr)
    Dim selectChoice As VbMsgBoxResult
    
    
    ' Pro JIKAN a API
    Dim jsonResponse As String
    Dim jsonObj As Object ' Bude vyûadovat tv˘j JSON parser
    Dim searchName As String
    Dim selectedCharID As String
    Dim selectedCharName As String
    Dim imageUrl As String
    Dim tempFile As String
    Dim selectedCharURL As String
    Dim customUrl As String
    Dim jsonAnimeInfo As Object ' Pro dotaz na Animeography
    
' Pro Hled·nÌ v Anime Listu
    Dim wsList As Worksheet
    Dim searchAnime As String
    Dim finalAnimeName As String
    Dim foundCell As Range
    Dim cellComment As String
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro Krok 4 (Hled·nÌ postavy)
    Dim continueSearching As Boolean
    Dim item As Object ' PromÏnn· pro iteraci v JSON
    Dim userChoice As VbMsgBoxResult
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro Krok 6 (Hled·nÌ sÈrie)
    Dim continueAnimeSearch As Boolean
    Dim seriesNameKey As String
    
    ' --- CÌlenÌ na listy ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsInfo = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("OBECN… INFORMACE")
    If wsInfo Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: List 'OBECN… INFORMACE' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Set wsList = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("ANIME LIST")
    If wsList Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: List 'ANIME LIST' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    
' TÕMTO K”DEM KOMPLETNÃ NAHRAœ PÿEDCHOZÕ "KROK 1"

' --- KROK 1: Sjednocen˝ v˝bÏr pozice ---

' Lok·lnÌ promÏnnÈ POUZE pro tento blok
Dim i As Long
Dim searchCharName As String
Dim currentText As String
Dim tempRank As Long

' Resetujeme rankNum
rankNum = 0

' Zept·me se na vstup (Type:=2 p¯ijme text i ËÌslo jako text)
rankInput = Application.InputBox( _
    prompt:="Zadej pozici (1-10) NEBO jmÈno postavy pro ˙pravu:", _
    title:="Krok 1: V˝bÏr Pozice", _
    Type:=2)
    
If rankInput = "False" Then Exit Sub ' Uûivatel stiskl Storno
If Len(rankInput) = 0 Then Exit Sub ' Uûivatel nic nezadal

' --- VyhodnocenÌ vstupu ---

' 1. ZkusÌme, zda to je platnÈ »ÕSLO POZICE
If IsNumeric(rankInput) Then
    tempRank = CLng(rankInput)
    If tempRank >= 1 And tempRank <= 10 Then
        rankNum = tempRank
    End If
End If

' 2. Pokud to nebylo platnÈ ËÌslo (nebo ËÌslo mimo 1-10),
'    zkusÌme HLED¡NÕ PODLE JM…NA
If rankNum = 0 Then
    searchCharName = CStr(rankInput)
    
    ' Pokud je text kratöÌ neû 2 znaky, nem· smysl hledat
    ' (a chr·nÌ to p¯ed vstupem "0", kter˝ nenÌ platn˝ rank)
    If Len(searchCharName) < 2 Then
         GoTo NalezenoNula ' P¯eskoËÌme rovnou na chybovou hl·öku
    End If

    ' Prohled·me vöech 10 textov˝ch polÌ
    On Error Resume Next ' Ignorujeme, pokud shape neexistuje
    For i = 1 To 10
        ' Pouûijeme hlavnÌ promÏnnou shpText
        Set shpText = wsInfo.Shapes("Top10_CharAnime_" & i)
        If Not shpText Is Nothing Then
            currentText = shpText.TextFrame.Characters.text
            ' Hled·me bez ohledu na velk·/mal· pÌsmena
            If InStr(1, currentText, searchCharName, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                rankNum = i ' Naöli jsme shodu!
                Exit For ' UkonËÌme hled·nÌ
            End If
        End If
        Set shpText = Nothing ' UvolnÌme pro dalöÌ smyËku
    Next i
    On Error GoTo 0
End If

' --- Fin·lnÌ kontrola ---
NalezenoNula:
If rankNum = 0 Then
    MsgBox "Pozice '" & rankInput & "' nebyla nalezena." & vbCrLf & _
           "Zadej buÔ ËÌslo 1-10, nebo Ë·st existujÌcÌho jmÈna postavy.", vbExclamation
    Exit Sub
End If

' ZobrazÌme uûivateli, co jsme vybrali (pro potvrzenÌ)
MsgBox "Bude upravena pozice #" & rankNum, vbInformation

' D·le kÛd pokraËuje Krokem 2, kter˝ jiû m· spr·vnÈ rankNum
    
    ' --- KROK 2: NalezenÌ objekt˘ ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Set shpImage = wsInfo.Shapes("Top10_Char_" & rankNum)
    Set shpText = wsInfo.Shapes("Top10_CharAnime_" & rankNum)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Kontrola, zda oba objekty existujÌ
    If shpImage Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: Objekt obr·zku 'Top10_Char_" & rankNum & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    If shpText Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: Objekt textu 'Top10_CharAnime_" & rankNum & "' nebyl nalezen.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' --- KROK 3: »tenÌ st·vajÌcÌch dat ---
    currentAltText = shpImage.AlternativeText
    
    ' Pouûijeme pomocnou funkci z modulu mod_API_Helpers
    currentCharID = ParseAltText(currentAltText, "CHAR_ID")
    currentAnimeName = ParseAltText(currentAltText, "ANIME_NAME")
    
    ' D·me uûivateli na v˝bÏr, pokud pozice uû je obsazen·
    If Len(currentCharID) > 0 Then
        If MsgBox("Pozice #" & rankNum & " je jiû nastavena." & vbCrLf & _
                  "(Postava ID: " & currentCharID & ", SÈrie: " & currentAnimeName & ")" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                  "Chceö tuto pozici p¯epsat?", _
                  vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "Pozice je obsazena") = vbNo Then
            Exit Sub ' Uûivatel nechce p¯epsat
        End If
    End If
    
    
    ' Vloûit za Krok 3 v modulu mod_Top10_Postavy

    ' --- KROK 4: Hled·nÌ postavy (JIKAN) ---
    
    continueSearching = True
    
    Do While continueSearching
        searchName = Application.InputBox(prompt:="Zadej jmÈno postavy pro hled·nÌ na MyAnimeList:", _
                                          title:="Krok 4: Hled·nÌ Postavy", _
                                          Type:=2)
                                          
        If searchName = "False" Then Exit Sub ' Uûivatel stiskl Storno
        If Len(searchName) < 3 Then
            MsgBox "Zadej prosÌm alespoÚ 3 znaky pro hled·nÌ.", vbExclamation
            GoTo NextSearchLoop ' P¯eskoËÌ zbytek a vr·tÌ se na zaË·tek Do While
        End If
        
        ' Zavol·me naöi pomocnou funkci z modulu mod_API_Helpers
        ' Pouûijeme limit=10, abychom nezobrazovali moc v˝sledk˘
        jsonResponse = JikanV4Request("/v4/characters?q=" & URLEncode(searchName) & "&limit=10")
        
        If Len(jsonResponse) = 0 Then
            MsgBox "Hled·nÌ postavy selhalo. API nevr·tilo û·dn· data.", vbCritical
            GoTo NextSearchLoop
        End If
        
        ' --- !!! ZDE POUéIJ SVŸJ JSON PARSER !!! ---
        ' P¯edpokl·d·m, ûe tv˘j parser funguje nÏjak takto.
        ' UPRAV TENTO ÿ¡DEK podle toho, jak˝ JSON parser pouûÌv·ö:
        'P¯Ìklad: Set jsonObj = JsonConverter.ParseJson(jsonResponse)
        ' P¯Ìklad: Set jsonObj = ParseJson(jsonResponse)
        ' -------------------------------------------
        On Error Resume Next ' Oöet¯enÌ chyb p¯i parsov·nÌ
        Set jsonObj = JsonConverter.ParseJson(jsonResponse)
        
        If err.Number <> 0 Or jsonObj Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox "Chyba p¯i parsov·nÌ JSON odpovÏdi. Zkontroluj sv˘j JSON modul.", vbCritical
            err.Clear
            On Error GoTo 0
            Exit Sub
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0
        ' -------------------------------------------

        ' Kontrola, zda API v˘bec nÏco naölo
        If Not jsonObj.Exists("data") Or jsonObj("data").count = 0 Then
            MsgBox "Pro '" & searchName & "' nebyly nalezeny û·dnÈ v˝sledky.", vbInformation
            GoTo NextSearchLoop
        End If

        ' SmyËka pro v˝bÏr spr·vnÈ postavy
        selectedCharID = "" ' Resetujeme v˝bÏr
        
        ' NAHRAœ CELOU SMY»KU "For Each item In jsonObj("data")" V KROKU 4

' TÕMTO K”DEM NAHRAœ CELOU SMY»KU "For Each item In jsonObj("data")" V KROKU 4

        ' TÕMTO K”DEM KOMPLETNÃ NAHRAœ CELOU SMY»KU "For Each item..." V KROKU 4

        For Each item In jsonObj("data")
            ' Lok·lnÌ promÏnnÈ pro tuto smyËku
            Dim mediaLabel As String
            Dim mediaTitle As String
            Dim char_id As String
            
            mediaTitle = "N/A" ' V˝chozÌ hodnota
            mediaLabel = "SÈrie: " ' V˝chozÌ popisek
            
            ' ZÌsk·me ID postavy z prvnÌho dotazu
            char_id = CStr(item("mal_id"))
            
            On Error Resume Next ' Ochrana pro API a parsov·nÌ
            
            ' --- NOVð KROK: Druh˝, specifick˝ dotaz na Anime ---
            ' TÌmto zÌsk·me data, kter· v prvnÌm vyhled·vacÌm dotazu chybÌ
            jsonResponse = JikanV4Request("/v4/characters/" & char_id & "/anime")
            
            If Len(jsonResponse) > 0 Then
                ' Pouûijeme n·ö nov˝ JSON objekt
                Set jsonAnimeInfo = JsonConverter.ParseJson(jsonResponse)
                
                ' OvÏ¯Ìme, ûe endpoint vr·til data a ûe pole nenÌ pr·zdnÈ
                If Not jsonAnimeInfo Is Nothing Then
                    If jsonAnimeInfo.Exists("data") And jsonAnimeInfo("data").count > 0 Then
                        ' Naöli jsme anime, vezmeme prvnÌ
                        mediaLabel = "Anime: "
                        mediaTitle = jsonAnimeInfo("data")(1)("anime")("title")
                    End If
                End If
                Set jsonAnimeInfo = Nothing ' UvolnÌme
            End If
            
            ' Pokud jsme anime nenaöli (ani po druhÈm dotazu),
            ' zkusÌme, jestli data nebyla alespoÚ v Manze (z prvnÌho dotazu)
            If mediaTitle = "N/A" Then
                If item.Exists("manga") And item("manga").count > 0 Then
                    mediaLabel = "Manga: "
                    mediaTitle = item("manga")(1)("title")
                End If
            End If
            
            On Error GoTo 0
            ' --- Konec vylepöenÌ ---
            
            
            ' ZobrazÌme MsgBox s v˝bÏrem (NynÌ se spr·vn˝mi daty)
            userChoice = MsgBox("Naöel jsem postavu:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                                "JmÈno: " & item("name") & vbCrLf & _
                                mediaLabel & mediaTitle & vbCrLf & _
                                "Odkaz: " & item("url") & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                                "Je to spr·vn· postava?", _
                                vbYesNoCancel + vbQuestion, "PotvrzenÌ V˝bÏru")
            
            ' Tento kÛd (logika vbYes/vbNo/vbCancel) z˘st·v· stejn˝
            If userChoice = vbYes Then
                selectedCharID = CStr(item("mal_id"))
                selectedCharName = CStr(item("name"))
                selectedCharURL = CStr(item("url"))
                
                continueSearching = False
                Exit For
                
            ElseIf userChoice = vbCancel Then
                Exit Sub ' Uûivatel stiskl Storno, konec makra
                
            ElseIf userChoice = vbNo Then
                ' Uûivatel stiskl Ne, pokraËujeme na dalöÌ v˝sledek
            End If
        Next item
        
        ' Pokud jsme proöli vöechny v˝sledky a uûivatel nic nevybral
        If selectedCharID = "" Then
            If MsgBox("Proöli jsme vöechny v˝sledky. Chceö zkusit hledat znovu (jinÈ jmÈno)?", _
                     vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "Hled·nÌ Ne˙spÏönÈ") = vbNo Then
                Exit Sub ' Uûivatel nechce hledat znovu
            End If
            ' Pokud ¯ekne Yes, smyËka 'Do While' se zopakuje
        End If
        
NextSearchLoop:
    Loop ' Konec Do While continueSearching
    
    
    ' --- KROK 5: ZÌsk·nÌ detail˘ postavy (URL obr·zku) ---
    
    If Len(selectedCharID) = 0 Then
        MsgBox "NeoËek·van· chyba: ID postavy nebylo vybr·no.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    jsonResponse = JikanV4Request("/v4/characters/" & selectedCharID)
    
    If Len(jsonResponse) = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: Nepoda¯ilo se zÌskat detaily pro postavu ID: " & selectedCharID, vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' --- !!! ZDE ZNOVU POUéIJ SVŸJ JSON PARSER !!! ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Set jsonObj = JsonConverter.ParseJson(jsonResponse)
    If err.Number <> 0 Or jsonObj Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Chyba p¯i parsov·nÌ JSON odpovÏdi (detaily postavy).", vbCritical
        err.Clear
        On Error GoTo 0
        Exit Sub
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    ' -------------------------------------------
    
    ' PokusÌme se zÌskat URL obr·zku
    On Error Resume Next
    imageUrl = jsonObj("data")("images")("jpg")("image_url")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Len(imageUrl) = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Chyba: V datech postavy nebylo nalezeno 'image_url'.", vbCritical
        ' M˘ûeme zkusit z·loûnÌ obr·zek, pokud existuje (nap¯. webp),
        ' ale pro teÔ makro ukonËÌme.
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' Informace pro uûivatele
    Debug.Print "Vybr·na postava: " & selectedCharName & " (ID: " & selectedCharID & ")"
    Debug.Print "Nalezena URL obr·zku: " & imageUrl
    
    ' Vloûit hned za KROK 5 (za ¯·dek Debug.Print "Nalezena URL...")

    ' --- NOVð KROK 5b: RuËnÌ v˝bÏr obr·zku (Poûadavek 3) ---
    If MsgBox("Naöel jsem hlavnÌ obr·zek postavy." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
              "Chceö si ruËnÏ vybrat jin˝ z galerie?", _
              vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "Volba Obr·zku") = vbYes Then
        
        ' Otev¯eme v prohlÌûeËi galerii obr·zk˘ postavy
        On Error Resume Next ' Pro p¯Ìpad, ûe by odkaz neöel otev¯Ìt
        ' Pouûijeme URL, kterou jsme si uloûili v Kroku 4
        ActiveWorkbook.FollowHyperlink Address:=selectedCharURL & "/pics"
        On Error GoTo 0
        
        customUrl = Application.InputBox( _
            prompt:="Otev¯el jsem v prohlÌûeËi galerii obr·zk˘." & vbCrLf & _
                    "ZkopÌruj sem prosÌm PÿÕMOU URL adresu (.jpg, .png) obr·zku, kter˝ chceö pouûÌt.", _
            title:="Krok 5b: RuËnÌ V˝bÏr Obr·zku", Type:=2)
        
        ' OvÏ¯Ìme, zda uûivatel nÏco vloûil a zda to vypad· jako URL
        If customUrl <> "False" And Len(customUrl) > 10 And left(customUrl, 4) = "http" Then
            imageUrl = customUrl ' P¯epÌöeme p˘vodnÌ imageUrl
            Debug.Print "Obr·zek zmÏnÏn na uûivatelskou URL: " & imageUrl
        ElseIf customUrl <> "False" Then
            MsgBox "Vloûen˝ text nevypad· jako platn· URL. Bude pouûit v˝chozÌ obr·zek.", vbExclamation
        Else
            ' Uûivatel stiskl Storno v InputBoxu, pouûije se v˝chozÌ obr·zek
            MsgBox "Bude pouûit v˝chozÌ obr·zek.", vbInformation
        End If
    End If
    
    
' Vloûit za Krok 5 v modulu mod_Top10_Postavy

' TÕMTO K”DEM KOMPLETNÃ NAHRAœ CELð PŸVODNÕ KROK 6

    ' --- KROK 6: Zad·nÌ n·zvu sÈrie (Poûadavek 1 - Zjednoduöeno) ---
    
    Do
        finalAnimeName = Application.InputBox( _
            prompt:="Krok 6: Zadej n·zev sÈrie" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "Zadej prosÌm p¯Ìmo fin·lnÌ n·zev sÈrie (nap¯. 'Monogatari' nebo 'Steins;Gate'), " & _
                    "kter˝ se m· zobrazit u postavy.", _
            title:="Krok 6: Zad·nÌ N·zvu SÈrie", _
            Default:=currentAnimeName, _
            Type:=2)
            
        If finalAnimeName = "False" Then Exit Sub ' Uûivatel stiskl Storno
        
        If Len(finalAnimeName) > 0 Then
            Exit Do ' N·zev je zadan˝, m˘ûeme opustit smyËku
        Else
            ' Uûivatel nic nezadal
            If MsgBox("Nezadal jsi û·dn˝ n·zev. Chceö to zkusit znovu?", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbNo Then
                Exit Sub ' Uûivatel to vzdal
            End If
            ' Pokud stiskne "Yes", smyËka se zopakuje
        End If
    Loop
    
    Debug.Print "Fin·lnÌ n·zev sÈrie: " & finalAnimeName
' TENTO K”D VLOé MÕSTO SMAZAN… »¡STI (OD KROKU 7 DO KONCE)
' ----------------------------------------------------------------

    ' --- KROK 7: Aktualizace Excelu (Fin·lnÌ verze) ---
    
    Debug.Print "SpouötÌm fin·lnÌ aktualizaci..."
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    
    ' 1. St·hneme obr·zek
    ' Pouûijeme funkci z modulu mod_API_Helpers
    tempFile = DownloadImage(imageUrl)
    
    If Len(tempFile) = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Stahov·nÌ obr·zku selhalo. Aktualizace byla p¯eruöena.", vbCritical
        Application.ScreenUpdating = True
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' P¯id·me Error Handler pro fin·lnÌ z·pis
    On Error GoTo UpdateError
    
' TOTO VLOé MÕSTO STAR…HO KROKU 2
' ---------------------------------
    ' 2. Aktualizujeme ODKAZ a OBR¡ZEK (ZmÏnÏnÈ po¯adÌ kv˘li chybÏ Excelu)
    
    ' KROK 2a: Nejd¯Ìve p¯id·me odkaz (na 'shpImage')
    If Len(selectedCharURL) > 0 Then
        ' Smaûeme star˝ odkaz z obr·zku (pokud tam byl)
        For Each hLink In wsInfo.Hyperlinks
            On Error Resume Next
            If hLink.Shape.Name = shpImage.Name Then
                hLink.Delete
                Exit For
            End If
            On Error GoTo UpdateError
        Next hLink
    
        ' P¯id·me nov˝ odkaz na OBR¡ZEK
        wsInfo.Hyperlinks.Add Anchor:=shpImage, Address:=selectedCharURL
        
    Else
        ' Pokud URL nenÌ, pro jistotu smaûeme star˝ odkaz
        For Each hLink In wsInfo.Hyperlinks
            On Error Resume Next
            If hLink.Shape.Name = shpImage.Name Then
                hLink.Delete
                Exit For
            End If
            On Error GoTo UpdateError
        Next hLink
        Debug.Print "selectedCharURL je pr·zdn·, odkaz se nep¯id·v·."
    End If
    
    ' KROK 2b: Aé POTOM vloûÌme obr·zek
    ' Toto po¯adÌ (odkaz prvnÌ, obr·zek druh˝) obch·zÌ chybu Excelu
    With shpImage.Fill
        .Visible = msoTrue
        .UserPicture tempFile
        .TextureTile = msoFalse
    End With
' ---------------------------------

' TOTO VLOé MÕSTO STAR…HO KROKU 3
' ----------------------------------------------------------------
    ' 3. Aktualizujeme textovÈ pole (JmÈno, SÈrie)
    Dim finalText As String
    finalText = selectedCharName & ", " & finalAnimeName

    ' VloûÌme fin·lnÌ text
    shpText.TextFrame.Characters.text = finalText
    
    ' UjistÌme se, ûe text NENÕ podtrûen˝
    shpText.TextFrame.Characters.Font.Underline = msoNoUnderline
    
    ' FIN¡LNÕ POJISTKA: AktivnÏ smaûeme odkaz z textovÈho pole
    On Error Resume Next ' Ignorujeme chyby, pokud odkaz neexistuje
    For Each hLink In wsInfo.Hyperlinks
        If hLink.Shape.Name = shpText.Name Then
            hLink.Delete
            Exit For
        End If
    Next hLink
    On Error GoTo UpdateError ' Vr·tÌme hlavnÌ error handling
' ----------------------------------------------------------------

    ' 4. Aktualizujeme AlternativeText (pro budoucÌ spuötÏnÌ)
    shpImage.AlternativeText = "CHAR_ID:" & selectedCharID & ";ANIME_NAME:" & finalAnimeName
    
    ' 5. Smaûeme doËasn˝ soubor
    On Error Resume Next ' Ignorujeme chybu, pokud by soubor neöel smazat
    Kill tempFile
    On Error GoTo UpdateError ' Vr·tÌme Error Handling
    
    ' Hotovo
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Hotovo!" & vbCrLf & "Pozice #" & rankNum & " byla ˙spÏönÏ aktualizov·na na:" & vbCrLf & _
           selectedCharName & ", " & finalAnimeName, vbInformation, "Aktualizace DokonËena"
           
    ' P¯eskoËÌme chybov˝ handler a jdeme rovnou na ˙klid
    GoTo Cleanup

' --- Toto musÌ b˝t ˙plnÏ na konci Sub, tÏsnÏ p¯ed "End Sub" ---

UpdateError:
    ' Chybov˝ handler pro Krok 7
    MsgBox "Doölo k chybÏ p¯i fin·lnÌ aktualizaci objekt˘ v Excelu." & vbCrLf & _
           "Error: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    ' PokusÌme se smazat temp soubor i p¯i chybÏ
    On Error Resume Next
    Kill tempFile

Cleanup:
    ' UvolnÏnÌ promÏnn˝ch z pamÏti
    Set wsInfo = Nothing
    Set wsList = Nothing
    Set shpImage = Nothing
    Set shpText = Nothing
    Set jsonObj = Nothing
    Set foundCell = Nothing
    Set hLink = Nothing ' UvolnÌme novou promÏnnou
    
    Debug.Print "Makro Spravovat_Top10_Postavy dokonËeno."

End Sub


    

' --- POZN¡MKA: ---
' Aby tento kÛd fungoval, musÌö mÌt povolenÈ "Microsoft XML, v6.0"
' V editoru VBA jdi na Tools -> References... -> a zaökrtni "Microsoft XML, v6.0"



'================================================================================
' FUNKCE: JikanV4Request
' ⁄»EL:  Odeöle GET poûadavek na JIKAN v4 API a vr·tÌ odpovÏÔ jako String.
'================================================================================
Function JikanV4Request(ByVal endpoint As String) As String
    Dim http As Object
    Dim requestUrl As String
    
    ' PouûÌv·me MSXML2.XMLHTTP.6.0
    Set http = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP.6.0")
    requestUrl = JIKAN_API_URL & endpoint
    
    ' NastavenÌ "Error Handlingu" pro p¯Ìpad, ûe API neodpovÌ
    On Error GoTo ApiError
    
    ' Odesl·nÌ synchronnÌho poûadavku (False = Ëek·me na odpovÏÔ)
    http.Open "GET", requestUrl, False
    http.sEnd
    
    ' API m· "rate limit" (omezenÌ poËtu dotaz˘).
    ' D·me kr·tkou pauzu (0.5 sekundy), abychom ho nep¯etÌûili.
    Application.Wait Now + TimeValue("00:00:00") + (Timer - Int(Timer) + 500) / 86400000

    ' Zpracov·nÌ odpovÏdi
    If http.status = 200 Then
        ' Vöe OK, vr·tÌme JSON text
        JikanV4Request = http.responseText
    Else
        ' Chyba na stranÏ API (nap¯. 404 Nenalezeno, 429 Rate limit)
        MsgBox "Chyba JIKAN API!" & vbCrLf & _
               "Status: " & http.status & " - " & http.statusText & vbCrLf & _
               "Endpoint: " & endpoint, vbCritical, "Chyba API"
        JikanV4Request = "" ' Vr·tÌme pr·zdn˝ string
    End If
    
    GoTo Cleanup

ApiError:
    ' Chyba spojenÌ (nap¯. nenÌ internet)
    MsgBox "Doölo k chybÏ p¯i p¯ipojov·nÌ k JIKAN API." & vbCrLf & _
           "Error: " & err.Description, vbCritical, "Chyba P¯ipojenÌ"
    JikanV4Request = ""

Cleanup:
    ' UvolnÏnÌ objektu z pamÏti
    Set http = Nothing
End Function

' Vloûit do stejnÈho modulu (nap¯. mod_API_Helpers)

' --- POZN¡MKA: ---
' Aby tento kÛd fungoval, musÌö mÌt povolenÈ "Microsoft ADO Stream"
' V editoru VBA jdi na Tools -> References... -> a zaökrtni "Microsoft ActiveX Data Objects 6.1 Library"
' (Pokud 6.1 nem·ö, vyber nejvyööÌ verzi, kterou tam m·ö, nap¯. 2.8)

'================================================================================
' FUNKCE: DownloadImage
' ⁄»EL:  St·hne soubor (obr·zek) z URL a uloûÌ ho do doËasnÈ sloûky.
' VRACÕ: Plnou cestu k doËasnÈmu souboru (nap¯. "C:\Users\...\temp_char_pic.jpg")
'================================================================================
Function DownloadImage(ByVal url As String) As String
    Dim http As Object
    Dim stream As Object
    Dim tempFilePath As String
    Dim fileExt As String
    
    ' ZjistÌme p¯Ìponu souboru z URL (kv˘li spr·vnÈmu uloûenÌ)
    On Error Resume Next
    fileExt = Right(url, Len(url) - InStrRev(url, "."))
    If fileExt = "" Or Len(fileExt) > 4 Then fileExt = "jpg" ' Pojistka
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Definujeme cestu k doËasnÈmu souboru
    tempFilePath = Environ("TEMP") & "\temp_char_pic." & fileExt
    
    Set http = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP.6.0")
    Set stream = CreateObject("ADODB.Stream")
    
    On Error GoTo DownloadError
    
    http.Open "GET", url, False
    http.sEnd
    
    If http.status = 200 Then
        ' Obr·zek nalezen, zpracujeme bin·rnÌ data
        With stream
            .Open
            .Type = 1 ' adTypeBinary
            .Write http.responseBody
            .SaveToFile tempFilePath, 2 ' adSaveCreateOverWrite
            .Close
        End With
        
        ' Vr·tÌme cestu k souboru
        DownloadImage = tempFilePath
        
    Else
        ' Obr·zek se nepoda¯ilo st·hnout
        MsgBox "Chyba p¯i stahov·nÌ obr·zku!" & vbCrLf & _
               "Status: " & http.status & " - " & http.statusText & vbCrLf & _
               "URL: " & url, vbCritical, "Chyba Stahov·nÌ"
        DownloadImage = ""
    End If
    
    GoTo Cleanup

DownloadError:
    MsgBox "Doölo k chybÏ p¯i stahov·nÌ obr·zku." & vbCrLf & _
           "Error: " & err.Description, vbCritical, "Chyba Stahov·nÌ"
    DownloadImage = ""

Cleanup:
    Set http = Nothing
    Set stream = Nothing
End Function

' Vloûit do modulu (nap¯. mod_API_Helpers)

'================================================================================
' FUNKCE: ParseAltText
' ⁄»EL:  Prohled· text (ve form·tu "KLIC1:HODNOTA1;KLIC2:HODNOTA2")
'         a vr·tÌ hodnotu pro zadan˝ klÌË.
'================================================================================
Function ParseAltText(ByVal altText As String, ByVal key As String) As String
    Dim pairs() As String
    Dim pair() As String
    Dim i As Long
    
    ' UjistÌme se, ûe klÌË m· za sebou dvojteËku
    If Right(key, 1) <> ":" Then key = key & ":"
    
    ' RozdÏlÌ text na jednotlivÈ p·ry (oddÏlovaË je st¯ednÌk)
    pairs = Split(altText, ";")
    
    On Error Resume Next ' Pro p¯Ìpad, ûe by form·t nebyl spr·vn˝
    For i = 0 To UBound(pairs)
        ' Hled·me n·ö klÌË (s dvojteËkou)
        If InStr(1, pairs(i), key, vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
            ' Naöli jsme klÌË, teÔ rozdÏlÌme p·r na klÌË a hodnotu
            pair = Split(pairs(i), ":")
            ' Vr·tÌme hodnotu (vöechno za prvnÌ dvojteËkou)
            ParseAltText = Trim(Replace(pairs(i), key, "", 1, 1))
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Pokud klÌË nebyl nalezen, vr·tÌ pr·zdn˝ string
    ParseAltText = ""
End Function

'================================================================================
' FUNKCE: URLEncode (Nov· verze bez ScriptControl)
' ⁄»EL:  ZakÛduje textov˝ ¯etÏzec pro bezpeËnÈ pouûitÌ v URL adrese.
'================================================================================
Public Function URLEncode(ByVal text As String) As String
    Dim i As Long
    Dim char As String
    Dim charCode As Integer
    Dim result As String
    
    On Error GoTo URLEncode_Error
    
    For i = 1 To Len(text)
        char = Mid(text, i, 1)
        ' ZÌsk·me ASCII hodnotu znaku
        charCode = Asc(char)
        
        Select Case charCode
            Case 48 To 57  ' 0-9
                result = result & char
            Case 65 To 90  ' A-Z
                result = result & char
            Case 97 To 122 ' a-z
                result = result & char
            Case 45, 46, 95, 126 ' Znaky - . _ ~ (tyto jsou bezpeËnÈ)
                result = result & char
            Case 32 ' Mezera
                result = result & "%20" ' Mezera se pro URL kÛduje jako %20
            Case Else
                ' Vöechny ostatnÌ nebezpeËnÈ znaky (% & / ? atd.)
                ' P¯evedeme jejich ASCII hodnotu na Hexa kÛd
                If charCode < 16 Then
                    result = result & "%0" & Application.WorksheetFunction.Dec2Hex(charCode)
                Else
                    result = result & "%" & Application.WorksheetFunction.Dec2Hex(charCode)
                End If
        End Select
    Next i
    
    URLEncode = result
    Exit Function
    
URLEncode_Error:
    ' Fallback pro p¯Ìpad chyby (nap¯. speci·lnÌ znaky mimo Ascii)
    URLEncode = text ' Vr·tÌme p˘vodnÌ text
    Debug.Print "Chyba v URLEncode: " & err.Description
End Function




--- KONEC K”DU [LIST_FAV_CHARS] ---

Modul: Graphs_FAV_OP_ED
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Graphs_FAV_OP_ED] ---
Option Explicit

' óóó N¡ZVY SLOUPEC V TABULCE "Table_FAV_OP_ED" óóó
Const COL_ANIME As String = "N·zev Anime"
Const COL_TYP As String = "Typ"
Const COL_SONG As String = "Song"
Const COL_AUTOR As String = "Autor"
Const COL_LYRICS As String = "HodnocenÌ textu"
Const COL_EMOCE As String = "Emoce"
Const COL_MELODIE As String = "Melodie"
Const COL_VIDEO As String = "Videoklip"
Const COL_HLAS As String = "Kvalita hlasu"
Const COL_FRISSON As String = "Frisson feeling"
Const COL_RATING_FINAL As String = "Fin·lnÌ hodnocenÌ"
Const COL_JAZYK As String = "Jazyk"
Const COL_SINGALONG As String = "Sing-along faktor"

' óóó N¡ZVY OBJEKTŸ óóó
Const TBL_OPED As String = "Table_FAV_OP_ED"
Const WS_OPED As String = "ANIME FAV OP + ED + OST"
Const WS_CHARTS As String = "ANIME FAV OP + ED + OST"
Const WS_AL As String = "ANIME LIST"
' Pozn·mka: Sloupec s n·zvy Anime v ANIME LIST (zde "C")
Const COL_AL_ANIME_LETTER As String = "C"

' óóó DEFINICE DATOV…HO TYPU (UDT) óóó
Public Type AnimeRow
    ID As Long
    Name As String
    typ As String
    Song As String
    Author As String
    RatingFinal As Double
    HasRating As Boolean
    Frisson As Boolean
    Language As String
    SingAlong As Double
    HasSingAlong As Boolean
    Lyrics As Double
    Emotion As Double
    Melody As Double
    Video As Double
    Voice As Double
    IsRadarValid As Boolean
End Type

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 1) Vytvo¯enÌ tlaËÌtka pro aktualizaci
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Public Sub VytvorTlacitkoOpEdGrafu()
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    Dim ws As Worksheet, btn As Shape, rng As Range
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WS_CHARTS)
    
    Set rng = ws.Range("G2")
    With rng
        .ColumnWidth = 14
        .RowHeight = 24.75
    End With
    
    On Error Resume Next
        ws.Shapes("btnAktualizaceOpEd").Delete
    On Error GoTo ErrBtn
    
    Set btn = ws.Shapes.AddShape(msoShapeRectangle, rng.left, rng.top, rng.Width, rng.Height)
    With btn
        .Name = "btnAktualizaceOpEd"
        .OnAction = "AktualizovatOpEdGrafy"
        .Fill.Solid: .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(71, 211, 89)
        With .line
            .Visible = msoTrue
            .ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            .weight = 1.5
        End With
        With .TextFrame2
            .VerticalAnchor = msoAnchorMiddle
            .HorizontalAnchor = msoAnchorCenter
            .WordWrap = False
            .TextRange.text = "Aktualizovat OP/ED Grafy"
            With .TextRange.Font
                .Name = "Aptos Narrow": .size = 11: .Bold = True
                .Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
        End With
        .Placement = xlMoveAndSize
    End With
    
    Exit Sub
ErrBtn:
    MsgBox "Chyba p¯i vytv·¯enÌ tlaËÌtka OP/ED graf˘: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 2) Wrapper ñ SpustÌ vöechna makra (CENTRALIZOVAN¡ DATA)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Public Sub AktualizovatOpEdGrafy()
    On Error GoTo ErrWrapper
    
    Dim wsData As Worksheet, wsCharts As Worksheet, wsAL As Worksheet
    Dim tbl As ListObject
    Dim arrData As Variant
    Dim dictMap As Object
    Dim dictSerieComments As Object
    Dim dataUDT() As AnimeRow
    Dim i As Long
    
    ' Optimalizace prost¯edÌ
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = False
        .Calculation = xlCalculationManual
        .EnableEvents = False
    End With
    
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WS_OPED)
    Set wsCharts = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WS_CHARTS)
    Set wsAL = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(WS_AL)
    Set tbl = wsData.ListObjects(TBL_OPED)
    
    ' 1. NaËtenÌ dat tabulky do pole
    If tbl.DataBodyRange Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Tabulka OP/ED je pr·zdn·.", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    ' OPTIMALIZACE F¡ZE 5: Value2 je rychlejöÌ (nekonvertuje typy jako Currency/Date)
    arrData = tbl.DataBodyRange.Value2
    
    ' 2. Mapov·nÌ sloupc˘ (N·zev -> Index)
    Set dictMap = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictMap.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    For i = 1 To tbl.ListColumns.count
        dictMap(tbl.ListColumns(i).Name) = i
    Next i
    
    ' 3. PARSING DAT (Pre-processing)
    dataUDT = ParseDataToUDT(arrData, dictMap)
    
    ' 4. NaËtenÌ koment·¯˘ pro SÈrie
    Set dictSerieComments = LoadSerieComments(wsAL)
    
    ' 5. Vol·nÌ graf˘ (pouûitÌ UDT)
    Call VytvorGrafHodnoceniBreakdown(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafRadarKategorii(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafTopAutori(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafFrissonVliv(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafTopSerie(dataUDT, wsCharts, dictSerieComments)
    Call VytvorGrafTopAutoriAvg(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafPrumerOpVsEd(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafJazykAnalyza(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafSingAlong(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    Call VytvorGrafHypeBubble(dataUDT, wsCharts)
    
CleanExit:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    ' MsgBox "Grafy OP/ED byly ˙spÏönÏ aktualizov·ny.", vbInformation
    Exit Sub
    
ErrWrapper:
    With Application
        .ScreenUpdating = True
        .Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
        .EnableEvents = True
    End With
    MsgBox "Kritick· chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

Private Function ParseDataToUDT(arr As Variant, map As Object) As AnimeRow()
    Dim rCount As Long, i As Long
    Dim res() As AnimeRow
    Dim idxAni As Long, idxTyp As Long, idxSong As Long, idxAut As Long
    Dim idxLyr As Long, idxEmo As Long, idxMel As Long, idxVid As Long, idxHlas As Long
    Dim idxFri As Long, idxRat As Long, idxJaz As Long, idxSing As Long
    
    rCount = UBound(arr, 1)
    ReDim res(1 To rCount)
    
    idxAni = map(COL_ANIME): idxTyp = map(COL_TYP): idxSong = map(COL_SONG)
    idxAut = map(COL_AUTOR): idxLyr = map(COL_LYRICS): idxEmo = map(COL_EMOCE)
    idxMel = map(COL_MELODIE): idxVid = map(COL_VIDEO): idxHlas = map(COL_HLAS)
    idxFri = map(COL_FRISSON): idxRat = map(COL_RATING_FINAL): idxJaz = map(COL_JAZYK)
    idxSing = map(COL_SINGALONG)
    
    Dim v As Variant
    
    For i = 1 To rCount
        ' OPTIMALIZACE F¡ZE 5: Inline Check mÌsto vol·nÌ Nz() (uöet¯Ì 30k+ vol·nÌ funkce)
        With res(i)
            .ID = i
            
            ' Name
            v = arr(i, idxAni)
            If IsError(v) Or IsEmpty(v) Then .Name = "" Else .Name = Trim(CStr(v))
            
            ' Typ
            v = arr(i, idxTyp)
            If IsError(v) Or IsEmpty(v) Then .typ = "" Else .typ = Trim(CStr(v))
            
            ' Song
            v = arr(i, idxSong)
            If IsError(v) Or IsEmpty(v) Then .Song = "" Else .Song = Trim(CStr(v))
            
            ' Author
            v = arr(i, idxAut)
            If IsError(v) Or IsEmpty(v) Then .Author = "" Else .Author = Trim(CStr(v))
            
            ' Language
            v = arr(i, idxJaz)
            If IsError(v) Or IsEmpty(v) Then .Language = "" Else .Language = Trim(CStr(v))
            
            ' Rating Final
            v = arr(i, idxRat)
            If IsNumeric(v) And Not IsEmpty(v) And Not IsError(v) Then
                .RatingFinal = CDbl(v)
                .HasRating = True
            Else
                .RatingFinal = 0
                .HasRating = False
            End If
            
            ' Frisson (Boolean)
            v = arr(i, idxFri)
            If IsError(v) Or IsEmpty(v) Then
                .Frisson = False
            Else
                .Frisson = (UCase(Trim(CStr(v))) = "ANO")
            End If
            
            ' SingAlong
            v = arr(i, idxSing)
            If IsNumeric(v) And Not IsEmpty(v) And Not IsError(v) Then
                .SingAlong = CDbl(v)
                .HasSingAlong = True
            Else
                .SingAlong = 0
                .HasSingAlong = False
            End If
            
            ' Radar Metrics (Lyrics, Emoce, Melodie, Video, Hlas)
            ' Logic: All must be valid numeric > 0
            v = arr(i, idxLyr)
            If IsNumeric(v) And Not IsEmpty(v) And Not IsError(v) Then .Lyrics = CDbl(v) Else .Lyrics = -1
            
            v = arr(i, idxEmo)
            If IsNumeric(v) And Not IsEmpty(v) And Not IsError(v) Then .Emotion = CDbl(v) Else .Emotion = -1
            
            v = arr(i, idxMel)
            If IsNumeric(v) And Not IsEmpty(v) And Not IsError(v) Then .Melody = CDbl(v) Else .Melody = -1
            
            v = arr(i, idxVid)
            If IsNumeric(v) And Not IsEmpty(v) And Not IsError(v) Then .Video = CDbl(v) Else .Video = -1
            
            v = arr(i, idxHlas)
            If IsNumeric(v) And Not IsEmpty(v) And Not IsError(v) Then .Voice = CDbl(v) Else .Voice = -1
            
            ' Radar Validity Check
            .IsRadarValid = (.Lyrics >= 0 And .Emotion >= 0 And .Melody >= 0 And .Video >= 0 And .Voice >= 0)
        End With
    Next i
    
    ParseDataToUDT = res
End Function

' Pomocn· funkce pro naËtenÌ koment·¯˘ sÈriÌ (pouze ty s koment·¯em)
Private Function LoadSerieComments(ws As Worksheet) As Object
    Dim dict As Object
    Dim rngComments As Range, cell As Range
    Dim lastRow As Long
    
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dict.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, COL_AL_ANIME_LETTER).End(xlUp).row
    On Error Resume Next
    Set rngComments = ws.Range(COL_AL_ANIME_LETTER & "2:" & COL_AL_ANIME_LETTER & lastRow).SpecialCells(xlCellTypeComments)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not rngComments Is Nothing Then
        For Each cell In rngComments
            ' Ukl·d·me: KlÌË = N·zev Anime, Hodnota = Text koment·¯e
            ' OPTIMALIZACE F¡ZE 6: Value2
            dict(Trim(cell.Value2)) = cell.Comment.text
        Next cell
    End If
    
    Set LoadSerieComments = dict
End Function

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 3) Graf 1: RozloûenÌ Fin·lnÌho hodnocenÌ
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 3) Graf 1: RozloûenÌ Fin·lnÌho hodnocenÌ (Array Optimized)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafHodnoceniBreakdown(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim cntTotal(1 To 10) As Long, cntOP(1 To 10) As Long, cntED(1 To 10) As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim rInt As Long
    Dim isNew As Boolean
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If data(i).HasRating And Len(data(i).typ) > 0 Then
            rInt = Int(data(i).RatingFinal)
            If rInt >= 1 And rInt <= 10 Then
                cntTotal(rInt) = cntTotal(rInt) + 1
                If data(i).typ = "OP" Then cntOP(rInt) = cntOP(rInt) + 1
                If data(i).typ = "ED" Then cntED(rInt) = cntED(rInt) + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' Osa X jen pro existujÌcÌ hodnoty
    Dim catList As Object: Set catList = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList")
    For i = 1 To 10
        If cntTotal(i) > 0 Then catList.Add i
    Next i
    If catList.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim cats() As String, vTot() As Long, vOP() As Long, vED() As Long
    Dim cnt As Long: cnt = catList.count
    ReDim cats(0 To cnt - 1): ReDim vTot(0 To cnt - 1)
    ReDim vOP(0 To cnt - 1): ReDim vED(0 To cnt - 1)
    
    Dim currIdx As Long
    For i = 0 To cnt - 1
        currIdx = catList(i)
        cats(i) = "HodnocenÌ " & currIdx
        vTot(i) = cntTotal(currIdx)
        vOP(i) = cntOP(currIdx)
        vED(i) = cntED(currIdx)
    Next i
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafHodnoceniOpEd")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(20, 50, 450, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafHodnoceniOpEd"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "RozloûenÌ hodnocenÌ (PoËet)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = True: .Legend.Position = xlLegendPositionBottom
            .Axes(xlValue).HasTitle = True: .Axes(xlValue).AxisTitle.text = "PoËet hodnocenÌ"
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    End If
    
    cht.ChartType = xlColumnClustered
    
    Dim srsOP As Series, srsED As Series, srsCelkem As Series
    Set srsCelkem = GetSeriesByName(cht, "PoËet (Celkem)")
    Set srsOP = GetSeriesByName(cht, "PoËet (OP)")
    Set srsED = GetSeriesByName(cht, "PoËet (ED)")
    
    Call ApplyDataWithLabelSave(srsCelkem, cats, vTot, isNew)
    Call ApplyDataWithLabelSave(srsOP, cats, vOP, isNew)
    Call ApplyDataWithLabelSave(srsED, cats, vED, isNew)
    
    On Error Resume Next
    srsOP.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = 10498160
    srsED.Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = 15773696
    
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Graf 1: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 4) Graf 3: Radar kategoriÌ (OPRAVENO)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 4) Graf 3: Radar kategoriÌ (OPRAVENO)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafRadarKategorii(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim sums(0 To 4) As Double, avgs(0 To 4) As Double
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, validRows As Long
    
    ' Indicies mapping for result arrays: 0=Lyrics, 1=Emotion, 2=Melody, 3=Video, 4=Voice
    
    validRows = 0
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If data(i).IsRadarValid Then
            validRows = validRows + 1
            sums(0) = sums(0) + data(i).Lyrics
            sums(1) = sums(1) + data(i).Emotion
            sums(2) = sums(2) + data(i).Melody
            sums(3) = sums(3) + data(i).Video
            sums(4) = sums(4) + data(i).Voice
        End If
    Next i
    
    If validRows = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim catsRaw As Variant: catsRaw = Array(COL_LYRICS, COL_EMOCE, COL_MELODIE, COL_VIDEO, COL_HLAS)
    Dim catsFmt(0 To 4) As String
    For j = 0 To 4
        avgs(j) = sums(j) / validRows
        catsFmt(j) = catsRaw(j) & ": " & Replace(Format(avgs(j), "0.0"), ".", ",") & "/10"
    Next j
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafRadarKategorii")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(20, 420, 450, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafRadarKategorii"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlRadarFilled
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ kategoriÌ (FH)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False
            .Axes(xlValue).MinimumScale = 0: .Axes(xlValue).MaximumScale = 10
        End With
    Else
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    End If
    
    ' óóó OPRAVA CHYBY óóó
    On Error Resume Next
    With cht.PlotArea
        .top = 10: .left = 10: .Width = cht.ChartArea.Width - 20: .Height = cht.ChartArea.Height - 20
    End With
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 1: cht.SeriesCollection(2).Delete: Loop
    
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .XValues = catsFmt
        .values = avgs
        .Name = "Pr˘mÏr"
    End With
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Graf Radar: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 5) Graf 4: Top auto¯i (Pie Chart)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 5) Graf 4: Top auto¯i (Pie Chart)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafTopAutori(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim dictAut As Object, dictChart As Object
    Dim i As Long
    Dim authors As Variant, auth As Variant
    Dim isNew As Boolean
    
    Set dictAut = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If Len(data(i).Author) > 0 Then
            authors = Split(data(i).Author, ";")
            For Each auth In authors
                auth = Trim(auth)
                If Len(auth) > 0 Then dictAut(auth) = dictAut(auth) + 1
            Next auth
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictAut.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Set dictChart = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim otherSum As Long: otherSum = 0
    Dim key As Variant
    
    For Each key In dictAut.keys
        If dictAut(key) < 3 Then
            otherSum = otherSum + dictAut(key)
        Else
            dictChart(key) = dictAut(key)
        End If
    Next key
    If otherSum > 0 Then dictChart("OstatnÌ auto¯i") = otherSum
    
    If dictChart.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim keysArr As Variant, valsArr As Variant
    Call SortDictionaryByValue(dictChart, keysArr, valsArr, False)
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafTopAutori")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(500, 420, 500, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafTopAutori"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlPie
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "ZastoupenÌ autor˘ (PoËet v˝skyt˘ >= 3)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        cht.ChartType = xlPie
    End If
    
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    Dim srs As Series: Set srs = cht.SeriesCollection(1)
    
    ' VloûenÌ dat
    Call ApplyDataWithLabelSave(srs, keysArr, valsArr, isNew)
    
    ' Aktualizace popisk˘ pro Pie Chart
    Dim total As Double: total = Application.Sum(valsArr)
    Dim lblTxt As String, pct As Double, ptIdx As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    For ptIdx = 1 To srs.Points.count
        pct = (valsArr(ptIdx - 1) / total) * 100
        lblTxt = keysArr(ptIdx - 1) & ": " & valsArr(ptIdx - 1) & " (" & Replace(Format(pct, "0.0"), ".", ",") & "%)"
        
        If srs.Points(ptIdx).DataLabel.text <> lblTxt Then
            srs.Points(ptIdx).DataLabel.text = lblTxt
        End If
        
        If isNew Then
            With srs.Points(ptIdx).DataLabel
                .Position = xlLabelPositionOutsideEnd
                .ShowCategoryName = False: .ShowValue = False: .ShowPercentage = False
                .Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .Font.size = 9: .Font.Bold = True
            End With
        End If
    Next ptIdx
    srs.HasLeaderLines = True
    
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Graf Auto¯i: " & err.Description
End Sub


'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 6) Graf 5: Vliv Frisson Feeling (POZOR: CÌl je WS_OPED)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 6) Graf 5: Vliv Frisson Feeling (Array Optimized)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafFrissonVliv(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim sumAno As Double, cntAno As Long
    Dim sumNe As Double, cntNe As Long
    Dim i As Long
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If data(i).HasRating Then
            If data(i).Frisson Then
                sumAno = sumAno + data(i).RatingFinal
                cntAno = cntAno + 1
            Else
                sumNe = sumNe + data(i).RatingFinal
                cntNe = cntNe + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    If cntAno = 0 And cntNe = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim catArr As Variant, cntArr() As Long, avgArr() As Variant
    Dim num As Long, idx As Long
    
    ' Dynamick· alokace podle toho co existuje
    If cntAno > 0 And cntNe > 0 Then
        catArr = Array("ANO", "NE")
        num = 2
    ElseIf cntAno > 0 Then
        catArr = Array("ANO")
        num = 1
    Else
        catArr = Array("NE")
        num = 1
    End If
    
    ReDim cntArr(1 To num, 1 To 1): ReDim avgArr(1 To num, 1 To 1)
    
    For i = 0 To num - 1
        If catArr(i) = "ANO" Then
            cntArr(i + 1, 1) = cntAno
            avgArr(i + 1, 1) = sumAno / cntAno
        Else
            cntArr(i + 1, 1) = cntNe
            avgArr(i + 1, 1) = sumNe / cntNe
        End If
    Next i
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, isNew As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafFrissonVliv")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(20, 100, 450, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafFrissonVliv"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Vliv 'Frisson Feeling' (PoËet vs. Pr˘mÏr)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = True: .Legend.Position = xlLegendPositionBottom
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    End If
    
    ' NastavenÌ sÈriÌ
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 2: cht.SeriesCollection(3).Delete: Loop
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count < 2: cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries: Loop
    
    ' 1. SÈrie (PoËet)
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .Name = "PoËet": .ChartType = xlColumnClustered: .AxisGroup = xlPrimary
        .XValues = catArr: .values = cntArr: .HasDataLabels = True
        
        Dim tot As Long: tot = 0
        For i = 1 To UBound(cntArr): tot = tot + cntArr(i, 1): Next i
        
        For i = 1 To .Points.count
            Dim pc As Double: pc = (cntArr(i, 1) / tot) * 100
            .Points(i).DataLabel.text = "# " & cntArr(i, 1) & vbLf & "(" & Replace(Format(pc, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " %)"
            If isNew Then .Points(i).DataLabel.Font.size = 9
        Next i
    End With
    
    ' 2. SÈrie (Pr˘mÏr)
    With cht.SeriesCollection(2)
        .Name = "Pr˘mÏr FH": .ChartType = xlLineMarkers: .AxisGroup = xlSecondary
        .XValues = catArr: .values = avgArr: .HasDataLabels = True
        If isNew Then
            .Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(237, 125, 49)
            .DataLabels.Position = xlLabelPositionAbove
            .DataLabels.Font.Bold = True
        End If
        '.DataLabels.NumberFormat = "0,00"
    End With
    
With cht
        ' VypnutÌ n·zv˘ (legendy) os
        .Axes(xlValue).HasTitle = False
        .Axes(xlValue, xlSecondary).HasTitle = False
        
        ' NastavenÌ mÏ¯Ìtka vedlejöÌ osy z˘st·v·
        .Axes(xlValue, xlSecondary).MinimumScale = 1
        .Axes(xlValue, xlSecondary).MaximumScale = 10
    End With
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Graf Frisson: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 7) Graf 6: Top 12 Anime SÈriÌ
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 7) Graf 6: Top 12 Anime SÈriÌ
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafTopSerie(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet, dictComm As Object)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim dictSum As Object, dictCnt As Object
    Dim dictAnimePerSerie As Object, dictOpCnt As Object, dictEdCnt As Object
    Dim i As Long
    Dim ani As String, serie As String, rate As Double
    Dim commentTxt As String
    
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictAnimePerSerie = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictOpCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictEdCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If data(i).HasRating Then
            rate = data(i).RatingFinal
            ani = data(i).Name
            
            ' ZÌsk·nÌ sÈrie z koment·¯˘
            serie = ani
            If dictComm.Exists(ani) Then
                commentTxt = dictComm(ani)
                If InStr(commentTxt, "N·zev sÈrie:") > 0 Then
                    serie = Trim(Split(commentTxt, "N·zev sÈrie:")(1))
                    If InStr(serie, vbLf) > 0 Then serie = left(serie, InStr(serie, vbLf) - 1)
                End If
            End If
            
            dictSum(serie) = dictSum(serie) + rate
            dictCnt(serie) = dictCnt(serie) + 1
            
            If Not dictAnimePerSerie.Exists(serie) Then Set dictAnimePerSerie(serie) = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
            dictAnimePerSerie(serie)(ani) = 1
            
            If data(i).typ = "OP" Then dictOpCnt(serie) = dictOpCnt(serie) + 1
            If data(i).typ = "ED" Then dictEdCnt(serie) = dictEdCnt(serie) + 1
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictCnt.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim dictAvg As Object: Set dictAvg = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim key As Variant
    For Each key In dictCnt.keys
        If dictCnt(key) > 0 And dictAnimePerSerie(key).count > 1 Then
            dictAvg(key) = dictSum(key) / dictCnt(key)
        End If
    Next key
    If dictAvg.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim kSort As Variant, vSort As Variant
    Call SortDictionaryByValue(dictAvg, kSort, vSort, False)
    
    Dim topN As Long: topN = UBound(kSort)
    If topN > 11 Then topN = 11 ' Top 12
    
    Dim kTop() As String, vTop() As Double
    ReDim kTop(0 To topN): ReDim vTop(0 To topN)
    
    Dim dilu As Long, opC As Long, edC As Long, lbl As String, dStr As String
    For i = 0 To topN
        serie = kSort(i)
        dilu = dictAnimePerSerie(serie).count
        opC = dictOpCnt(serie): edC = dictEdCnt(serie)
        
        Select Case dilu
            Case 1: dStr = "1 dÌl"
            Case 2, 3, 4: dStr = dilu & " dÌly"
            Case Else: dStr = dilu & " dÌl˘"
        End Select
        
        lbl = serie & vbLf & dStr
        If opC > 0 Then lbl = lbl & "; " & opC & " OP"
        If edC > 0 Then
            If opC > 0 Then lbl = lbl & ", " & edC & " ED" Else lbl = lbl & "; " & edC & " ED"
        End If
        
        kTop(i) = lbl
        vTop(i) = vSort(i)
    Next i
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, isNew As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafTopSerie")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(500, 790, 500, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafTopSerie"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Top " & (topN + 1) & " sÈriÌ (pr˘mÏrnÈ FH OP/ED)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = False
            .Axes(xlCategory).ReversePlotOrder = True
            .Axes(xlValue).MinimumScale = 0: .Axes(xlValue).MaximumScale = 10
            .Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Font.size = 9
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        cht.ChartTitle.text = "Top " & (topN + 1) & " sÈriÌ (pr˘mÏrnÈ FH OP/ED)"
    End If
    
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 1: cht.SeriesCollection(2).Delete: Loop
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    
    Call ApplyDataWithLabelSave(cht.SeriesCollection(1), kTop, vTop, isNew)
    
    ' KurzÌva pro n·zvy sÈriÌ (p¯ed vbLf)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim tick As Object, ln As Long
    For Each tick In cht.Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels
        ln = InStr(tick.text, vbLf)
        If ln > 0 Then
            tick.Characters(1, ln - 1).Font.Italic = True
            tick.Characters(ln, Len(tick.text)).Font.Italic = False
        Else
            tick.Font.Italic = True
        End If
    Next tick
    
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Graf Top SÈrie: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 8) Graf 7: Top 10 Autor˘ (Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 8) Graf 7: Top 10 Autor˘ (Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafTopAutoriAvg(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim dictSum As Object, dictCnt As Object, dictOp As Object, dictEd As Object
    Dim i As Long
    Dim authors As Variant, aut As Variant, rate As Double
    
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictOp = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictEd = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If Len(data(i).Author) > 0 And data(i).HasRating Then
            rate = data(i).RatingFinal
            authors = Split(data(i).Author, ";")
            For Each aut In authors
                aut = Trim(aut)
                If Len(aut) > 0 Then
                    dictSum(aut) = dictSum(aut) + rate
                    dictCnt(aut) = dictCnt(aut) + 1
                    If data(i).typ = "OP" Then dictOp(aut) = dictOp(aut) + 1
                    If data(i).typ = "ED" Then dictEd(aut) = dictEd(aut) + 1
                End If
            Next aut
        End If
    Next i
    
    Dim dictAvg As Object: Set dictAvg = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim k As Variant
    For Each k In dictCnt.keys
        If dictCnt(k) >= 2 Then dictAvg(k) = dictSum(k) / dictCnt(k)
    Next k
    If dictAvg.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim kS As Variant, vS As Variant
    Call SortDictionaryByValue(dictAvg, kS, vS, False)
    
    Dim topN As Long: topN = UBound(kS)
    If topN > 9 Then topN = 9 ' Top 10
    
    Dim kT() As String, vT() As Double
    ReDim kT(0 To topN): ReDim vT(0 To topN)
    
    Dim opC As Long, edC As Long, lbl As String
    For i = 0 To topN
        aut = kS(i)
        opC = dictOp(aut): edC = dictEd(aut)
        lbl = aut
        If opC > 0 And edC > 0 Then
            lbl = lbl & vbLf & "(" & opC & " OP, " & edC & " ED)"
        ElseIf opC > 0 Then
            lbl = lbl & vbLf & "(" & opC & " OP)"
        ElseIf edC > 0 Then
            lbl = lbl & vbLf & "(" & edC & " ED)"
        End If
        kT(i) = lbl
        vT(i) = vS(i)
    Next i
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, isNew As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafTopAutoriAvg")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(500, 1160, 500, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafTopAutoriAvg"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered
            .HasTitle = False
            .HasLegend = False
            .Axes(xlCategory).ReversePlotOrder = True
            .Axes(xlValue).MinimumScale = 0: .Axes(xlValue).MaximumScale = 10
            .Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels.Font.size = 9
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        cht.HasTitle = False
    End If
    
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 1: cht.SeriesCollection(2).Delete: Loop
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    
    Call ApplyDataWithLabelSave(cht.SeriesCollection(1), kT, vT, isNew)
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim tick As Object, ln As Long
    For Each tick In cht.Axes(xlCategory).TickLabels
        ln = InStr(tick.text, vbLf)
        If ln > 0 Then
            tick.Characters(1, ln - 1).Font.Italic = True
            tick.Characters(ln, Len(tick.text)).Font.Italic = False
        Else
            tick.Font.Italic = True
        End If
    Next tick
    
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Top Auto¯i Avg: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 9) Graf 8: Anal˝za Jazyka (V·ûen˝ pr˘mÏr)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 9) Graf 8: Anal˝za Jazyka (V·ûen˝ pr˘mÏr)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafJazykAnalyza(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim dictCnt As Object, dictSumW As Object, dictSumRateW As Object
    Dim i As Long
    Dim jStr As String, rate As Double
    Dim key As String, tempS As String, p1 As Long, p2 As Long, w As Double
    
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSumW = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSumRateW = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictCnt.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        jStr = data(i).Language
        If Len(jStr) > 0 And data(i).HasRating Then
            rate = data(i).RatingFinal
            
            If InStr(jStr, "(") = 0 Then
                ' Jednoduch˝ jazyk (3 znaky)
                If Len(jStr) = 3 Then
                    dictCnt(jStr) = dictCnt(jStr) + 1
                    dictSumW(jStr) = dictSumW(jStr) + 1
                    dictSumRateW(jStr) = dictSumRateW(jStr) + rate
                End If
            Else
                ' Sloûen˝ s %
                If InStr(jStr, "%") > 0 Then
                    tempS = jStr
                    Do While InStr(tempS, "(") > 0
                        p1 = InStr(tempS, "("): p2 = InStr(tempS, ")")
                        If p2 = 0 Then Exit Do
                        key = Trim(Mid(tempS, 1, p1 - 1))
                        If Len(key) = 3 Then
                            w = val(Mid(tempS, p1 + 1, p2 - p1 - 1)) / 100
                            If w > 0 Then
                                dictCnt(key) = dictCnt(key) + 1
                                dictSumW(key) = dictSumW(key) + w
                                dictSumRateW(key) = dictSumRateW(key) + (rate * w)
                            End If
                        End If
                        tempS = Trim(Mid(tempS, p2 + 1))
                    Loop
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictCnt.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' V˝poËet pr˘mÏru
    Dim dictAvg As Object: Set dictAvg = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim k As Variant
    For Each k In dictSumW.keys
        If dictSumW(k) > 0 Then dictAvg(k) = dictSumRateW(k) / dictSumW(k)
    Next k
    
    Dim kS As Variant, vS As Variant
    Call SortDictionaryByValue(dictCnt, kS, vS, False)
    
    Dim num As Long: num = UBound(kS) + 1
    Dim cA() As String, cCnt() As Long, cAvg() As Variant
    ReDim cA(0 To num - 1): ReDim cCnt(1 To num, 1 To 1): ReDim cAvg(1 To num, 1 To 1)
    
    For i = 0 To num - 1
        k = kS(i)
        cA(i) = k
        cCnt(i + 1, 1) = vS(i)
        cAvg(i + 1, 1) = dictAvg(k)
    Next i
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, isNew As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafJazykAnalyza")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(20, 790, 450, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafJazykAnalyza"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Anal˝za jazyka (poËet vs. v·ûen˝ pr˘mÏr)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = True: .Legend.Position = xlLegendPositionBottom
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    End If
    
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 2: cht.SeriesCollection(3).Delete: Loop
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count < 2: cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries: Loop
    
    ' SÈrie 1: PoËet
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .Name = "PoËet": .ChartType = xlColumnClustered: .AxisGroup = xlPrimary
        .XValues = cA: .values = cCnt: .HasDataLabels = True
        
        Dim tot As Long: tot = 0
        For i = 1 To UBound(cCnt): tot = tot + cCnt(i, 1): Next i
        
        For i = 1 To .Points.count
            Dim pc As Double: pc = (cCnt(i, 1) / tot) * 100
            .Points(i).DataLabel.text = "# " & cCnt(i, 1) & vbLf & "(" & Replace(Format(pc, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " %)"
            If isNew Then .Points(i).DataLabel.Font.size = 9
        Next i
    End With
    
    ' SÈrie 2: Pr˘mÏr
    With cht.SeriesCollection(2)
        .Name = "V·ûen˝ pr˘mÏr": .ChartType = xlLineMarkers: .AxisGroup = xlSecondary
        .XValues = cA: .values = cAvg: .HasDataLabels = True
        If isNew Then
            .DataLabels.Position = xlLabelPositionAbove
            .DataLabels.Font.Bold = True
            .Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(237, 125, 49)
        End If
        .DataLabels.NumberFormat = "0,00"
    End With
    
    cht.Axes(xlValue, xlSecondary).MaximumScale = 10
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Jazyk: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 11) Graf 10: Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ OP vs. ED
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 11) Graf 10: Pr˘mÏrnÈ hodnocenÌ OP vs. ED
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafPrumerOpVsEd(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim sumOP As Double, sumED As Double, cntOP As Long, cntED As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim typ As String, rate As Double
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If data(i).HasRating Then
            rate = data(i).RatingFinal
            typ = data(i).typ
            
            If typ = "OP" Then
                sumOP = sumOP + rate: cntOP = cntOP + 1
            ElseIf typ = "ED" Then
                sumED = sumED + rate: cntED = cntED + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    If cntOP = 0 And cntED = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim avgOP As Double, avgED As Double
    If cntOP > 0 Then avgOP = sumOP / cntOP
    If cntED > 0 Then avgED = sumED / cntED
    
    Dim cats(0 To 1) As String, vals(0 To 1) As Double
    If avgOP >= avgED Then
        cats(0) = "OP": cats(1) = "ED": vals(0) = avgOP: vals(1) = avgED
    Else
        cats(0) = "ED": cats(1) = "OP": vals(0) = avgED: vals(1) = avgOP
    End If
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, isNew As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafPrumerOpVsEd")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(500, 100, 350, 200)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafPrumerOpVsEd"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlBarClustered
            .HasTitle = False: .HasLegend = False
            .Axes(xlCategory).ReversePlotOrder = True
            .Axes(xlValue).MinimumScale = 0: .Axes(xlValue).MaximumScale = 10
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    End If
    
    cht.HasTitle = False
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 1: cht.SeriesCollection(2).Delete: Loop
    If cht.SeriesCollection.count = 0 Then cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
    
    Call ApplyDataWithLabelSave(cht.SeriesCollection(1), cats, vals, isNew)
    
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .Name = "Pr˘mÏr"
        .DataLabels.NumberFormat = "0,00"
        .DataLabels.Font.Bold = True
    End With
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba OP vs ED: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 12) Graf 11: Sing-along faktor
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 12) Graf 11: Sing-along faktor (Array Optimized)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafSingAlong(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    Dim sumSA(1 To 10) As Double
    Dim cntSA(1 To 10) As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim saIdx As Long
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If data(i).HasSingAlong And data(i).HasRating Then
            saIdx = Round(data(i).SingAlong, 0)
            If saIdx >= 1 And saIdx <= 10 Then
                sumSA(saIdx) = sumSA(saIdx) + data(i).RatingFinal
                cntSA(saIdx) = cntSA(saIdx) + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' Kontrola, zda m·me data
    Dim tot As Long: tot = 0
    For i = 1 To 10
        tot = tot + cntSA(i)
    Next i
    If tot = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim cA() As String, pA() As Long, aA() As Variant
    ReDim cA(0 To 9): ReDim pA(1 To 10, 1 To 1): ReDim aA(1 To 10, 1 To 1)
    
    Dim j As Long
    For j = 1 To 10
        cA(j - 1) = CStr(j)
        pA(j, 1) = cntSA(j)
        If cntSA(j) > 0 Then
            aA(j, 1) = sumSA(j) / cntSA(j)
        Else
            aA(j, 1) = CVErr(xlErrNA)
        End If
    Next j
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, isNew As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafSingAlong")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(20, 1160, 450, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafSingAlong"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht
            .ChartType = xlColumnClustered
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Vliv 'Sing-along' faktoru (PoËet vs. Pr˘mÏr FH)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
            .HasLegend = True: .Legend.Position = xlLegendPositionBottom
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
    End If
    
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 2: cht.SeriesCollection(3).Delete: Loop
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count < 2: cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries: Loop
    
    With cht.SeriesCollection(1)
        .Name = "PoËet": .ChartType = xlColumnClustered: .AxisGroup = xlPrimary
        ' Zachov·nÌ barvy
        Dim sColor As Long: sColor = RGB(255, 105, 180)
        If Not isNew Then On Error Resume Next: sColor = .Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB: On Error GoTo ErrH
        
        .XValues = cA: .values = pA: .HasDataLabels = True
        .Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = sColor
        
        For j = 1 To .Points.count
            Dim pc As Double: If tot > 0 Then pc = (pA(j, 1) / tot) * 100
            .Points(j).DataLabel.text = "# " & pA(j, 1) & vbLf & "(" & Replace(Format(pc, "0.0"), ".", ",") & " %)"
            If isNew Then .Points(j).DataLabel.Font.size = 9
        Next j
    End With
    
    With cht.SeriesCollection(2)
        .Name = "Pr˘mÏr FH": .ChartType = xlLineMarkers: .AxisGroup = xlSecondary
        .XValues = cA: .values = aA: .HasDataLabels = True
        If isNew Then
            .Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = 0
            .DataLabels.Position = xlLabelPositionAbove
            .DataLabels.Font.Bold = True
        End If
        .DataLabels.NumberFormat = "0,0"
    End With
    
    cht.Axes(xlValue, xlSecondary).MaximumScale = 10
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Sing Along: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 13) Graf 12: Bublinov˝ (Hype Quadrants) - One Point Per Series (Tooltip)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
' 13) Graf 12: Bublinov˝ (Hype Quadrants) - One Point Per Series (Tooltip)
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
Private Sub VytvorGrafHypeBubble(data() As AnimeRow, wsC As Worksheet)
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    Dim cnt As Long: cnt = UBound(data)
    Dim xArr() As Double, yArr() As Double, szArr() As Double, names() As String, isFri() As Boolean
    ReDim xArr(1 To cnt): ReDim yArr(1 To cnt): ReDim szArr(1 To cnt)
    ReDim names(1 To cnt): ReDim isFri(1 To cnt)
    
    Dim valid As Long: valid = 0
    Dim i As Long
    Dim sA As String, sS As String
    
    For i = LBound(data) To UBound(data)
        If data(i).IsRadarValid And data(i).HasRating Then
             If data(i).Video > 0 And data(i).Voice > 0 And data(i).Emotion > 0 And data(i).Lyrics > 0 Then
                valid = valid + 1
                xArr(valid) = (data(i).Video + data(i).Voice) / 2
                yArr(valid) = (data(i).Emotion + data(i).Lyrics) / 2
                szArr(valid) = data(i).RatingFinal ^ 4
                
                isFri(valid) = data(i).Frisson
                
                sA = data(i).Name
                sS = data(i).Song
