                If Len(sS) > 0 Then names(valid) = sA & " - " & sS Else names(valid) = sA
             End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    If valid = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim chtObj As ChartObject, cht As Chart, isNew As Boolean
    Dim xMin As Double, xMax As Double, yMin As Double, yMax As Double
    On Error Resume Next
    Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects("GrafHypeBubble")
    On Error GoTo ErrH
    
    If chtObj Is Nothing Then
        isNew = True
        Set chtObj = wsC.ChartObjects.Add(500, 100, 450, 350)
        chtObj.Name = "GrafHypeBubble"
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        cht.ChartType = xlBubble
        With cht
            .HasTitle = True: .ChartTitle.text = "Kvalita (tech vs. hloubka)"
            .ChartTitle.Font.Name = "Aptos Narrow": .ChartTitle.Font.size = 12: .ChartTitle.Font.Bold = True
        End With
    Else
        isNew = False
        Set cht = chtObj.Chart
        With cht.Axes(xlCategory): xMin = .MinimumScale: xMax = .MaximumScale: End With
        With cht.Axes(xlValue): yMin = .MinimumScale: yMax = .MaximumScale: End With
    End If
    
    ' Smaz·nÌ sÈriÌ (rebuild)
    Do While cht.SeriesCollection.count > 0: cht.SeriesCollection(1).Delete: Loop
    
    Dim k As Long, ser As Series
    For k = 1 To valid
        Set ser = cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        With ser
            .Name = names(k)
            .XValues = Array(xArr(k))
            .values = Array(yArr(k))
            .BubbleSizes = Array(szArr(k))
            
            If isFri(k) Then
                .Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(23, 169, 192)
                .Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(10, 80, 90)
            Else
                .Format.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(191, 135, 38)
                .Format.line.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(100, 70, 20)
            End If
            .Format.Fill.Transparency = 0
            .Format.line.weight = 0.5
        End With
    Next k
    
    cht.HasLegend = False
    With cht.Axes(xlValue)
        .HasTitle = True: .AxisTitle.text = "Hloubka (emoce + text)"
        If Not isNew Then .MinimumScale = yMin: .MaximumScale = yMax
    End With
    With cht.Axes(xlCategory)
        .HasTitle = True: .AxisTitle.text = "Technick· kvalita (video + hlas)"
        If Not isNew Then .MinimumScale = xMin: .MaximumScale = xMax
    End With
    Exit Sub
ErrH:
    MsgBox "Chyba Bubble: " & err.Description
End Sub

'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó
'     *** POMOCN… PROCEDURY ***
'óóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóóó

' (Funkce Nz byla odstranÏna v r·mci optimalizace F·ze 5/6 - nahrazeno inline logikou)

Private Function GetSeriesByName(cht As Chart, ByVal seriesName As String) As Series
    On Error Resume Next
    Set GetSeriesByName = cht.SeriesCollection(seriesName)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If GetSeriesByName Is Nothing Then
        Set GetSeriesByName = cht.SeriesCollection.NewSeries
        GetSeriesByName.Name = seriesName
    End If
End Function

Private Sub ApplyDataWithLabelSave(srs As Series, xVals As Variant, yVals As Variant, isNewChart As Boolean)
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' óóó PHASE 4: INTELLIGENT UPDATE CHECK óóó
    If Not isNewChart Then
        Dim curX As Variant, curY As Variant
        curX = srs.XValues
        curY = srs.values
        If ArraysMatch(curX, xVals) And ArraysMatch(curY, yVals) Then Exit Sub
    End If
    ' óóó END PHASE 4 óóó

    ' OPTIMALIZACE F¡ZE 5: ODSTRANÃNÕ ZBYTE»N…HO UKL¡D¡NÕ/OBNOVY FORM¡TU
    ' D¯Ìve zde byl cyklus, kter˝ ukl·dal form·t kaûdÈho bodu. To je pomalÈ a u dynamick˝ch dat (Top X)
    ' Ëasto chybnÈ, protoûe se mÏnÌ po¯adÌ. Excel si form·t drûÌ, pokud nemÏnÌme strukturu.
    ' Pokud je graf nov˝, nastavÌme v˝chozÌ form·t.

    ' 1. Data Update
    srs.XValues = xVals
    srs.values = yVals
    srs.HasDataLabels = True
    
    ' 2. Basic Formatting (Only if needed/new)
    If isNewChart Then
        Dim dl As DataLabel, i As Long
        For i = 1 To srs.Points.count
            Set dl = srs.Points(i).DataLabel
            With dl
                .Position = xlLabelPositionOutsideEnd
                .Font.size = 9: .Font.Bold = False: .Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            End With
        Next i
    End If
End Sub

' óóó HELPER: POROVN¡NÕ POLÕ (PHASE 4) óóó
Private Function ArraysMatch(arr1 As Variant, arr2 As Variant) As Boolean
    ' RychlÈ porovn·nÌ dvou polÌ. VracÌ True, pokud jsou shodn·.
    On Error GoTo NoMatch
    
    If IsEmpty(arr1) Or IsEmpty(arr2) Then GoTo NoMatch
    If Not IsArray(arr1) Or Not IsArray(arr2) Then GoTo CHECK_SCALAR
    
    Dim lb1 As Long, ub1 As Long, lb2 As Long, ub2 As Long
    lb1 = LBound(arr1): ub1 = UBound(arr1)
    lb2 = LBound(arr2): ub2 = UBound(arr2)
    
    ' Kontrola dimenzÌ (zjednoduöenÏ 1D)
    If (ub1 - lb1) <> (ub2 - lb2) Then GoTo NoMatch
    
    Dim i As Long, v1 As Variant, v2 As Variant
    For i = 0 To (ub1 - lb1)
        v1 = arr1(lb1 + i)
        v2 = arr2(lb2 + i)
        
        If VarType(v1) <> VarType(v2) Then
             ' Tolerance pro Double/Integer rozdÌly? ZkusÌme p¯ÌmÈ porovn·nÌ hodnot
             If IsNumeric(v1) And IsNumeric(v2) Then
                If Abs(CDbl(v1) - CDbl(v2)) > 0.000001 Then GoTo NoMatch
             Else
                If CStr(v1) <> CStr(v2) Then GoTo NoMatch
             End If
        Else
            If v1 <> v2 Then GoTo NoMatch
        End If
    Next i
    
    ArraysMatch = True
    Exit Function

CHECK_SCALAR:
    If arr1 = arr2 Then ArraysMatch = True: Exit Function
    
NoMatch:
    ArraysMatch = False
End Function

Private Sub SortDictionaryByValue(ByVal dict As Object, ByRef keysArr As Variant, ByRef valsArr As Variant, ByVal ascending As Boolean)
    If dict.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    keysArr = dict.keys
    valsArr = dict.items
    
    Call QuickSortLists(keysArr, valsArr, LBound(valsArr), UBound(valsArr), ascending)
End Sub

Private Sub QuickSortLists(ByRef kArr As Variant, ByRef vArr As Variant, ByVal inLow As Long, ByVal inHi As Long, ByVal ascending As Boolean)
    Dim pivot   As Variant
    Dim tmpSwap As Variant
    Dim tmpLow  As Long
    Dim tmpHi   As Long
    
    tmpLow = inLow
    tmpHi = inHi
    
    If inLow >= inHi Then Exit Sub
    
    pivot = vArr((inLow + inHi) \ 2)
    
    While (tmpLow <= tmpHi)
        If ascending Then
            While (vArr(tmpLow) < pivot And tmpLow < inHi)
                tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
            Wend
            While (pivot < vArr(tmpHi) And tmpHi > inLow)
                tmpHi = tmpHi - 1
            Wend
        Else
            While (vArr(tmpLow) > pivot And tmpLow < inHi)
                tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
            Wend
            While (pivot > vArr(tmpHi) And tmpHi > inLow)
                tmpHi = tmpHi - 1
            Wend
        End If
        
        If (tmpLow <= tmpHi) Then
            tmpSwap = vArr(tmpLow)
            vArr(tmpLow) = vArr(tmpHi)
            vArr(tmpHi) = tmpSwap
            
            tmpSwap = kArr(tmpLow)
            kArr(tmpLow) = kArr(tmpHi)
            kArr(tmpHi) = tmpSwap
            
            tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
            tmpHi = tmpHi - 1
        End If
    Wend
    
    If (inLow < tmpHi) Then QuickSortLists kArr, vArr, inLow, tmpHi, ascending
    If (tmpLow < inHi) Then QuickSortLists kArr, vArr, tmpLow, inHi, ascending
End Sub



--- KONEC K”DU [Graphs_FAV_OP_ED] ---

Modul: Export_ALL_VBA
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Export_ALL_VBA] ---
Sub ExportAllVBAtoWordAndTxtAndBas()
    Dim wdApp As Object
    Dim wdDoc As Object
    Dim vbComp As Object
    Dim sCode As String
    Dim sName As String
    Dim iLineCount As Long
    
    ' --- NOV… PROMÃNN… PRO UKL¡D¡NÕ A MAZ¡NÕ ---
    Dim sPath As String
    Dim sBasPath As String
    Dim sFileNameWord As String
    Dim sFileNameTxt As String
    Dim iFileNum As Integer
    Dim ext As String
    ' -------------------------------------------
    
    ' Konstanty pro Word
    Const wdFormatDocumentDefault = 16
    Const wdStyleHeading1 = -2
    Const wdPageBreak = 7
    
    ' --- NASTAVENÕ CESTY A N¡ZVU ---
    ' Cesta ke sloûce s lomÌtkem na konci (opraveno)
    sPath = "C:\Users\macou\Desktop\Anime list - experimenting\VBA modules in Anime Excel\"
    sBasPath = sPath & "VBA .bas files\"
    
    ' Kontrola, zda sloûka existuje (pro jistotu)
    If Dir(sPath, vbDirectory) = "" Then
        MsgBox "CÌlov· sloûka neexistuje!" & vbCrLf & sPath, vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' Vytvo¯enÌ podsloûky pro samostatnÈ exporty, pokud neexistuje
    If Dir(sBasPath, vbDirectory) = "" Then
        MkDir sBasPath
    End If
    
    ' --- MAZ¡NÕ STARðCH SOUBORŸ (Zrychleno wildcards) ---
    On Error Resume Next ' Ignorovat chyby u soubor˘, kterÈ jsou p¯ÌpadnÏ uzamËenÈ
    Kill sPath & "*_Current VBA Modules.docx"
    Kill sPath & "*_Current VBA Modules.txt"
    Kill sBasPath & "*.*"
    On Error GoTo 0
    ' ------------------------------

    ' --- PÿÕPRAVA TXT SOUBORU ---
    sFileNameTxt = Format(Now, "dd.mm.yyyy, hh,mm") & "_Current VBA Modules.txt"
    iFileNum = FreeFile
    Open sPath & sFileNameTxt For Output As #iFileNum
    Print #iFileNum, "Dokumentace VBA kÛdu - Anime Excel"
    Print #iFileNum, "Vygenerov·no: " & Format(Now, "dd.mm.yyyy, hh:mm")
    Print #iFileNum, ""

    ' --- PÿÕPRAVA MS WORD ---
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wdApp = GetObject(, "Word.Application")
    If err.Number <> 0 Then
        Set wdApp = CreateObject("Word.Application")
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    wdApp.Visible = True
    wdApp.ScreenUpdating = False ' VypnutÌ p¯ekreslov·nÌ = z·sadnÌ urychlenÌ makra pro Word
    
    Set wdDoc = wdApp.Documents.Add
    
    ' ⁄vodnÌ nadpis Word
    With wdApp.Selection
        .Style = wdStyleHeading1
        .TypeText text:="Dokumentace VBA kÛdu - Anime Excel"
        .TypeParagraph
        .Style = -1
        .TypeText text:="Vygenerov·no: " & Format(Now, "dd.mm.yyyy, hh:mm")
        .TypeParagraph
        .TypeParagraph
    End With

    ' --- SMY»KA PÿES MODULY ---
    For Each vbComp In ThisWorkbook.VBProject.VBComponents
        iLineCount = vbComp.CodeModule.CountOfLines
        If iLineCount > 0 Then
            sName = vbComp.Name
            sCode = vbComp.CodeModule.lines(1, iLineCount)
            
            ' Exportuj pouze pokud obsahuje nÏjakÈ funkce (case-insensitive = robustnÏjöÌ)
            If Len(Trim(sCode)) > 0 And _
               (InStr(1, sCode, "Sub ", vbTextCompare) > 0 Or _
                InStr(1, sCode, "Function ", vbTextCompare) > 0 Or _
                InStr(1, sCode, "Property ", vbTextCompare) > 0) Then
                
                ' 1) Export do samostatnÈho souboru
                Select Case vbComp.Type
                    Case 1 ' vbext_ct_StdModule
                        ext = ".bas"
                    Case 2 ' vbext_ct_ClassModule
                        ext = ".cls"
                    Case 3 ' vbext_ct_MSForm
                        ext = ".frm"
                    Case 100 ' vbext_ct_Document (List/ThisWorkbook)
                        ext = ".cls"
                    Case Else
                        ext = ".bas"
                End Select
                
                On Error Resume Next
                vbComp.Export sBasPath & sName & ext
                On Error GoTo 0
                
                ' 2) Z·pis do Wordu
                With wdApp.Selection
                    .Style = wdStyleHeading1
                    .TypeText text:="Modul: " & sName
                    .TypeParagraph
                    .Style = -1
                    .Font.Bold = True
                    .Font.Color = 0
                    .TypeText text:="--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [" & sName & "] ---"
                    .TypeParagraph
                    .Font.Bold = False
                    .Font.Name = "Consolas"
                    .Font.size = 9
                    .TypeText text:=sCode
                    .TypeParagraph
                    .Font.Name = "Calibri"
                    .Font.size = 11
                    .Font.Bold = True
                    .TypeText text:="--- KONEC K”DU [" & sName & "] ---"
                    .TypeParagraph
                    .InsertBreak Type:=wdPageBreak
                End With
                
                ' 3) Z·pis do TXT
                Print #iFileNum, "Modul: " & sName
                Print #iFileNum, "--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [" & sName & "] ---"
                Print #iFileNum, sCode
                Print #iFileNum, "--- KONEC K”DU [" & sName & "] ---"
                Print #iFileNum, ""
            End If
        End If
    Next vbComp
    
    ' Zav¯Ìt zapsan˝ TXT dokument
    Close #iFileNum
    
    ' N·vrat na zaË·tek dokumentu Word a obnova p¯ekreslov·nÌ
    wdApp.Selection.HomeKey Unit:=6
    wdApp.ScreenUpdating = True
    
    ' --- ULOéENÕ SOUBORU Wordu ---
    sFileNameWord = Format(Now, "dd.mm.yyyy, hh,mm") & "_Current VBA Modules.docx"
    wdDoc.SaveAs2 fileName:=sPath & sFileNameWord, FileFormat:=wdFormatDocumentDefault
    
    ' InformaËnÌ okno o ˙spÏchu
    'MsgBox "Hotovo! Uloûeno jako:" & vbCrLf & _
           "- Word: " & sFileNameWord & vbCrLf & _
           "- TXT: " & sFileNameTxt & vbCrLf & _
           "- SamostatnÈ zdrojovÈ soubory p¯evedeny do sloûky 'VBA .bas files'", vbInformation, "Export DokonËen"
    
    ' ⁄klid z pamÏti
    Set wdDoc = Nothing
    Set wdApp = Nothing
    Set vbComp = Nothing
End Sub


--- KONEC K”DU [Export_ALL_VBA] ---

Modul: Export_Technical_Parameters
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Export_Technical_Parameters] ---
Sub GenerateTechnicalSheetReport()
    ' ==========================================
    ' TECHNICKð REPORT - OBJEKTY A MAKRA (PLNð TEXT)
    ' Autor: Gemini (Upraveno: Bez limitu znak˘)
    ' ==========================================
    
    Dim wdApp As Object
    Dim wdDoc As Object
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim sPath As String, sFileName As String
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim tbl As ListObject
    Dim pt As PivotTable
    Dim wdTable As Object
    Dim r As Long
    Dim macroName As String
    Dim objType As String
    Dim fullText As String
    
    ' Konstanty Word
    Const wdFormatDocumentDefault = 16
    Const wdStyleHeading1 = -2
    Const wdStyleHeading3 = -4
    Const wdPageBreak = 7
    Const wdAutoFitWindow = 2
    
    ' 1. NastavenÌ cesty
    sPath = "C:\Users\macou\Desktop\Anime list - experimenting\"
    If Dir(sPath, vbDirectory) = "" Then Exit Sub
    
    ' 2. Start Wordu
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wdApp = GetObject(, "Word.Application")
    If err.Number <> 0 Then Set wdApp = CreateObject("Word.Application")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    wdApp.Visible = True
    Set wdDoc = wdApp.Documents.Add
    
    ' ⁄vod
    With wdApp.Selection
        .Style = wdStyleHeading1
        .TypeText text:="Technick˝ Blueprint - Objekty a Funkce (Full Data)"
        .TypeParagraph
        .TypeText text:="Generov·no: " & Format(Now, "dd.mm.yyyy hh:mm")
        .TypeParagraph
        .TypeParagraph
    End With
    
    ' 3. SmyËka p¯es listy
    For Each ws In ThisWorkbook.Worksheets
        
        With wdApp.Selection
            ' --- Nadpis Listu ---
            .Style = wdStyleHeading1
            .TypeText text:="List: " & ws.Name & " (" & ws.CodeName & ")"
            .TypeParagraph
            
            ' --- A) ANALðZA OBJEKTŸ ---
            If ws.Shapes.count > 0 Then
                .Style = wdStyleHeading3
                .TypeText text:="Objekty (" & ws.Shapes.count & ")"
                .TypeParagraph
                
                ' Tabulka
                Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(.Range, ws.Shapes.count + 1, 5)
                wdTable.Borders.Enable = True
                wdTable.Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
                wdTable.Rows(1).Shading.BackgroundPatternColor = 14737632
                
                ' HlaviËky
                wdTable.cell(1, 1).Range.text = "N·zev Objektu"
                wdTable.cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Typ"
                wdTable.cell(1, 3).Range.text = "Makro"
                wdTable.cell(1, 4).Range.text = "Pozice"
                wdTable.cell(1, 5).Range.text = "Data (Alt Text / Obsah)"
                
                r = 2
                For Each shp In ws.Shapes
                    ' Typ
                    Select Case shp.Type
                        Case 1: objType = "AutoShape"
                        Case 3: objType = "Graf"
                        Case 4: objType = "Koment·¯" ' msoComment
                        Case 8: objType = "TlaËÌtko"
                        Case 12: objType = "ActiveX"
                        Case 13: objType = "Obr·zek"
                        Case 17: objType = "TextBox"
                        Case Else: objType = "JinÈ (" & shp.Type & ")"
                    End Select
                    
                    ' Makro
                    macroName = ""
                    On Error Resume Next
                    macroName = shp.OnAction
                    On Error GoTo 0
                    
                    ' --- ZÕSK¡NÕ DAT (Tady byla zmÏna) ---
                    fullText = ""
                    
                    ' 1. Priorita: AlternativnÌ text (metadata)
                    fullText = shp.AlternativeText
                    
                    ' --- VYLEPäENÕ PRO GRAFY ---
' Pokud je to graf, zkusÌme zÌskat jeho n·zev (ChartTitle)
If shp.Type = 3 Then ' 3 = msoChart
    On Error Resume Next
    If shp.HasChart Then
         If shp.Chart.HasTitle Then fullText = shp.Chart.ChartTitle.text
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
End If
' ---------------------------
                    
                    ' 2. Priorita: Pokud je AltText pr·zdn˝, zkusÌme viditeln˝ text
                    If Trim(fullText) = "" Then
                        On Error Resume Next
                        ' ZkusÌme p¯eËÌst text z r·meËku (funguje pro TextBoxy a TlaËÌtka)
                        fullText = shp.TextFrame.Characters.text
                        ' ZkusÌme p¯eËÌst text z ActiveX
                        If fullText = "" Then fullText = shp.OLEFormat.Object.Caption
                        On Error GoTo 0
                    End If
                    
                    ' Pojistka proti p·du Wordu u extrÈmnÏ dlouh˝ch text˘ (nap¯. Base64 obr·zky)
                    If Len(fullText) > 2000 Then
                        fullText = left(fullText, 2000) & " ... [TEXT PÿÕLIä DLOUHð - OÿÕZNUTO]"
                    End If
                    
                    ' Z·pis
                    wdTable.cell(r, 1).Range.text = shp.Name
                    wdTable.cell(r, 2).Range.text = objType
                    wdTable.cell(r, 3).Range.text = macroName
                    ' --- BEZPE»N… ZÕSK¡NÕ POZICE ---
                    Dim objPos As String
                    objPos = "N/A" ' V˝chozÌ hodnota pro p¯Ìpad chyby
                    
                    On Error Resume Next ' DoËasnÏ ignorovat chyby
                    objPos = shp.TopLeftCell.Address(False, False)
                    On Error GoTo 0 ' Vr·tit hl·öenÌ chyb zpÏt
                    
                    wdTable.cell(r, 4).Range.text = objPos
                    ' -------------------------------
                    wdTable.cell(r, 5).Range.text = fullText ' Zde je nynÌ kompletnÌ text
                    
                    r = r + 1
                Next shp
                
                wdTable.AutoFitBehavior wdAutoFitWindow
                .EndKey Unit:=6
                .TypeParagraph
            End If
            
            ' --- B) ANALðZA TABULEK ---
            If ws.ListObjects.count > 0 Then
                .Style = wdStyleHeading3
                .TypeText text:="Tabulky (ListObjects)"
                .TypeParagraph
                Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(.Range, ws.ListObjects.count + 1, 3)
                wdTable.Borders.Enable = True
                wdTable.Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
                wdTable.cell(1, 1).Range.text = "N·zev"
                wdTable.cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Rozsah"
                wdTable.cell(1, 3).Range.text = "Zdroj"
                r = 2
                For Each tbl In ws.ListObjects
                    wdTable.cell(r, 1).Range.text = tbl.Name
                    wdTable.cell(r, 2).Range.text = tbl.Range.Address
                    wdTable.cell(r, 3).Range.text = tbl.SourceType
                    r = r + 1
                Next tbl
                wdTable.AutoFitBehavior wdAutoFitWindow
                .EndKey Unit:=6
                .TypeParagraph
            End If
            
            ' --- C) ANALðZA KONTINGEN»NÕCH TABULEK (PIVOT TABLES) ---
        If ws.PivotTables.count > 0 Then
            .Style = wdStyleHeading3
            .TypeText text:="KontingenËnÌ tabulky (PivotTables)"
            .TypeParagraph

            Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(.Range, ws.PivotTables.count + 1, 3)
            wdTable.Borders.Enable = True
            wdTable.Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
            wdTable.Rows(1).Shading.BackgroundPatternColor = 15132390 ' JemnÏ öed·

            wdTable.cell(1, 1).Range.text = "N·zev Pivotu"
            wdTable.cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Rozsah dat (Source)"
            wdTable.cell(1, 3).Range.text = "UmÌstÏnÌ"

            r = 2
            For Each pt In ws.PivotTables
                wdTable.cell(r, 1).Range.text = pt.Name

                ' ZÌsk·nÌ zdroje dat (m˘ûe b˝t text nebo odkaz)
                On Error Resume Next
                wdTable.cell(r, 2).Range.text = pt.sourceData
                If err.Number <> 0 Then wdTable.cell(r, 2).Range.text = "[ExternÌ/SloûitÈ]"
                On Error GoTo 0

                wdTable.cell(r, 3).Range.text = pt.TableRange1.Address
                r = r + 1
            Next pt

            wdTable.AutoFitBehavior 2 ' wdAutoFitWindow
            .EndKey Unit:=6
            .TypeParagraph
        End If
            
            .InsertBreak Type:=wdPageBreak
        End With
    Next ws
    
    ' UloûenÌ
    sFileName = Format(Now, "dd.mm.yyyy, hh,mm") & "_TechBlueprints_FULL.docx"
    On Error Resume Next
    If Dir(sPath & sFileName) <> "" Then Kill sPath & sFileName
    On Error GoTo 0
    wdDoc.SaveAs2 fileName:=sPath & sFileName
    
    MsgBox "Hotovo! Full Blueprint uloûen: " & sFileName, vbInformation
    
    Set wdDoc = Nothing
    Set wdApp = Nothing
End Sub
--- KONEC K”DU [Export_Technical_Parameters] ---

Modul: Thumbnail_Comment_Rename
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Thumbnail_Comment_Rename] ---
Option Explicit

' ======================================================================================
' HLAVNÕ SPOUäTÃCÕ MAKRO
' ======================================================================================
Sub SpustitVsechnaPrejmenovani()
    Call RenameImagesByColumnC
    Call RenameCommentsByColumns
End Sub

' ======================================================================================
' 1. PÿEJMENOV¡NÕ OBR¡ZKŸ
' ======================================================================================
Sub RenameImagesByColumnC()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim shp As Shape
    Dim animeName As String
    Dim cleanName As String
    Dim rowNum As Long
    Dim countRenamed As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If ws Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    countRenamed = 0
    
    For Each shp In ws.Shapes
        If shp.Type = 13 Or shp.Type = 11 Then ' msoPicture nebo msoLinkedPicture
            If shp.TopLeftCell.Column = 2 Then ' Sloupec B
                rowNum = shp.TopLeftCell.row
                animeName = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(rowNum, 3).Value))
                
                If Len(animeName) > 0 Then
                    ' Pouûijeme ËistÌcÌ funkci
                    cleanName = CleanNameForShape(animeName)
                    
                    On Error Resume Next
                    shp.Name = cleanName
                    If err.Number = 0 Then countRenamed = countRenamed + 1
                    On Error GoTo 0
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next shp
    
    MsgBox "Obr·zky p¯ejmenov·ny: " & countRenamed, vbInformation
End Sub

' ======================================================================================
' 2. PÿEJMENOV¡NÕ KOMENT¡ÿŸ (Tvoje p˘vodnÌ logika + ËiötÏnÌ znak˘)
' ======================================================================================
Sub RenameCommentsByColumns()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim animeName As String
    Dim cleanName As String
    Dim countRenamed As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If ws Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    countRenamed = 0
    
    Debug.Print "--- ZA»¡TEK PÿEJMENOV¡NÕ (UNIK¡TNÕ N¡ZVY) ---"
    
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        animeName = Trim(CStr(ws.Cells(i, "C").Value))
        
        If Len(animeName) > 0 Then
            cleanName = CleanNameForShape(animeName)
            If Len(cleanName) > 30 Then cleanName = left(cleanName, 30)
            
            ' PÿID¡V¡ME »ÕSLO ÿ¡DKU PRO UNIK¡TNOST (_i)
            
            ' 1) Sloupec G
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "G"), cleanName & "_Tags_" & i)
            
            ' 2) Sloupec I
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "I"), cleanName & "_EpHist_" & i)
            
            ' 3) Sloupec K
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "K"), cleanName & "_Review_" & i)
            
            ' 4) Sloupec N
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "N"), cleanName & "_Rewatch_" & i)
            
            ' 5) Sloupec Q
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "Q"), cleanName & "_Status_" & i)
            
            ' 6) Sloupec P
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "P"), cleanName & "_Dub_" & i)
            
            ' 7) Sloupec C
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "C"), cleanName & "_Name_" & i)
            
            ' 8) Sloupec L a M
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "L"), cleanName & "_Date_" & i)
            Call RenameCommentInCell(ws.Cells(i, "M"), cleanName & "_Date_" & i)
            
            countRenamed = countRenamed + 1
        End If
    Next i
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Hotovo! Koment·¯e majÌ nynÌ unik·tnÌ n·zvy.", vbInformation
End Sub

Private Sub RenameCommentInCell(targetCell As Range, newName As String)
    On Error Resume Next
    If Not targetCell.Comment Is Nothing Then
        ' ZkusÌme nastavit n·zev
        targetCell.Comment.Shape.Name = newName
        
        ' Kontrola, jestli se to povedlo (pro ladÏnÌ)
        If err.Number <> 0 Then
            Debug.Print "CHYBA na ¯·dku " & targetCell.row & " (" & targetCell.Address & "): Nelze p¯ejmenovat na '" & newName & "'"
            err.Clear
        End If
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

Private Function CleanNameForShape(ByVal rawName As String) As String
    Dim tempName As String
    Dim i As Integer
    Dim validChars As String
    Dim char As String
    
    ' PovolÌme jen pÌsmena, ËÌsla a podtrûÌtko. Vöe ostatnÌ vyhodÌme.
    ' To je nejbezpeËnÏjöÌ metoda.
    validChars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789_"
    tempName = ""
    
    For i = 1 To Len(rawName)
        char = Mid(rawName, i, 1)
        ' NahradÌme mezeru podtrûÌtkem
        If char = " " Then
            tempName = tempName & "_"
        ' Pokud je znak v povolenÈm seznamu, p¯id·me ho
        ElseIf InStr(validChars, char) > 0 Then
            tempName = tempName & char
        ' Jinak nahradÌme podtrûÌtkem (pro jistotu, aby se neslepila slova)
        Else
            tempName = tempName & "_"
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' OdstranÌme zdvojen· podtrûÌtka
    Do While InStr(tempName, "__") > 0
        tempName = Replace(tempName, "__", "_")
    Loop
    
    ' OdstranÌme podtrûÌtka na zaË·tku a konci
    If left(tempName, 1) = "_" Then tempName = Mid(tempName, 2)
    If Right(tempName, 1) = "_" Then tempName = left(tempName, Len(tempName) - 1)
    
    CleanNameForShape = tempName
End Function
--- KONEC K”DU [Thumbnail_Comment_Rename] ---

Modul: Export_List_MAL
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Export_List_MAL] ---
Option Explicit

' Glob·lnÌ promÏnn· pro Cache (SlovnÌk: ID -> SkÛre)
Dim scoreCache As Object

Sub ExportToMALXML()
    ' ==============================================================================
    ' FIN¡LNÕ VERZE: CACHE V LISTU "MAL Cache + Interactive Rating" (AS:AT)
    '
    ' LOGIKA UPDATE:
    ' 1. WATCHING: Vûdy 1 (aby se propisovaly novÈ epizody).
    ' 2. PTW:
    '    - Pokud je v Cache -> 0 (nemÏnit historii).
    '    - Pokud nenÌ v Cache (novÈ) -> 1 (p¯idat).
    ' 3. COMPLETED:
    '    - Pokud se zmÏnilo skÛre oproti Cache -> 1.
    '    - Pokud je anime pr·vÏ dokonËeno (dnes) -> 1.
    '    - Jinak -> 0 (chr·nÌ historii).
    ' ==============================================================================
    
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim xmlStr As String
    Dim i As Long, lastRow As Long
    Dim animeCount As Integer
    animeCount = 0
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual ' Vypne p¯epoËÌt·v·nÌ vzorc˘
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    
    ' 1. NaËtenÌ pamÏti z listu "MAL Cache + Interactive Rating" (sloupce AS:AT)
    LoadScoreCache
    
    ' Pomocn˝ slovnÌk pro uloûenÌ NOV…HO stavu pamÏti (kter˝ se na konci uloûÌ)
    Dim newScoreCache As Object
    Set newScoreCache = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro XML a logiku
    Dim animeTitle As String, animeID As String
    Dim myScore As String, myStatus As String
    Dim dateStart As String, dateFinish As String
    Dim episodesWatched As String, rewatchCount As String
    Dim rawScore As Variant, linkText As String
    Dim myTags As String
    Dim updateFlag As String
    Dim scoreChanged As Boolean
    Dim isInCache As Boolean
    
    ' HLAVI»KA XML
    xmlStr = "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""UTF-8""?>" & vbCrLf
    xmlStr = xmlStr & "<myanimelist>" & vbCrLf
    xmlStr = xmlStr & "  <myinfo>" & vbCrLf
    xmlStr = xmlStr & "    <user_id>000000</user_id>" & vbCrLf
    xmlStr = xmlStr & "    <user_name>ExportUser</user_name>" & vbCrLf
    xmlStr = xmlStr & "    <user_export_type>1</user_export_type>" & vbCrLf
    xmlStr = xmlStr & "  </myinfo>" & vbCrLf

    ' ==============================================================================
    ' F¡ZE 1: PTW LIST ("ANIME PLAN TO WATCH + FUTURES")
    ' ==============================================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = Nothing
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME PLAN TO WATCH + FUTURES")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not ws Is Nothing Then
        lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "G").End(xlUp).row
        Dim foundIDs As Collection, singleID As Variant
        Dim searchName As String, cleanName As String, skipItem As Boolean
        
        If lastRow >= 2 Then
            Debug.Print "--- PTW EXPORT ---"
            For i = 2 To lastRow
                searchName = ws.Range("G" & i).Value
                cleanName = CleanSearchName(searchName)
                
                skipItem = False
                If Len(cleanName) <= 1 Or cleanName = "N·zev" Or cleanName = "InterestStacks" Then skipItem = True
                If InStr(1, cleanName, "Anime, co vypadajÌ", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then skipItem = True
                If InStr(1, cleanName, "Short Completed Anime", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then skipItem = True
                
                If skipItem = False Then
                    Application.StatusBar = "PTW Export (" & i & "/" & lastRow & "): " & cleanName
                    Set foundIDs = GetMALIDsFromAniList(cleanName)
                    
                    If foundIDs.count > 0 Then
                        For Each singleID In foundIDs
                            animeID = CStr(singleID)
                            animeCount = animeCount + 1
                            
                            ' UloûenÌ do novÈ cache (PTW m· vûdy skÛre "0")
                            If Not newScoreCache.Exists(animeID) Then newScoreCache.Add animeID, "0"
                            
                            ' === SMART LOGIKA PRO PTW ===
                            ' Pokud uû ID zn·me z minula, neaktualizujeme (update=0).
                            ' Pokud je novÈ, aktualizujeme (update=1).
                            If scoreCache.Exists(animeID) Then
                                updateFlag = "0"
                            Else
                                updateFlag = "1"
                            End If
                            
                            xmlStr = xmlStr & GenerateAnimeNode(animeID, "API_IMPORT_" & CleanXML(cleanName), "0", "0000-00-00", "0000-00-00", "0", "Plan to Watch", "0", "Plan to Watch", updateFlag)
                            DoEvents
                        Next singleID
                    End If
                End If
            Next i
        End If
    End If

    ' ==============================================================================
    ' F¡ZE 2: HLAVNÕ LIST ("ANIME LIST")
    ' ==============================================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not ws Is Nothing Then
        lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
        If lastRow >= 2 Then
            ' --- ÿAZENÕ (Bubble Sort) ---
            Dim sortArr() As Variant
            Dim count As Long, rawDate As Variant
            ReDim sortArr(1 To (lastRow - 1), 1 To 2)
            count = 1
            For i = 2 To lastRow
                sortArr(count, 1) = i
                rawDate = ws.Range("M" & i).Value
                If IsDate(rawDate) Then sortArr(count, 2) = CDbl(CDate(rawDate)) Else sortArr(count, 2) = 99999999999#
                count = count + 1
            Next i
            
            Dim X As Long, Y As Long, tempRow As Long, tempVal As Double
            For X = 1 To UBound(sortArr) - 1
                For Y = X + 1 To UBound(sortArr)
                    If sortArr(X, 2) > sortArr(Y, 2) Then
                        tempRow = sortArr(X, 1): tempVal = sortArr(X, 2)
                        sortArr(X, 1) = sortArr(Y, 1): sortArr(X, 2) = sortArr(Y, 2)
                        sortArr(Y, 1) = tempRow: sortArr(Y, 2) = tempVal
                    End If
                Next Y
            Next X
            ' -------------------------------------
            
            Dim k As Long, realRow As Long
            For k = 1 To UBound(sortArr)
                realRow = sortArr(k, 1)
                
                ' ZÌsk·nÌ ID
                animeTitle = CleanXML(ws.Range("C" & realRow).Value)
                animeID = "0"
                If ws.Range("C" & realRow).Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
                    linkText = ws.Range("C" & realRow).Hyperlinks(1).Address
                    animeID = GetAnimeIDFromLink(linkText)
                End If
                If animeID = "0" And InStr(1, ws.Range("C" & realRow).Value, "myanimelist.net/anime/") > 0 Then
                    animeID = GetAnimeIDFromLink(ws.Range("C" & realRow).Value)
                End If
                
                If animeID <> "0" Then
                    animeCount = animeCount + 1
                    
                    ' Data
                    rawScore = ws.Range("K" & realRow).Value
                    If IsNumeric(rawScore) And rawScore >= 1 And rawScore <= 10 Then myScore = CStr(rawScore) Else myScore = "0"
                    
                    ' UloûenÌ do novÈ pamÏti pro p¯ÌötÌ bÏh
                    ' (Pokud uû ID existuje z PTW f·ze, p¯epÌöeme ho aktu·lnÌm skÛre, coû je spr·vnÏ)
                    If newScoreCache.Exists(animeID) Then
                        newScoreCache(animeID) = myScore
                    Else
                        newScoreCache.Add animeID, myScore
                    End If
                    
                    dateStart = FormatMALDate(ws.Range("L" & realRow).Value)
                    dateFinish = FormatMALDate(ws.Range("M" & realRow).Value)
                    episodesWatched = CStr(ws.Range("I" & realRow).Value)
                    If episodesWatched = "" Then episodesWatched = "0"
                    rewatchCount = CStr(ws.Range("N" & realRow).Value)
                    If rewatchCount = "" Or Not IsNumeric(rewatchCount) Then rewatchCount = "0"
                    
                    ' Status logic
                    If dateFinish <> "" And dateFinish <> "0000-00-00" Then
                        myStatus = "Completed"
                    ElseIf dateStart <> "" And dateStart <> "0000-00-00" Then
                        myStatus = "Watching"
                    Else
                        myStatus = "Plan to Watch"
                    End If
                    
                    ' Tagy (Jazyk)
                    myTags = CreateSmartTags(ws.Range("P" & realRow).Value, "", "")

                    ' === SMART UPDATE LOGIKA (HLAVNÕ LIST) - OPRAVEN¡ ===
                    scoreChanged = False
                    isInCache = scoreCache.Exists(animeID)
                    
                    Dim oldScore As String
                    If isInCache Then
                        oldScore = scoreCache(animeID)
                        If oldScore <> myScore Then scoreChanged = True
                    Else
                        oldScore = "-1" ' Indik·tor, ûe v cache nebylo
                    End If
                    
                    If myStatus = "Watching" Then
                        ' Watching: Vûdy aktualizovat (mÏnÌ se epizody)
                        updateFlag = "1"
                        
                    ElseIf myStatus = "Completed" Then
                        ' Completed logika:
                        If Not isInCache Then
                            ' 1. Pokud anime nenÌ v pamÏti (novÈ nebo p¯esunutÈ z netrackovanÈho PTW), VéDY update
                            updateFlag = "1"
                        ElseIf oldScore = "0" And myScore <> "0" Then
                            ' 2. Pokud bylo v cache se skÛre 0 (PTW) a teÔ m· skÛre -> update
                            updateFlag = "1"
                        ElseIf scoreChanged = True Then
                            ' 3. Pokud se zmÏnilo skÛre
                            updateFlag = "1"
                        ElseIf dateFinish = Format(Date, "yyyy-mm-dd") Then
                            ' 4. Pokud bylo dokonËeno pr·vÏ dnes
                            updateFlag = "1"
                        Else
                            ' Jinak neaktualizovat (chr·nÌme datum historie na MAL)
                            updateFlag = "0"
                        End If
                        
                    Else
                        ' PTW v hlavnÌm listu
                        If isInCache Then updateFlag = "0" Else updateFlag = "1"
                    End If
                    
                    xmlStr = xmlStr & GenerateAnimeNode(animeID, animeTitle, episodesWatched, dateStart, dateFinish, myScore, myStatus, rewatchCount, myTags, updateFlag)
                End If
            Next k
        End If
    End If

    ' UKON»ENÕ XML
    xmlStr = xmlStr & "</myanimelist>"
    
' ==============================================================================
    ' F¡ZE 3: ULOéENÕ SOUBORU (SPECIFICK¡ CESTA)
    ' CÌl: C:\Users\macou\Desktop\Anime list - experimenting
    ' ==============================================================================
    Dim fso As Object
    Dim folderPath As String, fileName As String, fullPath As String
    
    ' 1. NastavenÌ tvÈ specifickÈ cesty
    folderPath = "C:\Users\macou\Desktop\Anime list - experimenting\"
    
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    
    ' 2. Kontrola existence sloûky (pokud neexistuje, zkusÌme ji vytvo¯it)
    If Not fso.FolderExists(folderPath) Then
        On Error Resume Next
        fso.CreateFolder folderPath
        On Error GoTo 0
        
        ' Pokud se vytvo¯enÌ nepovedlo (nap¯. öpatn· cesta), fallback na Plochu
        If Not fso.FolderExists(folderPath) Then
            MsgBox "CÌlov· sloûka neexistuje a nepoda¯ilo se ji vytvo¯it:" & vbCrLf & _
                   folderPath & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                   "Soubor bude uloûen na Plochu.", vbExclamation
            folderPath = CreateObject("WScript.Shell").SpecialFolders("Desktop") & Application.PathSeparator
        End If
    End If
    
    ' 3. Definice n·zvu souboru
    fileName = Format(Date, "dd.mm.yyyy") & "_Anime_List_Export.xml"
    fullPath = folderPath & fileName
    
    ' 4. Kontrola z·mku souboru (pokud je otev¯en˝, vytvo¯Ìme kopii s Ëasem)
    If fso.FileExists(fullPath) Then
        On Error Resume Next
        fso.DeleteFile fullPath, True
        If err.Number <> 0 Then
            fileName = Format(Date, "dd.mm.yyyy") & "_Anime_List_Export_" & Format(Time, "hhmmss") & ".xml"
            fullPath = folderPath & fileName
            err.Clear
        End If
        On Error GoTo 0
    End If

    ' 5. UloûenÌ p¯es ADODB Stream (UTF-8)
    Dim adoStream As Object
    Set adoStream = CreateObject("ADODB.Stream")
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    With adoStream
        .Type = 2             ' adTypeText
        .Charset = "utf-8"    ' VynucenÌ UTF-8
        .Open
        .WriteText xmlStr
        .SaveToFile fullPath, 2 ' 2 = adSaveCreateOverWrite
        .Close
    End With
    
    ' !!! ZDE JE TA OPRAVA !!!
    ' UloûÌme aktu·lnÌ stav do Excelu pro p¯ÌötÏ
    SaveScoreCache newScoreCache
    ' !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "Hotovo! Soubor uloûen zde:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & fullPath, vbInformation
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "CHYBA PÿI UKL¡D¡NÕ: " & err.Description & vbCrLf & "Cesta: " & fullPath, vbCritical
End Sub

' ==========================================
' POMOCN… FUNKCE PRO XML
' ==========================================
Function GenerateAnimeNode(ID As String, title As String, eps As String, dStart As String, dFinish As String, score As String, status As String, rew As String, tags As String, update As String) As String
    Dim s As String
    s = "  <anime>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <series_animedb_id>" & ID & "</series_animedb_id>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <series_title><![CDATA[" & title & "]]></series_title>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <my_watched_episodes>" & eps & "</my_watched_episodes>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <my_start_date>" & dStart & "</my_start_date>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <my_finish_date>" & dFinish & "</my_finish_date>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <my_score>" & score & "</my_score>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <my_status>" & status & "</my_status>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <my_times_watched>" & rew & "</my_times_watched>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <my_tags><![CDATA[" & tags & "]]></my_tags>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "    <update_on_import>" & update & "</update_on_import>" & vbCrLf
    s = s & "  </anime>" & vbCrLf
    GenerateAnimeNode = s
End Function

' ==========================================
' FUNKCE PRO PR¡CI S PAMÃTÕ (AS:AT)
' ==========================================
Sub LoadScoreCache()
    Set scoreCache = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("MAL Cache + Interactive Rating")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "CHYBA: List 'MAL Cache + Interactive Rating' nebyl nalezen! Cache nebude fungovat.", vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    ' Hled·me poslednÌ ¯·dek ve sloupci AS (45. sloupec)
    lastRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, "AS").End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Sub ' P¯edpokl·d·me, ûe ¯·dek 1 je hlaviËka nebo pr·zdn˝
    
    Dim arr As Variant
    ' NaËteme AS2:AT(lastRow) do pole pro rychlost
    arr = wsCache.Range("AS2:AT" & lastRow).Value
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(arr, 1)
        If Not IsEmpty(arr(i, 1)) Then
            scoreCache(CStr(arr(i, 1))) = CStr(arr(i, 2))
        End If
    Next i
End Sub

Sub SaveScoreCache(newCache As Object)
    Dim wsCache As Worksheet
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsCache = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("MAL Cache + Interactive Rating")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsCache Is Nothing Then Exit Sub ' Chyba uû byla hl·öena v Load
    
    ' Vymaz·nÌ starÈ cache (sloupce AS a AT, od ¯·dku 2 dol˘)
    Dim lastRow As Long
    lastRow = wsCache.Cells(wsCache.Rows.count, "AS").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        wsCache.Range("AS2:AT" & lastRow).ClearContents
    End If
    
    If newCache.count > 0 Then
        Dim keys As Variant, items As Variant
        keys = newCache.keys
        items = newCache.items
        
        ' Rychl˝ z·pis polem
        Dim arr() As Variant
        ReDim arr(1 To newCache.count, 1 To 2)
        
        Dim i As Long
        For i = 0 To newCache.count - 1
            arr(i + 1, 1) = keys(i)
            arr(i + 1, 2) = items(i)
        Next i
        
        ' Z·pis do AS2:AT...
        wsCache.Range("AS2").Resize(newCache.count, 2).Value = arr
    End If
    
    ' Na ˙pln˝ konec (p¯ed Exit Sub a ErrorHandler):
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    
End Sub

' ==========================================
' ZBYTEK TVðCH PŸVODNÕCH FUNKCÕ
' (CreateSmartTags, CleanXML, API funkce...)
' SEM VLOé VäECHNY OSTATNÕ FUNKCE, KTER… JSI MÃL V PŸVODNÕM K”DU
' ==========================================
Function CreateSmartTags(langStr As String, studioStr As String, themeStr As String) As String
    ' UPRAVEN¡ VERZE: VracÌ pouze Jazyk (Dub/Sub). Studio a TÈmata jsou ignorov·na.
    
    Dim parts() As String
    Dim p As Variant
    Dim finalTags As String
    Dim langTag As String
    
    finalTags = ""
    
    ' 1. Zpracov·nÌ jazyka
    If Trim(langStr) <> "" Then
        parts = Split(langStr, ";")
        For Each p In parts
            p = Trim(p)
            If p <> "" Then
                Select Case UCase(p)
                    Case "CZ"
                        langTag = "CZ Dub"
                    Case "ENG"
                        langTag = "ENG Dub"
                    Case Else
                        ' Pro JAP, CHN, KOR a ostatnÌ
                        langTag = p & " Dub (ENG Sub)"
                End Select
                
                If finalTags = "" Then
                    finalTags = langTag
                Else
                    finalTags = finalTags & ", " & langTag
                End If
            End If
        Next p
    End If
    
    ' Studio a TÈmata byly odstranÏny, vracÌme jen jazyk.
    CreateSmartTags = finalTags
End Function

Function CleanXML(txt As String) As String
    Dim Temp As String
    Temp = txt
    Temp = Replace(Temp, "&", "&amp;")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, "<", "&lt;")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, ">", "&gt;")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, """", "&quot;")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, "'", "&apos;")
    CleanXML = Temp
End Function

Function FormatMALDate(val As Variant) As String
    If IsDate(val) Then
        FormatMALDate = Format(val, "yyyy-mm-dd")
    Else
        FormatMALDate = "0000-00-00"
    End If
End Function

Function GetAnimeIDFromLink(hyperlinkAddress As String) As String
    Dim parts() As String
    Dim i As Integer
    parts = Split(hyperlinkAddress, "/")
    For i = LBound(parts) To UBound(parts) - 1
        If LCase(parts(i)) = "anime" Then
            If IsNumeric(parts(i + 1)) Then
                GetAnimeIDFromLink = parts(i + 1)
                Exit Function
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    GetAnimeIDFromLink = "0"
End Function

' === ZDE MUSÕä NECHAT I ZBYTEK SVðCH API FUNKCÕ (GetMALIDsFromAniList atd.) ===
' === POKUD JE POTÿEBUJEä, ZKOPÕRUJ JE Z PÿEDCHOZÕHO MODULU ===

' ==========================================
' API FUNKCE (ANILIST -> MAL)
' ==========================================
Function GetMALIDsFromAniList(searchTitle As String) As Collection
    Dim xmlHttp As Object
    Dim jsonResponse As String
    Dim resultColl As New Collection
    Dim query As String, payload As String
    
    Dim rawNodes() As String
    Dim i As Long
    Dim nodeText As String
    Dim tempID As String, tempFormat As String, tempType As String, tempTitle As String
    
    If Trim(searchTitle) = "" Then
        Set GetMALIDsFromAniList = resultColl
        Exit Function
    End If

    query = "query ($search: String) { " & _
            "  Media (search: $search, type: ANIME, sort: SEARCH_MATCH) { " & _
            "    idMal format type title { romaji } " & _
            "    relations { edges { relationType node { idMal format type title { romaji } } } } " & _
            "  } }"

    payload = "{""query"":""" & CleanQueryForJSON(query) & """, ""variables"":{""search"":""" & CleanJSONString(searchTitle) & """}}"

    On Error Resume Next
    Set xmlHttp = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    If xmlHttp Is Nothing Then Set xmlHttp = CreateObject("WinHttp.WinHttpRequest.5.1")
    On Error GoTo 0

    If xmlHttp Is Nothing Then Exit Function

    With xmlHttp
        .Open "POST", "https://graphql.anilist.co", False
        .setRequestHeader "Content-Type", "application/json"
        .setRequestHeader "Accept", "application/json"
        .sEnd payload
        jsonResponse = .responseText
    End With

    rawNodes = Split(jsonResponse, """idMal""")
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(rawNodes)
        nodeText = rawNodes(i)
        tempID = GetValueFromFragment(nodeText, ":", ",")
        tempFormat = GetJsonValue(nodeText, """format""")
        tempType = GetJsonValue(nodeText, """type""")
        tempTitle = GetJsonValue(nodeText, """romaji""")
        
        Dim isValid As Boolean
        isValid = True
        If tempID = "0" Or tempID = "" Or tempID = "null" Then isValid = False
        If tempType <> "" And UCase(tempType) <> "ANIME" Then isValid = False
        If UCase(tempFormat) = "MUSIC" Then isValid = False
        If InStr(1, tempTitle, "PV", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then isValid = False
        If InStr(1, tempTitle, "Recap", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then isValid = False
        If InStr(1, tempTitle, "Summary", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then isValid = False
        If InStr(1, tempTitle, "Music Video", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then isValid = False
        
        If isValid Then
            On Error Resume Next
            resultColl.Add tempID, CStr(tempID)
            On Error GoTo 0
        End If
    Next i
    
    Set GetMALIDsFromAniList = resultColl
End Function

Function GetValueFromFragment(txt As String, startChar As String, endChar As String) As String
    Dim p1 As Long, p2 As Long
    p1 = InStr(1, txt, startChar)
    If p1 > 0 Then
        p1 = p1 + Len(startChar)
        p2 = InStr(p1, txt, endChar)
        If p2 > 0 Then
            GetValueFromFragment = Trim(Mid(txt, p1, p2 - p1))
            Exit Function
        End If
    End If
    GetValueFromFragment = ""
End Function

Function GetJsonValue(txt As String, key As String) As String
    Dim p1 As Long, p2 As Long
    p1 = InStr(1, txt, key)
    If p1 = 0 Then
        GetJsonValue = ""
        Exit Function
    End If
    p1 = InStr(p1, txt, ":") + 1
    Dim charCheck As String
    Do
        charCheck = Mid(txt, p1, 1)
        If charCheck <> " " And charCheck <> vbCr And charCheck <> vbLf Then Exit Do
        p1 = p1 + 1
    Loop
    If charCheck = """" Then
        p1 = p1 + 1
        p2 = InStr(p1, txt, """")
    Else
        p2 = p1
        Do
            If Mid(txt, p2, 1) = "," Or Mid(txt, p2, 1) = "}" Then Exit Do
            p2 = p2 + 1
        Loop
    End If
    If p2 > p1 Then
        GetJsonValue = Mid(txt, p1, p2 - p1)
    Else
        GetJsonValue = ""
    End If
End Function

Function CleanJSONString(txt As String) As String
    Dim Temp As String
    Temp = txt
    Temp = Replace(Temp, "\", "\\")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, """", "\""")
    CleanJSONString = Temp
End Function

Function CleanQueryForJSON(qry As String) As String
    Dim Temp As String
    Temp = Replace(qry, vbCrLf, " ")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, vbNewLine, " ")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, """", "\""")
    CleanQueryForJSON = Temp
End Function

Function CleanSearchName(txt As String) As String
    Dim Temp As String
    Temp = txt
    Temp = Replace(Temp, " (zbytek)", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, " (sÈrie)", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, " sÈrie", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, " + OVAs", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, " + S02", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, ", S01 + S02", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, " Stages", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, " (existuje nÏkolik verzÌ)", "")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, "(2011 ver)", "(2011)")
    Temp = Replace(Temp, "Cosmic Horror/Lovecraftian story", "")
    CleanSearchName = Trim(Temp)
End Function

--- KONEC K”DU [Export_List_MAL] ---

Modul: List_WatchPlan_Gemini
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [List_WatchPlan_Gemini] ---
Sub CopyAnimeWatchPlanPrompt()
    ' ==========================================================================================
    ' POPIS: NaËte Anime data, p¯id· info o dÈlce epizod a vygeneruje PROMPT pro AI.
    ' ==========================================================================================
    
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim animeData As String
    Dim jsonItem As String
    Dim finalPrompt As String
    
    ' --- NASTAVENÕ SLOUPCŸ (Konstanty pro snadnou ˙pravu) ---
    Const COL_NAZEV As String = "G"
    Const COL_TYP As String = "H"
    Const COL_EP_POCET As String = "I"
    Const COL_EP_DELKA As String = "J"  ' Nov˝ sloupec pro dÈlku epizody
    Const COL_CAS_TOTAL As String = "K"
    Const COL_POZN As String = "L"
    Const COL_STATUS As String = "M"
    
    ' NastavenÌ listu
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME PLAN TO WATCH + FUTURES")
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, COL_NAZEV).End(xlUp).row
    
    ' HlaviËka JSON
    animeData = "["
    
    ' --- ITERACE DATA ---
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        ' Kontrola, zda m· Anime n·zev
        If Len(ws.Range(COL_NAZEV & i).Value) > 0 Then
            
            ' 1. Oöet¯enÌ celkovÈho Ëasu (pro p¯Ìpad chyb #HODNOTA!)
            Dim timeTotal As String
            If IsError(ws.Range(COL_CAS_TOTAL & i).Value) Then
                timeTotal = "Nezn·m· dÈlka"
            Else
                timeTotal = ws.Range(COL_CAS_TOTAL & i).Value & " min"
            End If
            
            ' 2. NaËtenÌ dÈlky epizody (Sloupec J)
            Dim timeEp As String
            If IsNumeric(ws.Range(COL_EP_DELKA & i).Value) Then
                timeEp = ws.Range(COL_EP_DELKA & i).Value & " min"
            Else
                timeEp = "N/A"
            End If
            
            ' 3. »iötÏnÌ pozn·mky (escape uvozovek, lomÌtek a od¯·dkov·nÌ pro validnÌ JSON)
            Dim reasonClean As String
            reasonClean = ws.Range(COL_POZN & i).Value
            reasonClean = Replace(reasonClean, "\", "\\")   ' Escape zpÏtn˝ch lomÌtek
            reasonClean = Replace(reasonClean, """", "'")    ' NahrazenÌ uvozovek apostrofy
            reasonClean = Replace(reasonClean, vbNewLine, " ")
            reasonClean = Replace(reasonClean, Chr(10), " ")
            reasonClean = Replace(reasonClean, Chr(13), " ")
            
            ' 4. SestavenÌ JSON z·znamu
            jsonItem = "{" & _
                """Nazev"": """ & ws.Range(COL_NAZEV & i).Value & """, " & _
                """Typ"": """ & ws.Range(COL_TYP & i).Value & """, " & _
                """Pocet_EP"": """ & ws.Range(COL_EP_POCET & i).Value & """, " & _
                """Delka_EP"": """ & timeEp & """, " & _
                """Celkovy_Cas"": """ & timeTotal & """, " & _
                """Duvod_Poznamka"": """ & reasonClean & """, " & _
                """Status"": """ & ws.Range(COL_STATUS & i).Value & """" & _
                "}"
            
            ' P¯id·nÌ Ë·rky p¯ed dalöÌ poloûku
            If Len(animeData) > 1 Then animeData = animeData & "," & vbNewLine
            animeData = animeData & jsonItem
        End If
    Next i
    
    animeData = animeData & "]"
    
    ' --- SESTAVENÕ PROMPTU ---
    finalPrompt = "Jsi m˘j osobnÌ Anime kur·tor a expert na time-management." & vbNewLine & vbNewLine & _
    "M·m zde sv˘j seznam 'Plan to Watch' v JSON form·tu. Tv˝m ˙kolem je analyzovat data (vËetnÏ poËtu epizod a dÈlky) a pozn·mky, " & _
    "a vytvo¯it pro mÏ **3 r˘znÈ Anime Watch Pl·ny**." & vbNewLine & vbNewLine & _
    "**DATASET (Seznam Anime):**" & vbNewLine & _
    animeData & vbNewLine & vbNewLine & _
    "**PRAVIDLA PRO TVORBU PL¡NŸ:**" & vbNewLine & _
    "1. **Franchise Grouping:** Pokud je v seznamu vÌce z·znam˘ pat¯ÌcÌch do stejnÈ sÈrie, drû je u sebe." & vbNewLine & _
    "2. **Respektuj Status:** Pokud je status 'Vyd·no', mohu to bingewatchovat. Pokud 'VysÌl·no', ber v potaz t˝dennÌ vyd·v·nÌ." & vbNewLine & _
    "3. **T¯i r˘znÈ varianty:** Vytvo¯ t¯i odliönÈ pl·ny (nap¯. 'Temn˝ & Psychologick˝', 'Action & Hype', 'Chill' apod.)." & vbNewLine & vbNewLine & _
    "**POéADOVANð VðSTUP PRO KAéDð PL¡N:**" & vbNewLine & _
    "- **N·zev Pl·nu:** (VystihujÌcÌ tÈma)" & vbNewLine & _
    "- **Celkov˝ Ëas:** (Kolik hodin zabere zhlÈdnutÌ celÈho pl·nu)" & vbNewLine & _
    "- **Celkov˝ poËet epizod:** (SeËti epizody vöech anime v tomto pl·nu)" & vbNewLine & _
    "- **Seznam Anime:** Se¯azen˝ v doporuËenÈm po¯adÌ. Form·t: [N·zev] | [PoËet EP] x [DÈlka EP]" & vbNewLine & _
    "- **D˘vod v˝bÏru:** ProË jsi vybral tato Anime k sobÏ?" & vbNewLine & _
    "- **SpojujÌcÌ prvek:** Co tato Anime spojuje?"

    ' --- KOPÕROV¡NÕ DO SCHR¡NKY (RobustnÌ metoda p¯es HTML) ---
    Dim clipboardCheck As Boolean
    clipboardCheck = CopyTextToClipboard(finalPrompt)
    
    If clipboardCheck Then
        'MsgBox "Prompt zkopÌrov·n! NynÌ vloû do AI (Ctrl+V).", vbInformation, "Anime Plan Generator"
    Else
        MsgBox "Chyba p¯i kopÌrov·nÌ do schr·nky.", vbCritical
    End If

End Sub

' Pomocn· funkce pro spolehlivÈ kopÌrov·nÌ na Win 10/11
Function CopyTextToClipboard(text As String) As Boolean
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Dim htmlObj As Object
    Set htmlObj = CreateObject("htmlfile")
    htmlObj.parentWindow.clipboardData.setData "text", text
    CopyTextToClipboard = True
    Exit Function
ErrHandler:
    CopyTextToClipboard = False
End Function

--- KONEC K”DU [List_WatchPlan_Gemini] ---

Modul: Export_Rating_Research
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Export_Rating_Research] ---
Option Explicit

' --- TUTO »¡ST VLOé ⁄PLNÃ NAHORU POD OPTION EXPLICIT ---
Private Type AnimeDensityData
    Name As String
    AType As String
    WordCount As Long
    NormEpisodes As Double  ' P¯epoËÌtan· dÈlka (nap¯. film 120min = 5.0 normovan˝ch dÌl˘)
    DensityScore As Double  ' Slova na 1 normovanou epizodu
End Type

' ***********************************************************************************
' * NASTAVENÕ CEST                                                                  *
' ***********************************************************************************
' P˘vodnÌ dlouh· cesta k OneDrive
Const PATH_ROOT_LONG As String = "C:\Users\macou\OneDrive - äKODA AUTO VYSOK¡ äKOLA o.p.s\OsobnÌ PC\Excel Projekt - nemazat\Anime_List\Anime hodnocenÌ a rozbory\"
' Virtu·lnÌ disk pro zkr·cenÌ cesty (obch·zÌ limit Windows 260 znak˘)
Const VIRTUAL_DRIVE As String = "B:"

' V˝stupnÌ sloûky (nynÌ relativnÌ k virtu·lnÌmu disku)
Const PATH_OUT_RATINGS As String = VIRTUAL_DRIVE & "\Moje hodnocenÌ Anime\"
Const PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS As String = VIRTUAL_DRIVE & "\FaktickÈ rozbory (Gemini AI)\Vytvo¯enÈ faktickÈ rozbory\"
Const PATH_OUT_MERGED_ANIME As String = VIRTUAL_DRIVE & "\Rozbor + hodnocenÌ\Per Anime\"
Const PATH_OUT_MERGED_SERIES As String = VIRTUAL_DRIVE & "\Rozbor + hodnocenÌ\Per Series\"

' Text, kter˝ se vloûÌ do sÈrie, pokud chybÌ pozn·mka v Excelu
Const PLACEHOLDER_TEXT As String = "DetailnÌ hodnocenÌ nebylo jeötÏ uvedeno."


' ***********************************************************************************
' * MENU PRO VðBÃR EXPORTU                                                        *
' ***********************************************************************************
Sub SpustitExportSMenu()
    Dim volba As String
    Dim msg As String
    
    msg = "Vyberte reûim exportu:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
          "1 - KOMPLETNÕ EXPORT (Vöe)" & vbCrLf & _
          "2 - Pouze JEDNOTLIV¡ ANIME (Rychl˝ export)" & vbCrLf & _
          "3 - Pouze S…RIE (HromadnÈ dokumenty)"
          
    ' ZobrazenÌ InputBoxu
    volba = InputBox(msg, "Moûnosti Exportu", "1")
    
    ' Pokud uûivatel klikne na Zruöit nebo nic nezad·
    If volba = "" Then Exit Sub
    
    ' OvÏ¯enÌ, zda je zad·no ËÌslo 1, 2 nebo 3
    If volba = "1" Or volba = "2" Or volba = "3" Then
        ' Dotaz na p¯eps·nÌ existujÌcÌch soubor˘ (pro zrychlenÌ opakovan˝ch bÏh˘)
        Dim overwrite As Boolean
        Dim answer As VbMsgBoxResult
        
        answer = MsgBox("Chcete p¯epsat jiû existujÌcÌ soubory?" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                        "ANO = Vöe se vygeneruje znovu (PomalÈ, ale aktualizuje zmÏny)" & vbCrLf & _
                        "NE = P¯eskoËÌ se vöe, co uû existuje (Velmi rychlÈ, jen novÈ poloûky)", _
                        vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "Reûim aktualizace")
                        
        overwrite = (answer = vbYes)
        
        ' SpustÌ hlavnÌ proceduru s parametry
        ExportAllToWord_Master CInt(volba), overwrite
    Else
        MsgBox "Neplatn· volba. Zadejte 1, 2 nebo 3.", vbExclamation
    End If
End Sub



' ***********************************************************************************
' * HLAVNÕ SPOUäTÃCÕ PROCEDURA                                                      *
' ***********************************************************************************
' Upraven· hlaviËka p¯ijÌm· parametr (defaultnÏ 1, kdyby se spustila omylem p¯Ìmo)
Sub ExportAllToWord_Master(Optional ByVal exportMode As Integer = 1, Optional ByVal overwriteExisting As Boolean = False)
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, r As Long
    Dim wordApp As Object, fso As Object
    
    ' --- KROK 1: PÿIPOJENÕ DISKU ---
    If Not MountVirtualDrive(VIRTUAL_DRIVE, PATH_ROOT_LONG) Then
        If Application.Visible Then MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se p¯ipojit virtu·lnÌ disk " & VIRTUAL_DRIVE, vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    
    ' DatovÈ struktury
    Dim dictMain As Object
    Set dictMain = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictMain.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        MsgBox "é·dn· data k exportu.", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    
    ' Vytvo¯enÌ sloûek podle toho, co budeme exportovat
    If exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 2 Then
        EnsureFolder fso, PATH_OUT_RATINGS
        EnsureFolder fso, PATH_OUT_MERGED_ANIME
    End If
    If exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 3 Then
        EnsureFolder fso, PATH_OUT_MERGED_SERIES
    End If
    
    ' Inicializace Wordu
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wordApp = GetObject(, "Word.Application")
    If wordApp Is Nothing Then Set wordApp = CreateObject("Word.Application")
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    
wordApp.Visible = False
    wordApp.ScreenUpdating = False
    wordApp.DisplayAlerts = 0 ' wdAlertsNone (potlaËÌ vyskakovacÌ okna)
    
    ' --- TURBO BOOST: VypnutÌ kontrol ---
    ' UloûÌme p˘vodnÌ nastavenÌ, abychom je nerozbili
    Dim origSpelling As Boolean, origGrammar As Boolean, origPagination As Boolean
    origSpelling = wordApp.Options.CheckSpellingAsYouType
    origGrammar = wordApp.Options.CheckGrammarAsYouType
    origPagination = wordApp.Options.Pagination
    
    ' --- TURBO BOOST: Glob·lnÌ optimalizace ---
    ToggleSpeed True, wordApp
    

    ' ==============================================================================
    ' F¡ZE 1: NaËtenÌ dat do polÌ (Optimalizace)
    ' ==============================================================================
    Dim arrData As Variant
    Dim rStart As Long
    
    ' NaËteme celou oblast dat (Sloupce A aû L, abychom mÏli indexy C=3, K=11, L=12)
    ' P¯edpokl·d·me, ûe data zaËÌnajÌ na ¯·dku 2
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        arrData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(2, 1), ws.Cells(lastRow, 12)).Value
    End If
    
    ' --- Optimalizace: NaËtenÌ koment·¯˘ hromadnÏ ---
    Dim dictRatingComments As Object, dictSeriesComments As Object
    Set dictRatingComments = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSeriesComments = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    Dim cmt As Comment
    For Each cmt In ws.Comments
        If cmt.Parent.Column = 11 Then ' Sloupec K (Rating)
            dictRatingComments(cmt.Parent.row) = cmt.text
        ElseIf cmt.Parent.Column = 3 Then ' Sloupec C (N·zev/SÈrie)
            dictSeriesComments(cmt.Parent.row) = cmt.text
        End If
    Next cmt
    
    ' --- Optimalizace: Cache soubor˘ ---
    Dim dictFiles As Object
    Set dictFiles = LoadFileCache(fso, PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS)
    
    Dim animeName As String, cleanName As String
    Dim commentText As String
    Dim seriesName As String, storageKey As String, displayTitle As String
    Dim startDate As Variant
    Dim analysisPath As String
    
    Dim hasRatingNote As Boolean
    
    ' Loop p¯es pole (mnohem rychlejöÌ neû p¯es buÚky)
    For r = 1 To UBound(arrData, 1)
        animeName = Trim(CStr(arrData(r, 3))) ' Sloupec C
        
        If animeName <> "" Then
            ' Update statusbaru jen obËas
            If r Mod 50 = 0 Then Application.StatusBar = "Zpracov·v·m: " & animeName
            
            cleanName = CleanFileName(animeName)
            startDate = arrData(r, 12) ' Sloupec L
            
            ' Kontrola souboru p¯es Dictionary
            analysisPath = ""
            If dictFiles.Exists(cleanName & ".docx") Then
                analysisPath = PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS & cleanName & ".docx"
            End If
            
            ' --- 1. ZÕSK¡NÕ TEXTU HODNOCENÕ ---
            hasRatingNote = False
            commentText = PLACEHOLDER_TEXT
            
            ' SkuteËn˝ ¯·dek v Excelu = r + 1 (protoûe arrData zaËÌn· ¯·dkem 2)
            If dictRatingComments.Exists(r + 1) Then
                If Trim(dictRatingComments(r + 1)) <> "" Then
                    commentText = dictRatingComments(r + 1)
                    hasRatingNote = True
                End If
            End If
            
            ' --- 2. ZÕSK¡NÕ N¡ZVU S…RIE ---
            seriesName = ""
            If dictSeriesComments.Exists(r + 1) Then
                seriesName = ExtractSeriesName(dictSeriesComments(r + 1))
            End If
            
            ' --- EXPORTY JEDNOTLIVðCH SOUBORŸ (PODMÕNKA: REéIM 1 nebo 2) ---
            If exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 2 Then
                If hasRatingNote Then
                    Dim pathRating As String, pathMerged As String
                    Dim skipRating As Boolean, skipMerged As Boolean
                    
                    pathRating = PATH_OUT_RATINGS & cleanName & ".docx"
                    pathMerged = PATH_OUT_MERGED_ANIME & cleanName & ".docx"
                    
                    skipRating = Not overwriteExisting And fso.FileExists(pathRating)
                    skipMerged = Not overwriteExisting And fso.FileExists(pathMerged)
                    
                    If Not skipRating Then
                        CreateWordDoc_RatingOnly wordApp, cleanName, commentText, PATH_OUT_RATINGS
                    End If
                    
                    If Not skipMerged Then
                        CreateWordDoc_MergedAnime wordApp, cleanName, commentText, analysisPath, PATH_OUT_MERGED_ANIME
                    End If
                End If
            End If
            
            ' --- PÿÕPRAVA DAT PRO S…RIE (VéDY SBÕR¡ME DATA, ABY BYLA PÿIPRAVENA) ---
            ' Data musÌme nasbÌrat i v reûimu 3, jinak by nebylo co exportovat
            If seriesName <> "" Then
                storageKey = CleanFileName(seriesName)
                displayTitle = seriesName
            Else
                storageKey = cleanName
                displayTitle = animeName
            End If
            
            Dim dateVal As Date
            If IsDate(startDate) Then dateVal = CDate(startDate) Else dateVal = DateSerial(1900, 1, 1)
            
            If Not dictMain.Exists(storageKey) Then dictMain.Add storageKey, New Collection
            dictMain(storageKey).Add Array(dateVal, animeName, commentText, analysisPath, displayTitle)
        End If
    Next r
    
    ' ==============================================================================
    ' F¡ZE 2: Generov·nÌ soubor˘ sÈriÌ (PODMÕNKA: REéIM 1 nebo 3)
    ' ==============================================================================
    If (exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 3) And dictMain.count > 0 Then
        Dim key As Variant, colData As Collection, counter As Long
        Dim docTitle As String
        counter = 0
        
        For Each key In dictMain.keys
            counter = counter + 1
            Application.StatusBar = "Generuji sÈrie (" & counter & "/" & dictMain.count & "): " & left(CStr(key), 30)
            
            Set colData = dictMain(key)
            Set colData = SortCollectionByDate(colData)
            
            docTitle = CStr(key)
            If colData.count > 0 Then
                Dim firstItem As Variant
                firstItem = colData(1)
                If UBound(firstItem) >= 4 And firstItem(4) <> "" Then docTitle = firstItem(4)
            End If
            
            ' Kontrola existence (Skip)
            Dim pathSeries As String
            pathSeries = PATH_OUT_MERGED_SERIES & CleanFileName(docTitle) & ".docx"
            
            If overwriteExisting Or Not fso.FileExists(pathSeries) Then
                ' Per-item error handling ó pokud jeden soubor selûe, pokraËuj s dalöÌm
                On Error Resume Next
                CreateWordDoc_Unified wordApp, docTitle, colData, PATH_OUT_MERGED_SERIES
                If err.Number <> 0 Then
                    Debug.Print "Series CHYBA [" & docTitle & "]: " & err.Description
                    err.Clear
                End If
                On Error GoTo CleanExit
            End If
        Next key
    End If
    
CleanExit:
    On Error Resume Next
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' ObnovenÌ nastavenÌ
    ToggleSpeed False, wordApp
    
    If Not wordApp Is Nothing Then
        wordApp.ScreenUpdating = True
        wordApp.Quit
        Set wordApp = Nothing
    End If
    Set fso = Nothing
    UnmountVirtualDrive VIRTUAL_DRIVE
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    
    If err.Number = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Hotovo! Export v reûimu " & exportMode & " dokonËen.", vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "Chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    End If
End Sub

' ***********************************************************************************
' * FUNKCE PRO S…RIE (JEDNOTNð DOKUMENT)                                            *
' ***********************************************************************************
Sub CreateWordDoc_Unified(wApp As Object, title As String, colItems As Collection, path As String)
    On Error GoTo DocErr
    Dim doc As Object, item As Variant, i As Long
    Set doc = wApp.Documents.Add
    
    ' 1. HLAVNÕ ⁄VODNÕ NADPIS S…RIE
    With doc.Range(0, 0)
        .InsertAfter "S…RIE: " & UCase(title) & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
        .Font.Name = "Calibri"
        .Font.size = 24
        .Font.Bold = True
        .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 1 ' Center
    End With
    
    ' Loop p¯es vöechny dÌly (filmy/epizody) v sÈrii
    For i = 1 To colItems.count
        item = colItems(i)
        ' [0:Datum, 1:N·zevAnime, 2:Koment·¯, 3:CestaKAnal˝ze, 4:N·zevSÈrie]
        
        ' VloûenÌ konce str·nky p¯ed kaûdou dalöÌ poloûkou
        If i > 1 Then doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertBreak 7 ' wdPageBreak
        
        ' 2. PODNADPIS (N·zev konkrÈtnÌho anime + Rok)
        With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
            .text = "ANIME: " & UCase(item(1)) & " (" & Format(item(0), "yyyy") & ")" & vbCrLf
            .Font.Name = "Calibri"
            .Font.size = 18
            .Font.Bold = True
            .Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 139) ' DarkBlue
            .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 0 ' Left
        End With
        
        ' 3. OSOBNÕ HODNOCENÕ (nebo Placeholder)
        AddSectionHeader doc, "1. OSOBNÕ HODNOCENÕ"
        
        With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
            .InsertAfter item(2) & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
            .Font.size = 11
            .Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            If item(2) = PLACEHOLDER_TEXT Then .Font.Italic = True Else .Font.Italic = False
        End With
        
        ' 4. FAKTICKð ROZBOR
        If item(3) <> "" Then
            AddSeparator doc
            AddSectionHeader doc, "2. FAKTICKð ROZBOR"
            On Error Resume Next
            doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertFile item(3)
            On Error GoTo DocErr
            
        Else
            doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertAfter vbCrLf & "[Faktick˝ rozbor nenÌ k dispozici]" & vbCrLf
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' --- OPTIMALIZACE: »iötÏnÌ textu (Superscripts) Aé NAKONEC (O(1) mÌsto O(N^2)) ---
    RemoveSuperscripts doc
    
    doc.SaveAs2 path & CleanFileName(title) & ".docx"
    doc.Close False
        Exit Sub

DocErr:
    On Error Resume Next
    If Not doc Is Nothing Then doc.Close False
    On Error GoTo 0
    err.Raise err.Number, err.Source, "CreateWordDoc_Unified [" & title & "]: " & err.Description
End Sub

' ***********************************************************************************
' * POMOCN… FUNKCE (UTILITY)                                                        *
' ***********************************************************************************

Private Function MountVirtualDrive(driveLetter As String, targetPath As String) As Boolean
    Dim wsh As Object, fso As Object
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    
    ' Optimalizace: Pokud disk existuje, p¯edpokl·d·me, ûe je OK a ne¯eöÌme (uöet¯Ì 300ms)
    If fso.DriveExists(driveLetter) Then
        MountVirtualDrive = True
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
    If Right(targetPath, 1) = "\" Then targetPath = left(targetPath, Len(targetPath) - 1)
    Dim cmd As String: cmd = "subst " & driveLetter & " """ & targetPath & """"
    On Error Resume Next
    wsh.Run cmd, 0, True
    On Error GoTo 0
    MountVirtualDrive = fso.DriveExists(driveLetter)
End Function

Private Sub UnmountVirtualDrive(driveLetter As String)
    Dim wsh As Object: Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
    On Error Resume Next
    wsh.Run "subst " & driveLetter & " /d", 0, True
End Sub

Sub CreateWordDoc_RatingOnly(wApp As Object, fName As String, cText As String, path As String)
    Dim doc As Object
    Set doc = wApp.Documents.Add
    With doc.Content
        .InsertAfter cText
        .Font.Name = "Calibri": .Font.size = 11
    End With
    doc.SaveAs2 path & fName & ".docx"
    doc.Close False
End Sub

Sub CreateWordDoc_MergedAnime(wApp As Object, fName As String, cText As String, aPath As String, path As String)
    Dim doc As Object
    Set doc = wApp.Documents.Add
    AddSectionHeader doc, "MOJE HODNOCENÕ (" & fName & ")"
    doc.Content.InsertAfter cText & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    If aPath <> "" Then
        AddSeparator doc
        AddSectionHeader doc, "FAKTICKð ROZBOR (GEMINI AI)"
        doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertFile aPath
        
        ' OdstranÏnÌ hornÌch index˘ (citacÌ) z vloûenÈho textu
        RemoveSuperscripts doc
    End If
    doc.SaveAs2 path & fName & ".docx"
    doc.Close False
End Sub

Private Sub AddSectionHeader(doc As Object, txt As String)
    With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
        .InsertAfter txt & vbCrLf
        .Font.Name = "Arial": .Font.size = 14: .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Underline = True: .Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 0
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub AddSeparator(doc As Object)
    With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
        .InsertAfter String(30, "-") & vbCrLf
        .Font.Bold = False: .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 1
    End With
End Sub

' Nov· funkce pro odstranÏnÌ hornÌch index˘ (citacÌ)
Private Sub RemoveSuperscripts(doc As Object)
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' VypnutÌ sledov·nÌ zmÏn pro tento dokument (obrovskÈ zrychlenÌ maz·nÌ)
    doc.TrackRevisions = False
    
    ' 1. Smazat skuteËnÈ Footnotes/Endnotes (pokud existujÌ)
    Dim i As Long
    If doc.Footnotes.count > 0 Then
        For i = doc.Footnotes.count To 1 Step -1: doc.Footnotes(i).Delete: Next i
    End If
    If doc.Endnotes.count > 0 Then
        For i = doc.Endnotes.count To 1 Step -1: doc.Endnotes(i).Delete: Next i
    End If
    
    ' 2. Smazat specifickÈ Unicode znaky (123...) - JEDNA TÿÕDA ZNAKŸ (Wildcard)
    ' MÌsto 10 pr˘chod˘ udÏl·me jen jeden
    Dim strWildcard As String
    strWildcard = "[" & ChrW(&H2070) & ChrW(&HB9) & ChrW(&HB2) & ChrW(&HB3) & _
                  ChrW(&H2074) & ChrW(&H2075) & ChrW(&H2076) & ChrW(&H2077) & _
                  ChrW(&H2078) & ChrW(&H2079) & "]"
                  
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = strWildcard
        .Replacement.text = ""
        .Forward = True
        .wrap = 1 ' wdFindContinue
        .Format = False
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2 ' wdReplaceAll
    End With
    
    ' 3. Smazat form·tovan˝ text (Superscript = True)
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .Font.Superscript = True
        .text = ""
        .Replacement.text = ""
        .Forward = True
        .wrap = 1 ' wdFindContinue
        .Format = True
        .MatchWildcards = False
        .Execute Replace:=2 ' wdReplaceAll
    End With
    
    ' 4a. Smazat ËÌsla hned za teËkou (nap¯. "text.8")
    ' [NenÌ»Ìslo].123 -> [NenÌ»Ìslo].
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = "([!0-9])\.([0-9]@)"
        .Replacement.text = "\1."
        .Forward = True
        .wrap = 1 ' wdFindContinue
        .Format = False
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2 ' wdReplaceAll
    End With
    
    ' 4b. Smazat ËÌsla na ˙plnÈm konci odstavce (nap¯. "text vÏty.1")
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = "\.([0-9]@)^13"
        .Replacement.text = ".^13"
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2 ' wdReplaceAll
    End With
    
    ' 5. Smazat citace v hranat˝ch z·vork·ch (nap¯. [1], [12])
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = "\[[0-9]@\]"
        .Replacement.text = ""
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2 ' wdReplaceAll
    End With
    
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub
