Private Function FindAnalysisFile(fso As Object, cleanName As String) As String
    Dim p As String: p = PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS & cleanName & ".docx"
    If fso.FileExists(p) Then FindAnalysisFile = p Else FindAnalysisFile = ""
End Function

' --- NOV¡ FUNKCE: GLOB¡LNÕ PÿEPÕNA» RYCHLOSTI ---
Private Sub ToggleSpeed(ByVal speedUp As Boolean, Optional wApp As Object = Nothing)
    On Error Resume Next
    If speedUp Then
        Application.ScreenUpdating = False
        Application.Calculation = -4135 ' xlCalculationManual
        Application.EnableEvents = False
        Application.DisplayStatusBar = True
        
        If Not wApp Is Nothing Then
            wApp.ScreenUpdating = False
            wApp.DisplayAlerts = 0 ' wdAlertsNone
            wApp.Options.CheckSpellingAsYouType = False
            wApp.Options.CheckGrammarAsYouType = False
            wApp.Options.Pagination = False
        End If
    Else
        Application.ScreenUpdating = True
        Application.Calculation = -4105 ' xlCalculationAutomatic
        Application.EnableEvents = True
        Application.DisplayStatusBar = True
        
        If Not wApp Is Nothing Then
            wApp.ScreenUpdating = True
            wApp.DisplayAlerts = -1 ' wdAlertsAll
            wApp.Options.CheckSpellingAsYouType = True
            wApp.Options.CheckGrammarAsYouType = True
            wApp.Options.Pagination = True
        End If
    End If
End Sub

Private Function ExtractSeriesName(txt As String) As String
    Dim lines As Variant, line As Variant, rawLine As String
    lines = Split(Replace(txt, vbCr, vbLf), vbLf)
    For Each line In lines
        rawLine = Trim(line)
        If InStr(1, rawLine, "N·zev sÈrie:", vbTextCompare) = 1 Or _
           InStr(1, rawLine, "SÈrie:", vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
            ExtractSeriesName = Trim(Mid(rawLine, InStr(rawLine, ":") + 1))
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next line
    ExtractSeriesName = ""
End Function

Private Function CleanFileName(ByVal rawName As String) As String
    Dim s As String: s = rawName
    s = Replace(s, ":", "_"): s = Replace(s, "/", " "): s = Replace(s, "\", "")
    s = Replace(s, "*", ""): s = Replace(s, "?", ""): s = Replace(s, """", "")
    s = Replace(s, "<", ""): s = Replace(s, ">", ""): s = Replace(s, "|", "")
    ' Optimalizace: NativnÌ Trim mÌsto smyËky
    CleanFileName = Application.Trim(s)
End Function

Private Sub EnsureFolder(fso As Object, path As String)
    If Not fso.FolderExists(path) Then
        On Error Resume Next: fso.CreateFolder path: On Error GoTo 0
    End If
End Sub

' --- NOV¡ POMOCN¡ FUNKCE PRO ZÕSK¡NÕ »ÕSLA Z N¡ZVU ---
Private Function ExtractSortNumber(ByVal txt As String) As Long
    Dim i As Long, sNum As String
    txt = UCase(txt)
    sNum = ""
    
    ' Najde prvnÌ sekvenci ËÌslic v textu
    For i = 1 To Len(txt)
        If IsNumeric(Mid(txt, i, 1)) Then
            sNum = sNum & Mid(txt, i, 1)
        Else
            ' Pokud uû jsme ËÌslo naöli a teÔ je tam pÌsmeno, konËÌme (aby S10 nebylo 10 ale S1 a S2)
            If sNum <> "" Then Exit For
        End If
    Next i
    
    If sNum = "" Then
        ExtractSortNumber = 0 ' Pokud n·zev nem· ËÌslo, je to 0
    Else
        ExtractSortNumber = CLng(sNum)
    End If
End Function

' --- UPRAVEN¡ FUNKCE TÿÕDÃNÕ (QuickSort) ---
Private Function SortCollectionByDate(col As Collection) As Collection
    Dim i As Long
    Dim arr() As Variant
    Dim sortedCol As New Collection
    
    If col.count = 0 Then Set SortCollectionByDate = col: Exit Function
    
    ' P¯evod Collection -> Array
    ReDim arr(1 To col.count)
    For i = 1 To col.count: arr(i) = col(i): Next i
    
    ' QuickSort (Uû pouûÌv·me typovan· data, takûe û·dnÈ konverze uvnit¯)
    QuickSort arr, LBound(arr), UBound(arr)
    
    ' P¯evod Array -> Collection
    For i = 1 To UBound(arr): sortedCol.Add arr(i): Next i
    Set SortCollectionByDate = sortedCol
End Function

' Implementace QuickSort algoritmu
Private Sub QuickSort(vArray As Variant, inLow As Long, inHigh As Long)
    Dim pivot   As Variant
    Dim tmpSwap As Variant
    Dim tmpLow  As Long
    Dim tmpHigh As Long
    
    tmpLow = inLow
    tmpHigh = inHigh
    
    pivot = vArray((inLow + inHigh) \ 2)
    
    While (tmpLow <= tmpHigh)
        While (CompareItems(vArray(tmpLow), pivot) < 0 And tmpLow < inHigh)
            tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
        Wend
        
        While (CompareItems(pivot, vArray(tmpHigh)) < 0 And tmpHigh > inLow)
            tmpHigh = tmpHigh - 1
        Wend
        
        If (tmpLow <= tmpHigh) Then
            tmpSwap = vArray(tmpLow)
            vArray(tmpLow) = vArray(tmpHigh)
            vArray(tmpHigh) = tmpSwap
            tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
            tmpHigh = tmpHigh - 1
        End If
    Wend
    
    If (inLow < tmpHigh) Then QuickSort vArray, inLow, tmpHigh
    If (tmpLow < inHigh) Then QuickSort vArray, tmpLow, inHigh
End Sub

' Pomocn· funkce pro porovn·nÌ dvou poloûek (Datum, pak »Ìslo v n·zvu)
' VracÌ -1 pokud v1 < v2, 1 pokud v1 > v2, 0 pokud rovno
Private Function CompareItems(v1 As Variant, v2 As Variant) As Integer
    Dim d1 As Date, d2 As Date
    
    ' Oöet¯enÌ pr·zdnÈho data
    ' Oöet¯enÌ pr·zdnÈho data (DATA Ué JSOU TYPU DATE dÌky ˙pravÏ v hlavnÌm loopu)
    d1 = v1(0)
    d2 = v2(0)
    
    If d1 < d2 Then
        CompareItems = -1
    ElseIf d1 > d2 Then
        CompareItems = 1
    Else
        ' Data jsou stejn·, porovn·me ËÌsla v n·zvu
        Dim n1 As Long, n2 As Long
        n1 = ExtractSortNumber(CStr(v1(1)))
        n2 = ExtractSortNumber(CStr(v2(1)))
        
        If n1 < n2 Then
            CompareItems = -1
        ElseIf n1 > n2 Then
            CompareItems = 1
        Else
            CompareItems = 0
        End If
    End If
End Function

' --- FUNKCE PRO NA»TENÕ SOUBORŸ DO CACHE ---
' --- FUNKCE PRO NA»TENÕ SOUBORŸ DO CACHE (DIR = RYCHLEJäÕ) ---
Private Function LoadFileCache(fso As Object, folderPath As String) As Object
    Dim dict As Object
    Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dict.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    
    If Right(folderPath, 1) <> "\" Then folderPath = folderPath & "\"
    
    If fso.FolderExists(folderPath) Then
        Dim fName As String
        fName = Dir(folderPath & "*.*", vbNormal)
        Do While fName <> ""
            dict(fName) = True
            fName = Dir
        Loop
    End If
    Set LoadFileCache = dict
End Function


' ***********************************************************************************
' * KOMPLETNÕ AUDIT: KONTROLA CHYBÃJÕCÕCH A PÿEBYTE»NðCH ROZBORŸ                   *
' ***********************************************************************************
Sub CheckAnalysisIntegrity()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, r As Long
    Dim fso As Object, folderObj As Object, fileObj As Object
    Dim dictExcel As Object
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro v˝pis
    Dim listMissing As String, countMissing As Long
    Dim listExtra As String, countExtra As Long
    Dim displayLimit As Long
    Dim animeName As String, cleanName As String, fileNameNoExt As String
    
    ' --- NastavenÌ ---
    displayLimit = 15 ' Kolik poloûek z kaûdÈ kategorie vypsat max.
    countMissing = 0: listMissing = ""
    countExtra = 0: listExtra = ""
    
    ' --- 1. P¯ipojenÌ disku ---
    If Not MountVirtualDrive(VIRTUAL_DRIVE, PATH_ROOT_LONG) Then
        MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se p¯ipojit virtu·lnÌ disk " & VIRTUAL_DRIVE, vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    Set dictExcel = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictExcel.CompareMode = vbTextCompare ' Ignorovat velikost pÌsmen (Windows style)
    
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    Application.StatusBar = "ProbÌh· audit faktick˝ch rozbor˘..."
    
    ' ==============================================================================
    ' F¡ZE 1: Excel -> Disk (Hled·me, co chybÌ na disku a plnÌme Dictionary)
    ' ==============================================================================
    
    ' NaËtenÌ dat do pole
    Dim arrData As Variant
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        arrData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(2, 3), ws.Cells(lastRow, 3)).Value ' Sloupec C
    End If
    
    ' Cache soubor˘
    Dim dictFiles As Object
    Set dictFiles = LoadFileCache(fso, PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS)
    
    If IsArray(arrData) Then
        For r = 1 To UBound(arrData, 1)
            animeName = Trim(CStr(arrData(r, 1)))
            
            If animeName <> "" Then
                cleanName = CleanFileName(animeName)
                
                ' UloûÌme si Ëist˝ n·zev do pamÏti pro F·zi 2
                If Not dictExcel.Exists(cleanName) Then
                    dictExcel.Add cleanName, animeName
                End If
                
                ' Kontrola existence souboru (cache)
                If Not dictFiles.Exists(cleanName & ".docx") Then
                    countMissing = countMissing + 1
                    If countMissing <= displayLimit Then
                        listMissing = listMissing & "ï " & animeName & vbCrLf
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        Next r
    End If
    
    ' ==============================================================================
    ' F¡ZE 2: Disk -> Excel (Hled·me soubory navÌc, kterÈ nejsou v listu)
    ' ==============================================================================
    If fso.FolderExists(PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS) Then
        Set folderObj = fso.GetFolder(PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS)
        
        For Each fileObj In folderObj.Files
            ' ZajÌm· n·s jen .docx a ignorujeme doËasnÈ soubory Wordu (~$...)
            If LCase(Right(fileObj.Name, 5)) = ".docx" And left(fileObj.Name, 2) <> "~$" Then
                
                ' ZÌsk·me n·zev souboru bez p¯Ìpony
                fileNameNoExt = left(fileObj.Name, Len(fileObj.Name) - 5)
                
                ' Pokud tento n·zev nenÌ v naöem Dictionary z Excelu -> je to Extra soubor
                If Not dictExcel.Exists(fileNameNoExt) Then
                    countExtra = countExtra + 1
                    If countExtra <= displayLimit Then
                        listExtra = listExtra & "ï " & fileNameNoExt & vbCrLf
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        Next fileObj
    End If
    
    ' --- 3. ⁄klid a Report ---
    UnmountVirtualDrive VIRTUAL_DRIVE
    Set fso = Nothing
    Set dictExcel = Nothing
    Application.StatusBar = False
    
    ' SestavenÌ zpr·vy
    If countMissing = 0 And countExtra = 0 Then
        MsgBox "PerfektnÌ shoda!" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "Vöechna Anime v listu majÌ sv˘j rozbor a ve sloûce nejsou û·dnÈ zbyteËnÈ soubory navÌc.", _
               vbInformation, "Audit OK"
    Else
        Dim msg As String
        msg = "VðSLEDEK AUDITU:" & vbCrLf & String(40, "-") & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
        
        ' Sekce ChybÏjÌcÌ
        If countMissing > 0 Then
            msg = msg & "[!] CHYBÕ ROZBORY (V Excelu jsou, na disku ne): " & countMissing & vbCrLf & _
                  listMissing
            If countMissing > displayLimit Then msg = msg & "... a dalöÌch " & (countMissing - displayLimit) & vbCrLf
            msg = msg & vbCrLf
        Else
            msg = msg & "[OK] é·dnÈ chybÏjÌcÌ rozbory." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
        End If
        
        ' Sekce P¯eb˝vajÌcÌ
        If countExtra > 0 Then
            msg = msg & "[?] ROZBORY NAVÕC (Na disku jsou, v Excelu ne): " & countExtra & vbCrLf & _
                  listExtra
            If countExtra > displayLimit Then msg = msg & "... a dalöÌch " & (countExtra - displayLimit) & vbCrLf
        Else
            msg = msg & "[OK] é·dnÈ soubory navÌc." & vbCrLf
        End If
        
        MsgBox msg, vbExclamation, "Neshody v datech"
    End If
End Sub

' ***********************************************************************************
' * NOV¡ FUNKCE: ANALðZA HUSTOTY ROZBORŸ (WORD COUNT vs D…LKA ANIME)                *
' ***********************************************************************************
Sub AnalyzovatHustotuRozboru()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, r As Long
    Dim wordApp As Object, doc As Object, fso As Object
    Dim results() As AnimeDensityData
    Dim resultCount As Long
    Dim mode As String, modeName As String
    
    ' PromÏnnÈ pro ËtenÌ z Excelu
    Dim animeName As String, cleanName As String, animeType As String
    Dim eps As Variant, mins As Variant
    Dim normLen As Double
    Dim analysisPath As String
    Dim wCount As Long
    
    ' Setup
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    ' 1. VðBÃR REéIMU
    mode = InputBox("Vyber typ Anime pro anal˝zu hustoty:" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
                    "1 - TV Only (TV, TV Short)" & vbCrLf & _
                    "2 - Movie Only (Movie)" & vbCrLf & _
                    "3 - TV + Movie" & vbCrLf & _
                    "4 - ALL (Vöechno)", "Filtr Anal˝zy", "1")
                    
    If mode = "" Then Exit Sub
    If InStr("1234", mode) = 0 Then MsgBox "Neplatn· volba.", vbExclamation: Exit Sub
    
    Select Case mode
        Case "1": modeName = "TV Only"
        Case "2": modeName = "Movie Only"
        Case "3": modeName = "TV + Movie"
        Case "4": modeName = "ALL"
    End Select

    ' 2. PÿIPOJENÕ DISKU A INIT APPs
    If Not MountVirtualDrive(VIRTUAL_DRIVE, PATH_ROOT_LONG) Then
        MsgBox "Chyba p¯ipojenÌ disku.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    End If
    
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wordApp = GetObject(, "Word.Application")
    If wordApp Is Nothing Then Set wordApp = CreateObject("Word.Application")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    wordApp.Visible = False
    wordApp.DisplayAlerts = 0 ' wdAlertsNone
    
    ' Optimalizace i pro Word
    ToggleSpeed True, wordApp
    
    ' 3. SBÃR DAT (LOOP)
    resultCount = 0
    
    ' NaËtenÌ dat do pole: C (Name), D (Type), I (Eps), J (Mins)
    Dim arrData As Variant
    ' NaËteme sloupce C aû J (C=3 ... J=10)
    ' C je 1. sloupec v poli, D=2, I=7, J=8
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        arrData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(2, 3), ws.Cells(lastRow, 10)).Value
        ' Optimalizace alokace: Maxim·lnÌ moûn· velikost, abychom nemuseli dÏlat ReDim Preserve v kaûdÈm kroku
        ReDim results(1 To UBound(arrData, 1))
    End If
    
    ' Cache soubor˘
    Dim dictFiles As Object
    Set dictFiles = LoadFileCache(fso, PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS)
    
    If IsArray(arrData) Then
        For r = 1 To UBound(arrData, 1)
            ' Progress Bar do StatusBaru
            If r Mod 10 = 0 Then
                Dim pct As Long
                pct = CLng((r / UBound(arrData, 1)) * 100)
                Application.StatusBar = "Analyzuji hustotu: " & pct & "% (" & r & "/" & UBound(arrData, 1) & ")"
                DoEvents ' Aby Excel nezamrzl a reagoval
            End If
            
            animeName = CStr(arrData(r, 1)) ' Sloupec C
            animeType = CStr(arrData(r, 2)) ' Sloupec D
            
            ' Filtr podle typu (Upravit ¯etÏzce podle toho, jak je m·ö p¯esnÏ v Excelu)
            Dim processIt As Boolean: processIt = False
            
            Select Case mode
                Case "1": If InStr(1, animeType, "TV", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then processIt = True
                Case "2": If InStr(1, animeType, "Movie", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then processIt = True
                Case "3": If InStr(1, animeType, "TV", vbTextCompare) > 0 Or InStr(1, animeType, "Movie", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then processIt = True
                Case "4": processIt = True
            End Select
            
            If processIt And animeName <> "" Then
                ' V˝poËet dÈlky
                eps = arrData(r, 7) ' Sloupec I (7. v oblasti C:J)
                mins = arrData(r, 8) ' Sloupec J (8. v oblasti C:J)
                
                If IsNumeric(eps) And IsNumeric(mins) And val(eps) > 0 And val(mins) > 0 Then
                    ' Normovan· dÈlka: (PoËetEp * Minuty) / 24
                    normLen = (CDbl(eps) * CDbl(mins)) / 24
                    
                    ' Kontrola existence souboru
                    cleanName = CleanFileName(animeName)
                    analysisPath = PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS & cleanName & ".docx"
                    
                    ' PouûitÌ cache pro kontrolu existence
                    If dictFiles.Exists(cleanName & ".docx") Then
                        ' Otev¯enÌ Wordu a zjiötÏnÌ poËtu slov
                        wCount = 0
                        On Error Resume Next
                        Set doc = wordApp.Documents.Open(fileName:=analysisPath, ReadOnly:=True, Visible:=False, AddToRecentFiles:=False)
                        If Not doc Is Nothing Then
                            ' wdStatisticWords = 0
                            wCount = doc.Range.ComputeStatistics(0)
                            doc.Close SaveChanges:=False
                        End If
                        On Error GoTo 0
                        
                        ' Pokud m· slova, p¯id·me do pole
                        If wCount > 0 Then
                            resultCount = resultCount + 1
                            ' ReDim smaz·n - pole je p¯edalokovanÈ
                            results(resultCount).Name = animeName
                            results(resultCount).AType = animeType
                            results(resultCount).WordCount = wCount
                            results(resultCount).NormEpisodes = normLen
                            results(resultCount).DensityScore = wCount / normLen
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        Next r
    End If
    
    ' 4. TÿÕDÃNÕ (Bubble Sort - od nejmenöÌho Score)
    Application.StatusBar = "T¯ÌdÌm v˝sledky..."
    
    ' O¯ÌznutÌ pole na skuteËnou velikost
    If resultCount > 0 Then
        ReDim Preserve results(1 To resultCount)
    Else
        MsgBox "Nebyly nalezeny û·dnÈ v˝sledky.", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanUpDensity
    End If

    Dim i As Long, j As Long
    Dim Temp As AnimeDensityData
    
    If resultCount > 1 Then
        For i = 1 To resultCount - 1
            For j = i + 1 To resultCount
                If results(i).DensityScore > results(j).DensityScore Then
                    Temp = results(i)
                    results(i) = results(j)
                    results(j) = Temp
                End If
            Next j
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' 5. VðPIS VðSLEDKŸ
    ' 5. VðPIS VðSLEDKŸ
    Dim msg As String
    msg = "TOP 15 NEJSTRU»NÃJäÕCH ROZBORŸ (" & modeName & ")" & vbCrLf
    msg = msg & "Form·t: [Hustota slov/norm.ep] N·zev - (Slova / Norm.ep)" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    
    Dim limit As Long
    limit = resultCount
    If limit > 15 Then limit = 15
    
    If limit = 0 Then
        msg = msg & "Nebyly nalezeny û·dnÈ odpovÌdajÌcÌ rozbory."
    Else
        For i = 1 To limit
            ' Zkr·cenÌ n·zvu pro lepöÌ form·tov·nÌ
            Dim shortName As String
            shortName = results(i).Name
            If Len(shortName) > 25 Then shortName = left(shortName, 22) & "..."
            
            ' Form·t: 1. [140.4] AnimeName (Type) - 3433w / 24.4ep
            msg = msg & i & ". [" & Format(results(i).DensityScore, "0.0") & "] " & _
                  shortName & " (" & results(i).AType & ") - " & _
                  results(i).WordCount & "w / " & Format(results(i).NormEpisodes, "0.0") & "ep" & vbCrLf
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' Cleanup
CleanUpDensity:
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ToggleSpeed False, wordApp
    
    wordApp.Quit
    Set wordApp = Nothing
    Set fso = Nothing
    UnmountVirtualDrive VIRTUAL_DRIVE
    Application.StatusBar = False
    
    MsgBox msg, vbInformation, "Anal˝za hustoty dokonËena"
    
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' MODUL: Export_AnimeData_Word
' POPIS: Export dat do Word - Ëte z MAL Cache nebo poËÌt· v pamÏti
' VERZE: 7.0 - Optimalizovan· verze s progress barem a validacÌ
' DATUM: 04.02.2026
' ==================================================================================================
Option Explicit

' ==================================================================================================
' KONSTANTY - EXPORT
' ==================================================================================================
Private Const EXPORT_FOLDER As String = "C:\Users\macou\OneDrive - äKODA AUTO VYSOK¡ äKOLA o.p.s\OsobnÌ PC\Excel Projekt - nemazat\Anime_List\ChatBot - Sources\"
Private Const EXPORT_FILENAME As String = "01_Anime_Excel_Data"
Private Const PAGE_MARGIN_CM As Double = 0.2
Private Const FONT_NAME As String = "Calibri"

Private Const HEADING1_FONT_SIZE As Integer = 12
Private Const BODY_FONT_SIZE As Integer = 8
Private Const TABLE_FONT_SIZE As Integer = 8

' ==================================================================================================

Private Const SH_GEN As String = "OBECN… INFORMACE"
Private Const SH_ANIME As String = "ANIME LIST"
Private Const SH_HIST As String = "HISTORY LOG"
Private Const SH_FAV As String = "ANIME FAV OP + ED + OST"
Private Const SH_PLAN As String = "ANIME PLAN TO WATCH + FUTURES"

Private Const COL_PORADI As Long = 1      ' A - Po¯adÌ

Private Const COL_NAZEV As Long = 3       ' C - N·zev Anime
Private Const COL_TYP As Long = 4         ' D - Typ
Private Const COL_STUDIO As Long = 5      ' E - Studio
Private Const COL_DATUM As Long = 6       ' F - Datum vyd·nÌ

Private Const COL_STATUS As Long = 17     ' Q - Status

' ==================================================================================================
' MODULOV… PROMÃNN… (pro ErrorHandler cleanup a sdÌlen· data)
' ==================================================================================================
Private m_wdApp As Object
Private m_wdDoc As Object
Private m_startTime As Double

' SdÌlen· data ANIME LIST (naËteno jednou, pouûito vÌcekr·t)
Private m_animeData As Variant
Private m_animeLastRow As Long

' ==================================================================================================
' HLAVNÕ MAKRO
' ==================================================================================================
Public Sub ExportAniListDataPDF()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Dim exportPath As String
    Dim totalSections As Long: totalSections = 18
    Dim currentSection As Long: currentSection = 0
    
    m_startTime = Timer
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationManual
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    
    ' === VALIDACE LISTŸ ===
    If Not ValidateRequiredSheets() Then
        MsgBox "ChybÌ poûadovanÈ listy! Export p¯eruöen.", vbCritical
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    Call InitializeWordDocument(m_wdApp, m_wdDoc)
    Call LoadSharedAnimeData    ' NaËÌst ANIME LIST data jednou pro vöechny sekce
    exportPath = EXPORT_FOLDER & EXPORT_FILENAME & ".docx"
    
    ' === EXPORT SEKCÕ S PROGRESS BAREM ===
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("HlavnÌ nadpis", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call AddMainTitle(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    Call AddAboutMeSection(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Jak hodnotÌm", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionA_HowIRate(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("»Ìsla", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionB_Numbers(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Studia", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionD_Studios(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("SezÛny", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionE_SeasonsAge(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("TÈmata", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionF_Themes(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("é·nry", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionG_Genres(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("AniList tagy", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionH_AniListTags(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    Call SectionH2_AnimeWithTags(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Top Anime", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionK_TopAnime(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    Call SectionK2_HonourableMentions(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("OblÌbenÈ postavy", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionL_FavCharacters(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Dabing", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionM_Dub(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Status", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionN_Status(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("ZhlÈdnut· Anime", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionR_WatchedAnime(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Historie", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionS_WatchHistory(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Favourite OP/ED", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionT_FavouriteOPED(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Favourite OSTs", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionU_FavouriteOSTs(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Anime Futures", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionV_AnimeFutures(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    currentSection = currentSection + 1: Call UpdateProgress("Plan to Watch/Read", currentSection, totalSections)
    Call SectionW_PlanToWatch(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    Call SectionX_PlanToRead(m_wdDoc, m_wdApp)
    
    ' === ULOéENÕ A ZAVÿENÕ ===
    Call UpdateProgress("Ukl·d·nÌ...", totalSections, totalSections)
    m_wdApp.ScreenUpdating = True
    m_wdApp.DisplayAlerts = -1
    DoEvents
    
    m_wdDoc.SaveAs2 exportPath, 16
    DoEvents
    
    m_wdDoc.Close False
    DoEvents
    m_wdApp.Quit False
    
    Set m_wdDoc = Nothing
    Set m_wdApp = Nothing
    
CleanExit:
    Application.StatusBar = False  ' Resetovat status bar
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.Calculation = xlCalculationAutomatic
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    
    Dim elapsedTime As Double: elapsedTime = Timer - m_startTime
    MsgBox "Export dokonËen za " & Format(elapsedTime, "0.0") & " sekund!" & vbCrLf & "Soubor: " & exportPath, vbInformation
    Exit Sub
    
ErrorHandler:
    ' Cleanup Word p¯i chybÏ
    On Error Resume Next
    If Not m_wdDoc Is Nothing Then m_wdDoc.Close False
    If Not m_wdApp Is Nothing Then m_wdApp.Quit False
    Set m_wdDoc = Nothing
    Set m_wdApp = Nothing
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    MsgBox "Chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume CleanExit
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: Progress bar v Status Baru
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub UpdateProgress(sectionName As String, current As Long, total As Long)
    Dim pct As Long: pct = (current * 100) \ total
    Application.StatusBar = "Export: " & sectionName & " (" & pct & "%) " & String(pct \ 5, "-") & String(20 - pct \ 5, "-")
    DoEvents
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: Validace poûadovan˝ch list˘
' ==================================================================================================
Private Function ValidateRequiredSheets() As Boolean
    Dim requiredSheets As Variant, shName As Variant
    requiredSheets = Array(SH_GEN, SH_ANIME, SH_HIST, SH_FAV, SH_PLAN)
    
    ValidateRequiredSheets = True
    For Each shName In requiredSheets
        On Error Resume Next
        Dim ws As Worksheet: Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(CStr(shName))
        If ws Is Nothing Then
            Debug.Print "CHYBÕ LIST: " & shName
            ValidateRequiredSheets = False
        End If
        Set ws = Nothing
        On Error GoTo 0
    Next shName
End Function

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: NaËÌst sdÌlen· data ANIME LIST (vol·no jednou na zaË·tku)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub LoadSharedAnimeData()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_ANIME)
    m_animeLastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    If m_animeLastRow >= 2 Then
        m_animeData = ws.Range("A1:Q" & m_animeLastRow).Value
    End If
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: QuickSort pro pole index˘ (O(n log n) mÌsto O(n2) bubble sort)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub QuickSortIndices(ByRef indices() As Long, ByRef dataArr As Variant, ByVal sortCol As Long, ByVal lowIdx As Long, ByVal highIdx As Long, ByVal descending As Boolean)
    If lowIdx >= highIdx Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim pivotIdx As Long, i As Long, j As Long, tempIdx As Long
    Dim pivotVal As Variant
    
    pivotIdx = (lowIdx + highIdx) \ 2
    pivotVal = dataArr(indices(pivotIdx), sortCol)
    i = lowIdx: j = highIdx
    
    Do While i <= j
        If descending Then
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(i), sortCol), pivotVal) > 0: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(j), sortCol), pivotVal) < 0: j = j - 1: Loop
        Else
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(i), sortCol), pivotVal) < 0: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(j), sortCol), pivotVal) > 0: j = j - 1: Loop
        End If
        
        If i <= j Then
            tempIdx = indices(i): indices(i) = indices(j): indices(j) = tempIdx
            i = i + 1: j = j - 1
        End If
    Loop
    
    If lowIdx < j Then QuickSortIndices indices, dataArr, sortCol, lowIdx, j, descending
    If i < highIdx Then QuickSortIndices indices, dataArr, sortCol, i, highIdx, descending
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: Porovn·nÌ hodnot (Date, Number, String)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Function CompareValues(val1 As Variant, val2 As Variant) As Long
    ' VracÌ: -1 pokud val1 < val2, 0 pokud =, 1 pokud val1 > val2
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' Oöet¯it pr·zdnÈ hodnoty
    If IsEmpty(val1) Or IsNull(val1) Or val1 = "" Then
        If IsEmpty(val2) Or IsNull(val2) Or val2 = "" Then
            CompareValues = 0
        Else
            CompareValues = -1  ' Pr·zdnÈ na konec
        End If
        Exit Function
    End If
    If IsEmpty(val2) Or IsNull(val2) Or val2 = "" Then
        CompareValues = 1
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    ' Porovnat datumy
    If IsDate(val1) And IsDate(val2) Then
        If CDate(val1) < CDate(val2) Then
            CompareValues = -1
        ElseIf CDate(val1) > CDate(val2) Then
            CompareValues = 1
        Else
            CompareValues = 0
        End If
    ' Porovnat ËÌsla
    ElseIf IsNumeric(val1) And IsNumeric(val2) Then
        If CDbl(val1) < CDbl(val2) Then
            CompareValues = -1
        ElseIf CDbl(val1) > CDbl(val2) Then
            CompareValues = 1
        Else
            CompareValues = 0
        End If
    ' Porovnat stringy
    Else
        CompareValues = StrComp(CStr(val1), CStr(val2), vbTextCompare)
    End If
    
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

' ==================================================================================================
' INICIALIZACE S OPTIMALIZACEMI
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub InitializeWordDocument(ByRef wdApp As Object, ByRef wdDoc As Object)
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wdApp = GetObject(, "Word.Application")
    If wdApp Is Nothing Then Set wdApp = CreateObject("Word.Application")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' === OPTIMALIZACE PRO RYCHLOST ===
    wdApp.Visible = False            ' Skr˝t Word bÏhem generov·nÌ
    wdApp.ScreenUpdating = False     ' Vypnout aktualizaci obrazovky
    wdApp.DisplayAlerts = 0          ' wdAlertsNone - û·dnÈ dialogy
    
    ' Vypnout kontroly pravopisu/gramatiky (zp˘sobujÌ lag)
    wdApp.Options.CheckSpellingAsYouType = False
    wdApp.Options.CheckGrammarAsYouType = False
    wdApp.Options.CheckGrammarWithSpelling = False
    
    ' Vypnout automatickÈ hyperlinkov·nÌ
    wdApp.Options.AutoFormatAsYouTypeReplaceHyperlinks = False
    
    Set wdDoc = wdApp.Documents.Add
    wdDoc.PageSetup.Orientation = 1
    
    ' Vypnout kontroly v dokumentu
    wdDoc.ShowSpellingErrors = False
    wdDoc.ShowGrammaticalErrors = False
    
    Dim m As Double: m = PAGE_MARGIN_CM * 28.35
    With wdDoc.PageSetup: .TopMargin = m: .BottomMargin = m: .LeftMargin = m: .RightMargin = m: End With
End Sub

Private Sub AddHeading(wdApp As Object, txt As String, fs As Integer)
    With wdApp.Selection: .Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Font.size = fs: .Font.Bold = True
        .TypeText txt: .TypeParagraph: .TypeParagraph: End With
End Sub

Private Sub AddParagraph(wdApp As Object, txt As String)
    With wdApp.Selection: .Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Font.size = BODY_FONT_SIZE: .Font.Bold = False
        .TypeText txt: .TypeParagraph: End With
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: Vytvo¯Ì tabulku z Dictionary (klÌË -> hodnota)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub CreateTableFromDict(wdApp As Object, wdDoc As Object, dict As Object, h1 As String, h2 As String)
    If dict Is Nothing Or dict.count = 0 Then Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "[é·dn· data]"): Exit Sub
    
    Dim wdTable As Object, keys As Variant, i As Long
    keys = dict.keys
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, dict.count + 1, 2)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.Enable = True: .AutoFitBehavior 1
        .Range.Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Range.Font.size = TABLE_FONT_SIZE
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = h1: .cell(1, 2).Range.text = h2
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True: .Rows(1).Shading.BackgroundPatternColor = RGB(200, 200, 200)
        For i = 0 To UBound(keys)
            .cell(i + 2, 1).Range.text = CStr(keys(i))
            .cell(i + 2, 2).Range.text = CStr(dict(keys(i)))
        Next i
    End With
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6: wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: Vytvo¯Ì tabulku z Dictionary s pr˘mÏrn˝m hodnocenÌm (klÌË -> poËet, souËet -> pr˘mÏr)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub CreateTableFromDictWithRating(wdApp As Object, wdDoc As Object, dictCnt As Object, dictSum As Object, dictRatingCnt As Object, h1 As String, h2 As String, h3 As String)
    If dictCnt Is Nothing Or dictCnt.count = 0 Then Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "[é·dn· data]"): Exit Sub
    
    Dim wdTable As Object, keys As Variant, i As Long, avgRating As Double
    keys = dictCnt.keys
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, dictCnt.count + 1, 3)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.Enable = True: .AutoFitBehavior 1
        .Range.Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Range.Font.size = TABLE_FONT_SIZE
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = h1: .cell(1, 2).Range.text = h2: .cell(1, 3).Range.text = h3
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True: .Rows(1).Shading.BackgroundPatternColor = RGB(200, 200, 200)
        For i = 0 To UBound(keys)
            .cell(i + 2, 1).Range.text = CStr(keys(i))
            .cell(i + 2, 2).Range.text = CStr(dictCnt(keys(i)))
            If dictRatingCnt.Exists(keys(i)) And dictRatingCnt(keys(i)) > 0 Then
                avgRating = dictSum(keys(i)) / dictRatingCnt(keys(i))
                .cell(i + 2, 3).Range.text = Format(avgRating, "0.00")
            Else
                .cell(i + 2, 3).Range.text = "-"
            End If
        Next i
    End With
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6: wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: Tabulka z Excel Range
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub CreateTableFromRange(wdApp As Object, wdDoc As Object, ws As Worksheet, addr As String, Optional hdr As Boolean = True)
    On Error GoTo Err1
    Dim rng As Range, wdT As Object, r As Long, c As Long, nr As Long, nc As Long, v As String
    Set rng = ws.Range(addr): nr = rng.Rows.count: nc = rng.Columns.count
    If nr = 0 Then Exit Sub
    Set wdT = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, nr, nc)
    With wdT
        .Borders.Enable = True: .AutoFitBehavior 1
        .Range.Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Range.Font.size = TABLE_FONT_SIZE
        For r = 1 To nr: For c = 1 To nc
            On Error Resume Next: v = CStr(rng.Cells(r, c).Value): On Error GoTo Err1
            If Len(v) > 0 Then .cell(r, c).Range.text = v
        Next c: Next r
        If hdr Then .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True: .Rows(1).Shading.BackgroundPatternColor = RGB(200, 200, 200)
    End With
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6: wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph: Exit Sub
Err1: wdApp.Selection.TypeText "[Chyba]": wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HLAVNÕ NADPIS + O MNÃ
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub AddMainTitle(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    With wdApp.Selection: .Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE: .Font.Bold = True
        .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 1
        .TypeText "Data o sledov·nÌ Anime ñ VäE k " & Format(Date, "dd.mm.yyyy")
        .TypeParagraph: .TypeParagraph: End With
End Sub

Private Sub AddAboutMeSection(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "O mnÏ", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "Jmenuji se Patrik, sleduji re·lnÏ Anime od kvÏtna 2019, kdy jsem zhlÈdl svÈ prvnÌ (novodobÈ, nepoËÌt·m pokemony) Anime, kter˝m bylo Girls und Panzer. Dlouho jsem nic nesledoval aû do roku 2020, kdy jsem vidÏl Death Note. Po nÏm jsem vidÏl p·r film˘ nebo TV seri·l˘, ale skuteËnÏ jsem zaËal aû v roce 2025, kdy jsem zhlÈdl opravdu hodnÏ Anime.")
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE A: JAK HODNOTÕM
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionA_HowIRate(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "Jak hodnotÌm?", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    ' AI Prompt s filozofiÌ hodnocenÌ
    Dim ratingPhilosophy As String
    ratingPhilosophy = "Moje filozofie hodnocenÌ:" & vbCrLf & _
        "(10 -> peak story/enjoyment) (9 -> High above average story/enjoyment) " & _
        "(8 -> Slightly above average story/enjoyment) (7 -> Average story; below average enjoyment) " & _
        "(6 -> bad story/didn't enjoy) (5 -> I felt, like I'm wasting time)." & vbCrLf & _
        "ZaËÌn·m na 8/10 a potom je to na show, jestli se mi bude lÌbit a p˘jde to nahoru nebo dol˘." & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
        "V·hy kategoriÌ:" & vbCrLf & _
        "Animace = 2, CGI = 1,8, MC = 3, VedlejöÌ postavy = 2,5, Waifu = 1,5, Plot = 4, " & _
        "Pacing = 1,5, Story Conclusion = 1,5, Originalita = 2,5, Emoce = 3,5, Enjoyment = 4, " & _
        "OP = 1, ED = 0,5, OST = 2"
    
    Call AddParagraph(wdApp, ratingPhilosophy)
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE B: »ÕSLA (z OBECN… INFORMACE D2:I21, p¯eskoËit sloupec E)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionB_Numbers(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "»Ìsla", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_GEN)
    
    ' Exportovat D2:I21 - sloupec D m· legendu, E je pr·zdn˝ (p¯eskoËit), F-I majÌ data
    Dim dataArr As Variant, i As Long, j As Long, outCol As Long
    Dim wdTable As Object, rowIdx As Long
    Dim cellValue As Variant, cellText As String
    
    dataArr = ws.Range("D2:I21").Value
    
    ' PoËet ¯·dk˘: 20
    ' PoËet sloupc˘: 5 (D=legenda + F,G,H,I = hodnoty), p¯eskoËit E (sloupec 2 v poli)
    Dim numRows As Long: numRows = 20
    Dim numCols As Long: numCols = 5
    
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, numRows, numCols)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.Enable = True: .AutoFitBehavior 1
        .Range.Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Range.Font.size = TABLE_FONT_SIZE
        
        rowIdx = 1
        For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
            outCol = 1
            For j = 1 To 6
                If j <> 2 Then ' P¯eskoËit sloupec 2 (E = pr·zdn˝)
                    cellValue = dataArr(i, j)
                    
                    ' ÿ·dek 2 = »as sledov·nÌ (hh:mm) - hodnota je v DNECH, p¯evÈst na hh:mm
                    If i = 2 And j > 2 And IsNumeric(cellValue) Then
                        Dim totalHours As Double, hrs As Long, mins As Long
                        totalHours = CDbl(cellValue) * 24  ' Dny -> hodiny
                        hrs = Fix(totalHours)
                        mins = Fix((totalHours - hrs) * 60)
                        cellText = Format(hrs, "0") & ":" & Format(mins, "00")
                    Else
                        On Error Resume Next
                        If IsNumeric(cellValue) And Not IsEmpty(cellValue) Then
                            If Int(CDbl(cellValue)) <> CDbl(cellValue) Then
                                cellText = Format(cellValue, "0.00")
                            Else
                                cellText = CStr(cellValue)
                            End If
                        Else
                            cellText = CStr(cellValue)
                        End If
                        On Error GoTo 0
                    End If
                    
                    .cell(rowIdx, outCol).Range.text = cellText
                    outCol = outCol + 1
                End If
            Next j
            rowIdx = rowIdx + 1
        Next i
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
    End With
    
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6, 0
    wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE C: TYPY (z MAL Cache O1)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionC_Types(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "Typy", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    ' In-memory v˝poËet z ANIME LIST sloupec D + K (hodnocenÌ)
    Dim wsData As Worksheet, dictCnt As Object, dictSum As Object, dictRatingCnt As Object
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long, typeVal As String, dataArr As Variant
    
    Set wsData = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_ANIME)
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictRatingCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    lastRow = wsData.Cells(wsData.Rows.count, "D").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Sub
    
    dataArr = wsData.Range("A1:K" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' Sloupec D = index 4, Sloupec K (hodnocenÌ) = index 11
    For i = 2 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        typeVal = Trim(CStr(dataArr(i, 4)))
        If Len(typeVal) > 0 Then
            dictCnt(typeVal) = dictCnt(typeVal) + 1
            If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, 11)) And dataArr(i, 11) > 0 Then
                dictSum(typeVal) = dictSum(typeVal) + CDbl(dataArr(i, 11))
                dictRatingCnt(typeVal) = dictRatingCnt(typeVal) + 1
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' Vytvo¯it tabulku se 3 sloupci
    Dim wdTable As Object, key As Variant, rowIdx As Long
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, dictCnt.count + 1, 3)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.InsideLineStyle = 1: .Borders.OutsideLineStyle = 1
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "Typ"
        .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "PoËet"
        .cell(1, 3).Range.text = "Pr˘m. hodnocenÌ"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        
        rowIdx = 2
        For Each key In dictCnt.keys
            .cell(rowIdx, 1).Range.text = key
            .cell(rowIdx, 2).Range.text = CStr(dictCnt(key))
            If dictRatingCnt.Exists(key) And dictRatingCnt(key) > 0 Then
                .cell(rowIdx, 3).Range.text = Format(dictSum(key) / dictRatingCnt(key), "0.00")
            Else
                .cell(rowIdx, 3).Range.text = "N/A"
            End If
            rowIdx = rowIdx + 1
        Next key
    End With
    
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6, 0
    wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE D: STUDIA (IN-MEMORY z sdÌlen˝ch dat)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionD_Studios(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "Studia", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    If IsEmpty(m_animeData) Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim dictCnt As Object, dictSum As Object, dictRatingCnt As Object
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, arrS As Variant, studio As String
    
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictRatingCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' Sloupec E = COL_STUDIO = 5, Sloupec K = COL_HODNOCENI = 11
    For i = 2 To UBound(m_animeData, 1)
        If Len(m_animeData(i, COL_STUDIO)) > 0 Then
            arrS = Split(m_animeData(i, COL_STUDIO), ";")
            For j = LBound(arrS) To UBound(arrS)
                studio = Trim(arrS(j))
                If Len(studio) > 0 Then
                    dictCnt(studio) = dictCnt(studio) + 1
                    If IsNumeric(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI)) And m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI) > 0 Then
                        dictSum(studio) = dictSum(studio) + CDbl(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI))
                        dictRatingCnt(studio) = dictRatingCnt(studio) + 1
                    End If
                End If
            Next j
        End If
    Next i
    
    Call CreateTableFromDictWithRating(wdApp, wdDoc, dictCnt, dictSum, dictRatingCnt, "Studio", "PoËet", "Pr˘m. hodnocenÌ")
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE E-G: SezÛny, TÈmata, é·nry (z sdÌlen˝ch dat)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionE_SeasonsAge(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "VÏk anime", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    If IsEmpty(m_animeData) Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim i As Long, todayDate As Date, releaseDate As Date, daysDiff As Long
    Dim cnt0to2 As Long, cnt2to5 As Long, cnt5to15 As Long, cnt15plus As Long
    
    todayDate = Date
    
    ' Sloupec F = COL_DATUM = 6
    For i = 2 To UBound(m_animeData, 1)
        If IsDate(m_animeData(i, COL_DATUM)) Then
            releaseDate = CDate(m_animeData(i, COL_DATUM))
            daysDiff = todayDate - releaseDate
            
            Select Case daysDiff
                Case Is <= 730:  cnt0to2 = cnt0to2 + 1     ' 0-2 roky
                Case Is <= 1825: cnt2to5 = cnt2to5 + 1     ' 2-5 let
                Case Is <= 5475: cnt5to15 = cnt5to15 + 1   ' 5-15 let
                Case Else:       cnt15plus = cnt15plus + 1 ' 15+ let
            End Select
        End If
    Next i
    
    Dim wdTable As Object
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, 5, 2)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.InsideLineStyle = 1: .Borders.OutsideLineStyle = 1
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "VÏkov· skupina": .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "PoËet"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        .cell(2, 1).Range.text = "0-2 roky": .cell(2, 2).Range.text = CStr(cnt0to2)
        .cell(3, 1).Range.text = "2-5 let": .cell(3, 2).Range.text = CStr(cnt2to5)
        .cell(4, 1).Range.text = "5-15 let": .cell(4, 2).Range.text = CStr(cnt5to15)
        .cell(5, 1).Range.text = "15+ let": .cell(5, 2).Range.text = CStr(cnt15plus)
    End With
    
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6, 0
    wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

Private Sub SectionF_Themes(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "TÈmata", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    If IsEmpty(m_animeData) Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim dictCnt As Object, dictSum As Object, dictRatingCnt As Object
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, themeVal As String, themeList As Variant
    
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictRatingCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' Sloupec G = COL_TEMATA = 7, Sloupec K = COL_HODNOCENI = 11
    For i = 2 To UBound(m_animeData, 1)
        themeVal = Trim(CStr(m_animeData(i, COL_TEMATA)))
        
        If Len(themeVal) > 0 Then
            themeList = Split(themeVal, ";")
            For j = LBound(themeList) To UBound(themeList)
                themeVal = Trim(CStr(themeList(j)))
                If Len(themeVal) > 0 And UCase(themeVal) <> "X" Then
                    dictCnt(themeVal) = dictCnt(themeVal) + 1
                    If IsNumeric(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI)) And m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI) > 0 Then
                        dictSum(themeVal) = dictSum(themeVal) + CDbl(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI))
                        dictRatingCnt(themeVal) = dictRatingCnt(themeVal) + 1
                    End If
                End If
            Next j
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictCnt.count = 0 Then Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "(é·dn· tÈmata k dispozici)"): Exit Sub
    Call CreateTableFromDictWithRating(wdApp, wdDoc, dictCnt, dictSum, dictRatingCnt, "TÈma", "PoËet", "Pr˘m. hodnocenÌ")
End Sub

Private Sub SectionG_Genres(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "é·nry", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    If IsEmpty(m_animeData) Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim dictCnt As Object, dictSum As Object, dictRatingCnt As Object
    Dim i As Long, j As Long, genreVal As String, genreList As Variant
    
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictRatingCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' Sloupec H = COL_ZANRY = 8, Sloupec K = COL_HODNOCENI = 11
    For i = 2 To UBound(m_animeData, 1)
        genreVal = Trim(CStr(m_animeData(i, COL_ZANRY)))
        
        If Len(genreVal) > 0 Then
            genreList = Split(genreVal, ";")
            For j = LBound(genreList) To UBound(genreList)
                genreVal = Trim(CStr(genreList(j)))
                If Len(genreVal) > 0 Then
                    dictCnt(genreVal) = dictCnt(genreVal) + 1
                    If IsNumeric(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI)) And m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI) > 0 Then
                        dictSum(genreVal) = dictSum(genreVal) + CDbl(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI))
                        dictRatingCnt(genreVal) = dictRatingCnt(genreVal) + 1
                    End If
                End If
            Next j
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictCnt.count = 0 Then Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "(é·dnÈ û·nry k dispozici)"): Exit Sub
    Call CreateTableFromDictWithRating(wdApp, wdDoc, dictCnt, dictSum, dictRatingCnt, "é·nr", "PoËet", "Pr˘m. hodnocenÌ")
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE H: ANILIST TAGY (z MAL Cache BJ1)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionH_AniListTags(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "AniList tagy", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    ' NaËÌst data z cache - BX (MAL ID), BY (Name), BZ (Tags)
    Dim wsMal As Worksheet, wsAnime As Worksheet
    Dim dataArr As Variant, animeData As Variant
    Dim lastRow As Long, lastAnimeRow As Long, i As Long, j As Long
    Dim tagName As String, tagRank As Long
    Dim dictCnt As Object, dictSum As Object, dictRatingSum As Object, dictRatingCnt As Object
    
    On Error Resume Next: Set wsMal = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_MAL): On Error GoTo 0
    If wsMal Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    On Error Resume Next: Set wsAnime = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_ANIME): On Error GoTo 0
    If wsAnime Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictRatingSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictRatingCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' NaËÌst hodnocenÌ z ANIME LIST - sloupec C (MAL ID link) a K (hodnocenÌ)
    lastAnimeRow = wsAnime.Cells(wsAnime.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    Dim malIdToRating As Object: Set malIdToRating = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    If lastAnimeRow >= 2 Then
        Dim hl As Hyperlink, malID As Long, ratingVal As Variant
        For i = 2 To lastAnimeRow
            On Error Resume Next
            malID = 0
            If wsAnime.Cells(i, "C").Hyperlinks.count > 0 Then
                Dim urlParts() As String
                urlParts = Split(wsAnime.Cells(i, "C").Hyperlinks(1).Address, "/")
                If UBound(urlParts) >= 4 And IsNumeric(urlParts(4)) Then
                    malID = CLng(urlParts(4))
                End If
            End If
            ratingVal = wsAnime.Cells(i, "K").Value
            If malID > 0 And IsNumeric(ratingVal) And ratingVal > 0 Then
                malIdToRating(malID) = CDbl(ratingVal)
            End If
            On Error GoTo 0
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' CC = tag name, CD = count/relevance score
    lastRow = wsMal.Cells(wsMal.Rows.count, "CC").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Sub
    
    dataArr = wsMal.Range("CC2:CD" & lastRow).Value
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        tagName = Trim(CStr(dataArr(i, 1)))
        If Len(tagName) > 0 And IsNumeric(dataArr(i, 2)) Then
            dictCnt(tagName) = CLng(dataArr(i, 2))
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictCnt.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    
    ' NaËÌst tagy z cache pro v˝poËet pr˘mÏrnÈho hodnocenÌ na tag
    Dim cacheLastRow As Long
    cacheLastRow = wsMal.Cells(wsMal.Rows.count, "BX").End(xlUp).row
    If cacheLastRow >= 2 Then
        Dim cacheData As Variant
        cacheData = wsMal.Range("BX2:BZ" & cacheLastRow).Value
        
        For i = 1 To UBound(cacheData, 1)
            If IsNumeric(cacheData(i, 1)) Then
                malID = CLng(cacheData(i, 1))
                Dim tagString As String: tagString = CStr(cacheData(i, 3))
                
                If Len(tagString) > 0 And malIdToRating.Exists(malID) Then
                    Dim animeRating As Double: animeRating = malIdToRating(malID)
                    Dim tagsArr() As String: tagsArr = Split(tagString, ";")
                    
                    For j = LBound(tagsArr) To UBound(tagsArr)
                        Dim parts() As String: parts = Split(tagsArr(j), ":")
                        If UBound(parts) = 1 Then
                            If IsNumeric(parts(1)) Then
                                tagName = Trim(parts(0))
                                tagRank = CLng(parts(1))
                                If Len(tagName) > 0 Then
                                    ' V·ûen˝ pr˘mÏr: v·ha = tagRank / 100
                                    Dim vaha As Double: vaha = tagRank / 100
                                    dictRatingSum(tagName) = dictRatingSum(tagName) + (animeRating * vaha)
                                    dictRatingCnt(tagName) = dictRatingCnt(tagName) + vaha
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If
                    Next j
                End If
            End If
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' Se¯adit tagy podle poËtu - top 40
    Dim sortArr() As Variant, k As Variant, idx As Long
    ReDim sortArr(1 To dictCnt.count, 1 To 2)
    idx = 1
    For Each k In dictCnt.keys
        sortArr(idx, 1) = k
        sortArr(idx, 2) = dictCnt(k)
        idx = idx + 1
    Next k
    
    ' Bubble sort sestupnÏ
    Dim swapped As Boolean, temp1 As Variant, temp2 As Variant
    Do
        swapped = False
        For j = 1 To UBound(sortArr, 1) - 1
            If sortArr(j, 2) < sortArr(j + 1, 2) Then
                temp1 = sortArr(j, 1): temp2 = sortArr(j, 2)
                sortArr(j, 1) = sortArr(j + 1, 1): sortArr(j, 2) = sortArr(j + 1, 2)
                sortArr(j + 1, 1) = temp1: sortArr(j + 1, 2) = temp2
                swapped = True
            End If
        Next j
    Loop While swapped
    
    ' TOP 40 nejpoËetnÏjöÌch (pouze # a Tag, bez poËtu)
    Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "Top 40 nejpoËetnÏjöÌch tag˘:")
    Dim wdTable As Object, rowIdx As Long, maxRows As Long
    maxRows = Application.WorksheetFunction.Min(40, UBound(sortArr, 1))
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, maxRows + 1, 2)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.InsideLineStyle = 1: .Borders.OutsideLineStyle = 1
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "#": .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Tag"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        
        For i = 1 To maxRows
            .cell(i + 1, 1).Range.text = CStr(i)
            .cell(i + 1, 2).Range.text = sortArr(i, 1)
        Next i
    End With
    
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6, 0
    wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
    
    ' ============================================================================
    ' TOP 20 tag˘ podle v·ûenÈho pr˘mÏrnÈho hodnocenÌ
    ' ============================================================================
    If dictRatingCnt.count > 0 Then
        Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "Top 20 tag˘ podle v·ûenÈho hodnocenÌ:")
        
        ' Filtrovat tagy s MIN_SUMA_VAH >= 3 a sestavit pole
        Const MIN_SUMA_VAH As Double = 3#
        Dim filteredCount As Long: filteredCount = 0
        For Each k In dictRatingCnt.keys
            If dictRatingCnt(k) >= MIN_SUMA_VAH Then filteredCount = filteredCount + 1
        Next k
        
        If filteredCount > 0 Then
            Dim sortAvgArr() As Variant
            ReDim sortAvgArr(1 To filteredCount, 1 To 2)
            idx = 1
            For Each k In dictRatingCnt.keys
                If dictRatingCnt(k) >= MIN_SUMA_VAH Then
                    sortAvgArr(idx, 1) = k
                    sortAvgArr(idx, 2) = dictRatingSum(k) / dictRatingCnt(k)
                    idx = idx + 1
                End If
            Next k
            
            ' Bubble sort sestupnÏ dle v·ûenÈho hodnocenÌ
            Do
                swapped = False
                For j = 1 To UBound(sortAvgArr, 1) - 1
                    If sortAvgArr(j, 2) < sortAvgArr(j + 1, 2) Then
                        temp1 = sortAvgArr(j, 1): temp2 = sortAvgArr(j, 2)
                        sortAvgArr(j, 1) = sortAvgArr(j + 1, 1): sortAvgArr(j, 2) = sortAvgArr(j + 1, 2)
                        sortAvgArr(j + 1, 1) = temp1: sortAvgArr(j + 1, 2) = temp2
                        swapped = True
                    End If
                Next j
            Loop While swapped
            
            ' Vytvo¯it tabulku TOP 20 (jen # | Tag | V·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ)
            Dim maxRows2 As Long
            maxRows2 = Application.WorksheetFunction.Min(20, UBound(sortAvgArr, 1))
            Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, maxRows2 + 1, 3)
            With wdTable
                .Borders.InsideLineStyle = 1: .Borders.OutsideLineStyle = 1
                .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "#"
                .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Tag"
                .cell(1, 3).Range.text = "V·ûenÈ hodnocenÌ"
                .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
                
                For i = 1 To maxRows2
                    .cell(i + 1, 1).Range.text = CStr(i)
                    .cell(i + 1, 2).Range.text = sortAvgArr(i, 1)
                    .cell(i + 1, 3).Range.text = Format(sortAvgArr(i, 2), "0.00")
                Next i
            End With
            
            wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6, 0
            wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
        End If
    End If
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE H2: Seznam Anime s jejich AniList tagy
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionH2_AnimeWithTags(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "Anime a jejich AniList tagy", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    Dim wsMal As Worksheet
    Dim dataArr As Variant
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next: Set wsMal = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_MAL): On Error GoTo 0
    If wsMal Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    ' Cache: BX = MAL ID, BY = Anime Name, BZ = Tags (tag1:rank;tag2:rank;...)
    lastRow = wsMal.Cells(wsMal.Rows.count, "BX").End(xlUp).row
    If lastRow < 2 Then Exit Sub
    
    dataArr = wsMal.Range("BX2:BZ" & lastRow).Value
    
    ' SpoËÌtat platnÈ ¯·dky
    Dim validCount As Long: validCount = 0
    For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
        If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, 1)) And Len(Trim(CStr(dataArr(i, 2)))) > 0 Then
            validCount = validCount + 1
        End If
    Next i
    
    If validCount = 0 Then
        Call AddParagraph(wdApp, "(é·dn· data k dispozici)")
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' Vytvo¯it tabulku
    Dim wdTable As Object, rowIdx As Long
    Dim tagString As String, cleanTags As String, tagsArr() As String, parts() As String, j As Long
    
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, validCount + 1, 3)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.InsideLineStyle = 1: .Borders.OutsideLineStyle = 1
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "#": .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Anime": .cell(1, 3).Range.text = "AniList Tagy"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        
        rowIdx = 2
        For i = 1 To UBound(dataArr, 1)
            If IsNumeric(dataArr(i, 1)) And Len(Trim(CStr(dataArr(i, 2)))) > 0 Then
                .cell(rowIdx, 1).Range.text = CStr(rowIdx - 1)
                .cell(rowIdx, 2).Range.text = CStr(dataArr(i, 2))
                
                ' P¯evÈst tagy z form·tu "tag1:rank;tag2:rank" na "tag1; tag2; tag3"
                tagString = CStr(dataArr(i, 3)): cleanTags = ""
                If Len(tagString) > 0 Then
                    tagsArr = Split(tagString, ";")
                    For j = LBound(tagsArr) To UBound(tagsArr)
                        parts = Split(tagsArr(j), ":")
                        If UBound(parts) >= 0 Then
                            If Len(cleanTags) > 0 Then cleanTags = cleanTags & "; "
                            cleanTags = cleanTags & Trim(parts(0))
                        End If
                    Next j
                End If
                .cell(rowIdx, 3).Range.text = cleanTags
                rowIdx = rowIdx + 1
            End If
        Next i
    End With
    
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6, 0
    wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE I-J: HODNOCENÕ (z sdÌlen˝ch dat)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionI_Ratings(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "HodnocenÌ Anime", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    If IsEmpty(m_animeData) Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim dictCnt As Object, i As Long, rating As Long
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' Sloupec K = COL_HODNOCENI = 11
    For i = 2 To UBound(m_animeData, 1)
        If IsNumeric(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI)) And m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI) > 0 Then
            rating = CLng(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI))
            dictCnt(rating) = dictCnt(rating) + 1
        End If
    Next i
    
    ' Vytvo¯it tabulku se¯azenou dle hodnocenÌ 10->1
    Dim wdTable As Object, rowIdx As Long
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, 11, 2)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.InsideLineStyle = 1: .Borders.OutsideLineStyle = 1
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "HodnocenÌ": .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "PoËet anime"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        
        rowIdx = 2
        For rating = 10 To 1 Step -1
            .cell(rowIdx, 1).Range.text = CStr(rating)
            .cell(rowIdx, 2).Range.text = IIf(dictCnt.Exists(rating), CStr(dictCnt(rating)), "0")
            rowIdx = rowIdx + 1
        Next rating
    End With
    
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6, 0
    wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

Private Sub SectionJ_RatingsInteractive(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "HodnocenÌ Interactive", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    Dim wsMal As Worksheet
    On Error Resume Next: Set wsMal = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_MAL): On Error GoTo 0
    If Not wsMal Is Nothing Then
        Dim lr As Long: lr = wsMal.Cells(wsMal.Rows.count, "BE").End(xlUp).row
        If lr > 1 Then Call CreateTableFromRange(wdApp, wdDoc, wsMal, "BE1:BF" & lr, True)
    End If
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE K-L: Top Anime, Fav Chars (IN-MEMORY z Shapes)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionK_TopAnime(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "NejlepöÌ Anime", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    ' »teme z shapes na OBECN… INFORMACE
    Dim ws As Worksheet, shp As Shape
    Dim i As Long, animeName As String
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_GEN)
    
    Dim wdTable As Object
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, 11, 2)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.Enable = True: .AutoFitBehavior 1
        .Range.Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Range.Font.size = TABLE_FONT_SIZE
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "Pozice": .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Anime"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        
        For i = 1 To 10
            On Error Resume Next
            Set shp = ws.Shapes("Top10_Anime_" & i)
            If Not shp Is Nothing Then
                animeName = shp.AlternativeText
                If Len(animeName) = 0 Then animeName = "[Nezn·mÈ]"
            Else
                animeName = "[N/A]"
            End If
            On Error GoTo 0
            .cell(i + 1, 1).Range.text = CStr(i)
            .cell(i + 1, 2).Range.text = animeName
        Next i
    End With
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6: wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

Private Sub SectionK2_HonourableMentions(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "Honourable Mentions", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    ' »teme z shapes HM_Anime_* na OBECN… INFORMACE
    Dim ws As Worksheet, shp As Shape
    Dim i As Long, animeName As String, hmCount As Long
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_GEN)
    
    ' Zjistit kolik HM existuje (max 20)
    hmCount = 0
    For i = 1 To 20
        On Error Resume Next
        Set shp = ws.Shapes("HM_Anime_" & i)
        If Not shp Is Nothing Then
            If Len(Trim(shp.AlternativeText)) > 0 Then hmCount = hmCount + 1
        End If
        Set shp = Nothing
        On Error GoTo 0
    Next i
    
    If hmCount = 0 Then Exit Sub ' é·dnÈ HM
    
    Dim wdTable As Object
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, hmCount + 1, 2)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.Enable = True: .AutoFitBehavior 1
        .Range.Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Range.Font.size = TABLE_FONT_SIZE
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "Pozice": .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Anime"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        
        Dim rowIdx As Long: rowIdx = 2
        For i = 1 To 20
            On Error Resume Next
            Set shp = ws.Shapes("HM_Anime_" & i)
            If Not shp Is Nothing Then
                animeName = shp.AlternativeText
                If Len(Trim(animeName)) > 0 Then
                    .cell(rowIdx, 1).Range.text = CStr(i)
                    .cell(rowIdx, 2).Range.text = animeName
                    rowIdx = rowIdx + 1
                End If
            End If
            Set shp = Nothing
            On Error GoTo 0
        Next i
    End With
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6: wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

Private Sub SectionL_FavCharacters(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "NejoblÌbenÏjöÌ postavy", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    Dim ws As Worksheet, shp As Shape
    Dim i As Long, charText As String
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets(SH_GEN)
    
    Dim wdTable As Object
    Set wdTable = wdDoc.Tables.Add(wdApp.Selection.Range, 11, 2)
    With wdTable
        .Borders.Enable = True: .AutoFitBehavior 1
        .Range.Font.Name = FONT_NAME: .Range.Font.size = TABLE_FONT_SIZE
        .cell(1, 1).Range.text = "Pozice": .cell(1, 2).Range.text = "Postava (Anime)"
        .Rows(1).Range.Font.Bold = True
        
        For i = 1 To 10
            charText = "[N/A]"
            On Error Resume Next
            ' »teme z Top10_CharAnime_* (obsahuje "JmÈno, SÈrie")
            Set shp = ws.Shapes("Top10_CharAnime_" & i)
            If Not shp Is Nothing Then
                charText = shp.TextFrame.Characters.text
                If Len(Trim(charText)) = 0 Then charText = "[N/A]"
            End If
            On Error GoTo 0
            .cell(i + 1, 1).Range.text = CStr(i)
            .cell(i + 1, 2).Range.text = charText
        Next i
    End With
    wdApp.Selection.EndOf 6: wdApp.Selection.TypeParagraph
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE M: Dabing (z sdÌlen˝ch dat)
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionM_Dub(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "Dabing", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    If IsEmpty(m_animeData) Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim dictCnt As Object, dictSum As Object, dictRatingCnt As Object
    Dim i As Long, dubVal As String, dubParts As Variant, singleDub As String
    
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSum = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictRatingCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    For i = 2 To UBound(m_animeData, 1)
        dubVal = Trim(CStr(m_animeData(i, COL_DUB)))
        If Len(dubVal) > 0 Then
            dubParts = Split(dubVal, ";")
            Dim j As Long
            For j = LBound(dubParts) To UBound(dubParts)
                singleDub = Trim(CStr(dubParts(j)))
                If Len(singleDub) > 0 Then
                    dictCnt(singleDub) = dictCnt(singleDub) + 1
                    If IsNumeric(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI)) And m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI) > 0 Then
                        dictSum(singleDub) = dictSum(singleDub) + CDbl(m_animeData(i, COL_HODNOCENI))
                        dictRatingCnt(singleDub) = dictRatingCnt(singleDub) + 1
                    End If
                End If
            Next j
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictCnt.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    Call CreateTableFromDictWithRating(wdApp, wdDoc, dictCnt, dictSum, dictRatingCnt, "Dabing", "PoËet", "Pr˘m. hodnocenÌ")
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' SEKCE N: Status (z sdÌlen˝ch dat) - slouËit Existuje...
' ==================================================================================================
Private Sub SectionN_Status(wdDoc As Object, wdApp As Object)
    Call AddHeading(wdApp, "Status", HEADING1_FONT_SIZE)
    
    If IsEmpty(m_animeData) Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim dictCnt As Object, i As Long, statusVal As String
    Set dictCnt = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    For i = 2 To UBound(m_animeData, 1)
        statusVal = Trim(CStr(m_animeData(i, COL_STATUS)))
        If Len(statusVal) > 0 Then
            ' SlouËit vöechny "Existuje..." do jednÈ kategorie
            If InStr(1, statusVal, "Existuje", vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                statusVal = "Existuje pokraËov·nÌ"
            End If
            dictCnt(statusVal) = dictCnt(statusVal) + 1
        End If
    Next i
    
    If dictCnt.count = 0 Then Exit Sub
    Call CreateTableFromDict(wdApp, wdDoc, dictCnt, "Status", "PoËet")
End Sub
