End Sub

' ***********************************************************************************
' * HLAVNÕ SPOUäTÃCÕ PROCEDURA                                                      *
' ***********************************************************************************
Sub ExportAllToWord_Master(Optional ByVal exportMode As Integer = 3, Optional ByVal overwriteExisting As Boolean = False)
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, r As Long
    Dim wordApp As Object, fso As Object
    
    LogToFile "[Ratings] Starting ExportAllToWord_Master (Mode=" & exportMode & ")"
    
    If Not MountVirtualDrive(VIRTUAL_DRIVE, PATH_ROOT_LONG) Then
        LogToFile "[Ratings] ERROR: Failed to mount virtual drive " & VIRTUAL_DRIVE
        If Application.Visible Then MsgBox "Nepoda¯ilo se p¯ipojit virtu·lnÌ disk " & VIRTUAL_DRIVE, vbCritical
        Exit Sub
    End If
    LogToFile "[Ratings] Virtual drive mounted."
    
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    Dim dictMain As Object: Set dictMain = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dictMain.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("ANIME LIST")
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.count, "C").End(xlUp).row
    
    If lastRow < 2 Then
        If Application.Visible Then MsgBox "é·dn· data k exportu.", vbExclamation
        GoTo CleanExit
    End If
    
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    
    ' Ensure folders
    If exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 2 Then
        EnsureFolder fso, PATH_OUT_RATINGS
        EnsureFolder fso, PATH_OUT_MERGED_ANIME
    End If
    If exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 3 Then
        EnsureFolder fso, PATH_OUT_MERGED_SERIES
    End If
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wordApp = GetObject(, "Word.Application")
    If wordApp Is Nothing Then Set wordApp = CreateObject("Word.Application")
    On Error GoTo CleanExit
    
    wordApp.Visible = False
    ToggleSpeed True, wordApp
    
    ' NaËtenÌ dat do pole (sloupce A aû L)
    Dim arrData As Variant
    If lastRow >= 2 Then arrData = ws.Range(ws.Cells(2, 1), ws.Cells(lastRow, 12)).Value

    
    Dim dictRatingComments As Object, dictSeriesComments As Object
    Set dictRatingComments = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    Set dictSeriesComments = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    
    ' NaËÌst koment·¯e hromadnÏ (p¯es kolekci ws.Comments - mnohem rychlejöÌ)
    Dim cmt As Comment
    For Each cmt In ws.Comments
        If cmt.Parent.Column = 11 Then ' Sloupec K (Rating)
            dictRatingComments(cmt.Parent.row) = cmt.text
        ElseIf cmt.Parent.Column = 3 Then ' Sloupec C (N·zev/SÈrie)
            dictSeriesComments(cmt.Parent.row) = cmt.text
        End If
    Next cmt

    
    Dim dictFiles As Object: Set dictFiles = LoadFileCache(fso, PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS)
    Dim animeName As String, cleanName As String, commentText As String, seriesName As String
    Dim hasRatingNote As Boolean, analysisPath As String, startDate As Variant
    
    LogToFile "[Ratings] Processing " & UBound(arrData, 1) & " anime entries..."
    
    For r = 1 To UBound(arrData, 1)
        animeName = Trim(CStr(arrData(r, 3)))
        If animeName <> "" Then
            If r Mod 5 = 0 Then
                ReportProgress 60 + (r / UBound(arrData, 1)) * 20, 100, "NaËÌt·m data: " & animeName
            End If
            If r Mod 50 = 0 Then Application.StatusBar = "Zpracov·v·m: " & animeName

            cleanName = CleanFileName(animeName)
            startDate = arrData(r, 12)
            
            analysisPath = ""
            If dictFiles.Exists(cleanName & ".docx") Then analysisPath = PATH_SRC_ANALYSIS & cleanName & ".docx"
            
            ' 1. ZÕSK¡NÕ TEXTU HODNOCENÕ
            hasRatingNote = False
            commentText = PLACEHOLDER_TEXT
            
            If dictRatingComments.Exists(r + 1) Then
                If Trim(dictRatingComments(r + 1)) <> "" Then
                    commentText = dictRatingComments(r + 1)
                    hasRatingNote = True
                End If
            End If
            
            ' 2. ZÕSK¡NÕ N¡ZVU S…RIE
            seriesName = ""
            If dictSeriesComments.Exists(r + 1) Then
                seriesName = ExtractSeriesName(dictSeriesComments(r + 1))
            End If
            
            ' EXPORTY JEDNOTLIVðCH SOUBORŸ (PODMÕNKA: REéIM 1 nebo 2)
            If exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 2 Then
                If hasRatingNote Then
                    Dim pathRating As String, pathMerged As String
                    Dim skipRating As Boolean, skipMerged As Boolean
                    
                    pathRating = PATH_OUT_RATINGS & cleanName & ".docx"
                    pathMerged = PATH_OUT_MERGED_ANIME & cleanName & ".docx"
                    
                    skipRating = Not overwriteExisting And fso.FileExists(pathRating)
                    skipMerged = Not overwriteExisting And fso.FileExists(pathMerged)
                    
                    If Not skipRating Then
                        CreateWordDoc_RatingOnly wordApp, cleanName, commentText, PATH_OUT_RATINGS
                    End If
                    
                    If Not skipMerged Then
                        CreateWordDoc_MergedAnime wordApp, cleanName, commentText, analysisPath, PATH_OUT_MERGED_ANIME
                    End If
                End If
            End If
            
            Dim storageKey As String, displayTitle As String
            If seriesName <> "" Then
                storageKey = CleanFileName(seriesName)
                displayTitle = seriesName
            Else
                storageKey = cleanName
                displayTitle = animeName
            End If
            Dim dateVal As Date
            If IsDate(startDate) Then dateVal = CDate(startDate) Else dateVal = DateSerial(1900, 1, 1)
            
            If Not dictMain.Exists(storageKey) Then dictMain.Add storageKey, New Collection
            dictMain(storageKey).Add Array(dateVal, animeName, commentText, analysisPath, displayTitle)
        End If
    Next r

If (exportMode = 1 Or exportMode = 3) And dictMain.count > 0 Then
Dim key As Variant, colData As Collection, counter As Long
counter = 0

' LOG: ZaË·tek sÈrie generace
LogToFile "=== S…RIE EXPORT START ==="
LogToFile "dictMain.count = " & dictMain.count
LogToFile "exportMode = " & exportMode & ", overwriteExisting = " & overwriteExisting

For Each key In dictMain.keys
    counter = counter + 1
    ReportProgress 80 + (counter / dictMain.count) * 19, 100, "Generuji sÈrie: " & left(CStr(key), 30)
    Application.StatusBar = "Generuji sÈrie (" & counter & "/" & dictMain.count & "): " & left(CStr(key), 30)
    
    ' Zabr·nit tomu, aby neoËek·van· chyba p¯i t¯ÌdÏnÌ nebo zpracov·nÌ jednÈ sÈrie zruöila cel˝ export
    On Error Resume Next
    Set colData = SortCollectionByDate(dictMain(key))
    
    If err.Number <> 0 Then
        LogToFile "  --> ERROR in Preparation/Sort: " & err.Description
        err.Clear
        Set colData = New Collection ' PokraËujeme pr·zdnou kolekcÌ nebo se p¯eskoËÌ
    End If
    On Error GoTo CleanExit ' Restore clean exit logic for fatal outside-loop errors

    Dim docTitle As String: docTitle = CStr(key)
    If colData.count > 0 Then
        Dim firstItem As Variant: firstItem = colData(1)
        If UBound(firstItem) >= 4 And firstItem(4) <> "" Then docTitle = firstItem(4)
    End If
    ' Correct path constant
    Dim pathSeries As String: pathSeries = PATH_OUT_MERGED_SERIES & CleanFileName(docTitle) & ".docx"
    
    LogToFile "[" & counter & "/" & dictMain.count & "] KEY=" & CStr(key) & " TITLE=" & docTitle & " PATH=" & pathSeries
    
    If overwriteExisting Or Not fso.FileExists(pathSeries) Then
        ' Per-item error handling ó pokud jeden soubor selûe, pokraËuj s dalöÌm
        LogToFile "  --> Creating (overwrite=" & overwriteExisting & ", exists=" & fso.FileExists(pathSeries) & ")"
        On Error Resume Next
        CreateWordDoc_Unified wordApp, docTitle, colData, PATH_OUT_MERGED_SERIES
        If err.Number <> 0 Then
            Debug.Print "Series CHYBA [" & docTitle & "]: " & err.Description
            LogToFile "  --> ERROR: " & err.Description
            err.Clear
        Else
            LogToFile "  --> SUCCESS"
        End If
        
        Set colData = Nothing
        DoEvents
        Sleep 200
        LogToFile "  --> Loop End (Pre-Next)"
        
        On Error GoTo CleanExit
    Else
        LogToFile "  --> SKIPPED (file exists, overwrite=False)"
    End If
Next key
LogToFile "=== S…RIE EXPORT END ==="
End If

CleanExit:
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' ObnovenÌ nastavenÌ
    ToggleSpeed False, wordApp
    
    If Not wordApp Is Nothing Then
        wordApp.ScreenUpdating = True
        wordApp.Quit
        Set wordApp = Nothing
    End If
    Set fso = Nothing
    UnmountVirtualDrive VIRTUAL_DRIVE
    
    Application.StatusBar = False
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    
    If Application.Visible Then
        If err.Number = 0 Then
            'MsgBox "Hotovo! Export v reûimu " & exportMode & " dokonËen.", vbInformation
        Else
            MsgBox "Chyba: " & err.Description, vbCritical
        End If
    End If
End Sub

Sub CreateWordDoc_Unified(wApp As Object, title As String, colItems As Collection, path As String)
On Error GoTo DocErr
Dim doc As Object, item As Variant, i As Long
Set doc = wApp.Documents.Add
With doc.Range(0, 0)
.InsertAfter "S…RIE: " & UCase(title) & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
.Font.Name = "Calibri": .Font.size = 24: .Font.Bold = True: .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 1
End With

For i = 1 To colItems.count
item = colItems(i)
If i > 1 Then doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertBreak 7
With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
    .text = "ANIME: " & UCase(item(1)) & " (" & Format(item(0), "yyyy") & ")" & vbCrLf
    .Font.Name = "Calibri": .Font.size = 18: .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 139)
End With
AddSectionHeader doc, "1. OSOBNÕ HODNOCENÕ"
With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
    .InsertAfter item(2) & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
    .Font.size = 11: .Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
    .Font.Italic = (item(2) = PLACEHOLDER_TEXT)
End With
If item(3) <> "" Then
    AddSeparator doc
    AddSectionHeader doc, "2. FAKTICKð ROZBOR"
    On Error Resume Next: doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertFile item(3): On Error GoTo DocErr
Else
    doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertAfter vbCrLf & "[Faktick˝ rozbor nenÌ k dispozici]" & vbCrLf
End If
Next i
RemoveSuperscripts doc
doc.SaveAs2 path & CleanFileName(title) & ".docx"
doc.Close False
Exit Sub

DocErr:
    On Error Resume Next
    If Not doc Is Nothing Then doc.Close False
    On Error GoTo 0
    err.Raise err.Number, err.Source, "CreateWordDoc_Unified [" & title & "]: " & err.Description
End Sub

Sub CreateWordDoc_RatingOnly(wApp As Object, fName As String, cText As String, path As String)
Dim doc As Object: Set doc = wApp.Documents.Add
With doc.Content: .InsertAfter cText: .Font.Name = "Calibri": .Font.size = 11: End With
doc.SaveAs2 path & fName & ".docx": doc.Close False
End Sub

Sub CreateWordDoc_MergedAnime(wApp As Object, fName As String, cText As String, aPath As String, path As String)
Dim doc As Object: Set doc = wApp.Documents.Add
AddSectionHeader doc, "MOJE HODNOCENÕ (" & fName & ")"
doc.Content.InsertAfter cText & vbCrLf & vbCrLf
If aPath <> "" Then
AddSeparator doc
AddSectionHeader doc, "FAKTICKð ROZBOR (GEMINI AI)"
doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1).InsertFile aPath
RemoveSuperscripts doc
End If
doc.SaveAs2 path & fName & ".docx": doc.Close False
End Sub

Sub ToggleSpeed(ByVal speedUp As Boolean, Optional wApp As Object = Nothing)
    On Error Resume Next
    If speedUp Then
        Application.ScreenUpdating = False
        Application.Calculation = -4135 ' xlCalculationManual
        Application.EnableEvents = False
        Application.DisplayStatusBar = True
        
        If Not wApp Is Nothing Then
            wApp.ScreenUpdating = False
            wApp.DisplayAlerts = 0 ' wdAlertsNone
            wApp.Options.CheckSpellingAsYouType = False
            wApp.Options.CheckGrammarAsYouType = False
            wApp.Options.Pagination = False
        End If
    Else
        Application.ScreenUpdating = True
        Application.Calculation = -4105 ' xlCalculationAutomatic
        Application.EnableEvents = True
        Application.DisplayStatusBar = True
        
        If Not wApp Is Nothing Then
            wApp.ScreenUpdating = True
            wApp.DisplayAlerts = -1 ' wdAlertsAll
            wApp.Options.CheckSpellingAsYouType = True
            wApp.Options.CheckGrammarAsYouType = True
            wApp.Options.Pagination = True
        End If
    End If
End Sub

Sub EnsureFolder(fso As Object, path As String)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim parts() As String, buildPath As String, i As Long
    ' Remove drive letter if present for splitting logic, but keep it for building path
    Dim drive As String
    drive = ""
    If InStr(path, ":") > 0 Then
        drive = left(path, InStr(path, ":"))
        path = Mid(path, Len(drive) + 1)
    End If
    
    parts = Split(path, "\")
    buildPath = drive
    
    For i = 0 To UBound(parts)
        If parts(i) <> "" Then
            buildPath = buildPath & "\" & parts(i)
            ' Fix double slash issue if present
            buildPath = Replace(buildPath, drive & "\\", drive & "\")
            If Not fso.FolderExists(buildPath) Then fso.CreateFolder buildPath
        End If
    Next i
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

Function LoadFileCache(fso As Object, folderPath As String) As Object
Dim dict As Object: Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary"): dict.CompareMode = vbTextCompare
If Right(folderPath, 1) <> "\" Then folderPath = folderPath & "\"
If fso.FolderExists(folderPath) Then
    Dim fName As String: fName = Dir(folderPath & "*.*", vbNormal)
    Do While fName <> "": dict(fName) = True: fName = Dir: Loop
End If
Set LoadFileCache = dict
End Function

Function ExtractSeriesName(txt As String) As String
Dim lines As Variant, line As Variant, rawLine As String
If Trim(txt) = "" Then ExtractSeriesName = "": Exit Function
lines = Split(Replace(txt, vbCr, vbLf), vbLf)
For Each line In lines
    rawLine = Trim(line)
    If InStr(1, rawLine, "N·zev sÈrie:", vbTextCompare) = 1 Or _
       InStr(1, rawLine, "SÈrie:", vbTextCompare) = 1 Then
        ExtractSeriesName = Trim(Mid(rawLine, InStr(rawLine, ":") + 1)): Exit Function
    End If
Next line
ExtractSeriesName = ""
End Function

Sub AddSectionHeader(doc As Object, txt As String)
With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
    .InsertAfter txt & vbCrLf
    .Font.Name = "Arial": .Font.size = 14: .Font.Bold = True: .Font.Underline = True: .Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
    .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 0
End With
End Sub

Sub AddSeparator(doc As Object)
    With doc.Range(doc.Content.End - 1, doc.Content.End - 1)
        .InsertAfter String(30, "-") & vbCrLf
        .Font.Bold = False: .ParagraphFormat.Alignment = 1
    End With
End Sub

' Funkce pro odstranÏnÌ hornÌch index˘ (citacÌ)
Sub RemoveSuperscripts(doc As Object)
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' VypnutÌ sledov·nÌ zmÏn pro tento dokument
    doc.TrackRevisions = False
    
    ' 1. Smazat skuteËnÈ Footnotes/Endnotes
    Dim i As Long
    If doc.Footnotes.count > 0 Then
        For i = doc.Footnotes.count To 1 Step -1: doc.Footnotes(i).Delete: Next i
    End If
    If doc.Endnotes.count > 0 Then
        For i = doc.Endnotes.count To 1 Step -1: doc.Endnotes(i).Delete: Next i
    End If
    
    ' 2. Smazat specifickÈ Unicode znaky (123...) - JEDNA TÿÕDA ZNAKŸ (Wildcard)
    Dim strWildcard As String
    strWildcard = "[" & ChrW(&H2070) & ChrW(&HB9) & ChrW(&HB2) & ChrW(&HB3) & _
                  ChrW(&H2074) & ChrW(&H2075) & ChrW(&H2076) & ChrW(&H2077) & _
                  ChrW(&H2078) & ChrW(&H2079) & "]"
                  
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = strWildcard
        .Replacement.text = ""
        .Forward = True
        .wrap = 1 ' wdFindContinue
        .Format = False
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2 ' wdReplaceAll
    End With
    
    ' 3. Smazat form·tovan˝ text (Superscript = True)
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .Font.Superscript = True
        .text = ""
        .Replacement.text = ""
        .Forward = True
        .wrap = 1 ' wdFindContinue
        .Format = True
        .MatchWildcards = False
        .Execute Replace:=2 ' wdReplaceAll
    End With
    
    ' 4a. Smazat ËÌsla hned za teËkou
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = "([!0-9])\.([0-9]@)"
        .Replacement.text = "\1."
        .Forward = True
        .wrap = 1
        .Format = False
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2
    End With
    
    ' 4b. Smazat ËÌsla na ˙plnÈm konci odstavce
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = "\.([0-9]@)^13"
        .Replacement.text = ".^13"
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2
    End With
    
    ' 5. Smazat citace v hranat˝ch z·vork·ch
    With doc.Content.Find
        .ClearFormatting
        .Replacement.ClearFormatting
        .text = "\[[0-9]@\]"
        .Replacement.text = ""
        .MatchWildcards = True
        .Execute Replace:=2
    End With
    
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

Function ExtractSortNumber(ByVal txt As String) As Long
    Dim i As Long, sNum As String: txt = UCase(txt): sNum = ""
    For i = 1 To Len(txt)
        If IsNumeric(Mid(txt, i, 1)) Then
            sNum = sNum & Mid(txt, i, 1)
        Else
            If sNum <> "" Then Exit For
        End If
    Next i
    ExtractSortNumber = IIf(sNum = "", 0, CLng(sNum))
End Function

' ==============================================================================
' SECTION 3: NOTEBOOKLM LOGIC
' ==============================================================================
' NotebookLM update je nynÌ kompletnÏ ¯eöen v run_background_update.py,
' kter˝ se spouötÌ p¯es RunPythonOrchestrator().

' ==============================================================================
' SHARED HELPERS
' ==============================================================================

Function CleanFileName(ByVal rawName As String) As String
    Dim s As String: s = rawName
    s = Replace(s, ":", "_"): s = Replace(s, "/", " "): s = Replace(s, "\", "")
    s = Replace(s, "*", ""): s = Replace(s, "?", ""): s = Replace(s, """", "")
    s = Replace(s, "<", ""): s = Replace(s, ">", ""): s = Replace(s, "|", "")
    CleanFileName = Application.Trim(s)
End Function

' --- PROGRESS REPORTING HELPER ---
Sub ReportProgress(ByVal current As Long, ByVal total As Long, ByVal msg As String)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim fso As Object, ts As Object
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    ' Write progress in format: current|total|message
    Set ts = fso.CreateTextFile(PROGRESS_FILE, True, False)
    ts.WriteLine current & "|" & total & "|" & msg
    ts.Close
    Set ts = Nothing: Set fso = Nothing
End Sub


Function MountVirtualDrive(driveLetter As String, targetPath As String) As Boolean
    Dim wsh As Object, fso As Object
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    If fso.DriveExists(driveLetter) Then MountVirtualDrive = True: Exit Function
    Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
    If Right(targetPath, 1) = "\" Then targetPath = left(targetPath, Len(targetPath) - 1)
    On Error Resume Next
    wsh.Run "subst " & driveLetter & " """ & targetPath & """", 0, True
    MountVirtualDrive = fso.DriveExists(driveLetter)
End Function

Sub UnmountVirtualDrive(driveLetter As String)
    Dim wsh As Object: Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
    On Error Resume Next: wsh.Run "subst " & driveLetter & " /d", 0, True
End Sub

' --- RATINGS SORTING LOGIC ---
Function SortCollectionByDate(col As Collection) As Collection
    Dim i As Long
    Dim arr() As Variant
    Dim sortedCol As New Collection
    
    If col.count = 0 Then Set SortCollectionByDate = col: Exit Function
    
    ' P¯evod Collection -> Array
    ReDim arr(1 To col.count)
    For i = 1 To col.count: arr(i) = col(i): Next i
    
    ' QuickSort (Uû pouûÌv·me typovan· data, takûe û·dnÈ konverze uvnit¯)
    QuickSort arr, LBound(arr), UBound(arr)
    
    ' P¯evod Array -> Collection
    For i = 1 To UBound(arr): sortedCol.Add arr(i): Next i
    Set SortCollectionByDate = sortedCol
End Function

Sub QuickSort(vArray As Variant, inLow As Long, inHigh As Long)
    Dim pivot   As Variant
    Dim tmpSwap As Variant
    Dim tmpLow  As Long
    Dim tmpHigh As Long
    
    tmpLow = inLow
    tmpHigh = inHigh
    
    pivot = vArray((inLow + inHigh) \ 2)
    
    While (tmpLow <= tmpHigh)
        While (CompareItems(vArray(tmpLow), pivot) < 0 And tmpLow < inHigh)
            tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
        Wend
        
        While (CompareItems(pivot, vArray(tmpHigh)) < 0 And tmpHigh > inLow)
            tmpHigh = tmpHigh - 1
        Wend
        
        If (tmpLow <= tmpHigh) Then
            tmpSwap = vArray(tmpLow)
            vArray(tmpLow) = vArray(tmpHigh)
            vArray(tmpHigh) = tmpSwap
            tmpLow = tmpLow + 1
            tmpHigh = tmpHigh - 1
        End If
    Wend
    
    If (inLow < tmpHigh) Then QuickSort vArray, inLow, tmpHigh
    If (tmpLow < inHigh) Then QuickSort vArray, tmpLow, inHigh
End Sub

Function CompareItems(v1 As Variant, v2 As Variant) As Integer
    Dim d1 As Date, d2 As Date
    
    ' Oöet¯enÌ pr·zdnÈho data (DATA Ué JSOU TYPU DATE dÌky ˙pravÏ v hlavnÌm loopu)
    d1 = v1(0)
    d2 = v2(0)
    
    If d1 < d2 Then
        CompareItems = -1
    ElseIf d1 > d2 Then
        CompareItems = 1
    Else
        ' Data jsou stejn·, porovn·me ËÌsla v n·zvu
        Dim n1 As Long, n2 As Long
        n1 = ExtractSortNumber_NLM(CStr(v1(1)))
        n2 = ExtractSortNumber_NLM(CStr(v2(1)))
        
        If n1 < n2 Then
            CompareItems = -1
        ElseIf n1 > n2 Then
            CompareItems = 1
        Else
            CompareItems = 0
        End If
    End If
End Function

' --- POMOCN¡ FUNKCE PRO ZÕSK¡NÕ »ÕSLA Z N¡ZVU (Extrahov·no z GOOD_Rating_EXPORT.bas) ---
Private Function ExtractSortNumber_NLM(ByVal txt As String) As Long
    Dim i As Long, sNum As String
    txt = UCase(txt)
    sNum = ""
    
    ' Najde prvnÌ sekvenci ËÌslic v textu
    For i = 1 To Len(txt)
        If IsNumeric(Mid(txt, i, 1)) Then
            sNum = sNum & Mid(txt, i, 1)
        Else
            ' Pokud uû jsme ËÌslo naöli a teÔ je tam pÌsmeno, konËÌme (aby S10 nebylo 10 ale S1 a S2)
            If sNum <> "" Then Exit For
        End If
    Next i
    
    If sNum = "" Then
        ExtractSortNumber_NLM = 0 ' Pokud n·zev nem· ËÌslo, je to 0
    Else
        ExtractSortNumber_NLM = CLng(sNum)
    End If
End Function

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: QuickSort pro pole index˘ (sestupnÏ/vzestupnÏ)
' ==================================================================================================
Sub QuickSortIndices(ByRef indices() As Long, ByRef dataArr As Variant, ByVal sortCol As Long, ByVal lowIdx As Long, ByVal highIdx As Long, ByVal descending As Boolean)
    If lowIdx >= highIdx Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim pivotIdx As Long, i As Long, j As Long, tempIdx As Long
    Dim pivotVal As Variant
    
    pivotIdx = (lowIdx + highIdx) \ 2
    pivotVal = dataArr(indices(pivotIdx), sortCol)
    i = lowIdx: j = highIdx
    
    Do While i <= j
        If descending Then
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(i), sortCol), pivotVal) > 0: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(j), sortCol), pivotVal) < 0: j = j - 1: Loop
        Else
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(i), sortCol), pivotVal) < 0: i = i + 1: Loop
            Do While CompareValues(dataArr(indices(j), sortCol), pivotVal) > 0: j = j - 1: Loop
        End If
        
        If i <= j Then
            tempIdx = indices(i): indices(i) = indices(j): indices(j) = tempIdx
            i = i + 1: j = j - 1
        End If
    Loop
    
    If lowIdx < j Then QuickSortIndices indices, dataArr, sortCol, lowIdx, j, descending
    If i < highIdx Then QuickSortIndices indices, dataArr, sortCol, i, highIdx, descending
End Sub

' ==================================================================================================
' HELPER: Porovn·nÌ hodnot (Date, Number, String)
' ==================================================================================================
Function CompareValues(val1 As Variant, val2 As Variant) As Long
    ' VracÌ: -1 pokud val1 < val2, 0 pokud =, 1 pokud val1 > val2
    On Error Resume Next
    
    ' Oöet¯it pr·zdnÈ hodnoty
    If IsEmpty(val1) Or IsNull(val1) Or val1 = "" Then
        If IsEmpty(val2) Or IsNull(val2) Or val2 = "" Then
            CompareValues = 0
        Else
            CompareValues = -1  ' Pr·zdnÈ na konec
        End If
        Exit Function
    End If
    If IsEmpty(val2) Or IsNull(val2) Or val2 = "" Then
        CompareValues = 1
        Exit Function
    End If
    
    ' Porovnat datumy
    If IsDate(val1) And IsDate(val2) Then
        If CDate(val1) < CDate(val2) Then
            CompareValues = -1
        ElseIf CDate(val1) > CDate(val2) Then
            CompareValues = 1
        Else
            CompareValues = 0
        End If
    ' Porovnat ËÌsla
    ElseIf IsNumeric(val1) And IsNumeric(val2) Then
        If CDbl(val1) < CDbl(val2) Then
            CompareValues = -1
        ElseIf CDbl(val1) > CDbl(val2) Then
            CompareValues = 1
        Else
            CompareValues = 0
        End If
    ' Porovnat stringy
    Else
        CompareValues = StrComp(CStr(val1), CStr(val2), vbTextCompare)
    End If
    
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function


' --- FILE LOGGING HELPER (Pro headless Excel debugging) ---
Sub LogToFile(msg As String)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim fso As Object, ts As Object, logPath As String
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    ' PouûÌt spolehliv˝ path - OneDrive sloûka
    logPath = "C:\Users\macou\OneDrive - äKODA AUTO VYSOK¡ äKOLA o.p.s\OsobnÌ PC\Excel Projekt - nemazat\Anime_List\vba_series_export.log"
    Set ts = fso.OpenTextFile(logPath, 8, True) ' 8=Append
    ts.WriteLine Format(Now, "yyyy-mm-dd hh:nn:ss") & " | " & msg
    ts.Close
    Set ts = Nothing
    Set fso = Nothing
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub









--- KONEC K”DU [NotebookLM_Updater] ---

Modul: Gemini_3window_Helper
--- ZA»¡TEK K”DU [Gemini_3window_Helper] ---
Option Explicit

' --- DEKLARACE WINDOWS API (64-bit kompatibilnÌ) ---
#If VBA7 Then
    Declare PtrSafe Sub Sleep Lib "kernel32" (ByVal dwMilliseconds As Long)
    Declare PtrSafe Function GetForegroundWindow Lib "user32" () As LongPtr
    ' Funkce pro zruöenÌ maximalizace
    Declare PtrSafe Function ShowWindow Lib "user32" (ByVal hwnd As LongPtr, ByVal nCmdShow As Long) As Long
    Declare PtrSafe Function SetWindowPos Lib "user32" ( _
        ByVal hwnd As LongPtr, ByVal hWndInsertAfter As LongPtr, _
        ByVal X As Long, ByVal Y As Long, ByVal cx As Long, ByVal cy As Long, _
        ByVal wFlags As Long) As Long
#End If

' --- HLAVNÕ MAKRO ---
Sub OtevriGeminiNaTretinyVedlejsiMonitor()
    Dim i As Integer
    Dim url As String
    #If VBA7 Then
        Dim hwnd As LongPtr
    #Else
        Dim hwnd As Long
    #End If
    Dim poziceX As Long
    Dim sirkaOkna As Long
    Dim vyskaOkna As Long
    Dim korekceOkraje As Long
    Dim posunMonitoruX As Long
    Dim chromePath As String
    
    ' Konstanta pro obnovenÌ okna do norm·lnÌ velikosti
    Const SW_RESTORE As Long = 9
    
    ' NastavenÌ parametr˘
    url = "https://gemini.google.com/"
    korekceOkraje = 7     ' Neviditeln˝ stÌn okna ve Windows (obvykle 7 nebo 8 pixel˘)
    posunMonitoruX = 1920 ' Posun o cel˝ prvnÌ monitor (öÌ¯ka 1920 px)
    
    ' äÌ¯ka je 640 (t¯etina z 1920) + rozöÌ¯enÌ o lev˝ i prav˝ neviditeln˝ okraj
    sirkaOkna = 640 + (korekceOkraje * 2)
    vyskaOkna = 1040      ' 1080 minus odhadovan· v˝öka spodnÌ liöty Windows
    
    chromePath = """C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe"""
    
    For i = 1 To 3
        ' 1. Krok: Otev¯enÌ novÈho samostatnÈho okna Chromu
        Shell chromePath & " --new-window " & url, vbNormalFocus
        
        ' 2. Krok: Pauza 1200 milisekund (1,2 vte¯iny), aby okno stihlo vyskoËit
        Sleep 1200
        
        ' 3. Krok: ZachycenÌ tohoto novÈho okna (kterÈ je teÔ aktivnÌ vp¯edu)
        hwnd = GetForegroundWindow()
        
        ' 4. Krok: VynucenÈ zruöenÌ maximalizace okna (splasknutÌ do norm·lnÌho reûimu)
        ShowWindow hwnd, SW_RESTORE
        
        ' Drobn· pauza, aby systÈm stihl okno vizu·lnÏ zmenöit p¯ed jeho p¯esunem
        Sleep 200
        
        ' 5. Krok: V˝poËet pozice na ose X (posun na 2. monitor a korekce okraje)
        poziceX = posunMonitoruX + ((i - 1) * 640) - korekceOkraje
        
        ' 6. Krok: PosunutÌ a zmÏna velikosti okna
        ' Parametry: hwnd, 0 (Z-order), X, Y (0 = ˙plnÏ naho¯e), äÌ¯ka, V˝öka, 0 (Flags)
        SetWindowPos hwnd, 0, poziceX, 0, sirkaOkna, vyskaOkna, 0
    Next i
End Sub

--- KONEC K”DU [Gemini_3window_Helper] ---
